title: Gurih & Wangi! Resep NASI GORENG TERASI [Praktis 5 Menit Jadi]
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Goreng Terasi (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan:
350 gr nasi putih
12 siung bawang merah
3 siung bawang putih
9 buah cabai rawit merah
4 lembar daun jeruk
2 batang serai
5 pcs hati ampela kecap
6 gr terasi bubuk
¼ sdt kunyit bubuk (opsional)
½ sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdt gula pasir
1 buah jeruk limau (opsional)

Pelengkap:
telur mata sapi
emping
bawang merah goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Iris bawang merah, bawang putih, cabai rawit merah, daun jeruk, serai bagian putih dan hati ampela kecap
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit merah, serai dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi
3. Masukkan terasi bubuk dan kunyit bubuk, aduk rata lalu masukkan nasi, aduk rata
4. Masukkan hati ampela kecap, kaldu jamur dan gula pasir, masak hingga wangi kemudian tambahkan perasan jeruk limau, masak sesaat
5. Nasi goreng terasi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Terasi Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g white rice
12 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
9 pc red Thai chili
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 stalk lemongrass
5 pc Soy Liver and Gizzard
6 g shrimp paste powder
¼ tsp turmeric powder (optional)
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp sugar
1 pc kaffir lime (optional)

To Serve:
Fried egg
Emping
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. Slice the shallot, garlic, red Thai chili, kaffir lime leaf, white part of the lemongrass, and soy-braised chicken liver and gizzard.
2. Heat a little oil. Sauté the garlic, shallot, red Thai chili, lemongrass, and kaffir lime leaf until fragrant.
3. Add the shrimp paste powder and turmeric powder. Stir well, then add the rice and mix well.
4. Add the soy-braised chicken liver and gizzard, mushroom bouillon, and sugar. Cook until fragrant, then add the squeezed kaffir lime juice. Cook briefly.
5. Terasi Fried Rice is ready to be served.

title: Kuah Kental Berempah Khas RM Padang! Resep GULAI AYAM PADANG
recipe_id:
Resep Gulai Ayam (untuk 16 porsi)

Bahan:
2 kg ayam pejantan, buang kulit belah 4

Bahan bumbu halus:
120 gr cabai merah tanjung, buang biji
20 gr cabai rawit hijau
35 gr lengkuas
15 gr jahe
15 gr kunyit
15 biji petai kupas, belah dua
30 gr kemiri
60 gr bawang putih
75 gr bawang merah
150 gr minyak
200 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
2 sdm bumbu sari minang
5 butir asam kandis
4 batang serai
8 lembar daun salam
8 lembar daun jeruk
1 lembar daun kunyit
350 ml santan
1,2 liter air
1 ½ sdm garam
2 sdt penyedap
1 sdm gula pasir (opsional)

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
daun singkong rebus
timun
sambal hijau

Cara membuat:
1. Iris lengkuas dan jahe
2. Panaskan sebagian minyak, masukkan lengkuas, jahe, kemiri, kunyit, cabai merah tanjung, cabai rawit hijau dan petai, tumis hingga sedikit kecokelatan. Biarkan sesaat
3. Masukkan bumbu tumis ke dalam blender lalu masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, sisa minyak dan air, blender hingga benar-benar halus
4. Tumis bumbu halus lalu masukkan serai yang sudah digeprek, daun kunyit, daun salam, daun jeruk, bumbu sari minang dan asam kandis, tumis hingga wangi dan matang
5. Masukkan air, santan, garam, penyedap dan gula pasir, masak hingga mendidih
6. Masukkan ayam, aduk dan tutup. Masak selama 45-60 menit di api kecil
7. Gulai ayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Gulai Recipe (yield 16 servings)

Ingredients:
2 kg rooster, skin removed, cut into 4

Spice Paste:
120 g large red chili, seeds removed
20 g green Thai chili
35 g galangal
15 g ginger
15 g turmeric
15 pc stinky bean, peeled, halved
30 g candlenut
60 g garlic
75 g shallot
150 g oil
200 ml water

Other ingredients:
2 tbsp Sari Minang seasoning
5 pc asam kandis
4 stalk lemongrass
8 pc bay leaf
8 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc turmeric leaf
350 ml coconut milk
1.2 liter water
1½ tbsp salt
2 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar (optional)

To serve:
Steamed white rice
Boiled cassava leaf
Cucumber
Green chili sambal

Steps:
1. Slice galangal and ginger.
2. Heat some of the oil. Add galangal, ginger, candlenut, turmeric, large red chili, green Thai chili, and stinky beans. Sauté until lightly browned. Set aside to cool.
3. Transfer the sautéed spices to a blender. Add garlic, shallot, remaining oil, and water. Blend until very smooth.
4. Sauté the spice paste, then add bruised lemongrass, turmeric leaf, bay leaf, kaffir lime leaf, Sari Minang seasoning, and asam kandis. Cook until fragrant and fully cooked.
5. Add water, coconut milk, salt, MSG, and sugar. Cook until boiling.
6. Add chicken, stir, and cover. Cook for 45–60 minutes over low heat.
7. Chicken Gulai is ready to serve.

title: Kenyal, Juicy & Topping Serbaguna! Resep CHICKEN LUNCHEON / MEATLOAF / SPAM AYAM [Tips Stok Frozen]
recipe_id:
Resep Chicken Luncheon (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan minyak aromatik:
12 gr daun bawang cung bagian putih
30 gr minyak

Bahan chicken luncheon:
275 gr paha ayam filet
75 gr daging sapi cincang
100 gr kulit ayam
1 sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
2 sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt baking powder
2 sdt bawang putih bubuk
1 sdt angkak bubuk
100 gr es batu/air es
1 butir putih telur
1 ½ sdm kecap asin
25 gr tapioka/sang fen
2 sdm tepung roti putih

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
telur mata sapi

Cara membuat:
1. Didihkan air, rebus kulit beberapa saat, tiriskan
2. Iris-iris daun bawang cung bagian putih lalu tumis beberapa saat, sisihkan
3. Di dalam food processor, masukkan paha ayam filet, daging sapi giling, kulit rebus, garam, gula pasir, merica, kaldu jamur, kaldu ayam bubuk, baking powder, bawang putih bubuk, angkak bubuk dan es batu, haluskan hingga lengket
4. Masukkan minyak aromatik, putih telur, kecap asin, tapioka dan tepung roti, haluskan kembali
5. Siapkan loyang, alasi dengan baking paper. Tuang adonan ke dalam loyang, ratakan dan hentakkan ke meja. Tutup dengan aluminium foil
6. Kukus selama 40 menit di api sedang kecil. Diamkan hingga dingin lalu potong
7. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masak chicken luncheon hingga sedikit kecokelatan
8. Chicken luncheon siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Luncheon Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Scallion Oil ingredients:
12 g spring onion (white part)
30 g oil

Chicken Luncheon ingredients:
275 g chicken thigh fillet
75 g ground beef
100 g chicken skin
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tbsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp baking powder
2 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp red yeast rice powder
100 g ice cube/ice water
1 egg white
1½ tbsp soy sauce
25 g tapioca flour/potato starch
2 tbsp white breadcrumb

Serving:
Steamed white rice
Sunny-side-up egg

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Boil the skin briefly, then drain.
2. Slice the white part of the spring onions and sauté briefly, then set aside.
3. In a food processor, add chicken thigh fillet, ground beef, boiled skin, salt, sugar, pepper, mushroom bouillon, chicken powder, baking powder, garlic powder, red yeast rice powder, and ice. Blend until sticky.
4. Add the scallion oil, egg white, soy sauce, tapioca flour, and breadcrumb. Blend again until smooth.
5. Prepare a pan lined with baking paper. Pour the mixture into the pan, level it, and tap the pan on the counter. Cover with aluminum foil.
6. Steam for 40 minutes over medium-low heat. Let cool, then slice.
7. Heat a little oil and cook the Chicken Luncheon until lightly browned.
8. Chicken Luncheon is ready to serve.

title: MINYAK AYAM BAWANG HOMEMADE: Serbaguna Untuk Mie, Nasi & Sup! [Tahan Lama]
recipe_id:
Resep Minyak Ayam Bawang (untuk 350 ml)

Bahan:
100 gr kulit ayam
80 gr bawang merah
25 gr bawang putih
250 ml minyak

Cara membuat:
1. Didihkan air, rebus kulit ayam beberapa detik, tiriskan
2. Potong-potong bawang putih dan bawang merah
3. Di dalam blender, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kulit ayam dan sebagian minyak, blender hingga halus
4. Masak bumbu halus dan tuang sisa minyak, masak di api kecil hingga sedikit kecokelatan. Matikan api dan biarkan dingin
5. Minyak ayam bawang siap digunakan
recipe_en:
Aromatic Chicken Oil Recipe (yield 350 ml)

Ingredients:
100 g chicken skin
80 g shallot
25 g garlic
250 ml oil

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Boil the chicken skin for a few seconds. Set aside.
2. Slice the garlic and shallots.
3. In a blender, add garlic, shallots, chicken skin, and some of the oil. Blend until smooth.
4. Cook the oil mix and add the rest of the oil. Cook on low heat until browned. Turn the heat off and let cool.
5. Aromatic Chicken Oil is ready to use.

title: Lembut, Wangi & Istimewa! Resep BOLU BAKAR KEJU PREMIUM [Anti Gagal!]
recipe_id:
Resep Bolu Bakar Keju (untuk 12 porsi)

Ukuran loyang: 2 loyang ukuran 20 x 10 x 7cm

Bahan adonan roti:
255 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
110 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
110 gr gula pasir
10 gr ragi
65 gr air dingin
65 gr susu
15 gr kental manis putih
85 gr telur ayam, kocok
85 gr margarin
1 gr garam

Bahan buttercream:
200 gr mentega tawar
200 gr margarin
200 gr gula halus
1 butir telur
2 gr Blossom Paste Mentega & Susu
4 gr Blossom Paste Mentega dan Keju

Bahan olesan:
Blossom Paste Mentega dan Keju
margarin cair

Topping:
keju

Cara membuat:
1. Campurkan tepung terigu protein tinggi, protein sedang, gula pasir dan ragi, mixer di kecepatan rendah lalu masukkan air, susu, telur dan kental manis, mixer di kecepatan sedang selama 10 menit
2. Masukkan margarin dan garam, mixer di kecepatan tinggi beberapa saat lalu turunkan menjadi kecepatan sedang, mixer selama 10 menit atau hingga kalis. Diamkan adonan selama 30-40 menit
3. Untuk buttercream, bain marie telur hingga mencapai suhu 60 derajat celcius. Biarkan hingga suhu ruang
4. Kocok mentega tawar dengan margarin hingga sedikit mengembang lalu masukkan gula halus sambil disaring, mixer kembali
5. Masukkan telur, mixer hingga menyatu lalu masukkan Blossom Paste, mixer beberapa saat
6. Oles loyang dengan margarin lalu alasi dengan baking paper
7. Buang udara pada adonan roti lalu bagi menjadi dua. Pipihkan membentuk persegi panjang, tekan bagian bawah adonan lalu gulung
8. Letakkan di dalam loyang, tutup dengan cling wrap dan diamkan selama 30-40 menit
9. Jika loyang roti tidak ada tutup, alasi bagian atas roti dengan baking paper lalu loyang dan pemberat seperti ulekan. Panggang di suhu 175-180 derajat celcius selama 35 menit
10. Keluarkan roti dari loyang dan biarkan dingin
11. Campurkan mentega cair dengan Blossom Paste Mentega dan Keju, aduk rata
12. Belah dua roti lalu belah dua kembali tanpa memutus roti. Oles dengan buttercream dan tambahkan keju parut. Oles permukaan luar dengan margarin. Panggang dengan wajan hingga kecokelatan
13. Bolu bakar siap disajikan

Cek varian lain dari Blossom Paste di:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/blossompaste/
Website: https://blossompaste.com/
recipe_en:
Cheesy Bolu Bakar Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Pan size: 2 pans, sized 20 x 10 x 7cm

Bread dough ingredients:
255 g bread flour
110 g all-purpose flour
110 g sugar
10 g yeast
65 g cold water
65 g milk
15 g condensed milk
85 g egg, whisked
85 g margarine
1 g salt

Buttercream ingredients:
200 g unsalted butter
200 g margarine
200 g icing sugar
1 pc egg
2 g Blossom Paste Butter & Milk
4 g Blossom Paste Butter & Cheese

Glaze ingredients:
Blossom Paste Butter & Cheese
Melted margarine

Topping:
Cheese

Steps:
1. Mix bread flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, & yeast. Mixer at low speed, then add water, milk, egg, and condensed milk. Mixer at medium speed for 10 minutes.
2. Add margarine and salt. Mixer at high speed for a short time, then reduce to medium speed. Mixer for 10 minutes or until elastic. Let the dough rest for 30-40 minutes.
3. For the buttercream, bain marie the egg until 60°C. Let cool to room temperature.
4. Beat unsalted butter with margarine until slightly fluffy, then sift in icing sugar. Mixer again.
5. Add egg. Mixer until combined, then add Blossom Paste and mixer briefly.
6. Grease the pan with margarine, then line with baking paper.
7. Remove air from the dough, then divide into two. Flatten into a rectangular shape. Press the bottom of the dough then roll.
8. Place the dough in the pan. Cover with plastic wrap and let rest for 30-40 minutes.
9. If the pan has no lid, cover the top of the dough with baking paper. Then, place another pan and weights (such as pestles). Bake at 175–180°C for 35 minutes.
10. Remove the bread from the pan and let cool.
11. Mix melted margarine with Blossom Paste Butter & Cheese. Stir until combined.
12. Slice the bread in half, then slice it in half again without cutting through. Spread the buttercream & add grated cheese. Glaze the outside with the margarine mixture. Grill on a pan until golden brown.
13. Bolu Bakar is ready to serve.

title: Renyah, Wangi & Gurihnya Meresap! Resep SAYAP AYAM GORENG TERASI KHAS SINGAPURA
recipe_id:
Resep Sayap Ayam Goreng Terasi (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
500 gr sayap ayam, belah dua
2 siung bawang putih
8 gr terasi bakar
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt perasan lemon
1 sdt minyak wijen
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan pelapis basah:
60 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
30 gr tapioka
1 butir kuning telur
150 ml air
½ sdt baking powder

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam ulekan, masukkan bawang putih, terasi dan garam, ulek hingga halus
2. Marinasi ayam dengan bumbu halus, gula pasir, kaldu jamur, merica, perasan lemon, saus tiram dan minyak wijen, aduk rata dan diamkan minimal 1 jam
3. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan tepung terigu, tapioka, baking powder, kuning telur dan air, aduk rata
4. Celupkan ayam ke dalam tepung basah lalu goreng hingga matang dan kecokelatan, tiriskan
5. Sayap ayam goreng terasi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Prawn Paste Chicken Wings Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken wings, halved
2 clove garlic
8 g shrimp paste, roasted
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp lemon juice
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Batter ingredients:
60 g all-purpose flour
30 g tapioca flour
1 pc egg yolk
150 ml water
½ tsp baking powder

Steps:
1. In a mortar, add garlic, shrimp paste, and salt. Mash until smooth.
2. Marinate the chicken with the spices, sugar, mushroom bouillon, pepper, lemon juice, oyster sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well and marinate for 1 hour.
3. In a bowl, mix flour, tapioca, baking powder, egg yolk, and water.
4. Dip the chicken into the batter, then fry until cooked through and golden brown.
5. Prawn Paste Chicken Wings are ready to serve.

title: Praktis 1 Menu Untuk MPASI + Lauk Keluarga: Resep GADON SAPI [Lembut & Wangi!]
recipe_id:
Resep Gadon Sapi (5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr daging sapi iris
40 gr hati sapi rebus
2 butir telur
90 ml santan
60 ml air
1 ½ sdm maizena (opsional)
1 ½ sdt kaldu jamur
1 ½ sdm gula kelapa
1 ½ sdt garam

Bahan bumbu dasar:
2 sdm minyak kelapa
2 butir kemiri
6 siung bawang merah
4 siung bawang putih

Bahan lainnya:
serai
daun salam
bawang merah
cabai rawit merah
cabai rawit hijau
daun pisang untuk membungkus

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Iris bawang putih, bawang merah, geprek dan cincang kemiri
2. Panaskan minyak kelapa, tumis bawang merah hingga setengah kering kemudian masukkan bawang putih dan kemiri, tumis hingga kering, sisihkan
3. Di dalam food chopper, masukkan tumisan bumbu dasar, daging sapi iris, garam, gula kelapa, kaldu jamur dan hati sapi rebus, haluskan
4. Masukkan telur, santan, air dan maizena, haluskan kembali
5. Iris serai, bawang merah dan cabai rawit. Siapkan daun pisang, letakkan daun salam, serai dan adonan gadon, bungkus dan sematkan tusuk gigi
6. Siapkan wadah tahan panas, letakkan daun pisang sebagai alas. Susun daun salam, serai, bawang merah, cabai rawit dan adonan gadon lalu tutup dengan daun pisang. Kukus selama 25 menit
7. Gadon sapi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Beef Gadon Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g sliced beef
40 g beef liver, boiled
2 pc egg
90 ml coconut milk
60 ml water
1½  tbsp cornstarch (optional)
1½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1½ tbsp coconut sugar
1½ tsp salt

Spices:
2 tbsp coconut oil
2 pc candlenut
6 pc shallot
4 clove garlic

Other ingredients:
Lemongrass
Bay leaf
Shallot
Red Thai chili
Green Thai chili
Banana leaf for wrapping

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic and shallots. Pound and chop the candlenuts.
2. Heat coconut oil. Sauté the shallots until half-crisp, then add garlic and candlenuts. Sauté until crisp and set aside.
3. In a chopper, add the fried spices, beef, salt, coconut sugar, mushroom bouillon, and boiled beef liver. Blend.
4. Add eggs, coconut milk, water, and cornstarch. Blend again.
5. Slice the lemongrass, shallots, and Thai chili. Prepare banana leaves. Place the bay leaf, lemongrass, and Gadon mix. Wrap and secure with a toothpick.
6. Prepare a heatproof bowl. Place the banana leaves as the base. Arrange bay leaf, lemongrass, shallots, Thai chili, and the Gadon mix. Cover with a banana leaf. Steam for 25 minutes.
7. Beef Gadon is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Tanpa Cetakan & Kenyal! Resep BAKSO UNYIL / BAKSO MUTIARA [Anti Gagal]
recipe_id:
Resep Bakso Mutiara (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan aromatik:
2 sdm minyak
6 siung bawang merah
6 siung bawang putih

Bahan adonan bakso:
250 gr daging sapi has dalam (setengah beku)
250 gr dada ayam filet (setengah beku)
2 sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
2 sdt kaldu jamur
2 sdt baking powder
1-2 siung bawang putih
2 butir telur
2 sdt kecap manis
1 sdt dark soy sauce (opsional)
80 gr es batu
50 gr tapioka

Bahan kuah bakso:
1 liter air
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdm kaldu jamur
½ sdm garam
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm gula pasir
1 batang daun bawang, potong
1 batang seledri, potong
1 sdm minyak ayam bawang

Pelengkap:
sambal rawit
bawang merah goreng
jeruk nipis
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Iris bawang merah dan bawang putih. Panaskan minyak, goreng bawang merah beberapa saat kemudian masukkan bawang putih, masak di api sedang kecil hingga sedikit kering
2. Potong-potong daging sapi dan dada ayam filet
3. Di dalam food processor, masukkan daging sapi, dada ayam filet, garam, gula pasir, merica, kaldu jamur dan baking powder, haluskan hingga lengket
4. Masukkan tumisan aromatik, bawang putih cincang, telur, kecap manis, dark soy sauce dan es batu, haluskan hingga benar-benar halus kemudian masukkan tapioka, haluskan Kembali
5. Masukkan adonan bakso ke dalam kulkas selama 1-2 jam lalu masukkan ke dalam plastik segitiga
6. Siapkan air panas, basahi tangan dengan air dingin kemudian bentuk bakso, masak di api kecil hingga matang dan rendam dengan air es (air matang), tiriskan
7. Di dalam panci, masukkan air, kaldu ayam bubuk, kaldu jamur, garam, merica, gula pasir, daun bawang, seledri dan minyak bawang, masak hingga mendidih
8. Masukkan bakso, masak sesaat
9. Bakso mutiara siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Pearly Meatballs Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Aromatics:
2 tbsp oil
6 pc shallot
6 clove garlic

Meatball Dough ingredients:
250 g beef tenderloin (half frozen)
250 g chicken breast filet (half frozen)
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp baking powder
1-2 clove garlic
2 pc egg
2 tsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp dark soy sauce (optional)
80 g ice cube
50 g tapioca

Meatball Broth ingredients:
1 liter water
1 tbsp chicken powder
1/2 tbsp mushroom bouillon
1/2 tbsp salt
1/4 tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
1 stalk green onion, sliced
1 stalk celery, sliced
1 tbsp aromatic chicken oil

Sides:
Thai chili sambal
Fried shallot
Lime
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots and garlic. Heat oil. Fry the shallots for a few moments then add garlic. Cook over low-medium heat until slightly crisp.
2. Slice the beef and chicken breast fillet.
3. In a food processor, add beef, chicken breast fillet, salt, sugar, pepper, mushroom bouillon, and baking powder. Blend until sticky.
4. Add the fried aromatics, chopped garlic, eggs, sweet soy sauce, dark soy sauce, and ice cubes. Blend until completely smooth, then add tapioca and blend again.
5. Chill the meatball dough in the fridge for 1-2 hours, then put into a piping bag.
6. Prepare hot water. Wet hands with cold water. Shape the meatballs, then cook over low heat until done. Then, soak them in cold drinking water and set aside.
7. In a pot, add water, chicken powder, mushroom bouillon, salt, pepper, sugar, green onions, celery, and aromatic chicken oil. Bring to a boil.
8. Add the meatballs and cook briefly.
9. Pearly Meatballs are ready to serve.

title: Tips Dada Ayam Ekstra Lembut! Resep AYAM IRIS REBUS CHILI OIL
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Iris Rebus (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
300 gr dada ayam filet
1 sdm maizena
1 sdm putih telur
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt garam

Bahan chili oil:
2 sdm minyak
5 siung bawang putih
1 batang daun bawang
3 buah cabai rawit merah
1 ½ sdm cabai bubuk kasar
2 sdt kecap asin
2 sdt saus tiram
1 sdt gula pasir
25 ml air
½ sdt minyak wijen
1 iris jeruk nipis

Bahan lainnya:
jahe

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Iris-iris tipis dada ayam lalu marinasi dengan putih telur, maizena, garam, merica, gula pasir dan kaldu ayam bubuk, aduk rata
2. Iris daun bawang dan cabai rawit merah
3. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih cincang, tumis di api sedang hingga sedikit kekuningan lalu masukkan cabai bubuk kasar, cabai rawit merah dan daun bawang, tumis hingga wangi
4. Masukkan kecap asin, saus tiram, gula pasir dan air, masak sesaat lalu matikan api dan tambahkan minyak wijen, aduk rata
5. Didihkan air, masukkan irisan jahe dan ayam yang sudah dimarinasi, rebus selama 1-2 menit, tiriskan
6. Ayam iris rebus chili oil siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chili Oil Boiled Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Chicken Marinade:
300 g chicken breast fillet
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp egg white
1 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp salt

Chili Oil:
2 tbsp oil
1 clove garlic
1 stalk green onion
3 pc red Thai chili
1½ tbsp coarse chili flakes
2 tsp soy sauce
2 tsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sugar
25 ml water
1/2 tsp sesame oil
1 slice lime

Others:
Ginger

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken breast thinly, then marinate with egg white, cornstarch, salt, pepper, sugar, and chicken powder. Mix well.
2. Slice the green onion and red Thai chili.
3. Heat oil. Add chopped garlic. Sauté over medium heat until slightly yellow, then add coarse chili flakes, red Thai chili, and green onion. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and water. Cook briefly, then turn off heat and add sesame oil. Mix well.
5. Bring water to a boil, add sliced ginger and marinated chicken. Boil for 1-2 minutes, then drain.
6. Chili Oil Boiled Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Manis! Resep TAHU TELUR KRISPI / STEAK TAHU [Anti Gagal]
recipe_id:
Resep Tahu Telur Krispi Saus Gurih Manis (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan:
3 butir telur
2 buah tahu kuning
¼ sdt garam
1/8 sdt merica
minyak untuk menggoreng

Bahan pelapis basah:
3 sdm tepung bumbu serbaguna
3 sdm air

Bahan pelapis kering:
tepung bumbu serbaguna

Bahan saus gurih manis:
1 sdm margarin
3 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm saus tomat
1 sdt kecap inggris
½ sdm kecap manis
80 ml air

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan tahu, garam, merica dan telur, aduk sambil hancurkan tahu
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tuang adonan tahu telur dan bentuk kotak atau sesuai selera, masak hingga matang, sisihkan
3. Campurkan tepung bumbu serbaguna dengan air, aduk rata
4. Balurkan tahu telur ke dalam tepung kering, tepung basah lalu ke dalam tepung kering. Goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
5. Geprek bawang putih dan iris bawang bombai
6. Panaskan wajan, masukkan margarin dan bawang putih, tumis sesaat lalu masukkan bawang bombai, tumis hingga wangi
7. Masukkan saus tiram, saus sambal, saus tomat, kecap manis, kecap inggris dan air, masak sesaat
8. Tahu telur krispi saus gurih manis siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Crispy Tofu Omelet with Sweet & Savory Sauce Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
2 pc yellow tofu
1/4 tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
Oil for frying

Batter:
3 tbsp seasoned flour
3 tbsp water

Dry Coat:
Seasoned flour

Sweet & Savory Sauce:
1 tbsp margarine
3 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp ketchup
1 tsp Worcestershire sauce
1/2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
80 ml water

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. In a bowl, add tofu, salt, pepper, and egg. Stir while mashing the tofu.
2. Heat a little oil. Pour in the tofu-egg mixture and shape into a square or as desired. Cook until done and set aside.
3. Mix the seasoned flour with water. Stir until combined.
4. Coat the Tofu Omelet in flour, batter, then flour again. Fry until golden, drain.
5. Pound the garlic and slice the onion.
6. Heat a pan. Add margarine and garlic. Stir-fry briefly, then add onion and stir-fry until fragrant.
7. Add oyster sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, sweet soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and water. Cook briefly.
8. Crispy Tofu Omelet with Sweet & Savory Sauce is ready to serve.

title: Resep TEPUNG BUMBU SERBAGUNA HOMEMADE: Dijamin Krispi, Gurih & Tahan Lama!
recipe_id:
Resep Tepung Bumbu Serbaguna Homemade (untuk 300 gram)

Bahan:
200 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
50 gr tapioka/maizena
1 sdt paprika bubuk (opsional)
½ sdt kunyit bubuk (opsional)
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
1 sdm bawang putih goreng
14 lembar daun seledri
½ sdm oregano kering
1 sdt baking powder
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdm garam
1 sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir

Cara membuat:
1. Sangrai seledri di api sedang kecil hingga kering lalu masukkan ke dalam blender
2. Masukkan bawang putih goreng, bawang merah goreng, oregano kering, kunyit bubuk, paprika bubuk, garam, gula pasir, merica, kaldu ayam bubuk, baking powder dan sebagian tepung tapioka, blender hingga halus
3. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk lalu tambahkan sisa tapioka dan tepung terigu, aduk rata
4. Tepung bumbu serbaguna homemade siap digunakan
recipe_en:
Homemade Seasoned Flour Recipe (for 300 g)

Ingredients:
200 g all-purpose flour
50 g tapioca/cornstarch
1 tsp paprika powder (optional)
1/2 tsp turmeric powder (optional)
1 tbsp fried shallot
1 tbsp fried garlic
14 leaf celery
1/2 tbsp dried oregano
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp chicken powder
1/2 tbsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Toast the celery on medium-low heat until dry, then add to a blender.
2. Add fried garlic, fried shallot, dried oregano, turmeric powder, paprika powder, salt, sugar, pepper, chicken powder, baking powder, and some of the tapioca flour. Blend until smooth.
3. Transfer to a bowl, then add the remaining tapioca flour and all-purpose flour. Mix well.
4. Homemade Seasoned Flour is ready to use.

title: MINYAK BAWANG Serbaguna & Tinggal Aduk! Resep NASI WANGI FISH & CHICKEN NUGGET [Cocok Untuk Bekal]
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Wangi Fish & Chicken Nugget (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan minyak bawang:
10 siung bawang merah
1 batang daun bawang
2 sdm minyak
1 sdm margarin
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdt gula pasir (opsional)
merica (opsional)

Bahan lainnya:
CEDEA Fish & Chicken Nugget Original
nasi putih
minyak untuk menggoreng

Cara membuat:
1. Iris bawang merah dan daun bawang
2. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang merah, tumis hingga sedikit kering
3. Masukkan daun bawang, margarin, saus tiram, kaldu jamur dan gula pasir, masak di api sedang kecil hingga sedikit kering, sisihkan
4. Panaskan minyak, goreng CEDEA Fish & Chicken Nugget Original hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
5. Siapkan nasi dan tuang minyak bawang, aduk hingga rata
6. Nasi wangi fish & chicken nugget siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Fragrant Rice with Fish & Chicken Nuggets Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Shallot Oil ingredients:
10 pc shallot
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp oil
1 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1/2 tsp sugar (optional)
Pepper (optional)

Other ingredients:
CEDEA Original Fish & Chicken Nugget
Rice
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots and green onions.
2. Heat oil. Add shallot and sauté until slightly crisp.
3. Add green onions, margarine, oyster sauce, mushroom bouillon, and sugar. Cook on medium-low heat until slightly crisp. Set aside.
4. Heat oil. Fry CEDEA Original Fish & Chicken Nugget until golden. Set aside.
5. Prepare the rice. Pour the shallot oil over it and stir until evenly mixed.
6. Fragrant Rice with Fish & Chicken Nuggets is ready to serve.

title: Resep DORI KRISPI SAUS CREAMY: Garing & Gurih di Luar, Lembut di Dalam!
recipe_id:
Resep Dori Krispi Saus Creamy (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
150 gr ikan dori filet
5 sdm tepung bumbu serbaguna
3 sdm air
1 batang daun bawang (opsional)

Bahan garlic butter rice:
250 gr nasi putih
70 gr wortel rebus, potong kotak (opsional)
1 sdm margarin
2 siung bawang putih, cincang
1 butir telur
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
½ sdm kecap asin

Bahan creamy sauce:
1 sdm margarin
1 ½ sdm tepung bumbu serbaguna
100 ml air
100 ml susu
¼ sdt gula pasir

Bahan lainnya:
mozzarella parut
tepung bumbu serbaguna
minyak untuk menggoreng

Cara membuat:
1. Panaskan wajan, masukkan margarin dan tepung bumbu serbaguna, masak sesaat lalu tambahkan air dan susu, masak sesaat
2. Tambahkan gula pasir, aduk rata
3. Potong miring ikan dori. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung bumbu serbaguna dengan air, aduk rata kemudian masukkan ikan dori dan daun bawang iris, aduk rata
4. Balurkan ikan dori ke dalam tepung bumbu serbaguna lalu goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
5. Panaskan wajan, masukkan margarin dan bawang putih cincang, tumis hingga wangi lalu masukkan telur, aduk rata
6. Masukkan nasi dan wortel, aduk kemudian masukkan kaldu ayam bubuk, merica dan kecap asin, masak sesaat
7. Siapkan piring saji, tuang garlic butter rice, ikan dori krispi, creamy sauce dan keju mozzarella lalu torch
8. Dori krispi saus creamy siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Crispy Dory with Creamy Sauce Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g dory fillet
5 tbsp seasoned flour
3 tbsp water
1 stalk green onion (optional)

Garlic Butter Rice ingredients:
250 g white rice
70 g boiled carrot, diced (optional)
1 tbsp margarine
2 clove garlic, minced
1 pc egg
½ tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tbsp soy sauce

Creamy sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp margarine
1½ tbsp seasoned flour
100 ml water
100 ml milk
¼ tsp sugar

Other ingredients:
Grated mozzarella
Seasoned flour
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Heat a pan. Add margarine and seasoned flour. Cook briefly, then add water and milk. Cook briefly.
2. Add sugar, stir well.
3. Slice the dory diagonally. In a bowl, mix seasoned flour with water. Stir well, then add dory and sliced green onions. Mix well.
4. Coat the dory with seasoned flour, then fry until golden brown. Drain.
5. Heat a pan. Add margarine and minced garlic. Sauté until fragrant, then add egg. Stir well.
6. Add rice and carrot. Stir, then add chicken powder, pepper, and soy sauce. Cook briefly.
7. Prepare a serving plate. Place the Garlic Butter Rice, Crispy Dory,  and Creamy Sauce. Add mozzarella, then torch.
8. Crispy Dory with Creamy Sauce is ready to serve.

title: Resep NASI GURIH AYAM PEDAS RICE COOKER: Bumbunya Meresap, Gurih & Wangi! [Bisa Jadi Nasi Bakar]
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Gurih Ayam Pedas Rice Cooker (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan nasi gurih:
300 gr beras
400 ml air
3 cm lengkuas
2 lembar daun salam
1 batang serai
2 lembar daun pandan
8 buah cabai rawit merah
8 buah cabai rawit hijau
1 sdm margarin
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan ayam:
250 gr paha ayam filet
½ buah jeruk nipis
2 sdt maizena
2 sdm santan
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir

Bahan sambal:
3 sdm minyak
12 buah cabai merah keriting
2 buah cabai rawit merah (opsional)
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
5 lembar daun jeruk
2 gr terasi bakar

Bahan lainnya:
daun pisang
kemangi

Cara membuat:
1. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit merah, cabai merah keriting, daun jeruk dan terasi, masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan. Diamkan beberapa saat kemudian masukkan ke dalam food chopper, haluskan
2. Iris memanjang paha ayam filet kemudian marinasi dengan garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, gula pasir, perasan jeruk nipis, maizena, santan dan sambal, aduk rata
3. Di dalam rice cooker, masukkan beras, air, garam dan kaldu ayam bubuk, aduk rata kemudian masukkan lengkuas yang sudah digeprek, serai yang sudah digeprek, daun salam, daun pandan, cabai rawit merah, cabai rawit hijau, ayam yang sudah dimarinasi dan margarin, masak hingga matang
4. Untuk nasi bakar, siapkan daun pisang lalu letakkan daun kemangi, nasi dan ayam, bungkus dan sematkan tusuk gigi. Bakar hingga kecokelatan
5. Nasi gurih ayam pedas rice cooker siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Savory Chicken Rice Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Savory Rice ingredients:
300 g rice
400 ml water
3 cm galangal
2 pc bay leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc pandan leaf
8 pc red Thai chili
8 pc green Thai chili
1 tbsp margarine
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder

Chicken ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh fillet
½ pc lime
2 tsp cornstarch
2 tbsp coconut milk
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar

Sambal ingredients:
3 tbsp oil
12 pc red curly chili
2 pc red Thai chili (optional)
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 g roasted shrimp paste

Other ingredients:
Banana leaf
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. Heat oil. Add garlic, shallot, red Thai chili, red curly chili, kaffir lime leaf, and shrimp paste. Cook until slightly brown. Let cool for a moment, then put in a chopper and blend until smooth.
2. Slice chicken thigh fillet lengthwise, then marinate with salt, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, lime juice, cornstarch, coconut milk, and Sambal. Mix well.
3. In a rice cooker, add rice, water, salt, and chicken powder. Mix well, then add galangal and lemongrass (pounded), bay leaf, pandan leaf, red Thai chili, green Thai chili, marinated chicken, and margarine. Cook until done.
4. For Grilled Rice, prepare banana leaf. Place the lemon basil, rice, and chicken. Wrap and secure with a toothpick. Grill until browned.
5. Spicy Savory Chicken Rice is ready to serve.

title: Saus Siramannya Spesial! Resep TAHU KUKUS AYAM GILING [Anti Gagal]
recipe_id:
Resep Tahu Kukus Ayam Giling (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr tahu sutera kotak
1 jempol jahe (opsional)
minyak wijen (opsional)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
300 gr paha ayam giling
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm tapioka
1 butir putih telur
2 siung bawang putih
¾ sdt garam
½ sdt penyedap
½ sdm gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan saus siraman:
2 sdm kecap asin
1 batang daun bawang
120 ml air
½ sdm gula pasir
1 sdm minyak

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan paha ayam giling, garam, merica, penyedap, gula pasir, saus tiram, putih telur, tapioka dan bawang putih parut, aduk hingga lengket. Diamkan selama 15 menit
2. Belah dua tahu, susun di dalam wadah tahan panas kemudian letakkan ayam yang sudah dimarinasi dan irisan jahe. Kukus selama 12-15 menit
3. Iris daun bawang lalu tumis dengan sedikit minyak hingga wangi dan sedikit kering. Masukkan air, kecap asin dan gula pasir, masak sesaat
4. Siram tahu kukus dengan saus siraman dan minyak wijen
5. Tahu kukus ayam giling siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Steamed Tofu with Minced Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g silken tofu block
1 thumb ginger (optional)
Sesame oil (optional)

Chicken marinade ingredients:
300 g minced chicken thigh
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp tapioca flour
1 pc egg white
2 clove garlic
3/4 tsp salt
1/2 tsp MSG
1/2 tbsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 stalk green onion
120 ml water
1/2 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp oil

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine minced chicken thigh, salt, pepper, MSG, sugar, oyster sauce, egg white, tapioca flour, and grated garlic. Mix until sticky. Let it rest for 15 minutes.
2. Cut the tofu in half and arrange it in a heatproof container, then add the marinated chicken and ginger slices. Steam for 12–15 minutes.
3. Slice the green onions, then stir-fry with a bit of oil until fragrant and slightly crisp. Add water, soy sauce, and sugar, then cook briefly.
4. Pour the sauce and sesame oil over the steamed tofu.
5. Steamed Tofu with Minced Chicken is ready to serve.

title: 100% Empuk & Bumbu Meresap! Resep SEMUR DAGING SAPI PANGGANG [Tips Simpan Frozen]
recipe_id:
Resep Semur Panggang (untuk 10-12 porsi)

Bahan:
2 kg daging sapi brisket
700 ml air
½ sdm garam
2 sdt kaldu jamur
2 sdm saus tiram
3 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm gula kelapa
2 lembar bay leaf
4 butir cengkih

Bahan bumbu halus:
3 buah tomat merah
8 siung bawang merah
7 siung bawang putih
1 buah pala
3 cm jahe
3 butir kemiri
½ sdt lada putih butir
30 ml minyak

Bahan semur panggang:
1 buah bawang bombai
1 sdm mentega tawar
1 sdm madu
1 sdm kecap manis

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
bawang merah goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Didihkan air kemudian rebus daging selama 15 menit
2. Potong pala, geprek kemiri dan iris jahe. Di dalam blender, masukkan tomat merah yang dibelah dua, pala, jahe, kemiri, bawang merah, bawang putih, lada putih butir dan minyak, haluskan
3. Tiriskan daging lalu potong memanjang memutus serat
4. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bay leaf dan cengkih, tumis hingga mengeluarkan minyak
5. Masukkan daging, air, saus tiram, kecap manis, kaldu jamur dan garam. Presto selama 20 menit
6. Masukkan gula kelapa, masak hingga sedikit menyusut
7. Iris bawang bombai kemudian panaskan wajan, masukkan mentega, bawang bombai, daging dan sedikit kuah, masak hingga menyusut lalu masukkan madu dan kecap manis, masak sesaat
8. Semur panggang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Grilled Braised Beef Recipe (yield 10-12 servings)

Ingredients:
2 kg beef brisket
700 ml water
1/2 tbsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp coconut sugar
2 pc bay leaf
4 pc clove

Spices:
3 pc red tomato
8 pc shallot
7 clove garlic
1 pc nutmeg
3 cm ginger
3 pc candlenut
1/2 tsp white peppercorn
30 ml oil

Grilled Braised Beef:
1 pc onion
1 tbsp unsalted butter
1 tbsp honey
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce

Sides:
White rice
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. Boil water then cook the beef for 15 minutes.
2. Pound the nutmeg and candlenuts. Slice the ginger. In a blender, add halved red tomato, nutmeg, ginger, candlenut, shallot, garlic, white peppercorn, and oil. Blend until smooth.
3. Set the beef aside and slice against the grain.
4. Sauté the blended spice until fragrant, then add bay leaf and clove. Sauté until oily.
5. Add the beef, water, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, mushroom bouillon, and salt. Pressure cook for 20 minutes.
6. Add coconut sugar. Cook until slightly reduced.
7. Slice the onion. Heat the pan. Add butter, onion, beef, and a bit of broth. Cook until reduced, then add honey and sweet soy sauce. Cook briefly.
8. Grilled Braised Beef is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Pedas Manis! Resep AYAM SAUS SINGAPORE [Dijamin Nambah Nasi!]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Saus Singapore (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
350 gr paha ayam filet
½ buah jeruk nipis
1 sdm bumbu marinasi instan
2 sdm tapioca

Bahan bumbu halus:
4 cm jahe
4 cm lengkuas
3 buah cabai merah tanjung
3 buah cabai rawit merah
5 siung bawang putih
7 siung bawang merah
1 sdm tauco/1 sdt terasi
80 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
100 ml minyak
½ buah bawang bombai
1 batang daun bawang
500 ml air
1 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm saus tomat
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica
1 sdm tapioka + 2 sdm air
1 butir telur

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
mantau

Cara membuat:
1. Potong ayam kemudian marinasi dengan perasan jeruk nipis, bumbu marinasi instan dan tapioka, aduk rata
2. Potong jahe, lengkuas dan cabai merah tanjung. Di dalam blender, masukkan jahe, lengkuas, cabai merah tanjung, cabai rawit merah, bawang merah, bawang putih, tauco dan air, haluskan
3. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
4. Sisihkan sebagian minyak, tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi dan kering
5. Iris bawang bombai dan daun bawang kemudian masukkan ke dalam tumisan, tumis sesaat
6. Masukkan ayam, air, saus sambal, saus tomat, saus tiram, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica dan gula pasir, masak di api kecil hingga meresap
7. Panaskan minyak, goreng mantau hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
8. Campurkan tapioka dengan sedikit air kemudian masukkan ke dalam tumisan
9. Kocok telur dan masukkan ke dalam tumisan, masak sesaat
10. Ayam saus singapore siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Singapore Chili Chicken Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
½ pc lime
1 tbsp instant marinade
2 tbsp tapioca flour

Spices:
4 cm ginger
4 cm galangal
3 pc large red chili
3 pc red Thai chili
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 tbsp soybean paste / 1 tsp shrimp paste
80 ml water

Other ingredients:
100 ml oil
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion
500 ml water
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tbsp tapioca flour + 2 tbsp water
1 pc egg

Sides:
White rice
Mantou

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken, then marinate with lime juice, instant marinade, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
2. Slice the ginger, galangal, and large red chili. In a blender, add ginger, galangal, large red chili, red Thai chili, shallot, garlic, soybean paste, and water. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat oil and fry the chicken until browned. Drain.
4. Set aside some oil to sauté the blended spice until fragrant.
5. Slice the onion and green onions, then add into the pan. Stir briefly.
6. Add chicken, water, chili sauce, ketchup, oyster sauce, chicken powder, pepper, and sugar. Cook on low heat until absorbed.
7. Heat oil and fry the mantou until golden brown. Set aside.
8. Mix tapioca flour with a little water, then add into the pan.
9. Beat the egg and add it into the pan. Cook briefly.
10. Singapore Chili Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Istimewa! Resep CREAMY BEEF TRUFFLE RISOL [Sausnya Spesial!]
recipe_id:
Resep Creamy Beef Truffle Risol (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan kulit:
180 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
2 sdm maizena
300 ml air
100 ml susu
1 sdt garam
1 butir telur
1 sdm mentega tawar, lelehkan

Bahan roux:
35 gr mentega tawar
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang

Bahan isian creamy beef truffle:
25 gr mentega tawar
75 gr bawang bombai
3 siung bawang putih
275 gr daging sapi giling
120 gr jamur kancing putih
½ sdt thyme kering (opsional)
½ sdm mustard (opsional)
150 ml air
300 ml susu
½ sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
½ sdm truffle oil

Bahan saus truffle:
¼ buah bawang bombai
2 siung bawang putih
80 gr jamur kancing putih
2 sdm mentega tawar
¼ sdt thyme kering (opsional)
1 lembar bay leaf (opsional)
1 ½ sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
300 ml susu
100 ml cream
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdt gula pasir
1 ½ sdm truffle oil

Bahan lainnya:
mozzarella

Bahan pelapis basah:
75 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1 butir telur
120 ml air

Bahan pelapis kering:
tepung roti putih

Cara membuat:
1. Untuk isian, cincang bawang bombai dan jamur kancing putih
2. Untuk roux, panaskan mentega dan tepung terigu, masak hingga wangi, sisihkan
3. Panaskan mentega, masukkan bawang bombai dan bawang putih cincang, masak hingga wangi
4. Masukkan daging sapi giling, masak di api besar hingga wangi kemudian masukkan jamur, thyme, mustard, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir dan merica, masak sesaat
5. Masukkan air, masak hingga menyusut lalu masukkan susu dan roux, masak hingga menyusut. Matikan api dan masukkan truffle oil, aduk rata. Dinginkan
6. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan tepung terigu, maizena, garam, telur, susu dan air secara perlahan sambil diaduk kemudian masukkan mentega yang sudah dilelehkan, aduk rata dan saring
7. Panaskan wajan terbalik kemudian celupkan beberapa detik ke dalam adonan, masak beberapa saat dan lepaskan dari cetakan
8. Untuk saus, potong bawang bombai dan jamur lalu masukkan bawang bombai, bawang putih dan jamur ke dalam food chopper, haluskan
9. Panaskan mentega, masukkan jamur, bay leaf dan thyme kering, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan tepung terigu, masak sesaat
10. Masukkan susu sambil diaduk, cream, garam, gula pasir dan kaldu jamur, masak sesaat. Matikan api dan masukkan truffle oil, aduk rata
11. Siapkan kulit risol, letakkan isian, ratakan sedikit dan letakkan keju mozzarella, gulung perlahan
12. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan tepung terigu, telur dan air secara perlahan, aduk rata
13. Celupkan risol ke dalam tepung basah lalu tepung roti
14. Panaskan minyak, goreng risol hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan
15. Creamy beef truffle risol siap disajikan

title: Gurih Wangi! Resep NASI GORENG KORNET [Praktis 6 Menit]
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Goreng Kornet (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
400 gr nasi
100 gr kornet sapi
5 siung bawang merah
3 siung bawang putih
4 buah cabai rawit merah
3 buah cabai merah keriting
1 batang daun bawang
1 sdm margarin
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm saus tiram
1-2 sdm minyak
2 butir telur
½ sdm gula pasir
½ sdt penyedap

Pelengkap:
timun
tomat
kerupuk
bawang merah goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Cincang bawang putih, iris besar bawang merah, cabai merah keriting, cabai rawit merah dan daun bawang
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan bawang putih, tumis sesaat hingga wangi kemudian masukkan kornet dan margarin, masak hingga kornet menjadi sedikit kering
3. Masukkan bawang merah, cabai rawit, cabai merah keriting dan daun bawang bagian putih, masak hingga kering dan sisihkan ke pinggir wajan
4. Masukkan telur, aduk lalu masukkan nasi, saus tiram, kecap asin, gula pasir, penyedap dan sisa daun bawang, masak sesaat di api besar
5. Nasi goreng kornet siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Corned Beef Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g rice
100 g corned beef
5 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
4 pc red Thai chili
3 pc red curly chili
1 stalk green onion
1 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1-2 tbsp oil
2 pc egg
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp MSG

Sides:
Cucumber
Tomato
Cracker
Dried shallot

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic. Slice the shallot, red curly chili, red Thai chili, and green onions.
2. Heat a bit of oil. Add the garlic and sauté briefly until fragrant. Then, add the corned beef and margarine. Cook until the corned beef is slightly crisp.
3. Add the shallots, red Thai chili, red curly chili, and the white part of the green onions. Cook until crisp, then move to the side of the pan.
4. Add the eggs. Stir, then add the rice, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, MSG, and the remaining green onions. Cook briefly over high heat.
5. Corned Beef Fried Rice is ready to serve.

title: Manis, Gurih & Ekonomis! Resep EMPAL / GEPUK AYAM [Lengkap Dengan Sambal Terasi]
recipe_id:
Resep Empal Ayam (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg dada ayam filet
1 sdt asam jawa
65 ml santan
4 sdm gula merah
1 sdm kecap manis
2 sdm minyak
700 ml air
2 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt penyedap
1 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica

Bahan aromatik:
12 siung bawang merah
2 lembar daun salam
3 lembar daun jeruk
1 batang serai

Bahan bumbu halus:
8-10 siung bawang putih
5 butir kemiri
3 cm jahe
8 cm lengkuas
1 sdm ketumbar
50 ml air
50 ml minyak

Bahan sambal:
45 gr cabai rawit hijau
5 buah cabai rawit merah
8 siung bawang merah
1 buah tomat merah
4 gr terasi, bakar
1-2 buah jeruk limau
½ sdt garam
1/3 sdt penyedap
2 sdt gula pasir

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
timun
kemangi

Cara membuat:
1. Potong dada ayam filet lalu tusuk dengan tusuk sate yang sudah dibagi menjadi 2
2. Geprek kemiri, belah dua bawang putih, iris lengkuas dan jahe kemudian masukkan ke dalam blender beserta ketumbar, minyak dan air, blender hingga halus
3. Iris bawang merah dan geprek serai
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang merah hingga kering kemudian masukkan daun jeruk, serai dan daun salam, tumis hingga wangi
5. Masukkan bumbu halus, tumis hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak kemudian tambahkan air, santan, gula merah, kecap manis, asam jawa, garam, merica, kaldu ayam bubuk , penyedap dan gula pasir, aduk rata
6. Masukkan ayam, masak selama 15 menit, tiriskan kemudian geprek sedikit ayam dengan ulekan dan masak kembali hingga menyusut di api sedang kecil, tiriskan
7. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
8. Saring sedikit minyak bekas goreng ayam kemudian masukkan bawang merah, cabai rawit merah yang dibelah dua, cabai rawit hijau dan terasi, masak sesaat
9. Potong tomat dan masukkan ke dalam wajan, masak hingga layu dan kecokelatan. Pindahkan ke dalam ulekan lalu tambahkan garam, penyedap dan gula pasir, ulek hingga halus dan tambahkan perasan jeruk limau, aduk rata
10. Untuk empal suwir, hancurkan ayam dan masak di api kecil hingga kering
11. Empal ayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Empal Ayam Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg chicken breast fillet
1 tsp tamarind
65 ml coconut milk
4 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp oil
700 ml water
2 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper

Aromatic ingredients:
12 pc shallot
2 pc bay leaf
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 stalk lemongrass

Spices:
8-10 clove garlic
5 pc candlenut
3 cm ginger
8 cm galangal
1 tbsp coriander
50 ml water
50 ml oil

Sambal ingredients:
45 g green Thai chili
5 pc red Thai chili
8 pc shallot
1 pc red tomato
4 g shrimp paste, roasted
1-2 pc lime
1/2 tsp salt
1/3 tsp MSG
2 tsp sugar

To serve:
White rice
Cucumber
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken breast fillet, then skewer with small skewers.
2. Pound the candlenut. Halve the garlic. Slice the galangal and ginger, then put them into a blender with coriander, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
3. Slice the shallots and pound the lemongrass.
4. Heat a little oil. Fry the shallots until crisp, then add kaffir lime leaf, lemongrass, and bay leaf. Stir-fry until fragrant.
5. Add the blended spices. Sauté until fragrant and oily, then add water, coconut milk, palm sugar, sweet soy sauce, tamarind, salt, pepper, chicken powder, MSG, and sugar. Stir well.
6. Add the chicken. Cook for 15 minutes. Set aside, then lightly pound chicken with a pestle. Cook again on medium-low heat until reduced. Set aside.
7. Heat oil. Fry the chicken until browned and set aside.
8. Strain a little leftover frying oil, then add shallot, halved red Thai chili, green Thai chili, and shrimp paste. Cook briefly.
9. Slice the tomato and add to the pan. Cook until wilted and browned. Transfer to a mortar, then add salt, MSG, and sugar. Grind until smooth, then add lime juice and mix well.
10. For shredded Empal, shred the chicken and cook on low heat until browned.
11. Empal Ayam is ready to serve.

title: Renyah Gurih! Resep KEMBANG KOL KRISPI PEDAS MANIS
recipe_id:
Resep Kembang Kol Krispi Pedas Manis (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr kembang kol
700 ml air
1 sdm garam

Bahan adonan basah:
80 gr tepung bumbu serbaguna
½ sdt paprika bubuk (opsional)
½ sdt oregano kering (opsional)
1 butir telur
50 ml air

Bahan saus:
3 sdm mentega tawar/margarin
3 sdm saus sambal
3 sdm sambal bangkok
2 siung bawang putih
1-2 sdt perasan lemon
1 sdt gula pasir

Bahan cocolan:
3 sdm plain yogurt
50 gr mayones
1-2 sdt perasan lemon (opsional)
¼ sdt parsley kering
1 sdm bawang bombai cincang
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt gula pasir
1 sdm air

Pelapis:
tepung roti putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong kembang kol kemudian rendam dengan air dan garam. Rendam selama 10-15 menit, tiriskan
2. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan telur, air, tepung bumbu serbaguna, oregano kering dan paprika bubuk, aduk rata kemudian masukkan kembang kol, aduk rata
3. Balurkan kembang kol ke dalam tepung roti lalu susun sebagian kembang kol ke dalam air fryer dan oles dengan minyak. Panggang di suhu 180 derajat celcius selama 15-18 menit
4. Panaskan minyak, goreng sisa kembang kol hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
5. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan mayones, plain yogurt, garam, gula pasir, bawang bombai cincang, parsley kering dan perasan lemon, aduk rata lalu tambahkan air, aduk rata
6. Panaskan wajan, masukkan margarin, bawang putih yang dicincang, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan saus sambal, sambal bangkok, perasan lemon dan gula pasir, masak sesaat
7. Masukkan kembang kol ke dalam wajan, masak hingga merata
8. Kembang kol krispi pedas manis siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Sweet & Spicy Crispy Cauliflower Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g cauliflower
700 ml water
1 tbsp salt

Batter ingredients:
80 g seasoned flour
1/2 tsp paprika powder (optional)
1/2 tsp dried oregano (optional)
1 pc egg
50 ml water

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp unsalted butter/margarine
3 tbsp chili sauce
3 tbsp Bangkok sambal
2 clove garlic
1-2 tsp lemon juice
1 tsp sugar

Dip ingredients:
3 tbsp plain yogurt
50 g mayonnaise
1-2 tsp lemon juice (optional)
1/4 tsp dried parsley
1 tbsp chopped onion
1/4 tsp salt
1/2 tsp sugar
1 tbsp water

Coating:
White breadcrumb

Steps:
1. Slice the cauliflower and soak in salted water for 10-15 minutes. Drain.
2. In a bowl, combine egg, water, seasoned flour, dried oregano, and paprika powder. Mix well, then add cauliflower and mix evenly.
3. Coat the cauliflower in breadcrumbs, then arrange some of them in the air fryer and brush with oil. Bake at 180°C for 15-18 minutes.
4. Heat oil and fry the remaining cauliflower until golden, then drain.
5. In a bowl, mix mayonnaise, plain yogurt, salt, sugar, chopped onion, dried parsley, and lemon juice. Stir well, then add water and mix evenly.
6. Heat a pan. Add margarine and chopped garlic. Sauté until fragrant, then add chili sauce, Bangkok sambal, lemon juice, and sugar. Cook briefly.
7. Add cauliflower to the pan and cook until evenly coated.
8. Sweet & Spicy Crispy Cauliflower is ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Oven & Anti Gagal! Resep BOLU KUKUS KETAN COKELAT KEJU LUMER [Gluten Free]
recipe_id:
Resep Bolu Kukus Ketan Cokelat Keju Lumer (untuk 8 porsi)

Diameter loyang 19 cm

Bahan:
3 butir telur
120 gr gula pasir
80 gr gula palem (opsional, bisa diganti gula pasir)
½ sdt SP
1 sdt perisa vanila
1/3 sdt garam
170 gr susu
120 gr mentega cair
15 ml larutan kopi (opsional)
½ sdt baking powder (opsional)
50 gr cokelat bubuk
185 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Ketan

Bahan isian:
160 gr keju oles
3 sdm kental manis putih
1-2 sdt jeruk nipis

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan telur, gula pasir, gula palem, SP, perisa vanila dan garam, mixer hingga pucat mengembang selama 5 menit
2. Masukkan BOLA Deli Tepung Ketan, cokelat bubuk dan baking powder sambil disaring. Mixer dengan kecepatan rendah sambil masukkan susu, mentega cair dan larutan kopi, mixer sesaat hingga rata
3. Oles loyang dengan minyak kemudian panaskan selama 2 menit. Masukkan adonan ke dalam loyang hingga ¾ penuh. Kukus di api sedang besar selama 15-20 menit
4. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan keju oles, perasan jeruk nipis dan kental manis, aduk hingga rata kemudian masukkan ke dalam plastik segitiga
5. Lubangi bagian tengah bolu secara melingkar kemudian semprotkan isian dan tuang sisa adonan. Kukus di api sedang besar selama 15-20 menit
6. Bolu kukus ketan keju lumer siap disajikan
