title: Lembut & Bumbu Meresap! Resep PEPES DADA AYAM [Tips Stok Frozen]
recipe_id:
Resep Pepes Dada Ayam (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr dada ayam filet
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 butir putih telur
3 sdm santan
1 sdm maizena

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang merah
4 siung bawang putih
3 cm kunyit
3 butir kemiri
3 cm lengkuas
5 buah cabai merah keriting
80 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
1 buah tomat merah
5 buah cabai rawit merah
5 lembar daun jeruk
2 batang daun bawang
15 gr kemangi
1-2 sdm minyak
daun salam
serai
daun pisang

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong bawang putih, bawang merah, geprek kemiri dan iris lengkuas
2. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, lengkuas, kunyit dan cabai merah keriting, tumis hingga wangi dan kecokelatan
3. Masukkan bumbu yang sudah ditumis dan air ke dalam blender, haluskan
4. Potong tomat, daun bawang, iris daun jeruk dan cabai rawit merah
5. Iris tipis memanjang dada ayam kemudian masukkan garam, kaldu jamur, gula pasir, merica, bumbu halus, santan dan putih telur, aduk rata
6. Masukkan maizena, aduk rata kemudian masukkan cabai rawit merah, daun jeruk, tomat merah, daun bawang dan kemangi, aduk rata
7. Siapkan daun pisang, letakkan serai yang sudah diiris, daun salam dan ayam, bungkus dan sematkan tusuk gigi
8. Kukus ayam selama 30 menit. Untuk penyimpanan frozen, dinginkan terlebih dahulu pepes ayam lalu tutup dengan cling wrap satu per satu
9. Pepes dada ayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Breast Pepes Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g chicken breast fillet
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tbsp sugar
1/4 tsp pepper
1 pc egg white
3 tbsp coconut milk
1 tbsp cornstarch

Spices:
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
3 cm turmeric
3 pc candlenut
3 cm galangal
5 pc curly red chili
80 ml water

Other ingredients:
1 pc red tomato
5 pc red Thai chili
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 stalk green onion
15 g lemon basil
1-2 tbsp oil
Bay leaf
Lemongrass
Banana leaf

To serve:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallot, and galangal. Crush the candlenuts.
2. Heat oil. Add garlic, shallot, candlenut, galangal, turmeric, and curly red chili. Sauté until fragrant and browned.
3. Blend the sautéed spices with water until smooth.
4. Slice the tomato, green onion, kaffir lime leaf, and red Thai chili.
5. Slice the chicken breast thinly, then mix with salt, mushroom bouillon, sugar, pepper, blended spices, coconut milk, and egg white.
6. Add cornstarch and mix well, then add red Thai chili, kaffir lime leaf, red tomato, green onion, and lemon basil. Mix again.
7. Prepare the banana leaf. Place sliced lemongrass, bay leaf, and chicken. Wrap and secure with a toothpick.
8. Steam chicken for 30 minutes. For freezing, let the Pepes cool completely, then wrap each one in cling film.
9. Chicken Breast Pepes is ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Tepung Tetap Lembut & Kenyal! Resep SATE LILIT AYAM MANIS [Favorit Anak]
recipe_id:
Resep Sate Lilit Ayam Manis (untuk 15 pcs)

Bahan:
350 gr paha ayam giling
1 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
½ sdt kunyit bubuk
1 butir putih telur
1 ½ sdm gula kelapa
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan bumbu halus:
3 siung bawang putih
4 siung bawang merah
2 cm jahe
3 cm lengkuas
1 sdt ketumbar
2 butir kemiri
3 lembar daun jeruk
1-2 sdm minyak
30 ml air
1 sdm santan

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
sambal rawit iris
jeruk limau

Cara membuat:
1. Potong bawang putih, bawang merah, geprek kemiri, potong jahe dan lengkuas
2. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, jahe, lengkuas, ketumbar dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan
3. Masukkan bumbu dasar yang sudah ditumis, air dan santan ke dalam blender, haluskan
4. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan ayam, garam, merica, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula kelapa, kunyit bubuk, putih telur, kecap manis, saus tiram dan bumbu halus, aduk hingga rata
5. Bentuk bulat dengan scoop ice cream kemudian masukkan ke dalam kulkas hingga set
6. Siapkan tusukan sate lilit kemudian letakkan adonan dan tarik ke bawah tusukan menjadi bulat memanjang. Panggang dengan sedikit minyak hingga matang dan kecokelatan
7. Sate lilit ayam manis siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Sweet Chicken Sate Lilit Recipe (yield 15 pcs)

Ingredients:
350 g ground chicken thigh
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
1 pc egg white
1.5 tbsp coconut sugar
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper

Spices:
3 clove garlic
4 pc shallot
2 cm ginger
3 cm galangal
1 tsp coriander
2 pc candlenut
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
1-2 tbsp oil
30 ml water
1 tbsp coconut milk

To serve:
White rice
Sliced Thai chili sambal
Lime

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallot, ginger and galangal. Crush the candlenut.
2. Heat oil. Add garlic, shallot, candlenut, ginger, galangal, coriander, and kaffir lime leaf. Sauté until fragrant and slightly browned.
3. Blend the sautéed spices with water and coconut milk until smooth.
4. In a bowl, mix chicken, salt, pepper, chicken powder, coconut sugar, turmeric powder, egg white, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, and blended spices until well combined.
5. Shape into balls using an ice cream scoop, then chill until firm.
6. Prepare sate lilit skewers. Place the dough on and press downward to shape into long ovals. Grill with a bit of oil until cooked and golden brown.
7. Sweet Chicken Sate Lilit is ready to serve.

title: Kenyal & Gurih! Resep CREAMY GARLIC MAC AND CHEESE
recipe_id:
Resep Creamy Garlic Mac & Cheese (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
200 gr makaroni
1 sdt garam

Bahan saus:
1 sdm mentega tawar
10 siung bawang putih
1 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
¼ sdt kunyit bubuk
½ sdt paprika bubuk / gochugaru
550 ml susu
170 gr keju quick melt
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir
mozzarella, parut
keju parmesan bubuk (opsional)

Bahan sambal rawit kering:
15-20 buah cabai rawit merah
4 siung bawang putih
3 sdm minyak
½ sdt kaldu jamur
¼ sdt garam

Cara membuat:
1. Rebus makaroni dengan garam selama 8 menit, tiriskan
2. Panaskan mentega, masukkan bawang putih, masak hingga wangi dan kecokelatan di api kecil. Matikan api kemudian parut keju quick melt
3. Masukkan tepung terigu, kunyit bubuk dan paprika bubuk, aduk rata dan hancurkan kasar bawang putih, tumis hingga wangi
4. Masukkan susu secara perlahan sambil di aduk kemudian masukkan keju quick melt, garam, merica dan gula pasir, aduk rata
5. Masukkan makaroni, masak sesaat hingga mengental kemudian tuang setengah makaroni ke dalam wadah tahan panas
6. Tambahkan keju mozzarella parut, sisa makaroni, keju mozzarella dan keju parmesan bubuk di atasnya. Panggang di suhu 185 derajat celcius selama 15 menit
7. Di dalam food chopper, masukkan cabai rawit merah dan bawang putih, haluskan kasar
8. Panaskan minyak, masukkan cabai rawit yang sudah dihaluskan, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan garam dan kaldu jamur, masak sesaat di api kecil, tiriskan
9. Creamy garlic mac & cheese siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Creamy Garlic Mac & Cheese Recipe

Ingredients:
200 g macaroni
1 tsp salt

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp unsalted butter
10 clove garlic
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp turmeric powder
½ tsp paprika powder / gochugaru
550 ml milk
170 g quick melt cheese
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
Mozzarella, grated
Parmesan cheese powder (optional)

Dry Chili Sambal ingredients:
15-20 pc red Thai chili
4 clove garlic
3 tbsp oil
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
¼ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Boil macaroni with salt for 8 minutes. Drain.
2. Heat butter. Add garlic and cook over low heat until fragrant and golden. Turn off heat, then grate the quick melt cheese.
3. Add flour, turmeric powder, and paprika powder. Stir well and mash the garlic roughly. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Slowly add milk while stirring, then add quick melt cheese, salt, pepper, and sugar. Mix well.
5. Add macaroni. Cook briefly until thickened, then pour half into a heatproof dish.
6. Add grated mozzarella, the remaining macaroni, more mozzarella, and parmesan cheese powder on top. Bake at 185°C for 15 minutes.
7. In a food chopper, add red Thai chili and garlic. Coarsely chop.
8. Heat oil. Add the chili mixture. Cook briefly then add salt and mushroom bouillon. Cook on low heat. Set aside.
9. Creamy Garlic Mac & Cheese is ready to serve.

title: 100% Juicy! Resep GYOZA AYAM [Praktis Untuk Stok]
recipe_id:
Resep Gyoza Ayam (untuk 30-35 pcs)

Bahan kulit gyoza:
200 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdt garam
100 ml air mendidih

Bahan isian:
120 gr kol
50 gr kucai
200 gr paha ayam giling
1 siung bawang putih
1 cm jahe
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdt minyak wijen
½ sdt garam
2 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica
2 sdm air
1 sdm minyak

Bahan cocolan:
1 sdm cuka hitam
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt wijen panggang
½ sdm minyak wijen
2 sdt cabai bubuk
½ sdm minyak

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, garam dan air mendidih, aduk dengan sumpit kemudian uleni hingga menyatu. Istirahatkan minimal 2 jam
2. Pipihkan adonan kulit kemudian cetak bulat dengan diameter 8 cm
3. Iris kucai kemudian rebus kol selama 2-3 menit, tiriskan dan cincang
4. Di dalam mangkuk masukkan ayam giling, bawang putih parut, jahe parut, garam, gula pasir, merica, kecap asin, saus tiram, minyak wijen, kol dan kucai, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan air dan minyak, aduk rata
5. Siapkan kulit gyoza, isi dengan isian sekitar 12-15 gram. Oles pinggiran kulit dengan air kemudian lipat 5-6 lipatan
6. Lapisi bagian bawah gyoza dengan maizena sebelum dimasukkan ke dalam freezer
7. Panaskan minyak, susun gyoza dan tambahkan air, tutup wajan kemudian masak di api kecil hingga matang dan kecokelatan
8. Panaskan minyak dan minyak wijen kemudian siram ke dalam cabai bubuk
9. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan kecap asin, cuka hitam dan gula pasir, aduk hingga gula larut kemudian masukkan wijen panggang, aduk rata
10. Gyoza siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Gyoza Recipe (yield 30-35 pcs)

Gyoza Skin ingredients:
200 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp salt
100 ml boiling water

Filling ingredients:
120 g cabbage
50 g chive
200 g ground chicken thigh
1 clove garlic
1 cm ginger
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1/2 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tbsp water
1 tbsp oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp black vinegar
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp toasted sesame seeds
1/2 tbsp sesame oil
2 tsp chili powder
1/2 tbsp oil

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix flour, salt, and boiling water. Stir with chopstick, then knead until combined. Let rest for at least 2 hours.
2. Flatten the dough, then cut into circles with 8 cm diameter.
3. Slice the chives. Boil the cabbage for 2–3 minutes, then drain and chop.
4. In a bowl, add ground chicken, grated garlic, grated ginger, salt, sugar, pepper, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, cabbage, and chives. Mix well, then add water and oil, mix again.
5. Prepare the gyoza skin. Fill with about 12–15 g filling. Wet the edges with water, then fold into 5–6 pleats.
6. Coat the bottom of gyoza with cornstarch before freezing.
7. Heat oil. Arrange the gyoza and add water. Cover the pan and cook on low heat until cooked and golden brown.
8. Heat oil and sesame oil, then pour over the chili powder.
9. In a bowl, mix soy sauce, black vinegar, and sugar. Stir until sugar dissolves, then add toasted sesame seeds and mix well.
10. Gyoza is ready to serve.

title: Lembut & Praktis! Resep SHABU-SHABU DADA AYAM [Cocok Untuk Diet]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Shabu-Shabu (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
500 gr dada ayam filet (setengah beku)
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica
2 sdm maizena
3 sdm putih telur

Bahan lainnya:
3 siung bawang putih
1 batang daun bawang
1,2 liter air
2 sdm krimer bubuk
1 sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir (opsional)
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
sawi putih
enoki
horenso
silken tofu (firm), potong

Pelengkap:
saus wijen sangrai
daun ketumbar
cabai rawit merah
bawang putih goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Iris tipis dada ayam kemudian marinasi dengan kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, maizena dan putih telur, aduk rata
2. Potong sawi putih dan daun bawang
3. Panaskan wajan, masukkan bawang putih utuh dan daun bawang, masak hingga kecokelatan kemudian masukkan air dan batang sawi, rebus 5-8 menit
4. Masukkan kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, gula pasir, merica dan krimer bubuk, masak hingga mendidih
5. Masukkan tahu, jamur enoki, horenso, sawi putih dan ayam yang sudah dimarinasi, masak sesaat ayam kemudian angkat dan sisihkan
6. Iris daun ketumbar dan cabai rawit merah. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan saus wijen sangrai, daun ketumbar, cabai rawit merah dan bawang putih goreng
7. Ayam shabu-shabu siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Shabu-Shabu Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken breast fillet (half frozen)
1 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp egg white

Other ingredients:
3 clove garlic
1 stalk green onion
1.2 liter water
2 tbsp creamer
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar (optional)
1 tsp chicken powder
Napa cabbage
Enoki mushroom
Horenso
Firm white tofu, sliced

Sides:
Toasted sesame sauce
Cilantro
Red Thai chili
Fried garlic

Steps:
1. Thinly slice the chicken breast, then marinate with chicken powder, pepper, cornstarch, and egg white. Mix well.
2.Slice the Napa cabbage and green onion.
3. Heat pan. Add whole garlic and green onion. Cook until browned, then add water and cabbage stem. Boil for 5-8 minutes.
4. Add chicken powder, salt, sugar, pepper, and creamer. Bring to a boil.
5. Add tofu, enoki, horenso, Napa cabbage, and marinated chicken. Cook the chicken briefly, then remove and set aside.
6. Slice cilantro and red Thai chili. In a bowl, mix toasted sesame sauce, cilantro, chili, and fried garlic.
7. Chicken Shabu-Shabu is ready to serve.

title: Rendah Kalori & Serbaguna! Resep SAUS WIJEN SANGRAI / ROASTED SESAME DRESSING
recipe_id:
Resep Saus Wijen Sangrai (784 kalori untuk 10 sajian)

Bahan:
2 butir telur rebus
3 siung bawang putih
1 sdm minyak
1 sdm kecap asin
30 gr wijen putih
2 ½ sdm gula pasir
½ sdt garam
½ sdt MSG
½ sdt dashi powder / kaldu ayam bubuk
4 sdm air
1-2 sdm air jeruk nipis
1 sdm minyak wijen

Pelengkap:
ayam shabu-shabu
salad sayur

Cara membuat:
1. Sangrai biji wijen hingga kecokelatan di api kecil, sisihkan
2. Iris 2 siung bawang putih kemudian goreng dengan sedikit minyak hingga kecokelatan
3. Di dalam blender, masukkan telur rebus, bawang putih goreng dan minyak, sisa bawang putih mentah, wijen sangrai, garam, MSG, gula pasir, dashi powder, kecap asin, air jeruk nipis, minyak wijen dan air, blender hingga halus
4. Masukkan sisa wijen sangrai, blender sesaat
5. Saus wijen sangrai siap digunakan
recipe_en:
Toasted Sesame Sauce Recipe (784 calories for 10 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc boiled egg
3 clove garlic
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp soy sauce
30 g white sesame
2½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp MSG
½ tsp dashi powder / chicken powder
4 tbsp water
1-2 tbsp lime juice
1 tbsp sesame oil

Serve with:
Chicken shabu-shabu
Vegetable salad

Steps:
1. Toast sesame seeds over low heat until browned. Set aside.
2. Slice 2 clove garlic and fry with a bit of oil until browned.
3. In a blender, add boiled egg, fried garlic and oil, remaining raw garlic, toasted sesame, salt, MSG, sugar, dashi powder, soy sauce, lime juice, sesame oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Add the remaining toasted sesame. Blend briefly.
5. Toasted Sesame Sauce is ready to use.

title: Tips Menghilangkan Bau Prengus! Resep KAMBING BAKAR KECAP [Menu Idul Adha]
recipe_id:
Resep Kambing Bakar Kecap (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg daging paha kambing , potong
1 buah jeruk nipis
jahe

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang merah
3 siung bawang putih
3 butir kemiri
1 sdt lada butir (hitam dan putih)
3 cm kunyit
3 cm jahe
3 cm lengkuas
1/3 butir pala
1 sdt jintan
1 sdt ketumbar
50 ml minyak
25 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
2 lembar daun salam
6 lembar daun jeruk
½ sdm asam jawa
700 ml air
2 sdt gula pasir
½ sdm garam
2 ½ sdt kaldu bubuk

Bahan bumbu bakar (untuk 1/3 daging):
7 siung bawang merah
5 buah cabai rawit merah
1 buah tomat merah
1-2 sdm margarin
1 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram

Bahan pelengkap lainnya:
acar
emping
bawang merah goreng
nasi putih
sambal rawit

Cara membuat:
1. Marinasi kambing dengan perasan jeruk nipis, aduk rata kemudian rebus daging kambing dengan jahe selama 5-10 menit, bilas hingga bersih
2. Di dalam blender masukkan semua bahan bumbu halus, haluskan kemudian tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak
3. Masukkan daun jeruk dan daun salam, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan daging kambing, tumis sesaat
4. Masukkan air, asam jawa, garam, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk, masak selama 30-45 menit
5. Potong tomat, iris bawang merah dan cabai rawit merah
6. Panaskan margarin kemudian tumis bawang merah dan cabai rawit merah hingga wangi
7. Masukkan daging dan sedikit kuah rebusan, masak sesaat kemudian tambahkan kecap manis, saus tiram, tomat dan sedikit kuah rebusan kambing, masak sesaat
8. Kambing bakar kecap siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Soy-Glazed Goat Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg goat thigh meat, sliced
1 pc lime
Ginger

Spices:
5 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
1 tsp whole pepper (black and white)
3 cm turmeric
3 cm ginger
3 cm galangal
1/3 pc nutmeg
1 tsp cumin
1 tsp coriander
50 ml oil
25 ml water

Other ingredients:
2 pc bay leaf
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
½ tbsp tamarind
700 ml water
2 tsp sugar
½ tbsp salt
2½ tsp stock powder

Soy Glaze ingredients (for 1/3 of the meat):
7 pc shallot
5 pc red Thai chili
1 pc red tomato
1-2 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce

Add-ons:
Pickle
Emping
Fried shallot
White rice
Thai chili sambal

Steps:
1. Marinate the goat with lime juice. Mix well, then boil the goat meat with ginger for 5-10 minutes. Rinse clean.
2. In a blender, add all the spices. Blend, then sauté until fragrant and oily.
3. Add kaffir lime leaves and bay leaf. Sauté briefly, then add goat meat. Stir-fry briefly.
4. Add water, tamarind, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cook for 30-45 minutes.
5. Slice the tomato, shallots, and red Thai chili.
6. Heat the margarine, then stir-fry the shallots and red Thai chili until fragrant.
7. Add meat and a bit of the broth. Cook briefly, then add sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, tomato, and a bit more broth. Cook briefly.
8. Soy-Glazed Goat is ready to serve.

title: Lembut Gurih Praktis! Resep NASI AYAM &TELUR / OYAKODON VERSI LOKAL
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Ayam Telur (untuk 1-2 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
150 gr paha ayam filet
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
1 iris jeruk nipis

Bahan lainnya:
2 siung bawang putih
¼ buah bawang bombai
2 butir telur
3 buah cabai rawit merah
2 sdt kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
150 ml air
1 sdm minyak
1 batang daun bawang

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
bawang merah goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong ayam kemudian marinasi dengan kaldu ayam bubuk, merica dan perasan jeruk nipis
2. Iris bawang putih, potong besar bawang bombai, cabai rawit merah dan kocok telur
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih hingga harum kemudian masukkan ayam, masak sesaat di api besar
4. Masukkan bawang bombai dan cabai rawit merah, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan air, kecap manis dan saus tiram, masak hingga mendidih
5. Masukkan telur, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan irisan daun bawang, masak sesaat
6. Nasi ayam telur siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken & Egg Rice Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Chicken Marinade:
150 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
1 slice lime

Other ingredients:
2 clove garlic
1/4 pc onion
2 pc egg
3 pc red Thai chili
2 tsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
150 ml water
1 tbsp oil
1 stalk green onion

To serve:
White rice
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken, then marinate with chicken powder, pepper, and lime juice.
2. Slice the garlic. Cut the onion into large pieces. Chop the chili and whisk the egg.
3. Heat a bit of oil. Sauté the garlic until fragrant, then add the chicken and cook briefly over high heat.
4. Add the onion and chili. Sauté until fragrant, then add water, sweet soy sauce, and oyster sauce. Bring to a boil.
5. Add the egg. Cook briefly, then add sliced green onion and cook briefly again.
6. Chicken & Egg Rice is ready to serve.

title: Pedas Wangi Segar! Resep PECAK IKAN DAN TERONG
recipe_id:
Resep Pecak Ikan Terong (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ikan:
175 gr ikan dori filet
1 sdt bumbu marinasi instan
2 sdm maizena

Bahan sambal pecak:
6 siung bawang merah
6 siung bawang putih
10 buah cabai rawit merah
10 buah cabai rawit hijau
1 sdt terasi, bakar
3 butir kemiri
2 sdm santan
4 gr kencur
6 sdm air panas
1 sdt garam
1 sdt MSG
2 sdt gula pasir

Bahan pelengkap:
1 buah terong ungu
1 buah jeruk limau
kemangi
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong ikan. Marinasi dengan bumbu marinasi instan, aduk rata kemudian masukkan maizena, aduk rata
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng ikan dan terong ungu yang sudah dipotong hingga matang, tiriskan
3. Sisihkan sebagian minyak kemudian masak kemiri yang sudah digeprek, cabai rawit merah, cabai rawit hijau, bawang putih, bawang merah dan terasi, masak sesat dan pindahkan ke dalam ulekan
4. Masukkan kencur, garam, MSG dan gula pasir, ulek kemudian masukkan santan dan air panas, aduk rata
5. Masukkan terong dan ikan kemudian geprek
6. Pecak ikan terong siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Fried Fish & Eggplant Pecak Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Fish marinade ingredients:
175 g dory fillet
1 tsp instant marinade powder
2 tbsp cornstarch

Pecak Sambal ingredients:
6 pc shallot
6 clove garlic
10 pc red Thai chili
10 pc green Thai chili
1 tsp shrimp paste, roasted
3 pc candlenut
2 tbsp coconut milk
4 g aromatic ginger
6 tbsp hot water
1 tsp salt
1 tsp MSG
2 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
1 pc eggplant
1 pc kaffir lime
Lemon basil
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the fish. Marinate with instant marinade powder. Mix well, then add cornstarch and mix evenly.
2. Heat a bit of oil. Fry the fish and sliced eggplant until cooked, then set aside.
3. Set aside some of the oil, then cook the crushed candlenut, red Thai chili, green Thai chili, garlic, shallots, and shrimp paste briefly. Transfer to a mortar.
4. Add aromatic ginger, salt, MSG, and sugar. Grind, then add coconut milk and hot water. Mix well.
5. Add eggplant and fish, then mash together.
6. Fried Fish & Eggplant Pecak is ready to serve.

title: Garing Anti Gagal! Resep CIRENG TAHU MINI
recipe_id:
Resep Cireng Tahu Mini (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan: 
200 gr tahu putih
100 gr tapioka
2 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
3 siung bawang putih
1 batang daun bawang
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt garam / MSG
¼ sdt merica

Bahan sambal kecap:
3 sdm kecap manis
5 buah cabai rawit merah
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
1 buah jeruk limau

Pelapis:
tapioka

Pelengkap:
cabai rawit hijau

Cara membuat:
1. Iris daun bawang. Di dalam mangkuk masukkan tahu putih, bawang putih parut, garam, merica, kaldu ayam bubuk, tepung terigu dan tapioka, aduk hingga menyatu
2. Masukkan daun bawang, aduk rata kemudian bentuk pipih kecil-kecil dan balurkan ke dalam tapioka, aduk rata
3. Panaskan minyak, goreng hingga kering, tiriskan
4. Iris cabai rawit merah lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk. Masukkan kecap manis, bawang merah goreng dan perasan jeruk limau, aduk rata
5. Cireng tahu mini siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Mini Tofu Cireng (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g white tofu
100 g tapioca
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 clove garlic
1 stalk green onion
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp salt / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
5 pc red Thai chili
1 tbsp fried shallot
1 pc lime

Coating:
Tapioca

Sides:
Green Thai chili

Steps:
1. Slice the green onion. In a bowl, add white tofu, grated garlic, salt, pepper, chicken powder, flour, and tapioca. Stir until combined.
2. Add green onion and mix well. Then, shape the dough into small flat pieces and coat evenly with tapioca.
3. Heat oil. Fry until crisp and set aside.
4. Slice the red Thai chili and transfer to a bowl. Add sweet soy sauce, fried shallot, and lime juice. Mix well.
5. Mini Tofu Cireng is ready to serve.

title: Spesial! Resep CREAMY BEEF MUSHROOM [Tips Daging Empuk & Lembut]
recipe_id:
Resep Creamy Beef Mushroom (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi daging:
300 gr daging sapi iris
2 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdm tapioka
1 sdm kecap asin
4 sdm air
¼ sdt merica

Bahan lainnya:
90 gr jamur kancing putih
½ buah bawang bombai
2 siung bawang putih
1 batang seledri
½ sdt oregano kering
1 sdm mentega tawar
1 ½ sdm saus tomat
400 ml air
300 ml susu
2 sdm gravy powder / demi glace powder + 2 sdm air
2 sdm minyak
½ sdt garam
½ sdt gula pasir
1 ½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica

Bahan coleslaw:
40 gr kol
40 gr wortel
¼ sdt garam
½ buah jeruk nipis
½ sdm kental manis
2 sdm mayones

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Iris kol dan parut wortel kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Masukkan garam, perasan jeruk nipis, mayones dan kental manis, aduk rata
3. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, tapioka, kecap asin, air dan merica, aduk rata kemudian masukkan daging sapi iris, aduk hingga meresap
4. Iris jamur, cincang bawang bombai dan bawang putih kemudian larutkan bubuk gravy dengan sedikit air, aduk rata
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih dan bawang bombai hingga wangi kemudian masukkan jamur, tumis hingga kecokelatan
6. Sisihkan jamur ke pinggir wajan kemudian masukkan daging dan masak di api besar hingga matang
7. Masukkan seledri, oregano, mentega tawar dan saus tomat, aduk rata kemudian masukkan air, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, gula pasir, susu dan larutan gravy, masak hingga mengental
8. Creamy beef mushroom siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Creamy Mushroom Beef Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Beef Marinade ingredients:
300 g sliced beef
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tbsp tapioca
1 tbsp soy sauce
4 tbsp water
¼ tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
90 g Champignon mushroom
½ pc onion
2 clove garlic
1 stalk celery
½ tsp dried oregano
1 tbsp unsalted butter
1.5 tbsp ketchup
400 ml water
300 ml milk
2 tbsp gravy powder / demi glace powder + 2 tbsp water
2 tbsp oil
½ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
1 ½ tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper

Coleslaw ingredients:
40 g cabbage
40 g carrot
¼ tsp salt
½ pc lime
½ tbsp condensed milk
2 tbsp mayonnaise

Sides:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the cabbage and coarsely grate the carrot, then transfer to a bowl.
2. Add salt, lime juice, mayonnaise, and condensed milk. Mix well.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, tapioca, soy sauce, water, and pepper. Mix well, then add sliced beef. Mix until absorbed.
4. Slice the mushroom. Chop the onion and garlic, then dissolve gravy powder with a little water.
5. Heat a little oil. Sauté garlic and onion until fragrant, then add mushroom. Cook until browned.
6. Push mushroom to the side of the pan, then add beef and cook on high heat until done.
7. Add celery, oregano, unsalted butter, and ketchup. Mix well, then add water, salt, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, milk, and gravy slurry. Cook until thickened.
8. Creamy Mushroom Beef is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Lembut! Resep SOHUN KUAH TELUR PEDAS
recipe_id:
Resep Sohun Kuah Telur Pedas (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
60 gr sohun
4 buah cabai rawit merah
3 siung bawang putih
50 gr kol

Bahan telur:
1 batang daun bawang
2 butir telur
¼ sdt garam
1 sdm maizena
2 sdm air

Bahan lainnya:
2 sdm minyak
1 sdm saus sambal (opsional)
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt garam
½ sdm gula pasir
1 sdt MSG (opsional)
1/8 sdt merica
700 ml air
cabai bubuk / gochugaru

Pelengkap:
jeruk nipis
bawang merah goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Cincang bawang putih, iris cabai rawit merah, potong kotak kol dan iris daun bawang
2. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan maizena dan air, aduk rata kemudian masukkan daun bawang, telur dan garam, aduk rata
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan telur, masak hingga matang dan sisihkan ke pinggir wajan
4. Tambahkan sedikit minyak, masukkan bawang putih, tumis hingga wangi dan kecokelatan
5. Masukkan kol dan cabai rawit merah, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan air, masak hingga mendidih
6. Masukkan sohun, kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, MSG, gula pasir, merica dan saus tiram, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan cabai bubuk dan saus sambal, masak sesaat
7. Sohun kuah telur pedas siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Glass Noodles Egg Soup Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
60 g glass noodle
4 pc red Thai chili
3 clove garlic
50 g cabbage

Egg ingredients:
1 stalk green onion
2 pc egg
¼ tsp salt
1 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
2 tbsp oil
1 tbsp chili sauce (optional)
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp MSG (optional)
1/8 tsp pepper
700 ml water
Chili powder / gochugaru

Sides:
Lime
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. Chop the garlic and slice the Thai chili. Slice the cabbage into cubes and slice the green onion.
2. In a bowl, mix cornstarch and water. Mix well, then add green onion, egg, and salt. Mix well.
3. Heat a little oil. Add the egg mixture. Cook until done and set aside to the side of the pan.
4. Add a little oil. Add garlic and sauté together until fragrant and browned.
5. Add cabbage and Thai chili. Sauté briefly, then add water and bring to a boil.
6. Add glass noodles, chicken powder, salt, MSG, sugar, pepper, and oyster sauce. Cook briefly, then add chili powder and chili sauce. Cook briefly.
7. Spicy Glass Noodles Egg Soup is ready to serve.

title: Resep AYAM GEPREK TANPA GORENG: Minim Minyak & Tepung! [Cocok Untuk Stok]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Geprek Tanpa Goreng (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
500 gr paha ayam filet
3 siung bawang putih
2 iris jeruk nipis
4 sdm tapioka
1 sdt kunyit bubuk (opsional)
1 butir putih telur
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt merica

Bahan sambal geprek (untuk ½ resep ayam):
2 siung bawang putih
35 gr cabai rawit merah
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt MSG (opsional)

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
jeruk limau
head lettuce

Cara membuat:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan perasan jeruk nipis, bawang putih parut, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, merica, kunyit bubuk, tapioka dan putih telur, aduk rata. Diamkan minimal 1 jam
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masak ayam di api kecil hingga matang, sisihkan
3. Di wajan yang sama, tumis bawang putih dan cabai rawit merah beberapa saat kemudian pindahkan ke dalam ulekan
4. Tambahkan garam dan MSG, ulek kasar kemudian masukkan ayam dan geprek
5. Ayam geprek tanpa goreng siap disajikan
recipe_en:
No-Fry Ayam Geprek Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
3 clove garlic
2 wedge lime
4 tbsp tapioca
1 tsp turmeric powder (optional)
1 pc egg white
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper

Geprek Sambal ingredients (for ½ chicken recipe):
2 clove garlic
35 g red Thai chili
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp MSG (optional)

To serve:
White rice
Kaffir lime
Head of lettuce

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice, grated garlic, salt, chicken powder, sugar, pepper, turmeric powder, tapioca, and egg white. Mix well and let sit for at least 1 hour.
2. Heat a little oil. Cook chicken over low heat until done and set aside.
3. In the same pan, toast the garlic and red Thai chili briefly, then transfer to a mortar.
4. Add salt and MSG. Coarsely grind, then add the chicken and smash.
5. No-Fry Ayam Geprek is ready to serve.

title: Spesial & Gurih! Resep UDANG KEJU ALA GACOAN [Tips Stok Frozen]
recipe_id:
Resep Udang Keju (untuk 20 pcs)

Bahan:
300 gr paha ayam filet
150 gr udang
2 siung bawang putih
15 gr tepung roti putih
1 sdt baking powder
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
1 sdm maizena
30 ml air
1 butir telur
1 sdt minyak wijen
2 sdm minyak
2 sdt saus tiram
1 ½ sdt garam
2 sdt gula pasir
1 ½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica

Bahan isian:
keju oles

Bahan pelapis basah:
6 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
60 ml air
1 butir telur
¼ sdt garam
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan pelapis kering:
tepung roti putih
maizena

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam food chopper masukkan bawang putih, haluskan kemudian masukkan paha ayam filet, garam, gula pasir, kaldu ayam bubuk, saus tiram dan merica, aduk hingga lengket
2. Masukkan udang, tepung roti putih, maizena, baking powder, bawang merah goreng, air, telur, minyak wijen dan minyak, haluskan hingga rata. Diamkan di dalam kulkas
3. Balurkan keju ke dalam tepung maizena kemudian potong-potong dan balurkan kembali ke tepung maizena sambil dibentuk
4. Takar adonan dengan sendok es krim lalu balurkan ke dalam maizena. Isi dengan keju kemudian bentuk bulat memanjang
5. Untuk frozen food, kukus udang keju selama 10 menit di api kecil dalam keadaan tutup panci sedikit terbuka
6. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, garam, merica, air dan telur, aduk rata
7. Balurkan udang keju ke dalam tepung basah lalu tepung roti, ratakan
8. Panaskan minyak, goreng udang keju di api sedang hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan
9. Udang keju siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Cheesy Shrimp Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
150 g shrimp
2 clove garlic
15 g white breadcrumbs
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp fried shallots
1 tbsp cornstarch
30 ml water
1 pc egg
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp oyster sauce
1.5 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1.5 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper

Filling:
Cheese spread

Batter ingredients:
6 tbsp all-purpose flour
60 ml water
1 pc egg
¼ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper

Dry Coating ingredients:
White breadcrumbs
Cornstarch

Steps:
1. In a food chopper, add garlic. Chop, then add chicken thigh fillet, salt, sugar, chicken powder, oyster sauce, and pepper. Blend until sticky.
2. Add shrimp, white breadcrumbs, cornstarch, baking powder, fried shallots, water, egg, sesame oil, and oil. Blend. Let it sit in the fridge.
3. Coat the cheese with cornstarch, then slice and coat it again with cornstarch while shaping.
4. Scoop the dough with an ice cream scoop and coat them in cornstarch. Fill with cheese, then shape into an elongated ball.
5. For frozen food, steam the Cheesy Shrimp for 10 minutes over low heat with the lid slightly open.
6. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, salt, pepper, water, and egg, stir well.
7. Coat the Cheesy Shrimp in the batter, then coat in breadcrumbs. Smooth it out.
8. Heat oil. Fry the Cheesy Shrimp over medium heat until slightly golden. Drain.
9. Cheesy Shrimp is ready to serve.

title: Cocok Buat Diet! Resep DIMSUM DADA AYAM (Rendah Kalori)
recipe_id:
Resep Dimsum Dada Ayam (untuk 20 pcs)

Bahan dimsum:
300 gr dada ayam giling
150 gr jamur kancing putih
50 gr wortel (opsional)
1 batang daun bawang
2 siung bawang putih
2 butir putih telur
1 sdm air
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt minyak wijen
½ sdm garam
1 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt MSG (opsional)
1 sdt baking powder
3 sdm tapioca

Bahan lainnya:
sawi putih
kulit siomay/pangsit
wortel parut

Pelengkap:
chili oil
kecap asin

Cara membuat:
1. Potong kotak besar jamur kancing putih kemudian tumis dengan sedikit minyak hingga layu
2. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan dada ayam giling, garam, gula pasir, kaldu jamur, MSG dan merica, aduk hingga lengket
3. Masukkan parutan bawang putih, wortel, daun bawang iris, putih telur, air, saus tiram, minyak wijen dan tumisan jamur, aduk rata
4. Masukkan tapioka dan baking powder, aduk rata kemudian masukkan ke dalam kulkas
5. Kukus sawi putih selama 3 menit kemudian buang batang putih pada sawi dan belah dua
6. Letakkan adonan di atas sawi kemudian gulung membentuk siomay dan letakkan parutan wortel di atasnya. Kukus selama 8 menit
7. Dimsum dada ayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Breast Dim Sum Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Dim Sum ingredients:
300 g ground chicken breast
150 g white button mushroom
50 g carrot (optional)
1 stalk green onion
2 clove garlic
2 pc egg white
1 tbsp water
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp MSG (optional)
1 tsp baking powder
3 tbsp tapioca flour

Other ingredients:
Napa cabbage
Shumai/wonton wrapper
Grated carrot

Dipping:
Chili oil
Soy sauce

Steps:
1. Dice the white button mushrooms into large cubes and sauté with a little oil until wilted.
2. In a bowl, mix ground chicken breast, salt, sugar, mushroom bouillon, MSG, and pepper until sticky.
3. Add grated garlic, carrot, chopped green onions, egg white, water, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and sautéed mushrooms, then mix well.
4. Add tapioca flour and baking powder. Mix well and place in the fridge.
5. Steam the napa cabbage for 3 minutes, then remove the white stems and cut in half.
6. Place the filling on the napa cabbage and roll it into a Shumai shape, then top each with grated carrot. Steam for 8 minutes.
7. Chicken Breast Dim Sum is ready to serve.

title: Anti Gagal & Praktis! Resep SUP AYAM KRIM / CREAMY CHICKEN SOUP
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Ayam Krim (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
200 gr paha ayam filet
¾ sdt garam
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan lainnya:
2 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
1 sdm seledri (opsional)
1 buah wortel
50 gr jagung pipil
2 sdm mentega tawar
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
350 ml air
350 ml susu
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt parsley kering

Bahan sesame stick:
1 lembar danish pastry
¼ sdt garam
1/8 sdt merica
telur kocok
wijen putih
wijen hitam

Cara membuat:
1. Oles danish pastry dengan telur kocok kemudian taburkan garam, merica, wijen putih dan wijen hitam
2. Potong-potong danish pastry kemudian tarik dan letakkan ke dalam loyang yang sudah dialasi baking paper
3. Kerat bagian tengah danish pastry dengan belakang pisau. Proofing selama 1 jam kemudian panggang selama 7 menit di suhu 190 derajat celcius
4. Marinasi ayam dengan garam dan merica, aduk rata kemudian potong kotak bawang bombai, cincang bawang putih, iris seledri dan potong kotak kecil wortel
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng ayam hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan dan potong-potong
6. Di wajan yang sama, masukkan mentega, bawang bombai dan bawang putih, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan tepung terigu, tumis kembali hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan
7. Masukkan air secara perlahan sambil diaduk kemudian masukkan seledri, wortel, jagung pipil, ayam, susu, kaldu ayam bubuk, parsley kering dan gula pasir, masak hingga mendidih
8. Sup ayam krim siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Creamy Chicken Soup Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh fillet
¾ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
2 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 tbsp celery (optional)
1 pc carrot
50 g corn kernel
2 tbsp unsalted butter
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
350 ml water
350 ml milk
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp dried parsley

Sesame Stick ingredients:
1 sheet Danish pastry
¼ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
Beaten egg
White sesame seeds
Black sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Brush the Danish pastry with egg, then sprinkle with salt, pepper, white sesame seeds, and black sesame seeds.
2. Cut Danish pastry into pieces, then stretch and place on a baking tray lined with baking paper.
3. Make slits in the center of each Danish pastry with the back of a knife. Proof for 1 hour, then bake for 7 minutes at 190°C.
4. Marinate the chicken with salt and pepper. Mix well, then dice the onion into cubes, mince the garlic, slice the celery, and dice the carrot.
5. Heat a little oil. Fry the chicken until browned, drain, and cut into pieces.
6. In the same pan, add butter, onion, and garlic. Sauté until fragrant, then add flour. Sauté again until fragrant and lightly browned.
7. Slowly add water while stirring, then add celery, carrot, corn kernels, chicken, milk, chicken powder, dried parsley, and sugar. Bring to a boil.
8. Creamy Chicken Soup is ready to serve.

title: Praktis, Bikin Nambah Nasi! Resep AYAM OSENG BUMBU PEPES: Gurih Lembut & Wangi
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Oseng Bumbu Pepes (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
350 gr paha ayam filet
1 sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 iris jeruk nipis
1 sdm santan

Bahan bumbu halus:
4 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
5 cm kunyit
5 buah cabai merah keriting
2 sdm minyak
2 sdm air

Bahan lainnya:
1 batang daun bawang
1 buah tomat merah
2 lembar daun salam
2 batang serai
10 buah cabai rawit merah
150 ml air
1 sdt kaldu jamur
2 sdt gula pasir
kemangi

Pelengkap:
nasi putih 

Cara membuat :
Potong-potong ayam kemudian marinasi dengan garam, merica, perasan jeruk nipis dan santan, aduk rata
Geprek kemiri, potong bawang putih dan bawang merah
Di dalam blender, masukkan kemiri, bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai merah keriting, kunyit, minyak dan air, blender hingga halus 
Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak kemudian masukkan daun salam dan serai, tumis kembali hingga wangi 
Masukkan ayam, tumis hingga matang kemudian iris daun bawang dan tomat merah
Masukkan air, tomat merah, daun bawang, cabai rawit utuh, gula pasir dan kaldu jamur, masak hingga meresap kemudian masukkan kemangi, masak sesaat
Ayam oseng bumbu pepes siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Pepes Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 wedge lime
1 tbsp coconut milk

Spices:
4 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
5 cm turmeric
5 pc curly red chili
2 tbsp oil
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
1 stalk green onion
1 pc red tomato
2 pc bay leaf
2 stalk lemongrass
10 pc Thai chili
150 ml water
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp sugar
Lemon basil

Sides:
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into pieces, then marinate with salt, pepper, lime juice, and coconut milk. Mix well.
2. Pound the candlenut. Slice the garlic and shallot.
3. In a blender, add candlenut, garlic, shallot, curly red chili, turmeric, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant and oily, then add bay leaf and lemongrass. Sauté again until fragrant.
5. Add chicken and sauté until cooked, then slice green onion and red tomato.
6. Add water, red tomato, green onion, whole Thai chili, sugar, and mushroom bouillon. Cook until absorbed, then add lemon basil and cook briefly.
7. Chicken Pepes Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

title: Lembut Gurih! Resep AYAM CINCANG KUKUS [Bisa Untuk MPASI]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Cincang Kukus (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr paha ayam giling
1 butir telur
2 sdt tapioka
2 sdt kecap ikan
1 sdm kecap manis
2 sdt saus tiram
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
½ sdt jahe (opsional)
1 sdm minyak bawang putih
80 ml air
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
kecap asin + cabai rawit merah iris
nasi putih
daun bawang iris

Cara membuat:
1. Siapkan wadah tahan panas, masukkan paha ayam giling, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, kecap ikan, saus tiram, kecap manis, telur, bawang merah goreng, minyak bawang putih, jahe parut, tepung tapioka dan air, aduk hingga rata
2. Kukus adonan ayam selama 20-30 menit atau hingga matang
3. Ayam cincang kukus siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Steamed Minced Chicken Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g minced chicken thigh
1 pc egg
2 tsp tapioca flour
2 tsp fish sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp fried shallots
½ tsp ginger (optional)
1 tbsp garlic oil
80 ml water
1 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper

Sides:
Soy sauce + sliced red Thai chili
Rice
Sliced green onion

Steps:
1. In a heatproof bowl, add minced chicken thigh, chicken powder, pepper, fish sauce, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, egg, fried shallots, garlic oil, grated ginger, tapioca, and water. Mix well.
2. Steam for 20-30 minutes or until cooked.
3. Steamed Minced Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Chili Oil Serbaguna! Resep PANGSIT / WONTON CHILI OIL [Awet Tahan Lama]
recipe_id:
Resep Wonton Chili Oil (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan chili oil:
15 buah cabai merah keriting
8 buah cabai rawit merah
5 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
3 lembar daun jeruk (opsional)
100 ml minyak
½ sdm kaldu jamur
2 sdt gula pasir
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan lainnya:
15 pcs pangsit ayam
bawang putih goreng
biji wijen putih
daun bawang iris

Penyajian:
3 sdm chili oil
½ sdm saus sambal (opsional)
1-2 sdm cuka hitam (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam food chopper, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit merah, cabai merah keriting dan daun jeruk, haluskan
2. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bumbu dasar kemudian tumis di api kecil hingga kering
3. Masukkan kecap asin, kaldu jamur, gula pasir dan minyak wijen, aduk sesaat dan sisihkan
4. Rebus pangsit ayam selama 4-5 menit
5. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan chili oil, saus sambal dan cuka hitam, aduk rata kemudian masukkan pangsit yang sudah matang, aduk rata
6. Wonton chili oil siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chili Oil Wontons Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Chili Oil ingredients:
15 pc red curly chili
8 pc red Thai chili
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 pc lime leaf (optional)
100 ml oil
1/2 tbsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp sugar
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil

Other ingredients:
15 pc chicken wonton
Fried garlic
White sesame seeds
Sliced scallion

Serving:
3 tbsp chili oil
1/2 tbsp chili sauce (optional)
1-2 tbsp black vinegar (optional)

Steps:
1. Into a chopper, add garlic, shallot, red Thai chili, red curly chili, and lime leaf. Chop.
2. Heat oil. Add the chopped ingredients, then sauté on low heat until slightly crisp.
3. Add soy sauce, mushroom bouillon, sugar, and sesame oil. Stir briefly and set aside.
4. Boil the chicken wontons for 4-5 minutes.
5. In a bowl, mix chili oil, chili sauce, and black vinegar. Stir well, then add the cooked wontons and mix evenly.
6. Chili Oil Wontons are ready to serve.

title: 3 Bahan, 10 Menit Jadi! Resep TIM TELUR LEMBUT
recipe_id:
Resep Tim Telur (untuk 1-2 porsi)

Bahan:
2 butir telur ayam
200 ml air panas
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan lainnya:
1 sdm kecap asin
2 sdt gula cair
1 sdm minyak bawang putih
daun bawang iris (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Siapkan wadah tahan panas, masukkan telur dan kaldu ayam bubuk, kocok
2. Tuang air panas sedikit demi sedikit sambil dikocok kemudian kukus telur selama 8-10 menit. Kukus dengan posisi tutup sedikit terbuka
3. Tuang kecap asin, gula cair, dan minyak bawang putih
4. Tim telur siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Steamed Egg Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc chicken egg
200 ml hot water
1 tsp chicken powder

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tsp simple syrup
1 tbsp garlic oil
Sliced green onions (optional)

Steps:
1. Prepare a heatproof bowl. Whisk the eggs and chicken powder together.
2. Gradually pour the hot water in while whisking, then steam the eggs for 8-10 minutes. Steam with the lid slightly ajar.
3. Add soy sauce, simple sugar, and garlic oil.
4. Steamed Egg is ready to serve.

title: Cocok Untuk Stok! Resep SAMBAL BAWANG & TAHU TELUR CEPLOK
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Bawang (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
100 gr bawang merah
150 gr cabai rawit merah
200 ml minyak
3 lembar daun jeruk
50 ml air
½ sdt MSG
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt gula pasir

Bahan tahu telur ceplok:
1 butir telur
1 buah tahu
1/8 sdt garam
1/8 sdt kaldu bubuk

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam food chopper masukkan cabai rawit merah, haluskan sesaat dan sisihkan kemudian masukkan bawang merah ke dalam food chopper, haluskan hingga halus
2. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang merah, cabai rawit dan daun jeruk, tumis di api sedang besar hingga wangi kemudian masukkan garam, kaldu jamur, MSG, gula pasir dan air, kecilkan api dan masak hingga sedikit kering
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng tahu hingga sedikit kering kemudian belah dan masukkan telur garam dan kaldu bubuk, masak hingga matang
4. Sambal bawang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Sambal Bawang Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
100 g shallot
150 g red Thai chili
200 ml oil
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
50 ml water
1/2 tsp MSG
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar

Fried Tofu & Egg:
1 pc egg
1 pc tofu
1/8 tsp salt
1/8 tsp stock powder

Steps:
1. In a food chopper, add red Thai chili. Chop briefly and set aside. Then, add shallots into the chopper and chop until smooth.
2. Heat oil. Add shallots, chili, and kaffir lime leaf. Sauté over medium-high heat until fragrant, then add salt, mushroom bouillon, MSG, sugar, and water. Lower the heat and cook until slightly reduced.
3. Heat a little oil. Fry the tofu until slightly crisp, then split and add egg, salt, and stock powder. Cook until done.
4. Sambal Bawang is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Pedas Manis! Resep OSENG CUMI PETE
recipe_id:
Resep Oseng Cumi Pete (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan:
300 gr baby cumi asin
50 gr cabai rawit merah
90 gr cabai merah keriting
8 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
5 lembar daun jeruk
80 gr petai kupas, belah dua
1 batang serai
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt MSG
2 sdm gula pasir
75 ml air

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
kerupuk

Cara membuat:
1. Rendam cumi asin dengan air panas selama 10-30 menit kemudian bilas dengan air dan keringkan
2. Di dalam food chopper, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit merah, dan cabai merah keriting, haluskan
3. Panaskan minyak, tumis cumi asin hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bumbu yang sudah dihaluskan, daun jeruk dan serai yang sudah digeprek, tumis di api sedang besar hingga kering
4. Masukkan air, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, MSG dan petai, masak sesaat
5. Oseng cumi pete siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Squid Stir-Fry with Petai Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g salted baby squid
50 g red Thai chili
90 g curly red chili
8 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
80 g peeled petai, halved
1 stalk lemongrass
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tbsp sugar
75 ml water

Sides:
White rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Soak the salted squid in hot water for 10–30 minutes, then rinse and dry.
2. In a food chopper, add garlic, shallot, red Thai chili, and curly red chili. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat oil. Sauté salted squid until fragrant. Add the chopped spices, kaffir lime leaf, and pounded lemongrass. Stir-fry over medium-high heat until cooked.
4. Add water, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, and petai. Cook briefly.
5. Squid Stir-Fry with Petai is ready to serve.

title: Sarapan Praktis! Resep AYAM CINCANG KEMANGI [Gurih Manis]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Cincang Kemangi (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
350 gr paha ayam giling
1 sdm kecap manis
1 ½ sdm saus tiram
1 sdt kecap maggi / kecap ikan

Bahan lainnya:
4 siung bawang putih
4 siung bawang merah
5 buah cabai merah keriting
8 buah cabai rawit hijau
1 batang serai bagian putih
4 gr terasi, bakar
2 sdm minyak
2 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu bubuk
½ sdm saus tiram
25 gr kemangi
10 buah bawang merah kecil-kecil

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
telur mata sapi
jeruk limau

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan daging paha giling, kecap manis, saus tiram dan kecap maggi, aduk rata
2. Cincang bawang putih, bawang merah, serai, iris cabai merah keriting dan cabai rawit hijau
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih dan bawang merah hingga wangi kemudian masukkan terasi, serai, cabai merah keriting dan cabai rawit merah, tumis hingga wangi
4. Masukkan ayam yang sudah dimarinasi, masak hingga matang kemudian masukkan bawang merah utuh, gula pasir, merica, kaldu bubuk dan saus tiram, masak sesaat
5. Masukkan kemangi, masak sesaat
6. Ayam cincang kemangi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Lemon Basil Chicken Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g ground chicken thigh
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp Maggi sauce / fish sauce

Other ingredients:
4 clove garlic
4 pc shallot
5 pc red curly chili
8 pc green Thai chili
1 stalk lemongrass (white part)
4 g shrimp paste, roasted
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp stock powder
½ tbsp oyster sauce
25 g lemon basil
10 pc small shallot

To serve:
White rice
Sunny-side up egg
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix ground chicken thigh, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, and Maggi sauce. Stir well.
2. Finely chop garlic, shallot, and lemongrass. Slice red curly chili and green Thai chili.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté garlic and shallot until fragrant. Add shrimp paste, lemongrass, red curly chili, and green Thai chili. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add marinated chicken and cook until done. Add whole small shallots, sugar, pepper, stock powder, and oyster sauce. Cook briefly.
5. Add lemon basil and cook briefly.
6. Lemon Basil Chicken Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Istimewa! Resep GULAI NANGKA TAHU [Cocok Untuk Ketupat Lebaran]
recipe_id:
Resep Gulai Nangka Tahu (untuk 7 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr nangka muda
8 buah tahu kuning, goreng
4 buah telur rebus
10 buah cabai hijau keriting

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
1 sdt lada putih butir
1 ½ sdt ketumbar
6 cm kunyit
10 buah cabai merah keriting
50 ml minyak
2 sdm air

Bahan lainnya:
5 siung bawang merah
1 batang serai
2 lembar daun salam
4 cm lengkuas
1 liter air
100 ml santan
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt MSG
2 sdt garam
2 sdm gula pasir

Pelengkap:
ketupat
rendang
bawang merah goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam blender, masukkan bawang merah, bawang putih, kemiri, lada putih, ketumbar, kunyit, cabai merah keriting, minyak dan air, haluskan
2. Iris bawang merah, geprek lengkuas, serai, potong cabai hijau keriting dan nangka muda kemudian cuci bersih nangka
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang merah, serai dan lengkuas hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bumbu halus dan daun salam, tumis hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak
4. Masukkan air, nangka, tahu goreng, telur, cabai hijau keriting, garam, gula pasir, kaldu ayam bubuk dan MSG, masak selama 10 menit
5. Masukkan santan, masak kembali selama 5 menit
6. Gulai nangka tahu siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Gulai Nangka Tahu Recipe (yield 7 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g unripe jackfruit
8 pc yellow tofu, fried
4 pc boiled egg
10 pc curly green chili

Spices:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
1 tsp whole white pepper
1.5 tsp coriander
6 cm turmeric
10 pc curly red chili
50 ml oil
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
5 pc shallot
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc bay leaf
4 cm galangal
1 liter water
100 ml coconut milk
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar

Add-ons:
Ketupat
Rendang
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. In a blender, add shallot, garlic, candlenut, white pepper, coriander, turmeric, red chili, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
2. Slice the shallots. Pound the galangal and lemongrass. Slice the green chili and jackfruit, then wash the jackfruit.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté shallots, lemongrass, and galangal until fragrant, then add the spice paste and bay leaves. Sauté until fragrant and oily.
4. Add water, jackfruit, fried tofu, egg, green chili, salt, sugar, chicken powder, and MSG. Cook for 10 minutes.
5. Add coconut milk. Cook for another 5 minutes.
6. Gulai Nangka Tahu is ready to serve.

title: Ekonomis Praktis! Resep KUE SEMPRIT [Kue Kering Lebaran]
recipe_id:
Resep Kue Semprit (untuk 70 pcs)

Bahan:
120 gr margarin (suhu ruang)
80 gr mentega tawar (suhu ruang)
150 gr gula halus
2 butir kuning telur
½ sdt perisa vanila
¾ sdt garam
260 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
80 gr maizena
30 gr krimer bubuk / susu bubuk
½ sdt perisa cokelat

Pelengkap:
choco chips

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan mentega tawar, margarin dan gula halus, mixer sesaat
2. Masukkan kuning telur, garam dan perisa vanila sambil diaduk kemudian masukkan terigu, maizena dan krimer bubuk sambil disaring, aduk rata dengan spatula
3. Bagi menjadi dua adonan kemudian beri perisa cokelat untuk adonan cokelat, aduk rata
4. Semprotkan adonan putih dan cokelat ke dalam loyang yang sudah dialasi baking paper
5. Tambahkan choco chips kemudian panggang di suhu 130 derajat celcius selama 25-30 menit
6. Kue semprit siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Kue Semprit Recipe (yield 70 pcs)

Ingredients:
120 g margarine (room temperature)
80 g unsalted butter (room temperature)
150 g icing sugar
2 pc egg yolk
½ tsp vanilla extract
¾ tsp salt
260 g cake flour
80 g cornstarch
30 g creamer / milk powder
½ tsp chocolate flavoring

Add-ons:
Choco chips

Steps:
1. In a bowl, add unsalted butter, margarine, and icing sugar. Mix for a moment.
2. Add yolks, salt, and vanilla extract while stirring. Then, sift in flour, cornstarch, and creamer. Mix well with a spatula.
3. Divide the dough into two. Add chocolate flavoring to one of them and mix well.
4. Pipe both the white and chocolate dough on a pan lined with baking paper.
5. Add choco chips, then bake at 130°C for 25-30 minutes.
6. Kue Semprit is ready to serve.

title: Renyah Tahan Lama! Resep REMPEYEK KACANG TERI [100% Sukses]
recipe_id:
Resep Rempeyek (untuk 12 porsi)

Bahan:
275 gr tepung beras
80 gr tepung tapioka
2 butir telur
50 ml santan
20 lembar daun jeruk
1 sdm garam
2 sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdt merica
1 sdm gula pasir
400 ml air
200 gr kacang tanah
60 gr teri nasi

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
10 gr kencur
1 ½ sdm ketumbar, sangrai
3 butir kemiri, sangrai

Cara membuat:
1. Buang batang daun jeruk dan iris kemudian cincang kasar kacang tanah dan geprek kemiri
2. Di dalam blender, masukkan kemiri, bawang putih, kencur, ketumbar dan sedikit air dari takaran resep, haluskan
3. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan tepung beras, tapioka, bumbu halus, telur, santan, garam, kaldu jamur, merica, gula pasir dan air secara perlahan, aduk rata
4. Masukkan kacang tanah, ikan teri dan daun jeruk, aduk rata
5. Panaskan minyak, tuang sedikit adonan kemudian goreng rempeyek di api sedang besar hingga kecokelatan dan kering, tiriskan
6. Rempeyek siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Rempeyek Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Ingredients:
275 g rice flour
80 g tapioca flour
2 pc egg
50 ml coconut milk
20 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tbsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
400 ml water
200 g peanut
60 g anchovy, small

Spices:
6 clove garlic
10 g aromatic ginger
1.5 tbsp coriander, toasted
3 pc candlenut, toasted

Steps:
1. Remove the lime leaf stems and slice. Roughly chop the peanut and crush the candlenut.
2. In a blender, add candlenut, garlic, aromatic ginger, coriander, and a little water from the recipe measurement. Blend until smooth.
3. In a bowl, mix rice flour, tapioca flour, blended spices, eggs, coconut milk, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, and sugar. Add water gradually. Stir well.
4. Add peanut, anchovy, and lime leaves, then mix well.
5. Heat oil. Pour a small amount of batter, then fry Rempeyek over medium-high heat until golden brown and crispy. Drain.
6. Rempeyek is ready to serve.

title: Resep GULAI CINCANG KHAS PADANG: Empuk & Berempah! [Menu Lebaran]
recipe_id:
Resep Gulai Cincang Padang (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg daging iga tanpa tulang

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
5 butir kemiri
4 cm lengkuas
4 cm jahe
6 cm kunyit
125 gr cabai merah tanjung, rebus
12 buah cabai rawit hijau
130 ml minyak
150 ml air

Bahan kelapa gongseng:
250 gr kelapa parut

Bahan rempah kering:
½ butir pala
2 sdt ketumbar
2 sdt jintan
2 sdt lada putih butir
3 butir cengkih
6 butir kapulaga
2 buah bunga lawang

Bahan lainnya:
2 sdm kelapa gongseng
100 ml santan
2 batang serai, geprek
5 lembar daun jeruk
1 lembar daun kunyit
2 buah asam kandis
1 sdm kaldu sapi bubuk
1 sdt MSG
2 sdt garam
1 liter air

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
sambal ijo
daun singkong

Cara membuat:
1. Panaskan wajan, masukkan kelapa parut, sangrai hingga kering dan kecokelatan kemudian blender hingga halus
2. Di dalam wajan, masukkan pala, ketumbar, jintan, lada putih, cengkih, bunga lawang dan kapulaga, sangrai hingga harum kemudian haluskan
3. Iris jahe dan lengkuas
4. Di dalam blender, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, lengkuas, jahe, kunyit, cabai rawit hijau, cabai merah tanjung rebus, minyak dan air, blender hingga halus
5. Potong-potong daging
6. Tumis bumbu halus hingga mengeluarkan minyak kemudian masukkan rempah kering, serai, daun kunyit dan daun jeruk, tumis kembali hingga wangi
7. Masukkan daging, garam, kaldu sapi bubuk, MSG dan kelapa gongseng, tumis sesaat
8. Masukkan 800 ml air dan asam kandis. Presto selama 15-20 menit
9. Masukkan sisa air dan santan, masak sesaat
10. Gulai cincang padang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Padang Beef Gulai Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg boneless beef ribs

Blended Spices:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut
4 cm galangal
4 cm ginger
6 cm turmeric
125 g boiled red chili
12 pc green Thai chili
130 ml oil
150 ml water

Kelapa Gongseng:
250 g grated coconut

Dry Spices:
½ pc nutmeg
2 tsp coriander
2 tsp cumin
2 tsp white pepper
3 pc clove
6 pc cardamom
2 pc star anise

Other ingredients:
2 tbsp kelapa gongseng
100 ml coconut milk
2 stalk lemongrass, pounded
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc turmeric leaf
2 pc asam kandis
1 tbsp beef powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tsp salt
1 liter water

Add-ons:
White rice
Sambal Ijo
Cassava leaves

Steps:
1. Heat a pan, add grated coconut. Toast until dry and browned, then blend until fine.
2. In the same pan, add nutmeg, coriander, cumin, white peppercorn, clove, star anise, and cardamom. Toast until fragrant, then grind.
3. Slice ginger and galangal.
4. In a blender, combine garlic, shallots, candlenuts, galangal, ginger, turmeric, green Thai chili, boiled red chili, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
5. Slice the beef into pieces.
6. Sauté the blended spices until the oil separates, then add ground spices, lemongrass, turmeric leaf, and kaffir lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
7. Add beef, salt, beef powder, MSG, and kelapa gongseng. Stir-fry briefly.
8. Add 800 ml water and asam kandis. Pressure cook for 15-20 minutes.
9. Add the remaining water and coconut milk. Cook briefly.
10. Padang Beef Gulai is ready to serve.

title: Dijamin Nambah Nasi! Resep TONGSENG AYAM [Gurih Manis]
recipe_id:
Resep Tongseng Ayam (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
500 gr Olagud Paha Filet
1 iris jeruk nipis
3 sdm kecap manis
2 sdt kecap asin
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt merica

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
8 buah cabai merah keriting
2 butir kemiri
2 cm jahe
2 cm kunyit
3 cm lengkuas
1 ½ sdt ketumbar, sangrai
1 sdt jintan, sangrai
4 sdm minyak
2 sdm air

Bahan iris:
5 siung bawang merah
1 buah tomat merah
6 lembar kol
1 batang daun bawang

Bahan lainnya:
1 batang serai
3 lembar daun jeruk
2 lembar daun salam
15 buah cabai rawit merah
500 ml air
3 sdm santan
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt garam
1 sdt MSG
1 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
acar timun
emping
bawang merah goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong ayam kemudian marinasi dengan kecap manis, kecap asin, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica dan perasan jeruk nipis, aduk rata. Diamkan beberapa saat
2. Potong bawang putih, bawang merah, geprek kemiri, iris jahe, lengkuas dan cabai merah keriting
3. Di dalam blender, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, jahe, lengkuas, kunyit, cabai merah keriting, ketumbar, jintan, minyak dan air, haluskan
4. Iris bawang merah dan geprek serai
5. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang merah, serai, daun jeruk dan daun salam hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bumbu halus, tumis hingga mengeluarkan minyak
6. Masukkan ayam, tumis hingga matang kemudian potong tomat, kol dan daun bawang
7. Masukkan cabai rawit merah, daun bawang, kol, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, MSG, gula pasir dan merica, tumis sesaat di api besar
8. Masukkan air dan santan, aduk rata kemudian masukkan tomat, masak sesaat
9. Tongseng ayam siap disajikan
