recipe_en:
Chicken Tongseng Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g Olagud boneless chicken thigh
1 wedge lime
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper

Spices:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
8 pc curly red chili
2 pc candlenut
2 cm ginger
2 cm turmeric
3 cm galangal
1.5 tsp coriander, toasted
1 tsp cumin, toasted
4 tbsp oil
2 tbsp water

Sliced ingredients:
5 pc shallot
1 pc red tomato
6 pc cabbage leaf
1 stalk green onion

Other ingredients:
1 stalk lemongrass
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc bay leaf
15 pc red Thai chili
500 ml water
3 tbsp coconut milk
1 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp salt
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
White rice
Pickles
Emping/melinjo crackers
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken, then marinate with sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, chicken powder, pepper, and lime juice. Mix well and let sit for a while.
2. Slice the garlic and shallot. Pound the candlenut, and slice the ginger, galangal, and curly red chili.
3. In a blender, add garlic, shallot, candlenut, ginger, galangal, turmeric, curly red chili, coriander, cumin, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Slice the shallot and pound the lemongrass.
5. Heat oil. Sauté the shallot, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaf, and bay leaf until fragrant, then add the blended spices. Sauté until oily.
6. Add chicken and stir-fry until cooked, then slice the tomato, cabbage, and green onion.
7. Add Thai chili, green onion, cabbage, salt, chicken powder, MSG, sugar, and pepper. Stir-fry briefly over high heat.
8. Pour in water and coconut milk. Stir well, then add tomato. Cook briefly.
9. Chicken Tongseng is ready to serve.

title: Anti Gagal! Resep TEMPE MENDOAN BASAH [Lengkap Dengan Sambal Kecap]
recipe_id:
Resep Tempe Mendoan (untuk 18-20 pcs)

Bahan:
350 gr tempe
2-3 batang daun bawang

Bahan adonan:
220 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
60 gr tepung beras
¼ sdt kunyit bubuk
1 butir telur
1 sdt baking powder
400 ml air
2 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
2 sdt garam

Bahan bumbu halus:
4 siung bawang putih
½ sdm ketumbar, sangrai

Bahan sambal kecap:
1 siung bawang putih
6 buah cabai rawit merah
10 buah cabai rawit hijau
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt MSG
6 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
1 buah jeruk limau

Pelengkap:
cabai rawit hijau

Cara membuat:
1. Potong tipis tempe
2. Di dalam ulekan masukkan bawang putih, ketumbar dan garam, ulek hingga halus
3. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan tepung terigu, tepung beras, bumbu halus, kunyit bubuk, kaldu jamur, gula pasir, merica, baking powder, telur dan air, aduk rata
4. Iris daun bawang kemudian masukkan ke dalam adonan, aduk rata
5. Masukkan tempe ke dalam adonan kemudian goreng tempe di api besar beberapa saat, tiriskan
6. Di dalam ulekan, masukkan bawang putih, cabai rawit hijau, cabai rawit merah garam dan MSG, ulek kasar kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
7. Tambahkan kecap manis, perasan jeruk limau dan bawang merah goreng, aduk rata
8. Mendoan siap disajikan

Jangan lupa cek media social Mr Muscle
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mrmuscleid/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@mrmuscleindonesia
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/scjohnson_id
recipe_en:
Tempe Mendoan Recipe (untuk 18-20 pcs)

Ingredients:
350 g tempeh
2-3 stalk green onion

Batter ingredients:
220 g all-purpose flour
60 g rice flour
¼ tsp turmeric powder
1 pc egg
1 tsp baking powder
400 ml water
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp salt

Spices:
4 clove garlic
½ tbsp coriander, toasted

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
1 clove garlic
6 pc red Thai chili
10 pc green Thai chili
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp MSG
6 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp fried shallot
1 pc kaffir lime

Add-ons:
Green Thai chili

Instructions:
1. Thinly slice the tempeh.
2. In a mortar and pestle, add garlic, coriander, and salt. Mash until smooth.
3. In a bowl, mix flour, rice flour, mashed spices, turmeric powder, mushroom bouillon, sugar, pepper, baking powder, egg, and water. Stir well.
4. Slice green onions and add to the batter. Stir well.
5. Dip tempeh into the batter, then fry over high heat for a few moments. Drain.
6. In a mortar and pestle, add garlic, green Thai chili, red Thai chili, salt, and MSG. Mash coarsely, then transfer to a bowl.
7. Add sweet soy sauce, kaffir lime juice, and fried shallots. Stir well.
8. Mendoan is ready to serve.

title: Spesial Lebaran! Resep OPOR AYAM PUTIH [Favorit Keluarga]
recipe_id:
Resep Opor Ayam Putih (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
800 gr ayam kampung, potong 8
5 siung bawang merah
1 batang serai
2 lembar daun salam
5 cm lengkuas
2 lembar daun jeruk
2 sdm minyak

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
¾ sdt jintan, sangrai (opsional)
¼ butir pala
1 sdt ketumbar, sangrai
45 ml minyak
2 sdm air

Bahan lainnya:
150 ml santan
1 liter air
1 sdm garam
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt MSG
2 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica

Bahan tambahan:
250 ml air
50 ml santan

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
bawang goreng
emping
cabai rawit hijau (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam blender, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, pala, ketumbar, jintan dan minyak, haluskan
2. Iris bawang merah, geprek lengkuas dan serai
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang merah, lengkuas, serai, daun jeruk dan daun salam hingga kecokelatan kemudian masukkan bumbu halus, tumis hingga mengeluarkan minyak
4. Masukkan ayam, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan air, santan, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, MSG, gula pasir dan merica, masak selama 35-40 menit di api sedang kecil
5. Tambahkan air dan santan, masak sesaat
6. Opor ayam putih siap disajikan
recipe_en:
White Opor Ayam Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
800 g free-range chicken, cut into 8 pieces
5 pc shallot
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc bay leaf
5 cm galangal
2 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 tbsp oil

Spices:
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
¾ tsp cumin, toasted (optional)
¼ pc nutmeg
1 tsp coriander, toasted
45 ml oil
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
150 ml coconut milk
1 liter water
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Additional ingredients:
250ml water
50ml coconut milk

Sides:
White rice
Fried shallots
Melinjo crackers
Green Thai chili (optional)

Instructions:
1. In a blender, add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, nutmeg, coriander, cumin, and oil, then blend until smooth.
2. Slice the shallots. Pound the galangal and lemongrass.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté the shallots, galangal, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaf, and bay leaf until browned. Then, add the blended spices and sauté until oily.
4. Add chicken. Cook briefly, then add water, coconut milk, salt, chicken powder, MSG, sugar, and pepper. Cook for 35-40 minutes over medium-low heat.
5. Add water and coconut milk, cook briefly.
6. White Opor Ayam is ready to serve.

title: Anti Melempem, Garing Tahan Lama! Resep KENTANG MUSTOFA [100% Sukses]
recipe_id:
Resep Kentang Mustofa (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg kentang kupas
3 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
12 buah cabai merah keriting rebus
75 ml minyak
2 lembar daun salam
3 lembar daun jeruk
2 sdm air asam jawa
5 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
½ sdm garam
1 sdt MSG

Cara membuat:
1. Iris tipis kentang atau menggunakan parutan kemudian rendam dengan air selama 30 menit. Bilas beberapa kali hingga bersih dan keringkan
2. Panaskan minyak, goreng kentang hingga kering dan sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan
3. Potong bawang putih, bawang merah dan cabai merah keriting rebus
4. Di dalam blender masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai merah keriting rebus dan minyak, haluskan
5. Tumis bumbu halus, daun salam, daun jeruk dan merica, tumis hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak
6. Masukkan gula pasir, garam, MSG dan air asam jawa, masak sesaat hingga gula larut
7. Masukkan kentang, kecilkan api dan aduk rata
8. Kentang mustofa siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Kentang Mustofa Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg peeled potato
3 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
12 pc boiled curly red chili
75 ml oil
2 pc bay leaf
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 tbsp tamarind juice
5 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp salt
1 tsp MSG

Instructions:
1. Slice the potatoes thinly or use a grater, then soak in water for 30 minutes. Rinse several times until clean and dry.
2. Heat oil. Fry the potato until dry and slightly brown, then drain.
3. Slice the garlic, shallot, and boiled curly red chili.
4. In a blender, add garlic, shallot, boiled curly red chili, and oil. Blend until smooth.
5. Sauté the spices, bay leaf, kaffir lime leaf, and pepper. Sauté until fragrant and oil separates.
6. Add sugar, salt, MSG, and tamarind juice. Cook briefly until sugar dissolves.
Add potato, lower the heat, and mix well.
7. Kentang Mustofa is ready to serve.

title: Bikin Nagih! Resep NASI GILA MENTENG (Stok Sahur Praktis)
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Gila (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
2 butir kemiri
4 gr terasi, bakar (opsional)
1 sdt lada putih butir
80 ml minyak

Bahan lainnya:
6 butir telur
200 gr sosis
200 gr bakso sapi
2-3 sdm saus sambal bawang
2 ½ sdm kecap manis
1 ½ sdm saus tiram
2 sdt kecap ikan
2-3 sdm air
¼ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt gula pasir
1 sdm margarin

Pelengkap:
timun
sambal
nasi putih
kerupuk

Cara membuat:
1. Iris tipis sosis dan bakso kemudian iris bawang merah, bawang putih dan geprek kemiri
2. Di dalam blender, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, lada putih, terasi dan minyak, haluskan
3. Panaskan wajan, tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian masukkkan sosis, bakso dan kecap ikan, masak hingga wangi
4. Masukkan telur, aduk rata kemudian masukkan saus sambal, saus tiram dan kecap manis, masak sesaat
5. Masukkan air, kaldu ayam bubuk dan gula pasir, aduk rata kemudian masukkan margarin, tumis sesaat
6. Nasi gila siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Nasi Gila Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Spices:
5 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
2 pc candlenut
4 g toasted shrimp paste (optional)
1 tsp whole white pepper
80 ml oil
Other ingredients:
6 pc egg
200 g sausage
200 g beef meatballs
2-3 tbsp chili garlic sauce
2.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
2-3 tbsp water
¼ tsp chicken powder
2 tsp sugar
1 tbsp margarine
Sides:
Cucumber
Sambal
Steamed rice
Crackers
Steps:
1. Thinly slice the sausage and meatballs, then slice shallots and garlic, and crush the candlenuts.
2. In a blender, add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, white pepper, shrimp paste, and oil. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat a pan and sauté the spice mix until fragrant. Add sausage, meatballs, and fish sauce, then stir-fry until aromatic.
4. Add eggs and scramble, then add chili sauce, oyster sauce, and sweet soy sauce. Stir briefly.
5. Pour in water, chicken powder, and sugar. Mix well, then add margarine and stir-fry for a while.
6. Nasi Gila is ready to serve.

title: Kreasi NUGGET ALA PLATTER HALAL GUYS: Versi Sat Set!
recipe_id:
Resep Nugget Mix Platter (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan pilaf rice:
375 gr beras
500 ml air
2 sdt bubuk kari
1 sdt oregano kering
2 lembar bay leaf
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
½ buah bawang bombai, cincang
3 siung bawang putih, cincang
3 sdm minyak
1 sdm mentega tawar

Bahan garlic sauce:
100 gr mayones
100 gr sour cream
2 siung bawang putih
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
2-3 sdm air
1 buah jeruk nipis

Pelengkap:
sambal rawit
kulit tortilla, panggang dan potong
chicken nugget
tomat beef
head lettuce
hot sauce/tabasco (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih dan bawang bombai hingga wangi
2. Di dalam rice cooker, masukkan beras, air, kaldu ayam bubuk, bubuk kari, oregano kering, tumisan bawang putih bawang bombai dan bay leaf, aduk rata dan masak hingga matang
3. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan mayones, sour cream, bawang putih parut, garam, merica, perasan jeruk nipis dan air, aduk rata
4. Goreng chicken nugget hingga matang, tiriskan kemudian potong-potong tomat dan lettuce
5. Tambahkan mentega ke dalam nasi yang sudah matang, aduk rata
6. Di dalam piring saji, susun nasi dan pelengkap lainnya
7. Nugget mix platter siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Nugget Mixed Platter Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Pilaf Rice ingredients:
375 g rice
500 ml water
2 tsp curry powder
1 tsp dried oregano
2 pc bay leaf
1 tbsp chicken powder
½ pc onion, chopped
3 clove garlic, chopped
3 tbsp oil
1 tbsp unsalted butter

Garlic Sauce ingredients:
100 g mayonnaise
100 g sour cream
2 clove garlic
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2-3 tbsp water
1 pc lime

Toppings:
Cayenne pepper
Tortilla, grilled and sliced
Chicken nugget
Beef tomato
Lettuce head
Hot sauce/tabasco (optional)

Steps:
1. Heat oil. Sauté garlic and onion until fragrant.
2. In a rice cooker, add rice, water, chicken powder, curry powder, dried oregano, sautéed garlic and onion, and bay leaf. Stir well and cook through.
3. In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, grated garlic, salt, pepper, lime juice, and water. Mix well.
4. Fry the chicken nuggets. Set aside, then cut the tomatoes and lettuce.
5. Add butter to the cooked rice and mix well.
6. On a serving plate, arrange the rice and other toppings.
7. Nugget Mixed Platter is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Pedas Praktis! Resep TEMPE CHILI PADI
recipe_id:
Resep Tempe Chili Padi (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi tempe:
330 gr tempe
1 sdm bumbu marinasi tempe instan
4 sdm maizena
3 sdm air

Bahan lainnya:
5 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
50 gr cabai rawit merah
50 gr cabai rawit hijau
4 lembar daun jeruk
2 sdt kaldu jamur
2 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica
100 ml air
1 sdm air asam jawa

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong memanjang tempe dan iris miring
2. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan bumbu marinasi tempe instan, maizena dan air, aduk rata kemudian masukkan tempe, aduk rata
3. Panaskan minyak, goreng tempe hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
4. Di dalam food chopper, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit merah, cabai rawit hijau dan daun jeruk, haluskan
5. Tumis bumbu dasar di api sedang hingga wangi kemudian masukkan air, kaldu jamur, gula pasir, merica, air asam jawa dan tempe, tumis sesaat
6. Tempe chili padi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chili Tempeh Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinated Tempeh ingredients:
330 g tempeh
1 tbsp instant tempeh spice mix
4 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
5 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
50 g red Thai chili
50 g green Thai chili
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
100 ml water
1 tbsp tamarind juice

Add-on:
white rice

Steps:
1. Slice the tempeh lengthwise, then diagonally.
2. In a bowl, mix the instant tempeh spice mix, cornstarch, and water until well combined, then add the tempeh and coat evenly.
3. Heat oil. Fry the tempeh until golden brown, then drain.
4. In a chopper, chop the garlic, shallots, red and green Thai chilis, and kaffir lime leaves until smooth.
5. Sauté the blended spices over medium heat until fragrant. Then, add water, mushroom bouillon, sugar, pepper, tamarind juice, and tempeh. Stir-fry briefly.
6. Chili Tempeh is ready to serve.

title: 5 Menit Jadi! Resep NUGGET CABE GARAM [Ide Sahur Praktis]
recipe_id:
Resep Nugget Cabai Garam (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan:
200 gr chicken nugget stick
10 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
10 buah cabai rawit merah
2 batang daun bawang
1 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong chicken nugget lalu goreng hingga matang, tiriskan
2. Di dalam food chopper, masukkan cabai rawit merah, bawang merah dan bawang putih, haluskan kemudian iris daun bawang
3. Panaskan minyak, tumis bumbu dasar yang sudah dihaluskan di api sedang besar hingga wangi kemudian masukkan kaldu jamur, gula pasir dan merica, tumis di api kecil hingga sedikit kering
4. Masukkan nugget dan daun bawang, tumis sesaat
5. Nugget cabai garam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Salt & Pepper Nuggets Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g chicken nugget sticks
10 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
10 pc red Thai chili
2 stalk green onion
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar  
1/8 tsp pepper

Side dish:
White rice  

Instructions:
1. Cut the chicken nuggets into pieces, then fry until cooked. Set aside.
2. In a food chopper, chop the Thai chili, shallots, and garlic until smooth, then slice the green onions.
3. Heat oil. Sauté the chopped seasoning over medium-high heat until fragrant. Add mushroom bouillon, sugar, and pepper, then stir-fry over low heat until slightly crisp.
4. Add the fried nuggets and green onions. Stir briefly.
5. Spicy Salt & Pepper Nuggets are ready to serve.

title: Segar Praktis Sehat! Resep ES JELI HIJAU BAYAM [Favorit Anak]
recipe_id:
Resep Es Jeli Hijau Bayam (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan jeli:
15 gr bubuk jeli polos
5-7 gr bubuk agar-agar polos
4 lembar daun pandan
2 liter air
80 gr gula pasir
50 gr horenso

Bahan lainnya:
susu
sirup gula pandan/stevia
es batu

Cara membuat:
1. Rebus horenso beberapa saat kemudian bilas dan peras. Blender dengan sedikit air hingga halus
2. Di dalam panci, masukkan bubuk jeli polos, agar-agar polos, gula pasir, daun pandan dan air, masak hingga mendidih
3. Masukkan jus bayam, aduk rata dan masak sesaat. Tuang ke dalam loyang atau cetakan dan dinginkan hingga set
4. Di dalam gelas, masukkan es batu, jeli, gula pandan dan susu
5. Es jeli hijau bayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Green Spinach Jelly Drink Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Jelly ingredients:
15 g plain jelly powder
5-7 g plain agar powder
4 pc pandan leaf
2 liter water
80 g sugar
50 g horenso (Japanese spinach)

Other ingredients:
Milk
Pandan sugar syrup/Stevia
Ice cubes

Steps:
1. Boil the horenso briefly, then rinse and squeeze out excess water. Blend with a little water until smooth.
2. In a saucepan, add plain jelly powder, plain agar powder, sugar, pandan leaves, and water. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the spinach juice. Stir well and cook briefly. Pour into a mold and let it cool until set.
4. In a glass, add ice cubes, jelly, pandan sugar, and milk.
5. Green Spinach Jelly Drink is ready to serve.

title: Pedas, Gurih & Tahan Lama! Resep SAMBAL CUMI MERCON
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Cumi (untuk 1 jar / 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
150 gr cumi asin
8 siung bawang putih
15 siung bawang merah
100 gr cabai merah keriting
60 gr cabai rawit merah
5 lembar daun jeruk
200-250 ml minyak
1 sdt garam
1 sdt MSG
1 sdm gula pasir

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
kerupuk

Cara membuat:
1. Bilas cumi asin dengan air panas kemudian cuci bersih, keringkan dan potong-potong
2. Panaskan minyak, goreng cumi hingga sedikit kering, tiriskan
3. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai merah keriting, cabai rawit merah dan daun jeruk, masak sesaat kemudian haluskan
4. Tumis kembali sambal kemudian tambahkan minyak, garam, MSG dan gula pasir, tumis hingga mengeluarkan minyak
5. Masukkan cumi goreng, masak sesaat
6. Sambal cumi asin siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Salted Squid Sambal Recipe (yield 1 jar / 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g salted squid
8 clove garlic
15 pc shallot
100 g curly red chili
60 g red Thai chili
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
200-250 ml oil
1 tsp salt
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar

Sides:
Steamed rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Rinse the salted squid with hot water. Clean thoroughly, dry, and slice into pieces.
2. Heat oil. Fry the squid until slightly crispy, then drain.
3. Heat oil. Add garlic, shallots, curly red chili, Thai chili, and kaffir lime leaves. Cook briefly, then blend until smooth.
4. Sauté the sambal again, then add oil, salt, MSG, and sugar. Cook until the oil separates.
5. Add the fried squid and cook briefly.
6. Salted Squid Sambal is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Renyah! Resep GEHU PEDAS JELETOT [Cocok Untuk Takjil]
recipe_id:
Resep Gehu Pedas (untuk 13 pcs)

Bahan:
13 pcs tahu pong

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
4 buah cabai merah keriting rebus
60 ml minyak

Bahan lainnya:
225 gr kol
70 gr wortel
100 gr taoge
50 gr cabai rawit merah
½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1 ½ sdm gula pasir
½ sdm garam
2 sdm air
penyedap/msg (opsional)

Bahan pelapis basah:
75 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
25 gr tepung beras
25 gr maizena
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
¼ sdt baking powder
175 ml air

Cara membuat:
1. Iris kol, wortel, bawang merah dan bawang putih
2. Di dalam blender, masukkan bawang merah, bawang putih, cabai merah keriting rebus dan minyak, haluskan
3. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian cincang kasar cabai rawit merah dengan blender
4. Masukkan cabai rawit merah, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan kol dan wortel, aduk rata
5. Masukkan kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, gula pasir dan air, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan taoge, masak sesaat
6. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan tepung terigu, tepung beras, maizena, baking powder, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk dan merica, aduk rata kemudian masukkan air secara perlahan, aduk rata
7. Masukkan isian gehu yang sudah tidak panas ke dalam plastik segitiga kemudian isi tahu dengan isian dan celupkan ke dalam tepung basah
8. Panaskan minyak, goreng tahu di api sedang besar hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
9. Gehu pedas siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Gehu Recipe (yield 13 pcs)

Ingredients:
13 pc tahu pong

Spices:
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallots
4 pc boiled curly red chili
60 ml oil

Other ingredients:
225 g cabbage
70 g carrot
100 g bean sprouts
50 g red Thai chilies
½ tbsp chicken powder
1.5 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp salt
2 tbsp water
MSG (optional)

Batter ingredients:
75 g all-purpose flour
25 g rice flour
25 g cornstarch
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
¼ tsp baking powder
175 ml water

Steps:
1. Slice cabbage, carrot, shallots, and garlic.
2. In a blender, add shallots, garlic, boiled curly red chilies, and oil. Blend until smooth.
3. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant, then roughly chop the red Thai chili using a blender.
4. Add chopped Thai chili. Sauté briefly, then add cabbage and carrot. Stir well.
5. Add chicken powder, salt, sugar, and water. Cook briefly, then add bean sprouts. Cook briefly.
6. In a bowl, add flour, rice flour, cornstarch, baking powder, salt, chicken powder, and pepper. Mix well, then gradually add water, stirring until smooth.
7. Transfer the filling to a piping bag, then stuff the tofu with the filling and dip into the batter.
8. Heat oil. Fry the tofu over medium-high heat until golden brown. Remove.
9. Spicy Gehu is ready to serve.

title: Krispi Nagih! Resep TELUR BARENDO Khas Padang
recipe_id:
Resep Telur Barendo (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan:
3 butir telur ayam
3 siung bawang merah
¼ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
3 sdt air
3 sdt maizena

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
timun
bumbu rendang (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Campurkan maizena dan air, aduk rata
2. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan telur, kaldu ayam bubuk dan larutan maizena, kocok lepas kemudian iris bawang merah dan masukkan ke dalam telur, kocok kembali
3. Panaskan minyak, tuang telur secara perlahan sambil diaduk, masak hingga kecokelatan dan kering, tiriskan
4. Masukkan ke dalam air fryer untuk mengurangi minyak berlebih selama 5 menit pada suhu 180 derajat celcius
5. Telur barendo siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Telur Barendo Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc chicken egg
3 pc shallot
¼ tsp chicken powder
3 tsp water
3 tsp cornstarch

Add-on:
White rice
Cucumber
Rendang spices (optional)

Steps:
1. Mix cornstarch and water. Stir well.
2. In a bowl, add eggs, chicken powder, and cornstarch slurry. Whisk lightly, then slice shallots and add them to the eggs. Whisk again.
3. Heat oil, slowly pour in the eggs while stirring. Fry until browned and crispy, then remove and set aside.
4. Place in an air fryer to reduce excess oil for 5 minutes at 180°C.
5. Telur Barendo is ready to serve.

title: Praktis & Lembut! Resep TELUR SAUS TIRAM [Favorit Anak]
recipe_id:
Resep Telur Saus Tiram (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan:
3 butir telur
1 ½ sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdm air

Bahan lainnya:
3 siung bawang putih
¼ buah bawang bombai
1 batang daun bawang
2 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdt minyak wijen
2 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt kaldu jamur
1 ½ sdm maizena
250 ml air

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan terigu dengan air, aduk rata kemudian masukkan telur dan kaldu ayam bubuk, kocok hingga rata
2. Cincang bawang putih, iris bawang bombai dan daun bawang
3. Campurkan air, saus tiram, kecap asin, gula pasir dan maizena, aduk rata
4. Panaskan minyak, goreng telur, aduk rata kemudian masukkan bawang putih dan bawang bombai, masak hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan
5. Masukkan campuran saus, masak hingga mendidih kemudian masukkan daun bawang, kaldu jamur dan minyak wijen, masak sesaat
6. Telur saus tiram siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Eggs in Oyster Sauce Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
1.5 tbsp all-purpose flour
½ tsp chicken powder
2 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
3 clove garlic
¼ pc onion
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1.5 tbsp cornstarch
250 ml water

Add-on:
White rice

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix flour with water. Stir well, then add eggs and chicken powder. Mix well.
2. Mince garlic. Slice onion and green onion.
3. Mix water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch. Stir well.
4. Heat oil. Fry eggs while stirring, then add garlic and onion. Cook until fragrant and slightly browned.
5. Pour in the sauce mixture. Bring to a boil, then add green onion, mushroom bouillon, and sesame oil. Cook briefly.
6. Eggs in Oyster Sauce are ready to serve.

title: TANPA MIXER! CAKE KURMA DAN CREAMCHEESE FROSTING [Dates Carrot Cake]
recipe_id:
Resep Dates Cake With Cream Cheese (untuk 8 porsi)

Diameter loyang 20 cm

Bahan kurma paste:
150 gr kurma tunisia
1 sdt baking soda
60 ml air mendidih

Bahan adonan:
3 butir telur
5-6 sdm gula palem (50-60 gr)
130 ml minyak
50 gr mentega tawar, lelehkan
1 sdt perisa vanila
175 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1 ½ sdt baking powder
½ sdt kayu manis bubuk
¼ sdt pala bubuk
¾ sdt garam

Bahan isian:
170 gr wortel
60 gr kacang mete
100 gr kurma Tunisia

Bahan topping:
150 gr cream cheese (suhu ruang)
1 ½ sdm kental manis
1/8 sdt garam
kacang mete, cincang kasar
kurma tunisia, belah empat

Cara membuat:
1. Buang biji kurma dan belah dua. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk kemudian tambahkan baking soda dan air mendidih. Tutup dan rendam selama 10 menit
2. Masukkan kurma ke dalam food chopper, haluskan
3. Parut wortel, cincang kurma dan cincang kacang mete
4. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan telur dan gula palem, aduk dengan ballon whisk kemudian masukkan perisa vanila, aduk hingga gula larut
5. Masukkan kurma yang sudah dihaluskan, mentega cair dan minyak, aduk rata
6. Masukkan tepung terigu, baking powder, kayu manis bubuk, pala bubuk dan garam sambil disaring, aduk hingga rata
7. Masukkan wortel, kurma dan kacang mete, aduk rata
8. Siapkan loyang, alasi dengan baking paper kemudian tuang adonan ke dalam loyang. Panggang di suhu 160 derajat celcius selama 45 menit
9. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan cream cheese, aduk dengan ballon whisk kemudian masukkan kental manis dan garam, aduk hingga rata
10. Semprotkan topping cream cheese di atas cake, ratakan kemudian tuang kacang mete cincang dan kurma di atasnya
11. Dates carrot cake with cream cheese siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Date Cake with Cream Cheese Recipe (yield 8 servings)

For 20 cm pans

Date Paste ingredients:
150 g Tunisian dates
1 tsp baking soda
60 ml boiling water

Cake Batter ingredients:
3 pc egg
5-6 tbsp palm sugar (50-60 g)
130 ml oil
50 g unsalted butter, melted
1 tsp vanilla extract
175 g all-purpose flour
1.5 tsp baking powder
½ tsp ground cinnamon
¼ tsp ground nutmeg
¾ tsp salt

Mix-ins:
170 g carrot
60 g cashew
100 g Tunisian dates

Frosting ingredients:
150 g cream cheese (room temperature)
1.5 tbsp condensed milk
1/8 tsp salt
Cashew, roughly chopped
Tunisian dates, quartered

Instructions:
1. Remove the pits from the dates and cut them in half. Place them in a bowl, add baking soda and boiling water. Cover and let sit for 10 minutes.
2. Blend the soaked dates in a food chopper until smooth.
3. Grate the carrot, chop the dates, and chop the cashews.
4. In a bowl, whisk eggs and palm sugar with a balloon whisk, then add vanilla extract and mix until the sugar dissolves.
5. Add the blended date paste, melted butter, and oil. Mix well.
6. Sift in the flour, baking powder, ground cinnamon, ground nutmeg, and salt, then mix until combined.
7. Fold in the grated carrot, chopped dates, and cashews.
8. Line a baking pan with baking paper. Pour in the batter and bake at 160°C for 45 minutes.
9. In a bowl, whisk cream cheese until smooth, then add condensed milk and salt, mixing until combined.
10. Pipe or spread the cream cheese topping over the cooled cake, then sprinkle with chopped cashews and quartered dates.
11. Date Carrot Cake with Cream Cheese is ready to serve.

title: 5 Menit Jadi! Resep KOREAN TORTILLA EGG SANDWICH
recipe_id:
Resep Tortilla Egg Sandwich (untuk 1 porsi)

Bahan:
1 lembar kulit tortilla
2 butir telur
½ buah wortel
1 lembar kol
1 batang daun bawang
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt garam
⅛ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
1 sdt gula pasir
2 lembar sliced cheese (opsional)
saus tomat
mayones (opsional)
mentega

Cara membuat:
1. Iris kol, daun bawang dan wortel kemudian masukkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Masukkan telur, kaldu ayam bubuk, garam dan merica, aduk rata
3. Panaskan wajan, oles dengan mentega dan tuang adonan telur. Ratakan ke sisi wajan kemudian letakkan kulit tortila diatasnya sambil ditekan
4. Oles kulit tortila dengan mentega kemudian balik dan tambahkan sliced cheese, gula pasir, saus tomat, dan mayones, masak hingga kulit tortila wangi dan kering
5. Tortilla egg sandwich siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Tortilla Egg Sandwich Recipe (yield 1 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc tortilla sheet
2 pc egg
½ pc carrot
1 pc cabbage leaf
1 stalk green onion
½ tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
Toppings:
1 tsp sugar
2 slice cheese (optional)
Ketchup
Mayonnaise (optional)
Butter
Instructions:
1. Slice the cabbage, green onion, and carrot, then place them in a bowl.
2. Add eggs, chicken powder, salt, and pepper, then mix well.
3. Heat a pan. Grease it with butter, and pour in the egg mixture. Spread it out, then place the tortilla on top while pressing gently.
4. Grease the tortilla with butter, then flip it over. Add sliced cheese, sugar, ketchup, and mayonnaise. Cook until the tortilla is fragrant and crispy.
5. The Tortilla Egg Sandwich is ready to serve.

title: Kenyal Tidak Hancur! Resep SOHUN GORENG CABE IJO
recipe_id:
Resep Sohun Goreng Cabe Ijo (untuk 7-8 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr sohun
12 buah cabai hijau keriting
10 buah cabai rawit hijau
3 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
2 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu jamur
¼ sdt merica
½ sdm gula pasir
150 ml air

Bahan bumbu halus:
4 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
60 ml minyak

Pelengkap:
bawang goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Rendam sohun dengan air selama 10 menit
2. Iris bawang merah dan bawang putih kemudian masukkan ke dalam blender beserta minyak, haluskan
3. Iris cabai hijau keriting dan cabai rawit hijau
4. Panaskan minyak, tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian masukkan merica, tumis hingga kering
5. Masukkan cabai keriting hijau dan cabai rawit hijau, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan kecap manis, saus tiram, air, garam, kaldu jamur dan gula pasir, aduk rata
6. Masukkan sohun, aduk hingga rata. Gunting sohun apabila terlalu panjang
7. Sohun goreng cabe ijo siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Green Chili Fried Glass Noodles Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g glass noodles
12 pc curly green chili
10 pc green Thai chili
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
150 ml water

Blended Spices:
4 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
60 ml oil

Topping:
Fried shallots

Instructions:
1. Soak the glass noodles in water for 10 minutes.
2. Slice the shallots and garlic, then blend them with oil until smooth.
3. Slice the curly green chili and green Thai chili.
4. Heat oil. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant, then add pepper and cook well.
5. Add the sliced chilies and stir-fry briefly, then add sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, water, salt, mushroom bouillon, and sugar. Mix well.
6. Add the glass noodles and stir until evenly coated. Cut the noodles if they are too long.
7. Serve the Green Chili Fried Glass Noodles with fried shallots.

title: Mudah & Praktis! Resep TORI PAITAN RAMEN [Kaldu Untuk Stok]
recipe_id:
Resep Tori Paitan Ramen (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
500 gr paha ayam filet
130 gr saus teriyaki

Bahan kuah ramen:
1 kg sayap ayam
4 cm jahe
4 siung bawang putih
2 liter air

Bahan minyak bawang:
7 siung bawang merah
4 siung bawang putih
100 ml minyak

Bahan lainnya:
mi ramen
jamur kuping rebus
daun bawang, iris
nori
telur rebus

Penyajian:
300 ml kuah ramen
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdt gula pasir
1/3 sdt cuka beras (opsional)
¼ sdt katsuobushi bubuk
1 sdm minyak bawang

Cara membuat:
1. Marinasi paha ayam filet dengan saus teriyaki, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 2 jam atau semalaman
di dalam kulkas
2. Potong-potong sayap ayam dan iris jahe kemudian masukkan ke dalam presto beserta bawang putih dan air. Presto selama 60 menit
3. Di dalam food chopper, masukkan bawang merah, bawang putih dan minyak, haluskan kemudian masak hingga kecokelatan, sisihkan
4. Blender halus ayam yang sudah di presto kemudian saring. Diamkan di dalam kulkas semalaman
5. Masukkan ayam teriyaki ke dalam air fryer, masak pada suhu 180 derajat celcius selama 10-12 menit
6. Iris-iris ayam teriyaki, tuang minyak bawang kemudian torch
7. Panaskan kuah ramen kemudian di dalam mangkuk saji masukkan kecap asin, katsuobushi bubuk, kaldu jamur, gula pasir, cuka beras, kuah ramen, mi ramen dan minyak bawang
8. Tambahkan topping ayam teriyaki, telur rebus, jamur kuping, daun bawang dan nori
9. Tori paitan ramen siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Tori Paitan Ramen Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinated Chicken ingredients:
500 g boneless chicken thigh
130 g teriyaki sauce

Ramen Broth ingredients:
1 kg chicken wings
4 cm ginger
4 clove garlic
2 liter water

Aromatic Oil ingredients:
7 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
100 ml oil

Other ingredients:
Ramen noodles
Boiled wood ear mushroom
Chopped green onion
Nori
Boiled egg

Serving:
300 ml ramen broth
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp sugar
1/3 tsp rice vinegar (optional)
¼ tsp katsuobushi powder
1 tbsp aromatic oil

Instructions:
1. Marinate the chicken thighs with teriyaki sauce. Mix well and let sit for 2 hours or overnight in the fridge.
2. Chop the chicken wings and slice the ginger, then put them in a pressure cooker along with garlic and water. Cook for 60 minutes.
3. In a chopper, blend the shallots, garlic, and oil until smooth, then cook until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Blend the pressure-cooked chicken until smooth, then strain the broth. Let it sit in the fridge overnight.
5. Cook the Teriyaki Chicken in an air fryer at 180°C for 10-12 minutes.
6. Slice the Teriyaki Chicken, drizzle with aromatic oil, then torch it for extra flavor.
7. Heat the ramen broth. In a serving bowl, add soy sauce, katsuobushi powder, mushroom bouillon, sugar, rice vinegar, ramen broth, ramen noodles, and aromatic oil.
8. Top with Teriyaki Chicken, boiled egg, wood ear mushrooms, green onions, and nori.
9. Tori Paitan Ramen is ready to serve.

title: Anti Bocor! Resep CUSTARD BUN: Roti Isi Vla Lembut & Wangi
recipe_id:
Resep Custard Bun (untuk 12 pcs)

Bahan biang:
200 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
150 ml air
2 gr ragi
60 gr gula pasir

Bahan dough:
135 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
20 gr susu bubuk
3 gr ragi
1 butir telur
40 ml susu
45 gr mentega tawar
4 gr garam

Bahan isian vla putih:
2 sachet (120gr) vla instan vanila
220 ml air panas

Bahan isian vla cokelat:
2 sachet (126gr) vla instan cokelat
180 ml air panas

Bahan tambahan topping:
1 ½ sdm tepung terigu protein sedang (untuk
masing-masing vla

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung, gula dan ragi, aduk rata kemudian masukkan air secara perlahan, aduk rata. Diamkan di dalam kulkas minimal 4 jam atau semalaman
2. Campurkan vla instan dengan air panas, aduk rata. Diamkan di dalam kulkas selama 1-2 jam
3. Timbang isian ke dalam mangkuk berisi maizena kurang lebih 30 gram. Bentuk bulat dan masukkan ke dalam kulkas. Total 12 pcs isian, 6 untuk isian cokelat dan 6 untuk isian vanila
4. Untuk topping, tambahkan tepung terigu ke dalam sisa isian, aduk rata. Masukkan ke dalam plastik segitiga dan masukkan ke dalam kulkas
5. Di dalam mixer, masukkan biang, tepung terigu, susu bubuk, ragi, telur dan susu, mixer selama 6 menit di kecepatan sedang tinggi
6. Masukkan mentega dan garam, mixer selama 8-10 menit di kecepatan sedang tinggi hingga kalis. Istirahatkan adonan selama 30 menit
7. Bentuk bulat adonan kurang lebih 50-55 gram kemudian isi dengan isian, bentuk bulat Kembali hingga rapat
8. Letakkan pada loyang muffin yang sudah dialasi baking paper. Istirahatkan selama 30-40 menit
9. Tambahkan topping custard di atasnya. Panggang di suhu 150 derajat celcius selama 15 menit
10. Diamkan beberapa saat sebelum dikonsumsi. Custard bun siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Custard Bun Recipe (yield 12 pcs)

Starter ingredients:
200 g bread flour
150 ml water
2 g yeast
60 g sugar

Dough ingredients:
135 g bread flour
20 g milk powder
3 g yeast
1 pc egg
40 ml milk
45 g unsalted butter
4 g salt

Vanilla Custard Filling ingredients:
2 sachets (120 g) instant vanilla custard
220 ml hot water

Chocolate Custard Filling ingredients:
2 sachets (126 g) instant chocolate custard
180 ml hot water

Topping ingredients:
1.5 all-purpose flour (for each filling)

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix the flour, sugar, and yeast, then gradually add water. Mix well. Let it sit in the fridge for at least 4 hours or overnight.
2. Mix the instant custard with hot water and stir well. Let it chill in the fridge for 1-2 hours.
3. Weigh the filling into a bowl with cornstarch, about 30 grams each. Form into balls and refrigerate. You will have 12 fillings, 6 vanilla and 6 chocolate.
4. For the topping, add flour to the remaining filling and mix well. Place it into a piping bag and refrigerate.
5. In a mixer, combine the starter, flour, milk powder, yeast, egg, and milk. Mix for 6 minutes at medium-high speed.
6. Add butter and salt, then mix for 8-10 minutes at medium-high speed until smooth. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes.
7. Form dough balls of about 50-55 g, then fill with the custard filling. Seal them tightly.
8. Place them on a muffin tray lined with baking paper. Let them rest for 30-40 minutes.
9. Add the custard topping on top. Bake at 150°C for 15 minutes.
10. Let it cool slightly before serving. Custard Buns are ready to serve.

title: Praktis Pakai Rice Cooker! Resep BEEF PEPPER RICE
recipe_id:
Resep Beef Pepper Rice (untuk 7 porsi)

Bahan:
350 gr beras jepang
400 ml air
150 gr jagung, pipil
1 buah bawang bombai
1 sdt lada hitam
2 sdt kaldu bubuk

Bahan marinasi daging:
250 gr daging sapi iris
2 siung bawang putih
2 cm jahe
3 sdm saus teriyaki
2 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm maizena
50 ml air

Bahan minyak aromatik:
100 ml minyak
½ buah bawang bombai
5 siung bawang putih
4 cm jahe
1 sdm minyak wijen

Bahan tambahan nasi:
2 sdm saus teriyaki
1-2 sdm saus tiram
3 sdm minyak aromatik
1 batang daun bawang, iris
2 sdm mentega asin

Cara membuat:
1. Marinasi daging dengan bawang putih parut, jahe parut, saus teriyaki, saus tiram, maizena dan air, aduk rata. Diamkan beberapa saat
2. Potong kotak bawang bombai
3. Di dalam rice cooker, masukkan beras, air, daging yang sudah dimarinasi, jagung pipil, bawang bombai, lada hitam dan kaldu bubuk, masak hingga matang
4. Di dalam chopper, masukkan bawang putih, bawang bombai dan minyak, haluskan
5. Iris jahe kemudian tumis bumbu halus dan jahe hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan. Sisihkan ke dalam mangkuk lalu tambahkan minyak wijen, aduk rata
6. Tambahkan saus teriyaki, saus tiram, minyak aromatik dan mentega ke dalam nasi kemudian torch
7. Masukkan daun bawang, aduk rata
8. Beef pepper rice siap disajikan

title: Kenyal Gurih Lembut! Resep Ketan Ayam LO MAI GAI [Ala Resto Dimsum]
recipe_id:
Resep Lo Mai Gai (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan nasi:
500 gr beras ketan putih, cuci bersih
600 ml air
½ sdm ebi kering
4 buah jamur shitake kering
2 lembar daun pandan
1 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt gula pasir
3 sdm kecap asin

Bahan marinasi ayam:
300 gr paha ayam filet
½ sdt jahe parut
½ sdm kecap asin
1 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm tapioka
1 sdt minyak wijen
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt bubuk ngohiong
1/8 sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt kecap asin hitam
40 ml minyak
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah

Bahan lainnya:
lapchiong ayam
chili oil (opsional)
cabai rawit hijau (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam rice cooker, masukkan beras ketan, air, ebi kering, jamur shitake kering dan daun pandan, masak hingga matang
2. Potong-potong ayam kemudian marinasi dengan jahe parut, kecap asin, saus tiram, tapioka, minyak wijen, gula pasir, bubuk ngohiong, merica dan kaldu jamur, aduk rata
3. Tambahkan kecap asin hitam, aduk rata. Sisihkan jamur dan daun pandan pada nasi lalu potong-potong jamur
4. Cincang halus bawang putih dan bawang merah kemudian tumis hingga wangi
5. Masukkan ayam, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan jamur, masak beberapa saat
6. Masukkan kecap asin, kaldu jamur dan gula pasir ke dalam nasi, aduk rata kemudian iris miring lapchiong ayam
7. Di dalam aluminium cup, susun lapchiong, tumisan ayam, dan nasi ketan. Tutup dengan aluminium foil dan kukus selama 15-20 menit
8. Siapkan daun teratai kering yang sudah direndam air kemudian gunting menjadi beberapa bagian
9. Susun nasi ketan, topping ayam, lapchiong ayam, cabai rawit hijau dan nasi ketan, bungkus dan ikat. Kukus selama 15-20 menit
10. Lo mai gai siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Lo Mai Gai Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Rice ingredients:
500 g white sticky rice, wash thoroughly
600 ml water
½ tbsp dried shrimp
4 pc dried shiitake mushroom
2 pc pandan leaf
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar
3 tbsp soy sauce

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
½ tsp grated ginger
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp tapioca flour
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp five-spice powder
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp dark soy sauce
40 ml oil
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot

Others:
Chinese sausage (lap cheong)
Chili oil (optional)
Green Thai chili (optional)

Steps:
1. In a rice cooker, add sticky rice, water, dried shrimp, dried shiitake mushrooms, and pandan leaves. Cook until done.
2. Cut chicken into pieces and marinate with grated ginger, soy sauce, oyster sauce, tapioca flour, sesame oil, sugar, five-spice powder, pepper, and mushroom bouillon. Mix well.
3. Add dark soy sauce and mix well. Set aside mushrooms and pandan leaves from the rice, then chop the mushrooms.
4. Finely chop garlic and shallots, then sauté until fragrant.
5. Add chicken. Sauté briefly, then add mushrooms and cook for a few more minutes.
6. Add soy sauce, mushroom bouillon, and sugar to the rice. Mix well, then slice the Chinese sausage.
7. In aluminum cups, layer Chinese sausage, chicken stir-fry, and sticky rice. Cover with aluminum foil and steam for 15-20 minutes.
8. Prepare dried lotus leaves soaked in water, then cut into pieces.
9. Layer sticky rice, chicken topping, Chinese sausage, green Thai chili, and sticky rice. Wrap and tie with a string. Steam for 15-20 minutes.
10. Lo Mai Gai is ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Oven & Susu! CARAMEL PUDDING [Anti Gagal]
recipe_id:
Resep Caramel Pudding (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan karamel:
60 gr gula pasir
2 sdm air

Bahan puding:
2 butir kuning telur
2 butir telur
30 gr gula pasir
¼ sdt garam
1 sdt perisa vanila
50 gr krimer bubuk
300 ml air
10 gr maizena

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam panci, panaskan gula pasir dan air, masak hingga kecokelatan kemudian tuang ke dalam wadah tahan panas atau aluminium cup
2. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan telur, kuning telur, gula pasir, garam dan perisa vanila, aduk rata
3. Di dalam panci, masukkan krimer bubuk, air dan maizena, aduk rata kemudian masak hingga sedikit mendidih
4. Masukkan secara perlahan ke dalam adonan telur sambil diaduk kemudian saring dan tuang ke dalam wadah tahan panas
5. Tutup dengan aluminium foil kemudian kukus selama 30-35 menit
6. Caramel pudding siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Caramel Pudding Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Caramel ingredients:
60 g sugar
2 tbsp water

Pudding ingredients:
2 pc egg yolk
2 pc whole egg
30 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
50 g creamer powder
300 ml water
10 g cornstarch

Steps:
1. In a saucepan, heat sugar and water. Cook until golden brown, then pour into heat-proof bowls or aluminum cups.
2. In a bowl, whisk together whole eggs, egg yolks, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. In a saucepan, combine creamer powder, water, and cornstarch. Mix well and bring to a simmer.
4. Gradually pour the creamer mixture into the egg mixture while stirring, then strain and pour into the heat-proof bowls.
5. Cover with aluminum foil and steam for 30-35 minutes.
6. Caramel Pudding is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Gurih Lembut! Resep TIM IKAN GURAME
recipe_id:
Resep Tim Ikan (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
1 ekor ikan gurami (650 gr)
4 cm jahe
1 batang daun bawang

Bahan saus:
5 siung bawang putih
2 buah cabai merah keriting
1 batang daun bawang
2 sdm minyak
½ sdm minyak wijen (opsional)
2 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
1 sdm gula pasir
75 ml air

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Bersihkan ikan dan sayat-sayat
2. Iris jahe, potong besar sebagian daun bawang dan iris, cincang halus bawang putih dan iris cabai merah keriting
3. Di dalam piring tahan panas, susun daun bawang, ikan dan jahe. Kukus selama 8-10 menit di api besar
4. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan kecap asin, saus tiram, kaldu bubuk, gula pasir dan air, aduk rata
5. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih hingga wangi kemudian masukkan cabai merah keriting dan daun bawang, tumis hingga wangi
6. Masukkan campuran saus, masak beberapa saat
7. Siram saus di atas ikan dan tuang minyak wijen
8. Tim ikan siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Steamed Gourami Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
1 whole gourami (650 g)
4 cm ginger
1 stalk green onion

Sauce ingredients:
5 clove garlic
2 pc red curly chili
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp cooking oil
½ tbsp sesame oil (optional)
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp stock powder
1 tbsp sugar
75 ml water

Add-on:
White rice

Steps:
1. Clean and score the fish.
2. Slice the ginger. Chop part of the green onion into large pieces and some into thin pieces. Finely chop the garlic and slice the curly chili.
3. On a heatproof plate, arrange the green onion, fish, and ginger. Steam for 8-10 minutes over high heat.
4. In a bowl, mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, stock powder, sugar, and water. Stir well.
5. Heat oil. Sauté garlic until fragrant, then add red chili and green onion. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the sauce mixture and cook briefly.
7. Pour the sauce over the fish and drizzle with sesame oil.
8. Steamed Gourami is ready to serve.

title: Spesial! Resep SUKIYAKI Ala Resto Jepang [Bahan Lokal Ekonomis]
recipe_id:
Resep Sukiyaki (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan saus sukiyaki:
200 ml kecap asin
150 ml sake/50 ml jus apel
5 gr katsuobushi
5-6 sdm gula pasir
1 sdt cuka beras
150 ml air

Bahan marinasi daging:
250 gr daging sapi iris
1 sdm maizena
50 ml air
80 ml saus sukiyaki

Bahan lainnya:
250 ml air
250 ml saus sukiyaki
silken tofu (firm)
bawang bombai
jamur shitake
jamur shimeji cokelat
sawi putih
pakcoy
shirataki

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
onsen egg (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Panaskan panci, masukkan sake, masak hingga mendidih kemudian masukkan kecap asin, gula pasir, air dan cuka beras
2. Haluskan katsuobushi lalu masukkan ke dalam panci, masak hingga mendidih
3. Marinasi daging dengan saus sukiyaki, air dan maizena, aduk rata
4. Siapkan tahu kemudian torch dan potong-potong
5. Potong besar bawang bombai, daun bawang, sawi hijau dan sayat tiga bagian jamur shitake membentuk bintang
6. Panaskan wajan, masukkan lemak daging, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan bawang bombai dan daun bawang bagian putih, masak hingga kecokelatan
7. Masukkan saus sukiyaki dan air kemudian susun sawi putih, pakcoy, jamur shimeji, shirataki, daging, tahu, dan shitake, masak hingga matang
8. Sukiyaki siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Sukiyaki Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Sukiyaki Sauce ingredients:
200 ml soy sauce
150 ml sake/50 ml apple juice
5 g katsuobushi
5-6 tbsp sugar
1 tsp rice vinegar
150 ml water

Beef Marinade ingredients:
250 g sliced beef
1 tbsp cornstarch
50 ml water
80 ml sukiyaki sauce

Other ingredients:
250 ml water
250 ml sukiyaki sauce
Firm silken tofu
Onion
Shiitake mushroom
Brown shimeji mushroom
Napa cabbage
Bok choy
Shirataki noodles

Serving:
White rice
Onsen egg (optional)

Steps:
1. Heat a pot. Add sake and bring to a boil. Then, add soy sauce, sugar, water, and rice vinegar.
2. Grind katsuobushi and add it to the pot. Bring to a boil.
3. Marinate beef with sukiyaki sauce, water, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Prepare tofu by torching it, then slicing it into pieces.
5. Slice the onion, green onion, and napa cabbage. Score the shiitake mushrooms to form a star shape.
6. Heat a pan, then add beef fat. Cook briefly, then add onion and white part of green onion. Cook until browned.
7. Add sukiyaki sauce and water, then arrange napa cabbage, bok choy, shimeji mushrooms, shirataki, beef, tofu, and shiitake. Cook until done.
8. Sukiyaki is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Anti Gagal! Resep CUMI KRISPI MANIS PEDAS
recipe_id:
Resep Cumi Krispi Manis Pedas (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan marinasi cumi:
200 gr cumi
¾ sdt baking powder
½ buah jeruk nipis
2 siung bawang putih
½ sdt jahe
2 sdm telur
½ sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu jamur
sejumput merica
4 sdm tepung tapioka
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang

Bahan pelapis kering:
tepung tapioka

Bahan saus manis pedas:
1 sdm minyak
1 sdm margarin
½ buah bawang bombai
3 siung bawang putih
3 buah cabai rawit merah (opsional)
1 batang daun bawang
2 sdm saus tomat
2 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt kecap ikan
2 sdt gula pasir

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat :
1. Potong tipis cumi kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Marinasi dengan bawang putih parut, jahe parut, perasan jeruk nipis, garam, kaldu jamur, merica, baking powder dan telur, aduk rata. Diamkan minimal 15 menit atau hingga 1 jam
3. Tambahkan tepung tapioka dan tepung terigu, aduk rata
4. Balurkan ke dalam tepung tapioka, aduk rata. Diamkan 3 menit kemudian saring
5. Panaskan minyak, goreng cumi di api besar hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
6. Cincang bawang putih, potong kotak bawang bombai, cabai rawit merah dan daun bawang
7. Panaskan margarin dan sedikit minyak kemudian tumis bawang putih, bawang bombai dan cabai rawit merah, tumis hingga wangi
8. Masukkan saus tomat, saus sambal, saus tiram, kecap ikan dan gula pasir, tumis sesaat di api kecil kemudian masukkan cumi yang sudah digoreng, aduk rata
9. Masukkan daun bawang, aduk rata
10. Cumi krispi manis pedas siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Sweet & Spicy Crispy Calamari Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
200 g squid
¾ tsp baking powder
½ pc lime
2 clove garlic
½ tsp ginger
2 tbsp egg
½ tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
A pinch of pepper
4 tbsp tapioca flour
3 tbsp all-purpose flour

Dry Coating ingredients:
Tapioca flour

Sweet and Spicy Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp margarine
½ pc onion
3 clove garlic
3 pc red Thai chili (optional)
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp fish sauce
2 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice squid thinly and place it in a bowl.
2. Marinate with grated garlic, grated ginger, lime juice, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, baking powder, and egg. Mix well and let it rest for at least 15 minutes or up to 1 hour.
3. Add tapioca flour and all-purpose flour. Mix well.
4. Coat with tapioca flour and mix evenly. Let it sit for 3 minutes, then sift.
5. Heat oil and fry the squid on high heat until golden brown, then drain.
6. Mince garlic, dice onion, slice red Thai chili, and chop green onion.
7. Heat margarine and a little oil, then sauté garlic, onion, and red Thai chili until fragrant.
8. Add ketchup, chili sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, and sugar. Sauté briefly on low heat, then add fried squid and stir well.
9. Add green onion and mix well.
10. Sweet & Spicy Crispy Calamari is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Gurih Sehat! Resep SUP BAKSO LOHUA AYAM / BAKSO RAMBUTAN
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Bakso Lohua (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan adonan:
350 gr paha ayam filet
2 siung bawang putih
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
1 butir putih telur
1 ½ sdt garam
1/8 sdt merica
1 sdm gula pasir
1 ½ sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdm saus tiram
1 sdt minyak wijen
100 gr sohun (sudah direndam air)
60 gr wortel
100 gr jamur kuping

Bahan kuah:
3 siung bawang putih
2 batang seledri
1 batang daun bawang
1 sdm minyak
4 lembar kol
1 buah wortel
100 gr jamur kuping
2 iris jahe (opsional)
2 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 ½ liter air

Cara membuat:
1. Geprek bawang putih, jahe dan potong kol
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih dan jahe hingga wangi kemudian masukkan kol, tumis kembali hingga wangi
3. Masukkan air, wortel yang sudah dipotong, masak hingga mendidih lalu kecilkan api
4. Geprek bawang putih lalu di dalam food processor, masukkan ayam, bawang putih, garam, merica, gula pasir, kaldu jamur, bawang merah goreng, saus tiram, minyak wijen dan putih telur, haluskan hingga lengket
5. Pindahkan adonan ke dalam mangkuk. Masukkan wortel ke dalam food processor, haluskan dan masukkan ke dalam adonan
6. Masukkan jamur kuping ke dalam food processor, haluskan dan masukkan ke dalam adonan. Gunting-gunting sohun lalu masukkan ke dalam adonan, aduk rata
7. Bentuk bulat adonan baso lalu masukkan ke dalam kuah, masak hingga matang
8. Potong besar daun bawang dan seledri
9. Masukkan garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, merica, daun bawang, seledri dan jamur kuping
10. Sup bakso lohua siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Lohua Meatball Soup Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Meatball Mixture ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
2 clove garlic
1 tbsp fried shallots
1 pc egg white
1.5 tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
1.5 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
100 g glass noodles (soaked in water)
60 g carrot
100 g wood ear mushroom

Soup ingredients:
3 clove garlic
2 stalk celery
1 stalk green onion
1 tbsp oil
4 pc cabbage leaf
1 pc carrot
100 g wood ear mushroom
2 slice ginger (optional)
2 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1.5 liter water

Steps:
1. Pound the garlic and ginger. Slice the cabbage.
2. Heat some oil. Sauté garlic and ginger until fragrant, then add the cabbage and sauté until fragrant.
3. Add water and sliced carrot. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat.
4. Pound the garlic. In a food processor, add chicken, garlic, salt, pepper, sugar, mushroom bouillon, fried shallots, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and egg white. Blend until sticky.
5. Transfer the mixture to a bowl. Add carrot to the food processor and chop, then add that to the mixture.
6. Add wood ear mushrooms to the food processor. Chop and add to the mixture. Cut the glass noodles into small pieces, then add them to the mixture. Mix well.
7. Shape the meatball mixture into balls and add them to the broth. Cook until cooked through.
8. Chop the green onions and celery into large pieces.
9. Add salt, chicken powder, sugar, pepper, green onions, celery, and wood ear mushrooms to the broth.
10. Lohua Meatball Soup is ready to be served.

title: Bumbu Bakar Awet Serbaguna! Resep IKAN BAKAR TEFLON
recipe_id:
Resep Ikan Bakar Teflon (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ikan:
400 gr ikan tilapia filet
1 ½ sdt kaldu bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
2 sdm maizena
1-2 sdm putih telur

Bahan bumbu halus:
8 butir kemiri, sangrai
15 siung bawang putih
8 siung bawang merah
1 sdm ketumbar, sangrai
3 cm kunyit
2 cm jahe
2 sachet terasi, bakar
80 ml minyak
50 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
3 lembar daun jeruk
1 lembar daun salam
2 sdm saus tiram
½ sdm kecap maggi
100 ml kecap manis
2 sdm margarin
2 sdm saus tomat
1 sdm saus sambal
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica
150 ml air

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
sambal tomat

Cara membuat:
1. Potong ikan lalu marinasi dengan kaldu bubuk, merica, maizena dan putih telur, aduk rata
2. Di dalam blender masukkan kemiri, ketumbar, bawang putih, bawang merah, kunyit, jahe, terasi, minyak dan air, blender hingga halus
3. Panaskan wajan, masukkan bumbu halus, merica, daun salam dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak
4. Masukkan air, kecap manis, saus tiram, kaldu bubuk dan kecap maggi, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan margarin, aduk rata
5. Masukkan saus tomat dan saus sambal, masak sesaat
6. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan ikan, masak kedua sisi ikan hingga sedikit kecokelatan kemudian oles dengan bumbu bakar, masak hingga matang dan meresap
7. Ikan bakar teflon siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Pan-Grilled Fish Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Fish Marinade ingredients:
400 g tilapia fillet
1½ tsp stock powder
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch
1-2 tbsp egg white

Spices:
8 pc candlenut, toasted
15 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
1 tbsp coriander, toasted
3 cm turmeric
2 cm ginger
2 sachet shrimp paste, roasted
80 ml oil
50 ml water

Other ingredients:
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc bay leaf
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp Maggi sauce
100 ml sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp margarine
2 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
150 ml water

Add-ons:
White rice
Tomato sambal

Steps:
1. Slice the fish, then marinate with stock powder, pepper, cornstarch, and egg white. Mix well.
2. In a blender, add candlenuts, coriander, garlic, shallots, turmeric, ginger, shrimp paste, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
3. Heat a pan. Add the blended spices, pepper, bay leaf, and kaffir lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant and oily.
4. Add water, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, stock powder, and Maggi sauce. Cook briefly, then add margarine and stir well.
5. Add ketchup and chili sauce. Cook briefly.
6. Heat a little oil. Add the fish and cook both sides until lightly browned. Brush with the grilling sauce. Grill until fully cooked and the flavors are absorbed.
7. Pan-Grilled Fish is ready to be served.

title: Kenyal Gurih! Resep BAKSO AYAM BAKAR [Cocok Untuk Stok]
recipe_id:
Resep Bakso Ayam Bakar (untuk 45 pcs)

Bahan adonan bakso:
300 gr paha ayam filet (setengah beku)
150 gr dada ayam filet (setengah beku)
50 gr kulit ayam rebus (opsional)
4 sdm air es
1 butir telur
4 siung bawang putih, belah dua
4 siung bawang merah, belah dua
2 sdm minyak
¼ sdt pala bubuk
½ sdm baking powder
1 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
5 sdm tapioka
1 ½ sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu bubuk
1 ½ sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica

Bahan bumbu bakar:
2 siung bawang putih
2 sdm margarin
2 sdm saus tomat
1 sdm saus sambal
2 sdm saus tiram
½ sdm kecap maggi
3 sdm kecap manis
1-2 buah jeruk limau

Pelengkap:
bawang goreng
cabai rawit merah iris
jeruk limau

Cara membuat:
1. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng bawang putih dan bawang merah hingga wangi dan kecokelatan, sisihkan
2. Potong-potong dada ayam dan paha ayam
3. Di dalam food processor, masukkan paha ayam, dada ayam, garam, gula pasir, merica, kaldu bubuk, pala bubuk, baking powder dan air es, haluskan hingga lengket
4. Masukkan bawang putih dan bawang merah yang sudah digoreng, kulit ayam rebus dan telur, haluskan hingga benar-benar halus
5. Masukkan tepung tapioka dan tepung terigu, haluskan hingga rata. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
6. Didihkan air lalu kecilkan api. Bentuk bulat bakso lalu rebus hingga matang, tiriskan dan biarkan dingin
7. Tusuk bakso dengan tusuk sate
8. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan bawang putih parut, kecap manis, saus sambal, saus tomat, saus tiram, kecap maggi, margarin dan perasan jeruk limau, aduk rata
9. Sayat-sayat bakso kemudian bakar bakso hingga sedikit kecokelatan. Oles dengan bumbu bakar, bakar hingga wangi dan kecokelatan kemudian oles kembali, bakar hingga meresap
10. Bakso ayam bakar siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Grilled Chicken Meatballs Recipe (yield 45 pcs)

Meatball Dough ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet (half-frozen)
150 g chicken breast fillet (half-frozen)
50 g boiled chicken skin (optional)
4 tbsp cold water
1 pc egg
4 clove garlic, halved
4 pc shallot, halved
2 tbsp oil
¼ tsp nutmeg powder
½ tbsp baking powder
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
5 tbsp tapioca flour
1.5 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
1.5 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Grill Sauce ingredients:
2 clove garlic
2 tbsp margarine
2 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp Maggi sauce
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1-2 pc kaffir lime

Add-ons:
Fried shallots
Sliced red Thai chili
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Heat a little oil. Fry garlic and shallots until fragrant and browned. Set aside.
2. Slice the chicken breast and chicken thighs into pieces.
3. In a food processor, add chicken thighs, chicken breast, salt, sugar, pepper, chicken powder, nutmeg powder, baking powder, and cold water. Blend until sticky.
4. Add fried garlic and shallots, boiled chicken skin, and egg. Blend until smooth.
5. Add tapioca flour and all-purpose flour. Blend until well combined. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Bring water to a boil, then reduce the heat. Shape the dough into meatballs and cook until done. Drain and let cool.
7. Skewer the meatballs with satay sticks.
8. In a bowl, add grated garlic, sweet soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, margarine, and lime juice. Mix well.
9. Score the meatballs and grill until slightly browned. Brush with the grill sauce. Grill until fragrant and browned, then brush again and grill until the sauce is absorbed.
10. Grilled Chicken Meatballs are ready to serve.

title: Daging Lokal Tetap Empuk! Resep STEAK SAPI GORENG
recipe_id:
Resep Steak Sapi Goreng (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan marinasi daging:
300 gr daging sapi has dalam
½ sdt baking powder
1 butir telur
2 sdm tepung serbaguna
¼ sdt mixed herbs
½ sdt garam
1/8 sdt merica
1 siung bawang putih

Bahan pelapis:
1 butir telur
30 ml air
tepung serbaguna

Bahan creamy onion sauce:
½ buah bawang bombai
3 siung bawang putih
2 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
2 sdm mentega tawar
2 sdm minyak
300 ml air
4 sdm krimer bubuk
¼ sdt lada hitam
½ sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Pelengkap:
mashed potato
baby buncis, rebus
tomat ceri

Cara membuat:
1. Potong daging kemudian pukul-pukul dengan belakang pisau hingga tipis
2. Marinasi daging dengan telur, tepung serbaguna, baking powder, garam, merica, mixed herbs dan bawang putih parut, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 30 menit
3. Iris tipis bawang bombai. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang bombai hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan
4. Masukkan bawang putih yang dicincang halus, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan mentega, terigu dan lada hitam, tumis sesaat
5. Masukkan air, aduk rata lalu masukkan krimer bubuk, garam dan kaldu ayam bubuk, masak sesaat
6. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan telur dan air kemudian kocok lepas
7. Balurkan daging ke dalam tepung kering, telur dan tepung kering, goreng hingga matang, tiriskan
8. Steak sapi goreng siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Fried Beef Steak Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
300 g beef tenderloin
½ tsp baking powder
1 pc egg
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp mixed herbs
½ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
1 clove garlic

Coating ingredients:
1 pc egg
30 ml water
All-purpose flour

Creamy Onion Sauce ingredients:
½ pc onion
3 clove garlic
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
2 tbsp unsalted butter
2 tbsp oil
300 ml water
4 tbsp creamer powder
¼ tsp black pepper
½ tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder

Add-ons:
Mashed potato
Baby green bean, boiled
Cherry tomato

Steps:
1. Slice the beef, then tenderize it by pounding it with the back of a knife until thin.
2. Marinate the beef with egg, all-purpose flour, baking powder, salt, pepper, mixed herbs, and grated garlic. Mix well and let it sit for 30 minutes.
3. Thinly slice the onion. Heat oil in a pan. Sauté the onion until fragrant and slightly browned.
4. Add the finely minced garlic. Sauté until fragrant, then add the butter, flour, and black pepper. Sauté for a moment.
5. Add water and mix well, then add the creamer powder, salt, and chicken powder. Cook for a while.
6. In a bowl, whisk together the egg and water.
7. Coat the beef in dry flour. Dip it into the egg mixture, then coat it again in flour. Fry until cooked through and drain the excess oil.
8. Fried Beef Steak is ready to serve.

title: Lembut Creamy! Resep BASQUE BURNT CHEESECAKE
recipe_id:
Resep Basque Burnt Cheesecake (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
350 gr cream cheese (suhu ruang)
75 gr mascarpone (suhu ruang)
100 gr gula pasir
3 butir telur
¾ sdt garam
240 gr whipping cream
½ sdm perisa vanila
15 gr maizena

Bahan biscoff spread:
20 gr mentega tawar
30 gr minyak
100 gr biscoff
½ sdt kayu manis bubuk
75 gr white chocolate chips
½ sdt garam

Bahan tambahan saus biscoff:
50 ml biscoff spread
50 ml whipping cream
50 ml susu

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan cream cheese, mascarpone, gula pasir, garam, perisa vanila dan maizena, mixer hingga merata kemudian masukkan telur satu per satu, mixer kembali hingga rata
2. Masukkan whipping cream, aduk dengan spatula hingga rata
3. Siapkan loyang (ukuran diameter: 16 cm) kemudian alasi dengan baking paper. Masukkan adonan sambil disaring kemudian panggang di suhu 220 derajat celcius selama 30-35 menit
4. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan white chocolate chips, mentega tawar dan minyak, lelehkan dengan microwave
5. Masukkan biscoff, garam dan kayu manis bubuk ke dalam food processor, haluskan kemudian masukkan cokelat yang sudah dilelehkan, haluskan kembali
6. Untuk tambahan saus, di dalam mangkuk campurkan whipping cream, biscoff spread dan susu, aduk rata
7. Keluarkan cheesecake dari oven. Diamkan di suhu ruang kemudian dinginkan di dalam kulkas minimal 4 jam atau semalaman sebelum dikeluarkan dari loyang
8. Lap bagian loyang dengan lap panas lalu keluarkan cheesecake dari loyang
9. Basque burnt cheesecake siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Basque Burnt Cheesecake Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g cream cheese (room temperature)
75 g mascarpone (room temperature)
100 g sugar
3 pc egg
¾ tsp salt
240 g whipping cream
½ tbsp vanilla extract
15 g cornstarch

Biscoff Spread ingredients:
20 g unsalted butter
30 g oil
100 g Biscoff cookies
½ tsp cinnamon powder
75 g white chocolate chips
½ tsp salt

Biscoff Sauce ingredients:
50 ml Biscoff spread
50 ml whipping cream
50 ml milk

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix the cream cheese, mascarpone, sugar, salt, vanilla extract, and cornstarch until well combined. Then add the eggs one by one, mixing after each addition until smooth.
2. Add the whipping cream and stir with a spatula until fully incorporated.
3. Prepare a baking pan (diameter: 16 cm) lined with baking paper. Strain in the batter and bake at 220°C for 30-35 minutes.
4. In a bowl, combine white chocolate chips, butter, and oil. Melt them in the microwave.
5. Add the Biscoff cookies, salt, and cinnamon powder to a food processor and blend until fine. Then add the melted chocolate mixture and blend again.
6. For the sauce, combine the whipping cream, Biscoff spread, and milk in a bowl and stir well.
7. Remove the cheesecake from the oven. Let it cool to room temperature, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight before removing from the pan.
8. Wipe the sides of the pan with a warm cloth and remove the cheesecake from the pan.
9. Basque Burnt Cheesecake is ready to serve.

title: Istimewa Anti Gagal! Resep AYAM KODOK [Lengkap Dengan Saus]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Kodok (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
1 ekor ayam negeri

Bahan adonan:
500 gr ayam filet (paha & dada)
150 gr hati ayam mentah
4 buah telur rebus
3 lembar smoked beef
2 lembar roti tawar
60 ml air
1 butir telur
4 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
½ buah bawang bombai
1 batang seledri
¼ buah pala
1 sachet MAGGI Magic Lezat
1 sdt garam
1 ½ sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt baking powder
1 sdm maizena
3 sdm minyak

Bahan saus gravy:
2 sdm minyak
tulang ayam
½ buah bawang bombai
1 batang seledri
3 siung bawang putih
2 iris jahe
2 sdm mentega tawar
3 sdm saus tomat
1 sdt kecap inggris
1 sdm kecap asin
3 sdm MAGGI Saus Tiram
1 sdt MAGGI Magic Lezat
1 sdt MAGGI Seasoning
2 lembar bay leaf
2 sdm gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica
3 sdm maizena
1 liter air

Bahan olesan:
1 sdm mentega tawar
1 sdm MAGGI Saus Tiram
½ sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tomat

Pelengkap:
buncis, rebus
wortel, rebus
mashed potato

Cara membuat:
1. Rebus hati ayam hingga matang kemudian iris bawang merah
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng bawang merah hingga sedikit kecokelatan, sisihkan kemudian di minyak yang sama tumis bawang bombai yang sudah dipotong kotak kecil, tumis hingga wangi, sisihkan
3. Tumis hati ayam hingga kecokelatan dan wangi, sisihkan
4. Pisahkan daging ayam dari kulitnya secara perlahan. Sisakan bagian sayap dan potong bagian paha bawah
5. Pisahkan daging dan tulang ayam. Potong-potong tulang lalu rendam dengan air beberapa saat
6. Geprek bawang putih dan iris batang seledri
7. Di dalam food processor, masukkan dada ayam filet, bawang putih, batang seledri, garam, merica, gula pasir, MAGGI Magic Lezat dan pala yang diparut, haluskan hingga lengket
8. Masukkan sisa ayam, hati ayam, smoked beef, bawang merah goreng, telur, maizena dan baking powder, haluskan kembali. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
9. Masukkan roti tawar dan air ke dalam food processor, haluskan kemudian masukkan ke dalam adonan beserta bawang bombai, aduk rata. Masukkan adonan ke dalam plastik segitiga
10. Semprotkan adonan ke dalam kulit ayam, isi hingga 1/3 bagian kemudian masukkan telur rebus. Isi kembali dengan adonan
11. Jahit bagian yang terbuka dengan benang kasur atau tusuk gigi hingga tertutup rapi. Tusuk beberapa titik pada ayam dengan tusuk gigi. Alasi bagian bawah kukusan dengan wadah tahan panas kemudian kukus selama 40 menit
12. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan tulang ayam, masak hingga kecokelatan
13. Iris bawang bombai dan bawang putih. Masukkan bawang bombai, bawang putih dan bay leaf, tumis hingga wangi dan kecokelatan
14. Masukkan air, jahe dan seledri, masak selama 30-40 menit. Masukkan air tetesan ayam kemudian saring. Pindahkan kembali ke dalam panci
15. Masukkan saus tomat, kecap asin, kecap inggris, MAGGI Saus Tiram, MAGGI Seasoning, MAGGI Magic Lezat, gula pasir, merica dan mentega, masak hingga mendidih
16. Masukkan larutan maizena, masak hingga sedikit mengental
17. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan mentega, saus tomat, kecap manis dan MAGGI Saus Tiram, aduk rata
18. Oles ayam dengan bumbu olesan kemudian panggang di suhu 190-200 derajat celcius selama 10-15 menit. Di tengah memanggang oles ayam dengan bumbu olesan
19. Ayam kodok siap disajikan

title: Resep AYAM GORENG KRISPI SAUS MENTEGA: Juicy & Lembut!
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Goreng Krispi Saus Mentega (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
350 gr paha ayam filet
2 siung bawang putih
2 cm jahe
1 butir telur
½ sdt baking powder
4 sdm tapioka
½ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan lainnya:
1 buah bawang bombai
3 siung bawang putih
3 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm kecap inggris
1 ½ sdm saus tiram
1 sdt kecap maggi
1 sdm margarin
1 buah jeruk limau
1 sdt gula pasir
2 sdm minyak

Bahan pelapis kering:
tapioka

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
kecap asin + cabai rawit merah iris
telur mata sapi

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong ayam kemudian marinasi dengan bawang putih halus dan jahe parut
2. Masukkan garam, gula pasir, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, baking powder, tapioka dan telur, aduk rata. Diamkan minimal 15 menit
3. Balurkan ayam ke dalam tepung tapioka, aduk rata dan diamkan beberapa saat
4. Goreng ayam di api besar hingga membentuk struktur luar yang kering lalu kecilkan api dan goreng hingga matang, tiriskan
5. Geprek bawang putih dan iris besar bawang bombai
6. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bawang bombai, tumis beberapa saat hingga wangi
7. Kecilkan api, masukkan saus tiram, kecap maggi, kecap manis, kecap inggris, margarin dan gula pasir, besarkan api dan masak sesaat
8. Masukkan ayam yang sudah di goreng, aduk hingga merata. Tambahkan perasan jeruk limau
9. Ayam goreng krispi saus mentega siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Crispy Soy Butter Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
2 clove garlic
2 cm ginger
1 pc egg
½ tsp baking powder
4 tbsp tapioca flour
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
1 pc onion
3 clove garlic
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1½ tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp Maggi sauce
1 tbsp margarine
1 pc kaffir lime
1 tsp sugar
2 tbsp oil

Dry Coating ingredients:
Tapioca flour

For Serving:
White rice
Soy sauce + sliced red Thai chili
Fried egg

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into pieces, then marinate with minced garlic and grated ginger.
2. Add salt, sugar, chicken powder, pepper, baking powder, tapioca flour, and egg. Mix well. Let it sit for at least 15 minutes.
3. Coat the chicken with tapioca flour. Coat well, and let it sit for a while.
4. Fry the chicken on high heat until the outer layer is crispy, then reduce the heat and fry until cooked through. Set aside.
5. Pound the garlic and slice the onion.
6. Heat a little oil. Sauté the garlic until fragrant, then add the onion. Sauté for a few moments until fragrant.
7. Reduce the heat. Add oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, sweet soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, margarine, and sugar. Increase the heat and cook briefly.
8. Add the fried chicken and stir until well coated. Add the lime juice.
9. Crispy Soy Butter Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Lembut! Resep SAPO TAHU AYAM CINCANG
recipe_id:
Resep Sapo Tahu Ayam Cincang (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan:
480 gr tahu telur tube
23 gr ikan asin jambal roti
4 cm jahe
4 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
½ sdm kecap manis
1 sdt minyak wijen
1 batang daun bawang, iris
300 ml air
2 sdm minyak

Bahan marinasi ayam giling:
200 gr ayam paha giling
2 sdm saus tiram
2 sdt kecap maggi
2 sdt gula pasir
2 ½ sdm maizena

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
kecap asin + cabai rawit merah iris

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong tahu lalu goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
2. Cincang bawang putih, iris jahe, potong kotak bawang bombai, iris ikan asin jambal roti dan daun bawang
3. Marinasi ayam giling dengan saus tiram, kecap maggi, gula pasir dan maizena, aduk rata
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan ikan asin jambal roti dan jahe, tumis hingga kecokelatan kemudian masukkan bawang putih dan bawang bombai, tumis hingga wangi
5. Masukkan ayam, masak hingga matang lalu masukkan air dan kecap manis, aduk rata
6. Masukkan tahu dan daun bawang, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan minyak wijen, aduk rata
7. Sapo tahu ayam cincang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Minced Chicken Claypot Tofu Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
480 g egg tofu tube
23 g salted fish (Jambal Roti)
4 cm ginger
4 clove garlic
½ pc onion
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 stalk green onion, sliced
300 ml water
2 tbsp oil

Minced Chicken Marinade ingredients:
200 g minced chicken thigh
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp Maggi sauce
2 tsp sugar
2.5 tbsp cornstarch

Add-ons:
White rice
Soy sauce + sliced Thai chili

Steps:
1. Slice the tofu and fry until golden brown. Set aside.
2. Chop the garlic, slice the ginger, and dice the onion. Slice the salted fish and green onions.
3. Marinate minced chicken with oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, sugar, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Heat a little oil. Add the salted fish and ginger. Stir-fry until browned, then add garlic and onion. Stir-fry until fragrant.
5. Add minced chicken and cook until done, then add water and sweet soy sauce. Stir well.
6. Add the tofu and green onions. Cook briefly, then add sesame oil and mix well.
7. Minced Chicken Claypot Tofu is ready to serve.

title: 2 Topping Mie Goreng Praktis Ala Resto! Resep SHRIMP OMU NOODLE & MIE GORENG AYAM CHASHU
recipe_id:
Resep Shrimp Omu Noodle & Mie Goreng Ayam Chashu

Bahan shrimp omu noodle (untuk 1-2 porsi)
Bahan:
5 buah udang kupas
¼ sdt garam
1 sdt maizena
sejumput merica
2 butir telur
¼ sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdm minyak
2 buah Mi Sedaap Goreng Ala Chef Devina

Pelengkap:
chili oil (opsional)

Bahan mi goreng ayam chashu (untuk 6 porsi)
Bahan marinasi bilas:
1 kg paha ayam filet dengan kulit
1 sdm garam
2 sdt baking powder
1 buah jeruk nipis
5 sdm tapioka
50 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
1 sdm minyak
5 siung bawang putih
1 buah bawang bombai
5 cm jahe
50 ml kecap asin
100 ml saus teriyaki
800 ml air
2 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm gula pasir
½ sdm kaldu jamur

Bahan telur ramen:
6 butir telur omega
1 liter air
1 sdm cuka
Bahan olesan
minyak wijen
bawang putih
kaldu jamur
merica

Pelengkap:
Mi Sedaap Goreng Ala Chef Devina

Cara membuat shrimp omu noodle:
1. Belah dua udang kemudian marinasi dengan garam, merica dan maizena, aduk rata. Diamkan beberapa saat
2. Kocok telur dengan kaldu jamur
3. Didihkan air, rebus Mi Sedaap Goreng Ala Chef Devina berikut sayuran kering nya, rebus selama 3 menit
4. Masukkan bumbu-bumbu dan mi ke dalam mangkuk, aduk rata
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan udang, masak beberapa saat di api besar kemudian masukkan telur, matikan api dan aduk rata
6. Shrimp omu noodle siap disajikan

Cara membuat mi goreng ayam chashu:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan tapioka, garam, baking powder dan perasan jeruk nipis, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan sedikit air, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 1 jam di suhu ruang
2. Bilas ayam kemudian tiriskan
3. Geprek bawang putih, potong besar bawang bombai dan iris jahe
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan bawang putih, jahe dan bawang bombai, tumis hingga wangi dan kecokelatan
5. Masukkan air, saus teriyaki, kecap asin, kaldu jamur, gula pasir dan saus tiram, masak hingga mendidih kemudian masukkan ayam, masak di api kecil selama 25 menit
6. Di dalam panci, didihkan air dan cuka kemudian masukkan telur, rebus selama 6 ½ menit, rendam ke dalam air es lalu kupas
7. Setelah air kuah dingin masukkan telur lalu diamkan semalaman di dalam kulkas
8. Di dalam mangkuk masukkan bawang putih parut, kaldu jamur, merica dan minyak wijen, aduk rata
9. Potong-potong ayam kemudian masukkan ke dalam wadah kedap udara. Blender sisa saus kemudian masak kembali dan saring
10. Di dalam mangkuk, parut halus bawang putih kemudian campurkan dengan kaldu jamur, merica dan minyak wijen, aduk rata
11. Didihkan air, rebus Mi Sedaap Goreng Ala Chef Devina berikut sayuran kering nya, rebus selama 3 menit
12. Masukkan bumbu-bumbu dan mi ke dalam mangkuk, aduk rata
13. Susun daging di atas mi kemudian oles dengan saus olesan dan torch
14. Mi goreng ayam chashu siap disajikan

title: Praktis! Resep SUP KRIM JAMUR / CREAMY MUSHROOM SOUP
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Krim Jamur (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan sup krim jamur:
100 gr jamur champignon
100 gr jamur shitake
3 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
1 lembar bay leaf
1 batang seledri
¼ sdt thyme kering
120 ml cooking cream
2 sdm mentega tawar
2 sdm minyak
1 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¾ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica
500 ml air

Bahan croutons:
2 lembar roti tawar
2 sdm mentega tawar
2 siung bawang putih
1 sdt parsley kering (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Panaskan wajan, panggang roti hingga kecokelatan. Biarkan dingin beberapa saat lalu potong-potong
2. Di dalam wajan masukkan roti, bawang putih yang dicincang halus dan mentega, masak di api kecil hingga wangi lalu masukkan parsely kering, masak sesaat
3. Iris jamur champignon, shitake, bawang bombai dan bawang putih
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang bombai dan bawang putih hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan kemudian masukkan jamur, seledri, bay leaf dan thyme kering, tumis hingga kecokelatan. Sisihkan sedikit jamur
5. Masukkan mentega tawar dan tepung terigu, masak sesaat lalu masukkan air, masak selama 2 menit. Sisihkan seledri dan bay leaf kemudian blender hingga halus
6. Masukkan garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, gula pasir dan cooking cream, masak hingga mendidih
7. Sup krim jamur siap disajikan
