recipe_en:
Mushroom Cream Soup Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Creamy Mushroom Soup ingredients:
100 g champignon mushroom
100 g shiitake mushroom
3 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 pc bay leaf
1 stalk celery
¼ tsp dried thyme
120 ml cooking cream
2 tbsp unsalted butter
2 tbsp oil
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tsp chicken powder
¾ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
500 ml water

Croutons ingredients:
2 slice white bread
2 tbsp unsalted butter
2 clove garlic
1 tsp dried parsley (optional)

Steps:
1. Heat a pan and toast bread slices until golden brown. Let cool, then slice into small pieces.
2. In a pan, combine the bread, finely chopped garlic, and butter. Cook over low heat until fragrant, then add dried parsley and cook briefly.
3. Slice the champignon, shiitake, onion, and garlic.
4. Heat a little oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant and slightly golden, then add mushrooms, celery, bay leaf, and dried thyme. Sauté until browned. Set aside a portion of the mushrooms.
5. Add unsalted butter and flour to the pan. Cook briefly, then add water. Simmer for 2 minutes. Remove the celery and bay leaf, then blend until smooth.
6. Add salt, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, and cooking cream to the soup. Bring to a boil.
7. Creamy Mushroom Soup is ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Goreng Khas Pagi Sore! Resep AYAM POP [Lengkap Dengan Sambal]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Pop Khas Pagi Sore (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
2 ekor ayam pejantan, potong 4 bagian
6 siung bawang putih
3 lembar daun salam
6 lembar daun jeruk
2 batang serai
4 cm jahe

Bahan lainnya:
1 sdm garam
½ sdm kaldu jamur/penyedap
1/6 sdt merica
100 ml santan
600 ml air kelapa
600 ml air

Bahan sambal:
8 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
1 buah tomat merah
7 buah cabai merah tanjung
1 sdm gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu jamur/penyedap
300 ml air ungkepan ayam pop
2 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
60 ml minyak kelapa

Pelengkap:
daun singkong rebus
timun

Cara membuat:
1. Haluskan bawang putih dengan sedikit air hingga benar-benar halus kemudian iris jahe dan geprek serai
2. Siapkan panci, masukkan ayam pejantan yang sudah dipotong, air kelapa, air, bawang putih halus, jahe iris, serai geprek, daun salam, daun jeruk dan santan
3. Tambahkan garam, kaldu jamur dan merica. Aduk rata dan masak dengan api sedang kecil selama kurang lebih 30 menit sambil ditutup
4. Untuk sambal, potong tomat, cabai merah tanjung, bawang merah dan bawang putih
5. Siapkan wajan, panaskan minyak kelapa lalu masukkan bahan-bahan yang sudah dipotong. Masak hingga wangi
6. Tambahkan air ungkepan ayam pop ke wajan, masak kembali hingga bahan-bahan menjadi lunak
7. Masukkan bahan-bahan sambal yang sudah dimasak ke gelas blender, tambahkan tepung terigu, gula pasir dan kaldu jamur. Haluskan hingga benar-benar halus dan saring sambal
8. Tiriskan ayam yang sudah matang dan siram dengan sedikit air ungkepan ayam pop
9. Ayam pop siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Pagi Sore Ayam Pop Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc rooster chicken, chopped into 4 parts
6 pc garlic
3 pc bay leaf
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 stalk lemongrass
4 cm ginger

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp salt
½ tbsp mushroom bouillon/MSG
1/6 tsp pepper
100 ml coconut milk
600 ml coconut water
600 ml water

Sambal ingredients:
8 pc shallot
5 pc garlic
1 pc red tomato
7 pc large red chili
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom bouillon/MSG
300 ml chicken braising liquid
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
60 ml coconut oil

Sides:
Boiled cassava leaf
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Blend garlic with a little water until smooth, then slice the ginger and crush the lemongrass.
2. In a saucepan, add the chicken, coconut water, water, blended garlic, sliced ginger, crushed lemongrass, bay leaves, kaffir lime leaves, and coconut milk.
3. Add salt, mushroom bouillon, and pepper. Stir well and cook over medium-low heat for about 30 minutes, covered.
4. For the Sambal, slice the tomato, large red chili, shallots, and garlic.
5. In a pan, heat coconut oil, then add the sliced ingredients. Cook until fragrant.
6. Add the braising liquid from the chicken to the pan and cook until the ingredients soften.
7. Transfer the cooked sambal ingredients to a blender. Add flour, sugar, and mushroom bouillon. Blend until smooth, then strain the Sambal.
8. Set aside the cooked chicken and pour a little braising liquid over it.
9. Ayam Pop is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Ganja Eggplant Sambal Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
180 g purple eggplant (1 pc)
1-2 tbsp oil

Sambal ingredients:
6 pc shallot
6 pc red Thai chili
1 stalk lemongrass (white part only)
2 pc green tomato
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc kaffir lime
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
2 tsp sugar

Sides:
White rice
Omelette

Steps:
1. Cut the eggplant into pieces. Transfer to a heatproof bowl, drizzle with a little oil, and mix well.
2. Place the bowl in the microwave and cook for 2 minutes. Stir the eggplant and cook for another 2 minutes or until cooked through.
3. Thinly slice the white part of lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, shallots, and green tomatoes.
4. Using a mortar and pestle, grind the lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, shallots, red Thai chili, salt, sugar, and mushroom bouillon until slightly smooth.
5. Add green tomatoes and kaffir lime juice, then grind again. Tear the cooked eggplant into shreds and mix it into the sambal.
6. Ganja Eggplant Sambal is ready to serve.

title: Mudah Praktis! Resep SAMGYETANG SLOW COOKER [Sup Ayam Korea]
recipe_id:
Resep Samgyetang (untuk 5 porsi)

700 gr ayam negeri

5 sdm beras ketan putih, rendam air

Bahan lainnya:

¼ buah bawang bombai
4 siung bawang putih
rempah herbal

garam

Cara membuat:

2. Lumuri bagian dalam ayam dengan garam kemudian masukkan sebagian beras ketan, bawang putih utuh, batang ginseng, sebagian beras ketan, bawang putih, jujube dan sisa beras ketan
3. Lubangi bagian samping ayam lalu selipkan menyilang paha ayam
4. Potong besar lobak dan bawang bombai
5. Di dalam slow cooker atau panci, masukkan ayam, lobak, bawang bombai, bawang putih utuh, akar ginseng dan air, masak selama 4 jam atau hingga matang
6. Untuk saus cocolan, iris bawang bombai, cabai hijau dan cabai rawit merah. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk kemudian masukkan gula pasir, cuka beras, kecap asin dan air, aduk rata

recipe_en:
Samgyetang Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
700 g broiler
½ tsp salt
4 clove garlic
3 pc jujube
5 tbsp white sticky rice, soaked in water

Other ingredients:
500 ml water
100 g turnip
1 pc green onion, sliced
¼ pc onion
4 pc garlic
Herbal spices

Dipping Sauce I (Cho Ganjang):
½ pc onion
3 pc red Thai chili
2 pc green chili
3 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp rice vinegar
2 tbsp sugar
120 ml water

Dipping Sauce II:
Sesame oil
Salt
Pepper

Steps:
1. Remove excess fat and blood clots from the chicken and pat it dry.
2. Rub the inside of the chicken with salt, then stuff with some sticky rice, whole garlic, ginseng stalk, jujube, and the remaining sticky rice.
3. Make a small slit in the sides of the chicken and tuck the chicken thighs crosswise.
4. Cut the turnip and onion into large pieces.
5. In a slow cooker or pot, place the chicken, turnip, onion, whole garlic, ginseng root, and water. Cook for 4 hours or until cooked through.
6. For the dipping sauce, slice the onion, green chili, and red Thai chili. Place in a bowl, then add sugar, rice vinegar, soy sauce, and water. Stir well.
7. Mix sesame oil, a pinch of salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
8. Samgyetang is ready to serve.

title: Just 2 Ingredients! Garlic Fried Rice Recipe

recipe_en:
Garlic Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
7 pc garlic
2 tbsp oil
400 g rice
1 pc green onion
½ tbsp stock powder
1/8 tsp pepper
¼ tsp sugar

Scrambled Egg ingredients:
1 pc egg
¼ tsp stock powder

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic and slice the green onion.
2. Heat oil in a pan. Sauté the garlic until brown, then add rice, stock powder, pepper, sugar, and green onion. Cook over high heat until fragrant.
3. In a bowl, whisk the egg and stock powder. Heat oil until very hot, then add the egg and turn off the heat. Stir well.
4. Garlic Fried Rice is ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep SPIKOE KUNO KENARI [Lembut & Berpori]
recipe_id:
Resep Spikoe Kenari (untuk 8-10 porsi)

Bahan adonan kuning telur:
15 butir kuning telur
90 gr gula pasir
1 sdt perisa vanila
¼ sdt garam
65 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
15 gr maizena
6 gr susu bubuk
5 gr baking powder

Bahan meringue:
4 butir putih telur
80 gr gula pasir
½ sdt cream of tartar

Lainnya:
50 gr dutch butter
50 gr margarin
8 gr kental manis

Pelengkap:
kacang kenari

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, lelehkan Dutch butter, margarin dan kental manis dengan teknik au bain marie. Sisihkan dan biarkan hingga agak dingin
2. Siapkan mangkuk mixer, masukkan kuning telur, gula pasir, perisa vanila dan garam. Kocok dengan kecepatan sedang - tinggi hingga pucat dan kental berjejak selama kurang lebih 8 - 10 menit. Sisihkan
3. Di mangkuk terpisah, kocok putih telur, cream of tartar dan tuang gula pasir secara bertahap. Kocok hingga kaku dan mengkilap. Sisihkan
4. Siapkan kembali adonan kuning telur yang sudah dikocok kemudian masukkan maizena, tepung terigu, susu bubuk dan baking powder sambil disaring, aduk perlahan hingga rata
5. Campurkan sedikit demi sedikit putih telur yang sudah dikocok ke adonan kuning telur, aduk perlahan
6. Terakhir masukkan campuran butter yang sudah dilelehkan. Aduk hingga tercampur rata
7. Tuang adonan kue ke dalam loyang yang sudah dioles minyak dan diberi alas baking paper, masukkan ke dalam oven yang sudah dipanaskan di suhu 160 derajat celsius
8. Panggang spikoe selama 5 menit, kemudian keluarkan dari oven dan taburkan kacang kenari. Panggang kembali selama 35 menit atau hingga matang
9. Angkat spikoe dari oven dan biarkan dingin di dalam loyang. Setelah dingin, keluarkan spikoe dari loyang
10. Spikoe siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Kenari Spikoe Recipe (yield 8-10 servings)

Egg yolk batter ingredients:
15 pc egg yolk
90 g sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
¼ tsp salt
65 g all-purpose flour
15 g cornstarch
6 g milk powder
5 g baking powder

Meringue ingredients:
4 pc egg white
80 g sugar
½ tsp cream of tartar

Others:
50 g dutch butter
50 g margarine
8 g condensed milk

Add-ons:
Kenari nut

Steps:
1. In a bowl, melt Dutch butter, margarine, and condensed milk using the au bain-marie method. Set aside and let cool slightly.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine egg yolks, sugar, vanilla extract, and salt. Whip on medium-high speed until pale and thick, about 8-10 minutes. Set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, whip the egg whites and cream of tartar. Gradually add sugar while whisking until stiff peaks form and it becomes glossy. Set aside.
4. In the egg yolk mixture, sift in cornstarch, all-purpose flour, milk powder, and baking powder. Stir gently until well combined.
5. Gradually fold the meringue into the egg yolk batter, mixing gently.
6. Finally, add the melted butter. Stir until fully incorporated.
7. Pour the batter into a greased and lined baking pan. Place in a preheated oven at 160°C.
8. Bake the Spikoe for 5 minutes, then remove from the oven and sprinkle with kenari nuts. Continue baking for another 35 minutes or until fully cooked.
9. Remove the Spikoe from the oven and let it cool in the pan. Once cooled, remove from the pan.
10. Spikoe is ready to serve.

title: Practical, Just 5 Minutes! Stir-fried Cabbage and Egg Recipe [Economical Menu]

2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih di api sedang hingga wangi kemudian masukkan kol dan cabai rawit, masak sesaat di api besar hingga wangi

recipe_en:
Cabbage Stir-Fry with Eggs Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
180 g cabbage

⅛ tsp pepper
1 tbsp cornstarch

Accompaniments:
White rice
Fried shallots
Green onions

Steps:
1. Chop the garlic. Slice the Thai chili and cut the cabbage.
2. Heat a little oil in a pan. Sauté the garlic over medium heat until fragrant. Add cabbage and Thai chili. Cook briefly over high heat until fragrant.
3. Add eggs. Mix well, then add chicken powder, sugar, pepper, and soy sauce.
4. Mix cornstarch and water, then pour into the pan. Cook briefly.
5. Cabbage Stir-Fry with Eggs is ready to serve.

title: Lumer, Kenyal, Bisa Untuk Stok! Resep CIMOL KEJU Anti Alot [Lengkap Bumbu Pedas Daun Jeruk]
recipe_id:
Resep Cimol Keju (untuk 7 porsi)

Bahan cimol:
5 siung bawang putih
3 sdm minyak
375 ml air
120 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
2 sdt garam
1/4 sdt merica
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt penyedap
1 sdm gula pasir
300 gr tepung tapioka

Bahan isian:
Keju Cheddar Anchor

Bahan taburan cimol:
12 lembar daun jeruk
3 sdm bawang putih goreng
3 sdm cabai bubuk
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt penyedap
2 sdm gula pasir 

Cara membuat :
1. Masukkan bawang putih dan sebagian air ke dalam blender, haluskan
2. Di dalam panci, masukkan tepung terigu dan sisa air, aduk hingga rata
3. Masukkan bawang putih halus, minyak, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, penyedap dan merica, aduk rata. Nyalakan api, masak di api sedang hingga matang 
4. Pindahkan adonan biang ke dalam mangkuk. Biarkan hingga tidak terlalu panas
5. Untuk bumbu tabur, buang bagian batang daun jeruk kemudian sangrai beberapa saat hingga wangi
6. Di dalam blender masukkan cabai bubuk, bawang putih goreng, daun jeruk, gula pasir, penyedap dan kaldu ayam bubuk, haluskan
7. Masukkan tepung tapioka ke dalam adonan biang, aduk hingga rata. Bentuk memanjang adonan kemudian potong-potong
8. Potong-potong keju lalu isi adonan cimol dengan keju, bentuk bulat
9. Rebus cimol di api sedang selama 4-5 menit, tiriskan dan tambahkan sedikit minyak, aduk rata dan biarkan dingin
10. Panaskan minyak, goreng cimol di api sedang hingga kering, tiriskan
11. ⁠Cimol keju siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Cheese Cimol Recipe (yield 7 servings)

Cimol ingredients:
5 clove garlic
3 tbsp oil
375 ml water
120 g all-purpose flour
2 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
300 g tapioca flour

Filling ingredients:
Anchor Cheddar Cheese

Seasoning Powder ingredients:
12 pc kaffir lime leaf
3 tbsp fried garlic
3 tbsp chili powder
1 tbsp chicken powder
2 tsp MSG
2 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. Add garlic and some of the water into a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. In a saucepan, combine all-purpose flour and the remaining water. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add the blended garlic, oil, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, and pepper. Stir well. Turn on the heat and cook over medium heat until fully cooked.
4. Transfer the dough into a bowl. Let it cool down a bit.
5. For the seasoning powder, remove the stems from the kaffir lime leaves, then toast briefly until fragrant.
6. In a blender, add chili powder, fried garlic, kaffir lime leaves, sugar, MSG, and chicken powder. Blend until smooth.
7. Add tapioca flour to the dough. Stir until evenly mixed. Shape the dough into long tubes, then cut into small portions.
8. Cut the cheese into pieces, then stuff the cimol dough with the cheese. Shape them into balls.
9. Boil the cimol balls over medium heat for 4-5 minutes. Drain and add a little oil. Mix well and let cool.
10. Heat oil, then fry the cimol balls over medium heat until crisp and golden. Drain.
11. Cheese Cimol is ready to serve.

title: Just the right spicy! TAICHAN SATE Recipe: 100% Savory Nampol, Husband's Favorite
recipe_id:
Resep Sate Taichan (untuk 50-60 tusuk)

Bahan sate kulit:
250 gr kulit ayam
500 ml air
1 sdt garam
⅛ sdt merica
½ sdt penyedap

Bahan marinasi ayam
450 gr dada ayam filet
1 siung bawang putih
1 sdm saus tiram
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu jamur
1½ sdm minyak
¼ sdt merica
½ sdt air jeruk nipis

Bahan sambal taichan:
3 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
10 buah cabai merah keriting
10 buah cabai rawit merah
1-2 buah kemiri
1 buah jeruk limau
2 sdm minyak
1 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt garam
1 sdt gula
350 ml air

Pelengkap:
ketupat
bawang goreng
jeruk limau
kaldu jamur


Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong dada ayam filet lalu pindahkan ke mangkuk. Masukkan bawang putih parut, air perasan jeruk nipis, garam, kaldu jamur, merica, minyak, dan saus tiram. Aduk rata dan diamkan selama minimal 30 menit
2. Didihkan air kemudian masukkan garam, merica, penyedap dan kulit ayam. Rebus selama 1 menit, tiriskan
3. Iris memanjang kulit ayam lalu tusuk kulit ayam dengan tusukan sate. Timbang 1 tusuk sate kulit ayam sekitar 10-12 gram
4. Siapkan tusukan sate dan tusuk-tusuk daging ayam yang sudah dimarinasi. Timbang 1 tusuk sate ayam sekitar 15 gram
5. Panggang sate ayam dan sate kulit dengan panggangan sate yang sudah dioles sedikit minyak dan sudah dipanaskan. Panggang hingga sate matang dan berwarna kecokelatan
6. Untuk sate kulit krispi, panaskan minyak di wajan dan goreng sate kulit hingga matang
7. Untuk sambal taichan, geprek kemiri, potong bawang merah, bawang putih, cabai merah keriting dan cabai rawit merah
8. Panaskan minyak di wajan lalu masukkan bahan-bahan yang sudah dipotong. Masak hingga matang dan wangi
9. Haluskan bahan yang sudah dimasak menggunakan blender dan tambahkan sedikit air. Haluskan hingga benar-benar halus lalu masak kembali
10. Tambahkan sisa air, garam, kaldu jamur, dan gula. Masak sambal hingga matang dengan api sedang kecil selama sekitar 3 - 4 menit
11. Setelah sambal matang, tuang ke dalam mangkuk lalu beri perasan jeruk limau. Aduk rata
12. Sate taichan siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Taichan Satay Recipe (yield 50-60 skewers)

Chicken Skin Satay ingredients:
250 g chicken skin
500 ml water
1 tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
½ tsp MSG

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
450 g chicken breast fillet
1 clove garlic
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1½ tbsp oil
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp lime juice

Taichan Sambal ingredients:
3 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
10 pc red curly chili
10 pc red Thai chili
1-2 pc candlenut
1 pc kaffir lime
2 tbsp oil
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
350 ml water

Sides:
Ketupat
Fried shallots
Kaffir lime
Mushroom bouillon

Steps:
1. Cut chicken breast fillet and transfer to a bowl. Add grated garlic, lime juice, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, oil, and oyster sauce. Mix well and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
2. Boil water and add salt, pepper, MSG, and chicken skin. Boil for 1 minute, then drain.
3. Slice chicken skin lengthwise, then skewer them. Each chicken skin skewer should weigh about 10-12 g.
4. Prepare skewers and skewer the marinated chicken pieces. Each chicken skewer should weigh about 15 g.
5. Grill the chicken and chicken skin satay on a preheated, lightly oiled grill. Grill until the satay is cooked and browned.
6. For crispy chicken skin satay, heat oil in a pan and fry the chicken skin satay until done.
7. For Taichan Sambal, pound the candlenuts. Slice the shallots, garlic, red curly chili, and red Thai chili.
8. Heat oil in a pan, then add the chopped ingredients. Cook until fragrant and fully cooked.
9. Blend the cooked ingredients with a little water until completely smooth, then cook again.
10. Add the remaining water, salt, mushroom bouillon, and sugar. Cook sambal over medium-low heat for about 3-4 minutes until done.
11. Once the sambal is cooked, pour into a bowl and add kaffir lime juice. Stir well.
12. Taichan Satay is ready to serve.

title: Soft, Savory, and Deep-Fried! SPECIAL SUNDA TEMPE OREK Recipe
recipe_id:
Resep Tempe Orek Khas Sunda (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
600 gr tempe
2 sdm minyak
7 siung bawang merah
2 cm lengkuas
4 lembar daun salam
3-4 sdm kecap manis
2-3 sdm gula merah
¼ sdt merica
2 sdm MAGGI Saus Tiram
2 sachet MAGGI Magic Lezat
500 ml air
3 buah cabai gendot hijau
2 buah cabai merah besar

Bahan bumbu halus:
3 butir kemiri, geprek
5 siung bawang putih, geprek
3 sdm minyak

Pelengkap:
nasi
kerupuk

Cara membuat:
1. Geprek kemiri dan bawang putih, masukkan ke dalam blender dan tambahkan minyak. Haluskan hingga benar-benar halus
2. Iris bawang merah, geprek lengkuas dan potong-potong tempe
3. Panaskan minyak di wajan, masukkan bawang merah beserta lengkuas dan daun salam, tumis hingga bawang merah berwarna kecokelatan
4. Masukkan bumbu yang sudah dihaluskan dan tumis kembali hingga harum
5. Masukkan tempe yang sudah dipotong, air, kecap manis, MAGGI Saus Tiram, MAGGI Magic Lezat, merica dan gula merah. Masak kembali
6. Potong-potong cabai gendot hijau dan cabai merah besar kemudian masukkan ke wajan. Masak hingga matang dan air menyusut
7. Tempe orek siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Sundanese Tempeh Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
600 g tempeh
2 tbsp oil
7 pc shallot
2 cm galangal
4 pc bay leaf
3-4 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2-3 tbsp palm sugar
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp MAGGI oyster sauce
2 sachet MAGGI Magic Lezat
500 ml water
3 pc habanero
2 pc large red chili

Spices:
3 pc candlenut, pounded
5 clove garlic, pounded
3 tbsp oil

Sides:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Pound the candlenuts and garlic. Place in a blender and add oil. Blend until completely smooth.
2. Slice the shallots, pound the galangal, and cut the tempeh.
3. Heat oil in a pan. Add shallots along with galangal and bay leaves. Sauté until shallots are brown.
4. Add the blended spices and sauté again until fragrant.
5. Add the sliced tempeh, water, sweet soy sauce, MAGGI oyster sauce, MAGGI Magic Lezat, pepper, and palm sugar. Cook again.
6. Slice the habanero and large red chili, then add to the pan. Cook until done and the water reduces.
7. Tempeh Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

title: Fresh and Delicious! Recipe for ACEH MANGO KUWENI ROUJAK
recipe_id:
Rujak Aceh (untuk 10-12 porsi)

Bahan:
1-3 buah cabai rawit merah, opsional
3 buah cabai keriting merah
500 gr daging buah kuweni
1 sdm gula merah
5-6 sdm gula pasir
1/8 sdt garam
150 ml air
2 saset terasi
4 buah jeruk kunci

Bahan lainnya:
1 buah mangga muda
¼ buah pepaya mengkal
½ buah nanas
1 buah timun
4 buah jambu air
250 gr kolang kaling, rebus
½ buah bengkuang

Bahan larutan garam:
1,2 liter air
3-4 sdt garam

Cara membuat:
1. Kupas semua buah lalu bilas satu per satu buah ke dalam larutan air garam, tiriskan
2. Rebus cabai keriting merah dan cabai rawit merah hingga matang lalu bakar terasi hingga wangi
3. Potong mangga kweni dan masukkan ke dalam blender. Masukkan cabai yang sudah direbus, terasi, gula pasir, gula merah, garam dan air, blender hingga halus
4. Potong pepaya, mangga muda, nanas, timun, jambu air dan bengkuang. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
5. Tuang saus rujak dan perasan jeruk kunci, aduk rata kemudian masukkan kolang-kaling, aduk rata
6. Diamkan di kulkas selama 4 jam sebelum di hidangkan
recipe_en:
Rujak Aceh Recipe (yield 10-12 servings)

Ingredients:
1-3 pc Thai chili, optional
3 pc red curly chili
500 g kweni mango
1 tbsp palm sugar
5-6 tbsp white sugar
1/8 tsp salt
150 ml water
2 sachet shrimp paste
4 pc key lime

Other ingredients:
1 pc unripe mango
¼ pc young papaya
½ pc pineapple
1 pc cucumber
4 pc rose apple
250 g sugar palm fruit, boiled
½ pc jicama

Salt Solution:
1.2 liter water
3-4 tsp salt

Steps:
1. Peel all fruits, then rinse each fruit in the salt solution. Drain.
2. Boil red curly chili and Thai chili until cooked, then roast the shrimp paste until fragrant.
3. Slice the kweni mango and place in a blender. Add the boiled chilies, shrimp paste, white sugar, palm sugar, salt, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Slice the young papaya, unripe mango, pineapple, cucumber, rose apples, and jicama. Transfer to a bowl.
5. Pour in the Rujak Sauce and key lime juice. Stir well, then add sugar palm fruits. Stir well.
6. Let sit in the refrigerator for 4 hours before serving.

title: Gurih Wangi Lembut! Resep AYAM KUKUS PASUNDAN [Menu Viral]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Kukus (untuk 12 porsi)

Bahan:
2 ekor ayam negeri
52 gr bumbu ayam goreng instan
5 siung bawang putih
5 lembar daun salam
2 batang serai
1 liter air kelapa

Bahan untuk mengukus:
2 iris jahe
1 sdm bawang putih cincang
½ sdt kaldu jamur

Sambal terasi tomat:
4 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
4 gr terasi
63 gr cabai merah tanjung
10 buah cabai rawit merah
87 gr tomat ceri
1 sdm gula pasir
½ sdt garam
½ sdt penyedap
1-2 sdm minyak goreng
5 lembar daun jeruk
2 lembar daun salam
100 ml air
100 ml air ungkepan ayam (opsional)

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
timun
daun kemangi
tahu

Cara membuat:
1. Potong ayam menjadi 12 bagian dan masukkan ke panci
2. Geprek bawang putih dan serai kemudian masukkan ke panci. Tambahkan daun salam, bumbu ayam goreng instan dan air kelapa
3. Masak hingga mendidih kemudian kecilkan api. Ungkep ayam dengan api kecil selama kurang lebih 20 menit. Angkat ayam dan tiriskan
4. Siapkan bawang putih cincang dan iris-iris jahe
5. Sayat-sayat daging ayam lalu susun di piring kukusan bersama dengan tahu
6. Tambahkan kaldu jamur, irisan jahe dan bawang putih cincang
7. Kukus ayam dan tahu dengan api besar selama 10 – 12 menit
8. Untuk sambal terasi tomat, panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, cabai rawit merah, cabai merah tanjung dan terasi. Masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan
9. Masukkan tomat, masak sesaat dan pindahkan ke food processor. Haluskan
10. Masukkan kembali bahan yang sudah dihaluskan ke wajan, tuang air dan masukkan daun jeruk, daun salam, garam, gula pasir dan penyedap. Masak kembali sambil diaduk
11. Tambahkan air ungkepan ayam ke sambal. Masak kembali hingga menyusut
12. Ayam kukus siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Pasundan Steamed Chicken Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc broiler
52 g instant fried chicken spice mix
5 clove garlic
5 pc bay leaf
2 stalk lemongrass
1 liter coconut water

Ingredients for steaming:
2 slice ginger
1 tbsp minced garlic
½ tsp mushroom bouillon

Tomato Shrimp Paste Sambal:
4 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
4 g shrimp paste
63 g large red chili
10 pc red Thai chili
87 g cherry tomato
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp MSG
1-2 tbsp oil
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc bay leaf
100 ml water
100 ml chicken braising liquid (optional)

Sides:
Rice
Cucumber
Lemon basil
Tofu

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken into 12 pieces and place in a pot.
2. Pound the garlic and lemongrass, then add to the pot. Add bay leaves, instant fried chicken spice mix, and coconut water.
3. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat. Simmer the chicken over low heat for about 20 minutes. Remove the chicken and drain.
4. Prepare minced garlic and sliced ginger.
5. Score the chicken, then arrange it on a steaming plate along with tofu.
6. Add mushroom bouillon, sliced ginger, and minced garlic.
7. Steam the chicken and tofu over high heat for 10-12 minutes.
8. For the Tomato Shrimp Paste Sambal, heat oil, then add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, red Thai chili, large red chili, and shrimp paste. Cook until slightly browned.
9. Add tomatoes. Cook briefly, then transfer to a food processor. Blend until smooth.
10. Return the blended mixture to the pan. Pour in water and add kaffir lime leaves, bay leaves, salt, sugar, and MSG. Cook again while stirring.
11. Add chicken braising liquid to the Sambal. Cook again until reduced.
12. Steamed Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Tender & Soaking! LEMONGRASS ROASTED CHICKEN Air Fryer Recipe
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Panggang Serai (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
1,6 kg paha ayam utuh
4 batang serai
6 siung bawang putih
8 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
2½ sdm saus tiram
2 sdm kecap ikan
4 sdm gula palem
2 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu jamur
⅛ sdt merica
2 sdt minyak wijen

Spicy lime dipping sauce:
3 siung bawang putih
2 sdm air jeruk nipis
5 buah cabai rawit hijau
5 buah cabai rawit merah
3 sdm gula pasir
3 sdm kecap ikan

Pelengkap:
timun
nasi putih
telur mata sapi
daun ketumbar

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong serai, bawang putih dan bawang merah
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang merah, bawang putih, kemiri dan serai hingga harum dan sedikit kecokelatan
3. Siapkan blender, masukkan bahan-bahan yang sudah ditumis, tuangkan saus tiram, kecap ikan, minyak wijen, gula palem, merica, garam dan kaldu jamur. Haluskan hingga benar-benar halus dan semua bahan tercampur rata
4. Sayat-sayat ayam kemudian masukkan ke mangkuk, lalu tuangkan bumbu yang sudah dihaluskan, aduk hingga tercampur rata
5. Masukkan ayam yang sudah dimarinasi ke dalam kulkas semalaman
6. Aduk kembali ayam sebelum dipanggang kemudian panggang ayam menggunakan air fryer di suhu 180 derajat celcius selama 20 menit atau hingga matang
7. Setelah 12 menit, balik ayam dan lanjut panggang kembali hingga matang
8. Untuk dipping sauce, cincang bawang putih, potong-potong cabai rawit hijau dan cabai rawit merah. Masukkan ke mangkuk
9. Masukkan perasan jeruk nipis dan gula pasir. Aduk hingga gula larut. Terakhir masukkan kecap ikan dan aduk kembali hingga rata
10. Ayam panggang serai siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Lemongrass Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
1.6 kg bone-in chicken thigh
4 stalk lemongrass
6 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
3 candlenut
2½ tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
4 tbsp palm sugar
2 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
⅛ tsp pepper
2 tsp sesame oil

Spicy Lime Dipping Sauce:
3 clove garlic
2 tbsp lime juice
5 pc green Thai chili
5 pc red Thai chili
3 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp fish sauce

Sides:
Cucumber
White rice
Fried egg
Cilantro

Steps:
1. Slice the lemongrass, garlic, and shallots.
2. Heat a little oil. Sauté the shallots, garlic, candlenuts, and lemongrass until fragrant and slightly browned.
3. Prepare a blender. Add the sautéed ingredients, then pour in oyster sauce, fish sauce, sesame oil, palm sugar, pepper, salt, and mushroom bouillon. Blend until completely smooth and all ingredients are well mixed.
4. Score the chicken, then place it in a bowl. Add the marinade and mix well.
5. Marinate the chicken in the refrigerator overnight.
6. Stir the chicken again before grilling, then grill the marinated chicken using an air fryer at 180°C for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
7. After 12 minutes, flip the chicken and continue grilling until fully cooked.
8. For the dipping sauce, chop garlic and slice the green and red Thai chili. Place in a bowl.
9. Add lime juice and sugar. Stir until the sugar dissolves. Finally, add fish sauce and stir again until combined.
10. Lemongrass Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Spicy and Refreshing! Thai Som Tam / Papaya Salad Recipe [Homemade]
recipe_id:
Resep Som Tam (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan: 
200 gr pepaya muda
2 siung bawang putih
2 buah cabai rawit merah
3 buah cabai rawit hijau
2 sdm ebi, sangrai
50 gr gula merah
2 sdt jeruk nipis
1 sdm asam jawa
2 sdm kecap ikan
2 batang kacang panjang
2 sdm kacang tanah
3 buah tomat kecil

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
ikan goreng (opsional)

Cara membuat:
1. Iris pepaya, masukan ke dalam air es
2. Ulek bawang putih, cabai rawit merah, cabai rawit hijau, dan ebi yang sudah disangrai
3. Masukkan gula merah, perasan jeruk nipis, asam jawa, kecap ikan dan kacang panjang kemudian ulek kembali
4. Masukkan tomat yang sudah diiris dan kacang tanah, aduk rata
5. Tiriskan pepaya yang sudah direndam dan pindahkan ke wadah
6. Aduk pepaya bersama bumbu yang sudah diulek
7. Som Tam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Som Tam Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g green papaya
2 clove garlic
3 pc red Thai chili
2 pc green Thai chili
2 tbsp dried shrimp, toasted
50 g palm sugar
2 tsp lime juice
1 tbsp tamarind
2 tbsp fish sauce
2 pc long beans
2 tbsp peanuts
3 pc tomato, small

Sides:
White rice
Fried fish (optional)

Steps:
1. Slice the papaya and place in ice water.
2. Grind the garlic, red Thai chili, green Thai chili, and toasted dried shrimp.
3. Add palm sugar, lime juice, tamarind, fish sauce, and long beans, then grind again.
4. Add sliced tomatoes and peanuts. Mix well.
5. Drain the soaked papaya and place in a bowl.
6. Mix the papaya with the Sauce.
7. Som Tam is ready to serve.

title: Kulit Luar Garing, Dalam Padat! Resep BAKSO GORENG PREMIUM [Bisa Frozen]
recipe_id:
Resep Bakso Goreng (untuk 14-20 pcs)

Bahan minyak kulit ayam:
100 gr kulit ayam
3 sdm air
45 ml minyak goreng
7 siung bawang merah iris

Bahan adonan bakso:
400 gr paha ayam giling
100 gr udang kupas
5 siung bawang putih
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt penyedap
1 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
100 gr air es
200 gr tapioka
35 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1 butir telur
1 sdt baking powder
2 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan saus cocolan:
4 buah cabai merah keriting
2 siung bawang putih
2 sdm saus sambal
½ sdt garam
¾ sdm cuka
2 sdm gula pasir
150 ml air

Cara membuat:
1. Untuk minyak kulit ayam, panaskan wajan, masukkan kulit ayam dan air, masak hingga sedikit menyusut lalu gunting-gunting, masak hingga menyusut
2. Masukkan minyak goreng, masak hingga setengah kering lalu masukkan bawang merah, masak hingga kering dan kecokelatan
3. Di dalam food processor, masukkan minyak kulit ayam, bawang putih, setengah bagian paha ayam giling, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, penyedap, merica, baking powder, minyak wijen, telur dan air es, haluskan hingga benar-benar halus dan teksturnya lengket
4. Masukkan sisa paha ayam giling dan udang. Aduk kembali sesaat
5. Pindahkan ke mangkuk kemudian masukkan tapioka dan terigu, aduk rata
6. Panaskan minyak, bentuk bulat bakso lalu goreng sekitar 25 - 30 menit atau hingga matang, angkat dan tiriskan
7. Untuk saus cocolan, masukkan cabai keriting merah, bawang putih dan air ke dalam blender, haluskan
8. Masukkan ke dalam wajan kemudian tambahkan gula pasir, garam, cuka dan saus sambal, masak hingga mendidih
9. Bakso goreng siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Bakso Goreng Recipe (yield 14-20 pcs)

Fragrant Oil ingredients:
100 g chicken skin
3 tbsp water
45 ml oil
7 pc shallot, sliced

Meatball Dough ingredients:
400 g ground chicken thigh
100 g peeled shrimp
5 clove garlic
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
100 g cold water
200 g tapioca flour
35 g all-purpose flour
1 pc egg
1 tsp baking powder
2 tsp sesame oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
4 pc curly red chili
2 clove garlic
2 tbsp chili sauce
½ tsp salt
¾ tbsp vinegar
2 tbsp sugar
150 ml water

Steps:
1. For the Fragrant Oil, heat a pan. Add chicken skin and water. Cook until slightly reduced, then cut into small pieces and cook until fully reduced.
2. Add oil. Cook until half-crisp, then add shallots. Cook until crisp and browned.
3. In a food processor, add Fragrant Oil, garlic, half of the ground chicken thigh, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, pepper, baking powder, sesame oil, egg, and cold water. Blend until smooth and sticky.
4. Add the remaining ground chicken thigh and shrimp. Blend briefly.
5. Transfer to a bowl, then add tapioca and all-purpose flour. Mix well.
6. Heat oil. Shape the dough into round meatballs and fry for about 25-30 minutes or until cooked through. Remove and drain.
7. For the dipping sauce, add curly red chili, garlic, and water into a blender. Blend until smooth.
8. Pour into a pan, then add sugar, salt, vinegar, and chili sauce. Bring to a boil.
9. Fried Meatballs are ready to serve.

title: Make Your Own! IRVINS SALTED EGG: Savory and Crispy to the Max!
recipe_id:
Resep Salted Egg Salmon Skin (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan:
400 gr kulit salmon
2½ liter air
2 sdm garam

Bahan lainnya:
1 sdt baking powder
½ butir putih telur
150 gr tepung sang fen

Bahan saus telur asin:
3 butir kuning telur asin matang
1 sdm mentega tawar
15 lembar daun kari
3 siung bawang putih cincang
3 sdm minyak
3 buah cabai rawit merah
20 gr Krim Kafe
1 sdm gula halus
½ sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica

Cara membuat:
1. Didihkan air dan garam kemudian masukkan kulit salmon beberapa detik, angkat
2. Sisihkan sisa daging pada kulit salmon lalu potong-potong dan rebus kembali 1 menit, tiriskan sekitar 5 menit
3. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk kemudian masukkan putih telur dan baking powder, aduk rata
4. Lapisi dengan tepung sang fen kemudian goreng hingga kering, tiriskan
5. Haluskan kuning telur dengan saringan
6. Panaskan wajan, masukkan minyak, bawang putih dan mentega tawar, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan kuning telur dan daun kari
7. Potong-potong cabai rawit merah lalu masukkan ke wajan, aduk rata
8. Masukkan Krim Kafe, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica dan gula halus, aduk rata kemudian masukkan kulit salmon, aduk sesaat
9. Salted Egg Salmon Skin siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Salted Egg Salmon Skin Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g salmon skin
2.5 liter water
2 tbsp salt

Other ingredients:
1 tsp baking powder
½ egg white
150 g potato starch

Salted Egg Sauce ingredients:
3 pc salted egg yolks, cooked
1 tbsp unsalted butter
15 pc curry leaf
3 clove garlic, minced
3 tbsp oil
3 pc red Thai chili
20 g Krim Kafe
1 tbsp powdered sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Boil water and salt, then dip the salmon skin for a few seconds and remove.
2. Scrape the remaining meat on the salmon skin, then cut the skin into pieces and boil again for 1 minute. Let sit for about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer to a bowl, then add egg white and baking powder. Mix well.
4. Coat with potato starch, then fry until crunchy. Set aside.
5. Mash salted egg yolks with a strainer.
6. Heat a pan. Add oil, garlic, and unsalted butter. Sauté until fragrant, then add salted egg yolks and curry leaves.
7. Chop the red Thai chili, then add to the pan and mix well.
8. Add Krim Kafe, salt, chicken powder, pepper, and powdered sugar. Mix well, then add salmon skin and stir briefly.
9. Salted Egg Salmon Skin is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Serbaguna! Resep SAUS YAKINIKU [Tips Agar Tahan Lama]
recipe_id:
Resep Saus Yakiniku (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
35 gr bawang bombai
4 siung bawang putih
4 gr jahe
30 gr apel
25 ml minyak
25 ml air

Bahan saus:
2 sdt saus tiram
60 ml kecap asin
60 ml mirin
2 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica
1 sdt minyak wijen
½ sdt cuka beras
2 sdt biji wijen panggang
150 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
240 gr tahu telur tube
80 gr maizena
100 gr jamur enoki
merica, opsional

Cara membuat:
1. Masukkan bawang putih, jahe, bawang bombai, apel, minyak dan air ke dalam blender, haluskan
2. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak
3. Masukkan kecap asin, mirin, saus tiram, gula pasir, cuka, merica dan air, masak hingga mendidih lalu masukkan minyak wijen dan biji wijen, masak sesaat
4. Masukkan saus ke dalam jar atau wadah tertutup
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak lalu masukkan jamur enoki. Beri sedikit merica dan masak hingga kecokelatan di kedua sisi. Angkat dan susun di piring saji
6. Potong-potong tahu tube kemudian balurkan ke dalam maizena, diamkan sesaat
7. Panaskan minyak lalu goreng tahu hingga kering, tiriskan
8. Sajikan tahu tube goreng bersama jamur enoki dan siram dengan saus yakiniku
recipe_en:
Yakiniku Sauce Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Spice Paste ingredients:
35 g onion
4 clove garlic
4 g ginger
30 g apple
25 ml oil
25 ml water

Sauce ingredients:
2 tsp oyster sauce
60 ml soy sauce
60 ml mirin
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tsp sesame oil
½ tsp rice vinegar
2 tsp toasted sesame seeds
150 ml water

Other ingredients:
240 g egg tofu
80 g cornstarch
100 g enoki mushroom
Pepper, optional

Steps:
1. Blend garlic, ginger, onion, apple, oil, and water until smooth.
2. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant and the oil separates.
3. Add soy sauce, mirin, oyster sauce, sugar, vinegar, pepper, and water. Bring to a boil, then add sesame oil and sesame seeds. Cook briefly.
4. Pour the sauce into a jar or sealed container.
5. Heat a little oil, then add enoki mushrooms. Add a little pepper and cook until browned on both sides. Remove and arrange on a serving plate.
6. Cut the tofu, then coat with cornstarch and let it sit for a while.
7. Heat oil and fry the tofu until crispy. Drain.
8. Serve the fried tofu with enoki mushrooms and drizzle with Yakiniku Sauce.

title: Gurih dan Ngaldu: Sop Ayam Tauco ala Swike Jatiwangi
recipe_id:
Resep Sop Ayam Tauco (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan bumbu dasar:
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
5 cm jahe

Bahan lainnya:
600-700 gr ayam kampung
2 sdm minyak
1 buah wortel
1 buah kentang
1 buah tomat merah
2 batang seledri
1 batang daun bawang
4 sdm tauco
2 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
½ sdm garam
1/8 sdt merica
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt gula pasir
1 liter air

Cara membuat:
1. Iris bawang putih, bawang merah dan jahe
2. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang merah hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bawang putih, goreng hingga kering, angkat dan tiriskan
3. Potong-potong ayam
4. Masukkan tauco dan jahe ke panci, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan ayam, masak beberapa saat dan tuang air
5. Potong-potong tomat, wortel dan kentang kemudian masukkan ke panci
6. Bumbui dengan garam, merica, kaldu bubuk, gula pasir, kecap manis dan saus tiram. Tutup panci dan masak selama 15 menit atau hingga matang
7. Potong daun bawang dan seledri kemudian masukkan ke dalam panci. Tambahkan bawang yang sudah digoreng, masak sesaat
8. Sop ayam tauco siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Tauco Chicken Soup Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Spices:
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 cm ginger

Other ingredients:
600-700 g free-range chicken
2 tbsp oil
1 pc carrot
1 pc potato
1 pc red tomato
2 stalk celery
1 pc green onion
4 tbsp tauco
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
1 liter water

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallot, and ginger.
2. Heat oil. Fry the shallot until fragrant, then add garlic. Fry until crisp, then remove and set aside.
3. Cut chicken into pieces.
4. Add tauco and ginger to the pot. Sauté until fragrant, then add chicken. Cook for a moment, then add water.
5. Slice the tomato, carrot, and potato, then add to the pot.
6. Season with salt, pepper, chicken powder, sugar, sweet soy sauce, and oyster sauce. Cover the pot and cook for 15 minutes or until done.
7. Slice the spring onion and celery, then add to the pot. Add the fried shallots and garlic. Cook for a moment.
8. Tauco Chicken Soup is ready to be served.

title: 100% Mekar! Resep CARABIKANG / KUE BIKANG [Lembut Kenyal]
recipe_id:
Resep Carabikang (untuk 24 pcs)

Bahan cairan santan:
700 ml air
200 ml santan
4 lembar daun pandan

Bahan lainnya:
300 gr tepung beras
200 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
200 gr gula pasir
2 butir telur
1 sdt garam
½ sdt vanili
½ sdm baking powder

Bahan kuah santan:
200 ml santan
50 ml air
1/8 sdt garam

Cara membuat :
1. Di dalam panci masukkan air, santan dan daun pandan, masak hingga sedikit mendidih. Biarkan hingga hangat kuku
2. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung beras, terigu, gula pasir, garam, baking powder dan vanili
3. Masukkan setengah cairan santan sambil di aduk kemudian masukkan telur, aduk rata
4. Masukkan sisa cairan santan, aduk rata dan diamkan minimal 1 jam
5. Di dalam wajan masukkan santan, air dan garam, masak hingga sedikit mendidih, sisihkan
6. Sisihkan sebagian adonan di dalam mangkuk lain untuk warna hijau dan warna pink
7. Tambahkan sedikit perisa pandan, pewarna kuning dan cokelat untuk adonan hijau, aduk rata dan tambahkan sedikit perisa cocopandan untuk adonan pink, aduk rata
8. Panaskan loyang carabikang kemudian tuang adonan putih, sedikit adonan warna hijau dan pink
9. Masak hingga matang dan berongga kemudian siram dengan sedikit kuah santan. Keluarkan carabikang dari loyang
10. Carabikang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Carabikang Recipe (yield 24 pcs)

Coconut Milk Mixture ingredients:
700 ml water
200 ml coconut milk
4 pc pandan leaf

Other ingredients:
300 g rice flour
200 g all-purpose flour
200 g sugar
2 pc egg
1 tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla
½ tbsp baking powder

Coconut Sauce ingredients:
200 ml coconut milk
50 ml water
1/8 tsp salt

Steps:
1. In a pot, add water, coconut milk, and pandan leaf. Bring to a simmer. Let it cool to lukewarm.
2. In a bowl, mix rice flour, all-purpose flour, sugar, salt, baking powder, and vanilla.
3. Pour in half of the coconut mixture while stirring, then add eggs and mix well.
4. Add the remaining coconut mixture. Mix well and let it rest for at least 1 hour.
5. In a pan, combine coconut milk, water, and salt. Bring to a simmer and set aside.
6. Set aside two portions of the batter in another bowl for green and pink colors.
7. Add a little pandan essence as well as yellow and brown colorings to the green batter. Mix well. Add a little cocopandan essence to the pink batter and mix well.
8. Heat the Carabikang mold, then pour in the white batter, followed by a little of the green and pink batter.
9. Cook until done and spongy, then drizzle with a little Coconut Sauce. Remove the Carabikang from the mold.
10. Carabikang is ready to be served.

title: Ala Fiesta & Kanzler: Resep CHICKEN NUGGET HOMEMADE, 100 % Daging Asli [Bisa Jadi Stok Frozen]
recipe_id:
Resep Chicken Nugget (untuk 30 pcs)

Bahan minyak bawang:
3 sdm minyak
4 siung bawang merah, iris

Bahan adonan nugget:
300 gr paha ayam filet, potong
150 gr dada ayam filet, potong
2 lembar / 40 gr roti tawar
50 ml susu
1 sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
2½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica
¼ sdt pala bubuk
8 cm batang seledri
2 siung bawang putih, cincang
1 butir telur
1 sdm tepung sagu
1 sdt baking powder

Bahan pelapis kering:
40 gr tepung terigu
40 gr bubble crumb
50 gr tepung roti putih

Bahan pelapis basah:
5 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
¼ sdt garam
⅛ sdt merica
1 butir telur
60 ml air

Pelengkap:
saus sambal

Cara membuat:
1. Untuk minyak bawang, panaskan minyak kemudian tumis bawang merah dengan api sedang hingga kecokelatan. Sisihkan dan biarkan hingga tidak terlalu panas
2. Buang pinggiran roti tawar lalu suwir-suwir dan siram dengan susu
3. Iris halus batang seledri
4. Siapkan food processor, masukkan paha ayam filet, dada ayam filet, garam, gula pasir, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, pala bubuk, batang seledri, bawang putih dan minyak bawang merah. Haluskan hingga lengket
5. Masukkan roti, telur, tepung sagu dan baking powder, haluskan kembali hingga rata
6. Masukkan sebagian adonan nugget ke dalam plastik segitiga, semprotkan adonan di atas panci kukusan yang sudah dioles minyak dan diberi alas baking paper
7. Kukus selama 15 menit, angkat dan biarkan dingin
8. Untuk pelapis basah, siapkan mangkuk lalu masukkan tepung terigu, garam, merica, telur dan air, aduk rata
9. Ambil adonan nugget mentah, balurkan ke dalam tepung terigu sambil dibentuk kemudian celupkan ke adonan pelapis basah. Terakhir balurkan dengan bubble crumb
10. Untuk nugget yang sudah dikukus, celupkan nugget ke tepung kering lalu ke adonan pelapis basah kemudian balurkan dengan tepung roti
11. Goreng nugget dengan minyak panas menggunakan api sedang hingga kuning kecokelatan, tiriskan
12. Chicken nugget siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Nuggets Recipe (yield 30 pcs)

Fragrant Oil ingredients:
3 tbsp oil
4 pc shallot, sliced

Nugget Dough ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet, chopped
150 g chicken breast fillet, chopped
2 slice / 40 g white bread
50 ml milk
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
2.5 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
¼ tsp nutmeg
8 cm celery stalk
2 clove garlic, minced
1 pc egg
1 tbsp sago flour
1 tsp baking powder

Dry Coat:
40 g flour
40 g bubble crumb
50 g white breadcrumb

Batter ingredients:
5 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
1 pc egg
60 ml water

Condiment:
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. For the fragrant oil, heat the oil and sauté the sliced shallots over medium heat until golden brown. Set aside and allow to cool slightly.
2. Remove the crusts from the white bread. Tear the bread into pieces and soak it in milk.
3. Finely chop the celery stalk.
4. In a food processor, combine the chicken thigh fillet, chicken breast fillet, salt, sugar, chicken powder, pepper, nutmeg, celery, minced garlic, and fragrant oil. Blend until sticky.
5. Add the soaked bread, egg, sago flour, and baking powder. Blend again until well combined.
6. Transfer some of the nugget dough into a piping bag, and pipe it onto a greased steaming tray lined with baking paper.
7. Steam for 15 minutes, then remove and let cool.
8. For the batter, prepare a bowl and mix together the flour, salt, pepper, egg, and water until well combined.
9. Take a piece of raw nugget dough, coat it in flour while shaping it, then dip it into the batter. Finally, coat it with the bubble crumb.
10. For the steamed nuggets, coat them with flour, then dip into the batter, and finally coat with breadcrumbs.
11. Fry the nuggets in hot oil over medium heat until golden brown, then drain.
12. The Chicken Nuggets are ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Oven! Resep BOLU SUSU KUKUS VANILLA CHOCO: Lembut & Wangi
recipe_id:
Resep Bolu Susu Vanilla Choco (10 pcs)

Bahan bolu susu:
2 butir telur
80 gr gula pasir
¼ sdt garam
1 sdt SP
30 gr kental manis
120 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
½  sdt baking powder
½  sdt vanili bubuk
50 ml minyak
100 ml susu
30 gr meses cokelat

Bahan saus vla:
380 ml susu
100 ml air
¼ sdt garam
2 sdm maizena
80 gr kental manis
2 butir kuning telur
2 sdm mentega tawar

Bahan tambahan (untuk vla cokelat):
2 sdm cokelat bubuk
50 gr kental manis cokelat

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk masukkan telur, gula pasir, garam, SP dan kental manis, kocok hingga pucat dan mengembang
2. Masukkan tepung terigu, baking powder dan vanili bubuk sambil disaring, aduk sesaat kemudian masukkan minyak dan susu, kocok hingga rata
3. Masukkan meses, aduk dengan spatula hingga rata
4. Oles cetakan dengan minyak kemudian isi adonan hingga ¾ bagian dari cetakan yang digunakan. Kukus selama 15 menit 
5. Di dalam panci, masukkan susu, air, garam, maizena dan kental manis, masak hingga sedikit mendidih lalu tuang ke dalam kuning telur, aduk rata dan masak kembali hingga mendidih sambil diaduk 
6. Matikan api kemudian masukkan mentega tawar, aduk hingga rata
7. Bagi dua saus kemudian masukkan cokelat bubuk untuk vla cokelat, aduk rata lalu masukkan kental manis cokelat, aduk rata
8. Bolu susu vanila choco siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Vanilla Chocolate Milk Sponge Cake Recipe (yield 10 pcs)

Milk Sponge Cake ingredients:
2 pc egg
80 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp emulsifier (SP)
30 g condensed milk
120 g cake flour
½ tsp baking powder
½ tsp vanilla powder
50 ml oil
100 ml milk
30 g chocolate sprinkles

Custard Sauce ingredients:
380 ml milk
100 ml water
¼ tsp salt
2 tbsp cornstarch
80 g condensed milk
2 pc egg yolk
2 tbsp unsalted butter

Additional ingredients (for Chocolate Custard Sauce):
2 tbsp cocoa powder
50 g chocolate condensed milk

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine eggs, sugar, salt, emulsifier, and condensed milk. Mix until pale and fluffy.
2. Sift in the flour, baking powder, and vanilla powder. Mix briefly, then add oil and milk. Mix until well combined.
3. Fold in the chocolate sprinkles with a spatula until evenly distributed.
4. Grease the mold with oil and fill it with the batter up to ¾ full. Steam for 15 minutes.
5. In a saucepan, combine milk, water, salt, cornstarch, and condensed milk. Bring to a simmer, then pour into the egg yolks. Mix well and cook again until boiling while stirring.
6. Turn off the heat and add the unsalted butter. Mix until well combined.
7. Divide the sauce in half. Add cocoa powder to one portion for the Chocolate Custard Sauce. Mix well, then stir in the chocolate condensed milk until combined.
8. Vanilla Chocolate Milk Sponge Cake is ready to serve.

title: Ala Resto Cheap Version! SUAN CAI YU Recipe [SALTED VEGETABLES FISH SOUP]
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Ikan Sayur Asin / Suan Cai Yu (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ikan:
360 gr ikan gurami filet
1 sdm maizena
½ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica
½ sdm putih telur

Bahan tambahan marinasi untuk ikan goreng:
3 sdm maizena
2 sdm air

Bahan kuah:
tulang ikan
7 cm jahe, iris
10 siung bawang putih, belah dua
3 batang daun bawang son, potong besar
2 iris besar lemon
250 gr sayur asin, potong
½ sdm merica sichuan
15 gr cabai rawit kering
1.5 liter air
3 buah asinan plum
3 siung bawang putih geprek
½ sdm saus tiram
½ sdm kecap ikan
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt garam

Pelengkap:
nasi putih / mi

Cara membuat:
1. Filet ikan kemudian potong-potong. Marinasi dengan maizena, garam, gula pasir, merica dan putih telur, aduk rata
2. Panaskan minyak, goreng tulang ikan hingga kering, tiriskan. Sisihkan sebagian minyak lalu tumis bawang putih yang di belah dua dan jahe hingga wangi 
3. Masukkan merica sichuan dan cabai rawit kering, masak hingga wangi, tiriskan
4. Tumis sayur asin sesaat lalu masukkan air, tulang ikan, daun bawang son, bawang putih geprek, lemon dan asinan plum. Masak hingga mendidih
5. Tambahkan kecap ikan, saus tiram, kaldu ayam bubuk dan garam, masak selama 5-10 menit
6. Bagi dua ikan, tambahkan maizena dan air untuk ikan yang akan di goreng, aduk rata lalu goreng hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
7. Masukkan sisa ikan filet ke dalam kuah. Masak selama 1 menit kemudian masukkan bahan tumisan aromatik dan ikan goreng, masak sesaat
8. Sup Ikan Sayur Asin / Suan Cai Yu siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Suan Cai Yu / Fish Stew with Pickled Mustard Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Fish Marinade ingredients:
360 g gourami fish fillet
1 tbsp cornstarch
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tbsp egg white

Additional Marinade for Fried Fish:
3 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp water

Broth ingredients:
Fish bones
7 cm ginger, sliced
10 clove garlic, halved
3 stalk spring onion, sliced into large pieces
2 slice lemon, large
250 g pickled mustard, chopped
½ tbsp Sichuan pepper
15 g dried Thai chili
1.5 liter water
3 pc pickled plum
3 clove garlic, crushed
½ tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp salt

Add-ons:
White rice / noodles

Steps:
1. Fillet the fish and slice it into pieces. Marinate with cornstarch, salt, sugar, pepper, and egg white. Mix well.
2. Heat oil and fry the fish bones until crisp, then drain. Leave some oil in the pan, then sauté the halved garlic and ginger until fragrant.
3. Add Sichuan pepper and dried Thai chili. Cook until fragrant, then drain.
4. Sauté the pickled mustard briefly, then add water, fish bones, spring onions, crushed garlic, lemon, and pickled plums. Bring to a boil.
5. Add fish sauce, oyster sauce, chicken powder, and salt. Cook for 5-10 minutes.
6. Divide the fish into two parts. Add cornstarch and water to the portion that will be fried. Mix it well, then fry until golden brown and drain.
7. Add the remaining fish fillet to the broth. Cook for 1 minute, then add the sautéed aromatics and fried fish. Cook briefly.
8. The Fish Stew with Pickled Mustard (Suan Cai Yu) is ready to serve.

title: Resep MIE NYEMEK Sederhana: Hanya Pakai Telur Rasa Istimewa!
recipe_id:
Resep Mie Nyemek Telur (untuk 2 porsi)

Bumbu halus:
4 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
2 butir kemiri
3 gr / 1 sdt terasi
2 sdm minyak

Bahan lainnya:
3 butir telur
1 buah tomat merah
4 buah cabai rawit merah
500 ml air
2 sdm saus sambal
2 sdm saus tiram Maggi
1 sdt kecap Maggi/kecap asin
2 sdm kecap manis
1 sachet kaldu bubuk Maggi
130 gr mi telur kering 
1 batang daun bawang
50 gr sawi hijau

Pelengkap:
kerupuk
bawang goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, terasi dan minyak ke dalam blender, haluskan
2. Iris cabai rawit, sawi hijau, tomat merah dan daun bawang
3. Panaskan minyak, masak telur hingga kering, sisihkan 
4. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian masukkan tomat dan cabai rawit merah, tumis sesaat
5. Masukkan air, saus sambal, saus tiram, kecap maggi, kecap manis dan kaldu bubuk, masak hingga mendidih
6. Masukkan mi, telur yang sudah dipotong-potong dan daun bawang. Masak hingga matang kemudian masukkan sawi hijau, masak sesaat
7. Mi nyemek telur siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Saucy Egg Noodles Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Spice Paste ingredients:
4 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
2 pc candlenut
3 g / 1 tsp shrimp paste
2 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
3 pc egg
1 pc red tomato
4 pc red Thai chili
500 ml water
2 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp Maggi oyster sauce
1 tsp Maggi sauce/soy sauce
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 sachet Maggi stock powder
130 g dried egg noodles
1 stalk green onion
50 g choy sum

Add-ons:
Crackers
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, shrimp paste, and oil in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Slice the Thai chili, choy sum, red tomato, and green onion.
3. Heat oil. Cook the eggs until crisp and set aside.
4. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant, then add tomato and red Thai chili. Sauté briefly.
5. Add water, chili sauce, oyster sauce, Maggi sauce, sweet soy sauce, and stock powder. Bring to a boil.
6. Add noodles. Slice the fried eggs and green onion. Cook until done, then add choy sum and cook briefly.
7. Saucy Egg Noodles are ready to serve.

title: Resep MOCHI TEFLON! Daifuku Versi Praktis Untuk Ide Jualan!
recipe_id:
Resep Mochi Cokelat (18-20 pcs)

Bahan adonan mochi:
200 gr tepung ketan putih
150 gr gula pasir
300 ml air
50 ml minyak
30 gr krimer bubuk
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt vanili bubuk

Bahan isian:
30 gr mentega tawar/margarin
40 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
150 gr air
20 gr cokelat bubuk
120 gr compound milk chocolate, cincang
35 gr gula pasir
100 gr krimer bubuk
1/3 sdt garam

Pelengkap:
stroberi
tepung tapioka + daun pandan, sangrai

Cara membuat:
1. Campurkan air dengan krimer, aduk rata kemudian masukkan cokelat bubuk, aduk rata
2. Di dalam panci masukkan mentega dan tepung, masak hingga wangi kemudian masukkan larutan krimer sambil diaduk secara perlahan
3. Masukkan gula pasir dan garam, aduk sesaat. Matikan api lalu masukkan cokelat yang sudah dicincang, aduk hingga meleleh 
4. Pindahkan ke dalam wadah tahan panas kemudian tutup dengan cling wrap dan dinginkan selama 2 jam atau hingga set
5. Di dalam panci masukkan tepung ketan, vanili bubuk, garam dan gula
6. Campurkan air dengan krimer bubuk, aduk rata 
7. Masukkan larutan krimer ke dalam panci beserta minyak, aduk hingga rata kemudian nyalakan api dan masak hingga adonan menyatu serta mengeluarkan minyak
8. Pindahkan ke dalam wadah tahan panas, tutup dengan cling wrap dan diamkan hingga tidak terlalu panas
9. Bentuk bulat isian cokelat kurang lebih 20-25 gr kemudian balurkan ke dalam tepung tapioka
10. Isi adonan cokelat dengan stroberi kemudian masukkan ke dalam kulkas
11. Bentuk bulat adonan mochi kurang lebih 35 gr kemudian pipihkan dan masukkan isian cokelat, bentuk bulat dan balurkan ke dalam tepung tapioka 
12. Mochi cokelat siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chocolate Mochi Recipe (yield 18-20 pcs)

Mochi Dough ingredients:
200 g glutinous rice flour
150 g sugar
300 ml water
50 ml oil
30 g creamer
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla powder

Filling ingredients:
30 g unsalted butter/margarine
40 g all-purpose flour
150 g water
20 g cocoa powder
120 g compound milk chocolate, chopped
35 g sugar
100 g creamer
1/3 tsp salt

Add-ons:
Strawberry
Tapioca flour + pandan leaf, toasted

Steps:
1. Combine water with creamer. Stir well, then add cocoa powder and mix thoroughly.
2. In a saucepan, add butter and flour. Cook until fragrant, then gradually add the creamer mixture while stirring.
3. Add sugar and salt, stir briefly. Turn off the heat, then add the chopped chocolate and stir until melted.
4. Transfer to a heat-proof container. Cover with plastic wrap and chill for 2 hours or until set.
5. In a saucepan, combine glutinous rice flour, vanilla powder, salt, and sugar.
6. Mix water with creamer and stir well.
7. Add the creamer mixture and oil to the saucepan. Stir until well combined, then turn on the heat and cook until the mixture comes together and releases oil.
8. Transfer to a heat-proof container. Cover with plastic wrap and let it cool until it is no longer hot.
9. Shape chocolate filling into balls of about 20-25 g, then coat in tapioca flour.
10. Fill the chocolate paste with strawberries, then refrigerate.
11. Shape mochi dough into balls of about 35 g. Flatten, add chocolate filling, then shape into balls and coat in tapioca flour.
12. Chocolate Mochi is ready to serve.

title: Spesial Gurih Pedas! Resep IKAN TUNA WOKU Khas Manado
recipe_id:
Resep Ikan Tuna Woku (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi tuna:
500 gr ikan tuna filet
1 sdt garam
¼ sdt merica

Bahan bumbu rajang:
10 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
3 butir kemiri
5 cm kunyit
5 cm jahe
17 buah cabai rawit hijau
7 buah cabai rawit merah
2 batang serai

Bahan aromatik:
2 batang daun bawang
1 buah tomat merah
1 buah jeruk nipis
8 lembar daun jeruk
2 lembar daun pandan
30 gr kemangi
daun kunyit, opsional

Bahan lainnya:
350 ml air
½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdm penyedap
2 sdt gula pasir
75 ml minyak

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong ikan tuna kemudian marinasi dengan garam dan merica, aduk rata
2. Iris bagian putih serai dan geprek bagian batang hijau
3. Masukkan bawang putih, kemiri, jahe dan serai ke dalam food processor, haluskan kemudian masukkan kunyit, bawang merah, cabai rawit merah dan cabai rawit hijau, haluskan
4. Iris daun jeruk, daun pandan dan tomat merah
5. Panaskan minyak, masukkan batang serai, daun pandan dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bumbu rajang, tumis sesaat
6. Masukkan ikan tuna, kaldu ayam, gula pasir dan penyedap, tumis sesaat
7. Masukkan tomat merah, aduk rata kemudian masukkan air, masak selama 5-10 menit
8. Iris daun bawang kemudian masukkan ke dalam wajan, masak sesaat
9. Matikan api dan masukkan kemangi serta perasan jeruk nipis, aduk rata
10. Ikan tuna woku siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Tuna Woku Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Tuna Marinade ingredients:
500 g tuna fillet
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Spice Paste:
10 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
5 cm turmeric
5 cm ginger
17 pc green Thai chili
7 pc red Thai chili
2 stalk lemongrass

Aromatic ingredients:
2 stalks green onion
1 pc red tomato
1 pc lime
8 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc pandan leaf
30 g lemon basil
Turmeric leaf, optional

Other ingredients:
350 ml water
½ tbsp chicken powder
½ tbsp MSG
2 tsp sugar
75 ml oil

Add-ons:
White rice

Steps:
1. Slice the tuna into pieces, then marinate with salt and pepper. Mix well.
2. Slice the white part of the lemongrass and pound the green stalk.
3. Add garlic, candlenuts, ginger, and lemongrass in a food processor. Blend until smooth, then add turmeric, shallots, red Thai chili, and green Thai chili. Blend until smooth.
4. Slice the kaffir lime leaves, pandan leaves, and red tomato.
5. Heat the oil. Add the lemongrass, pandan leaves, and kaffir lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant, then add the spice paste and sauté briefly.
6. Add the tuna, chicken powder, sugar, and MSG. Sauté briefly.
7. Add the red tomato. Mix well, then add water. Cook for 5-10 minutes.
8. Slice the green onion and add it to the pan. Cook briefly.
9. Turn off the heat. Add lemon basil and lime juice. Mix well.
10. Tuna Woku is ready to serve.

title: Praktis, Renyah dan Lembut! Resep MARTABAK TELUR DAGING KECAP [Cocok Untuk Stok]
recipe_id:
Resep Martabak Telur Daging Kecap (untuk 12-15 pcs)

Bahan:
125 gr daging sapi giling
1 ½ sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
2 sdt tapioka
4 butir telur
½ buah bawang bombai
1 batang daun bawang
½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan pelengkap:
cabai rawit hijau
kulit spring roll

Cara membuat:
1. Marinasi daging dengan kecap manis, saus tiram dan tapioka, aduk rata
2. Potong kotak bawang bombai dan iris daun bawang kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
3. Masukkan daging, telur dan kaldu ayam, aduk rata
4. Siapkan kulit spring roll, letakkan isian kemudian lipat
5. Panaskan minyak, goreng di api sedang hingga kecokelatan dan matang , tiriskan
6. Untuk air fryer, oles martabak dengan minyak terlebih dahulu kemudian masukkan ke dalam air fryer dan panggang di suhu 180-185 derajat celcius selama 15 menit
7. Martabak telur daging kecap siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Soy Beef Egg Martabak Recipe (yield 12-15 pcs)

Ingredients:
125 g ground beef
1.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp tapioca flour
4 pc egg
½ pc onion
1 stalk green onion
½ tbsp chicken powder

Add-ons:
Green Thai chili
Spring roll wrappers

Steps:
1. Marinate the beef with sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
2. Dice the onion and slice the green onion, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Add the beef, eggs, and chicken powder. Mix thoroughly.
4. Prepare the spring roll wrappers. Place the filling on the center and fold.
5. Heat oil. Fry over medium heat until golden brown and cooked through, then drain.
6. To fry in an air fryer, brush the martabak with oil, then place it in the air fryer. Cook at 180-185°C for 15 minutes.
7. The Soy Beef Egg Martabak is ready to serve.

title: 15 Menit Jadi! Resep NASI GORENG SAUS KEJU [Cocok Untuk Bekal]
recipe_id:
Resep Cheesy Chicken Fried Rice (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan nasi goreng:
350 gr nasi
1 sdm Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ sdt minyak wijen
4 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
1 batang daun bawang
60 gr wortel
100 gr chicken luncheon
100 gr paha ayam filet
2 butir telur
1 ½ sdm gochujang
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdm kecap asin
1 sdt gula pasir
⅛ sdt merica

Bahan saus keju:
1 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
1 ½ sdm Anchor Unsalted Butter
250 ml susu
2 pcs Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices
¼ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Pelengkap: 
Anchor Cheddar Cheese
chicken katsu/karage (opsional)

Cara membuat :
1. Panaskan Anchor Unsalted Butter kemudian masukkan tepung terigu, tumis hingga wangi
2. Masukkan susu sedikit demi sedikit sambil di aduk kemudian tambahkan kaldu ayam bubuk dan Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices, masak hingga sedikit mengental
3. Iris bawang putih, potong kotak bawang bombai, wortel, iris daun bawang, potong kotak ayam lalu marinasi ayam dengan sedikit garam dan merica, aduk rata
4. Potong kotak chicken luncheon
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih hingga setengah kering kemudian masukkan bawang bombai, ayam dan wortel, tumis hingga ayam matang
6. Masukkan telur, aduk rata kemudian masukkan nasi putih, daun bawang, chicken luncheon, gochujang, kaldu ayam bubuk, kecap asin, gula pasir dan merica, aduk hingga rata
7. Masukkan Anchor Unsalted Butter dan minyak wijen, masak sesaat
8. Susun nasi goreng di dalam piring saji kemudian tuang saus keju, tambahkan Anchor Cheddar Cheese yang diparut dan chicken katsu atau toping lainnya
9. Cheesy chicken fried rice siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Cheesy Chicken Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Fried Rice ingredients:
350 g rice
1 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ tsp sesame oil
4 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion
60 g carrot
100 g chicken luncheon
100 g chicken thigh fillet
2 pc egg
1.5 tbsp gochujang
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper

Cheese Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
1.5 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
250 ml milk
2 slice Anchor Cheddar Cheese
¼ tsp chicken powder

Add-ons:
Anchor Cheddar Cheese
Chicken Katsu/Karaage (optional)

Steps:
1. Heat Anchor Unsalted Butter, then add flour and sauté until fragrant.
2. Gradually add milk while stirring, then add chicken powder and Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices. Cook until slightly thickened.
3. Slice the garlic and green onions. Dice the onion, carrot, and chicken. Marinate the chicken with a bit of salt and pepper. Mix well.
4. Dice the chicken luncheon.
5. Heat a bit of oil. Sauté garlic until half-crisp, then add onion, chicken, and carrot. Sauté until the chicken is cooked.
6. Add the eggs. Mix well, then add rice, green onion, chicken luncheon, gochujang, chicken powder, soy sauce, sugar, and pepper. Stir well.
7. Add Anchor Unsalted Butter and sesame oil. Cook briefly.
8. Arrange the Fried Rice on a serving plate, then pour the Cheese Sauce over it. Add grated Anchor Cheddar Cheese and Chicken Katsu or other toppings.
9. Cheesy Chicken Fried Rice is ready to serve.

title: Garing Renyah Lembut! Resep TERONG RAOS Khas Pandan Wangi
recipe_id:
Resep Terong Raos (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
1-2 buah terong ungu (250 gram)
2 sdm minyak/margarin
7 pcs cumi asin, rendam air panas
5 siung bawang putih
7 siung bawang merah
1 batang daun bawang
4 buah cabai merah keriting
5 buah cabai rawit merah
1 buah jeruk limau (opsional)

Bahan lainnya:
1 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
2 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu jamur/penyedap

Bahan adonan:
150 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
30 gr tepung beras
½ sdm baking powder
¼ sdt garam
½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
250 ml air
½ sdm cuka meja

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, tepung beras, baking powder, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk dan merica
2. Masukkan air secara perlahan sambil di aduk kemudian tambahkan cuka, aduk rata
3. Potong-potong terong kemudian masukkan ke dalam tepung basah, goreng terong hingga kecokelatan dan kering, tiriskan
4. Cincang bawang putih, iris bawang merah, cabai merah keriting, cabai rawit merah, daun bawang dan cumi
5. Panaskan minyak/margarin, tumis bawang merah hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bawang putih, daun bawang, cabai merah, cabai rawit merah dan cumi asin, tumis hingga wangi dan kering
6. Masukkan kecap manis, saus tiram, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk dan terong, aduk hingga rata kemudian masukkan perasan jeruk limau, aduk rata
7. Terong raos siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Terong Raos Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
1-2 pc eggplant (250 g)
2 tbsp oil/margarine
7 pc salted squid, soaked in hot water
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 stalk green onion
4 pc curly red chili
5 pc Thai chili
1 pc lime (optional)

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom bouillon/MSG

Batter ingredients:
150 g all-purpose flour
30 g rice flour
½ tbsp baking powder
¼ tsp salt
½ tbsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
250 ml water
½ tbsp vinegar

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix the all-purpose flour, rice flour, baking powder, salt, chicken powder, and pepper.
2. Gradually add water while stirring, then add vinegar. Mix well.
3. Cut the eggplant into slices, then dip into the batter. Fry the eggplant until golden brown and crispy, then drain.
4. Chop the garlic. Slice the shallots, curly red chili, Thai chili, green onion, and squid.
5. Heat the oil/margarine. Sauté the shallots until fragrant, then add the garlic, green onion, red chili, Thai chili, and salted squid. Sauté until fragrant and crisp.
6. Add sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, stock powder, and eggplant. Stir until well mixed, then add lime juice. Mix well.
7. Terong Raos is ready to serve.

title: Gurih, Pedas, Manis! Resep SAMBAL TERI KECOMBRANG [Tahan Lama]
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Teri Kecombrang (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan:
100 gr teri medan
12 siung bawang putih
18 siung bawang merah
1 buah tomat merah
200 gr cabai merah tanjung
50 gr cabai rawit merah
4 gr terasi
50 gr kecombrang
10 lembar daun jeruk
1 batang serai
1 jempol lengkuas
150 ml minyak
2 sdt garam
3 sdm gula pasir
2 sdt penyedap

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
kerupuk

Cara membuat:
1. Rendam teri dengan air panas beberapa saat kemudian tiriskan
2. Iris tipis kecombrang, daun jeruk, geprek serai dan lengkuas
3. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai merah tanjung, cabai rawit merah dan tomat ke dalam food processor, haluskan
4. Panaskan minyak, masukkan lengkuas, serai, daun jeruk, teri dan terasi, goreng hingga sedikit kecokelatan
5. Masukkan bahan-bahan yang sudah di haluskan dan kecombrang, aduk rata kemudian masukkan garam, penyedap dan gula pasir, masak di api sedang kecil selama 15-20 menit
6. Sambal teri kecombrang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Kecombrang Anchovy Sambal Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
100 g Medan anchovy
12 clove garlic
18 clove shallot
1 pc red tomato
200 g red chili
50 g Thai chili
4 g shrimp paste
50 g kecombrang
10 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
1 thumb galangal
150 ml oil
2 tsp salt
3 tbsp sugar
2 tsp MSG

Add-ons:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Soak the anchovies in hot water for a few moments, then drain.
2. Slice the kecombrang and kaffir lime leaves thinly. Pound the lemongrass and galangal.
3. Add garlic, shallots, red chili, Thai chili, and tomato to a food processor. Blend until smooth.
4. Heat the oil. Add galangal, lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, anchovies, and shrimp paste. Fry until lightly browned.
5. Add the blended ingredients and kecombrang. Stir well, then add salt, MSG, and sugar. Cook over medium-low heat for 15-20 minutes.
6. Kecombrang Anchovy Sambal is ready to serve.

title: Enak Praktis! Resep TUMIS KANGKUNG PEDAS TERASI Ala Resto
recipe_id:
Resep Tumis Kangkung Pedas Terasi (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr kangkung
7 siung bawang merah
1 sdt terasi bubuk
1 sdm saus tiram
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdm gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
4 buah cabai rawit merah
15 buah cabai merah keriting
1 buah tomat merah

Bahan lainnya:
2 buah cabai merah
1 buah tomat merah

Cara membuat:
1. Iris bawang merah, sisihkan kemudian di dalam food processor masukkan bawang putih, cabai merah keriting, cabai rawit merah dan tomat, haluskan
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang merah hingga wangi
3. Masukkan bumbu halus, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan terasi, tumis hingga mengeluarkan minyak
4. Potong-potong tomat merah dan cabai merah
5. Masukkan kangkung, tomat, cabai merah, saus tiram, garam, kaldu jamur, gula pasir dan merica, masak hingga matang
6. Tumis kangkung pedas terasi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Kangkong Stir-Fry with Shrimp Paste Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g kangkong
7 pc shallot
1 tsp shrimp paste powder
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tbsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Spices:
6 clove garlic
4 pc red Thai chili
15 pc curly red chili
1 pc red tomato

Additional ingredients:
2 pc red chili
1 pc red tomato

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots and set aside. In a food processor, blend garlic, curly red chili, red Thai chili, and tomato until smooth.
2. Heat a little oil and sauté the shallots until fragrant.
3. Add the ground spices. Sauté until fragrant, then add the shrimp paste and cook until it releases oil.
4. Slice the red tomato and red chili.
5. Add kangkong, tomato, red chili, oyster sauce, salt, mushroom bouillon, sugar, and pepper. Cook through.
6. Spicy Kangkong Stir-Fry with Shrimp Paste is ready to serve.

title: Wangi Lembut Ekonomis! Resep BOLU MARMER KUKUS
recipe_id:
Resep Bolu Kukus Marmer (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
3 butir telur
300 gr gula halus
240 ml air
90 gr Krim Kafe
300 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
¾ sdt garam
3 sdt SP
1 ½ sdt vanili
¾ sdm baking powder
4 sdm cokelat bubuk
30 gr meses cokelat

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk masukkan tepung terigu, gula halus, garam, baking powder dan vanili sambil disaring
2. Masukkan krim kafe, SP, telur dan air, kocok dengan mixer hingga pucat dan mengembang
3. Bagi 2 adonan kemudian tambahkan cokelat bubuk yang sudah di saring dan meses untuk adonan cokelat, mixer kembali hingga rata
4. Oles loyang dengan minyak kemudian panaskan loyang selama 3 menit
5. Tuang sedikit adonan cokelat ke dalam loyang kemudian adonan putih, ulangi hingga adonan habis lalu aduk membentuk corak dengan garpu
6. Kukus bolu selama 35 menit di api sedang kemudian keluarkan bolu dari loyang
7. Bolu kukus marmer siap disajikan

Krim Kafe, Krimer Serba Guna kualitas terbaik, dengan rasa lembut dan creamy cocok untuk bahan kreasi menu minuman dan makanan manis (dessert). Krim Kafe ini juga low sodium lho!

Tokopedia: https://tokopedia.link/Fk6knxst4Lb

recipe_en:
Steamed Marble Cake Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
300 g icing sugar
240 ml water
90 g Krim Kafe
300 g cake flour
¾ tsp salt
3 tsp SP
1.5 tsp vanilla powder
¾ tbsp baking powder
4 tbsp cocoa powder
30 g chocolate sprinkles

Steps:
1. In a bowl, sift together flour, icing sugar, salt, baking powder, and vanilla powder.
2. Add Krim Kafe, SP, eggs, and water, then beat with a mixer until pale and fluffy.
3. Divide the batter into two portions, then add sifted cocoa powder and chocolate sprinkles to one portion, mixing until well combined.
4. Grease the cake pan with oil and preheat the pan for 3 minutes.
5. Pour a small amount of chocolate batter into the pan, followed by the white batter. Repeat until all the batter is used, then swirl with a fork to create a marble effect.
6. Steam the cake for 35 minutes over medium heat, then remove from the pan.
7. Steamed Marble Cake is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Wangi! Resep SOTO BETAWI AYAM
recipe_id:
Resep Soto Betawi Ayam (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg ayam negri, potong 8
5 pasang hati ampela ayam, rebus

Bahan bumbu halus:
8 siung bawang putih
12 siung bawang merah
5 butir kemiri
6 cm jahe
1 sdt ketumbar
1 sdt lada putih butir
60 ml minyak
50 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
1 ½ sdm bubuk kari minang
3 lembar daun salam
5 lembar daun jeruk
5 cm lengkuas
1 batang serai
1 ½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1 ½ sdm gula pasir
1 ½ sdm garam
½ sdm penyedap
100 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
2 liter air

Pelengkap:
2 buah tomat merah
2 batang seledri
1 batang daun bawang
3 buah kentang
bawang goreng
sambal rawit
jeruk limau
emping
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam blender masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, jahe, ketumbar, lada putih, minyak dan air, haluskan
2. Masukkan bumbu halus dan bubuk kari minang ke dalam wajan, tumis hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak
3. Geprek serai dan lengkuas kemudian masukkan daun salam, serai, lengkuas dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi
4. Masukkan air, ayam, hati ampela, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, penyedap dan seledri, masak selama 30 menit
5. Belah dua kentang kemudian goreng di api sedang hingga matang, tiriskan
6. Potong kotak tomat dan iris daun bawang kemudian sisihkan ayam, hati ampela dan rempah lainnya, biarkan dingin
7. Tambahkan Anchor Cooking Cream ke dalam kuah, aduk rata
8. Goreng ayam dan hati ampela hingga kering, tiriskan kemudian suwir ayam, potong-potong hati ampela dan kentang
9. Soto betawi ayam siap disajikan
