recipe_en:
Soto Betawi with Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg broiler, cut into 8 pieces
5 pair chicken liver and gizzard, boiled

Spices:
8 clove garlic
12 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut
6 cm ginger
1 tsp coriander
1 tsp whole white pepper
60 ml oil
50 ml water

Additional ingredients:
1.5 tbsp Kari Minang powder
3 pc bay leaf
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
5 cm galangal
1 stalk lemongrass
1.5 tbsp chicken powder
1.5 tbsp sugar
1.5 tbsp salt
½ tbsp MSG
100 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
2 liter water

Garnishes:
2 pc red tomato
2 stalk celery
1 stalk green onion
3 pc potato
Fried shallots
Thai chili sambal
Lime
Emping
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. In a blender, combine garlic, shallots, candlenuts, ginger, coriander, white pepper, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil in a pan. Add the spice paste and Kari Minang powder. Sauté until fragrant and the oil separates.
3. Pound the lemongrass and galangal, then add bay leaves, lemongrass, galangal, and kaffir lime leaves to the pan. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add water, chicken, liver and gizzard, salt, chicken powder, sugar, MSG, and celery. Cook for 30 minutes.
5. Cut potatoes in half and fry over medium heat until cooked.
6. Dice the tomatoes and slice the green onions. Set the chicken, liver, gizzard, and other spices aside. Let cool.
7. Add Anchor Cooking Cream to the broth. Stir well.
8. Fry the chicken, liver and gizzard until crisp. Set aside, then shred the chicken. Slice the liver, gizzard, and potatoes.
9. Soto Betawi with Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Lembut Nyoklat! Resep BROWNIES BATIK KUKUS
recipe_id:
Resep Brownies Batik Kukus (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan lapisan batik:
1 butir telur
40 gr gula pasir
½ sdt SP
40 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1/8 sdt garam

Warna 1:
4 tetes pewarna kuning
4 tetes pewarna cokelat
1 tetes pewarna hitam

Warna 2:
4 tetes pewarna hitam
6 tetes pewarna cokelat

Bahan brownies:
3 butir telur
100 gr gula pasir
1 sdt SP
1 sdt perisa vanila
90 gr mentega tawar
60 gr dark chocolate compound
40 gr kental manis cokelat
20 gr cokelat bubuk
65 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
½ sdt garam
1 sdt baking powder

Cara membuat:
1. Untuk lapisan batik, campurkan telur, gula pasir, SP, garam dan tepung terigu, kocok hingga pucat dan mengembang
2. Bagi menjadi 3 adonan, 1 adonan tanpa warna, untuk warna pertama teteskan pewarna kuning, cokelat dan hitam, untuk warna kedua teteskan pewarna cokelat dan hitam, aduk masing-masing warna hingga rata
3. Masukkan masing-masing warna ke dalam plastik segitiga
4. Siapkan pola batik yang sudah di print, sesuaikan dengan ukuran loyang kemudian oles baking paper dengan minyak dan tempelkan dengan motif batik
5. Beri corak warna gelap untuk luar batik kemudian isi dengan warna polos dan isi pinggiran batik dengan warna kuning kecokelatan
6. Kukus selama 1 menit kemudian rapihkan adonan yang menempel pada pinggiran loyang dan letakkan kembali ke bagian dalam loyang
7. Lelehkan mentega dengan dark chocolate, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan kental manis cokelat, aduk rata
8. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan telur, gula pasir, garam dan SP, kocok hingga pucat dan mengembang
9. Masukkan campuran cokelat dan perisa vanila, kocok kembali hingga rata kemudian masukkan tepung terigu, cokelat bubuk dan baking powder sambil disaring, aduk rata. Tuang ke dalam loyang. Kukus selama 25-30 menit
10. Brownies batik kukus siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Steamed Batik Brownies Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Batik Layer ingredients:
1 pc egg
40 g sugar
½ tsp SP
40 g all-purpose flour
1/8 tsp salt

Color 1:
4 drop yellow food coloring
4 drop brown food coloring
1 drop black food coloring

Color 2:
4 drop black food coloring
6 drop brown food coloring

Brownies ingredients:
3 pc egg
100 g sugar
1 tsp SP
1 tsp vanilla extract
90 g unsalted butter
60 g dark chocolate compound
40 g sweetened condensed milk (chocolate flavor)
20 g cocoa powder
65 g all-purpose flour
½ tsp salt
1 tsp baking powder

Steps:
1. For the Batik layer, mix the egg, sugar, SP, salt, and all-purpose flour. Whisk until pale and fluffy.
2. Divide into 3 portions. One portion has no color. For the first color, add yellow, brown, and black food coloring. For the second color, add brown and black food coloring. Mix each color well.
3. Transfer each color into a piping bag.
4. Prepare a Batik pattern that has been printed. Adjust it to the size of the pan, then grease the baking paper with oil and place the Batik pattern on it.
5. Pipe the dark color to outline the Batik pattern, then fill with the white color and fill the edges of the Batik pattern with yellowish-brown color.
6. Steam for 1 minute, then trim the batter that’s stuck to the edges of the pan. Place it back into the pan.
7. Melt the butter with dark chocolate. Mix well, then add sweetened condensed milk (chocolate flavor) and mix well.
8. In a bowl, add eggs, sugar, salt, and SP. Whisk until pale and fluffy.
9. Add the chocolate mixture and vanilla extract. Whisk until well-combined, then sift in all-purpose flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder. Mix well. Pour into the pan. Steam for 25-30 minutes.
10. Steamed Batik Brownies are ready to serve.

title: Bisa Frozen! Resep TAKOYAKI: Garing Di Luar, Meleleh Di Mulut!
recipe_id:
Resep Takoyaki (untuk 30 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
200 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
15 gr maizena
650 ml air
1 butir telur
1 sdt baking powder
1 sdm dashi bubuk
½ sdt garam
1 sdm aonori

Bahan tenkasu:
100 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
200 ml air
1 sdt baking powder
½ sdt garam

Bahan saus:
60 gr saus tomat
100 gr kecap inggris
200 gr saus teriyaki
10 gr gula pasir
30 gr saus tiram

Pelengkap:
daun bawang
gurita
aonori
katsuobushi

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, garam, baking powder dan air, aduk rata kemudian masukkan ke dalam plastik segitiga
2. Panaskan minyak, semprotkan adonan secara perlahan kemudian goreng sesaat di api sedang kecil, tiriskan
3. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, baking powder, aonori, telur, garam, dashi bubuk dan air secara perlahan, aduk hingga rata
4. Iris halus daun bawang dan potong gurita
5. Panaskan cetakan takoyaki dan tuang sedikit minyak kemudian tuang adonan
6. Masukkan gurita, tenkasu dan daun bawang kemudian balikkan setengah takoyaki dan tuang kembali adonan, bentuk bulat dan masak hingga kecokelatan
7. Untuk saus, di dalam panci masukkan saus teriyaki, saus tomat, saus tiram, kecap inggris dan gula pasir, aduk rata kemudian masak hingga mendidih, sisihkan
8. Takoyaki siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Takoyaki Recipe (yield 30 pcs)

Batter ingredients:
200 g all-purpose flour
15 g cornstarch
650 ml water
1 pc egg
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp dashi powder
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp aonori

Tenkasu ingredients:
100 g all-purpose flour
200 ml water
1 tsp baking powder
½ tsp salt

Sauce ingredients:
60 g ketchup
100 g Worcestershire sauce
200 g teriyaki sauce
10 g sugar
30 g oyster sauce

Add-ons:
Green onions
Octopus
Aonori
Katsuobushi

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, salt, baking powder, and water. Stir well, then transfer to a piping bag.
2. Heat oil. Drip the batter in slowly, then fry briefly over medium-low heat. Drain.
3. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, cornstarch, baking powder, aonori, egg, salt, dashi powder, and water slowly. Stir until mixed well.
4. Finely chop green onions and cut the octopus into pieces.
5. Heat a takoyaki pan and add a small amount of oil, then pour in the batter.
6. Add octopus, tenkasu, and green onions, then flip the takoyaki halfway and pour more batter to shape into balls. Cook until browned.
7. For the Sauce, in a saucepan, combine teriyaki sauce, ketchup, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and sugar. Stir well, then cook until boiling. Set aside.
8. Takoyaki is ready to serve.

title: Wangi Istimewa! Resep NASI GORENG CABE IJO Pakai Ikan Asin
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Goreng Cabe Ijo (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan bumbu dasar:
5 siung bawang merah
4 siung bawang putih
120 gr cabai hijau keriting
20 buah cabai rawit hijau
5 lembar daun jeruk

Bahan lainnya:
30 gr ikan jambal roti
2 batang daun bawang
2 butir telur
1 sdm saus tiram
600 gr nasi
½ sdm garam
1 sdm gula pasir
½ sdm penyedap
1/8 sdt merica
4 sdm minyak
½ sdt baking soda untuk merebus cabai hijau

Pelengkap:
emping
bawang merah goreng
timun

Cara membuat :
1. Didihkan air, masukkan cabai hijau keriting dan baking soda, rebus selama 3 menit, tiriskan lalu haluskan
2. Cincang bawang putih dan bawang merah, iris daun bawang, potong-potong kecil jambal roti, iris cabai rawit hijau dan daun jeruk
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih dan bawang merah hingga wangi kemudian masukkan ikan asin, tumis sesaat
4. Masukkan telur, aduk rata lalu masukkan cabai rawit hijau, daun jeruk, cabai hijau keriting yang sudah di haluskan dan nasi, aduk hingga rata
5. Masukkan saus tiram, garam, gula pasir, penyedap, merica dan daun bawang, masak sesaat di api besar
6. Nasi goreng cabe ijo siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Green Chili Fried Rice Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Base Spices:
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
120 g curly green chili
20 pc green Thai chili
5 pc kaffir lime leaf

Other ingredients:
30 g jambal roti (salted fish)
2 pc green onion
2 pc egg
1 tbsp oyster sauce
600 g rice
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp MSG
1/8 tsp pepper
4 tbsp oil
½ tsp baking soda for boiling green chili

Condiments:
Emping crackers
Fried shallots
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Add curly green chili and baking soda. Boil for 3 minutes, drain, then chop.
2. Chop garlic and shallots. Slice the green onions. Chop the jambal roti into small pieces. Slice green Thai chili and kaffir lime leaves.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add salted fish and sauté briefly.
4. Add the eggs. Stir well, then add green Thai chili, kaffir lime leaves, chopped curly green chili, and rice. Stir until well mixed.
5. Add oyster sauce, salt, sugar, MSG, pepper, and green onions. Cook briefly over high heat.
6. Green Chili Fried Rice is ready to serve.

title: Kuah Kental dan Gurih! Resep LOMIE AYAM KANGKUNG [Bikin Nagih!]
recipe_id:
Resep Lomie Kangkung (untuk 6-8 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
50 gr udang

Bahan topping ayam:
500 gr ayam paha atas / 250 gr filet
3 sdm minyak
2 batang daun bawang cung
2 liter air
1 ½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdm garam
1 ½ sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
3 buah jamur shitake (opsional)

Bahan lainnya:
½ sdt garam
1 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan kuah kental:
3 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm saus tiram
80 gr tapioka
1 butir telur

Bahan rebusan:
1 ½ liter air
½ sdt baking soda
½ sdt garam

Bahan pelengkap:
mi basah
kangkung
taoge
bawang goreng
sambal rawit
jeruk limau

Cara membuat :
1. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah dan udang ke dalam food processor, haluskan
2. Panaskan minyak, tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi. Iris daun bawang kemudian masukkan ke dalam wajan, tumis hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan
3. Masukkan air, kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, gula pasir dan merica, masak hingga mendidih lalu masukkan ayam dan jamur shitake yang sudah di iris, masak selama 20 menit di api kecil
4. Sisihkan ayam lalu tambahkan garam dan minyak wijen, aduk rata dan tutup
5. Masukkan kecap manis, kecap asin dan saus tiram ke dalam wajan, aduk rata
6. Larutkan tapioka dengan sedikit air kemudian masukkan perlahan ke dalam wajan, masak hingga mengental
7. Kocok telur kemudian masukkan ke dalam wajan secara perlahan sambil di aduk
8. Lepaskan daging ayam dari tulang nya kemudian potong-potong
9. Didihkan air masukkan garam dan baking soda, rebus taoge dan kangkung beberapa saat, tiriskan
10. Rebus mi beberapa saat, tiriskan
11. Lomie ayam kangkung siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Lomie Kangkung Recipe (yield 6-8 servings)

Spice Paste ingredients:
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
50 g shrimp

Chicken Topping ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh / 250 g fillet
3 tbsp oil
2 pc scallion
2 liter water
1.5 tbsp chicken powder
1 tbsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
3 pc Shiitake mushroom (optional)

Other ingredients:
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sesame oil

Thick Soup ingredients:
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
80 g tapioca flour
1 pc egg

Ingredients to boil:
1.5 liter water
½ tsp baking soda
½ tsp salt

Add-ons:
Fresh noodles
Kangkung
Bean sprouts
Fried shallots
Chili sauce
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Add garlic, shallots, and shrimp into a food processor. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant. Slice scallions, then add to the pan. Sauté until fragrant and slightly browned.
3. Add water, chicken powder, salt, sugar, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then add chicken and sliced shiitake mushrooms. Cook for 20 minutes over low heat.
4. Set aside the chicken, then add salt and sesame oil. Mix well and cover.
5. Add sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, and oyster sauce to the pan. Mix well.
6. Dissolve tapioca in a little water, then slowly add to the pan. Cook until thickened.
7. Beat the egg, then slowly add to the pan while stirring.
8. Remove the chicken meat from the bone then chop into pieces.
9. Boil water. Add salt and baking soda, then blanch the bean sprouts and kangkung briefly. Drain.
10. Boil the noodles briefly and drain.
11. Lomie Kangkung is ready to serve.

title: Kenyal, Lembut, Cocok Untuk Stok! Resep PENTOL DOS [Favorit Anak]
recipe_id:
Resep Pentol Dos (untuk 70-80 pcs)

Bahan biang:
5 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
50 ml minyak
350 ml air
120 gr tepung beras
1 sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt penyedap
1 sdm gula pasir
3 sdm kecap asin
2-3 batang daun bawang

Bahan campuran adonan:
1 butir telur ayam
250 gr tapioka
50 gr tepung terigu protein sedang

Bahan sambal kacang:
4 siung bawang merah
2 siung bawang putih
1 butir kemiri
4 sdm minyak
50 gr kacang tanah goreng
2 buah cabai rawit merah (opsional)
3 buah cabai merah keriting
2 lembar daun jeruk
500 ml air
1 ½ sdm kecap manis
1 sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt garam
1 ½ sdm gula merah
1 ½ sdm tapioka

Pelengkap:
jeruk limau

Cara membuat:
1. Masukkan bawang putih dan bawang merah ke dalam food processor, haluskan
2. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih dan bawang merah hingga sedikit kecokelatan
3. Campurkan air dengan tepung beras, aduk rata lalu masukkan ke dalam wajan
4. Masukkan garam, penyedap, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir dan merica, masak hingga mengental dan matang kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
5. Untuk sambal kacang, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, kacang tanah, cabai merah keriting dan cabai rawit merah ke dalam food processor, haluskan
6. Panaskan minyak, tumis bumbu kacang hingga wangi dan berbusa kemudian tambahkan air, gula merah, kecap manis, daun jeruk, garam dan kaldu jamur, masak hingga air berkurang setengahnya
7. Sisihkan daun jeruk dan blender halus sebagian sambal kacang. Masak kembali kemudian masukkan larutan tapioka, masak hingga mendidih dan mengental
8. Setelah adonan biang dingin, masukkan telur, kecap asin, terigu dan tapioka, aduk hingga rata
9. Cincang daun bawang dan campurkan ke dalam adonan, aduk rata. Bentuk bulat adonan kemudian rebus hingga mengapung dan matang, tiriskan dan tambahkan sedikit minyak
10. Tusukkan pentol dengan tusuk sate kemudian goreng hingga kering, tiriskan
11. Pentol dos siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Pentol Dos Recipe (yield 70-80 pieces)

Starter ingredients:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
50 ml oil
350 ml water
120 g rice flour
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
1 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp soy sauce
2-3 pc green onion

Dough ingredients:
1 pc egg
250 g tapioca flour
50 g all-purpose flour

Peanut Sauce ingredients:
4 pc shallot
2 clove garlic
1 pc candlenut
4 tbsp oil
50 g fried peanut
2 pc red Thai chili (optional)
3 pc curly red chili
2 pc kaffir lime leaf
500 ml water
1.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp palm sugar
1.5 tbsp tapioca flour

Add-ons:
Lime

Steps:
1. Place garlic and shallots into a food processor. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil. Sauté garlic and shallots until lightly browned.
3. Mix water with rice flour, then add to the pan.
4. Add salt, seasoning, chicken powder, sugar, and pepper. Cook until thickened and cooked through, then transfer to a bowl.
5. For the Peanut Sauce, place garlic, shallots, candlenut, peanuts, curly red chili, and red Thai chili into a food processor. Blend until smooth.
6. Heat oil. Sauté the mixture until fragrant and foamy, then add water, palm sugar, sweet soy sauce, kaffir lime leaves, salt, and mushroom bouillon. Cook until the water reduces by half.
7. Set the kaffir lime leaves aside. Blend part of the Peanut Sauce until smooth. Cook again, then add the tapioca slurry. Cook until boiling and thickened.
8. Once the starter mixture is cool, add egg, soy sauce, all-purpose flour, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
9. Chop green onions and mix them into the dough. Mix well. Shape the dough into balls, then boil until they float and are cooked through. Drain and add a bit of oil.
10. Skewer the balls with satay sticks and fry until crisp, then drain.
11. Pentol Dos is ready to serve.

title: Empuk & Meresap! Resep CHICKEN TERIYAKI: Praktis Bikin di Rumah
recipe_id:
Resep Chicken Teriyaki (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
4 pcs paha ayam filet dengan kulit (total 750 gram)
8 sdm saus teriyaki
½ buah jeruk nipis
¼ sdt merica
2 sdm maizena
3 siung bawang putih, geprek

Bahan untuk ayam panggang:
100 ml air
50 gr saus teriyaki
½ sdm mentega tawar (opsional)

Bahan untuk ayam tumis:
3 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
½ sdm mentega tawar (opsional)
50 gr saus teriyaki

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
brokoli, rebus
wijen putih

Cara membuat :
1. Marinasi ayam dengan perasan jeruk nipis, bawang putih, merica, maizena dan saus teriyaki, aduk rata. Diamkan minimal 2 jam atau semalaman di dalam kulkas 
2. Untuk ayam panggang, panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan ayam, masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan di semua sisi 
3. Masukkan air dan saus teriyaki, masak selama 5 menit di api sedang sambil ditutup lalu masukkan mentega, masak sesaat
4. Untuk tumis, iris bawang putih, iris tebal bawang bombai dan potong-potong ayam
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis sesaat bawang putih lalu masukkan ayam, tumis di api besar hingga sedikit kecokelatan
6. Masukkan bawang bombai, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan saus teriyaki dan mentega, masak beberapa saat
7. Ayam teriyaki siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Teriyaki Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients to marinate:
4 pc chicken thigh fillet, with skin (total 750 g)
8 tbsp teriyaki sauce
½ pc lime
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch
3 clove garlic, pounded

Roasted Teriyaki Chicken ingredients:
100 ml water
50 g teriyaki sauce
½ tbsp unsalted butter (optional)

Stir-Fried Teriyaki Chicken ingredients:
3 clove garlic
½ pc onion
½ tbsp unsalted butter (optional)
50 g teriyaki sauce

Add-ons:
White rice
Boiled broccoli
White sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice, garlic, pepper, cornstarch, and teriyaki sauce. Mix well. Let it sit for at least 2 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
2. For Roasted Teriyaki Chicken, heat a little oil. Add the chicken and cook until lightly browned on all sides.
3. Add water and teriyaki sauce. Cook for 5 minutes over medium heat with the lid on, then add butter and cook briefly.
4. For Stir-Fried Teriyaki Chicken, slice the garlic, cut the onion thickly, and chop the chicken.
5. Heat a little oil. Briefly sauté the garlic, then add the chicken in. Stir-fry over high heat until lightly browned.
6. Add onion and sauté briefly, then add teriyaki sauce and butter. Cook for a few moments.
7. Teriyaki Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Praktis & Istimewa! Resep BIHUN KUAH SAPI IRIS [Favorit Keluarga]
recipe_id:
Resep Bihun Kuah Sapi Iris (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
300 gr daging sapi has dalam
2 sdm tapioka
2 siung bawang putih
2 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm kecap manis
1/8 sdt merica
2 sdm air

Bahan kuah:
1 ½ liter air
2 sdm minyak
8 siung bawang merah
4 siung bawang putih
4 batang seledri
2 batang daun bawang
1 sdt garam
2 sdt gula pasir
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan lainnya:
300 gr bihun
bawang merah goreng
sawi hijau, rebus

Cara membuat:
1. Iris-iris daging dengan ketebalan 2-3 mm lalu marinasi dengan bawang putih parut, merica, kecap asin, kecap manis, air dan tapioka, aduk rata secara perlahan. Diamkan selama 5-10 menit
2. Iris bawang putih, bawang merah, daun bawang dan seledri
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih dan bawang merah hingga wangi kemudian masukkan air, masak hingga mendidih
4. Masukkan daging sapi secara perlahan, kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, gula pasir, daun bawang dan seledri, masak sesaat
5. Didihkan air, masukkan bihun dan masak selama 2 menit, tiriskan
6. Bihun kuah sapi iris siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Sliced Beef Vermicelli Soup Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients to marinate:
300 g beef tenderloin
2 tbsp tapioca flour
2 clove garlic
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tbsp water

Soup ingredients:
1.5 L water
2 tbsp oil
8 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
4 pc celery
2 pc green onion
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
2 tsp chicken powder

Other ingredients:
300 g vermicelli
Fried shallots
Boiled choy sum

Steps:
1. Slice the beef into 2-3 mm thick pieces then marinate with grated garlic, pepper, soy sauce, sweet soy sauce, water, and tapioca flour. Mix gently. Let it sit for 5-10 minutes.
2. Slice the garlic, shallots, green onions, and celery.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté garlic and shallots until fragrant then add water and bring to a boil.
4. Gradually add the beef, chicken powder, salt, sugar, green onions, and celery. Cook briefly.
5. Bring water to a boil. Add vermicelli and cook for 2 minutes, then drain.
6. Sliced Beef Vermicelli Soup is ready to serve.

title: Resep SPICY CHICKEN WINGS: Manis Gurih! [Cocok Untuk Stok]
recipe_id:
Resep Spicy Chicken Wings (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
750 gr sayap ayam
½ buah jeruk nipis
4 siung bawang putih halus
2 sdm maizena
½ sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm saus BBQ
1 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm gochugaru/paprika bubuk
2 sdm gula palem
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt merica

Cara membuat:
1. Marinasi sayap ayam dengan perasan jeruk nipis, bawang putih halus, merica, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula palem, saus tiram, kecap manis, saus sambal, saus BBQ, gochugaru dan maizena, aduk rata
2. Diamkan ayam di dalam kulkas semalaman
3. Susun di dalam kukusan dan kukus selama 15-20 menit di api sedang kecil. Biarkan hingga dingin
4. Panaskan minyak, goreng sayap beberapa saat, tiriskan
5. Spicy chicken wings siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Chicken Wings Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients to marinate:
750 g chicken wings
½ pc lime
4 clove garlic, finely grated
2 tbsp cornstarch
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp BBQ sauce
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp gochugaru/paprika powder
2 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Marinate chicken wings with lime juice, garlic, pepper, chicken powder, palm sugar, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, chili sauce, BBQ sauce, gochugaru, and cornstarch. Mix well.
2. Let the wings marinate in the refrigerator overnight.
3. Arrange in a steamer and steam for 15-20 minutes over medium-low heat. Allow to cool.
4. Heat oil. Fry the wings briefly, then drain.
5. Spicy Chicken Wings are ready to serve.

title: Lembut Gurih! Resep PANGSIT AYAM KUAH / WONTON SOUP [Favorit Anak & Keluarga]
recipe_id:
Resep Pangsit Ayam Kuah (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan:
300 gr paha ayam filet
3 siung bawang putih
4 siung bawang merah
1 butir putih telur
2 sdm tapioka
1 sdm saus tiram
1 batang daun bawang
2 sdm minyak
1 ½ sdm gula pasir
1 ½ sdt garam
1 ½ sdt kaldu jamur
1/3 sdt merica
2 sdm air

Bahan kuah:
1 ½ liter air
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
½ sdt garam
½ sdm gula pasir

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
daun bawang iris
kulit pangsit
minyak bawang putih

Cara membuat :
1. Cincang bawang merah dan iris daun bawang. Panaskan minyak, goreng bawang merah hingga wangi kemudian masukkan daun bawang, tumis sesaat, sisihkan
2. Iris bawang putih kemudian masukkan ke dalam food processor beserta sebagian ayam, garam, gula pasir, kaldu jamur dan merica, haluskan hingga lengket
3. Masukkan sisa ayam, putih telur, saus tiram,air dan tapioka, haluskan sesaat. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk dan masukkan minyak bawang, aduk rata
4. Siapkan kulit pangsit, letakkan ½ sdm adonan lalu lipat segitiga dan lipat ke tengah
5. Panaskan air dan sedikit minyak, masukkan pangsit dan rebus sesaat, tiriskan
6. Untuk kuah, masak semua bahan hingga mendidih
7. Pangsit ayam kuah siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Wonton Soup Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
3 clove garlic
4 clove shallot
1 pc egg white
2 tbsp tapioca flour
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 stalk green onion
2 tbsp oil
1.5 tbsp sugar
1.5 tsp salt
1.5 tsp mushroom bouillon
1/3 tsp pepper
2 tbsp water

Soup ingredients:
1.5 liter water
1 tbsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar

Add-ons:
White rice
Sliced green onions
Wonton wrappers
Garlic oil

Steps:
1. Chop shallots and slice green onions. Heat oil. Fry shallots until fragrant, then add green onions. Sauté briefly and set aside.
2. Slice the garlic. Place it in a food processor with some chicken, salt, sugar, mushroom bouillon, and pepper, grind until sticky.
3. Add the remaining chicken, egg white, oyster sauce, water, and tapioca flour. Blend briefly. Transfer to a bowl and add garlic oil. Mix well.
4. Prepare wonton wrappers. Place ½ tbsp of the mixture. Fold into a triangle and fold towards the center.
5. Heat water and a little oil. Add wontons and boil briefly. Drain.
6. For the Soup, cook all ingredients until boiling.
7. Chicken Wonton Soup is ready to serve.

title: Resep AYAM GEPREK SAMBAL KOREK: Gurih, Krispi, Juicy!
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Geprek (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
600 gr paha ayam filet
1 sdm air jeruk nipis
2 sdm gula pasir
1 sdm garam
1 sdt merica
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
5 siung bawang putih
1/3 buah bawang bombai
400 ml air
1 butir telur
80 gr tepung terigu protein sedang

Bahan pelapis kering:
450 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
100 gr tapioka / maizena
50 gr tepung beras
4 sdt baking powder
2 sdt kunyit bubuk
2 sdt gochugaru / paprika bubuk

Bahan sambal:
100 gr cabai rawit merah
6 siung bawang putih
1 sachet terasi, bakar
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt penyedap
1 buah jeruk limau
2 sdm minyak panas

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
timun

Cara membuat :
1. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang bombai dan sedikit air ke dalam blender, haluskan
2. Marinasi ayam dengan garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, gula pasir, air jeruk nipis, telur, bumbu halus, terigu dan air, aduk rata. Diamkan minimal 2 jam di suhu ruang
3. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, tapioka, tepung beras, kunyit bubuk, gochugaru dan baking powder, aduk rata
4. Tiriskan ayam kemudian balurkan ke dalam tepung kering lalu celupkan ke tepung basah dan lapisi kembali ke tepung kering. Ulangi satu kali lagi apabila ingin tekstur yang lebih tebal
5. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam di api besar hingga membentuk struktur luar yang kering lalu kecilkan api, goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
6. Untuk sambal, ulek bawang putih, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, penyedap dan terasi, haluskan
7. Masukkan cabai rawit merah ke dalam food processor, haluskan kemudian gabungkan ke dalam ulekan, aduk rata
8. Siram dengan minyak panas, aduk rata. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk kemudian masukkan perasan jeruk limau, aduk rata
9. Ayam geprek siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Ayam Geprek Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade:
600 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tbsp lime juice
2 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1 tbsp chicken powder
5 clove garlic, minced
1/3 pc onion
400 ml water
1 pc egg
80 g all-purpose flour

Dry Coat:
450 g all-purpose flour
100 g tapioca flour or cornstarch
50 g rice flour
4 tsp baking powder
2 tsp turmeric powder
2 tsp gochugaru or paprika powder

Sambal ingredients:
100 g red Thai chili
6 clove garlic
1 sachet shrimp paste, toasted
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
½ tsp MSG
1 pc kaffir lime
2 tbsp hot oil

Add-ons:
Rice
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Blend garlic, onion, and a little water until smooth.
2. Marinate the chicken with salt, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, lime juice, egg, blended spices, all-purpose flour, and water. Mix well. Let sit for at least 2 hours at room temperature.
3. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, tapioca flour, rice flour, turmeric powder, gochugaru, and baking powder. Mix well.
4. Drain the chicken, then coat with the dry mixture. Dip into the batter and coat again with the dry mixture. Repeat once more if a thicker texture is desired.
5. Heat oil. Fry the chicken over high heat until a crispy outer structure forms, then reduce the heat and fry until golden brown. Drain.
6. For the Sambal, mash garlic, salt, chicken powder, MSG, and toasted shrimp paste until smooth.
7. Blend the red Thai chili in a food processor, then mix with the ground ingredients.
8. Pour hot oil over the Sambal and mix well. Transfer to a bowl and add lime juice. Mix well.
9. Ayam Geprek is ready to serve.

title: Praktis, Mudah, Enak! Resep UDANG GORENG ASAM JAWA
recipe_id:
Resep Udang Goreng Asam Jawa (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
400 gr udang
6 siung bawang putih
1 sdm asam jawa
1 sdm air
½ sdm garam
½ sdm kaldu jamur
1/8 sdt merica
1-2 sdm tapioka

Bahan sambal kecap:
1 siung bawang putih
5 buah cabai rawit merah
15 buah cabai rawit hijau
2 sdm gula merah
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
2 sdm kecap manis
½ sdt garam
½ buah tomat merah, potong kotak
½ buah jeruk limau

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong bagian ujung kepala udang lalu belah 3 ruas pertama punggung udang dan bersihkan kotorannya
2. Haluskan bawang putih dengan ulekan lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
3. Masukkan asam jawa dan air, aduk rata lalu masukkan udang, garam, kaldu jamur, merica dan tapioka, aduk rata secara perlahan. Diamkan selama 10 menit
4. Di dalam ulekan, masukkan bawang putih dan garam, ulek hingga halus
5. Masukkan cabai rawit hijau dan cabai rawit merah, ulek kasar kemudian tambahkan gula merah, ulek kembali. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
6. Masukkan kecap manis, bawang goreng, tomat merah dan perasan jeruk limau, aduk rata
7. Panaskan minyak, goreng udang di api besar beberapa saat, tiriskan
8. Udang goreng asam jawa siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Tamarind Fried Shrimp Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinade:
400 g shrimp
6 clove garlic
1 tbsp tamarind
1 tbsp water
½ tbsp salt
½ tbsp mushroom bouillon
1/8 tsp pepper
1-2 tbsp tapioca flour

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
1 clove garlic
5 pc red Thai chili
15 pc green Thai chili
2 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp fried shallots
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tsp salt
½ pc red tomato, diced
½ pc lime

Add-ons:
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. Cut off the shrimp heads and slice the first three segments of the shrimp's back to remove the vein.
2. Mash the garlic with a mortar and pestle, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Add tamarind and water, mix well. Add shrimp, salt, mushroom bouillon, pepper, and tapioca flour. Mix gently. Let sit for 10 minutes.
4. In a mortar, mash garlic and salt until smooth.
5. Add green and red Thai chili. Mash coarsely, then add palm sugar and mash again. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Add sweet soy sauce, fried shallots, diced tomato, and lime juice, mix well.
7. Heat oil. Fry the shrimp over high heat briefly, then drain.
8. Tamarind Fried Shrimp is ready to serve.

title: Luar Renyah Dalam Creamy Gurih! Resep RISOLES KORNET KEJU
recipe_id:
Resep Risoles Kornet Keju (untuk 8-10 porsi)

Bahan kulit:
150 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
2 sdm maizena
300 ml air
100 ml susu
1 sdt garam
1 butir telur
1 sdm Anchor Unsalted Butter, lelehkan

Bahan isian kornet:
½ buah bawang bombai ukuran kecil, potong
kotak
200 gr kornet sapi
1 sdm minyak
2 sdm Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdm gula pasir

Bahan pelapis:
75 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1 butir telur
120 ml air
tepung roti putih

Pelengkap:
telur rebus
Anchor Keju Blok Cheddar
mayones
saus sambal

Cara membuat :
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, garam, telur, susu dan air, aduk rata kemudian masukkan mentega yang sudah dilelehkan, aduk rata dan saring
2. Panaskan wajan, tuang ¾ centong sayur adonan sambil diratakan, ulangi hingga habis
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang bombai hingga wangi kemudian masukkan mentega dan kornet, aduk rata
4. Masukkan gula pasir dan kaldu ayam bubuk, tumis hingga kering, sisihkan
5. Parut keju dan belah empat telur. Untuk pelapis basah, campurkan tepung, telur dan air, aduk rata
6. Siapkan kulit risol, susun kornet, telur rebus, keju parut dan mayones. Lipat dan oles bagian ujung kulit risol dengan adonan basah
7. Celupkan risol ke dalam adonan basah lalu ke dalam tepung roti
8. Panaskan minyak, goreng di api sedang besar hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
9. Risoles kornet keju siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Corned Beef Cheese Rissole Recipe (yield 8-10 servings)

Skin ingredients:
150 g all-purpose flour
2 tbsp cornstarch
300 ml water
100 ml milk
1 tsp salt
1 pc egg
1 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter, melted

Corned Beef Filling:
½ pc small onion, diced
200 g corned beef
1 tbsp oil
2 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ tsp chicken powder
½ tbsp sugar

Batter ingredients:
75 g all-purpose flour
1 pc egg
120 ml water
White breadcrumbs

Add-ons:
Boiled eggs
Anchor Cheddar Block Cheese
Mayonnaise
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix all-purpose flour, cornstarch, salt, egg, milk, and water until smooth. Add melted butter, mix well, and strain.
2. Heat a frying pan. Pour ¾ ladle of the skin batter while spreading evenly. Repeat until all of the batter is used.
3. Heat a little oil. Sauté diced onion until fragrant, then add butter and corned beef. Mix well.
4. Add sugar and chicken powder. Stir-fry until cooked. Set aside.
5. Grate cheese and cut boiled eggs into quarters. For the wet batter, mix flour, egg, and water until smooth.
6. Prepare the skin. Arrange the corned beef, boiled eggs, grated cheese, and mayonnaise. Fold and seal the ends of the skin with the wet batter mixture.
7. Dip the rissole into the wet batter mixture, then coat with white breadcrumbs.
8. Heat oil. Fry the rissoles over medium heat until golden brown. Drain.
9. Corned Beef Cheese Rissoles are ready to serve.

title: Resep NEGI SHIO BEEF Ala Jepang [Favorit Keluarga]
recipe_id:
Resep Negi Shio Beef (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan:
5 siung bawang putih
150 gr daun bawang

Bahan lainnya:
500 gr daging sapi iris
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm minyak wijen
1 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdt merica
3 sdm sake/mirin halal

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
minyak wijen
biji wijen putih

Cara membuat:
1. Cincang kasar daun bawang kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk. Tambahkan garam, kaldu jamur, sake, kecap asin, minyak wijen dan merica, aduk rata
2. Campurkan daun bawang ke dalam daging sapi, aduk rata. Diamkan minimal 30 menit
3. Iris bawang putih. Panaskan minyak, goreng di api kecil hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan daging dan masak di api besar hingga matang
5. Siapkan mangkuk, susun nasi, daging dan pelengkap lainnya
6. Negi shio beef siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Negi Shio Beef Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
5 clove garlic
150 g green onion

Other ingredients:
500 g sliced beef
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp pepper
3 tbsp halal sake/mirin

Add-ons:
Rice
Sesame oil
White sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Chop the green onions and transfer to a bowl. Add salt, mushroom bouillon, sake, soy sauce, sesame oil, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Mix the green onions with the beef. Let sit for at least 30 minutes.
3. Slice the garlic. Heat the oil. Fry on low heat until browned. Drain.
4. Heat a little oil. Add the beef and cook over high heat until done.
5. Prepare a bowl. Arrange the rice, beef, and other add-ons.
6. Negi Shio is ready to be served.

title: Krispi Gurih! Resep AYAM GORENG OAT Ala Singapura
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Goreng Oat (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
300 gr paha ayam filet
1 sdt perasan jeruk nipis
1 sdm putih telur
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1/8 sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdm saus tiram
3 sdm maizena

Bahan lainnya:
5 siung bawang putih
3 buah cabai merah keriting
2 buah cabai rawit merah
1 sdm minyak
1 sdm mentega tawar
2 tangkai daun kari
80 gr rolled oat (kasar)
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt gula pasir
1 sdm susu bubuk

Bahan pelapis:
80 gr rolled oat (halus)

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
telur mata sapi

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong ayam kemudian marinasi dengan perasan jeruk nipis, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, merica, putih telur, saus tiram dan maizena, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 5-10 menit
2. Masukkan rolled oat ke dalam food processor. Bagi menjadi 2 tekstur sedikit kasar dan halus
3. Balurkan ayam ke dalam oat halus kemudian goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
4. Cincang bawang putih, iris cabai merah keriting dan cabai rawit merah
5. Panaskan minyak dan mentega kemudian tumis bawang putih dan cabai hingga wangi
6. Masukkan daun kari dan oat, masak di api kecil hingga wangi kemudian masukkan ayam, garam, gula pasir, kaldu jamur dan susu bubuk, aduk rata
7. Ayam goreng oat siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Oat Fried Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinade:
300 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp lime juice
1 tbsp egg white
½ tsp chicken powder
1/8 tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
½ tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp cornstarch

Other ingredients:
5 clove garlic
3 pc red curly chili
2 pc red Thai chili
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp unsalted butter
2 sprig curry leaf
80 g rolled oats (coarse)
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp sugar
1 tbsp powdered milk

Coating:
80 g rolled oat (fine)

Add-ons:
Rice
Sunny side-up egg

Steps:
1. Cut the chicken into pieces, then marinate with lime juice, chicken powder, sugar, pepper, egg white, oyster sauce, and cornstarch. Mix well. Let sit for 5-10 minutes.
2. Add rolled oats into a food processor. Divide into two textures: slightly coarse and fine.
3. Coat the chicken in finely chopped oats, then fry until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Mince the garlic. Slice the red curly chili and red Thai chili.
5. Heat oil and butter, then sauté garlic and chili until fragrant.
6. Add curry leaves and oats. Cook on low heat until fragrant, then add chicken, salt, sugar, mushroom bouillon, and powdered milk. Stir well.
7. Oat Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Renyah, Kenyal, Anti Lepas! Resep TAHU ACI Khas Tegal
recipe_id:
Resep Tahu Aci (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih
2 siung bawang merah
2 sdt ketumbar
150 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
230 gr tapioka
2 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
30 gr kucai
60 gr tahu putih
½ sdm garam
½ sdm kaldu sapi bubuk
½ sdt penyedap
½ sdt merica
8 buah tahu putih

Bahan sambal kecap:
3 buah cabai rawit merah
1 siung bawang putih
1 sdm gula merah
3 sdm kecap manis
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt penyedap

Pelengkap:
cabai rawit hijau

Cara membuat:
1. Potong empat tahu membentuk segitiga
2. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, ketumbar dan air ke dalam blender, haluskan
3. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan tahu, tapioka dan terigu, hancurkan tahu sambil diaduk rata
4. Masukkan garam, penyedap, kaldu sapi bubuk, merica dan bumbu halus, aduk rata
5. Iris kucai lalu letakkan di samping adonan
6. Letakkan adonan di bagian tengah dan pinggiran tahu kemudian taburkan tepung tapioka
7. Goreng tahu di api sedang kecil hingga mengembang kemudian kecilkan api, masak hingga kecokelatan
8. Untuk sambal, di dalam ulekan campurkan cabai rawit merah, bawang putih, garam, penyedap dan gula merah, ulek hingga halus kemudian gabungkan ke dalam kecap manis, aduk rata
9. Tahu aci siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Starchy Tofu Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Spices:
5 clove garlic
2 pc shallot
2 tsp coriander
150 ml water

Other ingredients:
230 g tapioca starch
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
30 g chive
60 g white tofu
½ tbsp salt
½ tbsp beef powder
½ tsp MSG
½ tsp pepper
8 pc white tofu

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
3 pc red Thai chili
1 clove garlic
1 tbsp palm sugar
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp MSG

Condiment:
Green Thai chili

Steps:
1. Cut the tofu into four triangular pieces.
2. Blend garlic, shallot, coriander, and water until smooth.
3. In a bowl, mix tofu, tapioca starch, and flour. Mash the tofu while stirring until well combined.
4. Add salt, MSG, beef powder, pepper, and blended spices. Mix well.
5. Slice the chives and place them next to the dough.
6. Place the dough on the side and bottom of the tofu, then dust with tapioca.
7. Fry the tofu over medium-low heat until it expands, then reduce the heat and cook until golden brown.
8. For the sambal, in a stone bowl, mix red Thai chili, garlic, salt, MSG, and palm sugar. Mash until smooth, then combine with sweet soy sauce and mix well.
9. Starchy Tofu is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Cepat! Resep TELUR DADAR KRISPI / CRISPY OMELETTE
recipe_id:
Resep Cripsy Omelette (untuk 2-4 porsi)

Bahan adonan:
100 ml air 
2 sdm tepung beras
1 sdm tapioka
1 sdm minyak
¾ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt bubuk kunyit

Bahan isian:
2 butir telur
30 gr tauge
1 lembar kol
50 gr sosis
1 batang daun bawang ukuran kecil
½ sdt kecap asin
sejumput merica

Bahan saus:
1 siung bawang putih
1 sdm saus tomat
1 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm air matang
½ sdt gula pasir

Cara membuat :
1. Untuk saus, parut bawang putih lalu campurkan gula pasir, saus sambal, saus tomat dan air, aduk rata
2. Campurkan air, tepung beras, tepung tapioka, bubuk kunyit, kaldu ayam bubuk dan minyak, aduk rata
3. Panaskan wajan, tuang ½ adonan, ratakan dan masak di api sedang 
4. Iris kol, daun bawang dan sosis
5. Susun sosis dan telur, ratakan kemudian masukkan kol, daun bawang, tauge, kecap asin dan sedikit merica, tutup dan masak hingga matang
6. Crispy omelette siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Crispy Omelette Recipe (yield 2-4 servings)

Batter:
100 ml water
2 tbsp rice flour
1 tbsp tapioca flour
1 tbsp oil
¾ tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp turmeric powder

Filling:
2 pc egg
30 g bean sprouts
1 leaf cabbage
50 g sausage
1 stalk green onion, small
½ tsp soy sauce
A pinch of pepper

Sauce:
1 clove garlic
1 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp mineral water
½ tsp sugar

Steps:
1. For the sauce, grate the garlic then mix with sugar, chili sauce, ketchup, and water.
2. Mix water, rice flour, tapioca flour, turmeric powder, chicken powder, and oil.
3. Heat a pan. Pour in half the batter and spread it evenly. Cook over medium heat.
4. Slice the cabbage, green onions, and sausages.
5. Arrange the sausages and eggs on the crepe. Spread them evenly, then add cabbage, green onion, bean sprouts, soy sauce, and a bit of pepper. Cover and cook until done.
6. Crispy Omelette is ready to serve.

title: Tender, Sweet, and Savory! Palembang's Special Beef Malbi Recipe [Eid al-Adha Menu]
recipe_id:
Resep Daging Malbi (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
650 gr daging sapi sengkel
250 gr kelapa parut

Bahan bumbu halus:
12 siung bawang merah
7 siung bawang putih
3 cm jahe
1 sdt lada putih butir
½ sdt lada hitam butir
1 sdm ketumbar
½ butir pala
75 ml minyak
50 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
1 batang serai, geprek
5 butir cengkih
6 cm kayu manis
2 sdm gula batok
4-5 sdm kecap manis
1 liter air
1 sdt kaldu sapi bubuk
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt penyedap

Bahan sambal nanas:
150 gr nanas
2 siung bawang merah (opsional)
6 buah cabai merah keriting
15 buah cabai rawit hijau
½ sdt terasi, bakar
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt gula pasir

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat :
1. Potong-potong daging, sisihkan
2. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, jahe, lada hitam, lada putih, pala, ketumbar, minyak dan air ke dalam blender, haluskan
3. Tumis bumbu halus hingga mengeluarkan minyak lalu masukkan serai, kayu manis dan cengkih, tumis kembali hingga wangi
4. Masukkan air, daging, garam, kaldu sapi bubuk dan penyedap, masak di api sedang kecil hingga empuk
5. Sangrai kelapa parut hingga kecokelatan kemudian blender hingga halus
6. Masukkan gula merah, kecap manis dan kelapa gongseng ke dalam wajan, masak hingga meresap
7. Untuk sambal nanas, potong kotak kecil nanas dan iris bawang merah
8. Di dalam ulekan masukkan cabai merah keriting, cabai rawit hijau, terasi, garam dan gula pasir, ulek halus
9. Masukkan sebagian nanas, ulek kembali lalu masukkan sisa nanas dan bawang merah, aduk rata
10. Malbi daging sapi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Beef Malbi Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
650 g beef shank
250 g grated coconut

Spices:
12 pc shallot
7 clove garlic  
3 cm ginger 
1 tsp whole white pepper
½ tsp whole black pepper
1 tbsp coriander
½ pc nutmeg
75 ml oil
50 ml water

Other ingredients:
1 stalk lemongrass, pounded  
5 pc clove
6 cm cinnamon
2 tbsp palm sugar
4-5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 liter water
1 tsp beef powder
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp MSG

Pineapple Sambal ingredients:
150 g pineapple
2 pc shallot (optional)
6 pc curly red chili
15 pc green Thai chili
½ tsp shrimp paste, roasted
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar

Add-ons:
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the beef into pieces. Set aside.
2. Blend garlic, shallot, ginger, black pepper, white pepper, nutmeg, coriander, oil, and water in a blender until smooth.
3. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant, then add lemongrass, cinnamon, and cloves. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add water, beef, salt, beef powder, and MSG. Cook over low heat until tender.
5. Toast the grated coconut until golden brown, then blend until smooth.
6. Add palm sugar, sweet soy sauce, and toasted coconut to the pan. Cook until reduced.
7. For the Pineapple Sambal, dice the pineapple and slice the shallot.
8. In a stone bowl, mash curly red chili, green Thai chili, roasted shrimp paste, salt, and sugar until smooth.
9. Add some pineapple, mash again, then add the remaining pineapple and shallots. Mix well.
10. Beef Malbi is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Nagih! Resep MISOA AYAM PEDAS [Cocok Untuk Keluarga]
recipe_id:
Resep Misoa Ayam Pedas (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
150 gr paha ayam giling
5 siung bawang putih
4 siung bawang merah
3 buah cabai rawit merah
1 batang daun bawang
3 lembar kol
2 sdm minyak

Bahan lainnya:
2 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm saus tiram
1 ½ sdt gochugaru / cabai bubuk
2 pcs misoa
600 ml air
½ sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Cara membuat :
1. Cincang bawang putih, iris bawang merah, iris kol, daun bawang dan cincang cabai rawit
2. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih di api sedang kecil hingga wangi dan kecokelatan, sisihkan sebagian bawang putih
3. Masukkan bawang merah dan cabai rawit merah, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan ayam, saus tiram, saus sambal, cabai bubuk dan kaldu ayam bubuk, tumis hingga matang
4. Masukkan kol dan daun bawang, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan air, masak hingga mendidih
5. Masukkan misoa, masak hingga matang kemudian tambahkan garam dan gula pasir, aduk rata
6. Misoa ayam pedas siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Chicken Misua Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g ground chicken thigh  
5 clove garlic  
4 pc shallot  
3 pc red Thai chili  
1 stalk green onion  
3 leaf cabbage  
2 tbsp oil  

Other ingredients:
2 tbsp chili sauce  
1 tbsp oyster sauce  
1.5 tsp gochugaru / chili powder  
2 pc misua  
600 ml water  
½ tsp sugar  
¼ tsp salt  
2 tsp chicken powder  

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic. slice the shallot, cabbage, and green onion. Chop the Thai chili.
2. Heat the oil. Sauté the garlic over medium-low heat until fragrant and browned. Set aside some of it.
3. Add shallot and Thai chili. Stir fry until fragrant, then add the chicken, oyster sauce, chili sauce, chili powder, and chicken powder. Stir fry until cooked.
4. Add the cabbage and green onions. Cook briefly, then add water. Bring to a boil.
5. Add misua. Cook until soft, then add salt and sugar. Stir well.
6. Spicy Chicken Misua is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Ala Abang-Abang! Resep NASI GORENG TEK-TEK
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Goreng Tek-Tek (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang merah
4 siung bawang putih
2 butir kemiri
2 sdt terasi bubuk
2 buah cabai merah
60 ml minyak
1 sdm air

Bahan lainnya:
300 gr nasi putih
1 ½ sdm bumbu halus
1 butir telur ayam
1 sdm minyak
45 gr ayam suwir
1-2 sdm kecap manis
½ sdm saus tiram
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica
2 buah bakso sapi
1 batang daun bawang
20 gr sawi hijau
20 gr kol

Pelengkap:
kerupuk
bawang merah goreng
timun
tomat merah

Cara membuat :
1. Blender semua bahan bumbu halus kemudian tumis hingga wangi dan matang, sisihkan
2. Iris bakso, sawi hijau, daun bawang dan kol
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan telur, aduk rata kemudian masukkan bumbu halus, bakso dan ayam suwir, tumis hingga wangi
4. Masukkan nasi, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, saus tiram dan kecap manis, aduk rata kemudian masukkan kol, daun bawang dan sawi hijau, masak sesaat
5. Nasi goreng tek-tek siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Nasi Goreng Tek-Tek Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Spices:
5 pc shallot  
4 clove garlic  
2 pc candlenut  
2 tsp shrimp paste powder  
2 pc red chili  
60 ml oil  
1 tbsp water  

Other ingredients:
300 g white rice  
1.5 tbsp spice mix  
1 pc egg  
1 tbsp oil  
45 g shredded chicken  
1-2 tbsp sweet soy sauce  
½ tbsp oyster sauce  
½ tsp salt  
½ tsp chicken powder  
¼ tsp pepper  
2 pc beef meatball  
1 stalk green onion  
20 g choy sum  
20 g cabbage  

Condiments:
Cracker  
Fried shallot  
Cucumber  
Red tomato  

Steps:
1. Blend all the spice ingredients, then sauté until fragrant and cooked. Set aside.
2. Slice the meatball, choy sum, green onion, and cabbage.
3. Heat a little oil. Add the egg and stir well, then add the spice mix, meatball, and shredded chicken. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the rice, salt, chicken powder, pepper, oyster sauce, and sweet soy sauce. Stir well, then add the cabbage, green onion, and choy sum. Cook briefly.
5. Nasi Goreng Tek-Tek is ready to serve.

title: Gak Bau Gak Alot! Resep SAMBAL PARU
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Paru (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
400 gr paru sapi
1 sdm garam
4 sdm tapioka

Bahan bumbu halus:
10 siung bawang merah
7 siung bawang putih
200 gr cabai merah dan cabai merah keriting
6 buah cabai rawit merah

Bahan lainnya:
100 ml minyak
6 buah cabai rawit merah
1 batang serai
5 lembar daun jeruk
3 cm lengkuas
1 sdt asam jawa
2 sdm gula merah
300 ml air
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu jamur / kaldu sapi bubuk
½ sdt penyedap

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat :
1. Potong kotak paru lalu cuci hingga bersih
2. Marinasi paru dengan garam dan tapioka, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 30 menit kemudian bilas hingga bersih. Rebus paru selama 30-35 menit, tiriskan
3. Masukkan cabai merah, cabai merah keriting, cabai rawit merah, bawang putih dan bawang merah ke dalam food processor, haluskan hingga sedikit kasar
4. Geprek serai dan lengkuas. Panaskan minyak, masukkan paru, lengkuas, serai dan daun jeruk masak hingga kecokelatan
5. Masukkan bumbu halus, masak hingga wangi kemudian masukkan air, garam, gula pasir, kaldu jamur, penyedap, asam jawa dan cabai rawit utuh. Masak hingga meresap
6. Sambal paru siap disajikan

title: Gurih Menghangatkan! Resep BAYAM 2 TELUR Ala Resto
recipe_id:
Resep Bayam Dua Telur (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan:
200 gr bayam hijau
5 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
1 butir telur
1 butir telur asin matang
1 sdm saus tiram
500 ml air
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt maizena
1/8 sdt merica
2 sdt gula pasir

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Cincang bawang putih, potong kotak kecil bawang bombai, telur asin dan kocok lepas telur
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan bawang putih dan bawang bombai, tumis hingga wangi 
3. Masukkan air dan bayam, masak selama 3 menit 
4. Masukkan telur asin, kaldu ayam bubuk, saus tiram, gula pasir dan merica, masak hingga mendidih
5. Masukkan telur, aduk secara perlahan dan masukkan larutan maizena, masak sesaat
6. Bayam dua telur siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Two-Egg Spinach Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g spinach
5 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 pc egg
1 pc cooked salted egg
1 tbsp oyster sauce
500 ml water
2 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp cornstarch
1/8 tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. Chop the garlic and dice the onion. Slice the salted egg into small cubes and lightly beat the egg.
2. Heat a little oil. Add garlic and onion and sauté until fragrant.
3. Add water and spinach. Cook for 3 minutes.
4. Add salted egg, chicken powder, oyster sauce, sugar, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Add the chicken egg. Stir gently, then add cornstarch slurry and cook briefly.
6. Two-Egg Spinach is ready to be served.

title: 7 Menit! Resep MIE SIRAM AYAM Ala Resto
recipe_id:
Resep Mi Siram Ayam (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan tumisan:
5 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdt minyak wijen
1 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm maizena
400 ml air
1 butir telur (opsional)
2 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan marinasi ayam:
150 gr paha ayam filet
1 sdt maizena
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan isian:
30 gr hati ayam rebus
3 buah bakso sapi

Bahan lainnya:
1 batang daun bawang
½ buah bawang bombai
sawi hijau
1 sdt minyak wijen
2-3 porsi mi kering

Pelengkap:
cabai rawit iris + kecap asin

Cara membuat:
1. Rebus mi hingga matang, tiriskan lalu tambahkan sedikit minyak, aduk rata
2. Cincang kasar bawang putih, bawang merah, iris bawang bombai, daun bawang dan sawi
3. Potong-potong ayam filet lalu marinasi dengan garam, gula pasir, merica dan maizena, aduk rata
4. Iris baso sapi dan hati ayam
5. Tumis bawang merah, bawang putih hingga wangi kemudian masukkan ayam, tumis hingga matang
6. Masukkan hati ayam, bakso, bawang bombai dan daun bawang, masak sesaat hingga wangi
7. Masukkan air, saus tiram, kecap asin, gula pasir dan kaldu ayam bubuk. Larutkan maizena dengan air lalu masukkan ke dalam tumisan
8. Masukkan sawi hijau, aduk rata kemudian masukkan telur kocok secara perlahan, aduk sesaat
9. Tambahkan minyak wijen, aduk rata
10. Siapkan wajan, masukkan mi dan sedikit minyak wijen, masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan
11. Mi siram ayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Saucy Chicken Noodles Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Sauce ingredients:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp cornstarch
400 ml water
1 pc egg (optional)
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder

Marinade ingredients:
150 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tsp cornstarch
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Toppings:
30 g boiled chicken liver
3 pc beef meatballs

Other ingredients:
1 pc green onion
½ pc onion
Choy sum
1 tsp sesame oil
2-3 portion dried noodles

Condiment:
Sliced Thai chili + soy sauce

Steps:
1. Boil the noodles until cooked. Drain, then add a little oil and mix well.
2. Roughly chop the garlic and shallot. Slice the onion, green onions, and choy sum.
3. Slice the chicken fillet, then marinate with salt, sugar, pepper, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Slice the beef meatballs and chicken liver.
5. Stir-fry the shallot and garlic until fragrant. Add chicken and stir-fry until cooked.
6. Add chicken liver, meatballs, onion, and green onions. Cook briefly until fragrant.
7. Add water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and chicken powder. Dissolve cornstarch with water, then add to the stir-fry.
8. Add choy sum. Stir, then slowly add beaten egg and stir briefly.
9. Add sesame oil, mix well.
10. Prepare a pan. Add the noodles and a little sesame oil. Cook until lightly browned.
11. Saucy Chicken Noodles are ready to serve.

title: Satu Bumbu Untuk Berbagai Masakan! Resep NASI GORENG SOLARIA
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Goreng Solaria (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
75 gr bawang putih
60 gr bawang merah
7 pcs udang kupas
3 batang daun bawang (bagian putih)

Bahan lainnya:
4 sdm saus tiram
3 sdm kecap ikan
2 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm minyak wijen
1 sdm margarin
¾ sdt merica
100 ml minyak

Bahan nasi goreng:
400 gr nasi putih
2 butir telur
4 buah cabai rawit merah
1 buah cabai merah
2 buah baso ikan
2 batang daun bawang  (bagian hijau)
50 gr ayam paha filet (marinasi dengan 1/8 sdt garam + 1/8 sdt merica + ½ sdt maizena)
2 sdm minyak
2-3 sdm bumbu halus
½ sdt gula pasir
½ sdt penyedap
1 sdm kecap manis

Pelengkap:
acar timun

Cara membuat:
1. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, daun bawang bagian putih dan udang ke dalam blender, haluskan hingga halus
2. Panaskan minyak, masukkan bumbu halus, aduk rata kemudian masukkan merica, tumis di api sedang kecil hingga wangi
3. Masukkan saus tiram, kecap ikan, kecap asin dan minyak wijen, tumis sesaat lalu masukkan margarin, aduk rata
4. Masukkan bumbu ke dalam toples anti panas atau wadah lain yang tertutup
5. Iris cabai merah, cabai rawit, sisa daun bawang, baso ikan dan ayam filet
6. Marinasi ayam dengan garam, merica dan tepung maizena, aduk rata
7. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan telur, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan ayam dan baso ikan, tumis hingga matang
8. Masukkkan nasi, cabai merah, daun bawang, bumbu dasar, gula pasir, penyedap dan kecap manis, masak sesaat
9. Nasi goreng siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Solaria Fried Rice Recipe (yied 2 servings)

Spices:
75 g garlic
60 g shallot
7 pc peeled shrimp
3 pc green onion (white part)

Other ingredients:
4 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp fish sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 tbsp margarine
¾ tsp pepper
100 ml oil

Fried Rice ingredients:
400 g white rice
2 pc egg
4 pc red Thai chili
1 pc red chili
2 pc fish ball
2 pc green onion (green part)
50 g chicken thigh fillet (marinated with 1/8 tsp salt + 1/8 tsp pepper + ½ tsp cornstarch)
2 tbsp oil
2-3 tbsp spice mix
½ tsp sugar
½ tsp MSG
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce

Add-ons:
Pickled cucumber

Steps:
1. Add garlic, shallots, white part of green onion, and shrimp in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil. Add the spice paste. Stir, then add pepper. Sauté on medium-low heat until fragrant.
3. Add oyster sauce, fish sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Sauté briefly, then add margarine. Mix well.
4. Put the spice mix in a heatproof jar or other sealed container.
5. Slice the red chili, Thai chili, remaining green onion, fish balls, and chicken.
6. Marinate the chicken with salt, pepper, and cornstarch. Mix well.
7. Heat a little oil. Add eggs and sauté briefly, then add chicken and fish balls. Sauté until cooked.
8. Add rice, red chili, green onion, spice mix, sugar, MSG, and sweet soy sauce. Cook briefly.
9. Fried Rice is ready to serve.

title: Di Balik Cerita Ibu, Healthy Go x Devina Hermawan
Resep TAHU OSENG SAUS PADANG: Kenyal, Pedas & Gurih!
recipe_id:
Resep Tahu Saus Padang (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan:
300 gr tahu putih sutra

Bahan bumbu halus:
3 siung bawang putih
3 siung bawang merah
2 buah cabai merah rebus
2 sdm minyak

Bahan lainnya:
½ buah bawang bombai
3 lembar daun jeruk
4 buah cabai rawit merah
1 batang daun bawang
1 buah cabai merah

Bahan saus:
1 sdm saus tiram
½ sdm saus tomat
1 sdm saus sambal
½ sdm kecap ikan / kecap asin
2 sdt kecap manis
1 sdm margarin
½ sdt gula pasir
250 ml air

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong tipis tahu membentuk segitiga kemudian goreng hingga kering dan kecokelatan, tiriskan 
2. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai merah dan sedikit minyak ke dalam blender, haluskan 
3. Iris bawang bombai, daun bawang, cabai rawit merah dan cabai merah
4. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak kemudian masukkan bawang bombai, daun bawang bagian putih, cabai rawit dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi 
5. Masukkan air, saus tiram, kecap ikan, kecap manis, saus sambal, saus tomat dan margarin, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan gula pasir, tahu, cabai merah dan daun bawang, masak hingga meresap
6. Tahu saus padang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Tofu in Padang Sauce Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g white silk tofu

Spices:
3 clove garlic
3 pc shallot
2 pc red chili, boiled
2 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
½ pc onion
3 pc lime leaf
4 pc red Thai chili
1 pc green onion
1 pc red chili

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp chili sauce
½ tbsp fish sauce / soy sauce
2 tsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp margarine
½ tsp sugar
250 ml water

Add-ons:
Rice

Steps:
1. Thinly slice tofu into triangles, then fry until crispy and golden brown. Set aside.
2. Blend garlic, shallots, and red chili with a little oil until smooth.
3. Slice the onion, green onions, red Thai chili, and red chili.
4. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant and oily. Add onion, white part of green onions, Thai chili, and lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add water, oyster sauce, fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, chili sauce, ketchup, and margarine. Cook briefly, then add sugar, tofu, red chili, and green onions. Cook until absorbed.
6. Tofu in Padang Sauce is ready to serve.

title: Istimewa! Sup Matahari Khas Solo Favorit Anak & Keluarga
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Matahari (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan kulit:
2 butir telur
5 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
50 ml air
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan adonan ayam:
250 gr ayam giling
1 butir putih telur
1 siung bawang putih
½ sdm saus tiram
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt garam
2 sdt gula pasir
1 sdm maizena
2 sdm air

Bahan kuah:
4 siung bawang putih
4 siung bawang merah
1 batang daun bawang
1 batang seledri
½ butir pala
2 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica
1,5 liter air

Pelengkap:
1 buah sosis
100 gr sohun matang
60 gr jamur kuping
60 gr wortel
1 batang daun bawang
bawang merah goreng

Cara membuat:
1. Siapkan mangkuk, masukkan telur, tepung terigu dan kaldu ayam bubuk, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan air, aduk rata
2. Panaskan wajan dan sedikit minyak, tuang adonan sebanyak ¾ centong sayur, masak beberapa saat, sisihkan dan ulangi hingga adonan habis
3. Geprek bawang putih dan bawang merah kemudian tumis hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan
4. Tambahkan air, pala, daun bawang, seledri, kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, gula pasir dan merica, masak hingga mendidih lalu sisihkan seledri, daun bawang dan yang lainnya
5. Potong sosis dan belah, parut kasar wortel, iris jamur kuping, daun bawang dan gunting-gunting sohun
6. Siapkan mangkuk, masukkan ayam giling, bawang putih yang diparut, garam, gula pasir, merica, saus tiram, putih telur, maizena dan air, aduk rata
7. Masukkan sebagian jamur, sohun, wortel dan sisa sosis, aduk rata
8. Siapkan kulit, susun sosis, jamur, wortel, daun bawang, sohun dan letakkan adonan ayam pada bagian atas, lipat membentuk bulat
9. Kukus selama 10-15 menit, dinginkan 5-10 menit sebelum dibelah
10. Sup matahari siap disajikan

title: Tanpa Oven! Resep CHOCOLATE GRANOLA OAT
recipe_id:
Resep Chocolate Granola Oat (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
200 gr rolled oat
50 gr almond slice
50 gr kacang mede
50 gr mixed seeds
100 gr gula palem
80 gr mentega tawar, lelehkan
30 gr bubuk cokelat
3 sdm susu bubuk
½ sdt garam
1 sdt perisa vanila

Cara membuat:
1. Cincang kacang mede kemudian di dalam wajan masukkan rolled oat, kacang mede, almond dan mixed seeds, sangrai hingga sedikit kecokelatan, sisihkan 
2. Di dalam wajan, masukkan gula palem, masak sesaat kemudian masukkan mentega cair, masak hingga gula benar-benar meleleh
3. Masukkan granola yang sudah di sangrai, aduk rata
4. Masukkan garam, perisa vanila, cokelat bubuk dan susu bubuk, masak di api kecil selama 2-3 menit
5. Chocolate granola oat siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chocolate Granola Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g rolled oat
50 g sliced almond
50 g cashew
50 g mixed seeds
100 g palm sugar
80 g unsalted butter, melted
30 g cocoa powder
3 tbsp milk powder
½ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract

Steps:
1. Chop the cashew. In a pan, add rolled oats, cashew, almonds, and mixed seeds. Toast until lightly browned and set aside.
2. Into the pan, add palm sugar. Cook briefly, then add melted butter. Cook until the sugar is fully melted.
3. Add the toasted granola and mix well.
4. Add salt, vanilla extract, cocoa powder, and milk powder. Cook on low heat for 2-3 minutes.
5. Chocolate Granola is ready to serve.

title: Komplit Khas Siantar! Resep MIE KERITING HALAL Pakai Ayam
recipe_id:
Resep Mi Keriting Siantar Halal (untuk 6-8 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam kecap:
250 gr dada ayam filet
250 gr paha ayam filet
2 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm kaldu jamur
¼ sdt merica 

Bahan minyak ayam:
250 gr kulit ayam
100 ml air
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica 
50 ml minyak

Bahan bumbu halus:
7 siung bawang merah
10 siung bawang putih
2 cm jahe
50 ml air

Lainnya:
1 liter air
3 sdm kecap manis
3 sdm saus tiram
½ sdt bubuk ngohiong
1 sdm gula pasir
8 butir telur rebus

Bahan ayam charsiu:
350 gr paha ayam filet
65 gr saus charsiu (Chinese Barbeque Sauce)
3 tetes pewarna merah (opsional)

Bahan acar cabai:
23 buah cabai rawit hijau
6 buah cabai merah keriting
1 sdm cuka meja
3 sdm gula pasir
½ sdt garam
150 ml air

Pelengkap:
taoge, rebus sesaat
bawang goreng
daun bawang cung, iris
mi keriting

Cara membuat:
1. Marinasi paha ayam filet dengan saus charsiu dan pewarna merah, aduk rata. Diamkan 2 jam di suhu ruang atau semalaman di dalam kulkas 
2. Iris cabai merah keriting dan cabai rawit hijau, sisihkan ke dalam mangkuk 
3. Di dalam wajan masukkan air, cuka meja, gula pasir dan garam, masak hingga mendidih kemudian tuang ke dalam cabai yang sudah dipotong, aduk rata
4. Potong kotak kecil ayam kemudian marinasi dengan kecap asin, kaldu jamur dan merica, aduk rata dan diamkan beberapa saat
5. Iris bawang putih dan bawang merah kemudian masukkan ke dalam blender beserta jahe dan air, blender hingga halus
6. Di dalam wajan masukkan kulit ayam, air, garam dan merica, masak hingga menyusut lalu tambahkan minyak dan gunting-gunting kulit ayam, masak di api sedang kecil hingga kering, tiriskan
7. Masukkan bumbu halus ke dalam wajan, tumis hingga wangi lalu masukkan ayam, tumis sesaat
8. Masukkan air, kecap manis, saus tiram dan bubuk ngohiong, aduk rata kemudian masukkan telur rebus, masak selama 15 menit 
9. Masukkan gula pasir, masak sesaat dan sisihkan ke dalam mangkuk
10. Susun ayam charisu ke dalam air fryer. Panggang di suhu 170 derajat celcius selama 10-12 menit. Jika belum terlalu matang panggang kembali di suhu 180 derajat celcius selama 5 menit
11. Rebus mi keriting selama 2-3 menit dan rebus taoge beberapa saat, tiriskan
12. Mi keriting siantar halal siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Spicy Mushroom Stir-Fry with Lemon Basil Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g oyster mushroom
1 tsp salt

Other ingredients:
½ tsp mushroom bouillon
1 tsp coriander powder
½ tsp turmeric powder
3 tbsp all-purpose flour

Spices:
5 pc shallot
3 clove garlic
3 pc red chili, boiled
1 tbsp water
2 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
1 pc green onion
3 pc lime leaf
5 pc red Thai chili
12 g lemon basil
75 ml water
½ tsp chicken bouillon
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Add-on:
Rice

Steps:
1. Shred the mushrooms, then season with salt. Mix well. Leave it for a few moments, then squeeze.
2. Transfer to a bowl, then add mushroom bouillon, turmeric powder, coriander powder, and flour. Mix well.
3. Heat the oil, then fry the mushrooms until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Blend the garlic, shallots, red chili, oil, and water in a blender until smooth.
5. Slice red Thai chili and green onions.
6. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant and oily, then add the lime leaves and red Thai chili. Stir-fry until fragrant.
7. Add water, chicken bouillon, sugar, and pepper. Stir well.
8. Add the green onions and mushrooms. Stir fry for a moment, then add lemon basil. Stir well.
9. Spicy Mushroom Stir-Fry with Lemon Basil is ready to serve.

title: Sehat Praktis! Resep TUMIS BUNCIS BAWANG PUTIH
recipe_id:
Resep Tumis Buncis Bawang Putih (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan:
350 gr baby buncis
12 siung bawang putih

Bahan saus:
2 sdt saus tiram

80 ml air
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt penyedap
½ sdm gula pasir
1 sdm arak masak
¼ sdt garam
1/8 sdt merica

Cara membuat:
1. Panaskan minyak, goreng buncis selama 1-2 menit, tiriskan dan rendam dengan air dingin
2. Campurkan air, kaldu ayam bubuk, saus tiram, gula pasir, penyedap dan maizena, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan garam dan merica, aduk rata
3. Masukkan bawang putih ke dalam food processor, haluskan
4. Panaskan minyak goreng sebagian bawang putih di api sedang kecil hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
5. Tumis sisa bawang putih hingga wangi kemudian masukkan arak masak, aduk rata
6. Masukkan campuran saus, masak sesaat hingga mengental kemudian masukkan buncis, masak sesaat
7. Pindahkan ke dalam piring saji kemudian taburkan bawang putih goreng
8. Buncis bawang putih siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Garlic Green Beans Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g baby green bean
12 clove garlic

Sauce ingredients:
2 tsp oyster sauce
2 tsp cornstarch
80 ml water
½ tsp chicken bouillon
¼ tsp MSG
½ tbsp sugar
1 tbsp cooking wine
¼ tsp salt
1/8 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Heat oil. Fry the green beans for 1-2 minutes. Drain and soak in cold water.
2. Mix water, chicken bouillon, oyster sauce, sugar, MSG, and cornstarch. Mix well then add salt and pepper. Stir.
3. Chop the garlic using a food processor.
4. Heat oil. Fry some of the garlic over medium low heat until yellowed. Strain.
5. Sauté the remaining garlic until fragrant. Add cooking wine, stir.
6. Add the sauce mixture. Cook for a moment until thickened, then add the green beans. Cook for a moment.
7. Transfer to a serving plate, then sprinkle with fried garlic.
8. Garlic Green Beans are ready to serve.

title: Favorit Anak! Resep KERIPIK DAGING: Gurih, Sehat, Renyah & Tahan Lama
recipe_id:
Resep Keripik Daging (untuk 6 porsi)

tepung sagu

1. Iris lengkuas lalu di dalam blender masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, lengkuas, ketumbar, garam, gula palem, kaldu jamur, baking powder dan kecap inggris, blender hingga halus
2. Susun daging di dalam tray dalam keadaan beku kemudian tuang bumbu halus, ratakan. Diamkan di dalam kulkas semalaman atau di suhu ruang selama 2 jam
3. Balurkan ke dalam tepung sagu kemudian sisihkan ke dalam saringan
4. Goreng di api sedang hingga setengah kering kemudian kecilkan api, masak hingga kering kecokelatan dan tiriskan

recipe_en:
Beef Chips Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
15 g galangal
23 g garlic
25 g shallot
6 g coriander
2 pc egg

Other ingredients:
375 g sliced beef
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1½ tbsp palm sugar
4 g baking powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
1/8 tsp pepper

Coating:
Sago flour

Steps:
1. Slice the galangal. Into a blender, add the garlic, shallots, galangal, coriander, salt, palm sugar, mushroom bouillon, baking powder, and Worcestershire sauce. Blend until smooth.
2. Arrange the frozen meat on a tray, then pour in the marinade. Spread evenly. Leave in the refrigerator overnight or at room temperature for 2 hours.
3. Coat the slices in sago flour, then set them aside on a rack.
4. Fry over medium heat until half crisp, then reduce the heat to low and cook until golden brown. Remove and drain.
5. Beef Chips are ready to serve.

timun

1. Didihkan air, rebus cabai hijau, cabai keriting hijau dan cabai rawit dengan baking soda dan garam selama 5 menit. Masukkan bawang merah dan bawang putih pada 2 menit terakhir
2. Ulek cabai dengan ulekan hingga sedikit kasar kemudian iris tomat hijau
3. Panaskan minyak, masukkan daun jeruk dan tomat, masak sesaat

recipe_en:
Green Chili Sambal Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
65 g curly green chili
95 g large green chili
20 g green Thai chili
1 L water
1 tsp baking soda
1 tsp salt
10 pc shallot
7 clove garlic
150 ml oil

Other ingredients:
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tbsp sugar
1-2 pc green tomato
5 pc lime leaf

Add-ons:
Rice
Cucumber
Omelette

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil, then simmer large green chili, curly green chili, and green Thai chili with baking soda and salt for 5 minutes. Add shallots and garlic in the last 2 minutes.
2. Mash the chili until slightly coarse, then slice the green tomatoes.
3. Heat oil, add lime leaves and tomatoes. Cook briefly.
4. Add mashed green chili, salt, mushroom bouillon, and sugar. Cook briefly.
5. Green Chili Sambal is ready to serve.

title: Bikin Nagih! Resep TUMIS ATI AMPELA CABE IJO

2. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, cabai rawit hijau, kunyit, kencur dan minyak ke dalam blender, haluskan 
3. Iris bawang merah dan geprek lengkuas
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang merah, lengkuas, daun salam dan daun jeruk hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bumbu halus, tumis hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak
5. Potong-potong ati ampela lalu masukkan ke dalam tumisan, masak sesaat

recipe_en:
Liver & Gizzard with Green Chili Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g chicken liver and gizzard
2 pc bay leaf
40 g ginger, sliced and pounded
1 tbsp salt
1½ liter water

Spices:
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut, toasted
20 pc green Thai chili
4 cm turmeric
5 cm aromatic ginger
60 ml oil

Other ingredients:
8 pc green chili, sliced large
10 pc red Thai chili, sliced
6 pc shallot, sliced
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 pc bay leaf
4 cm galangal
20 g palm sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
250 ml water
1 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom bouillon

Add-ons:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Add chicken liver and gizzard, ginger, bay leaves, and salt. Boil for 15 minutes, then drain.
2. Add garlic, shallots, candlenuts, green Thai chili, turmeric, aromatic ginger, and oil into a blender. Blend until smooth.
3. Slice the shallots and pound the galangal.
4. Heat a little oil. Sauté the shallots, galangal, bay leaves, and kaffir lime leaves until fragrant, then add the blended spices. Sauté until fragrant and oily.
5. Cut chicken liver and gizzard into pieces, then add to the pan. Cook briefly.
6. Add green chili, salt, mushroom bouillon, palm sugar, pepper, sweet soy sauce, and water. Cook until reduced.
7. Add red Thai chili. Stir-fry briefly.
8. Liver & Gizzard with Green Chili is ready to be served.

title: 100% Renyah Tahan Lama! Resep BISTIK JADOEL SAUS MENTEGA

Resep Bistik Jadoel (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:

½ sdm kecap asin
1 sdm putih telur

Bahan saus:
5 siung bawang putih, geprek
1 buah bawang bombai, iris besar
2 sdm margarin
½ sdm kecap asin
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm kecap inggris
1 sdm saus tomat
3 sdm kecap manis
1/8 sdt merica
½ sdm gula pasir
2 lembar bay leaf
200 ml air

Bahan pelapis:
telur
tapioka

Bahan keripik kentang:
3 buah kentang
2 sdm cuka beras
2 liter air
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdt gula halus

Pelengkap:
wortel, rebus
buncis, rebus
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Potong tipis daging kemudian marinasi dengan garam, kaldu bubuk, gula pasir, merica, kecap asin, putih telur, air dan tepung tapioka, aduk rata kemudian masukkan baking powder, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 15 menit 
2. Iris tipis kentang kemudian cuci dan rendam dengan air dan cuka, aduk rata kemudian tiriskan
3. Panaskan minyak, goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan kemudian tambahkan garam, kaldu jamur dan gula halus, aduk rata 
4. Panaskan wajan, masukkan margarin, bawang putih, bawang bombai dan bay leaf, tumis hingga wangi 
5. Masukkan kecap inggris, kecap asin, saus tiram, kecap manis, saus tomat dan air, masak hingga mendidih
6. Tambahkan gula pasir dan merica, aduk rata kemudian masukkan larutan maizena, masak sesaat hingga mengental
7. Masukkan telur ke dalam daging kemudian balurkan ke dalam tapioka, aduk rata
8. Panaskan minyak, goreng di api besar hingga setengah matang, tiriskan kemudian goreng kembali hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan 
9. Bistik jadoel siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Old-Fashioned Beef Steak Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g beef fillet
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken bouillon
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp egg white
2 tbsp water
2 tbsp tapioca flour
¾ tsp baking powder

Sauce ingredients:
5 clove garlic, pounded
1 pc onion, sliced
2 tbsp margarine
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp ketchup
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1/8 tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
2 pc bay leaf
200 ml water

Coating ingredients:
Egg
Tapioca flour

Potato Chips ingredients:
3 pc potato
2 tbsp rice vinegar
2 liter water
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom bouillon
½ tsp powdered sugar

Add-ons:
Carrots, boiled
Green beans, boiled
Steamed rice

Steps:
1. Slice the beef thinly, then marinate with salt, chicken bouillon, sugar, pepper, soy sauce, egg white, water, and tapioca flour. Mix well and add baking powder, stir until combined. Let it sit for 15 minutes.
2. Thinly slice the potatoes, then wash and soak in water and rice vinegar. Mix well and drain.
3. Heat oil. Fry the potatoes until golden brown. Drain, then sprinkle with salt, mushroom bouillon, and powdered sugar. Mix well.
4. Heat the pan. Add margarine, garlic, onion, and bay leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, ketchup, and water. Bring to a boil.
6. Add sugar and pepper. Mix well, then add the cornstarch slurry. Cook briefly until thickened.
7. Dip the beef in egg, then coat with tapioca flour evenly.
8. Heat oil. Fry the beef over high heat until half-cooked. Drain, then fry again until golden brown. Drain.
9. Old-Fashioned Beef Steak is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Praktis! Resep SEMUR PEDAS & OSENG KENTANG TANPA KECAP [Menu Lebaran]

title: Takjil Lembut Seger! Resep Es Teler Cake Dessert Box [Ide Jualan]
recipe_id:
Resep Es Teler Cake Dessert Box (untuk 4 box)

Bahan chiffon cake:
6 butir kuning telur
65 ml minyak
100 ml jus pandan
30 ml santan Kara
½ sdt garam
130 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
6 gr baking powder
½ sdt perisa pandan
6 butir putih telur
100 gr gula pasir
½ sdt cream of tartar / 1 sdt perasan lemon

Bahan santan cream:
300 ml whipping cream
100 ml santan Kara
50 gr kental manis
¼ sdt garam

Bahan avocado cream:
350 gr alpukat
60 gr kental manis

Pelengkap:
nangka, potong kotak kecil
kelapa muda, potong memanjang

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan kuning telur, jus pandan, minyak, santan, garam, tepung terigu dan baking powder sambil disaring, aduk dengan ballon whisk 
2. Masukkan perisa pandan, aduk rata 
3. Di dalam mangkuk lain masukkan putih telur, gula pasir dan cream of tartar, kocok dengan mixer hingga membentuk paruh burung
4. Masukkan adonan putih telur ke dalam adonan kuning telur secara bertahap, aduk perlahan
5. Tuang ke dalam loyang yang sudah di alasi baking paper. Ketuk-ketuk loyang dan panggang di suhu 150 derajat selama 30 menit 
6. Masukkan alpukat dan kental manis ke dalam blender, haluskan hingga menyatu dan masukkan ke dalam plastik segitiga
7. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan whipping cream, santan dan garam, kocok hingga set lalu masukkan kental manis, kocok sesaat hingga menyatu
8. Masukkan santan cream ke dalam plastik segitiga dan simpan di dalam kulkas 
9. Potong cake sesuai ukuran dessert box yang akan digunakan
10. Susun chiffon cake, santan cream, nangka, kelapa muda, santan cream, avocado cream, chiffon cake, santan cream, avocado cream, santan cream, nangka dan kelapa muda. Simpan di dalam kulkas sebelum disajikan 
11. Es teler dessert box siap disajikan
