recipe_en:
Es Teler Cake Dessert Box Recipe (yield 4 boxes)

Chiffon Cake ingredients:
6 pc egg yolk
65 ml oil
100 ml pandan juice
30 ml Kara coconut milk
½ tsp salt
130 g cake flour
6 g baking powder
½ tsp pandan paste
6 pc egg white
100 g sugar
½ tsp cream of tartar / 1 tsp lemon juice

Coconut Cream ingredients:
300 ml whipping cream
100 ml Kara coconut milk
50 g condensed milk
¼ tsp salt

Avocado Cream ingredients:
350 g avocado
60 g condensed milk

Toppings:
Jackfruit, diced
Coconut, sliced lengthwise

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix egg yolks, pandan juice, oil, coconut milk, and salt. Sift in flour and baking powder. Stir with a balloon whisk.
2. Add pandan paste, mix well.
3. In another bowl, combine egg whites, sugar, and cream of tartar. Beat with a mixer until the birdbeak stage.
4. Gradually fold the egg white mixture into the egg yolk mixture. Mix gently.
5. Pour into a baking pan lined with baking paper. Tap the pan and bake at 150°C for 30 minutes.
6. Blend avocado and condensed milk until smooth, then transfer to a piping bag.
7. In a bowl, mix whipping cream, coconut milk, and salt. Mix until it sets, then add condensed milk. Mix briefly until combined.
8. Transfer the Coconut Cream to a piping bag and refrigerate.
9. Cut the cake into pieces according to the size of the dessert box to be used.
10. Layer the Chiffon Cake, Coconut Cream, jackfruit, coconut, Coconut Cream, Avocado Cream, Chiffon Cake, Coconut Cream, Avocado Cream, Coconut Cream, jackfruit, and coconut. Chill in the refrigerator before serving.
11. Es Teler Cake Dessert Box is ready to be served.

title: 100% Sukses Lembut! Resep MARMER CAKE [Cocok Untuk Pemula]
recipe_id:
Resep Marmer Cake (untuk 16 porsi)

Bahan adonan butter:
100 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter (suhu ruang)
100 gr Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
100 gr gula halus

Bahan adonan telur:
6 butir kuning telur
2 butir telur
45 gr minyak
165 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
15 gr susu bubuk
4 gr baking powder
½ sdt SP, opsional
½ sdt garam
130 gr gula pasir
2 sdt perisa vanila

Bahan campuran cokelat:
15 gr cokelat bubuk
15 gr pasta cokelat
40 gr air hangat

Topping:
50 gr Anchor Keju Blok Cheddar, opsional

Cara membuat:
1. Campurkan cokelat bubuk dengan air hangat dan pasta cokelat, aduk rata
2. Potong kotak kecil keju
3. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan unsalted butter, tinned butter dan gula halus, kocok hingga pucat dan mengembang
4. Di dalam mangkuk lain, campurkan kuning telur, telur utuh, minyak, perisa vanila, gula pasir, garam, tepung, susu bubuk, baking powder sambil di saring dan SP, kocok hingga mengembang dan gula larut
5. Masukkan adonan mentega sedikit demi sedikit sambil diaduk lalu sisihkan 1/5 bagian adonan dan campurkan dengan cokelat, aduk rata
6. Masukkan sebagian adonan putih ke dalam loyang yang sudah di oles mentega dan tepung
7. Masukkan adonan cokelat dan sedikit sisa adonan putih, aduk memutar dengan garpu
8. Masukkan keju, aduk perlahan. Panggang dengan suhu 175 derajat celcius selama 50-60 menit
9. Keluarkan dari panggangan, dinginkan dan lepaskan dari loyang 
10. Marmer cake siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Marble Cake Recipe (yield 16 servings)

Ingredients A:
100 g Anchor Unsalted Butter (room temperature)
100 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
100 g icing sugar

Ingredients B:
6 pc egg yolk
2 pc whole egg
45 g oil
165 g cake flour
15 g powdered milk
4 g baking powder
½ tsp SP (emulsifier)
½ tsp salt
130 g sugar
2 tsp vanilla extract

Ingredients C (for chocolate batter):
15 g cocoa powder
15 g chocolate paste
40 g warm water

Topping:
50 g Anchor Cheddar Cheese

Steps:
1. Mix cocoa powder with warm water and chocolate paste. Stir until smooth.
2. Cut the cheddar cheese into small cubes.
3. In a bowl, combine unsalted butter, tinned butter, and icing sugar. Whip until pale and fluffy.
4. In another bowl, mix egg yolks, whole eggs, oil, vanilla extract, SP, sugar, and salt. Sift in flour, powdered milk, and baking powder. Mix until fluffy and the sugar is dissolved.
5. Gradually add the butter mixture into the egg mixture while stirring. Set aside 1/5 of the batter and mix it with the chocolate mixture. Stir until smooth.
6. Pour some of the white batter into a buttered and floured baking pan.
7. Add the chocolate batter and the remaining white batter. Swirl the batter gently with a fork.
8. Add the cheese cubes and mix lightly. Bake at 175°C for 50-60 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven, cool, and remove from the pan.
10. Marble Cake is ready to serve.

title: Mirip Kopyor Asli! Resep ES KOPYOR IMITASI [Menu Takjil]

recipe_en:
Mock Coconut Ice Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Jelly ingredients:
1 pack plain jelly powder
1 pack plain agar powder
½ tsp salt
600 ml instant coconut milk
300 ml coconut water

Pandan Syrup ingredients:
2 pc pandan leaf
150 g sugar
150 ml water

Add-ons:
Evaporated milk
Ice cubes
Cocopandan syrup
Coconut jelly
Basil seeds

Steps:
1. In a saucepan, combine jelly powder, agar powder, salt, instant coconut milk, and coconut water. Mix well. Turn on the heat and cook until boiling while stirring.
2. Pour into molds. Allow to cool until set.
3. In a saucepan, combine sugar, water, and pandan leaves. Bring to a boil.
4. Scoop out the coconut jelly using a coconut shaver or a spoon.
5. Prepare glasses. Layer with ice cubes, 2-3 tbsp of cocopandan syrup, coconut jelly, basil seeds, ice cubes, 2-3 tbsp of Pandan Syrup, coconut jelly, and evaporated milk.
6. Mock Coconut Ice is ready to serve.

title: Savory Fragrant! Recipe CHICKEN GREEN PEPPER (GREEN CHILI) KHAS PADANG Ala Devina Hermawan
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Lado Ijo (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 kg ayam negeri utuh
6 siung bawang putih, opsional
1 sdt perasan jeruk nipis

1 sdt garam
10 siung bawang merah
10 siung bawang putih
70 ml minyak

Bahan iris:
6 siung bawang merah
1-2 buah tomat hijau

Bahan aromatik:
1 lembar daun salam

5 cm lengkuas
8 lembar daun jeruk

timun

Cara membuat:
1. Potong ayam menjadi 10 bagian lalu marinasi dengan bawang putih parut, perasan jeruk nipis, garam, merica, kaldu jamur dan gula pasir, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 15-30 menit
2. Didihkan air, masukkan cabai keriting hijau, cabai hijau, cabai rawit hijau, baking soda dan garam, masak selama 5 menit lalu pada 2 menit terakhir masukkan bawang merah dan bawang putih

5. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang merah hingga wangi dan setengah matang kemudian masukkan serai, lengkuas, daun salam, daun jeruk, tumis sesaat hingga wangi
6. Masukkan ayam, tumis hingga sedikit kecokelatan kemudian tambahkan air, masak hingga menyusut
7. Masukkan sambal hijau, tomat hijau, garam, kaldu jamur, gula pasir dan merica, masak sesaat

recipe_en:
Green Sambal Chicken Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 kg whole chicken
6 clove garlic, optional
1 tsp lime juice
2 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom stock powder
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper

Sambal ingredients:
100 g curly green chili
150 g green chili
35 g green Thai chili
1 L water
1 tsp baking soda
1 tsp salt
10 pc shallot
10 clove garlic
70 ml oil

Sliced ingredient:
6 pc shallot
1-2 pc green tomato

Aromatics:
1 pc bay leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
5 cm galangal
8 pc kaffir lime leaf

Other ingredients:
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom broth
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
100 ml water

Add-ons:
Rice
Cucumber

Steps:
1. Cut the chicken into 10 pieces. Marinate with grated garlic, lime juice, salt, pepper, mushroom powder, and sugar. Mix well. Marinate for 15-30 minutes.
2. Bring water to a boil. Add curly green chili, green chili, green Thai chili, baking soda, and salt. Cook for 5 minutes, then in the last 2 minutes add shallots and garlic.
3. Crush the boiled chilies with a mortar and pestle until slightly coarse.
4. Bruise the galangal and lemongrass. Slice the shallots and green tomatoes.
5. Heat oil. Sauté the shallots until fragrant and halfway cooked, then add lemongrass, galangal, bay leaf, kaffir lime leaf. Sauté briefly until fragrant.
6. Add the chicken. Sauté until lightly browned, then add water. Cook until reduced.
7. Add the Green Sambal, green tomatoes, salt, mushroom powder, sugar, and pepper. Cook briefly.
8. Green Sambal Chicken is ready to be served.

title: Empuk Meresap! Resep AYAM BAKAR BUMBU PADANG
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Bakar Bumbu Padang (untuk 6 porsi)

1/2 sdt merica
1/2 buah jeruk nipis

Bahan bumbu halus:

3 butir kemiri
5 cm kunyit
3 buah cabai merah
5 cm lengkuas
15 buah cabai rawit hijau
100 ml minyak goreng

Bahan lainnya:
1 sdm bubuk minang
1 lembar daun pandan
1 batang serai
1 lembar daun salam
1/2 lembar daun kunyit
2 lembar daun jeruk
500 ml air

1/8 sdt merica

Pelengkap:

sambal cabai hijau

Cara membuat:
1. Potong bekakak ayam dan sayat-sayat bagian sendi & bagian yang tebal
2. Marinasi ayam dengan garam, merica dan perasan jeruk nipis, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 15-30 menit
3. Masukkan bawang merah, bawang putih, kemiri, lengkuas, kunyit, cabai merah, cabai rawit hijau, minyak dan air ke dalam blender, haluskan
4. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak lalu masukkan daun salam, serai, daun pandan, daun jeruk, daun kunyit dan bubuk minang, tumis hingga wangi
5. Masukkan ayam, air, kaldu jamur, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, gula pasir dan Krim Kafe. Masak di api kecil hingga air menyusut
6. Siapkan panggangan, panggang ayam hingga kecokelatan di semua sisi

recipe_en:
Padang Roasted Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 pc chicken (850-900 g)
2 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
½ pc lime

Spices:
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
5 cm turmeric
3 pc red chili
5 cm galangal
15 pc green Thai chili
100 ml cooking oil
60 ml water

Other ingredients:
1 tbsp Minang curry powder
1 pc pandan leaf
1 stalk lemongrass
1 pc bay leaf
½ pc turmeric leaf
2 pc kaffir lime leaf
500 ml water
1 tsp mushroom stock powder
1 tsp chicken powder
⅛ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
4 tbsp Krim Kafe

Add-ons:
Steamed rice
Cucumber
Green Chili Sambal

Steps:
1. Cut chicken into pieces. Slash the joints and thick parts.
2. Marinate the chicken with salt, pepper, and lime juice. Mix well. Marinate for 15-30 minutes.
3. Blend shallots, garlic, candlenuts, galangal, turmeric, red chili, green Thai chil, oil, and water until smooth.
4. Sauté the paste until fragrant and oily, then add bay leaf, lemongrass, pandan leaf, kaffir lime leaf, turmeric leaf, and Minang curry powder. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add chicken, water, mushroom powder, chicken powder, pepper, sugar, and Krim Kafe. Cook over low heat until the liquid reduces.
6. Preheat the grill. Roast the chicken until browned on all sides.
7. Padang Roasted Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Cukup 4 Menit! Resep NASI GORENG KAMPUNG JADUL: Sahur / Buka Praktis!

kerupuk
telur mata sapi

Cara membuat :
1. Siapkan ulekan, masukkan bawang putih, garam, kaldu jamur dan lada putih butir, ulek hingga halus
2. Masukkan bawang merah, rawit hijau dan terasi, ulek kasar kemudian tumis hingga wangi
3. Masukkan telur, aduk rata kemudian masukkan nasi dan gula pasir, masak hingga wangi

recipe_en:
Kampung Fried Rice Recipe (yield 1 serving)

Ingredients:
300 g cooked white rice
2 pc egg
30 g watercress/water spinach
½ tsp sugar
3 tbsp oil

Spices:
4 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
½ tsp shrimp paste
35 pc green Thai chili
¼ tsp whole white pepper
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom stock powder

Add-ons:
Crackers
Sunny-side-up eggs

Steps:
1. Prepare a mortar and pestle. Add garlic, salt, mushroom powder, and whole pepper. Mash until smooth.
2. Add shallots, green Thai chili, and shrimp paste. Mash coarsely, then sauté until fragrant.
3. Add eggs. Stir well, then add rice and sugar. Cook until fragrant.
4. Add watercress/water spinach, cook briefly.
5. Kampung Fried Rice is ready to serve.

title: Takjil Praktis! Resep POFFERTJES (KUE CUBIT ALA BELANDA)
recipe_id:
Resep Poffertjes (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
300 ml susu 
35 gr margarin cair
2 butir telur
50 gr gula pasir
200 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
20 gr maizena
½ sdt garam 
½ sdt ragi instan
½ sdt baking powder
perisa pandan, opsional

Pelengkap:
gula halus
Nutella

Bahan Nutella hot latte:
50 ml espresso
200 ml susu
1 sdm sirup gula merah
½ sdm kental manis
Nutella
milk foam, opsional

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, gula, garam, baking powder, ragi, telur, susu dan margarin, aduk rata hingga tidak ada gumpalan
2. Diamkan adonan selama 1 jam kemudian bagi dua adonan dan beri perisa pandan, aduk rata
3. Panaskan cetakan, oles dengan mentega
4. Tuang sedikit adonan ke dalam cetakan, masak di api sedang hingga sedikit kecokelatan di semua sisi. Ulangi hingga adonan habis
5. Susun di dalam piring saji kemudian taburkan gula halus dan Nutella
6. Untuk Nutella hot latte, siapkan gelas semprotkan Nutella ke dalam pinggiran gelas
7. Campurkan espresso, sirup  gula merah dan kental manis, aduk rata. Tuang ke dalam gelas lalu tuang susu dan milk foam di atasnya
8. Poffertjes dan Nutella hot latte siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Poffertjes Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
300 ml milk
35 g melted margarine
2 pc egg
50 g granulated sugar
200 g all-purpose flour
20 g cornstarch
½ tsp salt
½ tsp instant yeast
½ tsp baking powder
Pandan essence, optional

Add-ons:
Icing sugar
Nutella

Nutella Hot Latte ingredients:
50 ml espresso
200 ml milk
1 tbsp palm sugar syrup
½ tbsp condensed milk
Nutella
Milk foam, optional

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix flour, cornstarch, sugar, salt, baking powder, yeast, eggs, milk, and melted margarine until smooth and lump-free.
2. Let the batter rest for 1 hour, then divide it into two portions. Add pandan flavoring to one portion, mix well.
3. Heat the pan and grease it with butter.
4. Pour a small amount of batter into the pan. Cook over medium heat until lightly browned on all sides. Repeat until the batter is finished.
5. Arrange on a serving plate, then dust with icing sugar and Nutella.
6. For Nutella Hot Latte, prepare a glass and pipe Nutella around the edges.
7. Mix espresso, palm sugar syrup, and condensed milk. Pour into the glass, then add milk and milk foam on top.
8. Poffertjes and Nutella Hot Latte are ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses Tanpa Ungkep! Resep AYAM GORENG REMPAH
recipe_id:

½ sdt merica

1 sdt ketumbar sangrai

daun kari
nasi putih

1. Iris serai, jahe, bawang putih, bawang merah dan cabai merah lalu masukkan ke dalam blender
2. Masukkan kunyit, daun jeruk yang sudah di buang batang nya, ketumbar, jintan dan telur, blender hingga halus
3. Potong ayam menjadi 2 bagian, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk kemudian masukkan bumbu halus, garam, gula pasir, merica, kaldu bubuk, baking powder, cuka, pewarna merah dan maizena, aduk rata

recipe_en:
Spiced Fried Chicken Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg whole chicken thigh
1 tsp vinegar
2 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 tbsp chicken powder
¾ tsp baking powder, optional
1 egg
10 tbsp cornstarch
4-5 drops red food coloring, optional

Spices:
1 stalk lemongrass
3 cm ginger
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
2 segment turmeric
1 tsp coriander, toasted
1 tsp cumin, toasted
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
2 pc red chili

Garnish:
Curry leaf
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice lemongrass, ginger, garlic, shallots, and red chili. Put them into a blender.
2. Add turmeric, kaffir lime leaves (stem removed), coriander, cumin, and egg into the blender. Blend until smooth.
3. Cut the chicken into 2 pieces. Transfer to a bowl, then add the blended spices, salt, sugar, pepper, chicken powder, baking powder, vinegar, red food coloring, and cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Let it marinate for 2 hours at room temperature.
5. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken until they’re cooked, then add the curry leaves. Set aside.
6. Spiced Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

title: 100% Empuk Kenyal! Resep CUMI SAUS TIRAM Ala Resto
recipe_id:
Resep Cumi Saus Tiram (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
500 gr cumi 
1 sdt baking powder
1 sdm kecap inggris
1 sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm maizena 

Bahan saus:
3 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm kecap inggris
1 sdm kecap ikan
2 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdm maizena
300 ml air
1 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan lainnya:
½ buah bawang bombai ukuran kecil
5 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
2 buah cabai merah
1 batang daun bawang
4 cm jahe
1 sdm margarin

Cara membuat:
1. Potong-potong cumi, belah dua bagian kepala dan buang bagian mata 
2. Marinasi dengan garam, merica, kecap inggris, baking powder dan maizena, aduk rata. Diamkan minimal 15 menit
3. Cincang bawang putih, bawang merah, iris tebal bawang bombai, iris miring cabai merah, daun bawang dan jahe
4. Campurkan air, saus tiram, kecap inggris, kecap ikan, kecap manis, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula dan maizena, aduk rata
5. Panaskan minyak, goreng cumi beberapa saat, tiriskan dan sisihkan sebagian minyak
6. Tumis bawang putih, bawang merah dan jahe hingga wangi kemudian masukkan margarin, tumis sesaat
7. Masukkan bawang bombai dan cabai merah, tumis hingga wangi
8. Masukkan larutan saus, masak hingga mendidih kemudian masukkan cumi, daun bawang dan minyak wijen, aduk rata
9. Cumi saus tiram siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Squid in Oyster Sauce Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
500 g squid
1 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp cornstarch

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp chicken powder
2 tbsp cornstarch
300 ml water
1 tsp sesame oil

Other ingredients:
½ pc onion, small
5 pc shallots
5 clove garlic
2 pc red chili
1 pc green onion
4 cm ginger
1 tbsp margarine

Steps:
1. Cut the squid into pieces, halve the head and remove the eyes.
2. Marinate with salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, baking powder, and cornstarch. Mix well. Let it sit for at least 15 minutes.
3. Chop the garlic and shallots. Slice the onion into thick pieces. Slice the red chili diagonally. Slice the green onions and ginger.
4. Mix water, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, chicken powder, sugar, and cornstarch. Mix well.
5. Heat the oil. Fry the squid briefly. Remove and set aside some of the oil.
6. Sauté garlic, shallots, and ginger until fragrant, then add margarine. Cook briefly.
7. Add onion and red chili. Sauté until fragrant.
8. Add the sauce mixture. Bring to a boil, then add the squid, green onions, and sesame oil. Stir well.
9. Squid in Oyster Sauce is ready to be served.

title: Lebaran WAJIB Ada! Resep OPOR AYAM KUNING
recipe_id:
Resep Opor Ayam Kuning (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan:
800 gr ayam negeri, potong  
½ buah jeruk nipis
2 sdt garam

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri, sangrai 
5 cm kunyit, bakar
¾ sdt lada putih butir
1 sdt ketumbar
2 sdm minyak
50 ml air

Bahan aromatik:
2 batang serai
2 lembar daun salam
3 lembar daun jeruk
3 cm lengkuas

Bahan lainnya:
200 ml santan
600 ml air
20 gr gula merah
½ sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt penyedap
5 siung bawang merah

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan perasan jeruk nipis dan garam, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 15-30 menit 
2. Potong bawang putih, bawang merah dan geprek kemiri kemudian masukkan ke dalam blender
3. Masukkan kunyit, ketumbar, lada putih butir, minyak dan air, blender hingga halus
4. Iris bawang merah, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan bumbu halus, tumis di api sedang hingga mengeluarkan minyak 
5. Geprek serai dan lengkuas lalu masukkan ke dalam tumisan berserta daun salam dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi
6. Masukkan ayam, tumis sesaat lalu masukkan air dan santan, aduk rata
7. Masukkan garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, penyedap dan gula merah, masak hingga matang di api kecil 
8. Opor ayam kuning siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Opor Ayam Kuning Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
800 g broiler, chopped
½ pc lime
2 tsp salt

Spices:
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut, toasted
5 cm turmeric, roasted
¾ tsp whole white pepper
1 tsp coriander
2 tbsp oil
50 ml water

Aromatics:
2 pc lemongrass
2 pc bay leaf
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
3 cm galangal

Others:
200 ml coconut milk
600 ml water
20 g palm sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp MSG
5 pc shallot

Add-on:
Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice and salt for 15-30 minutes.
2. Slice the garlic and shallots. Pound the candlenuts. Add them into the blender.
3. Add turmeric, coriander, white pepper, oil, and water. Blend until smooth.
4. Slice the shallots. Sautè until fragrant, then add the blended spices. Cook on medium heat until oily.
5. Pound the lemongrass and galangal. Add into the pan along with bay leaf and lime leaf. Cook until fragrant.
6. Add the chicken. Cook for a moment, then add water and coconut milk. Stir.
7. Add salt, chicken powder, MSG, and palm sugar. Cook on low heat.
8. Opor Ayam Kuning is ready to serve.

title: Diet Tetap Praktis & Gurih! Resep DAGING GULUNG SAWI
recipe_id:
Resep Daging Gulung Sawi (untuk 10 pcs)

Bahan:
150 gr daging sapi giling 
½ sdt AJI-NO-MOTO®
1 sdt garam
2 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm air
2 sdt air jahe
1 butir putih telur
1 sdm Saori® Saus Tiram
2 siung bawang putih halus
35 gr wortel
50 gr sohun
60 gr jamur kuping
2 sdm maizena
1 batang daun bawang
2 sdm minyak panas

Bahan lainnya:
500 ml air
2 sdm maizena
3 sdm Saori® Saus Tiram
2 sdt Masako® Rasa Gurih Pas
2 sdt gula pasir
16 buah cabai rawit hijau
6 siung bawang putih

Pelengkap: 
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Buang bagian batang sawi yang tebal kemudian kukus selama 2 menit, tiriskan
2. Potong kotak kecil wortel, iris jamur kuping, gunting-gunting sohun, iris daun bawang lalu siram daun bawang dengan minyak panas
3. Siapkan mangkuk, campurkan daging, air, air jahe, garam, gula pasir, merica, AJI-NO-MOTO® dan Saori® Saus Tiram, aduk hingga lengket
4. Masukkan bawang putih halus, daun bawang, putih telur, maizena, wortel, jamur kuping dan sohun, aduk rata
5. Siapkan sawi putih, letakkan 2 sdm adonan kemudian gulung. Kukus selama 10 menit
6. Untuk saus, panaskan sedikit minyak lalu masukkan bawang putih cincang, tumis hingga wangi
7. Masukkan air, Saori® Saus Tiram, Masako® Rasa Gurih Pas, gula pasir dan larutan maizena sambil diaduk
8. Tambahkan cabai rawit iris, masak sesaat
9. Daging gulung sawi siap disaijkan

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dapurumami.id
Website: https://www.dapurumami.com/
recipe_en:
Cabbage Beef Rolls Recipe (yield 10 pcs)

Ingredients:
150 g ground beef
½ tsp AJI-NO-MOTO®
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp water
2 tsp ginger juice
1 pc egg white
1 tbsp Saori® Oyster Sauce
2 clove garlic, minced
35 g carrot
50 g glass noodles
60 g wood ear mushroom
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 pc green onion
2 tbsp hot oil

Others:
500 ml water
2 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp Saori® Oyster Sauce
2 tsp Masako® Rasa Gurih Pas
2 tsp sugar
16 pc green Thai chili
6 clove garlic

Add-on:
Rice

Steps:
1. Trim the thick cabbage stem, then steam for 2 minutes. Set aside.
2. Small dice the carrot. Slice the wood ear mushroom, cut up the glass noodles. Slice the green onions and mix it with hot oil.
3. In a bowl, combine the beef with water, ginger juice, salt, sugar, pepper, AJI-NO-MOTO®, and Saori® Oyster Sauce. Mix until sticky.
4. Add minced garlic, green onions, egg white, cornstarch, carrot, wood ear mushroom, and glass noodles. Mix well.
5. Spread the cabbage. Add 2 tbsp of meat, then roll. Steam for 10 minutes.
6. For the Sauce, heat some oil. Sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
7. Add water, Saori® Oyster Sauce, Masako® Rasa Gurih Pas, sugar, and cornstarch mixture while stirring.
8. Add sliced Thai chili. Cook for a moment.
9. Cabbage Beef Rolls are ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep SAPO TAHU SEAFOOD Ala Resto
recipe_id:
Resep Sapo Tahu Seafood (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
100 gr udang kupas sisa buntut
115 gr cumi, kupas
185 gr ikan gurami filet
¾ sdt baking powder
3 sdm putih telur
1 ½ sdt maizena
½ sdt garam
½ sdt lada putih

Bahan isian:
1 buah wortel
4 buah jamur champignon
½ bonggol brokoli
240 gr tahu telur tube

Bahan lainnya:
5 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
15 gr jahe
2 batang daun bawang
500 ml air
2 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt minyak wijen
3-4 sdm maizena
3 sdm air untuk melarutkan maizena

Langkah:
1. Potong ikan gurami filet, belah punggung udang, potong, dan sayat-sayat cumi lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Marinasi dengan putih telur, maizena, baking powder, lada putih, dan garam, aduk rata
3. Potong-potong tahu telur tube lalu goreng beberapa saat, tiriskan
4. Di wajan yang sama, goreng ikan beberapa saat, tiriskan, goreng udang dan cumi 20-30 detik, tiriskan
5. Sisihkan minyak dan sisa kan sedikit lalu tumis bawang putih, jahe, dan daun bawang bagian putih hingga wangi
6. Masukkan jamur, bawang bombai, air, saus tiram, kecap asin, gula pasir, dan kaldu ayam bubuk, aduk rata
7. Larutkan maizena dengan air lalu masukkan ke dalam tumisan, tumis beberapa saat hingga mengental
8. Masukkan brokoli, wortel, tahu telur, ikan, udang, cumi, dan minyak wijen, aduk rata. Sapo tahu seafood siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Seafood Claypot Tofu Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients to marinate:
100 g peeled shrimp, tail intact
115 g squid, peeled
185 g gourami fillet
¾ tsp baking powder
3 tbsp egg white
1.5 tsp cornstarch
½ tsp salt
½ tsp white pepper

Add-ons:
1 pc carrot
4 pc Champignon mushroom
½ pc broccoli
240 g egg tofu tube

Others:
5 clove garlic
½ pc onion
15 g ginger
2 pc green onion
500 ml water
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sesame oil
3-4 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp water to mix the cornstarch

Steps:
1. Slice the gourami fillet. Slit the back of the shrimp. Slice and score the squid. Place everything in a bowl.
2. Marinate with egg white, cornstarch, baking powder, pepper, and salt. Mix well.
3. Slice the egg tofu, then fry for a moment. Set aside.
4. In the same pan, fry the fish shortly. Set aside. Fry the shrimp and squid for 20-30 seconds. Set aside.
5. Set aside the oil. Leave some to stir-fry the garlic, ginger, and the white part of green onions until fragrant.
6. Add mushroom, onion, water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, and chicken powder. Stir well.
7. Dilute the cornstarch in water, then add to the sauce. Cook until it thickens.
8. Add broccoli, carrot, egg tofu, fish, shrimp, squid, and sesame oil. Mix well, then Seafood Claypot Tofu is ready to serve.

title: Savory and Chewy! A Recipe for Pempek Adaan, a Palembang Specialty [Complete with Cuko]
recipe_id:
Resep Pempek Adaan (untuk 50-60 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
1 kg ikan tenggiri giling
500 gr es serut / air es
4 sdm garam
5 sdm gula pasir
4 sdm kaldu jamur / penyedap
6 siung bawang putih, blender halus
2 butir putih telur
800 gr sagu
100 gr bawang merah, cincang kasar
4 batang daun bawang, iris
50 ml minyak panas
150 ml santan

Bahan cuko:
500 gr gula merah batok
60 gr cabai rawit hijau
12 siung bawang putih
2 sdm ebi kering, rendam air hangat
2 sdm cuka
30 gr asam jawa, rendam air hangat 
2 sdt garam
2 sdm gula pasir
750 ml air

Cara membuat:
1. Untuk kuah cuko, didihkan air, gula dan asam jawa, masak hingga mendidih 
2. Blender ebi, cabai rawit hijau, bawang putih dan sedikit air hingga halus
3. Saring kuah cuko kemudian masukkan bumbu halus ke dalam kuah cuko. Tambahkan garam, gula pasir dan cuka, masak hingga mendidih dan matang
4. Siram daun bawang dengan minyak panas, aduk rata
5. Untuk adonan, masukkan ikan tenggiri, garam, kaldu jamur dan gula pasir ke dalam mixer, aduk hingga lengket
6. Masukkan es serut, mixer hingga menyatu kemudian masukkan bawang putih, putih telur dan tepung sagu, aduk hingga merata
7. Masukkan bawang merah, daun bawang dan santan, aduk rata
8. Bentuk bulat adonan dengan scoop ice cream yang sudah di celupkan ke dalam minyak lalu goreng hingga kecokelatan di api sedang, tiriskan
9. Untuk tekstur lebih krispi, potong-potong pempek yang sudah matang lalu goreng kembali hingga kering, tiriskan
10. Pempek siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Pempek Adaan Recipe (yield 50-60 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
1 kg ground Spanish Mackerel
500 g shaved ice / cold water
4 tbsp salt
5 tbsp sugar
4 tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
6 clove garlic, blended smoothly
2 pc egg
800 g sago flour
100 g shallot, roughly chopped
4 pc green onion, sliced
50 ml hot oil
150 ml coconut milk

Cuko ingredients:
500 g batok palm sugar
60 g green Thai chili
12 clove garlic
2 tbsp dried shrimp, soaked in warm water
2 tbsp vinegar
30 g tamarind, soaked in warm water
2 tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
750 ml water

Steps:
1. For Cuko, combine water, palm sugar, and tamarind. Bring to a boil.
2. Blend the dried shrimp, green Thai chili, garlic, and a little water until smooth.
3. Sift the Cuko, then add the blended spices into the Cuko. Add salt, sugar, and vinegar. Bring to a boil.
4. Pour hot oil onto the green onions. Mix well.
5. For the dough, add the ground fish, salt, mushroom powder, and sugar into the mixer. Mix until sticky.
6. Add shaved ice and mix until the dough comes together. Then, add garlic, egg white, and sago flour. Mix well.
7. Add shallots, green onions, and coconut milk. Mix well.
8. Shape the dough into balls with an ice cream scoop dipped into oil. Fry until golden brown on medium heat. Set aside.
9. For a crispier texture, slice the cooked Pempek and fry them again until crispy.
10. Pempek is ready to serve.

title: Kenyal Tidak Mudah Hancur! Resep SAMBAL KRECEK [Favorit Keluarga]
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Krecek (untuk 11 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih 
8 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
8 buah cabai merah rebus
½ sdt terasi, opsional
60 ml minyak
50 ml air 

Bahan lainnya:
2 lembar daun salam
1 batang serai, geprek
25 buah cabai rawit merah
30 buah cabai rawit hijau
100 gr tempe
300 gr kerupuk krecek
50 gr kacang tolo
100 ml santan
800 ml air
1 sdm garam
2 sdt penyedap
2 sdm gula pasir
1 sdm gula merah

Pelengkap:
nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih, kemiri, terasi, cabai merah, minyak dan air hingga halus
2. Tumis bumbu hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak lalu masukkan serai dan daun salam, tumis hingga wangi
3. Masukkan air dan santan. Potong tempe dan sebagian cabai rawit merah 
4. Masukkan kacang tolo, tempe, cabai rawit merah, garam, penyedap, gula pasir dan gula merah, masak sekitar 10 menit
5. Masukkan kerupuk kulit, cabai rawit merah utuh dan cabai rawit hijau, masak di api kecil selama 30 menit atau hingga matang. Tambahkan sedikit air jika diperlukan
6. Sambal krecek siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Sambal Krecek Recipe (yield 11 servings)

Spices:
6 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
8 pc red chili, boiled
½ tsp shrimp paste, optional
60 ml oil
50 ml water 

Others:
2 pc bay leaf
1 pc lemongrass, pounded
25 pc red Thai chili
30 pc green Thai chili
100 g tempeh
300 g krecek
50 g tolo nut
100 ml coconut milk
800 ml water
1 tbsp salt
2 tsp MSG
2 tbsp white sugar
1 tbsp palm sugar

Add-ons:
Rice

Steps:
1. Blend shallots, garlic, candlenuts, shrimp paste, red chili, oil, and water until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant and oily. Add lemongrass and bay leaf. Cook until fragrant.
3. Add water and coconut milk. Slice the tempeh and some of the red Thai chili.
4. Add tolo nuts, tempeh, red Thai chili, salt, MSG, white sugar, palm sugar. Cook for about 10 minutes.
5. Add krecek, whole red and green Thai chili. Cook on low for 30 minutes or until cooked. Add water if needed.
6. Sambal Krecek is ready to serve.

title: Ide Jualan Homemade! Resep KAKI NAGA SAYUR
recipe_id:
Resep Kaki Naga Sayur (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
200 gr paha ayam filet 
20 gr bayam
½ sdm gula pasir
½ sdt garam
½ sdt merica
¾ sdt AJI-NO-MOTO®
1 sdm bawang putih goreng 
4 sdm tepung roti
1 butir telur

Bahan pelapis:
tepung roti
tepung terigu
telur

Pelengkap:
saus sambal / mayones

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam food processor masukkan ayam, bayam, gula, garam, merica, AJI-NO-MOTO® dan bawang putih goreng, haluskan
2. Masukkan tepung roti dan telur, aduk rata. Bagi adonan menjadi 8, bentuk dengan sendok lalu balurkan ke dalam tepung terigu
3. Tusuk dengan stik es krim, pipihkan sedikit kemudian balurkan ke dalam telur dan tepung roti
4. Panaskan minyak, goreng di api sedang hingga kecokelatan
5. Kaki naga sayur siap disajikan 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dapurumami.id
Website: https://www.dapurumami.com/
recipe_en:
Vegetable Nugget Drumsticks Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Bahan:
200 g chicken thigh fillet
20 g spinach
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
¾ tsp AJI-NO-MOTO®
1 tbsp fried garlic
4 tbsp breadcrumbs
1 pc egg

Coating:
Breadcrumbs
Flour
Egg

Condiment:
Chili sauce / mayonnaise

Steps:
1. Into a food processor, add chicken, spinach, sugar, salt, pepper, AJI-NO-MOTO®, and fried garlic. Blend until smooth.
2. Add breadcrumbs and egg. Blend well. Divide the dough into 8 parts. Scoop with a spoon, then coat with flour.
3. Stick the ice cream stick through the dough. Flatten it a little bit, then coat with egg and breadcrumbs.
4. Heat the oil. Fry on medium heat until golden brown.
5. Vegetable Nugget Drumsticks are ready to serve.

title: 100% Renyah Tanpa Cetakan! Resep LIDAH KUCING
recipe_id:
Resep Lidah Kucing (untuk 100 pcs)

Bahan:
75 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter (suhu ruang)
75 gr Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
90 gr gula halus
½ sdt garam
1 sdt perisa vanila
1 butir kuning telur
15 gr susu bubuk 
120 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
½ sdt baking powder
60 gr Anchor Cheddar Cheese
50 gr putih telur

Cara membuat:
1. Parut keju dan sisihkan
2. Di dalam mangkuk kocok mentega tawar, tinned salted butter dan gula halus hingga pucat dan mengembang
3. Masukkan kuning telur, garam dan perisa vanila, mixer hingga rata
4. Masukkan tepung terigu, baking powder dan susu bubuk sambil di saring. Masukan keju parut, mixer kembali hingga rata
5. Masukkan putih telur, kocok sesaat kemudian pindahkan ke dalam piping bag
6. Siapkan baking paper seukuran loyang yang akan digunakan. Lipat menjadi 4 bagian lalu lipat lagi sekitar 1 cm untuk jarak
7. Semprotkan adonan lidah kucing lalu panggang di suhu 130 derajat celcius selama 25 menit
8. Lidah kucing keju siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Cat’s Tongue Cookies Recipe (yield 100 pcs)

Ingredients:
75 g Anchor Unsalted Butter (room temperature)
75 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
90 g icing sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla essence
1 pc egg yolk
15 g milk powder
120 g all-purpose flour
½ tsp baking powder
60 g Anchor Cheddar Cheese
50 g egg white

Steps:
1. Grate the cheese. Set aside.
2. In a bowl, whip the unsalted butter, tinned salted butter, and icing sugar until pale and fluffy.
3. Add egg yolk, salt, and vanilla essence. Mix well.
4. Sift in flour, baking powder, and milk powder. Add grated cheese, mix evenly.
5. Add egg whites. Mix for a moment, then transfer the batter into a piping bag.
6. Prepare baking paper according to the pan’s size. Fold into 4 parts, then fold a 1-cm space on each section.
7. Pipe the batter on the pan, then bake at 130°C for 25 minutes.
8. Cat’s Tongue Cookies are ready to serve.

title: Resep GOHYONG VIRAL CIKINI: Lengkap Dengan Kuah Sausnya
recipe_id:
Resep Gohyong Cikini (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan kulit:
80 gr tepung terigu protein sedang 
40 gr maizena
280 ml air
1 butir telur
2 sdm minyak
¾ sdt garam

Bahan isian:
500 gr paha ayam filet dengan kulit ( keadaan mentah lalu rebus )
250 gr baso sapi
130 gr tapioka
40 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
2 butir telur
1 batang daun bawang, iris
5 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
1 sdt baking powder
2 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt penyedap
2 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt merica
1 sdm air, jika diperlukan

Bahan saus:
4 sdm saus tomat
2 sdm kecap asin
1 ½ sdm saus tiram
2 sdm kecap inggris
40 gr gula merah
2 sdt penyedap
4 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
1 sdm margarin
1 ½ sdt bubuk ngohiong
800 ml air rebusan ayam

Pelengkap:
cabai rawit hijau iris

Cara membuat:
1. Untuk kulit, campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, telur, minyak dan air, aduk rata kemudian masukkan garam, aduk kembali
2. Panaskan wajan, tuang sedikit adonan kulit lalu ratakan, masak hingga kering. Ulangi hingga habis
3. Belah dua bawang putih dan bawang merah 
4. Panaskan wajan, masukkan margarin, bawang putih dan bawang merah, tumis hingga wangi
5. Masukkan saus tiram, saus tomat, kecap asin, kecap inggris, gula merah, bubuk ngohiong, air dan penyedap, masak hingga mendidih
6. Untuk adonan, masukkan bawang putih dan bawang merah ke dalam food processor, haluskan kemudian masukkan ayam, haluskan kembali. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
7. Masukkan baso ke dalam food processor, haluskan sesaat dan pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
8. Masukkan tepung tapioka, terigu, garam, merica, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, baking powder dan penyedap, aduk rata kemudian masukkan telur dan daun bawang, aduk rata
9. Siapkan kulit, bagi dua adonan kemudian letakkan adonan di atas kulit dan gulung
10. Potong-potong kemudian goreng selama 7 menit atau hingga matang, tiriskan
11. Gohyong siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Cikini Gohyong Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Skin ingredients:
80 g all-purpose flour
40 g cornstarch
280 ml water
1 pc egg
2 tbsp oil
¾ tsp salt

Stuffing ingredients:
500 g raw chicken thigh fillet, with skin, boiled
250 g beef meatball
130 g tapioca flour
40 g all-purpose flour
2 pc egg
1 pc green onion, sliced
5 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
1 tsp baking powder
2 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp MSG
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 tbsp water, if needed

Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
40 g palm sugar
2 tsp MSG
4 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
1 tbsp margarine
1.5 tsp five-spice powder
800 ml chicken stock

Add-ons:
Green Thai chili, sliced

Steps:
1. For the skin, combine flour, cornstarch, egg, oil, and water. Mix well, then add salt and mix again.
2. Heat the pan. Pour a little of the batter and spread evenly. Cook until it’s dry. Repeat until the batter is finished.
3. Halve the garlic and shallots.
4. Heat the pan. Add margarine, garlic, and shallots. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add oyster sauce, ketchup, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, palm sugar, five-spice powder, water, and MSG. Bring to a boil.
6. For the stuffing, blend the garlic and shallots in the food processor. Add chicken and blend again. Set aside in a bowl.
7. Add meatballs into the food processor. Blend for a moment, then place in the bowl.
8. Add tapioca flour, flour, salt, pepper, chicken powder, sugar, baking powder, and MSG. Mix well, then add eggs and green onions. Mix well again.
9. Prepare the skin. Divide the stuffing into two parts, then place it on the skin and roll.
10. Slice the Gohyong, then fry for 7 minutes or until cooked. Set aside.
11. Gohyong is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Curly Chicken Pentol Recipe (yield 80 pcs)

Ingredients:
500 g ground chicken thigh
1 tbsp beef powder
½ tbsp salt
½ tsp MSG
4 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 pc egg white
1 tbsp minced garlic
2 tbsp fried shallots
100 ml cold water
200 g tapioca flour
40 g all-purpose flour

Filling:
Cheddar, cubed
Red Thai chili, sliced

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp ketchup
3 tbsp chili sauce
1 sdm minced garlic
100 ml water
2 tsp flour

Steps:
1. Season the chicken with salt, beef powder, sugar, pepper, and MSG. Stir until sticky.
2. Add cold water, egg white, fried shallots, and garlic. Mix well, then add tapioca flour and flour. Mix well.
3. Bring water to a simmer, then lower the heat. To stuff the dough, spread some dough on the bowl wall. Place the cheese or chili on it, then shape into a bowl.
4. Boil the dough, then steam it for 10 minutes.
5. For the sauce, combine water with flour. Stir well, then add garlic, chili sauce, and ketchup. Cook for a moment until it boils.

title: Satu Jam Jadi! Resep NASI GUDEG KOMPLIT
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Gudeg (untuk 11 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
20 siung bawang putih
15 siung bawang merah
8 butir kemiri, sangrai
6 cm lengkuas, iris
2 sdt ketumbar sangrai
1 ½ sdt lada putih butir
100 ml air

Bahan areh:
4 sdm bumbu halus
1 batang serai
3 lembar daun salam
500 ml santan
300 ml air
½ sdm gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt garam
1 butir putih telur
60 ml air

Bahan nangka:
1 kg nangka muda
1 sdm baking soda
2 liter air
1 ½ sdm garam

Bahan gudeg:
bumbu halus
6 butir telur rebus
6 buah tahu putih
1 kg ayam paha bawah
165 gr tempe
8 lembar daun salam
2 batang serai, geprek
800 ml air
150 gr gula merah warna gelap
50 ml santan
1 sdm garam
½ sdm penyedap

Pelengkap:
nasi putih
cabai rawit hijau
sambal krecek

Cara membuat:
1. Didihkan air, rebus nangka dengan garam dan baking soda selama 7 menit, tiriskan
2. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih, kemiri, lada putih dan air hingga halus
3. Sisihkan 4 sdm bumbu halus untuk areh kemudian masukkan lengkuas dan ketumbar ke dalam
sisa bumbu, haluskan kembali
4. Untuk gudeg, panaskan sedikit minyak lalu tumis bumbu hingga wangi dan mengeluarkan minyak
5. Masukkan daun salam dan serai, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan air, gula merah, santan, garam dan penyedap, aduk rata
6. Masukkan nangka, ayam, telur, tahu dan tempe, masak di api sedang kecil selama 1 jam
7. Untuk areh, panaskan sedikit minyak kemudian tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi
8. Masukkan daun salam dan serai, tumis sesaat kemudian masukkan santan, air, gula pasir, kaldu ayam bubuk dan garam, masak hingga mendidih
9. Campurkan putih telur dengan air lalu masukkan secara perlahan ke dalam wajan, masak sesaat dan sisihkan
10. Sisihkan ayam, tahu, telur dan tempe ke dalam mangkuk. Masak kembali nangka selama 5 menit
11. Nasi gudeg siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Nasi Gudeg Recipe (yield 11 servings)

Spices:
20 clove garlic
15 pc shallot
8 pc candlenut, toasted
6 cm galangal, sliced
2 tsp coriander, toasted
1.5 tsp whole white pepper
100 ml water

Areh ingredients:
4 tbsp blended spices
1 pc lemongrass
3 pc bay leaf
500 ml coconut milk
300 ml water
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
2 tsp salt
1 pc egg white
60 ml water

Boiled Jackfruit ingredients:
1 kg unripe jackfruit
1 tbsp baking soda
2 liter water
1.5 tbsp salt

Gudeg ingredients:
Blended spices
6 pc boiled egg
6 pc white tofu
1 kg chicken drumstick
165 g tempeh
8 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
800 ml water
150 g dark palm sugar
50 ml coconut milk
1 tbsp salt
½ tbsp MSG

Add-ons:
Rice
Green Thai chili
Sambal Krecek

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Boil the jackfruit with salt and baking soda for 7 minutes. Set aside.
2. Blend the shallots, garlic, candlenuts, white pepper, and water until smooth.
3. Set aside 4 tbsp of the blended spices to make Areh. Add galangal and coriander into the blender and blend again.
4. For the Gudeg, heat some oil and sauté the blended spices until fragrant and oily.
5. Add bay leaf and lemongrass. Sauté until fragrant, then add water, palm sugar, coconut milk, salt, and MSG. Stir well.
6. Add the jackfruit, chicken, eggs, tofu, and tempeh. Cook on low heat for 1 hour.
7. For the Areh, heat some oil and sauté the blended spices until fragrant.
8. Add bay leaf and lemongrass. Sauté for a moment, then add coconut milk, water, sugar, chicken powder, and salt. Bring to a boil.
9. Mix egg whites with water, then add into the pan slowly. Cook for a moment, then set aside.
10. Set the chicken, tofu, eggs, and tempeh into a bowl. Continue cooking the jackfruit for 5 minutes.
11. Nasi Gudeg is ready to serve.

title: Satu Bumbu Dua Protein: Resep TUMIS SARDEN & AYAM BUMBU SARDEN

7 cm lengkuas
4 - 5 lembar daun salam
4 - 5 lembar daun jeruk

recipe_en:
Sardine Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g canned sardines in tomato sauce

Stir-Fry ingredients:
15 pc shallot
6 clove garlic
1 pc lemongrass, pounded
7 cm ginger
7 cm galangal
4 - 5 pc bay leaf
4 - 5 pc kaffir lime leaf
30 g stinky bean, peeled and halved
1 pc red tomato
2 pc red chili
25 g red Thai chili
25 g green Thai chili
1 pc green onion

Others:
200 ml water
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic and half of the shallots. Slice the tomato into large chunks. Slice the red chili, lemongrass, galangal, and ginger.
2. Heat the oil. Add sliced shallots, garlic, bay leaf, lime leaf, lemongrass, ginger, and galangal. Sauté until fragrant and a bit browned.
3. Add stinky beans, tomato, red chili, whole red and green Thai chilis, and whole shallots. Cook for a moment.
4. Add the canned sardines, water, salt, pepper, sugar, and mushroom powder. Cook until the sauce thickens.
5. Add sweet soy sauce and sliced green onions. Cook again for a moment.
6. Sardine Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Sehat: Resep TELUR TOMAT Praktis!

4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng telur hingga matang, sisihkan

recipe_en:
Tomato Omelette Recipe (untuk 2 porsi)

Ingredients:
3 pc egg
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion
1 tbsp cornstarch
1/8 tsp pepper
1/3 tsp salt
1/3 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Others:
2 pc red tomato
2 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
1 tbsp chili sauce, optional
2 tbsp ketchup
½ tbsp soy sauce
½ tbsp oyster sauce
250 ml water
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Add-ons:
Enoki mushroom
Green onion
Thai chili, sliced + soy sauce

Steps:
1. Slice the green onions and dice the onion.
2. Combine the eggs, green onions, onion, salt, pepper, and mushroom powder. Mix well, then add cornstarch. Mix again.
3. Slice the garlic, shallots, and tomatoes.
4. Heat some oil. Fry the eggs until cooked. Set it aside.
5. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add the tomatoes. Stir.
6. Add water, ketchup, soy sauce, oyster sauce, chili sauce, sugar, and mushroom powder. Stir well.
7. Slice the enoki, green onions, and Omelette. Add them into the pan. Cook for a moment.
8. Tomato Omelette is ready to serve.

title: Resep SPAGHETTI ORIENTAL: Praktis Gurih Ala Pizza Hut
recipe_id:
Resep Spaghetti Oriental (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
350 gr paha ayam filet
3-4 sdm campuran saus
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan campuran saus:
3 sdm saus tomat
1 sdm kecap manis
2 sdm saus tiram
3 siung bawang putih
2 cm jahe
½ sdm kecap inggris
1 sdt minyak wijen
½ sdt bubuk ngohiong
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdm gula pasir

6 siung bawang putih
5 buah cabai merah keriting
3 buah cabai rawit merah

160 gr spaghetti, rebus 6 menit

Langkah:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan saus tiram, saus tomat, kecap manis, kecap inggris, minyak wijen, bubuk ngohiong, bawang putih parut, jahe parut kaldu ayam bubuk dan gula pasir, aduk rata
2. Marinasi ayam dengan campuran saus dan merica, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 30 menit di suhu ruang
3. Cincang bawang putih, potong besar bawang merah, iris cabai merah keriting, cabai rawit merah dan daun bawang
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis ayam hingga kecokelatan di semua sisi kemudian masukkan sedikit air, masak hingga air menyusut, sisihkan
5. Panaskan kembali sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih dan bawang merah hingga wangi lalu masukkan cabai merah keriting, cabai rawit, daun bawang, sisa saus, pasta dan air, masak hingga menyusut

recipe_en:
Oriental Spaghetti Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Chicken Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh fillet
3-4 tbsp sauce mix
1/8 tsp pepper

Sauce Mix ingredients:
3 tbsp ketchup
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 clove garlic
2 cm ginger
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
½ tsp five-spice powder
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tbsp sugar

Others:
6 clove garlic
5 pc curly red chili
3 pc red Thai chili
8 pc shallot
1 pc green onion
160 g spaghetti, boiled for 6 minutes
4-5 tbsp water

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine oyster sauce, ketchup, sweet soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, sesame oil, five-spice powder, grated garlic, grated ginger, chicken powder, and sugar. Mix well.
2. Combine the chicken with the sauce mix and pepper. Mix well. Marinate for 30 minutes at room temperature.
3. Mince the garlic. Slice the shallots into large pieces. Slice the curly red chili, red Thai chili, and green onions.
4. Heat some oil. Pan-sear the chicken until browned on both sides. Then, add a bit of water and cook until it’s reduced. Set aside.
5. Heat a little bit of oil. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add curly red chili, Thai chili, and green onions. Add the rest of the sauce, the pasta, and water. Cook until reduced.
6. Oriental Spaghetti is ready to serve.

title: Resep CLASSIC LASAGNA: Mudah & Pakai Bahan Di Rumah!
recipe_id:
Resep Classic Lasagna (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan kulit lasagna:
450 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
3 butir telur
40 ml air
1 sdt garam

Bahan bechamel sauce:
115 gr mentega tawar
8 sdm tepung terigu
1,5 liter susu
¼ sdt pala
1½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica

Bahan saus daging:
600 gr daging sapi giling
600 gr daging ayam giling
6 buah tomat
85 gr tomato paste
250 gr saus tomat
4 lembar bay leaves
1 sdm oregano
1 sdm kecap inggris
6 siung bawang putih
2 buah bawang bombai
2 buah wortel
2 batang seledri, iris
1 liter air
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt garam
½ sdt merica
4-5 sdm minyak untuk menumis

Bahan lainnya:
100 gr keju cheddar
250 gr keju mozzarella

Cara membuat:
1. Kulit lasagna: Kocok telur, air dan garam. Tuang ke wadah berisi terigu lalu aduk menggunakan sumpit hingga merata
2. Uleni adonan hingga permukaannya halus kemudian gulung dan bungkus dengan plastik wrap. Diamkan minimal 2 jam
3. Bagi adonan menjadi 4 bagian, taburi adonan dengan sedikit tepung agar tidak lengket lalu pipihkan adonan menggunakan rolling pin
4. Tipiskan adonan dengan alat penggiling mi/pasta secara bertahap hingga mencapai ketebalan 1-1.5 mm. Taburi kembali dengan tepung kemudian lipat dan potong sesuai ukuran loyang yang akan digunakan
5. Saus daging: Haluskan bawang bombai, wortel dan bawang putih menggunakan chopper lalu tumis di api besar hingga wangi dan layu. Sisihkan
6. Haluskan tomat menggunakan chopper hingga halus. Sisihkan
7. Panaskan kembali wajan, masukkan daging sapi dan daging ayam giling dan masak hingga kecokelatan dan kering kemudian tambahkan 2 sdm minyak. Masak kembali
8. Masukkan bahan tumisan ke dalam wajan kemudian tambahkan tomat yang sudah dihaluskan, bay leaves, oregano, tomato paste, saus tomat dan kecap inggris, kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, merica, air dan seledri, aduk rata. Masak di api kecil selama 30 menit
9. Saus bechamel: Panaskan wajan, masukkan mentega tawar dan tunggu hingga meleleh. Masukkan tepung terigu dan aduk menggunakan balloon whisk. Masak hingga wangi 
10. Masukkan bubuk pala, aduk kembali dan tuang susu sedikit demi sedikit sambil diaduk. Terakhir masukkan garam dan merica. Masak hingga mengental sambil di aduk
11. Siapkan loyang atau wadah tahan panas, tuang bechamel sauce dan susun kulit lasagna - saus daging - bechamel sauce - keju mozzarella dan keju cheddar. Ulangi tahap ini hingga 4-5 lapis. Terakhir taburi dengan keju mozzarella
12. Panggang selama 40-45 menit di suhu 180℃ atau jika menggunakan kompor freestanding menggunakan api atas dengan api besar dan api bawah dengan api sedang 
13. Classic Lasagna siap disajikan

title: Empuk, Tanpa Oven, Bumbu Meresap: Resep BRISKET BARBECUE
recipe_id:
Resep Barbecue Brisket (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan presto:
2,2 kg daging sapi brisket
5 lembar daun salam
6 siung bawang putih, geprek
50 gr jahe, geprek & iris
3 liter air
3 sdm garam
2 sdm kaldu bubuk

Bahan bumbu halus:
2 buah tomat merah
60 gr bawang putih
4 cm jahe
10 siung bawang merah
60 ml minyak

Bahan saus:
80 gr saus tiram
150 gr saus tomat
150 gr saus bbq
5 sdm kecap manis
1 liter air

Bahan sambal chimichurri:
5 siung bawang putih
¼ buah bawang bombai
7 buah cabai merah keriting
15 buah cabai rawit hijau
60 ml minyak panas
1 sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt merica

1 buah lemon
20 gr parsley
50 ml olive oil

½ buah lemon

Pelengkap:
kentang goreng
jagung rebus
sambal bawang
tomat ceri

Langkah:
1. Siapkan presto, masukkan air, jahe, bawang putih, daun salam, daging, garam dan kaldu bubuk. Presto daging selama 70-80 menit
2. Masukkan tomat, bawang putih, jahe dan bawang merah ke dalam blender, haluskan kemudian tumis hingga kering
3. Tambahkan saus tomat, saus tiram, saus bbq, kecap manis dan air, aduk rata kemudian masukkan daging, masak selama 30 menit di api sedang kecil
4. Tiriskan daging dan masukkan ke dalam kulkas sesaat sebelum dipotong
5. Masukkan air, gula palem, saus tomat dan perasan lemon ke dalam saus, masak sesaat
6. Untuk chimichurri, siapkan chopper masukkan bawang putih, bawang bombai, cabai merah keriting dan cabai rawit hijau, haluskan dan pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
7. Tambahkan minyak panas, aduk rata. Blender parsley, daun ketumbar, perasan lemon, garam gula dan merica, blender sesaat kemudian campurkan ke dalam cabai
8. Tambahkan olive oil, aduk rata
9. Potong daging lalu panggang dengan wajan hingga sedikit kecokelatan kemudian bungkus dengan baking paper
10. Susun daging dan pelengkap lainnya
11. Barbecue brisket siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Barbecue Brisket Recipe (yield 10 servings)

To pressure cook:
2.2 kg beef brisket
5 pc bay leaf
6 clove garlic, pounded
50 g ginger, pounded & sliced
3 liter water
3 tbsp salt
2 tbsp stock powder

Blended Spices:
2 pc red tomato
60 g garlic
4 cm ginger
10 pc shallot
60 ml oil

Sauce ingredients:
80 g oyster sauce
150 g ketchup
150 g BBQ sauce
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 liter water

Chimichurri ingredients:
5 clove garlic
¼ pc onion
7 pc curly red chili
15 pc green Thai chili
60 ml hot oil
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
70 g cilantro
1 pc lemon
20 g parsley
50 ml olive oil

BBQ Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp palm sugar
½ pc lemon
60 g ketchup
125 ml water

Sides:
French fries
Boiled corn
Shallot Sambal
Cherry tomato

Steps:
1. Into the pressure cooker, add water, ginger, garlic, bay leaf, brisket, salt, and stock powder. Cook for 70-80 minutes.
2. Into the blender, add tomatoes, garlic, ginger, and shallots. Blend, then sauté until fragrant.
3. Add ketchup, oyster sauce, BBQ sauce, sweet soy sauce, and water. Stir well, then add the brisket in. Cook for 30 minutes on medium-low heat.
4. Set the brisket aside, then place in the fridge a moment before slicing.
5. Add water, palm sugar, ketchup, and lemon juice into the sauce. Cook for a moment.
6. For the Chimichurri, add garlic, onion, curly red chili, and green Thai chili into the chopper. Chop finely, then transfer to a bowl.
7. Add hot oil, mix well. Blend the parsley, cilantro, lemon juice, salt, sugar, and pepper for a moment, then mix with the chopped chili.
8. Add olive oil. Mix well.
9. Slice the brisket, then grill on a nonstick pan until browned. Wrap in a baking paper.
10. Plate the brisket and sides.
11. Barbecue Brisket is ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses: Resep PALM SUGAR CHEESE COOKIES Renyah & Gurih
recipe_id:
Resep Palm Sugar Cheese Cookies (untuk 145 pcs)

Bahan:
295 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
110 gr gula halus

1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan unsalted butter, tinned butter, garam dan gula halus sambil disaring, mixer hingga pucat dan sedikit mengembang
2. Masukkan kuning telur, mixer hingga tercampur rata kemudian masukkan susu bubuk, maizena dan tepung terigu sambil disaring, aduk dengan spatula hingga rata
3. Tambahkan keju parut, aduk rata kemudian masukkan ke dalam kulkas selama 30 menit 
4. Bentuk bulat dengan berat 5-6 gr atau 1 sdt kemudian balurkan ke dalam gula palem 
5. Susun ke dalam loyang yang sudah di alasi baking paper
6. Panggang di suhu 150 derajat celcius selama 30 menit
7. Palm sugar cheese cookies siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Palm Sugar Cheese Cookies Recipe (yield 145 pcs)

Ingredients:
295 g all-purpose flour
110 g icing sugar
40 g egg yolk
2 g salt
50 g powdered milk
55 g cornstarch
120 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
120 g Anchor Unsalted Butter (room temperature)
120 g Anchor Cheddar Cheese

Others:
100 g palm sugar

Steps:
1. In a bow, combine the unsalted butter, tinned butter, salt, and sifted icing sugar. Mix with a mixer until pale and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks. Mix evenly, then sift in powdered milk, cornstarch, and flour. Mix evenly with a spatula.
3. Add grated cheese. Mix well, then place in the fridge for 30 minutes.
4. Shape the dough into balls, each 5-6 g or 1 tsp. Coat with palm sugar.
5. Arrange the dough on a pan lined with baking paper.
6. Bake at 150°C for 30 minutes.
7. Palm Sugar Cheese Cookies are ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Red Fried Rice Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
650 g white rice

Toppings:
100 g chicken liver, boiled
70 g kekian
5 pc beef meatball
2 pc egg

Sauces:
4 tbsp red tomato sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
1 tbsp Raja Rasa sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
3 drop red food coloring

Others:
1 pc green onion
1 tbsp margarine
8 clove garlic
8 pc shallots
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp MSG

Add-ons:
Cucumber
Lime
Thai Chili Sambal

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic finely. Slice the shallots and green onions.
2. Slice the meatballs, kekian, and chicken liver.
3. Heat some oil. Fry the eggs until fragrant, then add meatballs, kekian, and chicken liver. Cook until lightly browned, then set aside.

5. Add tomato sauce, fish sauce, oyster sauce, Raja Rasa sauce, salt, pepper, and sugar. Stir well.

7. Add the toppings, green onions, and margarine. Stir, then add MSG. Cook for a moment.

garam secukupnya untuk merebus kentang

title: Kuahnya Kental! Resep CAPCAY SAYUR Ala Chinese Resto

air secukupnya

Bahan isian:

75 gr dada ayam filet
75 gr kekian ayam udang, goreng
1 sdt baking powder
2 sdt maizena

Bahan lainnya:

50 gr sawi hijau

11. Tambahkan kuah kaldu, masak beberapa saat lalu masukkan sawi hijau dan daun bawang. Masak selama 3 menit
12. Masukkan isian daging yang sudah di tumis dan kekian yang sudah di potong
13. Masukkan garam, merica, gula pasir, kaldu jamur, kecap asin, kecap ikan, dan larutan maizena, masak hingga sedikit mengental
14. Masukkan minyak wijen, matikan api lalu aduk rata
15. Capcay siap disajikan

title: Praktis, Lembut, Kenyal! Resep FISH CAKE / ODENG / EOMUK (어묵)
recipe_id:
Resep Fish Cake (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan adonan:
200 gr daging ikan tenggiri 
100 gr paha ayam filet
1 siung bawang putih
¼ buah bawang bombai
½ sdt garam
2 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap (opsional)
1 sdm bubuk ikan gabus
½ sdm baking powder
50 gr tepung sagu
150 gr es batu
1 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan kuah:
1.2 liter air 
3 siung bawang putih
1 buah wortel
½ buah bawang bombai
12 buah ikan teri kering
½ sdt bubuk rumput laut
1 sdm gula pasir
2 sdm kecap asin
½ sdm kaldu jamur / penyedap

Cara membuat:
1. Di dalam food processor masukkan ayam, ikan, garam, gula pasir, merica, bubuk ikan gabus, kaldu jamur dan es batu, haluskan hingga lengket
2. Masukkan parutan bawang bombai, bawang putih, baking powder, tepung sagu dan minyak wijen, haluskan hingga menyatu
3. Siapkan wadah kotak anti panas, alasi dengan baking paper. Tuang adonan lalu ratakan
4. Tutup dengan pemberat lalu kukus selama 30-35 menit di api kecil. 
5. Buang bagian perut ikan teri kering, belah dua bawang putih, potong besar bawang bombai dan wortel 
6. Siapkan panci, masukkan bawang bombai, bawang putih dan teri kering, masak tanpa minyak hingga harum lalu tambahkan air, kecap asin dan gula
7. Potong besar wortel lalu masukkan ke dalam panci. Tambahkan bubuk nori, masak selama 15-20 menit di api kecil 
8. Keluarkan fish cake dari kukusan, biarkan dingin lalu potong-potong
9. Goreng fish cake di api sedang besar hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan 
10. Untuk versi kuah rebus fish cake beberapa saat lalu tusuk dengan tusuk sate
11. Home made fish cake siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Fish Cake Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Dough ingredients:
200 g Spanish mackerel fillet
100 g chicken thigh fillet
1 clove garlic
¼ pc onion
½ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG (optional)
1 tbsp snakehead powder
½ tbsp baking powder
50 g sago flour
150 g ice cube
1 tsp sesame oil

Soup ingredients:
1.2 liter water
3 clove garlic
1 pc carrot
½ pc onion
12 pc dried anchovy
½ tsp seaweed powder
1 tbsp sugar
2 tbsp soy sauce
½ tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Steps:
1. In a food processor, add chicken, fish, salt, sugar, pepper, snakehead powder, mushroom powder, and ice cubes. Blend until sticky.
2. Add grated onion and garlic, baking powder, sago flour, and sesame oil. Blend until mixed well.
3. Prepare a heat-proof pan and line it with baking paper. Add the dough and spread evenly.
4. Weigh the top down, then steam for 30-35 minutes on low heat.
5. Remove the gut from the dried anchovy. Halve the garlic, slice the onion and carrot into large pieces.
6. Prepare a pan. Add the onion, garlic, and dried anchovy. Toast without oil until fragrant, then add water, soy sauce, and sugar.
7. Add the sliced carrot into the pan. Add seaweed powder, then cook for 15-20 minutes on low heat.
8. Get the Fish Cake out of the steamer. Let cool, then slice.
9. Fry the Fish Cake on medium-high heat until golden brown. Set aside.
10. For the Soup version, cook the Fish Cake for a moment in the soup, then skewer them.
11. Homemade Fish Cake is ready to serve.

title: Savory and Easy to Make! A Modern Chicken Sempol Recipe

recipe_en:
Chicken Sempol Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh filet
5 pc shallot
2 clove garlic
1 pc green onion, sliced
4 pc curly red chili, sliced
5 pc kaffir lime leaf, sliced
2 pc egg
100 g tapioca flour
40 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
2 tsp chicken powder

Thai dipping sauce ingredients:
3 pc cilantro
4 clove garlic
20 pc green Thai chili
3 tbsp Bangkok Sambal
1 tbsp fish sauce
2-3 tbsp lime juice
2 tbsp water

Steps:
1. Into a food processor, add chicken, salt, pepper, sugar, chicken powder, garlic, and shallots. Blend until sticky.
2. Add eggs, tapioca flour, all-purpose flour, green onions, curly red chili, and lime leaf. Blend again, then transfer the dough into a piping bag.
3. Prepare skewers. Insert half of the skewer through the plastic opening. Squeeze the bag while pulling the skewer out.
4. Boil in simmering water until cooked. Set aside.
5. For the dipping sauce, blend cilantro, green Thai chili, garlic, Bangkok Sambal, and fish sauce. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Add lime juice and water. Mix well.
7. Lightly beat an egg. Dip the Sempol into the egg, then fry until golden brown. Set aside.
8. Sempol is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Spicy Tofu Martabak Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
370 g white tofu
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper
1 pc green onion
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 pc egg
4 tbsp ABC Sambal Asli
2 tbsp oil, for stir-frying

Others:
Spring roll / lumpia skin
ABC Sambal Extra Pedas
Oil, for frying

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic and shallots. Dice the onion and slice the green onions.
2. Heat the oil. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant, then add onions and green onions. Sauté until they wilt, then transfer into a bowl.
3. Add the tofu, then mash it. Season with salt, chicken powder, sugar, pepper, and egg. Mix well.
4. Add ABC Sambal Asli. Mix well.
5. Prepare the spring roll skin. Place the filling on the skin, then fold.
6. Heat the oil. On medium heat, fry the Martabak until golden brown. Set aside.
7. Spicy Tofu Martabak is ready to serve. For added heat, serve it with ABC Sambal Extra Pedas as a dip.

title: Bisa Jadi Ide Jualan! Resep CHICKEN SHRIMP ROLL ala Hokben
recipe_id:
Resep Chicken & Shrimp Roll (untuk 4 porsi)

200 gr paha ayam filet
120 gr udang kupas
3 siung bawang putih
1 sdm bawang goreng
1 butir putih telur
30 ml air
1 sdm maizena
1 sdm minyak ayam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt garam
2 sdt gula pasir
1/8 sdt merica

Bahan kulit:
2 butir telur
1/8 sdt garam

Bahan pelapis basah:
100 ml susu
5 sdm tepung terigu
3 sdm putih telur

Bahan pelapis kering:
tepung roti putih

Pelengkap:
salad ala hokben

Cara membuat:
1. Masukkan bawang putih ke dalam food processor, haluskan kemudian masukkan ayam, udang, bawang goreng, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica dan gula pasir, haluskan hingga lengket
2. Masukkan air, maizena, putih telur dan minyak ayam, haluskan hingga rata
3. Kocok telur dengan sedikit garam lalu masak telur dadar hingga matang
4. Siapkan telur dadar, tuang sebagian adonan lalu ratakan dan gulung
5. Kukus selama 15-20 menit di api sedang. Keluarkan dari kukusan lalu dinginkan dan potong-potong sesuai selera
6. Untuk tepung basah, campurkan putih telur, terigu dan susu, aduk rata
7. Celupkan chicken shrimp roll ke dalam tepung basah kemudian ke dalam tepung roti
8. Goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
recipe_en:
Chicken & Shrimp Roll Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh filet
120 g peeled shrimp
3 clove garlic
1 tbsp fried shallots
1 pc egg white
30 ml water
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp chicken oil
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1/8 tsp pepper

Skin ingredients:
2 pc egg
1/8 tsp salt

Batter ingredients:
100 ml milk
5 tbsp flour
3 tbsp egg white

Coating ingredients:
White breadcrumbs

Add-ons:
Salad ala HokBen

Steps:
1. Add garlic into the food processor. Blend, then add chicken, shrimp, fried shallots, salt, chicken powder, pepper, and sugar. Blend until sticky.
2. Add water, cornstarch, egg white, and chicken oil. Blend evenly.
3. Beat the eggs with a bit of salt, then cook the Omelette.
4. Prepare the Omelette. Spread half of the meat dough evenly, then roll.
5. Steam for 15-20 minutes on medium heat. Set aside to cool down, then slice to your preference.
6. For the batter, mix egg white, flour, and milk evenly.
7. Dip the Chicken & Shrimp Roll into the batter, then coat with breadcrumbs.
8. Fry until golden brown. Set aside.

title: Khas RM Padang: Resep AYAM POP Spesial!
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Pop (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan: 
2 ekor ayam pejantan, buang kulit potong 4 bagian
6 siung bawang putih 
3 lembar daun salam
6 lembar daun jeruk
1 batang serai
4 cm jahe

Bahan lainnya:
1 sdm garam
½ sdm kaldu jamur / penyedap
1/6 sdt merica
50 ml santan
1 liter air kelapa

Bahan sambal:
8 siung bawang merah 
5 siung bawang putih
10 buah cabai keriting merah
1 buah tomat merah
3 buah cabai merah tanjung
1-2 sdt gula pasir
300 ml air ungkepan ayam
150 ml air dingin
1 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
60 ml minyak kelapa

Pelengkap:
150 gr daun singkong
1 sdt baking soda
1 sdm garam
1 sdm gula pasir
air untuk merebus daun singkong
timun
nasi putih

Cara membuat:
1. Iris jahe dan serai, sisihkan. Blender bawang putih dengan sedikit air kelapa hingga halus
2. Siapkan panci, masukkan bawang putih halus, serai, jahe, daun salam, daun jeruk, air kelapa, ayam, santan, garam, kaldu jamur dan merica. Masak di api sedang kecil selama 30 menit
3. Setelah matang, matikan api dan diamkan ayam di dalam panci
4. Potong cabai merah, cabai keriting, bawang merah, bawang putih dan tomat
5. Panaskan minyak kelapa, tumis bawang merah dan bawang putih hingga wangi kemudian masukkan tomat dan cabai merah, masak hingga wangi
6. Tiriskan ayam lalu saring kuah kaldu
7. Masukkan kuah ungkepan ayam ke dalam tumisan sambal. Masak hingga lunak
8. Masukkan ke dalam blender, tambahkan sedikit air dingin, tepung terigu dan gula pasir, blender hingga halus. Masak Kembali beberapa saat
9. Didihkan air, masukkan garam, baking soda, gula pasir dan daun singkong, masak selama 8-10 menit, tiriskan
10. Panaskan minyak kelapa, celup ayam ke dalam minyak hangat beberapa saat, tiriskan

recipe_en:
Ayam Pop Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc rooster, skinned and chopped into 4 pieces
6 clove garlic
3 pc bay leaf
6 pc lime leaf
1 pc lemongrass
4 cm ginger

Others:
1 tbsp salt
½ tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
⅙ tsp pepper
50 ml coconut milk
1 liter coconut water

Sambal ingredients:
8 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
10 pc red curly chili
1 pc red tomato
3 pc large red chili
1-2 tsp sugar
300 ml braising liquid
150 ml cold water
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
60 ml coconut oil

Sides:
150 g cassava leaf
1 tsp baking soda
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
Water, to boil
Cucumber
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the ginger and lemongrass, set aside. Blend the garlic with a little bit of coconut water until smooth.
2. Prepare a pan. Add the blended garlic, lemongrass, ginger, bay leaf, lime leaf, coconut water, chicken, coconut milk, salt, mushroom powder, and pepper. Cook on medium-low heat for 30 minutes.
3. After they’re cooked, turn the heat off and leave the chicken in the pan.
4. Slice the red chili, curly chili, shallots, garlic, and tomato.
5. Heat the coconut oil. Sauté the shallots and garlic until fragrant, then add the tomato and chilis. Cook until fragrant.
6. Remove the chicken, then strain the braising liquid.
7. Add the braising liquid into the chili. Boil until soft.
8. Add the chili mixture into a blender. Add cold water, flour, and sugar. Blend until smooth, then cook again for a moment.
9. Boil some water. Add salt, baking soda, sugar, and cassava leaf. Boil for 8-10 minutes, set aside.
10. Heat the coconut oil. Dip the chicken into the warm oil for a moment. Set aside.
11. Ayam Pop is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Chicken & Shrimp Shumai Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Marinade ingredients:
350 g chicken thigh filet
100 g peeled shrimp
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp baking powder

Others:
Grated garlic + 1 tbsp water
Grated ginger + 1 tbsp water
1 pc egg white
50 ml cold water
2 tsp oyster sauce
2 tsp sesame oil
½ tbsp soy sauce
1-2 tbsp oil
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
Shumai skin, to wrap
Carrot, small-diced

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken and shrimp with baking powder, salt, and sugar. Mix well and marinate for 15-30 minutes.
2. Rinse the chicken and shrimp until the water is clear. Pat dry.
3. Add water into the grated ginger and garlic.
4. Add some of the chicken into the food processor along with salt, sugar, mushroom powder, and pepper. Blend until smooth.
5. Add the ginger and garlic liquid, egg white, oil, soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and tapioca flour.
6. Slice the remaining chicken and shrimp, then add into the food processor. Chop roughly.
7. Transfer the dough into a bowl. Add cold water and mix well.
8. Shape the dough with shumai skin. Steam for 15 minutes.
9. Chicken & Shrimp Shumai is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Kriuk! Resep NASI TUTUG ONCOM KHAS SUNDA
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Tutug Oncom (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan tutug oncom:
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah 
8 cm kencur
2 sdt garam
1 ½ sdm gula pasir
1 sdt penyedap
5 buah cabai merah keriting
360 gr oncom
1 lembar daun salam
1 lembar daun jeruk

Bahan kriuk tutug oncom:
35 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
35 gr maizena
½ sdt baking powder
1 butir telur
50 ml santan
80 ml air
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
⅓ tutug oncom

Pelengkap:
nasi putih + 2/3 tutug oncom
tempe goreng
tahu goreng
sambal tomat
timun
kemangi

Langkah:
1. Potong-potong oncom lalu bakar. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk. Diamkan hingga dingin
2. Di dalam ulekan, masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, kencur, cabai merah keriting dan garam, ulek hingga halus 
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak lalu hancurkan oncom yang sudah dingin
4. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi lalu masukkan oncom, gula pasir, penyedap, daun jeruk dan daun salam, masak di api sedang hingga kering.Sisihkan 
5. Campurkan 2/3 bagian tutug oncom ke dalam nasi panas, aduk rata
6. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, baking powder, telur dan santan. Masukkan air secara perlahan sambil di aduk hingga rata
7. Masukkan sisa tutug oncom, aduk dengan garpu
8. Panaskan minyak, masukkan adonan oncom menggunakan garpu secara perlahan, goreng di api sedang hingga kering, tiriskan
9. Nasi tutug oncom siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Nasi Tutug Oncom Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Tutug Oncom ingredients:
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
8 cm aromatic ginger
2 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
1 tsp MSG
5 pc red curly chili
360 g oncom
1 pc bay leaf
1 pc kaffir lime leaf

Crispy Tutug Oncom ingredients:
35 g all-purpose flour
35 g cornstarch
½ tsp baking powder
1 pc egg
50 ml coconut milk
80 ml water
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder
⅓ tutug oncom

Others:
Rice + 2/3 tutug oncom
Fried Tempeh
Fried Tofu
Tomato Sambal
Cucumber
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. Slice the oncom, then toast it. Place in a bowl and let cool.
2. On a stone bowl, add garlic, shallots, aromatic ginger, red chili, and salt. Mash until smooth.
3. Heat some oil, then crumble the cooled oncom.
4. Sauté the spices until fragrant, then add the oncom, sugar, MSG, lime leaf, and bay leaf. Cook on medium heat until crisp. Set aside.
5. Mix ⅔ of the tutug oncom into hot rice. Mix well.
6. In a bowl, combine flour, cornstarch, chicken powder, salt, baking powder, egg, and coconut milk. Add water in slowly while stirring. Mix well.
7. Add the rest of the tutug oncom. Mix with a fork.
8. Heat the oil. Splatter the batter with a fork into the oil slowly. Fry on medium heat until crispy. Set aside.
9. Nasi Tutug Oncom is ready to serve.

title: Restaurant-Style, Practical Version! Hot Plate Tofu and Chicken Mushroom Recipe

recipe_en:
Tofu Hot Plate with Chicken Mushroom Sauce Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
1-2 pc tube egg tofu
200 g chicken thigh fillet
2 pc egg

Others:
3 clove garlic
½ pc onion
3 pc champignon mushroom
1 pc green onion
200 ml water
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tsp mushroom stock powder
1.5 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp oil

Add-ons:
Rice
Soy sauce + sliced red Thai chili

Steps:
1. Mince the garlic. Dice the onion and mushroom. Roughly mince the thigh fillet, then transfer to a bowl.
2. Into the chicken, add oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, fish sauce, mushroom powder, and cornstarch. Mix well.
3. Heat some oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant, then add mushroom. Cook for a moment.
4. Add the chicken and continue cooking. Add water and cook until the sauce thickens.
5. Slice the tofu, then fry until golden brown. Set the oil aside.
6. Add lightly beaten eggs and Chicken Mushroom Sauce into the tofu. Cook on high heat.
7. Add sesame oil and green onions. Cook for a moment.
8. Tofu Hot Plate with Chicken Mushroom Sauce is ready to serve.

title: 3 Menu Praktis! CUMI BAKAR JIMBARAN, NUGET TEMPE & UDANG PANGGANG KEJU
recipe_id:
Resep Cumi Bakar Bumbu Jimbaran, Nuget Tempe dan Udang Panggang Keju

Bahan cumi bakar jimbaran:
470 gr cumi ukuran besar
80 gr nanas
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica

Bahan bumbu halus jimbaran:
4-5 siung bawang putih
7 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
1 saset terasi
2 sdm minyak
1 sdm air
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm saus tomat
½ sdm saus sambal
1 sdm kecap manis
100 ml air

Pelengkap:
Timun
Sambal dabu-dabu https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PiWZxo6H91U&t=16s&ab_channel=DevinaHermawan
Nasi putih

Bahan udang panggang keju:
9 pcs udang
1 siung bawang putih, iris
⅓ sdt garam
⅓ sdt kaldu jamur
⅛ sdt lada hitam
½ sdm minyak
1 sdm mayones
1-2 sdm keju mozarela parut

Pelengkap:
Nasi putih

Bahan nugget tempe:
145 gr tempe
65 gr wortel
1 batang daun bawang
3 batang seledri kecil
1 butir telur
3 sdm tepung roti putih
1 sdm bawang goreng
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt gula pasir
⅛ sdt merica

Bahan pelapis:
Telur kocok
Tepung roti putih

Pelengkap:
Saus tomat

Langkah:

Cumi Bakar Jimbaran :

1. Bersihkan cumi lalu belah dan tusuk cumi dengan tusukan sate. Sayat sedikit pinggiran cumi dengan gunting 
2. Marinasi cumi dengan nanas parut, garam dan merica, ratakan. Diamkan selama 30 menit
3. Haluskan bumbu halus kemudian tumis hingga wangi. Masukkan saus sambal, saus tiram, saus tomat, air dan kecap manis, masak beberapa saat
4. Lap sedikit cumi dengan tisu lalu panggang selama 5 menit di suhu 200 derajat celcius
5. Oles dengan bumbu jimbaran  lalu lanjut panggang di suhu 200 derajat celcius selama 5-7 menit 
6. Sajikan cumi panggang jimbaran dengan nasi, timun dan sambal dabu-dabu

Udang Panggang Keju

1. Masukkan udang ke dalam cup alumunium foil. Masukkan irisan bawang putih, garam, kaldu jamur, lada hitam dan sedikit minyak, aduk rata. Susun bawang putih di atas udang. Panggang selama 5 menit di suhu 200 derajat celcius
2. Masukkan mayones di atas udang, ratakan lalu tambahkan keju mozarela parut. Panggang di suhu 200 derajat celcius selama 5 menit 
3. Sajikan udang panggang keju dengan nasi 

Nugget Tempe

1. Rebus tempe beberapa saat. Iris daun bawang, seledri dan parut wortel. Pindahkan tempe ke dalam mangkuk kemudian hancurkan dengan garpu
2. Masukkan daun bawang, seledri, wortel, telur  tepung roti, bawang goreng, garam, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir dan merica, aduk rata
3. Bentuk bulat kecil seukuran satu sendok teh. Masukkan ke dalam telur lalu ke dalam tepung roti, bentuk bulat sambil di pipihkan sedikit
4. Masukkan nugget ke dalam air fryer, oles / semprotkan minyak. Panggang di suhu 180 deraiat celcius selama 10-15 menit atau hingga matang
5. Nugget tempe siap disajikan

title: Empuk! Resep SUP IGA SAPI KUAH BENING
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Iga Sapi (untuk 8-10 porsi)

Bahan:
1,5 kg iga sapi
1 sdt garam
3 lembar daun salam
1 liter air
4 cm jahe

Bahan lainnya:
5 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
3 cm jahe
½ sdt lada putih
¾ butir pala
4 butir cengkih
3 butir kapulaga
3,3 liter air
1 ½ sdm garam
1 sdm kaldu jamur / penyedap
1 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu sapi bubuk
1 batang daun bawang, potong
5 batang seledri, potong
1 buah tomat merah

Pelengkap:
2 buah kentang
3 buah wortel
2 sdm bawang goreng
Tomat merah
Sambal rawit hijau
Jeruk nipis

Langkah:
1. Didihkan air, masukan iga sapi, jahe, daun salam, dan garam kedalam presto. Masak di api besar selama 10 menit, lalu kecilkan api masak selama 20 menit. Diamkan daging dalam presto tanpa membuka tutup
2. Geprek bawang putih, jahe, dan bawang merah. Potong besar kentang dan wortel. 
3. Didihkan kembali air di panci yang berbeda. 
4. Masukan iga, bawang putih, jahe, bawang merah dan tomat, cengkih, pala, kapulaga, merica, garam, kaldu jamur, gula pasir, dan kaldu sapi bubuk. 
5. Masukan kentang dan wortel. Masak selama 20 menit
6. Masukkan daun bawang, seledri dan bawang merah goreng ke dalam sup. Masak selama 1-2 menit
7. Sup iga sapi siap disajikan
