recipe_en:
Rice Cooker Chicken Congee Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g rice, rinsed, soaked
1 liter chicken broth
2 pc bone-in chicken thigh
1 pc bay leaf
1 clove garlic
½ tbsp salt, optional
1 tsp mushroom powder, optional
¼ tsp pepper, optional

Topping:
Boiled egg
Green onion
Celery
Fried shallot
Crackers
Emping
Thai chili sambal
Sweet soy sauce

Baby Food Topping:
Steamed carrot
Steamed kabocha

Steps:
1. Add the rice, pounded garlic, salt, bay leaf, and chicken broth to the rice cooker.
2. Remove the skin from the chicken, then add it into the rice cooker. Cook normally.
3. Remove the chicken and bay leaf, then stir the Congee with a balloon whisk until soft.
4. Shred the chicken. Set aside.
5. For the baby food topping, mash the carrot, kabocha, and chicken. Serve the Congee and toppings in the bowl or a plate.
6. If the Congee is too thick, add a little hot water and season to taste. Mix well.
7. Assemble the Congee and toppings in a bowl.
8. Chicken Congee is ready to serve.

title: Fudgy! Resep BROWNIE BITES [Cocok Untuk Hampers]
recipe_id:
Resep Fudgy Brownie Bites (2 loyang ukuran 30 cm x 10 jadi 72 pcs)

Bahan A:
260 gr Marvel Dark Compound Chocolate Buttons
50 gr mentega tawar
50 gr dutch butter / margarin
50 gr minyak

Bahan B:
120 gr dark brown sugar
120 gr gula pasir
200 gr telur
6 gr garam
2 gr espresso
1 sdm air hangat
1 sdm perisa vanila

Bahan C:
100 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
5 gr bubuk cokelat

Bahan D (topping):
50 gr Marvel Chocolate Chips (masing-masing loyang)
Garam laut kasar

Langkah:
1. Panaskan oven di suhu 190 derajat celcius lalu siapkan loyang ukuran 30 cm x 10 cm, oles minyak alasi dengan baking paper 
2. Di dalam wajan, campurkan dutch butter, mentega tawar, dan minyak, lelehkan di api kecil lalu tuang ke dalam Marvel Dark Compound Chocolate Buttons, aduk rata hingga cokelat meleleh
3. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan telur, gula pasir, dark brown sugar, perisa vanila, dan garam
4. Larutkan kopi dengan air hangat lalu gabung ke dalam mangkuk, kocok hingga gula larut sekitar 4-5 menit
5. Masukkan tepung terigu dan bubuk cokelat sambil disaring, aduk sesaat lalu tuang lelehan cokelat, aduk dengan spatula hingga rata
6. Bagi dua adonan lalu tuang ke dalam loyang
7. Taburkan Marvel Chocolate Chips, ratakan lalu taburkan sedikit garam laut
8. Panggang di suhu 190 derajat selama 10 menit lalu turunkan di suhu 180 derajat celcius selama 20 menit
9. Angkat brownies dan tunggu dingin atau hangat kuku kemudian potong kecil menjadi beberapa bagian
10. Susun brownies secara menyamping ke dalam loyang yang telah dialasi baking paper. Panggang Kembali selama 4-5 menit di suhu 180 derajat celcius
11. Keluarkan dari loyang, diamkan hingga dingin
12. Fudgy brownie bites siap dihidangkan

recipe_en:
Fudgy Brownie Bites Recipe (2 pans size 30 cm x 10 cm yield 72 pcs)

Ingredients A:
260 g Marvel Dark Compound Chocolate Buttons
50 g unsalted butter
50 g dutch butter / margarine
50 g oil

Ingredients B:
120 g dark brown sugar
120 g white sugar
200 g egg
6 g salt
2 g espresso powder
1 tbsp warm water
1 tbsp vanilla extract

Ingredients C:
100 g all-purpose flour
5 g cocoa powder

Ingredients D (topping):
50 g Marvel Chocolate Chips (for each pan)
Coarse sea salt

Step:
1. Pre-heat the oven at 190°C. Brush a 30 cm x 10 cm baking pan with oil and line with baking paper.
2. In a pan, combine dutch butter, unsalted butter, and oil. Melt on low heat, then pour into Marvel Dark Compound Chocolate Buttons. Stir until the chocolate melts.
3. In a bowl, combine eggs, white sugar, dark brown sugar, vanilla extract, and salt.
4. Mix the espresso powder with warm water, then add to the bowl. Mix until the sugar is dissolved, about 4-5 minutes.
5. Sift in flour and cocoa powder. Mix, then add melted chocolate. Mix evenly with a spatula.
6. Divide the batter into two pans evenly.
7. Sprinkle Marvel Chocolate Chips evenly, then sprinkle a bit of sea salt.
8. Bake at 190°C for 10 minutes. Lower it to 180°C and bake for 20 minutes.
9. Pull the brownies out of the oven. Wait for it to cool down or until lukewarm, then slice into several pieces.
10. Arrange brownies sideways on a pan lined with baking paper. Bake it again for 4-5 minutes at 180°C.
11. Get the brownies out of the pan and let cool.
12. Fudgy Brownie Bites are ready to serve.

title: Iftar & Sahur Menu! HONEY BUTTER FRIED CHICKEN Recipe [Honey Butter Chicken]

3. Potong besar wortel, kabocha, buncis, cabai merah, dan bawang bombai, sisihkan

recipe_en:
Honey Butter Chicken Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
450 g chicken thigh filet
3 clove garlic
8 tbsp potato starch
1 tsp lime juice
½ tsp chicken powder
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 pc egg

Add-ons:
½ pc onion
100 g green kabocha
3 pc red chili
50 g green beans

Sauce ingredients:
1-2 tbsp honey
1-2 tbsp Anchor Salted Butter
⅓ tsp chicken powder

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then slice into cubes. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Add lime juice, chicken powder, soy sauce, minced garlic, egg, and potato starch. Mix well.
3. Slice carrots, kabocha, green beans, chili, and onion into large pieces. Set aside.
4. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken until golden brown. Set aside.
5. In the same pan, fry the veggies for 1-2 minutes. Set aside.
6. Transfer the chicken and veggies into a bowl, then add Anchor Salted Butter, honey, and chicken powder. Mix well.
7. Honey Butter Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Resep NASI BAKSO BAKAR [Praktis Untuk Sahur]
recipe_id:

½ buah bawang bombai

Bahan bumbu bakar:

1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm margarin
1 sdm saus sambal, opsional
2 siung bawang putih, haluskan

Pelengkap:

1 batang daun bawang, iris
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt lada hitam

nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Di dalam wadah tahan panas campurkan bawang putih yang telah halus, kecap manis, saus tiram, saus sambal, dan margarin, aduk rata
2. Iris bawang bombai lalu masukkan ke dalam bumbu bakar beserta bakso sapi, aduk rata
3. Masukkan ke dalam air fryer, panggang di suhu 190 derajat celcius selama 10 menit. Aduk bakso di tengah memanggang
4. Untuk versi kedua, tusukkan bawang bombai yang dipotong kotak dan bakso sapi lalu oles dengan bumbu bakar
5. Panggang di suhu 190 derajat celcius selama 10 menit, oles dengan bumbu bakar di tengah memanggang
6. Panaskan minyak tumis daun bawang hingga wangi lalu masukkan telur
7. Tambahkan garam dan lada hitam, masak hingga setengah matang atau sesuai selera

recipe_en:
Grilled Meatball Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
15 pc beef meatball
½ pc onion

Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp chili sauce, optional
2 clove garlic, minced

Others:
2 pc egg
1 pc green onion, sliced
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
1 tbsp oil
Rice

Steps:
1. In a heatproof bowl, combine minced garlic, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, chili sauce, and margarine. Mix well.
2. Slice the onion. Add into the sauce with the meatballs. Mix well.
3. Place in the air fryer. Grill at 190°C for 10 minutes. Halfway through, give it a stir.
4. For the second version, skewer onion that’s been sliced into squares and meatballs. Brush with the sauce.
5. Grill at 190°C for 10 minutes. Halfway through, brush more sauce on.
6. Heat the oil. Sauté the green onions until fragrant, then add the eggs.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Cook until over-easy or to your preference.
8. Grilled Meatball Rice is ready to serve.

title: Lumer Di Mulut! Resep VOLCANO SUSHI [Praktis Pakai Premium Sosis Salmon]
recipe_id:
Resep Volcano Sushi (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan nasi sushi:
375 ml beras
450 ml air

Bahan cuka sushi:
3 sdm cuka beras
2 sdm air panas
2 sdm gula pasir
⅓ sdt garam

Bahan katsu sosis salmon:
Cedea Premium Sosis Salmon
1 butir telur
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
¼ sdt garam
⅛ sdt merica
Tepung roti putih
Timun kyuri
Tepung terigu protein sedang untuk pelapis

Topping volcano:
Cedea Premium Sosis Salmon
½ buah bawang bombai
1 batang daun bawang
5 buah cabai rawit merah
2 sdm mentega tawar
1 sdm minyak

Bahan saus volcano:

Nori sushi
Wijen sangrai
Tobiko

Langkah:
1. Cuci bersih beras lalu rendam dengan air selama 30 menit kemudian masak dengan rice cooker hingga matang
2. Campurkan air panas dan gula pasir, aduk hingga larut lalu masukkan cuka dan garam, aduk rata
3. Belah dua Cedea Premium Sosis Salmon lalu di dalam mangkuk kocok telur dengan garam, merica, dan tepung terigu, aduk rata
4. Balurkan Cedea Premium Sosis Salmon ke dalam tepung terigu lalu ke dalam campuran telur kemudian ke dalam tepung roti

13. Masukkan nasi sushi, ratakan dan taburkan wijen kemudian balikkan

15. Potong-potong sushi, beri topping dan saus volcano di atasnya kemudian torch. Masukkan topping tobiko di atas sushi
16. Volcano sushi siap disajikan

title: EMPUK SEHARIAN! Resep KUE KLEPON: Lembut, Kenyal, Lumer Di Mulut [Takjil]
recipe_id:
Resep lengkapnya bisa kamu dapatkan di buku kumpulan resepku, yang bisa kamu dapatkan GRATIS di Cookpad: 
https://go.cookpad.cc/BukuTakjilDevina

Resep Klepon (45 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
200 gr tepung beras ketan
50 gr tepung beras
250 ml air
30 gr gula pasir
⅛ sdt perisa pandan
1 tetes pewarna kuning, opsional
1 tetes pewarna merah, opsional

Bahan isian:
150 gr gula merah

Bahan lainnya:
250 gr kelapa parut
½ sdt garam
2 lembar daun pandan

Langkah:

1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan kelapa parut dengan garam, aduk rata. Pindahkan ke dalam loyang tahan panas lalu masukkan daun pandan di atasnya. Kukus selama 15-20 menit. Angkat dan pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Parut gula merah lalu bentuk bulat kecil kurang lebih 3-4 gram
3. Di dalam wajan campurkan air, tepung beras, gula pasir, perisa pandan, sedikit pewarna kuning, dan pewarna merah, aduk rata lalu masak hingga mengental
4. Masukkan adonan yang telah dimasak ke dalam tepung beras ketan lalu aduk hingga rata dan menyatu
5. Bentuk memanjang adonan lalu potong-potong kurang lebih 12-15 gram per satu pcs klepon
6. Didihkan air lalu bentuk klepon seperti mangkuk kemudian isi dengan gula merah, bentuk bulat
7. Rebus klepon di api sedang kecil hingga mengapung dan matang, tiriskan
8. Balurkan klepon ke dalam kelapa parut
9. Klepon siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Klepon Recipe (yield 45 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
200 g glutinous rice flour
50 g rice flour
250 ml water
30 g sugar
⅛ tsp pandan extract
1 drop yellow food coloring, optional
1 drop red food coloring, optional

Filling ingredient:
150 g palm sugar

Others:
250 g grated coconut
½ tsp salt
2 pc pandan leaf

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine grated coconut with salt. Mix well. Transfer to a heat-proof bowl and place pandan leaves on top. Steam for 15-20 minutes. Set aside and transfer to a bowl.
2. Grate the palm sugar. Shape it into balls, about 3-4 grams each.
3. In a pan, combine water, rice flour, sugar, pandan extract, a bit of yellow food coloring and red food coloring. Mix well, then cook until thickens.
4. Add the cooked dough into glutinous rice flour, then mix well until it’s smooth.
5. Shape the dough into a long cylinder. Slice to 12-15 grams per piece.
6. Heat water in a pan. Shape the dough into a bowl and fill it with palm sugar. Shape it again into balls.
7. Boil the Klepon on medium-low heat until it floats. Once it’s cooked, set aside.
8. Coat the Klepon with grated coconut.
9. Klepon is ready to serve.

title: Fresh and Savory! Coconut Milkshake Recipe, Mr. Coconut Singapore Style [Takjil]
recipe_id:
Resep Coconut Milkshake (untuk 3 porsi)

400 ml air kelapa muda beku
150 gr es krim kelapa kopyor
150 ml air Dugan Wong Coco
150 gr Dugan Wong Coco

Topping:
150 gr Dugan Wong Coco

Langkah:

2. Pindahkan ke dalam gelas lalu beri topping Dugan Wong Coco di atasnya

recipe_en:
Coconut Milkshake Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:

150 ml liquid from Wong Coco’s Dugan
150 g Wong Coco’s Dugan

title: Favorit Anak-Anak! Resep BROKOLI SAUS TIRAM & TIM TELUR
recipe_id:
Resep Brokoli Saus Tiram & Tim Telur (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan tim telur:
2 butir telur
200 ml air
¼ sdt garam

Bahan tumisan:
2 bonggol brokoli
1 sdm garam
800 ml air
½ buah bawang bombai
5 siung bawang putih
2 sdm minyak

Bahan saus:
2 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
350 ml air
2-3 sdm maizena

Langkah:
1. Campurkan air, telur dan garam, kocok lepas lalu pindahkan ke dalam wadah tahan panas sambil disaring
2. Tutup dengan alumunium foil lalu kukus selama 20-30 menit di api sedang kecil
3. Potong besar-besar brokoli lalu kupas bagian luar batang brokoli, potong
4. Cuci bersih brokoli lalu rendam dengan air dan garam selama 5 menit kemudian bilas 
5. Iris bawang bombai dan cincang bawang putih
6. Untuk saus, campurkan air, saus tiram, kecap asin, gula pasir, kaldu ayam dan maizena, aduk rata 
7. Rebus brokoli hingga matang, tiriskan
8. Panaskan minyak, goreng bawang putih hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan
9. Di dalam wajan yang sama, tumis bawang bombai dan brokoli, aduk rata kemudian tuang saus, masak beberapa saat hingga mengental 
10. Tuang tumisan di atas tim telur lalu taburkan bawang putih goreng di atasnya
11. Brokoli saus tiram tim telur siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Broccoli with Oyster Sauce & Steamed Egg (yield 5-6 servings)

Steamed Egg ingredients:
2 pc egg
200 ml water
¼ tsp salt

Stir-fry ingredients:
2 pc broccoli
1 tbsp salt
800 ml water
½ pc onion
5 clove garlic
2 tbsp oil

Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
350 ml water
2-3 tbsp cornstarch

Steps:
1. Mix water, eggs, and salt. Loosely beat the eggs, then strain into a heat-proof bowl.
2. Cover the bowl with aluminum foil. Steam for 20-30 minutes on medium-low heat.
3. Slice the broccoli into large florets. Peel the stem and slice the core.
4. Wash the broccoli, then soak it with water and salt for 5 minutes. Rinse it.
5. Slice the onion and mince the garlic.
6. For the Sauce, mix water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sugar, chicken powder, and cornstarch.
7. Boil the broccoli and set aside.
8. Heat the oil. Fry the garlic until a bit yellowed. Set aside.
9. In the same pan, stir-fry the onion and broccoli. Add the sauce in, stir, and cook for a moment until the sauce thickens.
10. Pour the Broccoli Stir-Fry on top of the Steamed Egg. Sprinkle Fried Garlic on top.
11. Broccoli with Oyster Sauce & Steamed Egg is ready to serve.

title: Lembut Aromatik! Resep IKAN STEAM BAWANG PUTIH
recipe_id:
Resep Ikan Steam Bawang Putih (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
300 gr ikan dori filet
20 gr sohun kering, rendam air
1 jempol jahe
1 batang daun bawang

Bahan bawang putih goreng:
15 siung bawang putih
50 ml minyak
⅛ sdt garam
¼ sdt kaldu jamur
⅛ sdt merica

Bahan saus:
2 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt gula pasir
150 ml air panas
¼ sdt kaldu jamur

Lainnya:
Daun ketumbar
Daun bawang

Langkah:
1. Iris tipis miring daun bawang untuk garnish lalu potong besar-besar daun bawang lainnya
2. Petik daun ketumbar lalu masukkan daun ketumbar dan daun bawang untuk garnish ke dalam air es
3. Blender kasar bawang putih lalu panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih, garam, kaldu jamur  dan merica, masak hingga sedikit kuning, tiriskan
4. Siapkan piring anti panas lalu susun soun, daun bawang dan jahe 
5. Keringkan dori lalu potong-potong dan susun ke dalam piring. Kukus selama 7 menit
6. Untuk saus, campurkan air panas dengan gula pasir, kecap asin, saus tiram dan kaldu jamur, aduk rata
7. Taburkan bawang putih goreng di atas ikan dan tuang sebagian saus, kukus kembali selama 3 menit
8. Susun daun bawang dan daun ketumbar di atas ikan lalu siram dengan minyak panas 
9. Ikan steam bawang putih siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Garlic Steamed Fish Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g dory filet
20 g dry glass noodles, soaked
1 thumb ginger
1 pc green onion

Fried Garlic ingredients:
15 clove garlic
50 ml oil
⅛ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom powder
⅛ tsp pepper

Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sugar
150 ml hot water
¼ tsp mushroom powder

Others:
Cilantro
Green onion

Steps:
1. Slice the green onions diagonally for garnish. Slice the other green onions into large pieces.
2. Pick the cilantro leaves. Add the cilantro and green onions into cold water for garnish.
3. Chop the garlic. Heat the oil and cook the garlic with salt, mushroom powder, and pepper until yellowish. Set aside.
4. Prepare a heat-proof plate. Place the glass noodles, green onions, and ginger on it.
5. Pat dry and slice the dory. Place the fish on the plate and steam for 7 minutes.
6. For the sauce, combine hot water with sugar, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and mushroom powder. Mix well.
7. Sprinkle fried garlic on top of the fish and pour some of the sauce. Steam again for 3 minutes.
8. Place the green onions and cilantro on top of the fish, then pour hot oil on top.
9. Garlic Steamed Fish is ready to serve.

title: Spesial TANPA Arak Masak! Resep KOREAN BBQ : Galbi [Bisa Pakai Ayam]
recipe_id:
Resep Korean Beef Galbi (untuk 8-9 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg beef short ribs (galbi)
300 gr saus galbi
 
Bahan saus galbi:
200 gr buah pir century
120 gr bawang bombai
5 cm jahe
8 siung bawang putih
80 ml kecap asin
2 sdm kecap ikan
30 gr gula palem
2 sdm madu
1 sdt lada hitam bubuk
100 ml air
 
Saus cocolan I (ssamjang):
1 batang daun bawang
3 siung bawang putih ukuran kecil
35 gr gochujang
50 gr miso Korea
1½  sdm minyak wijen
2 sdt cuka beras
2 sdt gula pasir
 
Saus cocolan II (korean sweet sour dipping sauce/ cho ganjang):
½ buah bawang bombai
5 buah cabai rawit merah
3 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm cuka beras
2 sdm gula palem
200 ml air
 
Pelengkap:
Kabocha (labu jepang)
Selada hijau
Bawang putih, belah dua
Nasi jepang / nasi putih
Kimchi

Langkah:
1. Potong pir, bawang bombai, iris tipis jahe dan bawang putih lalu masukkan ke dalam blender
2. Masukkan kecap asin, kecap ikan, gula palem, madu, lada hitam, dan air, blender hingga halus lalu campurkan sebagian ke dalam daging. Diamkan minimal 1 jam
3. Masak sisa saus galbi hingga matang untuk disimpan sebagai stock
4. Untuk cocolan ssamjang, cincang halus daun bawang kemudian masukkan ke dalam mangkuk
5. Masukkan bawang putih halus, gochujang, miso korea, minyak wijen, cuka beras, dan gula pasir, aduk hingga rata
6. Untuk cocolan kedua, iris tipis bawang bombai dan cabai rawit. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan cuka, kecap asin, gula palem, air, bawang bombai, dan cabai rawit, aduk rata
7. Panaskan panggangan, beri sedikit minyak lalu panggang daging hingga matang di kedua sisi
8. Masak daging bersamaan dengan kabocha dan bawang putih lalu gunting-gunting daging
9. Galbi siap disajikan dengan saus cocolan dan pelengkap lainnya
recipe_en:
Korean Beef Galbi Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg beef short ribs (galbi)
300 g galbi sauce
 
Galbi Sauce ingredients:
200 g Century pear
120 g onion
5 cm ginger
8 clove garlic
80 ml soy sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
30 g palm sugar
2 tbsp honey
1 tsp black pepper powder
100 ml water
 
Dipping Sauce I (Ssamjang):
1 pc green onion
3 clove garlic, small
35 g gochujang
50 gr doenjang (Korean miso)
1½ tbsp sesame oil
2 tsp rice vinegar
2 tsp sugar
 
Dipping Sauce II (Korean Sweet Sour Dipping Sauce / Cho Ganjang):
½ pc onion
5 pc red Thai chili
3 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp rice vinegar
2 tbsp palm sugar
200 ml water
 
Add-ons:
Kabocha (Japanese pumpkin)
Lettuce
Garlic, halved
Japanese rice / white rice
Kimchi

Steps:
1. Slice the pear and onion. Slice the ginger and garlic thinly, then add into the blender.
2. Add soy sauce, fish sauce, palm sugar, honey, black pepper, and water. Blend until smooth, then mix some of it with the meat. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
3. Cook the rest of the galbi sauce to store in the fridge.
4. For the Ssamjang Dip, mince the garlic finely and place in a bowl.
5. Combine the garlic with gochujang, Korean miso, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and sugar. Mix well.
6. For the second dip, slice the onion and Thai chili thinly. In a bowl, combine vinegar, soy sauce, palm sugar, water, onion, and Thai chili. Mix well.
7. Heat the grill. Add some oil, then grill the meat until cooked on both sides.
8. Grill the meat with kabocha and garlic, then cut the meat.
9. Galbi is ready to serve with the dipping sauces and add-ons.

title: Favorit! Resep NASI KATSU AYAM KOREA [Chicken Mushroom Donkkaseu]
recipe_id:
Resep Chicken Mushroom Donkkaseu (untuk 3-6 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr dada ayam filet
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 buah jeruk nipis
¼ sdt merica

Bahan tepung kering:
Tepung terigu protein sedang
Tepung roti putih

Bahan tepung basah:
2 butir telur
2 sdm susu
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica

Bahan saus:
20 buah jamur champignon
3 sdm mentega
2 sdm minyak
½ buah bawang bombai
3 siung bawang putih
3 sdm serbuk demi glace
1 sdm saus tomat
½ sdm kecap inggris
400-500 ml air
½ sdt gula pasir

Pelengkap:
3 lembar kol
5 sdm mayones
2 sdm saus tomat
Nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam lalu belah dua menjadi butterfly. Taburkan kaldu ayam, garam, dan merica dan perasan jeruk nipis di semua sisi, ratakan
2. Tutup dengan cling wrap lalu pukul-pukul dengan rolling pin atau benda tumpul lainnya
3. Taburkan sedikit tepung terigu di semua sisi ayam, ratakan
4. Di dalam mangkuk, kocok telur, susu, garam, dan merica. Masukkan ayam ke dalam telur lalu ke dalam tepung roti, ratakan
5. Cincang bawang putih, iris bawang bombai dan jamur
6. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang bombai hingga wangi lalu masukkan jamur dan bawang putih, tumis sesaat
7. Kecilkan api, masukkan mentega dan serbuk demi glace, masak sesaat lalu masukkan air secara perlahan sambal diaduk
8. Masukkan saus tomat, kecap inggris, dan gula pasir, masak di api sedang kecil hingga menyatu
9. Untuk salad, iris kol lalu masukkan ke dalam air es. Campurkan mayones dengan saus tomat, aduk rata
10. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam di api sedang besar hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
11. Chicken mushroom donkkaseu siap disajikan

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @WINNGAS
Instagram: https://instagram.com/winngas/
Website: https://winngas.com/
Tokopedia: https://tokopedia.com/winn-gas
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/winngas
recipe_en:
Chicken Mushroom Donkkaseu Recipe (yield 3-6 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g chicken breast filet
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
1 pc lime
¼ tsp pepper

Dry Coat ingredients:
All-purpose flour
White breadcrumbs

Batter ingredients:
2 pc egg
2 tbsp milk
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Sauce ingredients:
20 pc champignon
3 tbsp butter
2 tbsp oil
½ pc onion
3 clove garlic
3 tbsp demi-glace powder
1 tbsp ketchup
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
400-500 ml water
½ tsp sugar

Add-ons:
3 pc cabbage leaf
5 tbsp mayonnaise
2 tbsp ketchup
Rice

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then butterfly it. Sprinkle it with chicken powder, salt, pepper, and lime juice on all sides evenly.
2. Cover it with plastic wrap, then pound the chicken with a rolling pin or other blunt object.
3. Sprinkle all sides with a bit of flour evenly.
4. In a bowl, mix eggs, milk, salt, and pepper. Dip the chicken into the batter, than coat it with breadcrumbs evenly.
5. Mince the garlic. Slice the onion and mushroom.
6. Heat the oil. Sauté the onion until fragrant, then add mushroom and garlic. Sauté for a moment.
7. Lower the heat. Add butter and demi-glace powder. Cook for a moment, then add water slowly while stirring.
8. Add ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, and sugar. Cook on low heat until the sauce comes together.
9. For the Salad, slice the cabbage and soak it in cold water. Mix the mayo with ketchup.
10. Heat the oil and fry the chicken on medium-high heat until golden brown. Set aside.
11. Chicken Mushroom Donkkaseu is ready to serve.

title: Lengkap Berbagai Tekstur! Resep SUP BAKSO AYAM SAYURAN [Yong Tau Foo]
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Bakso Ayam Sayuran/ Yong Tau Foo (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan adonan bakso ayam:
400 gr dada ayam filet
2 sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
2 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
1 butir putih telur
2 sdt baking powder
100 gr tahu putih
2 sdm bawang merah goreng
1 siung bawang putih
50 gr maizena / tepung sagu / tepung tapioka
80-100 ml air dingin Le Minerale
1 sdm kecap ikan, opsional
¼ sdt merica

Bahan kaldu ayam:
300 gr tulang rongkong ayam, rebus 5 menit
3 liter air Le Minerale
2 sdt garam
⅛ sdt merica
1 sdm gula pasir
2 sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap

Pelengkap:
Tahu pong, belah
Paprika merah, potong & buang biji
Pare, potong, rendam dengan air garam, rebus
Terong ungu
Brokoli, potong, rebus
Kulit kembang tahu
Garlic oil (https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4) 
Daun bawang cung
Sambal rawit merah
Jeruk nipis

Langkah:
1. Didihkan air lalu masukkan tulang rongkong. Rebus selama 1 jam di api kecil kemudian tambahkan garam, merica, gula pasir, dan kaldu jamur, aduk rata
2. Di dalam food processor masukkan dada ayam, garam, kaldu jamur, gula pasir, merica, bawang putih, dan bawang merah goreng, haluskan hingga lengket
3. Masukkan tahu putih, putih telur, baking powder, kecap ikan, maizena, dan air es, haluskan hingga tercampur rata lalu masukkan sebagian adonan ke dalam piping bag
4. Isi tahu pong dengan adonan dan semprotkan adonan di tengah kulit tahu, lipat lalu pipihkan kemudian goreng di api sedang kecil hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan
5. Potong miring terong, belah bagian tengah lalu isi dengan adonan, goreng di api sedang kecil hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
6. Isi paprika, pare, dan brokoli dengan adonan lalu ratakan dengan bantuan air. Rebus di api sedang kecil beberapa saat hingga matang, tiriskan
7. Susun pelengkap di dalam mangkuk lalu tuang kuah, daun bawang cung, dan garlic oil
8. Sup bakso ayam sayuran siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Chicken Meatball Veggie Soup / Yong Tau Foo Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Chicken Meatball Dough ingredients:
400 g chicken breast filet
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
2 tsp stock powder / MSG
1 pc egg white
2 tsp baking powder
100 g white tofu
2 tbsp fried shallot
1 clove garlic
50 g cornstarch / sago flour / tapioca flour
80-100 ml Le Minerale cold water
1 tbsp fish sauce, optional
¼ tsp pepper

Chicken Broth ingredients:
300 g chicken carcass, boiled for 5 minutes
3 liter Le Minerale water
2 tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
2 tsp mushroom stock / MSG

Add-ons:
Tofu puffs, sliced
Red bell pepper, sliced & deseeded
Bitter melon, sliced, soaked in salt water, boiled
Purple eggplant
Broccoli, sliced, boiled
Tofu skin
Garlic oil (https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4) 
Spring onion
Red Thai Chili Sambal
Lime

Steps:
1. Boil water, then add the carcass in. Boil for 1 hour on low heat, then add salt, pepper, sugar, and mushroom stock. Stir.
2. In a food processor, add chicken breast filet, salt, mushroom stock, sugar, pepper, garlic, and fried shallots. Blend until sticky.
3. Add white tofu, egg whites, baking powder, fish sauce, cornstarch, and cold water. Blend until smooth, then add some of the dough into a piping bag.
4. Fill the tofu puffs with the dough. Pipe the dough on the tofu skin, then fold and flatten. Next, fry everything on medium-low heat until lightly browned. Set aside.
5. Slice the eggplant diagonally. Make a slit and fill it with the dough. Fry on medium-low heat until browned. Set aside.
6. Fill the bell pepper, bitter melon, and broccoli with the dough. Smooth out the dough with water. Boil on medium-low heat for a moment until cooked. Set aside.
7. Assemble the add-ons in a bowl, then pour the broth in. Add spring onions and garlic oil.
8. Chicken Meatball Veggie Soup is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Kaldunya Berasa! Resep SUP AYAM AIR KELAPA [Chinese Coconut Chicken Soup]
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Ayam Kelapa (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan:
1 ekor ayam kampung @900gr
2 sdm garam untuk marinasi
3 buah jamur shitake
120 gr jamur shimeji putih
1 jempol jahe
40 gr kim cam (bunga sedap malam)
1 sdt lada putih butir, sangrai
1 sdt lada hitam butir, sangrai
500 ml Hydro Coco
1 liter air
½ sdt garam, opsional

Saus cocolan:
3 siung bawang putih
10 buah cabai rawit hijau
4 sdm kecap asin

Pelengkap:
Nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Potong-potong kecil ayam lalu marinasi dengan garam, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 10 menit  lalu bilas
2. Iris jahe, jamur shitake, shimeji dan ikat bunga sedap malam, bilas bunga sedap malam dengan air lalu peras
3. Didihkan air di dalam panci kemudian masukkan Hydro Coco, ayam, jahe, jamur shitake, jamur shimeji, bunga sedap malam, lada hitam, dan lada putih, masak di api kecil selama 1 jam
4. Untuk cocolan, iris bawang putih dan cabai rawit hijau lalu campurkan ke dalam kecap asin, aduk rata
5. Sup ayam kelapa siap disajikan

Website: https://hydrococo.com/ 
Tokopedia: https://tokopedia.com/kalbenutritionals/

recipe_en:
Coconut Chicken Soup Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc free-range chicken @900g
2 tbsp salt, to marinate
3 pc Shiitake mushroom
120 g white Shimeji mushroom
1 thumb ginger
40 g kim cam (tuberose flower)
1 tsp whole white pepper, toasted
1 tsp whole black pepper, toasted
500 ml Hydro Coco
1 liter water
½ tsp salt, optional

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
3 clove garlic
10 pc green Thai chili
4 tbsp soy sauce

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken into small pieces. Marinate it with salt for 10 minutes, then rinse.
2. Slice the ginger, Shiitake, and Shimeji. Tie the tuberose flower into knots, then rinse it and squeeze the water out.
3. Bring water to a boil, then add Hydro Coco into the pan. Add chicken, ginger, Shiitake, Shimeji, tuberose flower, black pepper, and white pepper. Cook on low heat for 1 hour.
4. For the dipping sauce, slice the garlic and green Thai chili, then mix them into the soy sauce.
5. Coconut Chicken Soup is ready to serve.

title: Renyah! Resep LUMPIA GORENG ISI AYAM SAYUR (Spring Roll)
recipe_id:
Resep Spring Roll (20 pcs)

Bahan marinasi: 
250 gr paha ayam filet
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm gula palem
½ sdt kaldu jamur
1 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan lainnya:
2 sdm Anchor Unsalted Butter
1 sdm minyak
2 batang daun bawang
150 gr wortel
150 gr lobak
100 gr jamur kuping
2 sdt kecap ikan
¼ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
Sambal bangkok
Head lettuce
Kulit spring roll untuk membungkus

Langkah:
1. Iris wortel, lobak, jamur kuping, dan daun bawang
2. Didihkan air, rebus lobak dan wortel dengan sedikit garam selama 3-5 menit, tiriskan
3. Iris tipis ayam kemudian marinasi dengan kecap asin, saus tiram, gula palem, kaldu jamur, dan minyak wijen, aduk rata
4. Panaskan Anchor Unsalted Butter dan minyak kemudian tumis ayam, masak sesaat
5. Masukkan daun bawang, masak hingga wangi lalu masukkan jamur kuping, kecap ikan, dan merica, tumis sesaat
6. Matikan api lalu masukkan wortel dan lobak, aduk rata. Dinginkan 
7. Bungkus isian dengan kulit spring roll lalu goreng hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
8. Spring roll siap disajikan 

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @ANCHOR_INDONESIA
Instagram: https://instagram.com/anchor_indonesia/
Tokopedia: https://www.tokopedia.com/fonterraoff...
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/fonterra.official
Lazada: https://www.lazada.co.id/shop/lazada-...
recipe_en:
Spring Roll Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Marinade ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh filet
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp palm sugar
½ tsp mushroom powder
1 tsp sesame oil

Others:
2 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
1 tbsp oil
2 pc green onion
150 g carrot
150 g turnip
100 g wood ear mushroom
2 tsp fish sauce
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
Bangkok Sambal
Head lettuce
Spring roll skin to wrap

Steps:
1. Slice the carrot, turnip, wood ear mushroom, and green onions.
2. Boil water. Cook the carrot and turnip with a bit of salt for 3-5 minutes. Set aside.
3. Slice the chicken thinly, then marinate it with soy sauce, oyster sauce, palm sugar, mushroom powder, and sesame oil. Mix well.
4. Heat Anchor Unsalted Butter and oil. Stir-fry the chicken for a moment.
5. Add green onions and cook until fragrant. Then, add wood ear mushroom, fish sauce, and pepper. Cook for a moment.
6. Turn the heat off, then add the carrot and turnip. Mix well and let cool.
7. Wrap the filling with the spring roll skin, then fry until golden brown. Set aside.
8. Spring Roll is ready to serve.

title: Juicy Meresap Sampai Dalam! Resep AYAM PANGGANG MADU Khas Resto Chinese
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Panggang Madu (untuk 7-8 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 ekor ayam negeri (berat 1,2 kg)
1 buah jeruk nipis
5 siung bawang putih
1 jempol jahe
2 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm gula palem
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt merica
½ sdt bubuk ngohiong
1 sdm minyak wijen
¼ sdt pewarna makanan merah (opsional)

Bahan olesan:
4 sdm madu
1 sdt minyak wijen
2 sdt kecap asin

Langkah:
1. Iris besar jahe dan bawang putih
2. Di dalam mangkuk, marinasi ayam dengan perasan jeruk nipis, bawang putih, jahe, kecap asin, saus tiram, gula palem, merica, kaldu ayam bubuk, bubuk ngohiong, minyak wijen, dan sedikit pewarna merah, aduk rata
3. Tutup dengan cling wrap sambal di tekan-tekan lalu diamkan di kulkas semalaman 
4. Keringkan ayam lalu tusukan tongkat rotisserie lalu jepitkan penjepit hingga kencang
5. Ikat bagian paha ayam dengan tali lalu masukkan ke dalam panggangan. Panggang selama 60 menit. Untuk api bawah memakai api besar untuk api atas pakai api kecil atau jika menggunakan oven di suhu 180 derajat celcius
6. Untuk saus cocolan, campurkan madu, minyak wijen, dan kecap asin, aduk rata
7. Setelah 40 menit, oles ayam dengan olesan lalu panggang kembali 
8. Sebelum dipotong diistirahatkan ayam selama 15 menit 
9. Ayam panggang madu siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Honey Roasted Chicken Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 pc broiler (1.2 kg)
1 pc lime
5 clove garlic
1 thumb ginger
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp palm sugar
1 tbsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp sesame oil
¼ tsp red food coloring (optional)

Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp honey
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp soy sauce

Steps:
1. Slice the ginger and garlic into large pieces.
2. In a bowl, marinate the chicken with lime juice, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, oyster sauce, palm sugar, pepper, chicken powder, five-spice powder, sesame oil, and a bit of red food coloring. Mix well.
3. Cover it with plastic wrap and press it down. Marinate overnight in the fridge.
4. Pat the chicken dry, then pierce it with the rotisserie stick. Clip the chicken tightly.
5. Tie the thighs together with a twine, then roast it for 60 minutes. Use high heat at the bottom and low heat at the top. If you use an oven, set it to 180°C.
6. For the Sauce, combine honey, sesame oil, and soy sauce. Mix well.
7. After 40 minutes, brush the chicken with the sauce. Roast it again.
8. Before carving, rest the chicken for 15 minutes.
9. Honey Roasted Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Resep KUOTIE AYAM: Praktis Bisa Kukus Atau Panggang!
recipe_id:
Resep Kuotie Ayam (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
200 gr paha ayam giling
½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap
2 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt kecap asin
1 sdt saus tiram
½ sdt kecap ikan
¼ sdt minyak wijen
100 gr sawi putih
50 gr kucai
1 sdm air jahe
25 gr sohun kering
2 sdt maizena

Bahan cocolan:
1 jempol jahe
2 siung bawang putih cincang halus
2 sdm cuka hitam
2 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm saus sambal

Lainnya:
Kulit siomay (https://youtu.be/MxkTHBTS3L0)

Langkah:
1. Rendam sohun dengan air. Diamkan beberapa saat
2. Potong kecil sawi putih kemudian tumis hingga layu 
3. Iris kucai dan potong-potong sohun
4. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan ayam giling, kecap asin, saus tiram, kecap ikan, kaldu ayam bubuk, kaldu jamur, gula pasir, merica, minyak wijen, air jahe, dan maizena, aduk rata
5. Masukkan sawi putih, kucai, dan sohun, aduk rata
6. Basahi pinggiran kulit dengan air. Masukkan 1 sdm isian ke dalam kulit lalu lipat-lipat di satu sisi. Ulangi hingga habis 
7. Kukus sebagian kuotie selama 7-8 menit  
8. Untuk sisa nya, panaskan wajan susun kuotie lalu masukkan air dan sedikit minyak. Masak di api sedang hingga menyusut
9. Untuk cocolan, iris tipis jahe kemudian campurkan cuka hitam dan kecap asin. Masukkan jahe ke dalam campuran kecap asin
10. Campurkan bawang putih dan saus sambal, aduk rata
11. Kuotie ayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Guotie Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g minced chicken thigh
½ tbsp chicken powder
½ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp oyster sauce
½ tsp fish sauce
¼ tsp sesame oil
100 g Chinese cabbage
50 g chives
1 tbsp ginger extract
25 g dry glass noodles
2 tsp cornstarch

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
1 thumb ginger
2 clove garlic, chopped finely
2 tbsp black vinegar
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp chili sauce

Others:
Shumai wrapper (https://youtu.be/MxkTHBTS3L0)

Steps:
1. Soak the glass noodles in water for a moment.
2. Slice the Chinese cabbage into small pieces, then stir-fry until it wilts.
3. Slice the chives and glass noodles.
4. In a bowl, combine the minced chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, chicken powder, mushroom powder, sugar, pepper, sesame oil, ginger extract, and cornstarch. Mix well.
5. Add the cabbage, chives, and glass noodles. Mix well.
6. Wet the edges of the skin with water. Add 1 tbsp of filling on the skin, then fold it close. Repeat until all the filling is finished.
7. Steam some of the Guotie for 7-8 minutes.
8. Pan-fry the rest by placing the Guotie on a hot pan, then add water and a bit of oil. Cook on medium heat until the water evaporates.
9. For the dipping sauce, slice the ginger thinly. Mix black vinegar with soy sauce, then add the ginger in.
10. Mix the garlic with chili sauce.
11. Chicken Guotie is ready to serve.

title: Renyah Empuk! Resep AYAM GORENG PEDAS [Nashville Chicken]
recipe_id:
Resep Nashville Chicken (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
500 gr dada ayam filet
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
⅓ sdt garam
⅓ sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdm bawang putih bubuk
½ sdm cabai bubuk / bubuk paprika asap
2 sdt Tabasco Original

Bahan tepung kering:
300 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
2 sdt baking powder
3 sdm maizena
1 sdt garam
1 sdt merica

Bahan tepung basah:
2 butir telur
100 ml susu
2 sdm campuran tepung kering
1 sdt paprika bubuk, opsional

Bahan minyak pedas:
1 sdm paprika bubuk
1 sdt cabai rawit bubuk
1 sdt bawang putih bubuk
2 sdt kaldu jamur
2 sdt gula palem
150 ml minyak panas
2 sdt Tabasco Original

Pelengkap:
Roti tawar potongan tebal
Pickled gherkins

Langkah:
1. Potong miring ayam kemudian sayat-sayat 
2. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, marinasi dengan garam, merica, kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, bawang putih bubuk, cabai bubuk, dan Tabasco Original, aduk rata
3. Tutup dengan cling wrap, diamkan minimal 2 jam atau di dalam kulkas semalaman
4. Untuk tepung kering, campurkan terigu, maizena, garam, merica, dan baking powder, aduk rata
5. Untuk tepung basah, campurkan telur, susu, dan campuran tepung kering, aduk rata
6. Tambahkan paprika bubuk, aduk rata
7. Panaskan minyak, lalu balurkan ayam ke dalam tepung kering, tepung basah lalu tepung kering. Goreng di api sedang besar hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
8. Untuk minyak pedas, di dalam mangkuk campurkan paprika bubuk, rawit bubuk, kaldu jamur, bawang putih bubuk, gula palem, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan minyak panas, aduk rata
9. Tambahkan Tabasco Original, aduk rata
10. Celupkan ayam ke dalam minyak pedas hingga rata
11. Nashville chicken siap disajikan dengan roti panggang dan pickled gherkins sebagai pelengkap
recipe_en:
Nashville Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken breast filet
2 tsp chicken powder
⅓ tsp salt
⅓ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
½ tbsp garlic powder
½ tbsp chili powder / smoked paprika powder
2 tsp Tabasco Original

Dry Coat ingredients:
300 g all-purpose powder
2 tsp baking powder
3 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper

Batter ingredients:
2 pc egg
100 ml milk
2 tbsp dry coat
1 tsp paprika powder, optional

Spicy Oil ingredients:
1 tbsp paprika powder
1 tsp chili powder
1 tsp garlic powder
2 tsp mushroom powder
2 tsp palm sugar
150 ml hot oil
2 tsp Tabasco Original

Add-ons:
Thick toast
Pickled gherkins

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into strips, then score it.
2. Place the chicken in a bowl, then marinate it with salt, pepper, chicken powder, sugar, garlic powder, chili powder, and Tabasco Original. Mix well.
3. Cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight in the fridge.
4. For the dry coat, combine flour, cornstarch, salt, pepper, and baking powder. Mix well.
5. For the batter, combine eggs, milk, and some of the dry coat. Mix well.
6. Add paprika powder. Mix well.
7. Heat the oil. Dip the chicken into the dry coat, then the batter, then the dry coat. Fry on medium-high heat until golden brown. Set aside.
8. For the Spicy Oil, combine paprika powder, chili powder, mushroom powder, garlic powder, and palm sugar in a bowl. Mix well, then pour hot oil into the bowl and stir.
9. Add Tabasco Original. Mix well.
10. Dip the chicken into the Spicy Oil to coat it evenly.
11. Nashville Chicken is ready to serve with toast and pickled gherkins.

title: Praktis Menu Tahun Baru! Resep SOSIS KARI ALA JERMAN [Currywürst]
recipe_id:
Resep Currywürst (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
Sosis Sapi

Bahan saus:
1 buah bawang bombai ukuran kecil
3 sdm minyak
2 sdm bubuk kari
200 ml saus tomat
1 sdm jus apel
2 sdt kecap inggris
1 sdt air perasan lemon
100 ml air
½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan kol ala Bavarian:
½ buah kol
4 sdm minyak
½ sdt jintan utuh
2 sdm mentega tawar 
2 sdt air perasan lemon
150 ml air
⅓ sdt garam
⅛ sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir

Pelengkap:
Kentang goreng

Langkah:
1. Cincang halus bawang bombai, panaskan minyak tumis hingga wangi
2. Masukkan bubuk kari dan saus tomat, aduk sesaat lalu masukkan jus apel, saus sambal, kecap inggris, perasan lemon, air, dan kaldu ayam bubuk, masak sesaat, sisihkan
3. Panaskan minyak, masukkan jintan, tumis sesaat hingga wangi kemudian masukkan kol yang telah diiris, masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan
4. Masukkan air, garam, merica, gula pasir, mentega, dan air perasan lemon, masak hingga matang
5. Sayat-sayat Bernardi Sosis Sapi kemudian panaskan sedikit minyak, masak sosis hingga kecokelatan dan matang, tiriskan kemudian potong-potong
6. Susun kentang goreng, sosis, kol, dan siram dengan saus kari di atas nya
7. Sosis kari ala jerman siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Currywürst Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
Beef sausage

Sauce ingredients:
1 pc onion, small
3 tbsp oil
2 tbsp curry powder
200 ml ketchup
1 tbsp apple juice
2 tsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp lemon juice
100 ml water
½ tsp chicken powder

Bavarian Cabbage ingredients:
½ pc cabbage
4 tbsp oil
½ tsp whole cumin
2 tbsp unsalted butter
2 tsp lemon juice
150 ml water
⅓ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
French fries

Steps:
1. Finely chop the onion. Heat the oil and sauté until fragrant.
2. Add curry powder and ketchup. Stir, then add apple juice, chili sauce, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, water, and chicken powder. Cook for a moment, then set aside.
3. Heat the oil. Add cumin and stir-fry for a moment until fragrant. Then, add sliced cabbage and cook until lightly browned.
4. Add water, salt, pepper, sugar, butter, and lemon juice. Cook well.
5. Score the Bernardi Beef Sausage. Heat some oil and pan-fry the sausage until browned and cooked. Set aside, then slice.
6. Assemble the French Fries, sausage, and cabbage. Pour the Curry Sauce on top.
7. Currywürst is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Meresap Sampai Dalam! Resep AYAM BAKAR BUMBU KACANG
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Bakar Bumbu Kacang (untuk 8-9 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
700 gr paha ayam filet
½ sdm bubuk kunyit
1 sdm bubuk bawang putih
1 sdt bubuk paprika (opsional)
1 sdt garam
½ sdt merica
1 sdt gula pasir
¾ sdt penyedap / kaldu bubuk
2 sdm santan

Bahan bumbu kacang:
75 gr kacang tanah
75 gr kacang mede
3 siung bawang putih
4 siung bawang merah
30 gr gula merah
4 lembar daun jeruk
1 sdm kecap manis
2 sdm santan
3 cm kencur (opsional)
10 buah cabai merah keriting (opsional)
500 ml air
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap

Pelengkap:
Timun kyuri
Jeruk limau
Cabai rawit merah
Nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan kunyit bubuk, bawang putih bubuk, paprika bubuk, garam, merica, gula pasir,  penyedap, dan santan, aduk rata. Diamkan minimal satu jam di suhu ruang
2. Blender kacang mede dan kacang tanah hingga halus, sisihkan lalu blender bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai merah keriting, kencur, dan sedikit minyak
3. Tumis bumbu halus dan kacang hingga wangi lalu masukkan air, kecap manis, gula merah, santan, garam, kaldu jamur, dan daun jeruk, masak di api kecil  hingga mengental, sisihkan
4. Panggang ayam yang telah di marinasi hingga matang
5. Rebus cabai rawit hingga empuk, tiriskan
6. Ayam bakar siap disajikan dengan pelengkap
recipe_en:
Grilled Chicken with Peanut Sauce Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
700 g chicken thigh fillet
½ tbsp turmeric powder
1 tbsp garlic powder
1 tsp paprika powder (optional)
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp sugar
¾ tsp MSG / stock powder
2 tbsp coconut milk

Peanut Sauce ingredients:
75 g peanut
75 g cashew
3 clove garlic
4 pc shallot
30 g palm sugar
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp coconut milk
3 cm aromatic ginger (optional)
10 pc curly red chili (optional)
500 ml water
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom powder / MSG

Add-ons:
Japanese cucumber
Kaffir lime
Red Thai chili
Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with turmeric powder, garlic powder, paprika powder, salt, pepper, sugar, MSG, and coconut milk. Mix well. Marinate at least 1 hour at room temperature.
2. Finely ground the cashew and peanut. Set aside, then blend the garlic, shallots, curly red chili, and aromatic ginger with a bit of oil.
3. Sauté the blended spices and the ground nuts until fragrant. Then, add water, sweet soy sauce, palm sugar, coconut milk, salt, mushroom powder, and lime leaf. Cook on low heat until thickened. Set aside.
4. Grill the marinated chicken.
5. Boil the Thai chili until soft. Set aside.
6. Grilled Chicken is ready to serve with the add-ons.

title: Resep AYAM ‘PANGGANG’ RICE COOKER [Cajun Chicken Rice]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam ‘Panggang’ Rice Cooker (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
700 gr ayam paha atas
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdm paprika bubuk
2 sdt bawang putih bubuk
½ sdm oregano kering
½ sdm thyme kering

Bahan nasi:
380 gr Beras Premium Fortune
500 gr air
½ sdt kunyit bubuk

Bahan tumis:
½ buah bawang bombai
½ buah paprika merah
2 sdm kismis
50 gr smoked beef
1 sdm mentega tawar
⅓ sdt garam
⅓ sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap
¼ sdt merica

Bahan salsa tomat:
3 buah tomat merah
⅓ buah bawang bombai ukuran kecil
1 siung bawang putih
2 sdm daun ketumbar
3 sdm air jeruk nipis
4 buah cabai rawit merah
1 sdm Minyak Goreng Fortune
½ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir

Langkah:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan garam,kaldu ayam bubuk, gula pasir, paprika bubuk, bawang putih bubuk, oregano kering, dan thyme, aduk rata. Diamkan di kulkas semalaman
2. Cuci bersih Beras Premium Fortune lalu masukkan kunyit bubuk
3. Didihkan air, masukkan ke dalam beras beserta ayam yang telah di marinasi. Masak di dalam rice cooker hingga matang
4. Pisahkan tomat dengan biji lalu masukkan bawang bombai, bawang putih, dan cabai rawit ke dalam food processor, haluskan
5. Masukkan tomat, haluskan kembali. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk dan tambahkan garam, gula pasir, perasan jeruk nipis, Minyak Goreng Fortune, dan daun ketumbar
6. Potong kotak paprika, bawang bombai dan smoked beef
7. Keluarkan ayam dari rice cooker kemudian panaskan sedikit Minyak Goreng Fortune, goreng ayam sesaat, tiriskan
8. Sisihkan sebagian minyak lalu tumis paprika merah, bawang bombai, smoked beef, garam, kaldu bubuk, merica, kismis, dan mentega, masak sesaat
9. Masukkan tumisan ke dalam nasi, aduk rata 

Yuk cek Instagram @FORTUNECERMAT
Instagram: https://instagram.com/fortunecermat
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/Fortune-Cooking-Oil-Pouch-2-L-i.65323877.6057939507
Blibli: https://www.blibli.com/cari/Fortune?shipment=blibli
JD.ID: https://www.jd.id/product/fortune-cooking-oil-pouch-1l_10009879/100014842.html
recipe_en:
Cajun Chicken Rice Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
700 g chicken thigh
2 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
½ tbsp paprika powder
2 tsp garlic powder
½ tbsp dried oregano
½ tbsp dried thyme

Rice ingredients:
380 g Fortune Premium Rice Grains
500 g water
½ tsp turmeric powder

Stir-Fry ingredients:
½ pc onion
½ pc red bell pepper
2 tbsp raisin
50 g smoked beef
1 tbsp unsalted butter
⅓ tsp salt
⅓ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Tomato Salsa ingredients:
3 pc red tomato
⅓ pc onion, small
1 clove garlic
2 tbsp cilantro
3 tbsp lime juice
4 pc red Thai chili
1 tbsp Fortune Oil
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with salt, chicken powder, sugar, paprika powder, garlic powder, dried oregano, and dried thyme. Mix well and marinate overnight in the fridge.
2. Rinse Fortune Premium Rice Grains, then add turmeric powder.
3. Boil the water and pour it into the rice. Place the marinated chicken on top and cook in the rice cooker.
4. Deseed the tomatoes. Blend the onion, garlic, and Thai chili with a food processor.
5. Add the tomatoes in and blend again. Transfer to a bowl, then add salt, sugar, lime juice, Fortune Oil, and cilantro.
6. Dice the bell pepper, onion, and smoked beef.
7. Remove the chicken from the rice cooker. Heat a little bit of Fortune oil and pan-sear the chicken. Set aside.
8. Set aside some of the oil, then stir-fry the red bell pepper, onion, smoked beef, salt, stock powder, pepper, raisins, and butter. Cook for a moment.
8. Add the stir-fry into the rice and mix well.
9. Cajun Chicken Rice is ready to serve.

title: Family Favorite! BUTTER CAKE Recipe [Specially Using New Zealand Butter]
recipe_id:
Resep Butter Cake (untuk 8-9 porsi)

Bahan kering:
140 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
15 gr maizena
20 gr susu bubuk
½ sdt baking powder

Bahan kuning telur:
150 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter
120 gr Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
130 gr gula pasir
6 butir kuning telur
30 ml minyak
40 gr kental manis
1 sdt perisa vanila

Bahan putih telur:
4 butir putih telur
50 gr gula pasir
½ sdt cream of tartar
⅛ sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Blender gula pasir hingga halus kemudian di dalam mangkuk masukkan Anchor Unsalted Butter dan Anchor Tinned Salted Butter yang sudah suhu ruang, kocok beberapa saat hingga mengembang
2. Masukkan gula, kocok kembali lalu masukkan kuning telur secara perlahan, kocok kembali
3. Masukkan kental manis, perisa vanila, dan minyak, kocok sesaat
4. Masukkan baking powder, susu bubuk, maizena, dan tepung terigu sambil disaring, kocok hingga menyatu di kecepatan rendah
5. Kocok putih telur hingga berbusa kemudian masukkan setengah gula pasir, cream of tartar, dan garam, kocok kembali
6. Masukkan sisa gula pasir, kocok hingga membentuk paruh burung
7. Masukkan sedikit demi sedikit adonan putih telur ke dalam adonan kuning telur, aduk perlahan dengan spatula
8. Oles loyang dengan mentega lalu tuang adonan. Panggang di suhu 175 derajat celcius selama 50 menit. Turunkan suhu menjadi 150 derajat celcius di 15 menit terakhir
9. Keluarkan cake dari loyang, tunggu hingga dingin kemudian potong-potong

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @ANCHOR_INDONESIA
Instagram: https://instagram.com/anchor_indonesia/
Tokopedia: https://www.tokopedia.com/fonterraoff...
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/fonterra.official
Lazada: https://www.lazada.co.id/shop/lazada-...
recipe_en:
Butter Cake Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Dry ingredients:
140 g cake flour
15 g cornstarch
20 g milk powder
½ tsp baking powder

Egg Yolk Batter ingredients:
150 g Anchor Unsalted Butter
120 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
130 g sugar
6 pc egg yolk
30 ml oil
40 g condensed milk
1 tsp vanilla extract

Meringue ingredients:
4 pc egg white
50 g sugar
½ tsp cream of tartar
⅛ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Blend the sugar until finely ground. In a bowl, add room-temp Anchor Unsalted Butter and Anchor Tinned Salted Butter. Beat until fluffy.
2. Add sugar. Beat the mixture again, then add the egg yolks in slowly while mixing.
3. Add condensed milk, vanilla extract, and oil. Mix for a moment.
4. Sift in baking powder, milk powder, cornstarch, and cake flour. Mix on low speed until the batter comes together.
5. Beat the egg whites until frothy, then add half of the sugar, cream of tartar, and salt. Mix again.
6. Add the rest of the sugar and mix until the bird-beak stage.
7. Add the meringue bit by bit into the yolk batter. Fold in gently with a spatula.
8. Rub the pan with butter, then pour the batter in. Bake at 175°C for 50 minutes. At the last 15 minutes, lower the heat to 150°C.
9. Remove the cake out of the pan. Wait until it cools down before slicing.
10. Butter Cake is ready to serve.

title: Creamy Gurih! Resep ZUPPA SOUP AYAM [CHICKEN POT PIE]
recipe_id:
Resep Chicken Pot Pie (untuk 9 pcs)

Bahan kaldu ayam:
500 gr ayam paha bawah
2 buah wortel
2 batang seledri ukuran besar
2 lembar bay leaf
3 siung bawang putih
1 liter air
¼ sdt lada hitam

Bahan lainnya:
6 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
4 sdm mentega tawar
200 ml cooking cream

⅛ sdt merica

Bahan isian:

150 gr sosis ayam

Pelengkap:
Puff pastry
Telur untuk olesan
Wijen putih

2. Potong kotak bawang bombai, chicken luncheon dan sosis
3. Keluarkan wortel dari panci kemudian potong kotak-kotak
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang bombai hingga wangi kemudian masukkan chicken luncheon, dan sosis, tumis sesaat
5. Masukkan mentega, tepung terigu, dan pala bubuk, aduk sesaat lalu masukkan kuah kaldu sambil disaring
6. Suwir ayam, potong-potong lalu masukkan ke dalam kuah

recipe_en:
Chicken Pot Pie Recipe (yield 9 pcs)

Chicken Stock ingredients:
500 g drumstick
2 pc carrot
2 pc celery, large
2 pc bay leaf
3 clove garlic
1 L water
¼ tsp black pepper

Others:
6 tbsp all-purpose flour
4 tbsp unsalted butter
200 ml cooking cream
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder
⅛ tsp pepper
⅛ tsp nutmeg powder
550 ml chicken stock

Filling ingredients:
½ pc onion, large
150 g chicken sausage
195 g chicken luncheon
100 g peas

Add-ons:
Puff pastry
Egg for egg wash
White sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Boil the water. Add chicken, carrot, garlic, bay leaf, celery, and black pepper. Bring to a boil, then continue cooking on low heat for 15 minutes.
2. Dice the onion, chicken luncheon, and sausage.
3. Remove the carrot from the saucepan, then dice.
4. Heat some oil. Sautè the onion until fragrant, then add chicken luncheon and sausage. Cook for a moment.
5. Add butter, flour, and nutmeg powder. Cook for a moment, then strain in the stock.
6. Shred the chicken. Slice, then add into the soup.
7. Add carrot, peas, salt, sugar, pepper, chicken powder, and cooking cream. Cook for a moment.
8. Pour the soup into heat-proof cups, then slice the puff pastry into 4 pieces. Place on top of the cups.
9. Brush the puff pastry with egg and sprinkle sesame seeds on top. Bake on 190°C for 15 minutes.
10. Chicken Pot Pie is ready to serve.

Resep Galantin Ayam (untuk 8-9 porsi)

Bahan marinasi basah:
1 kg paha ayam filet dengan kulit
3 sdm gula pasir
1,5 sdm garam
1 sdt merica
900 ml air
2 sdm kecap asin

Bahan galantine paste:
350 gr paha ayam filet
1 sdt Royco Kaldu Ayam
1 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm Royco Saus Tiram
½ sdm bawang putih goreng
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
1 lembar roti tawar
1 butir telur
60 gr smoked beef
80 gr hati ayam, rebus
80 gr ampela, rebus
4 butir telur rebus
65 gr wortel rebus
75 gr buncis rebus

Bahan saus:
3 sdm mentega tawar
2 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
2 batang rosemary
1 buah bawang bombai
3 sdm Royco Saus Tiram
1 sdt Royco Kaldu Ayam
3 sdm saus tomat
2 sdm kecap asin
½ sdm kecap inggris
4 sdm air kaldu kukusan ayam
600 ml air
2 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
Wortel rebus
Brokoli rebus
Kentang goreng

Bahan mustard jawa:
1 butir kuning telur
1 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
150 ml air
1 sdm margarin
1,5 sdm mustard
1 sdt cuka beras
2 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Campurkan air, garam, gula pasir, merica, dan kecap asin, aduk hingga larut kemudian tuang ke dalam ayam. Diamkan semalaman di dalam kulkas
2. Masukkan ayam, telur, bawang merah goreng, bawang putih goreng, gula pasir, merica, Royco Kaldu Ayam, Royco Saus Tiram, dan roti tawar ke dalam food processor, haluskan hingga halus dan lengket
3. Potong kotak buncis, wortel, smoked beef, hati, dan ampela
4. Keringkan ayam yang sudah di brine, ratakan ayam yang bentuknya kurang beraturan dengan pisau
5. Potong kotak sisa ayam lalu masukkan ke dalam mangkuk 
6. Masukkan  buncis, wortel, smoked beef, hati ampela, dan adonan yang telah dihaluskan, aduk rata secara perlahan
7. Siapkan alumunium foil, susun ayam yang sudah ditrim lalu masukkan adonan galantin , ratakan 
8. Susun telur rebus di atas adonan kemudian gulung perlahan. Rapatkan bagian kanan dan kiri. Kukus selama 60 menit 
9. Untuk saus, iris bawang bombai lalu tumis hingga kecokelatan 
10. Masukkan mentega, terigu dan rosemary, aduk rata lalu tambahkan kecap asin, kecap inggris, saus tomat, Royco Saus Tiram, air, Royco Kaldu Ayam, gula pasir, dan merica, masak sesaat hingga wangi
11. Sisihkan rosemary, blender saus hingga halus kemudian didihkan kembali
12. Keluarkan galantin dari kukusan, buka bungkus aluminium foil kemudian tuang tetesan kaldu ayam ke dalam saus
13. Oles galantin dengan saus kemudian panggang di suhu 220 derajat celcius selama 10 menit. Oleskan saus di tengah memanggang
14. Untuk mustard jawa, masak margarin dan tepung terigu, aduk rata kemudian masukkan air, kuning telur, mustard, cuka beras, gula pasir, dan garam, masak sesaat, sisihkan 
15. Galantin ayam siap disajikan dengan pelengkap

recipe_en:
Eggplant Omelette Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g purple eggplant
7 pc shallot
7 pc red Thai chili
3 pc egg
⅓ tsp salt
⅓ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
⅛ tsp pepper

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. Peel the eggplant. Halve and slice it, then soak it in water for a moment.
2. Slice the shallots and Thai chili into thick pieces.
3. Heat the oil. Fry the eggplant until half-cooked, then add the shallots. Fry for a moment and set aside.
4. In a bowl, add eggs, salt, mushroom powder, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Add Thai chili and eggplant. Stir.
6. Heat the oil. Cook the Omelette.
7. Eggplant Omelette is ready to serve.

title: Lembut Manis! Resep ROTI KLEPON CINNAMON ROLL [Tanpa Mixer]
recipe_id:
Resep Klepon Cinnamon Roll (12 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
370 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
30 gr gula pasir
30 gr brown palem
3 gr garam
50 gr mentega cair
7 gr ragi
90 ml susu cair
90 ml jus pandan pekat
1 butir telur
1 sdt perisa vanila

Bahan isian unti kelapa:
160 gr kelapa parut
50 ml air
140 gr gula merah
1 lembar daun pandan
⅛ sdt garam

Bahan isian lainnya:
75 gr mentega
¼ sdt bubuk kayu manis
30 gr gula merah, sisir

Bahan glaze pandan:
130 gr gula halus
3 sdm mentega cair
3 sdm susu
½ sdt perisa vanila
2 tetes perisa pandan
⅛ sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan, masak jus pandan dan susu hingga hangat kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk. Tambahkan perisa pandan bila perlu
2. Masukkan gula pasir dan gula palem, aduk rata lalu masukkan ragi, aduk rata. Tutup, diamkan hingga mengembang sekitar 5 menit.
3. Masukkan telur, mentega cair, garam, dan perisa vanila, aduk rata kemudian masukkan tepung terigu, aduk dengan sumpit hingga tercampur rata.
4. Pindahkan adonan ke dalam talenan lalu uleni selama 5-8 menit dengan tangan. Masukkan ke dalam mangkuk, tutup dengan cling wrap. Diamkan selama 1 jam.
5. Untuk unti kelapa, masak gula merah, air, dan daun pandan hingga larut kemudian masukkan kelapa parut dan garam, masak hingga air menyusut.
6. Untuk glaze, saring gula halus kemudian masukkan mentega cair dan susu, aduk rata.
7. Masukkan perisa vanila dan perisa pandan, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan garam, aduk kembali
8. Kempiskan adonan, bentuk bulat kemudian belah tengah menjadi empat bagian sambil di buka membentuk persegi 
9. Taburkan sedikit tepung terigu kemudian pipihkan membentuk persegi panjang hingga ketebalan sekitar 4 mm
10. Campurkan mentega dengan kayu manis bubuk, aduk rata.
11. Oleskan campuran mentega sambil di ratakan lalu masukkan sedikit demi sedikit unti kelapa di semua sisi sambil di ratakan.
12. Taburkan gula merah di semua sisi lalu gulung secara perlahan.
13. Bagi menjadi 12 bagian dengan benang jahit , kemudian susun ke dalam loyang kaca yang telah diolesi mentega / baking paper. Diamkan kembali selama 45 menit.
14. Panggang klepon cinnamon roll di suhu 180 derajat celcius selama 30-35 menit.
15. Setelah cinnamon roll dingin, tuang glaze di atasnya.
16. Klepon cinnamon roll siap disajikan

Resep Nasi Krawu (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan:
1,2 kg sapi sengkel
2 liter air

Bahan bumbu halus:
10 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih

5 cm lengkuas, iris
3 cm kunyit, bakar
2 sdt ketumbar butir, sangrai

½ sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap

3 sdm santan kental

½ sdt garam

2 sdm gula merah

Pelengkap:
Sambal terasi
Nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Presto daging selama 1.5 jam, tiriskan 
2. Blender bawang putih, bawang merah, kunyit, dan sedikit minyak lalu tumis hingga wangi
3. Masukkan daun jeruk, kelapa parut, gula merah, garam, dan kaldu jamur, masak di api kecil hingga kering. Sisihkan setengah serundeng
4. Blender cabai merah keriting hingga halus kemudian tuang ke dalam sisa serundeng, masak kembali hingga kering, sisihkan
5. Blender lengkuas, jahe, kemiri, bawang putih, bawang merah, kunyit, ketumbar, minyak, dan air hingga halus
6. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi lalu masukkan serai dan daun salam, tumis hingga wangi
7. Tambahkan air kaldu, daging, santan, asam jawa, garam, merica, kaldu jamur, kaldu sapi bubuk, gula pasir, dan Bango Kecap Manis, masak selama 15-20 menit hingga meresap
8. Tekan-tekan daging hingga hancur 
9. Nasi krawu siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Nasi Krawu Recipe (yield 10 servings)

Ingredients:
1.2 kg beef shank
2 L water

Blended Spices ingredients:
10 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
4 pc candlenut, pounded
5 cm galangal, sliced
3 cm turmeric, roasted
2 tsp coriander seed, toasted
4 cm ginger, sliced
50 ml oil
30 ml water

Others:
3 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded and sliced
1 tsp beef powder
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
1 tbsp sugar
4 tbsp Bango Sweet Soy Sauce
3 tbsp thick coconut milk
1 tsp tamarind
800 ml beef broth

Serundeng ingredients:
170 g grated coconut
3 cm turmeric
2 clove garlic
3 pc shallot
4 pc curly red chili, boiled
5 pc lime leaf
½ tsp salt
½ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
2 tbsp palm sugar

Add-ons:
Shrimp Paste Sambal
Rice

Steps:
1. Pressure-cook the meat for 1.5 hours. Set aside.
2. Blend the garlic, shallots, and turmeric with a bit of oil. Cook until fragrant.
3. Add lime leaves, grated coconut, palm sugar, salt, and mushroom powder. Cook on low heat until dry. Set aside half of the Serundeng.
4. Blend the curly red chili until smooth, then add into the remaining Serunding. Cook again until dry and set aside.
5. Blend the galangal, ginger, candlenuts, garlic, shallots, turmeric, and coriander seeds with oil and water until smooth.
6. Cook the blended spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass and bay leaf. Cook until fragrant.
7. Add the broth, meat, coconut milk, tamarind, salt, pepper, mushroom powder, beef powder, sugar, and Bango Sweet Soy Sauce. Cook for 15-20 minutes until flavorful.
8. Press the meat down until it disintegrates.
9. Nasi Krawu is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Renyah! Resep UDANG GORENG BIHUN

recipe_en:
Vermicelli-Wrapped Shrimp Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
16 pc shrimp, peeled with tail intact
125 g vermicelli

Batter ingredients:
2 pc egg
1 tbsp chicken powder
6 tbsp all-purpose flour

Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tbsp chili sauce
3 pc red Thai chili
½ tsp lime juice
1 tsp sesame oil

Steps:
1. Boil water, then pour it into the vermicelli. Soak for 10 minutes.
2. Mince the Thai chili, then add into the mayonnaise.
3. Add lime juice, chili sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well.
4. Combine flour, chicken powder, and eggs. Mix well.
5. Slit the bottom of the shrimp. Straighten the shrimp, then dip into the batter.
6. Strain the vermicelli, then cut it. Add 4 tbsp of batter and mix well.
7. Coat the shrimp with the vermicelli evenly.
8. Heat the oil. Fry the shrimp until golden brown. Set aside.
9. Vermicelli-Wrapped Shrimp is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Steamed Ginger Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
750 g whole chicken thigh
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp stock powder / MSG
1 tsp sugar
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch

Others:
40 g / 8 cm ginger

Scallion Oil:
4 pc scallion
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
3 tbsp oil
1 tsp sesame oil

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then chop into several pieces.
2. Marinate the chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt, stock powder, sugar, pepper, and cornstarch. Mix well, then marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Slice the scallions. Place in a bowl, then season with salt and mushroom powder.
4. Heat the oil. Pour the hot oil into the scallions, then add sesame oil. Mix well.
5. Slice the ginger. Place the chicken on stainless or heat-proof plates. Divide into 2 plates, then place the ginger on top. Steam for 25-30 minutes.
6. Steamed Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Dijamin Keluarga Suka! Resep SOHUN AYAM CLAYPOT

recipe_en:
Claypot Glass Noodles Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g glass noodles
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 pc green onion
5 slice ginger
3 tbsp oil
300 ml water
1 tsp chicken powder

Other ingredients:
180 g ground chicken
1 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tsp soy sauce
1.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp cornstarch
¼ tsp black pepper

Add-ons (optional):
Sliced Thai chili + soy sauce

Steps:
1. Soak the glass noodles for 2-3 minutes. Set aside.
2. Marinate the chicken with oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, sesame oil, cornstarch, and black pepper. Mix well.
3. Pound the garlic. Slice the shallots, green onions, and ginger.
4. Heat the oil. Add the ginger, shallots, and the white part of green onions. Stir.
5. Add the garlic in. Cook until fragrant, then add the chicken and cook for a moment.
6. Add water and chicken powder. Bring to a boil.
7. Add green onions and glass noodles. Cook for a moment until everything is absorbed.
8. Claypot Glass Noodles are ready to serve.

title: Resep SAYAP AYAM GORENG SAUS VIETNAM [Garlic Pepper Wings] : Gurih & Nagih!
recipe_id:
Resep Garlic Pepper Wings (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 kg sayap ayam, potong 2 bagian
1 sdm minyak wijen
1 buah jeruk nipis
1 sdt garam
1 sdm kaldu bubuk / penyedap
½ sdt merica

Bahan ungkepan:
80 gr bawang putih dengan kulit ukuran kecil
2 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm kecap ikan
1 sdt lada hitam kasar
400 ml air
1 sdm gula pasir
3 sdm minyak

Bahan saus cocolan:
3,5 sdm kecap ikan
3 sdm gula pasir
5 sdm air
2 sdm air jeruk nipis
2 sdt cuka beras
2 sdm wortel
1 buah cabai merah keriting
1 buah cabai rawit merah
1 siung bawang putih

Lainnya:
Cabai gendot
Maizena / tapioka untuk pelapis

Langkah:
1. Marinasi sayap ayam dengan air jeruk nipis, garam, kaldu bubuk, merica, dan minyak wijen, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 15 menit
2. Iris tipis wortel, cincang halus bawang putih, iris cabai merah keriting dan cabai rawit merah kemudian masukkan ke dalam mangkuk
3. Masukkan gula pasir, cuka beras, kecap ikan, air jeruk nipis, dan air, aduk hingga rata
4. Masukkan bawang putih ke dalam blender, haluskan 
5. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih dan lada hitam hingga wangi kecokelatan. Sisihkan sebagian bawang putih untuk taburan
6. Masukkan sayap ayam, aduk rata kemudian masukkan saus tiram, kecap ikan, gula pasir, dan air. Masak di api sedang kecil selama 8-10 menit, tiriskan
7. Balurkan ayam ke dalam tepung maizena / tapioka. Diamkan selama 5 menit 
8. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam hingga kering, tiriskan kemudian goreng cabai gendot beberapa saat, tiriskan 
9. Garlic pepper wings siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Garlic Pepper Wings Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 kg chicken wings, halved
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp stock powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper

Braise ingredients:
80 g garlic, small, unpeeled
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp coarse black pepper
400 ml water
1 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
3.5 tbsp fish sauce
3 tbsp sugar
5 tbsp water
2 tbsp lime juice
2 tsp rice wine vinegar
2 tbsp carrot
1 pc curly red chili
1 pc red Thai chili
1 clove garlic

Others:
Habanero
Cornstarch / tapioca flour to coat

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken wings with lime juice, salt, stock powder, pepper, and sesame oil. Mix well and marinate for 15 minutes.
2. Slice the carrot thinly. Mince the garlic finely, slice the curly red chili and red Thai chili. Place them in a bowl.
3. Add sugar, rice wine vinegar, fish sauce, lime juice, and water. Mix well.
4. Blend the garlic in a blender.
5. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic and black pepper until fragrant and browned. Set aside some of the garlic as garnish.
6. Add the chicken wings. Stir, then add oyster sauce, fish sauce, sugar, and water. Cook on medium-low heat for 8-10 minutes. Set aside.
7. Coat the wings with cornstarch/tapioca flour. Rest for 5 minutes.
8. Heat the oil and fry the wings until crisp. Set aside, then fry the habanero. Set aside.
9. Garlic Pepper Wings are ready to serve.

title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep SUP AYAM MAKARONI khas Amerika [Chicken Noodle Soup]
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Ayam Makaroni (8-9 porsi)

Bahan:
750 gr ayam broiler, potong 8
5 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
½ buah bawang bombai
245 gr wortel
4 batang seledri
85 gr buncis
100 gr makaroni kering
¼ sdt bubuk pala, opsional
1 sdm Royco Kaldu Ayam
1 sdm margarin
1 sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
2,5 liter air
Minyak untuk menumis

Langkah:
1. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng ayam hingga kecokelatan di kedua sisi, sisihkan sedikit minyak 
2. Iris bawang merah dan bawang putih kemudian tumis hingga wangi
3. Masukkan margarin dan bubuk pala, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan air, masak hingga mendidih
4. Potong kotak wortel, buncis, bawang bombai, dan seledri
5. Masukkan wortel, buncis, bawang bombai, dan makaroni kemudian tambahkan Royco Kaldu Ayam, gula pasir, garam, dan merica. Masak selama 15 menit atau hingga matang
6. Angkat ayam lalu suwir-suwir
7. Masukkan kembali ayam ke dalam sup lalu tambahkan seledri, masak sesaat 3-5 menit
8. Sup ayam makaroni siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Noodle Soup Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
750 g broiler chicken, chopped into 8 pieces
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
½ pc onion
245 g carrot
4 pc celery
85 g green bean
100 g dry macaroni
¼ tsp nutmeg powder, optional
1 tbsp Royco Chicken Powder
1 tbsp margarine
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
2.5 L water
Oil to sauté

Steps:
1. Heat some oil. Pan-sear the chicken until browned on both sides. Set aside some of the oil.
2. Slice the shallots and garlic, then sauté them until fragrant.
3. Add margarine and nutmeg powder. Sauté until fragrant, then add water and bring to a boil.
4. Slice the carrots, green beans, onion, and celery.
5. Add the carrots, green beans, onion, and macaroni. Then, add Royco Chicken Powder, sugar, salt, and pepper. Cook for 15 minutes or until soft.
6. Set the chicken aside, then shred.
7. Add the shredded chicken back into the soup. Add celery and cook for 3-5 minutes.
8. Chicken Noodle Soup is ready to serve.

title: Ekonomis Tetap Spesial! Resep SAMBAL TEMPE GOANG Khas Sunda
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Tempe Goang (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
200 gr tempe
2 siung bawang putih
25 gr cabai rawit merah
45 gr cabai rawit hijau
1,5 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap
1 sdt garam
3-4 sdm minyak panas

Pelengkap:
Nasi
Kerupuk

Langkah:
1. Potong tempe lalu goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
2. Di dalam ulekan masukkan bawang putih, garam, kaldu jamur, dan gula kemudian haluskan
3. Masukkan cabai rawit hijau dan cabai rawit merah, haluskan
4. Panaskan minyak, tuang minyak panas ke dalam sambal, aduk rata
5. Masukkan tempe lalu hancurkan, aduk rata
6. Sambal tempe goang siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Sambal Tempeh Goang Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g tempeh
2 clove garlic
25 g red Thai chili
45 g green Thai chili
1.5 tsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom powder / MSG
1 tsp salt
3-4 tbsp hot oil

Others:
Rice
Crackers

Steps:
1. Slice the tempeh. Fry until browned and set aside.
2. Add garlic, salt, mushroom powder, and sugar to the stone bowl. Grind until smooth.
3. Add green and red Thai chili. Grind until smooth.
4. Heat the oil. Pour hot oil into the Sambal. Stir well.
5. Add the tempeh in and mash it. Stir well.
6. Sambal Tempeh Goang is ready to serve.

title: Renyah Anti Gagal! Resep CREAMY LEMON PIE Ala McDonald's
recipe_id:
Resep Creamy Lemon Pie (8 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
200 gr mentega tawar
260 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
2 gr garam
16 gr gula pasir
120 gr air es

Bahan creamy lemon curd:
75 gr gula pasir
1 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdm maizena
4 sdm Krim Kafe Kapal Api
2 sdm air perasan lemon
2 butir kuning telur
½ sdt perisa vanila
30 gr mentega tawar
160 ml susu

Lainnya:
Telur untuk olesan

Langkah:
1. Potong kotak mentega seukuran 1-1.5 cm
2. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan tepung terigu, garam, dan gula pasir, aduk rata
3.Masukkan mentega, aduk  perlahan hingga tepung menyelimuti mentega kemudian tambahkan air es, aduk kembali secara perlahan
4. Pindahkan adonan ke dalam baking paper lalu lapisi atas nya dengan baking paper, pipihkan. 
5. Lipat bagian kanan kiri lalu lipat menjadi satu. Bungkus rapat dengan baking paper. Dinginkan di dalam kulkas selama 30 menit
6. Untuk isian creamy lemon, di dalam panci masukkan susu, gula pasir dan Krim Kafe Kapal Api, aduk rata kemudian nyalakan api, masak hingga sedikit mendidih
7. Di dalam mangkuk, masukkan kuning telur, jus lemon, tepung terigu, dan maizena, aduk rata
8. Tuang campuran susu yang sudah panas secara perlahan sambil diaduk kemudian masak kembali hingga mengental di api sedang kecil
9. Tambahkan mentega dan perisa vanila, aduk hingga rata
10. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, tutup dengan cling wrap hingga menyentuh permukaan creamy lemon. Dinginkan di kulkas hingga set 
11. Setelah dingin masukkan ke dalam piping bag
12. Keluarkan adonan pie dari kulkas. Pipihkan pie, taburkan sedikit tepung terigu supaya tidak lengket, pipihkan kembali hingga tipis kurang lebih 4-5 mm
13. Lipat bagian kanan dan kiri kemudian lipat menjadi satu. Bungkus dengan baking paper. Masukkan kembali ke dalam kulkas selama 30 menit.
14. Pipihkan adonan memanjang, buang pinggiran adonan agar lebih rapi kemudian gulung dengan baking paper. Masukkan ke dalam kulkas selama 30 menit
15. Keluarkan pie dari kulkas, pipihkan sedikit kemudian potong menjadi 8 bagian 
16. Semprotkan isian pada bagian tengah pie kemudian oles pinggiran pie dengan telur. 
17. Lipat pie lalu tekan pinggiran pie dengan garpu. Simpan di dalam freezer selama 10 menit sebelum di goreng
18. Oles pie dengan telur sebelum digoreng
19. Panaskan minyak, goreng pie hingga kecokelatan di kedua sisi atau jika menggunakan air fryer panggang di suhu 200°C selama 12-15 menit 
20. Creamy lemon pie siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Creamy Lemon Pie Recipe (yield 8 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
200 g unsalted butter
260 g all-purpose flour
2 g salt
16 g sugar
120 g cold water

Creamy Lemon Curd ingredients:
75 g sugar
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
4 tbsp Krim Kafe Kapal Api
2 tbsp lemon juice
2 pc egg yolk
½ tsp vanilla extract
30 g unsalted butter
160 ml milk

Others:
Egg for the egg wash

title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep PUDING ALA GYU-KAKU [Panna Cotta]
recipe_id:
Kali ini aku mau membuat Puding ala Gyu-Kaku  dengan Indomilk Kental manis Plain & Swiss Choco.

Resep Puding ala Gyu-Kaku (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
350 ml cream
200 ml air
60 ml Indomilk Kental Manis Plain
1,5 sdt atau 5 gr gelatin bubuk
1 sdt perisa vanila

Bahan saus gula merah:
100 ml air
50 gr gula merah
50 gr gula pasir

Topping lainnya:
Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco
Kacang mede panggang

Langkah:
1. Campurkan gelatine dengan 1-2 sdm air
2. Di dalam panci, masukkan cream, air, perisa vanila, dan Indomilk Kental Manis Plain, masak di api sedang kecil hingga sedikit mendidih sambil di aduk
3. Matikan api, masukkan gelatin, aduk rata kemudian saring
4. Masukkan ke dalam wadah lalu biarkan di suhu ruang hingga dingin kemudian masukkan ke dalam kulkas selama 3 jam atau hingga set
5. Untuk saus gula merah, masak gula pasir dengan sedikit air hingga kecokelatan lalu masukkan sisa air dan gula merah, masak hingga larut kemudian saring 
6. Haluskan kacang mede dengan blender
7. Tuang saus gula merah di atas pudding lalu taburkan kacang 
8. Untuk toping lain, tuang Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco lalu taburkan kacang mede 
9. Puding ala gyu-kaku siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Gyu-Kaku Pudding Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
350 ml cream
200 ml water
60 ml Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk
1.5 tsp or 5 g gelatin powder
1 tsp vanilla extract

Brown Sugar Sauce ingredients:
100 ml water
50 g brown sugar
50 g white sugar

Other Toppings:
Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk
Roasted cashew

Steps:
1. Add 1-2 tbsp to the gelatin.
2. In a pan, add the cream, water, vanilla extract, and Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk. Cook on medium-low heat while stirring until it simmers.
3. Turn the heat off. Add the gelatin. Mix well, then strain it.
4. Transfer the mixture into a bowl. Let cool on room temp, then chill in the fridge for 3 hours or until it sets.
5. For the Brown Sugar Sauce, cook the white sugar with a bit of water until browned, then add the rest of the water and the brown sugar. Cook until the sugar is dissolved, then strain the sauce.
6. Grind the cashews with a blender.
7. Pour the Brown Sugar Sauce on the pudding, then sprinkle with cashew.
8. For other topping, pour the Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk, then sprinkle with cashew.
9. Gyu-Kaku Pudding is ready to serve.

title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep NASI KULIT AYAM KRISPI SAMBAL GLEDEK : 100% Renyah & Gurih
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Kulit Sambal Gledek (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
300 gr kulit ayam
½ sdm garam
½ sdt merica
1 liter air

Bahan nasi:
375 gr Beras Premium Fortune
500 ml air

Bahan tepung basah:
100 gr tepung bumbu serbaguna
1 butir telur
1 sdt bubuk bawang bombai
50 ml air

Tepung kering:
Tepung bumbu serbaguna

Bahan sambal:
100 gr cabai rawit merah
5 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
50 ml Minyak Goreng Fortune
50 ml air
¾ sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
1 sdt gula pasir

Pelengkap:
Telur
Daun bawang iris
Garam dan merica secukupnya
Kol goreng

Langkah:
1. Cuci Beras Premium Fortune lalu masukkan air. Masak dengan rice cooker hingga matang 
2. Untuk sambal, panaskan Minyak Goreng Fortune lalu goreng bawang putih, bawang merah, dan cabai rawit merah, masak  sesaat
3. Masukkan bahan sambal ke dalam food processor, haluskan kemudian masak kembali
4. Tambahkan air, garam, kaldu bubuk, dan gula pasir, masak hingga minyak keluar di api sedang, sisihkan 
5. Didihkan air kemudian masukkan garam, merica, dan kulit ayam, rebus selama 3-5 menit kemudian bilas hingga bersih
6. Masukkan ke dalam mangkuk lalu tambahkan tepung bumbu serbaguna, bubuk bawang bombai, telur, dan air, aduk hingga rata
7. Panaskan Minyak Goreng Fortune, masukkan kulit ayam ke dalam tepung kering hingga rata lalu goreng kulit hingga kering di api kecil sedang, tiriskan
8. Kocok telur, daun bawang, garam, dan merica secukupnya kemudian goreng hingga matang, sisihkan
9. Goreng kol hingga kering atau sesuai selera
10. Nasi kulit sambal gledek siap disajikan
