recipe_en:
Chicken Skin Rice with Sambal Gledek Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g chicken skin
½ tbsp salt
½ tsp pepper
1 L water

Rice ingredients:
375 g Fortune Premium Rice Grains
500 ml water

Wet Batter ingredients:
100 g seasoned flour
1 pc egg
1 tsp onion powder
50 ml water

Dry Flour Mix:
Seasoned flour

Sambal ingredients:
100 g red Thai chili
5 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
50 ml Fortune Oil
50 ml water
¾ tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder / MSG
1 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
Egg
Sliced green onion
Salt and pepper, to taste
Fried Cabbage

Steps:
1. Rinse Fortune Premium Rice Grains, then add water. Cook with a rice cooker.
2. For the Sambal, heat Fortune Oil. Fry the garlic, shallots, and Thai chili for a moment.
3. Add the Sambal ingredients into a food processor. Blend, then cook it again.
4. Add water, salt, stock powder, and sugar. Cook until oily on medium heat. Set aside.
5. Bring water to a boil, then add salt, pepper, and chicken skin. Boil for 3-5 minutes, then rinse well.
6. Transfer the chicken skin to a bowl, then add seasoned flour, onion powder, egg, and water. Mix well.
7. Heat Fortune Oil. Coat the chicken skin with the dry flour mix evenly, then fry it until crispy on medium-low heat. Set aside.
8. Beat the egg, green onion, salt, and pepper. Fry it on a pan and set aside.
9. Fry the cabbage until crisp or to taste.
10. Chicken Skin Rice with Sambal Gledek is ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Tepung Terigu! Resep MIE OATMEAL [100% Kenyal]
recipe_id:
Resep Mie Goreng Oat (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan adonan mie:
150 gr Quaker Rolled Oats
100 gr tepung beras
100 gr tepung tapioka
¼ sdt garam
250 ml air mendidih

Bahan mie goreng:
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
3 sdm minyak
2 butir telur
50 gr tauge
1 batang daun bawang
1 sdm kecap ikan / kecap asin
1 sdm kecap manis
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
¼ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
Ayam kecap, opsional (https://youtu.be/XGtpp6eGg5Y)

Langkah:
1. Haluskan Quaker Rolled Oats dengan blender lalu masukkan ke dalam mangkuk 
2. Masukkan tepung beras, tepung tapioka, dan garam, aduk rata lalu didihkan air masukkan ke dalam adonan, aduk dengan sumpit
3. Setelah adonan hangat, uleni dengan tangan hingga menyatu kemudian pipihkan dengan ketebalan 2-3 mm. Taburkan tepung bila perlu
4. Lipat dua adonan lalu potong-potong 
5. Didihkan air, rebus mie selama 2-3 menit atau hingga matang, bilas dengan air, tiriskan
6. Cincang  bawang putih dan iris bawang merah lalu tumis hingga wangi
7. Masukkan telur, aduk rata kemudian masukkan daun bawang, mie, kecap ikan, kecap manis, kaldu bubuk, dan merica, masak sesaat
8. Masukkan tauge, aduk rata
9. Mie goreng oat siap disajikan  

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @QUAKERINDONESIA
Instagram: https://instagram.com/quakerindonesia/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzxa3KseF0KhoJsmy0E11CQ
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/quakerofficial
Tokopedia: bit.ly/QuakerChefDevina
recipe_en:
Fried Oat Noodles (yield 3-4 servings)

Noodle Dough ingredients:
150 g Quaker Rolled Oat
100 g rice flour
100 g tapioca flour
¼ tsp salt
250 ml boiling water

Fried Noodles ingredients:
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 tbsp oil
2 pc egg
50 g beansprout
1 pc green onion
1 tbsp fish sauce / soy sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
Sweet soy chicken, optional (https://youtu.be/XGtpp6eGg5Y)

Steps:
1. Grind Quaker Rolled Oats with a blender. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Add rice flour, tapioca flour, and salt. Mix well, then boil some water. Pour it into the dough and stir with chopsticks.
3. After the dough can be handled safely, knead it by hand until it comes together, then flatten it to 2-3 mm thick. Dust with flour, if needed.
4. Fold the dough once, then slice it.
5. Boil some water. Cook the noodles for 2-3 minutes or until cooked. Rinse with water and set aside.
6. Chop the garlic and slice the shallots. Sauté until fragrant.
7. Add the eggs in. Stir, then add green onions, noodles, fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, stock powder, and pepper. Cook for a moment.
8. Add the beansprouts. Stir.
9. Fried Oat Noodles are ready to serve.

title: Wangi Maksimal! Resep AYAM GORENG HONG KONG ala Devina Hermawan: Cocok Untuk Stok Di Kulkas!
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Goreng Hong Kong (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 kg paha ayam
½ sdm garam
1 sdm gula pasir
½ sdm kaldu bubuk / penyedap
½ sdt merica
½ sdt bubuk ngohiong
1 sdm kecap hitam
2 sdm Royco Saus TIram
2 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan lainnya:
6 siung bawang putih
1 jempol jahe
2 sdm minyak
500 ml air
2 sdm maizena

Bahan sambal:
2 siung bawang putih
5 buah cabai keriting merah
10 buah cabai rawit merah
50 ml air
¼ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt cuka

Pelengkap:
Daun ketumbar
Nasi putih
Timun
Minyak bawang putih goreng

Langkah:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan kecap hitam, Royco Saus Tiram, garam, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk, merica, dan bubuk ngohiong aduk rata 
2. Tambahkan minyak wijen, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 1-2 jam di suhu ruang
3. Untuk sambal, blender cabai rawit, cabai keriting, bawang putih, dan air kemudian masukkan ke dalam wajan
4. Tambahkan garam, gula pasir dan cuka, masak beberapa saat
5. Iris jahe dan geprek bawang putih
6. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih, dan jahe hingga wangi lalu masukkan ayam beserta bumbu marinasi nya, masak sesaat
7. Masukkan air, masak selama 20-30 menit di api kecil lalu sisihkan ayam
8. Buang jahe dan bawang putih kemudian masukkan larutan maizena, masak sesaat hingga sedikit mengental
9. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam di api sedang hingga kering, tiriskan 
10. Ayam hongkong siap disajikan dengan pelengkap
recipe_en:
Hong Kong Fried Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 kg chicken thigh
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp stock powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp dark soy sauce
2 tbsp Royco Oyster Sauce
2 tsp sesame oil

Others:
6 clove garlic
1 thumb ginger
2 tbsp oil
500 ml water
2 tbsp cornstarch

Sambal ingredients:
2 clove garlic
5 pc curly red chili
10 pc red Thai chili
50 ml water
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp vinegar

Add-ons:
Cilantro
Rice
Cucumber
Garlic oil

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with dark soy sauce, Royco Oyster Sauce, salt, sugar, stock powder, pepper, and five-spice powder. Mix well.
2. Add sesame oil and mix well. Marinate for 1-2 hours at room temperature.
3. For the Sambal, blend Thai chili, curly chili, garlic, and water. Cook in a pan.
4. Season with salt, sugar, and vinegar. Cook for a moment.
5. Slice the ginger and pound the garlic.
6. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic and ginger until fragrant, then add the chicken and marinade. Cook for a moment.
7. Add water. Cook for 20-30 minutes on low heat, then set the chicken aside.
8. Remove the ginger and garlic. Add the cornstarch mixture. Cook for a moment until it thickens a bit.
9. Heat some oil. Fry the chicken on medium heat until crisp. Set aside.
10. Hong Kong Chicken is ready to serve with the add-ons.

title: Lembut & Meresap Sampai Dalam! Resep AYAM ASAM MANIS PEDAS
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Asam Manis Pedas (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 kg ayam broiler, potong 17 bagian
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
1 sdt garam
½ sdt merica
4 sdm maizena
2 sdm jeruk nipis
2 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan lainnya:
1 buah bawang bombai
1 batang daun bawang
1 buah timun
5 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
8 buah cabai rawit merah
2 buah cabai merah
2 sdm saus sambal
3 sdm saus tomat
2 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm margarin
80 ml minyak
300 ml air

Langkah:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan garam, merica, kaldu bubuk, air jeruk nipis, dan maizena, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan minyak wijen, aduk kembali. Diamkan selama satu jam
2. Cincang bawang putih, iris bawang merah, bawang bombai, daun bawang, cabai merah, cabai rawit, dan kupas timun lalu potong miring
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng ayam hingga kecokelatan di kedua belah sisi, sisihkan
4. Sisihkan sebagian minyak, tumis bawang putih dan bawang merah hingga wangi lalu masukkan air, margarin, saus tomat, saus sambal, saus tiram, kecap manis, bawang bombai, cabai merah, cabai rawit merah, dan ayam, masak hingga mengental
5. Masukkan daun bawang dan timun, masak sesaat
6. Ayam asam manis pedas siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Spicy Sweet & Sour Chicken Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Bahan marinasi:
1 kg broiler chicken, chopped into 17 pieces
1 tsp stock powder
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
4 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp lime juice
2 tsp sesame oil

Other ingredients:
1 pc onion
1 pc green onion
1 pc cucumber
5 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
8 pc red Thai chili
2 pc red chili
2 tbsp chili sauce
3 tbsp ketchup
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp margarine
80 ml oil
300 ml water

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with salt, pepper, stock powder, lime juice, and cornstarch. Mix well, then add sesame oil and mix again. Marinate for 1 hour.
2. Mince the garlic and slice the shallots, onion, green onion, red chili, and Thai chili. Peel the cucumber and slice it diagonally.
3. Heat some oil and fry the chicken until browned on both sides. Set aside.
4. Set aside some of the oil. Sauté the garlic and shallots until fragrant. Then, add water, margarine, ketchup, chili sauce, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, onion, red chili, Thai chili, and chicken. Cook until the sauce thickens.
5. Add green onions and cucumber. Cook for a moment.
6. Spicy Sweet & Sour Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Resep PASTA DAGING ALA RUSIA: Creamy & Gurih! [Beef Stroganoff Fettuccine]
recipe_id:
Resep Beef Stroganoff (untuk 7-8 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
500 gr daging has dalam
1 kuning telur
4 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
2 sdm kecap inggris
½ sdt lada hitam
1 sdm minyak

Bahan lainnya:
2 buah bawang bombai ukuran sedang
250 gr jamur swiss brown
3 siung bawang putih
5 lembar bay leaf
3 sdm mentega tawar
200 ml cream / sour cream
1 sdm air perasan lemon atau 80 ml white wine / shake
1 sdm mustard, opsional
⅓ sdt garam
¼ sdt lada hitam
2 sdm saus tomat
2 buah pickled gherkins, opsional
500 ml air
1 batang seledri
2 sdt kaldu sapi bubuk
Parsley

Bahan mixed vegetables:
250 gr brokoli, rebus
250 gr wortel, potong, rebus
6 siung bawang putih, cincang halus
2 sdm minyak
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt lada hitam
1 sdm olive oil

Pelengkap:
Fettuccine

Langkah:
1. Pukul-pukul daging dengan rolling pin atau benda tumpul lainnya kemudian iris memanjang dan miring 
2. Marinasi dengan kecap inggris, kuning telur, tepung terigu, lada hitam dan minyak, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 10 menit
3. Rebus pasta hingga matang lalu tuang sedikit minyak, aduk rata
4. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih hingga wangi lalu masukkan wortel dan brokoli, aduk rata
5. Tambahkan garam dan lada hitam, masak beberapa saat lalu masukkan olive oil, aduk rata, sisihkan 
6. Potong-potong jamur, iris bawang bombai, cincang bawang putih, iris pickled gherkins dan cincang parsley
7. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan daging lalu masak hingga kecokelatan, sisihkan
8. Panaskan kembali sedikit minyak, tumis jamur hingga wangi dan layu lalu masukkan bawang bombai, masak hingga wangi
9. Masukkan bawang putih, bayleaf, seledri, mentega, daging , pickled gherkins, parsley, perasan lemon, mustard, saus tomat, air, kaldu sapi bubuk dan cream, masak beberapa saat
10. Tambahkan garam dan lada hitam, masak sesaat
11. Beef stroganoff siap disajikan dengan fettuccine dan sayuran sebagai pelengkap
recipe_en:
Beef Stroganoff Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g beef fillet
1 pc egg yolk
4 tbsp all-purpose flour
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
½ tsp black pepper
1 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
2 pc onion, medium
250 g swiss brown mushroom
3 clove garlic
5 pc bay leaf
3 tbsp unsalted butter
200 ml cream / sour cream
1 tbsp lemon juice or 80 ml white wine / sake
1 tbsp mustard, optional
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 pc pickled gherkins, optional
500 ml water
1 pc celery
2 tsp beef powder
Parsley

Mixed Vegetables ingredients:
250 g broccoli, blanched
250 g carrot, sliced, blanched
6 clove garlic, minced
2 tbsp oil
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
1 tbsp olive oil

Add-ons:
Fettuccine

Steps:
1. Pound the beef with a rolling pin or other blunt objects. Slice diagonally.
2. Marinade with Worcestershire sauce, egg yolk, flour, black pepper, and oil. Mix well and marinade for 10 minutes.
3. Boil the pasta. Once cooked, add a bit of oil and mix well.
4. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic until fragrant, then add carrots and broccoli. Stir.
5. Season with salt and black pepper. Cook for a moment, then add olive oil. Stir and set aside.
6. Slice the mushroom, onion, pickled gherkins, and parsley. Mince the garlic.
7. Heat some oil. Add the beef in and cook until browned. Set aside.
8. Add more oil and heat it up. Sauté the mushroom until fragrant, then add onion. Cook until fragrant.
9. Add garlic, bay leaf, celery, butter, beef, pickled gherkins, parsley, lemon juice, mustard, tomato sauce, water, beef powder, and cream. Cook for a moment.
10. Season with salt and black pepper. Cook for a moment.
11. Beef Stroganoff is ready to serve with fettuccine and vegetables.

title: Lembut Manis Gurih! Resep ES KETAN HITAM
recipe_id:
Resep Es Ketan Hitam (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
150 gr beras ketan hitam
150 gr beras ketan putih
150 ml air
80 ml santan
2 lembar daun pandan
40 gr gula merah
¼ sdt garam

Bahan kuah creamy:
600 ml air
150 gr Krim Kafe Kapal Api
100 gr gula pasir
½ sdt garam
2 lembar daun pandan

Pelengkap:
Kelapa muda
Es serut
Es krim vanila

Langkah:
1. Rendam beras ketan semalaman atau minimal 3 jam kemudian bilas kembali hingga bersih
2. Kukus beras ketan selama 30 menit
3. Masak air, santan, gula merah, garam, dan daun pandan hingga mendidih dan larut kemudian tuang ke dalam ketan yang telah dikukus, aduk rata
4. Kukus kembali selama 20 menit
5. Untuk kuah creamy, masukkan Krim Kafe Kapal Api, gula pasir, garam, daun pandan, dan air ke dalam panci, aduk rata lalu masak hingga mendidih. Dinginkan
6. Susun es serut, kelapa muda, ketan, es krim vanila lalu siram dengan kuah creamy
7. Es ketan hitam siap dihidangkan 

Krim Kafe ini merupakan krimer serbaguna tidak hanya berfungsi untuk krimer kopi, tetapi sebagai bahan masakan untuk makanan dan minuman manis. Krim Kafe ini juga low sodium lho!

recipe_en:
Black Sticky Rice Dessert Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g black glutinous rice
150 g white glutinous rice
150 ml water
80 ml coconut milk
2 pc pandan leaf
40 g palm sugar
¼ tsp salt

Creamy Soup ingredients:
600 ml water
150 g Kapal Api Krim Kafe
100 g sugar
½ tsp salt
2 pc pandan leaf

Others:
Young coconut
Shaved ice
Vanilla ice cream

Steps:
1. Soak the glutinous rice overnight or for at least 3 hours. Then, rinse cleanly.
2. Steam the glutinous rice for 30 minutes.
3. Bring water, coconut milk, palm sugar, salt, and pandan leaves to a boil until the sugar is dissolved. Pour into the steamed glutinous rice. Mix well.
4. Steam it again for 20 minutes.
5. For the Creamy Soup, add Kapal Api Krim Kafe, sugar, salt, pandan leaves, and water into a saucepan. Stir well and bring to a boil. Chill.
5. Assemble the shaved ice, young coconut, glutinous rice, and vanilla ice cream. Pour the Creamy Soup in.
6. Black Sticky Rice Dessert is ready to serve.

title: Sangat Praktis & Gurih! Resep MARTABAK TELUR ROTI TAWAR
recipe_id:
Resep Martabak Telur Roti Tawar (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan:
8 lembar roti tawar kupas
1 batang daun bawang
⅓ buah bawang bombai
200 gr daging giling
3 butir telur
1 sdt bubuk kari
¾ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
¼ sdt merica
Minyak Goreng Fortune

Pelengkap:
Acar
Nasi putih Beras Premium Fortune

Langkah:
1. Potong kotak kecil bawang bombai dan iris daun bawang
2. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan daging giling, daun bawang, bawang bombai, bubuk kari, garam, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk, dan merica, aduk rata
3. Tambahkan telur, aduk hingga menyatu
4. Siapkan roti, masukkan adonan daging sambil di ratakan lalu tutup kembali dengan roti
5. Belah dua roti lalu ratakan adonan yang menempel pada pinggiran roti 
6. Panaskan Minyak Goreng Fortune, goreng martabak roti di api sedang kecil hingga kecokelatan lalu panggang di suhu 160 derajat celcius selama 5 menit 
7. Martabak telur roti tawar siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Martabak Telur Bread (yield 8 servings)

Ingredients:
8 pc white bread, no crust
1 pc green onion
⅓ pc onion
200 g ground beef
3 pc egg
1 tsp curry powder
¾ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
Fortune Oil

Others:
Pickle
Fortune Premium Rice Grains

Steps:
1. Dice the onion and slice the green onions.
2. In a bowl, combine the ground meat, green onions, onion, curry powder, salt, sugar, stock powder, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Add eggs. Mix well.
4. Prepare the bread. Add the meat filling evenly. Top with another bread.
5. Slice the bread into two pieces. Clean up the edges.
6. Heat Fortune Oil. Fry the Martabak Bread on medium-low heat until it’s golden brown. Bake at 160°C for 5 minutes.
7. Martabak Telur Bread is ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep CHOCOLATE CHURROS Dengan Saus Karamel Favorit Anak & Suami.
recipe_id:
Resep Chocolate Churros (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
130 ml susu
30 gr kental manis putih
30 gr mentega
50 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
10 gr cokelat bubuk
50 gr Goriorio Cokelat
1 butir telur
⅙ sdt garam

Bahan salted caramel:
80 ml susu
60 gr gula pasir
40 ml air
30 gr mentega
60 gr gula palem
½ sdt garam
1 sdt perisa vanila

Bahan pelapis:
4 sdm gula pasir

Langkah:
1. Untuk saus, masak gula pasir, gula palem, dan air, masak di api sedang hingga larut dan wangi kemudian masukkan susu, mentega, garam, dan perisa vanila, masak selama 2 menit, sisihkan
2. Untuk adonan churros, masak susu, kental manis, mentega, dan garam di api sedang kecil hingga larut kemudian masukkan tepung terigu, aduk hingga menyatu
3. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, diamkan hingga dingin atau hangat kuku
4. Haluskan Goriorio Cokelat dengan food processor lalu masukkan ke dalam adonan beserta telur, aduk hingga rata
5. Tambahkan cokelat bubuk sambil disaring, aduk rata
6. Masukkan piping tip ke dalam piping bag lalu masukkan adonan churros
7. Panaskan minyak, semprotkan churros ke dalam minyak lalu gunting, goreng churros hingga struktur luar menjadi kering,tiriskan 
8. Untuk taburan, haluskan gula pasir dengan blender. Balurkan churros ke dalam gula pasir
9. Churros cokelat siap disajikan

Website: https://siantartop.co.id/

recipe_en:
Chocolate Churros Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
130 ml milk
30 g white condensed milk
30 g butter
50 g all-purpose flour
10 g cocoa powder
50 g Goriorio, Chocolate flavor
1 pc egg
⅙ tsp salt

Salted Caramel Sauce:
80 ml milk
60 g sugar
40 ml water
30 g butter
60 g palm sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract

Coating:
4 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. For the Sauce, add sugar, palm sugar, and water into a saucepan. Cook on medium heat until the sugars are dissolved and fragrant. Then, add milk, butter, salt, and vanilla extract. Continue cooking for 2 minutes, then set aside.
2. For the Churros dough, cook milk, condensed milk, butter, and salt on medium-low heat until dissolved. Then, add flour and mix evenly.
3. Transfer to a bowl. Rest until it’s cooled down or lukewarm.
4. Grind the Chocolate Goriorio using a food processor. Add it into the dough along with the egg. Mix evenly.
5. Sift the cocoa powder in and mix well.
6. Place the piping tip inside the piping bag, then add the Churro dough.
7. Heat the oil. Pipe the Churro dough into the oil and cut it with scissors. Fry the Churros until the exterior is crisp. Set aside.
8. Grind the sugar with a blender. Coat the Churros with sugar.
9. Chocolate Churros are ready to serve.

title: Resep ‘PIZZA’ KRISPI JAMUR: Renyah & Gurih! [Mushroom Tart]
recipe_id:
Resep Mushroom Tart (untuk 3-6 porsi)

Bahan adonan:
195 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
½ sdt garam
20 gr air es
120 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter

Bahan caramelized onion:
2 sdm minyak
4 batang daun thyme
½ sdm Anchor Unsalted Butter
1 ½ buah bawang bombai
½ sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt lada hitam

Bahan creamy mushroom:
75 gr jamur tiram/ oyster
50 gr jamur kancing / champignon
50 gr jamur shitake
100 gr jamur shimeji
1 butir kuning telur
5 batang daun thyme
1 sdm Anchor Unsalted Butter
80 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica

Topping
10 gr keju parmesan

Langkah:
1. Potong kotak kecil Anchor Unsalted Butter lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Masukkan tepung terigu dan garam, aduk menggunakan tangan hingga menjadi butiran pasir
3. Tambahkan air es, aduk sebentar lalu bungkus dengan cling wrap. Masukkan ke dalam kulkas selama 1 jam
4. Untuk caramelized onion, iris bawang bombai lalu tumis di api besar hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan
5. Tambahkan garam, gula pasir, lada hitam, dan daun thyme, masak hingga kecokelatan di api kecil
6. Matikan api lalu masukkan Anchor Unsalted Butter, aduk rata, sisihkan
7. Pipihkan adonan lalu bentuk persegi panjang
8. Tekan-tekan bagian pinggir adonan, tusuk bagian tengah adonan dengan garpu  lalu panggang di suhu 170 derajat celcius selama 15 menit
9. Potong-potong jamur sesuai selera lalu panaskan minyak, tumis jamur oyster dan shimeji di api besar beberapa saat
10. Masukkan sisa jamur, masak kembali hingga wangi dan kecokelatan
11. Masukkan Anchor Unsalted Butter, daun thyme, garam, dan lada hitam, aduk rata kemudian masukkan Anchor Cooking Cream masak beberapa saat
12. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk. Dinginkan hingga hangat kuku lalu tambahkan kuning telur, aduk rata 
13. Susun caramelized onion dan creamy mushroom di atas tart crust. Tambahkan parutan keju parmesan. Panggang kembali di suhu 190 derajat celcius selama 10 menit 
14. Mushroom tart siap disajikan  

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @ANCHOR_INDONESIA
Instagram: https://instagram.com/anchor_indonesia/
Tokopedia: https://www.tokopedia.com/fonterraoff...
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/fonterra.official
Lazada: https://www.lazada.co.id/shop/lazada-...
recipe_en:
Mushroom Tart Recipe (yield 3-6 servings)

Dough ingredients:
195 g all-purpose flour
½ tsp salt
20 g cold water
120 g Anchor Unsalted Butter

Caramelized Onions ingredients:
2 tbsp oil
4 sprig thyme
½ tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
1.5 pc onion
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper

Creamy Mushroom ingredients:
75 g Oyster mushroom
50 g Button mushroom / Champignon
50 g Shiitake
100 g Shimeji
1 pc egg yolk
5 sprig thyme
1 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter
80 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Topping:
10 g parmesan

Steps:
1. Dice Anchor Unsalted Butter into small pieces. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Add flour and salt. Mix with hand until sandy.
3. Add cold water. Mix a bit, then wrap dough with a plastic wrap. Place in the fridge for 1 hour.
4. For the Caramelized Onions, slice the onions and sauté on high heat until fragrant and lightly browned.
5. Add salt, sugar, black pepper, and thyme. Cook until browned on low heat.
6. Turn the heat off, then add Anchor Unsalted Butter. Stir, then set aside.
7. Flatten the dough and shape into a rectangle.
8. Press the edge of the dough. Punch holes in the center with a fork, then bake it at 170°C for 15 minutes.
9. Slice the mushrooms to your preference. Heat the oil. Sauté the Oyster mushroom and Shimeji on high heat for a moment.
10. Add the rest of the mushrooms. Continue cooking until fragrant and browned.
11. Add Anchor Unsalted Butter, thyme, salt, and black pepper. Stir, then add Anchor Cooking Cream. Cook for a moment.
12. Transfer the mushroom into a bowl. Let it cool down until it’s lukewarm, then add the yolk in. Mix well.
13. Assemble the Caramelized Onions and Creamy Mushroom on top of the tart crust. Add grated Parmesan. Bake it again at 190°C for 10 minutes.
14. Mushroom Tart is ready to serve.

title: Wangi Gurih Segar! Resep BIHUN AYAM KUAH LAKSA
recipe_id:
Resep Bihun Laksa (untuk 7-8 porsi)

Bahan:
350 gr dada ayam filet
2 buah kentang
350 gr bihun, rendam air
200 ml santan
2 liter air
1 sdm garam
½ sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap
½ sdt merica
2 sdm gula pasir
1 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan bumbu laksa:
60 ml minyak
7 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
5 butir kemiri, sangrai
½ sdt ketumbar, sangrai
½ sdt jintan, sangrai (opsional)
6 cm kunyit
8 buah cabai merah keriting
3 cm jahe
5 lembar daun salam
6 lembar daun jeruk
1 sdt asam jawa
1 batang serai, geprek, potong
1 buah tomat ukuran sedang

Bahan lainnya:
10 siung bawang merah untuk bawang goreng, opsional
4 sdm minyak

Pelengkap:
Tauge
Kemangi
Cabai rawit merah, rebus, blender
Jeruk limau
4 butir telur + ¼ sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Iris bawang merah kemudian panaskan minyak, goreng bawang merah hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
2. Haluskan kemiri, bawang putih, bawang merah, jahe, kunyit, cabai keriting merah, ketumbar, jintan dan minyak hingga halus
3. Tambahkan air bila perlu, haluskan kembali
4. Panaskan minyak bawang, tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian masukkan serai, daun salam, daun jeruk, tumis sesaat
5. Tambahkan  air, tomat, kentang, ayam, kaldu ayam bubuk, garam, gula pasir, merica dan asam jawa, masak selama 10 menit atau hingga ayam dan kentang matang
6. Sisihkan tomat dan ayam lalu suwir ayam
7. Tambahkan santan dan kaldu jamur ke dalam kuah, aduk rata.
8. Kocok telur dengan garam, goreng telur hingga matang lalu iris-iris
9. Laksa bihun siap disajikan dengan pelengkap

recipe_en:
Vermicelli Laksa Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g chicken breast fillet
2 pc potato
350 g vermicelli, soaked in water
200 ml coconut milk
2 L water
1 tbsp salt
½ tsp mushroom powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp chicken powder

Laksa spices:
60 ml oil
7 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut, toasted
½ tsp coriander, toasted
½ tsp cumin, toasted (optional)
6 cm turmeric
8 pc red curly chili
3 cm ginger
5 pc bay leaf
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tsp tamarind
1 pc lemongrass, pounded, sliced
1 pc tomato, medium

Others:
10 pc shallot for the Fried Shallot, optional
4 tbsp oil

Add-ons:
Beansprout
Lemon basik
Red Thai chili, boiled, blended
Kaffir lime
4 pc egg + ¼ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots. Heat the oil and fry the shallots until golden brown. Set aside.
2. Blend the candlenuts, garlic, shallots, ginger, turmeric, red curly chili, coriander, cumin, and oil until smooth.
3. Add water if needed. Blend again.
4. Heat the shallot oil. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass, bay leaf, lime leaf. Cook for a moment.
5. Add water, tomato, potato, chicken, chicken powder, salt, sugar, pepper, and tamarind. Cook for 10 minutes or until the chicken is cooked and the potato is soft.
6. Set aside the tomato and chicken. Shred the chicken.
7. Add coconut milk and mushroom powder into the broth. Stir.
8. Beat the eggs with salt. Fry until it’s cooked, then slice.
9. Vermicelli Laksa is ready to serve with the add-ons.

title: Gak Alot Pasti Nagih! Resep CUMI CABAI HIJAU
recipe_id:
Resep Cumi Cabai Hijau (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr cumi
1,5 liter air
7 lembar daun jeruk
1 sdt garam

Bahan lainnya:
150 gr cabai hijau tanjung
30 gr cabai rawit hijau
6 siung bawang putih
9 siung bawang merah
4-5 sdm minyak
5 lembar daun jeruk
1,5 sdm Royco Saus Tiram
¼ sdt garam
½ sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
50 ml air

Bahan pelengkap:
Nasi putih
Jeruk limau

Langkah:
1. Buang bagian mata, tulang cumi dan bagian keras lainnya, potong-potong kemudian bilas dengan air
2. Didihkan air, masukkan cumi, daun jeruk, dan garam, masak selama 10-15 menit
3. Cincang bawang putih, bawang merah, dan cabai hijau dengan food processor
4. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang dan cabai hijau yang telah dicincang
5. Masukkan daun jeruk dan cabai rawit, masak hingga wangi kemudian masukkan cumi, aduk rata
6. Masukkan Royco Saus Tiram, garam, gula pasir, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata
7. Tambahkan air, masak hingga meresap
8. Cumi cabai hijau siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Green Chili Squid Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g squid
1.5 L water
7 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tsp salt

Other ingredients:
150 g green tanjung chili
30 g green Thai chili
6 clove garlic
9 pc shallot
4-5 tbsp oil
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
1.5 tbsp Royco Oyster Sauce
¼ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
¼ tsp stock powder / MSG
50 ml water

Add-ons:
Cooked rice
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Remove the eyes, bones, and other hard parts of the squid. Slice, then rinse with water.
2. Boil some water and add the squid, kaffir lime leaf, and salt. Boil for 10-15 minutes.
3. Chop the garlic, shallots, and green chili with a food processor.
4. Heat the oil. Stir-fry the chopped garlic, shallots, and green chili.
5. Add kaffir lime leaf and Thai chili. Cook until fragrant, then add the squid. Stir well.
6. Add Royco Oyster Sauce, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Stir well.
7. Add water and cook until water is reduced.
8. Green Chili Squid is ready to serve.

title: Cocok Bekal Anak: Resep NASI SOSIS TELUR JEPANG ‘OYAKODON’ & NUGGET ‘NIGIRI’
recipe_id:
Cocok dijadikan kreasi ide bekal untuk anak dan keluarga karena enak dan simple, menggunakan bahan-bahan yang mudah didapat. 

Resep Sosis Oyakodon & Nugget Nigiri (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan nasi:
275 gr beras
60 gr beras ketan
500 ml air

Bahan nugget nigiri:
Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
350 gr nasi
2 sdm mayones
¼ sdt garam

Bahan sosis oyakodon:
Kanzler Sosis Beef Cocktail
4 butir telur
½ buah bawang bombai
1 batang daun bawang

Bahan saus oyakodon
45 ml kecap asin
45 ml mirin
1 sdt dashi powder / chicken powder
1,5 sdt gula pasir
150 ml air

Pelengkap:
Brokoli
Tomat ceri

Langkah:
1. Untuk saus, campurkan dashi bubuk, gula pasir, kecap asin, mirin, dan air, aduk rata
2. Iris daun bawang dan bawang bombai kemudian sayat-sayat Kanzler Sosis Beef Cocktail
3. Panggang Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget dengan air fryer di suhu 180 derajat celcius selama 8 menit
4. Campurkan nasi dengan mayones dan garam, aduk rata
5. Gunting-gunting rumput laut kemudian bentuk nasi sesuai selera
6. Simpan Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget di atas nasi lalu ikat dengan rumput laut
7. Panaskan wajan, tuang sedikit saus oyakodon kemudian masukkan Kanzler Sosis Beef Cocktail dan bawang bombai, masak beberapa saat
8. Tambahkan daun bawang kemudian kocok perlahan telur, masukkan ke dalam wajan, masak hingga matang
9. Tambahkan saus oyakodon bila perlu
10. Susun nasi, oyakodon, nugget nigiri, dan pelengkap lainnya ke dalam wadah
11. Sosis oyakodon dan nugget nigiri siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Sausage Oyakodon & Nugget Nigiri Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Rice ingredients:
275 g rice
60 g glutinous rice
500 ml water

Nugget Nigiri ingredients:
Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
350 g rice
2 tbsp mayonnaise
¼ tsp salt

Sausage Oyakodon ingredients:
Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage
4 pc egg
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion

Oyakodon Sauce ingredients:
45 ml soy sauce
45 ml mirin
1 tsp dashi powder / chicken powder
1.5 tsp sugar
150 ml water

Others:
Broccoli
Cherry tomato

Steps:
1. For the sauce, combine dashi powder, sugar, soy sauce, mirin, and water. Stir well.
2. Slice the green onions and onion, then make slits on Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage.
3. Cook the Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget in an air fryer at 180°C for 8 minutes.
4. Mix the rice with mayonnaise and salt. Mix well.
5. Cut the nori with scissors, then shape the rice to your liking.
6. Place Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget on top of the rice, then secure with nori.
7. Heat the pan. Add some Oyakodon sauce, then add Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage and onion. Cook for a moment.
8. Add green onions. Lightly beat the eggs, then add into the pan and cook through.
9. Add more Oyakodon sauce if needed.
10. Assemble the rice, Oyakodon, Nugget Nigiri, and other ingredients in the lunchbox.
11. Sausage Oyakodon and Nugget Nigiri are ready to serve.

title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep NASI TELUR CEPLOK [Scallion Oil]
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Telur Ceplok (untuk 1-2 porsi)

Bahan:
2 butir telur
2 batang daun bawang
3 sdm minyak
2 siung bawang putih
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt gula pasir
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm air
Nasi putih
Cabai rawit

Langkah:
1. Iris daun bawang dan bawang putih kemudian panaskan minyak, tumis daun bawang hingga wangi di api sedang kecil 
2. Masukkan bawang putih, tumis beberapa saat hingga wangi lalu tambahkan garam, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk, merica dan air, aduk rata, sisihkan
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng telur hingga setengah matang atau sesuai selera
4. Siapkan nasi putih, tuang telur dan tumisan daun bawang di atasnya. Tambahkan irisan cabai rawit bila suka

recipe_en:
Fried Egg Rice Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc egg
2 pc scallion
3 tbsp oil
2 clove garlic
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp water
Cooked rice
Thai chili

Steps:
1. Slice the scallions and garlic. Heat the oil and sauté the scallion until fragrant on medium-low heat.
2. Add the garlic. Sauté for a moment until fragrant, then add salt, sugar, stock powder, pepper, and water. Mix well, then set aside.
3. Heat some oil. Fry the eggs until half cooked or to your preference.
4. Prepare the cooked rice. Place the Fried Eggs and Scallion Oil on top. Add sliced Thai chili if you like.
5. Fried Egg Rice is ready to serve.

title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep BAKSO CUANKI AYAM Komplit: 1 Adonan Untuk Semua [Khas Cuanki Serayu]
recipe_id:
Resep Bakso Cuanki Ayam (untuk 10 porsi)

Bahan:
400 gr paha ayam filet
4 siung bawang putih
2 sdm bawang merah goreng
½ sdt merica
1 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
½ sdm gula pasir
2,5 sdt baking powder
2 sdm kecap ikan
2 sdm minyak
2 butir telur
125 gr air es
260 gr tepung tapioka
30 gr tepung terigu protein sedang

Bahan kuah:
600 gr tulang rongkong ayam
1 sdm bawang putih goreng
1 sdm bawang merah goreng
3 batang seledri
3 liter air
1 sdm gula pasir
1 sdm garam
2 sdt bubuk kaldu ayam
2 sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap
¼ sdt merica

Bahan pelengkap:
Kulit pangsit
Tahu putih
Bakso sapi (https://youtu.be/gqcRtvIFArA)
Sambal rawit
Kecap manis
Jeruk nipis

Langkah:
1. Didihkan air, rebus tulang 7-8 menit lalu bilas dengan air 
2. Didihkan kembali air, masukkan tulang ayam rebus selama 1-2 jam di api sedang kecil. Buang busa atau lemak pada kuah
3. Tambahkan garam, kaldu jamur, kaldu ayam, gula pasir, dan merica
4. Haluskan bawang merah goreng dan bawang putih goreng kemudian masukkan ke dalam kuah bersamaan dengan seledri, masak beberapa saat
5. Untuk adonan, masukkan ayam, garam, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk, merica dan bawang putih ke dalam food processor. Haluskan hingga lengket
6. Masukkan telur, kecap ikan, minyak, air es, tepung terigu, tapioka dan baking powder, aduk hingga rata
7. Siapkan kulit pangsit, ambil sedikit adonan lalu ratakan dengan garpu
8. Panaskan minyak, goreng di api kecil hingga kecokelatan dan renyah, tiriskan
9. Untuk siomay goreng, siapkan kulit pangsit, ambil sekitar ½ sdm adonan kemudian bentuk seperti kerucut, goreng hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
10. Untuk adonan tahu, pisahkan 160 gr adonan lalu campurkan dengan 1 sdm air, aduk rata
11. Beri lubang pada bagian tengah tahu lalu isi dengan sedikit adonan, ratakan dengan garpu
12. Bentuk bulat sisa adonan lalu rebus bersama dengan tahu hingga matang, tiriskan
13. Panaskan kembali kuah, sisihkan tulang ayam dan seledri kemudian masukkan bakso sapi dan tahu bakso  
14. Baso cuanki siap disajikan

title: Praktis & Gurih! Resep NASI KUNING RICE COOKER AYAM SUWIR SERUNDENG
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Kuning Rice Cooker (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan bumbu dasar:
5 siung bawang putih
7 siung bawang merah
10 buah kacang mede
20 gr kunyit
3 sdm minyak

Bahan nasi kuning:
500 gr beras
675 ml air
50 ml santan
½ bumbu dasar kuning
1 batang serai
1 iris jahe
1 jempol lengkuas
3 lembar daun salam
4 lembar daun jeruk
1 lembar daun pandan
1 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap
¼ sdt merica

Bahan ayam suwir serundeng:
350 gr dada ayam filet
60 gr kelapa parut
½ bumbu dasar kuning
1 jempol lengkuas
1 batang serai
350 ml air
2 lembar daun salam
4 lembar daun jeruk
20 gr gula merah
½ sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap
¼ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
2 butir telur + ⅛ sdt garam
Timun
Kemangi
Bawang goreng

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bawang putih, bawang merah, kunyit, kacang mede, dan minyak dengan blender lalu tumis hingga wangi dan sedikit menggelap, sisihkan
2. Geprek serai, lengkuas dan jahe
3. Masukkan beras, tumisan bumbu kuning, air, dan santan ke dalam rice cooker kemudian aduk rata
4. Masukkan serai, lengkuas, jahe, daun jeruk, daun salam, daun pandan, garam, kaldu jamur, dan merica, masak hingga matang
5. Masak kembali sisa tumisan bumbu lalu masukkan serai, lengkuas, daun salam, dan daun jeruk, tumis sesaat
6. Potong-potong ayam lalu masukkan ke dalam tumisan bumbu kuning, aduk rata
7. Masukkan air,  garam, kaldu jamur, merica, dan gula merah, masak hingga ayam matang sekitar 8 menit
8. Sisihkan ayam kemudian suwir-suwir dengan garpu
9. Masukkan kelapa parut ke dalam wajan, masak hingga air menyusut lalu masukkan ayam suwir, masak hingga sedikit kering, sisihkan
10. Kocok telur dengan garam kemudian panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng hingga matang lalu iris
11. Nasi kuning ayam serundeng siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Rice Cooker Turmeric Rice Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Yellow Spice Mix ingredients:
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
10 pc cashew
20 g turmeric
3 tbsp oil

Turmeric Rice ingredients:
500 g rice
675 ml water
50 ml coconut milk
½ of the yellow spice mix
1 pc lemongrass
1 slice ginger
1 thumb galangal
3 pc bay leaf
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc pandan leaf
1 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Shredded Serundeng Chicken ingredients:
350 g chicken breast fillet
60 g grated coconut
½ of the yellow spice mix
1 thumb galangal
1 pc lemongrass
350 ml water
2 pc bay leaf
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
20 g palm sugar
½ tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
2 pc egg + ⅛ tsp salt
Cucumber
Lemon basil
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, oil, turmeric, cashew, and oil. Sauté until fragrant and a bit dark. Set aside.
2. Pound the lemongrass, galangal, and ginger.
3. Add the rice, yellow spice mix, water, and coconut milk into the rice cooker. Stir well.
4. Add lemongrass, galangal, ginger, lime leaf, bay leaf, pandan leaf, salt, mushroom powder, and pepper. Cook the rice normally.
5. Cook the rest of the yellow spice mix again. Add lemongrass, galangal, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Cook for a moment.
6. Slice the chicken and add into the spice mix. Stir.
7. Add water, salt, mushroom powder, pepper, and palm sugar. Cook until the chicken is done, about 8 minutes.
8. Set the chicken aside, then shred with forks.
9. Add grated coconut into the pan. Cook until the water is reduced, then add shredded chicken. Cook until a bit crisp. Set aside.
10. Beat the eggs with salt. Heat some oil and fry the egg until it’s cooked, then slice it.
11. Serundeng Chicken Rice is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Wangi! Resep BLACK PEPPER OAT BEEF BURGER
recipe_id:
Resep Black Pepper Oat Beef Burger (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan patty:
300 gr daging sapi giling
70 gr Quaker Rolled Oats
2 butir putih telur
4 buah cabai keriting merah
½ buah paprika merah
½ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
⅛ sdt merica

Bahan saus lada hitam:
4 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai
60 gr saus tomat
3 sdm kecap inggris
1,5 sdm maizena
10 gr lada hitam, sangrai, haluskan
200 ml air
1 sdt kaldu sapi bubuk
1 sdm gula pasir
1 sdm mentega tawar
⅛ sdt garam

Bahan lainnya:
200 gr jamur champignon
Selada
Bawang bombai, potong
Tomat merah, potong
Roti hamburger

Langkah:
1. Untuk saus, cincang halus bawang bombai dan bawang putih lalu panaskan sedikit minyak tumis bawang bombai hingga wangi
2. Masukkan bawang putih, mentega, dan lada hitam, aduk rata kemudian masukkan air, kecap inggris, saus tomat, gula pasir, dan kaldu sapi, masak di api kecil 
3. Masukkan garam, masak selama kurang lebih 5 menit lalu masukkan larutan maizena, masak hingga mengental. Sisihkan
4. Iris jamur lalu panaskan minyak, tumis beberapa saat. Sisihkan 
5. Potong kotak-kotak kecil paprika dan cabai keriting lalu cincang sebagian jamur yang telah di tumis
6. Untuk patty, campurkan daging giling, Quaker Rolled Oats, putih telur, garam, gula pasir, merica,  jamur, paprika merah, dan cabai merah, aduk rata
7. Bagi menjadi 4 lalu bentuk bulat. Masukkan ke dalam wajan yang telah panas, masak beberapa saat di kedua sisi
8. Masukkan ke dalam air fryer atau oven. Panggang di suhu 200°C selama 8 menit
9. Panggang roti burger lalu susun selada, tomat, patty, jamur, bawang bombai, dan saus lada hitam
10. Oat beef black pepper  burger siap disajikan   

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @QUAKERINDONESIA
Instagram: https://instagram.com/quakerindonesia/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzxa3KseF0KhoJsmy0E11CQ
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/quakerofficial
Tokopedia: bit.ly/QuakerChefDevina
recipe_en:
Black Pepper Oat Beef Burger Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Patty ingredients:
300 g ground beef
70 g Quaker Rolled Oats
2 pc egg white
4 pc red curly chili
½ pc red bell pepper
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper

Black Pepper Sauce ingredients:
4 clove garlic
½ pc onion
60 g ketchup
3 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1.5 tbsp cornstarch
10 g black pepper, toasted, ground
200 ml water
1 tsp beef powder
1 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp unsalted butter
⅛ tsp salt

Other ingredients:
200 g champignon mushroom
Lettuce
Onion, sliced
Red tomato, sliced
Hamburger buns

Steps:
1. For the sauce, chop the onion and garlic finely. Heat some oil, then sauté the onion until fragrant.
2. Add garlic, butter, and black pepper. Stir, then add water, Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, and beef powder. Cook on low heat.
3. Add salt. Cook for about 5 minutes, then add the cornstarch mixture. Cook until it thickens, then set aside.
4. Slice the mushroom. Heat the oil and sauté for a moment. Set aside.
5. Dice the bell pepper and chili, then chop some of the sautéed mushrooms.
6. For the patty, combine the ground beef, Quaker Rolled Oats, egg whites, salt, sugar, pepper, mushroom, red bell pepper, and red chili. Mix well.
7. Divide into 4 parts, then shape into a patty. Cook both sides on a hot pan for a moment.
8. Place the patties into an air fryer or an oven. Grill at  200°C for 8 minutes.
9. Toast the buns, then arrange the lettuce, tomato, patty, mushroom, onion, and Black Pepper Sauce.
10. Black Pepper Oat Beef Burger is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Ekonomis! Resep TEMPE LADA HITAM [Menu Vegetarian]
recipe_id:
Resep Tempe Lada Hitam (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr tempe
70 gr maizena
1 butir telur
4 sdm air
½ sdt kaldu jamur / penyedap
3 siung bawang putih

Bahan saus lada hitam:
2 sdm margarin
1 sdm minyak
4 siung bawang putih, cincang
6 siung bawang merah, cincang
220 ml air
20 gr lada hitam, sangrai, haluskan
2 sdm gula pasir
2 sdm kecap inggris
1 sdm kecap asin
½ sdt minyak wijen
3 sdm Royco Saus Tiram
2 sdt kaldu jamur
120 gr saus tomat

Bahan lainnya:
½ buah bawang bombai
2 buah cabai merah
2 buah cabai hijau

Langkah:
1. Untuk saus, panaskan minyak tumis bawang putih dan bawang merah, tumis beberapa saat hingga wangi
2. Masukkan margarin, aduk rata lalu masukkan lada hitam, tumis beberapa saat 
3. Tambahkan air, saus tomat, kecap inggris, kecap asin, Royco Saus Tiram, minyak wijen, gula pasir, dan kaldu jamur, masak beberapa saat. Sisihkan    
4. Potong tempe lalu suwir, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
5. Masukkan bawang putih , telur, air, maizena, dan kaldu jamur, aduk rata
6. Panaskan minyak, goreng tempe hingga kecokelatan dan kering, tirikan
7. Potong kotak cabai merah, cabai  hijau dan bawang bombai lalu tumis sesaat di wajan yang sama
8. Masukkan tempe dan setengah saus lada hitam, aduk rata
9. Tempe lada hitam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Black Pepper Tempeh Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Bahan:
250 g tempeh
70 g cornstarch
1 pc egg
4 tbsp water
½ tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
3 clove garlic

Black Pepper Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp oil
4 clove garlic, minced
6 pc shallot, minced
220 ml water
20 g black pepper, toasted, ground
2 tbsp sugar
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tsp sesame oil
3 tbsp Royco Oyster Sauce
2 tsp mushroom stock powder
120 g ketchup

Others:
½ pc onion
2 pc red chili
2 pc green chili

Steps:
1. For the Sauce, heat oil. Sauté garlic and shallots for a moment until fragrant.
2. Add margarine. Stir, then add black pepper and cook for a moment.
3. Add water, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, Royco Oyster Sauce, sesame oil, sugar, and mushroom stock powder. Cook for a moment. Set aside.
4. Slice the tempeh and pinch into chunks. Place in a bowl.
5. Add garlic, egg, water, cornstarch, and mushroom stock powder. Mix well.
6. Heat the oil. Fry the tempeh until golden brown and crisp. Set aside.
7. Dice the red chili, green chili, and onion. Stir-fry for a moment in the same pan.
8. Add the tempeh and half of the Black Pepper Sauce. Mix well.
9. Black Pepper Tempeh is ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Cetakan! Resep MIE HIJAU LEBAR [Mie Goreng Terasi]
recipe_id:
Resep Mie Goreng Terasi (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan adonan mie:
280 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
4 gr garam
160 ml air
2 sdt Kaileaf Moringa Leaf Powder
Minyak untuk merendam adonan

Bahan lainnya:
4 gr terasi, bakar
8 buah cabai rawit merah, iris
2 buah cabai merah, iris
4 siung bawang putih, cincang
7 siung bawang merah, iris
2 butir telur
1 sdm kecap asin
50 gr sawi hijau, potong
80 gr tauge
3 sdm minyak untuk menumis
1 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan mie, di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, garam, dan Kaileaf Moringa Leaf Powder, aduk rata kemudian masukkan air, aduk kembali. Uleni hingga menyatu
2. Bentuk memanjang, bagi menjadi 8 bagian kemudian tarik memanjang kembali dan gulung
3. Masukkan semua adonan ke dalam wadah berisi minyak, tutup dengan cling wrap. Diamkan minimal 1-2 jam
4. Ambil satu per satu adonan, pipihkan lalu tekan bagian tengah mie dengan sumpit hingga membentuk lipatan 
5. Lempar-lempar adonan hingga memanjang lalu sobek pada bagian tengah 
6. Didihkan air, rebus mie hingga matang sekitar 3-4 menit, bilas dengan air. Tiriskan 
7. Panaskan minyak, masukkan telur, aduk rata kemudian masukkan terasi, masak beberapa saat
8. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, dan cabai rawit, masak hingga wangi
9. Masukkan mie, kecap asin, gula pasir, merica, kaldu bubuk, sawi hijau, tauge, dan cabai merah, masak beberapa saat
10. Mie goreng terasi siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Shrimp Paste Fried Noodles Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Noodle Dough ingredients:
280 g bread flour
4 g salt
160 ml water
2 tsp Kaileaf Moringa Leaf Powder
Oil to soak the dough

Other ingredients:
4 g shrimp paste, toasted
8 pc red Thai chili, sliced
2 pc red chili, sliced
4 clove garlic, minced
7 pc shallot, sliced
2 pc egg
1 tbsp soy sauce
50 g choy sum, sliced
80 g beansprout
3 tbsp oil, to stir fry
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp stock powder / MSG

Steps:
1. For the noodle dough, in a bowl, combine the flour, salt, and Kaileaf Moringa Leaf Powder. Mix well, then add water and mix again. Knead until the dough comes together.
2. Shape the dough into a long cylinder. Divide it into 8 pieces, then pull and roll each piece.
3. Soak all the dough in oil and cover in plastic wrap. Rest for at least 1-2 hours.
4. Get a piece of dough. Flatten it, then press the middle with a chopstick to form a fold.
5. Throw the dough down while pulling, then tear it down the middle.
6. Boil the water and cook the noodles for 3-4 minutes. Rinse with water and set aside.
7. Heat some oil. Add the eggs and stir. Then, add shrimp paste and cook for a moment.
8. Add garlic, shallots, and Thai chili. Cook until fragrant.
9. Add the noodles, soy sauce, sugar, pepper, stock powder, choy sum, beansprouts, and red chili. Cook for a moment.
10. Shrimp Paste Fried Noodles is ready to serve.

title: Wangi Gurih Bikin Nagih! Resep NASI BAKAR AYAM KEMANGI
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Bakar Ayam Kemangi (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan nasi gurih:
375 gr Beras Premium Fortune
500 ml air
5 siung bawang merah, geprek
2 lembar daun salam
1 batang serai, geprek, potong
1 jempol lengkuas, geprek
2 buah cabai merah, belah dua
2 sdm margarin
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
50 gr kemangi

Bahan marinasi:
350 gr paha ayam filet
1 buah jeruk nipis ukuran kecil
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica

Bahan tumis ayam:
6 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
8 buah cabai rawit merah
12 buah cabai rawit hijau
1 buah tomat merah ukuran kecil
2 buah cabai merah
2 buah cabai hijau
2 batang daun bawang
50 gr kemangi
¼ sdt garam 
1 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
2 sdt gula pasir
50 ml Minyak Goreng Fortune

Langkah:
1. Cuci bersih Beras Premium Fortune lalu masukkan ke dalam wadah rice cooker
2. Masukkan air, bawang merah, serai, lengkuas, cabai merah, kaldu ayam bubuk dan margarin, masak hingga matang 
3. Setelah matang masukkan kemangi, aduk rata
4. Marinasi ayam dengan perasan jeruk nipis, garam dan merica, diamkan beberapa saat 
5. Panaskan sedikit Minyak Goreng Fortune lalu masukkan ayam, goreng hingga kecokelatan di kedua belah sisi
6. Setelah matang, potong-potong ayam, sisihkan
7. Haluskan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit merah, cabai rawit hijau, dan Minyak Goreng Fortune lalu tumis hingga matang di api kecil
8. Masukkan ayam, aduk rata lalu masukkan daun bawang, tomat, cabai merah dan cabai hijau yang telah dipotong, masak sesaat
9. Tambahkan garam, kaldu bubuk dan gula pasir, aduk rata. Matikan api lalu tambahkan daun kemangi, aduk rata
10. Potong lebar daun pisang lalu bakar di atas api hingga layu
11. Tuang tumisan ayam di atas daun pisang lalu masukkan nasi yang telah di cetak
12. Gulung kemudian ratakan dengan sendok di kedua sisi, sematkan tusuk gigi
13. Panaskan panggangan, bakar nasi hingga wangi dan kecokelatan
14. Nasi bakar ayam siap disajikan

title: Fresh and Creamy! Puff Pastry Fruit Pie Recipe
recipe_id:
Resep Puff Pastry Fruit Pie (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
Puff pastry
Tepung terigu
Mentega

Bahan pastry cream:
350 ml susu
75 gr Krim Kafe Kapal Api 
60 gr gula pasir
2 butir kuning telur
30 gr maizena
30 gr mentega tawar
1 sdt perisa vanila
⅓ sdt garam

Topping:
Kiwi, potong
Stroberi, potong
Blueberry, potong
Jeruk kaleng

Bahan lainnya:
2 sdt bubuk jelly
300 ml air

Langkah:
1. Untuk pastry cream, panaskan susu dan Krim Kafe Kapal Api hingga sedikit mendidih lalu di wadah terpisah, campurkan kuning telur, gula pasir, maizena, dan garam, aduk rata 
2. Tuang campuran susu yang sudah panas secara perlahan sambil di aduk lalu masak kembali di dalam panci yang sama hingga mengental
3. Masukkan mentega dan perisa vanila, aduk rata lalu masukkan ke dalam mangkuk sambil di saring. Tutup dengan cling wrap, dinginkan
4. Setelah dingin, aduk pastry cream dengan balloon whisk hingga lembut
5. Untuk puff pastry, taburkan sedikit tepung terigu lalu pipihkan dengan rolling pin
6. Potong puff pastry seukuran loyang yang digunakan, lebihkan sedikit
7. Oles loyang dengan mentega lalu tepung terigu, ratakan 
8. Simpan puff pastry ke dalam loyang lalu tusuk-tusuk dengan garpu
9. Tumpuk dengan kertas roti dan piring atau pemberat lalu panggang di suhu 190°C selama 25 menit
10. Setelah dingin, masukkan pastry cream lalu susun buah-buahan sebagai topping
11. Masak jelly dengan air kemudian oleskan ke dalam buah
12. Puff pastry fruit pie siap disajikan  

Krim Kafe ini merupakan krimer serbaguna tidak hanya berfungsi untuk krimer kopi, tetapi sebagai bahan masakan untuk makanan dan minuman manis. Krim Kafe ini juga low sodium lho!

recipe_en:
Fruit Pie Puff Pastry Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Ingredients:
Puff pastry
Flour
Butter

Pastry Cream ingredients:
350 ml milk
75 g Kapal Api Krim Kafe
60 g sugar
2 pc egg yolk
30 g cornstarch
30 g unsalted butter
1 tsp vanilla extract
⅓ tsp salt

Topping:
Kiwi, sliced
Strawberry, sliced
Blueberry, sliced
Canned orange

Other ingredients:
2 tsp jelly powder
300 ml water

Steps:
1. For the Pastry Cream, heat the milk and Kapal Api Krim Kafe until simmering. In a separate bowl, mix the egg yolks, sugar, cornstarch, and salt well.
2. Pour the simmering milk mixture slowly into the bowl as you stir. Then, place it back in the pan and cook until thickened.
3. Add butter and vanilla extract. Mix well, then sift and transfer to a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and chill.
4. After it’s chilled, stir the Pastry Cream with a balloon whisk until smooth.
5. For the puff pastry, dust it with flour and flatten with a rolling pin.
6. Slice the puff pastry a little bit bigger than the baking pan.
7. Spread butter on the pan and dust it with flour evenly.
8. Place the puff pastry in the pan, then poke holes in it with a fork.
9. Layer it with baking paper and a plate or weights, then bake at 190°C for 25 minutes.
10. After the pastry cools down, add the Pastry Cream and assemble the fruits on top.
11. Cook the jelly with water, then brush it on top of the fruits.
12. Fruit Pie Puff Pastry is ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Alat Khusus! Resep MIE TEPUNG BERAS [Gluten Free]
recipe_id:
Resep Mie Tepung Beras (untuk 1-2 porsi)

Bahan:
150 gr tepung beras
150 gr tepung tapioka
180 gr air mendidih
¼ sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung beras, tepung tapioka dan garam, aduk rata
2. Didihkan air, tuang ke dalam campuran tepung, aduk dengan sumpit hingga membentuk butiran pasir lalu uleni hingga menyatu
3. Pipihkan adonan mie dengan rolling pin lalu potong-potong
4. Didihkan air kemudian rebus mie hingga mengapung dan matang, bilas dengan air mengalir, tiriskan
5. Mie tepung beras siap untuk diolah
recipe_en:
Rice Flour Noodles Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
150 g rice flour
150 g tapioca flour
180 g boiling water
¼ tsp salt

Steps:
1. In a bowl, add rice flour, tapioca flour, and salt. Mix well.
2. Boil some water, then pour it into the bowl. Knead until it comes together.
3. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin, then slice it.
4. Boil some water, then cook the noodles until it floats and is cooked. Set aside.
5. Rice Flour Noodles is ready to use.

title: Luar Krispi Dalam Lembut! Resep PERKEDEL KENTANG KORNET
recipe_id:
Resep Perkedel Kentang (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
3 buah kentang rebus (550 gr)
1 butir kuning telur
6 siung bawang merah
8 siung bawang putih
1 sdt bubuk kari
1 batang daun bawang, iris
4 sdm tepung tapioka
½ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
100 gr kornet sapi

Langkah:
1. Panaskan sedikit minyak kemudian masukkan bawang merah dan bawang putih, goreng di api sedang hingga matang dan sedikit kecokelatan, sisihkan   
2. Hancurkan kentang dengan ulekan kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
3. Haluskan bawang yang telah digoreng kemudian masukkan ke dalam kentang
4. Masukkan kuning telur, bubuk kari, daun bawang, tepung tapioka, kornet, garam, kaldu bubuk, gula pasir, dan merica, aduk rata
5. Panaskan minyak, bentuk bulat perkedel dengan garpu kemudian goreng hingga matang di api kecil sedang, tiriskan
6. Perkedel kentang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Potato Patty Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc boiled potato (550 g)
1 pc egg yolk
6 pc shallot
8 clove garlic
1 tsp curry powder
1 pc green onion, sliced
4 tbsp tapioca flour
½ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp stock powder
100 g corned beef

Steps:
1. Heat some oil, then fry the shallots and garlic on medium heat until cooked and slightly browned. Set aside.
2. Mash the potatoes in a stone bowl, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Mash the fried shallots and garlic until smooth. Add into the potato.
5. Add the yolk, curry powder, green onions, tapioca flour, corned beef, salt, stock powder, sugar, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Heat the oil. Shape the Potato Patty with a fork, then fry on medium-low heat until cooked. Set aside.
6. Potato Patty is ready to serve.

title: Kenyal Gurih Manis! Resep KUE LAPIS PEPE COKELAT
recipe_id:
Resep Kue Lapis Pepe Cokelat (loyang ukuran 20x20 cm)

Bahan lapis pepe:
800 ml santan instan
800 ml air
6 lembar daun pandan
600 gr tepung sagu
650 gr gula pasir
1,5 sdt bubuk vanili atau 2 sdt perisa vanila
2 sdt garam

Bahan tambahan lapisan cokelat:
175 ml Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco
3 sdm bubuk cokelat

Bahan tambahan lapisan putih:
150 ml Indomilk Kental Manis Plain

Pelengkap:
1 sdt kopi bubuk espresso
1 sdm bubuk cokelat
1 sdm tepung sagu
Minyak goreng untuk mengoles loyang

Langkah:
1. Campurkan santan, air, daun pandan, gula pasir, dan garam, masak hingga sedikit mendidih lalu dinginkan
2. Pisahkan daun pandan lalu masukkan tepung sagu dan bubuk vanili, aduk dengan balloon whisk hingga merata 
3. Bagi 2 adonan lalu seduh bubuk cokelat dengan sedikit adonan, aduk rata
4. Campurkan ke dalam adonan cokelat lalu tuang Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco, aduk rata
5. Untuk adonan putih, tuang Indomilk Kental Manis Plain, aduk rata
6. Untuk lapisan paling atas, pisahkan sekitar 2 centong adonan cokelat lalu campur dengan bubuk cokelat, kopi bubuk, dan tepung sagu, aduk rata
7. Oles loyang dengan minyak kemudian panaskan kukusan
8. Tuang satu centong adonan putih, kukus selama 4 menit lalu tuang satu centong adonan cokelat, kukus kembali selama 4 menit, ulangi hingga lapisan putih terakhir
9. Tuang campuran lapisan cokelat setelah lapisan putih kemudian kukus selama 20 menit
10. Diamkan lapis hingga dingin lalu keluarkan dari loyang
11. Lapis pepe siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Chocolate Pepe Layered Cake Recipe (for 20x20 cm or 8x8” pan size)

Pepe Layered Cake ingredients:
800 ml instant coconut milk
800 ml water
6 pc pandan leaf
600 g sago flour
650 g sugar
1.5 tsp vanilla powder or 2 tsp vanilla extract
2 tsp salt

Chocolate Layer additional ingredients:
175 ml Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk
3 tbsp cocoa powder

White Layer additional ingredients:
150 ml Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk

Others:
1 tsp espresso powder
1 tbsp cocoa powder
1 tbsp sago flour
Oil to brush the pan

Steps:
1. Mix the coconut milk, water, pandan, sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil, then let cool.
2. Remove the pandan leaves, then add sago flour and vanilla powder. Mix with a balloon whisk evenly.
3. Divide the batter into two parts. Dilute the cocoa powder with the mixture. Stir evenly.
4. Add the diluted cocoa into the Chocolate batter, then add Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk. Mix well.
5. For the White batter, add Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk. Mix well.
6. For the topmost layer, set aside about 2 ladles worth of Chocolate batter. Mix it with cocoa powder, espresso powder, and sago flour. Mix well.
7. Brush the pan with oil, then heat up the steamer.
8. Pour one ladleful of the White batter. Steam for 4 minutes, then pour one ladleful of the Chocolate batter. Steam again for 4 minutes. Continue until the last White layer.
9. Pour the topmost Chocolate layer, then steam it for 20 minutes.
10. Let the Layered Cake cool down, then remove it from the pan.
11. Pepe Layered Cake is ready to serve.

title: Wangi Berempah! Resep AYAM GORENG KARI
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Goreng Kari (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
800 gr ayam broiler, potong 14
1 butir telur
70 gr roux kari atau 2 sdm bubuk kari + 1 sdt garam
5 siung bawang putih
100 gr tepung tapioka
1 sdm cuka
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica
 
Bahan pelengkap:
8 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
5 buah cabai keriting merah
5 buah cabai keriting hijau
6 buah cabai rawit merah
20 gr kemangi
1 batang daun bawang

Langkah:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan bawang putih halus, parutan roux kari, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, cuka, dan telur, aduk rata kemudian masukkan tepung tapioka, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 1 jam
2. Geprek bawang merah, bawang putih lalu belah dua cabai rawit, potong cabai keriting hijau, cabai keriting merah dan daun bawang 
3. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam di api besar hingga struktur luar ayam terbentuk lalu kecilkan api, goreng hingga matang, tiriskan
4. Goreng bawang merah dan bawang putih, aduk lalu masukkan cabai rawit, cabai keriting merah, cabai keriting hijau, daun bawang, dan daun kemangi, tiriskan
5. Ayam goreng kari siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Curry Fried Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
800 g broiler, chopped into 14 pieces
1 pc egg
70 g curry roux or 2 tbsp curry powder + 1 tsp salt
5 clove garlic
100 g tapioca flour
1 tbsp vinegar
1 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
 
Add-ons:
8 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
5 pc red curly chili
5 pc green curly chili
6 pc red Thai chili
20 g lemon basil
1 pc green onion

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with minced garlic, grated curry roux, chicken powder, pepper, vinegar, and egg. Mix well, then add tapioca flour. Mix well and marinate for 1 hour.
2. Pound the shallots and garlic. Halve the Thai chili. Slice the red curly chili, green curly chili, and green onions.
3. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken on medium-high heat until the outer structure is formed. Then, lower the heat and fry until they’re thoroughly cooked. Set aside.
4. Fry the shallots and garlic. Stir, then add Thai chili, red curly chili, green curly chili, green onions, and lemon basil. Set aside.
5. Curry Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Gurih & Segar! Resep ES CAMPUR TAIWAN [Taiwanese Dessert]
recipe_id:
Resep Taiwanese Dessert (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan taro ball:
150 gr talas, kukus
60 gr tepung tapioka / tepung beras ketan
2-3 sdm air panas
1 sdm gula pasir

Bahan sweet potato ball:
150 gr ubi jalar merah, kukus
45 gr tepung tapioka / tepung beras ketan
2-3 sdm air panas
1 sdm gula pasir

Bahan sirup gula:
500 ml air
300 gr gula pasir
3 lembar daun pandan

Bahan kuah susu:
300 ml susu
15 sdm Krim Kafe Kapal Api
150 ml air panas

Bahan kacang hijau:
100 gr kacang hijau, rendam semalaman
2 lembar daun pandan
3 iris jahe
1 liter air
80 gr gula pasir

Pelengkap:
Cincau hitam
Es serut

Langkah:
1. Untuk sirup gula, di dalam panci masukkan air, gula pasir, dan pandan, masak hingga mendidih, dinginkan
2. Untuk kuah susu, campurkan Krim Kafe Kapal Api dengan air panas lalu tambahkan susu, aduk rata. Dinginkan
3. Untuk kacang hijau, di dalam panci masukkan air, kacang hijau, daun pandan, dan jahe, masak hingga empuk lalu tambahkan gula pasir, masak sesaat selama 5 menit, sisihkan
4. Hancurkan ubi di dalam mangkuk lalu masukkan tepung tapioka dan gula pasir, aduk rata
5. Tambahkan air panas perlahan, uleni hingga menyatu kemudian bentuk memanjang, potong-potong
6. Hancurkan talas di dalam mangkuk  lalu masukkan tepung tapioka, dan gula pasir, aduk rata 
7. Tambahkan air panas secara perlahan, uleni hingga menyatu kemudian bentuk memanjang, potong-potong
8. Didihkan air, masukkan adonan ubi, rebus hingga matang lalu masukkan ke dalam sirup gula
9. Di panci yang sama masukkan adonan talas, rebus hingga matang lalu pindahkan ke dalam sirup gula
10. Susun es serut, cincau hitam, kacang hijau, dan mochi ball ke dalam mangkuk kemudian tuang kuah susu
11. Es campur ala Taiwan siap disajikan  

Krim Kafe ini merupakan krimer serbaguna tidak hanya berfungsi untuk krimer kopi, tetapi sebagai bahan masakan untuk makanan dan minuman manis. Krim Kafe ini juga low sodium lho!

recipe_en:
Taiwanese Dessert Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Taro Ball ingredients:
150 g taro, steamed
60 g tapioca flour / glutinous rice flour
2-3 tbsp hot water
1 tbsp sugar

Sweet Potato Ball ingredients:
150 g sweet potato, steamed
45 g tapioca flour / glutinous rice flour
2-3 tbsp hot water
1 tbsp sugar

Sugar Syrup ingredients:
500 ml water
300 g sugar
3 pc pandan leaf

Milk Soup ingredients:
300 ml milk
15 tbsp Krim Kafe Kapal Api
150 ml hot water

Mung Bean ingredients:
100 g mung bean, soaked overnight
2 pc pandan leaf
3 slice ginger
1 L water
80 g sugar

Others:
Grass jelly
Shaved ice

Steps:
1. For the Sugar Syrup, add water, sugar, and pandan to a pan. Bring to a boil. Let cool.
2. For the Milk Soup, mix Krim Kafe Kapal Api with hot water. Add milk. Mix and let cool.
3. For the Mung Beans, add water, mung beans, pandan leaf, and ginger into a pot. Boil until soft, then add sugar. Cook for 5 minutes, then set aside.
4. Mash the sweet potato in a bowl. Add tapioca flour and sugar. Mix well.
5. Add hot water bit by bit. Knead until the dough comes together, then shape into a cylinder and slice.
6. Mash the taro in a bowl. Add tapioca flour and sugar. Mix well.
7. Add hot water bit by bit. Knead until the dough comes together, then shape into a cylinder and slice.
8. Boil the water. Add the Sweet Potato Balls and boil until they’re cooked, then transfer into the Sugar Syrup.
9. In the same pot, add the Taro Balls and boil until they’re cooked, then transfer into the Sugar Syrup.
10. Assemble the shaved ice, grass jelly, mung beans, Sweet Potato Balls, and Taro Balls into a bowl. Then, pour the Milk Soup.
11. Taiwanese Dessert is ready to serve.

title: Creamy Soft! BAKED MACARONI WITH CHEESE Recipe [Macaroni Schotel]
recipe_id:
Resep Macaroni Schotel (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr makaroni kering
1 liter air
½ sdt garam

Bahan saus putih:
7 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
5 sdm mentega tawar
750 ml susu
¼ sdt bubuk pala
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt garam
¾ sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt lada hitam
60 gr keju cheddar
70 gr keju mozarella / quick melt
1 batang seledri
3 butir telur

Bahan isian:
85 gr kornet sapi
100 gr beef bacon
80 gr daging cincang
1 buah bawang bombai ukuran kecil
2 siung bawang putih
Minyak secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Didihkan air, masukkan makaroni dan garam, rebus selama 8-10 menit lalu bilas dengan air mengalir, tiriskan
2. Cincang bawang bombai, bawang putih, dan potong kotak kecil beef bacon, sisihkan
3. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang bombai dan bawang putih hingga wangi kemudian masukkan kornet, masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan
4. Masukkan daging cincang dan beef bacon, masak hingga matang, sisihkan 
5. Di wajan yang sama, masukkan mentega, tepung terigu, bubuk pala, dan merica, masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan
6. Masukkan susu perlahan sambil diaduk kemudian masukkan garam, masak hingga mengental
7. Pisahkan sedikit saus putih ke dalam mangkuk 
8. Masukkan  parutan keju cheddar ke dalam saus putih, lalu masukkan makaroni, tumisan daging, telur, seledri, kaldu bubuk, dan lada hitam, aduk rata  
9. Pindahkan ke dalam loyang tuangkan saus putih lalu beri parutan keju mozarella di atasnya
10. Panggang di suhu 165°C selama 30 menit
11. Keluarkan macaroni schotel, diamkan hingga dingin lalu potong
12. Macaroni schotel siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Macaroni Schotel Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g dry macaroni
1 L water
½ tsp salt

White Sauce ingredients:
7 tbsp all-purpose flour
5 tbsp unsalted butter
750 ml milk
3 pc egg
¼ tsp nutmeg powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp salt
¾ tsp stock powder
¼ tsp black pepper
60 g cheddar cheese
70 g mozzarella / quick melt cheese
1 pc celery

Filling ingredients:
85 g corned beef
100 g beef bacon
80 g ground beef
1 pc onion, small
2 clove garlic
Oil, as needed

Steps:
1. Bring water to a boil. Add macaroni and salt. Boil for 8-10 minutes, then rinse under running water. Set aside.
2. Chop the onion and garlic. Dice the beef bacon. Set aside.
3. Heat the oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant. Then, add corned beef and cook until lightly browned.
4. Add ground beef and beef bacon. Cook thoroughly, then set aside.
5. In the same pan, add butter, flour, nutmeg powder, and pepper. Cook until lightly browned.
6. Add milk bit by bit while stirring. Then, add salt. Cook until it thickens.
7. Set aside some White Sauce into a bowl.
8. Add grated cheese into the White Sauce. Then, add macaroni, sautéed meat, eggs, celery, stock powder, and black pepper. Mix well.
9. Transfer to a baking pan. Add the White Sauce, then add grated mozzarella on top.
10. Bake at 165°C for 30 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and let it cool down before slicing.
12. Macaroni Schotel is ready to serve.

title: Lembut Meresap! Resep CHOCOLATE MILK BATH CAKE
recipe_id:
Resep Chocolate Milk Bath Cake (loyang ukuran 20x30 cm untuk 10-12 porsi)

Bahan cake:
200 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
265 gr gula pasir
60 gr bubuk cokelat
2 sdt baking powder
½ sdt baking soda
2 sdt kopi bubuk espresso
¾ sdt garam
500 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate
120 ml minyak
2 butir telur ukuran besar (total 120 gr)
2 sdt perisa vanila

Bahan milk bath:
200 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Pure
200 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate
35 gr kental manis putih

Bahan choco whipped cream:
350 ml whipping cream
5-6 sdm selai cokelat
1 sdt perisa vanila
⅛ sdt garam

Lainnya:
Milk chocolate / dark chocolate

Langkah:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung terigu, bubuk cokelat, baking soda, baking powder, dan kopi bubuk sambil disaring
2. Masukkan garam dan gula pasir, aduk dengan balloon whisk lalu masukkan MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate, telur, minyak, dan perisa vanila, aduk hingga rata
3. Tuang ke dalam loyang lalu panggang di suhu 165°C selama 50 menit
4. Untuk milk bath, campurkan MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate, MilkLife Fresh Milk Pure, dan kental manis, aduk rata. Dinginkan
5. Untuk choco whipped cream, di dalam wadah tuang whipping cream, selai cokelat, perisa vanila dan garam lalu kocok. Pindahkan ke dalam piping bag, simpan di kulkas
6. Setelah cake dingin, tusuk cake dengan tusuk sate lalu siram milk bath secara perlahan hingga meresap
7. Semprotkan whipped cream lalu taburkan parutan cokelat di atasnya, dinginkan di dalam kulkas
8. Untuk rasa yang maksimal diamkan semalaman sebelum dikonsumsi

recipe_en:
Chocolate Milk Bath Cake Recipe (for 20x30 cm pan, yield 10-12 servings)

Cake ingredients:
200 g all-purpose flour
265 g sugar
60 g cocoa powder
2 tsp baking powder
½ tsp baking soda
2 tsp espresso powder
¾ tsp salt
500 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate
120 ml oil
2 pc egg, large (a total of 120 g)
2 tsp vanilla extract

Milk Bath ingredients:
200 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Pure
200 ml MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate
35 g white condensed milk

Choco Whipped Cream ingredients:
350 ml whipping cream
5-6 tbsp chocolate spread
1 tsp vanilla extract
⅛ tsp salt

Others:
Milk chocolate / dark chocolate

Steps:
1. In a bowl, sift in flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and espresso powder.
2. Add salt and sugar. Mix with a balloon whisk, then add MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate, eggs, oil, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
3. Pour into a pan. Bake at 165°C for 50 minutes.
4. For the Milk Bath, mix MilkLife Fresh Milk Chocolate, MilkLife Fresh Milk Pure, and condensed milk evenly. Chill.
5. For the Choco Whipped Cream, add whipping cream, chocolate spread, and vanilla extract into a bowl. Whip, transfer into a piping bag, and chill in the fridge.
6. After the cake is cooled, poke holes in it with a skewer. Then, pour the Milk Bath slowly until it’s absorbed.
7. Pipe the Whipped Cream on top and sprinkle shaved chocolate on top. Chill in the fridge.
8. For better taste, let the cake chill overnight before consuming.

title: Seenak Bubur Abang-Abang! Resep BUBUR AYAM OAT KUAH KUNING
recipe_id:
Resep Bubur Oat Kuah Kuning (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan bubur:
200 gr Quaker Rolled Oats
1,2 liter air / kaldu
4 sdm tepung beras
2 lembar daun salam
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

Bahan ayam kuah kuning:
350 gr dada ayam fillet
7 siung bawang merah
5 siung bawang putih
3 butir kemiri
4 cm kunyit
3-4 sdm minyak
2 lembar daun salam
2 batang serai, geprek
2 sdt garam
½ sdm gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica
2 sdm santan
1 liter air

Bahan pelengkap:
Bawang goreng
Seledri
Kerupuk
Sambal rawit
Kecap manis

Langkah:
1. Blender bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, kunyit, dan minyak hingga halus
2. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi di api sedang kecil lalu masukkan daun salam dan serai, aduk rata
3. Tambahkan air, ayam, garam, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk, dan merica, masak hingga mendidih dan matang
4. Masukkan santan, masak beberapa saat, sisihkan ayam lalu suwir
5. Untuk bubur, masukkan Quaker Rolled Oats ke dalam wajan beserta tepung beras, daun salam, air, dan kaldu ayam bubuk, aduk rata masak hingga mendidih sambil diaduk
6. Masukkan garam dan merica, masak hingga mengental

recipe_en:
Oat Porridge with Turmeric Broth Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Porridge ingredients:
200 g Quaker Rolled Oats
1.2 L water / stock
4 tbsp rice flour
2 pc bay leaf
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp chicken powder

Turmeric Broth ingredients:
350 g chicken breast fillet
7 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
3 pc candlenut
4 cm turmeric
3-4 tbsp oil
2 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
2 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
2 tbsp coconut milk
1 L water

Condiments:
Fried shallot
Celery
Crackers
Thai Chili Sambal
Sweet soy sauce

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, turmeric, and oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant on medium-low heat. Add bay leaf and lemongrass. Stir.
3. Add water, chicken, salt, sugar, stock powder, and pepper. Bring to a boil and cook through.
4. Add coconut milk. Cook for a moment. Set the chicken aside and shred.
5. For the Porridge, add Quaker Rolled Oats and rice flour, bay leaf, water, and chicken powder to the pan. Keep stirring and bring to a boil.
6. Season with salt and pepper. Cook until it thickens.
7. Pour the Porridge into a bowl. Add toppings and pour the Turmeric Broth in.
8. Oat Porridge with Turmeric Broth is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Pedas! Resep SAMBAL UDANG KECOMBRANG : Bikin Nambah Nasi!
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Udang Kecombrang (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
400 gr udang utuh

Bahan bumbu rajang:
15-20 buah cabai keriting merah
10 buah cabai rawit merah
12 siung bawang merah
8 siung bawang putih
6 gr terasi bakar, haluskan

Bahan lainnya:
½ buah bawang bombai
1 buah bunga kecombrang
5 lembar daun jeruk
1 lembar daun salam
1 batang serai
1 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm saus tiram
1 buah tomat merah ukuran sedang
150 ml air
⅓ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
4 sdm minyak

Langkah:
1. Masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai keriting, cabai rawit, dan terasi ke dalam food processor, haluskan 
2. Cincang bawang bombai, tomat merah, iris tipis kecombrang dan potong serai
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak tumis campuran cabai hingga setengah kering lalu masukkan daun jeruk, daun salam, serai, bawang bombai, dan kecombrang, aduk rata tumis hingga wangi
4. Masukkan tomat, aduk sesaat lalu tambahkan air, saus tiram dan saus sambal, aduk rata
5. Tambahkan garam, gula pasir, dan kaldu bubuk, masak di api sedang kecil hingga wangi, sisihkan
6. Potong bagian kepala udang yang tajam dan belah punggung udang
7. Panaskan minyak, goreng udang beberapa saat selama 2 menit lalu masukkan ke dalam tumisan sambal, aduk rata
8. Sambal udang kecombrang siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Shrimp with Kecombrang Sambal Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g whole shrimp

Sliced ingredients:
15-20 pc red curly chili
10 pc red Thai chili
12 pc shallot
8 clove garlic
6 g toasted shrimp paste, mashed

Others:
½ pc onion
1 pc kecombrang flower
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc bay leaf
1 pc lemongrass
1 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 pc red tomato, medium
150 ml water
⅓ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
4 tbsp oil

Steps:
1. Add garlic, shallots, curly chili, Thai chili, and shrimp paste to a food processor and blend.
2. Chop the onion and tomato. Slice the kecombrang thinly and slice the lemongrass.
3. Heat some oil. Stir-fry the chili mixture until half-cooked. Then, add lime leaf, bay leaf, lemongrass, onion, and kecombrang. Stir and cook until fragrant.
4. Add the tomato in. Stir for a moment, then add water, oyster sauce, and chili sauce. Stir well.
5. Add salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cook on medium-low heat until fragrant. Set aside.
6. Trim the sharp parts of the shrimp head and butterfly it.
7. Heat the oil. Fry the shrimp for about 2 minutes, then mix with the Sambal well.
9. Shrimp with Kecombrang Sambal is ready to serve.

title: Resep LUMPIA GORENG AYAM JAMUR Favorit Keluarga!
recipe_id:
Resep Lumpia Ayam Jamur (20 pcs)

Bahan:
20 lembar kulit spring roll ukuran besar

Bahan isian:
350 gr ayam giling
150 gr jamur shitake & champignon
150 gr buncis
100 gr wortel
6 siung bawang putih
8 siung bawang merah
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm kecap asin
½ sdt minyak wijen
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm gula pasir

Bahan telur:
3 butir telur
⅛ sdt garam
⅛ sdt merica

Bahan saus aci:
100 gr tepung tapioka
750 ml air
50 gr gula merah
⅛ sdt garam

Bahan pelengkap:
Cabai rawit hijau
Sambal bangkok

Lainnya:
Minyak goreng Fortune

Langkah:
1. Potong kecil-kecil jamur, wortel, dan buncis kemudian haluskan bawang putih dan iris bawang merah 
2. Kocok telur dengan garam dan merica kemudian panaskan sedikit Minyak Goreng Fortune masak telur sambil diaduk, sisihkan
3. Panaskan sedikit Minyak Goreng Fortune, tumis jamur hingga kecokelatan lalu masukkan wortel dan buncis, tumis hingga matang, sisihkan
4. Di wajan yang sama panaskan sedikit Minyak Goreng Fortune lalu tumis bawang merah hingga wangi
5. Masukkan bawang putih, tumis hingga harum lalu masukkan ayam giling, masak hingga matang 
6. Masukkan telur dan sayuran, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan kecap asin, saus tiram, garam, merica, gula pasir, dan minyak wijen, aduk rata
7. Untuk saus kental, dalam keadaan api mati campurkan air, tepung tapioka, dan gula merah, nyalakan api kemudian tambahkan garam, masak hingga mengental dan mengkilap, sisihkan ke dalam mangkuk, dinginkan
8. Siapkan kulit spring roll, oles saus kental di bagian bawah kulit spring roll lalu masukkan isian dan gulung 
9. Panaskan Minyak Goreng Fortune, goreng lumpia di api sedang beberapa saat hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
10. Lumpia ayam jamur siap disajikan
