recipe_en:
Chicken Mushroom Spring Rolls Recipe (yield 20 pcs)

Ingredients:
20 pc Spring Roll skin, large

Filling ingredients:
350 g ground chicken
150 g Shiitake & Champignon mushroom
150 g green bean
100 g carrot
6 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tsp sesame oil
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar

Egg ingredients:
3 pc eggs
⅛ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper

Thick Sauce ingredients:
100 g tapioca flour
750 ml water
50 g palm sugar
⅛ tsp salt

Condiments:
Green Thai chili
Bangkok Sambal

Others:
Fortune frying oil

Steps:
1. Dice the mushroom, carrots, and green beans into small pieces. Mince the garlic and slice the shallots.
2. Whisk the eggs with salt and pepper. Heat a little Fortune Oil and cook the eggs while stirring. Set aside.
3. Heat a little Fortune Oil. Sauté the mushroom until browned, then add carrots and green beans. Stir fry well and set aside.
4. In the same pan, heat a little Fortune Oil and sauté the shallots until fragrant.
5. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant. Then, add ground chicken and cook well.
6. Add the eggs and veggies. Stir well, then add soy sauce, oyster sauce, salt, pepper, sugar, and sesame oil. Mix well.
7. For the Thick Sauce, add water, tapioca flour, and palm sugar into a pan with the heat off. Then, turn the heat on and season with salt. Cook until it thickens and becomes shiny, then place in a bowl and let cool.
8. Prepare the Spring Roll skin and spread the Thick Sauce on the bottom. Add the filling and roll.
9. Heat Fortune Oil and fry the Spring Rolls on medium heat until golden. Set aside.
10. Chicken Mushroom Spring Roll is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Wangi! Resep MISOA AYAM KECAP Favorit Keluarga
recipe_id:
Resep Misoa Ayam Kecap (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan:
400 gr paha ayam filet
1 sdm saus tiram
2 sdt kecap ikan
3 sdm kecap manis
2 sdt kecap hitam, opsional
2 sdt minyak wijen

Bahan lainnya:
75 ml minyak
2 batang daun bawang
7 siung bawang putih
8 siung bawang merah
4 cm jahe
200 ml air
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
¼ sdt merica
2 sdt gula pasir
4 porsi misoa / mie basah

Bahan pelengkap:
Sambal cabai rawit
Kuah kaldu ayam, opsional
Bawang goreng

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam lalu potong kotak kecil, sisihkan
2. Geprek dan cincang bawang putih, iris bawang merah, daun bawang, dan geprek jahe
3. Panaskan minyak tumis bawang merah hingga wangi lalu masukkan bawang putih, jahe, dan daun bawang, tumis hingga wangi
4. Masukkan ayam, masak beberapa saat kemudian masukkan kecap ikan, kecap manis, saus tiram, minyak wijen, kecap hitam dan air, aduk rata
5. Tambahkan kaldu bubuk, merica, dan gula pasir, masak hingga mengental dan meresap
6. Didihkan air, rebus misoa beberapa saat atau hingga matang kemudian bilas dengan air matang
7. Pindahkan misoa ke dalam mangkuk lalu beri topping ayam, bawang goreng, daun bawang, dan sambal rawit
8. Sajikan dengan kuah kaldu jika ingin berkuah
9. Misoa ayam kecap siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Soy Chicken Misoa Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp dark soy sauce, optional
2 tsp sesame oil

Other ingredients:
75 ml oil
2 pc green onions
7 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
4 cm ginger
200 ml water
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
4 serving misoa / fresh noodles

Condiments:
Thai Chili Sambal
Chicken stock, optional
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then small dice. Set aside.
2. Pound and mince the garlic. Slice the shallots, green onions, and pound the ginger.
3. Heat the oil and stir fry the shallots until fragrant. Then, add garlic, ginger, and green onions. Cook until fragrant.
4. Add the chicken. Cook for a moment, then add fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, dark soy sauce, and water. Stir well.
5. Add stock powder, pepper, and sugar. Cook until thick and flavorful.
5. Boil water and cook the Misoa for a moment or until cooked. Rinse with mineral water.
7. Transfer Misoa into a bowl. Add chicken topping, fried shallots, green onions, and Thai Chili Sambal.
8. Serve with chicken stock for the Soupy version.
9. Soy Chicken Misoa is ready to serve.

title: Luar Krispi Dalam Kenyal! Resep TAHU ACI KRISPI KUAH GEJROT
recipe_id:
Resep Tahu Aci Krispi Kuah Gejrot (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
10 pcs tahu putih
250 gr tepung tapioka
½ sdm garam
½ sdm kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica

Bahan kuah gejrot:
350 ml air
80 + 40 gr gula merah, sisir
2 sdm kecap manis
5 butir asam jawa
6-12 siung bawang merah
20-30 buah cabai rawit hijau
1,5 sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Untuk kuah, masukkan air, gula merah, asam jawa, dan kecap manis ke dalam panci, masak hingga mendidih. Diamkan beberapa saat lalu saring
2. Potong-potong tahu kemudian pipihkan dengan tangan
3. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan tepung tapioka, garam, merica, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata 
4. Masukkan tahu ke dalam tepung sambil di ratakan. Diamkan selama 5-10 menit hingga menyerap
5. Panaskan minyak, sebelum digoreng masukkan tahu yang sudah meresap ke dalam tepung lalu goreng hingga setengah matang, tiriskan
6. Diamkan selama 5 menit lalu goreng kembali hingga kuning kecokelatan atau garing, tiriskan
7. Di dalam ulekan, masukkan bawang merah, garam, cabai rawit, dan gula merah, ulek kasar
8. Masukkan kuah gejrot ke dalam sambal, aduk rata
9. Tahu aci siap disajikan dengan sambal gejrot
recipe_en:
Crispy Chewy Tofu in Chili Soy “Gejrot” Sauce Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
10 pc white tofu
250 g tapioca flour
½ tbsp salt
½ tbsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Gejrot Sauce ingredients:
350 ml water
80 + 40 g palm sugar, shaved
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
5 pc tamarind
6-12 pc shallot
20-30 pc green Thai chili
1.5 tsp salt

Steps:
1. For the Sauce, add water, palm sugar, tamarind, and sweet soy sauce into the pan. Bring to a boil. Let it rest for a moment, then strain.
2. Slice the tofu, then flatten in with your palm.
3. In a bowl, combine tapioca flour with salt, pepper, and stock powder. Mix well.
4. Coat the tofu with the flour mix evenly. Let it rest for 5-10 minutes until the flour is absorbed.
5. Heat the oil. Before frying, coat the wet tofu with the flour mix again. Then, fry until they’re half-cooked and set aside.
6. Let them rest for 5 minutes, then fry them again until golden brown or crisp. Set aside.
7. In a stone bowl, add shallots, salt, Thai chili, and palm sugar. Grind roughly.
8. Add the Gejrot Sauce into the chili and mix well.
9. Crispy Tofu is ready to serve with Gejrot Sambal.

title: Crunchy & Kenyal! Resep CRISPY PIZZA TANPA OVEN [Gluten Free]
recipe_id:
Resep Crispy Pizza (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
125 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Beras
35 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Tapioka
1½ cup / 350 ml air
200 ml susu
25 ml minyak
¼ sdt garam
2 sdt mustard

Bahan isian:
Sosis
Bawang bombai
Cabai rawit hijau
Tomat merah
Tuna kaleng
Sambal matah (https://youtu.be/2l43lXBBJo0) 

Lainnya:
Mayones
Saus sambal
Saus tomat
Keju slice
Lada hitam, opsional
Parsley, cincang, opsional
Basil kering

Langkah:
1. Di dalam mangkuk campurkan BOLA Deli Tepung Beras, BOLA Deli Tepung Tapioka, garam, air, susu, minyak, dan mustard, aduk hingga rata
2. Potong bawang bombai, tomat, sosis dan cabai rawit
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak tumis bawang bombai dan sosis beberapa saat sisihkan
4. Di wajan yang sama tambahkan sedikit minyak, tuang adonan sedikit demi sedikit, ratakan
5. Kecilkan api. Masukkan tomat lalu tuang sedikit minyak di sekeliling wajan
6. Masukkan saus tomat, dan saus sambal, ratakan kemudian tambahkan sosis, bawang bombai, basil kering, cabai rawit, keju, dan mayones, tutup lalu masak hingga pinggiran menjadi kering
7. Taburkan parsley dan lada hitam
8. Untuk sambal matah, tuang adonan ke dalam wajan ,lalu susun tomat
9. Tuang sedikit minyak di sekeliling wajan lalu masukkan tuna dan keju, masak hingga kering di api kecil
10. Masukkan sambal matah dan taburkan parsley, angkat 
11. Crispy pizza siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Crispy Pizza Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
125 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
35 g BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour
1.5 cup water
200 ml milk
25 ml oil
¼ tsp salt
2 tsp mustard

Toppings:
Sausage
Onion
Green Thai chili
Red tomato
Canned tuna
Sambal matah (https://youtu.be/2l43lXBBJo0) 

Others:
Mayonnaise
Chili sauce
Ketchup
Sliced cheese
Black pepper, optional
Parsley, chopped, optional
Dried basil

Steps:
1. In a bowl, combine BOLA Deli Rice Flour, BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour, salt, water, milk, oil, and mustard. Mix well.
2. Slice the onion, tomato, sausage, and Thai chili.
3. Heat some oil and sauté the onion and sausage for a moment. Set aside.
4. In the same pan, add some oil. Pour the batter bit by bit evenly.
5. Lower the heat. Add the tomato, then pour some oil around the edges.
6. Spread the ketchup and chili sauce evenly, then add sausages, onion, dried basil, Thai chili, cheese, and mayonnaise. Cover the pan and cook until the edges are crisp.
7. Sprinkle some parsley and black pepper.
8. For the Sambal Matah Pizza, pour the batter in the pan, then arrange the tomato.
9. Pour some oil around the edges, then add tuna and cheese. Cook until crisp on low heat.
10. Add the Sambal Matah and sprinkle parsley on top. Set aside.
11. Crispy Pizza is ready to serve.

title: Luar Krispi Dalam Lumer! Resep KROKET BELANDA
recipe_id:
Resep Dutch Croquette (23-25 pcs)

Bahan kaldu ayam:
500 gr ayam paha filet
2 siung bawang putih
1 buah bawang bombai
3 batang seledri
2 lembar bay leaf
1 liter air

Bahan adonan kroket: 
65 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
80 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ sdt bubuk pala
1 sdm mustard
400 ml air kaldu ayam
150 ml Anchor Full Cream Milk
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
2 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
½ sdt garam
1 sdt daun timi (thyme), cincang halus
Ayam suwir

Topping: 
100 gr jamur kancing, potong dadu, tumis
5 slice Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices, potong dadu

Bahan pelapis 1:
Tepung terigu protein sedang

Bahan pelapis 2:
2 butir telur
200 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
170 ml air

Bahan pelapis 3:
Tepung roti

Bahan saus mustard:
5 sdm mustard
1 sdt cuka
⅛ sdt garam
2 sdm sirup gula

Pelengkap:
Roti tawar, panggang

Langkah:
1. Didihkan air, masukkan ayam, bawang bombai, bawang putih, bay leaf, dan daun seledri, masak hingga mendidih, sisihkan busa
2. Jika sudah mendidih kecilkan api, masak selama 45-60 menit. Tambahkan air sedikit demi sedikit jika menyusut 
3. Saring kaldu ayam lalu suwir-suwir ayam dengan garpu
4. Panaskan Anchor Unsalted Butter lalu masukkan tepung terigu, masak di api sedang kecil hingga merata dan wangi
5. Masukkan merica dan pala bubuk, aduk rata
6. Masukkan air kaldu sedikit demi sedikit sambil diaduk kemudian masukkan Anchor Full Cream Milk, aduk rata
7. Masukkan ayam suwir, daun thyme, mustard, gula pasir, kaldu ayam bubuk, dan garam, aduk rata
8. Bagi dua adonan ragout lalu masukkan Anchor cheddar cheese slices, aduk rata
9. Masukkan jamur ke dalam sisa adonan ragout, aduk rata
10. Tutup dengan cling wrap. Masukkan ke dalam kulkas minimal 3 jam
11. Untuk tepung basah, campurkan tepung terigu, telur, dan air, aduk rata
12. Bentuk ragout dengan scoop ice cream lalu lapisi dengan tepung terigu kering. Bentuk memanjang untuk ragout ayam jamur
13. Masukkan ke dalam tepung basah lalu ke dalam tepung roti, ratakan
14. Panaskan minyak lalu goreng kroket di api sedang besar selama satu menit atau hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan 
15. Untuk saus, campurkan mustard, cuka, sirup gula, dan garam, aduk rata
16. Siapkan roti panggang, oleskan saus mustard dan simpan kroket di atasnya
17. Dutch croquette siap disajikan

title: Empuk Gurih! Resep EMPAL SERUNDENG KEMIRI [Menu IdulAdha]
recipe_id:
Resep Empal Serundeng (untuk 8-9 porsi)

Bahan:
1,2 kg daging sapi topside
1,2 liter air
2 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica

Bahan lainnya:
100 gr kemiri
100 gr lengkuas, iris
80 gr gula merah
2 sdm air asam jawa
150 ml santan instan
4 batang serai, geprek, potong
6 lembar daun salam
4 lembar daun jeruk
1 sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
500 ml air
500 ml air kaldu sapi

Bahan bumbu halus:
15 siung bawang putih
18 buah bawang merah
3 cm jahe, iris
2 sdt ketumbar
½ butir pala
100 ml Minyak Goreng Fortune

Pelengkap:
Nasi putih Beras Premium Fortune
Bawang Goreng

Lainnya:
Minyak Goreng Fortune untuk menggoreng

Langkah:
1. Masukkan daging, air, garam, kaldu bubuk, dan merica ke dalam presto. Presto selama 30 menit 
2. Dinginkan daging, potong-potong lalu pukul-pukul perlahan dengan ulekan batu atau rolling pin 
3. Haluskan kemiri dengan food processor lalu sangrai hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan, sisihkan
4. Haluskan lengkuas dengan sedikit air hingga halus, sisihkan
5. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih, jahe, ketumbar, pala, dan Minyak Goreng Fortune hingga halus 
6. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi lalu masukkan serai, daun salam, dan daun jeruk, tumis kembali
7. Masukkan kemiri dan lengkuas, aduk rata masak di api kecil hingga wangi
8. Tambahkan air, santan, air asam jawa, gula merah, garam, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk, dan air kaldu sapi, aduk rata
9. Masukkan daging, masak di api sedang hingga air menyusut, sisihkan daging 
10. Masak kembali sisa bumbu di api sedang kecil hingga menyusut dan mengeluarkan minyak, sisihkan 
11. Panaskan Minyak Goreng Fortune lalu goreng daging hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
12. Goreng serundeng di api sedang kecil hingga kecokelatan, sisihkan
13. Empal serundeng siap disajikan dengan nasi dan taburan bawang goreng sebagai pelengkap

recipe_en:
Empal Serundeng Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
1.2 kg beef, topside
1.2 L water
2 tsp salt
2 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
100 g candlenuts
100 g galangal, sliced
80 g palm sugar
2 tbsp tamarind juice
150 ml instant coconut milk
4 pc lemongrass, pounded, sliced
6 pc bay leaf
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
500 ml water
500 ml beef stock

Blended Spices ingredients:
15 clove garlic
18 pc shallot
3 cm ginger, sliced
2 tsp coriander
½ pc nutmeg
100 ml Fortune Oil

Add-ons:
Fortune Premium Rice
Fried shallot

Others:
Fortune Oil to fry

Steps:
1. Add the meat, water, salt, stock powder, and pepper into the pressure cooker. Cook for 30 minutes.
2. Let the meat cool down. Slice and pound slowly with a stone pestle or a rolling pin.
3. Blend the candlenuts with a food processor, then toast it until fragrant and lightly browned. Set aside.
4. Blend the galangal with a bit of water until smooth. Set aside.
5. Blend the shallots, garlic, ginger, coriander, nutmeg, and Fortune Oil until smooth.
6. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Continue cooking.
7. Add the candlenuts and galangal. Stir and cook on low heat until fragrant.
8. Add water, coconut milk, tamarind juice, palm sugar, salt, sugar, stock powder, and beef stock. Stir.
9. Add the meat in. Cook on medium heat until the liquid is reduced. Set the meat aside.
10. Continue cooking the leftover spices on medium-low heat until it’s reduced and becomes oily. Set aside.
11. Heat Fortune Oil and fry the meat until browned. Set aside.
12. Fry the Serundeng on medium-low heat until browned. Set aside.
13. Empal Serundeng is ready to serve with rice and fried shallots as a topping.

title: Kids Favorite! CHOCOLATE ROLL OVEN Recipe with VLA FILLING
recipe_id:
Resep Dadar Gulung Cokelat (10-12 pcs)

Bahan kulit:
90 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdm maizena
1 sdm bubuk cokelat
300 ml susu Ultra Mimi Kids Cokelat
50 ml air
¼ sdt garam
35 ml margarin cair
1 butir telur

Bahan isian:
2 butir kuning telur
400 ml susu Ultra Mimi Kids Full Cream
30 gr maizena
15 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
50 gr gula pasir
50 gr mentega tawar
1,5 sdt perisa vanila
¼ sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Untuk isian campurkan kuning telur, gula pasir, tepung terigu, maizena, garam, perisa vanila dan susu Ultra Mimi Kids Full Cream ke dalam wajan, aduk rata kemudian masak hingga mendidih sambil diaduk
2. Masukkan mentega, masak hingga mengental lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
3. Tutup dengan cling wrap hingga menyentuh dasar, dinginkan hingga set
4. Aduk isian dengan balloon whisk hingga lembut dan merata lalu masukkan ke dalam piping bag
5. Untuk kulit, campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, bubuk cokelat, garam, margarin cair, telur, susu Ultra Mimi Kids Cokelat, dan air, aduk rata lalu saring
6. Panaskan wajan lalu tuang adonan kulit, masak hingga pinggiran kulit kering, sisihkan. Ulangi hingga habis
7. Susun kulit, semprotkan isian di atasnya lalu gulung
8. Dadar gulung cokelat siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Chocolate Crepe Rolls Recipe (yield 10 pcs)

Crepe ingredients:
90 g all-purpose flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp cocoa powder
300 ml Ultra Mimi Kids Chocolate Milk
50 ml water
¼ tsp salt
35 ml melted margarine
1 pc egg

Custard ingredients:
2 pc egg yolk
400 ml Ultra Mimi Kids Full Cream Milk
30 g cornstarch
15 g all-purpose flour
50 g sugar
50 g unsalted butter
1.5 tsp vanilla extract
¼ tsp salt

Steps:
1. For the Custard, combine egg yolks, sugar, flour, cornstarch, salt, vanilla extract, and Ultra Mimi Kids Full Cream Milk in a pan. Mix well, then bring to a boil while stirring.
2. Add butter. Cook until it thickens, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Cover the surface with plastic wrap and chill to set.
4. Stir the Custard with a balloon whisk until it’s fluffy and even, then place in a piping bag.
5. For the Crepe, combine the flour, cornstarch, cocoa powder, salt, melted margarine, egg, Ultra Mimi Kids Chocolate Milk, and water. Mix well, then strain.
6. Heat the pan and pour the batter in. Cook until the edges are dry, then set aside. Repeat until the batter is finished.
7. Lay the crepe and pipe the filling on top, then roll.
8. Chocolate Crepe Rolls are ready to serve.

title: Soft and Soaked! GOAT SATE Recipe [Eid al-Adha Menu]
recipe_id:
Resep Sate Kambing (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr daging has kambing 
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
5 cm lengkuas, iris
1 sdm ketumbar sangrai
3 sdm air asam jawa
3 sdm Bango Kecap Manis
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
½ sdt merica
2 sdm air

Bahan sambal kecap:
5 siung bawang merah
6 buah cabai rawit merah
1 buah tomat merah
1 buah jeruk nipis
100 ml Bango Kecap Manis

Lainnya:
Margarin

Langkah:
1. Keringkan daging, buang silver skin lalu potong tipis. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Blender lengkuas, ketumbar, bawang putih, bawang merah, dan air asam jawa hingga halus  
3. Masukkan bumbu halus ke dalam daging lalu garam, kaldu bubuk, merica, dan Bango Kecap Manis
4. Tambahkan air, aduk rata. Diamkan selama 30-60 menit
5. Tusuk daging dengan tusukan sate yang telah direndam air
6. Panaskan panggangan, masak sate hingga sedikit kecokelatan di kedua sisi kemudian oleskan margarin, panggang hingga matang
7. Untuk sambal, potong tomat, cabai rawit, bawang merah, dan jeruk nipis
8. Sate kambing siap disajikan dengan sambal kecap

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @BANGOWARISANKULINER
Instagram: https://instagram.com/bangowarisankuliner/
Website: https://bango.co.id/
recipe_en:
Goat Satay (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g goat tenderloin
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 cm galangal, sliced
1 tbsp toasted coriander
3 tbsp tamarind juice
3 tbsp Bango Sweet Soy Sauce
1 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp water

Sweet Soy Sambal ingredients:
5 pc shallot
6 pc red Thai chili
1 pc red tomato
1 pc lime
100 ml Bango Sweet Soy Sauce

Others:
Margarine

Steps:
1. Pat the meat dry. Trim the silver skin, then slice thinly. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Blend the galangal, coriander, garlic, shallots, and tamarind juice until smooth.
3. Add the blended spices to the meat. Add salt, stock powder, pepper, and Bango Sweet Soy Sauce.
4. Add water and mix well. Marinate for 30-60 minutes.
5. Skewer the meat with the soaked satay skewer.
6. Heat the grill. Cook the Satay until lightly browned on both sides, then brush the margarine on and grill until they’re fully cooked.
7. For the Sambal, slice the tomato, Thai chili, shallots, and lime.
8. Goat Satay is ready to serve with Sweet Soy Sambal.

title: Spesial! Resep RAWON KHAS JAWA TIMUR [Menu IdulAdha]
recipe_id:
Resep Rawon (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr daging sapi sengkel
2 batang serai, geprek, potong
2 lembar daun salam
5 lembar daun jeruk
1 buah tomat merah
1,5 liter air
¾ sdm garam   
2 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
1,5 sdm gula pasir
½ sdt merica
1 batang daun bawang, potong

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
5 buah keluak
4 butir kemiri sangrai
3 cm kunyit
50 ml minyak goreng
50 ml air

Bahan sambal:
20 buah cabai rawit merah
3 siung bawang putih
50 ml air
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
Minyak secukupnya

Pelengkap:
Telur asin
Bawang goreng
Jeruk nipis
Kecambah

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, keluak, kunyit, dan minyak kemudian masukkan air, blender kembali hingga halus 
2. Tumis bumbu halus di api sedang kecil hingga keluar minyak lalu masukkan serai, daun jeruk dan daun salam, tumis hingga wangi
3. Masukkan air, masak hingga mendidih lalu pindahkan ke dalam presto
4. Masukkan daging, tomat merah, daun bawang, garam, kaldu bubuk, merica, dan gula pasir, presto selama 60 menit
5. Untuk sambal, masukkan cabai rawit merah dan bawang putih ke dalam food processor, haluskan
6. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis cabai rawit sesaat lalu masukkan air, garam, gula pasir, dan kaldu bubuk, masak hingga menyusut, sisihkan
7. Susun rawon di dalam mangkuk, tambahkan telur asin, kecambah, jeruk nipis, sambal, dan bawang goreng
8. Rawon siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Rawon Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g beef shank
2 pc lemongrass, pounded, sliced
2 pc bay leaf
5 pc kaffir lime leaf
1 pc red tomato
1.5 L water
¾ tbsp salt
2 tsp stock powder / MSG
1.5 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 pc green onion, sliced

Blended Spices ingredients:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
5 pc keluak
4 pc toasted candlenut
3 cm turmeric
50 ml oil
50 ml water

Sambal ingredients:
20 pc red Thai chili
3 clove garlic
50 ml water
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp stock powder / MSG
Oil, as needed

Add-ons:
Salted egg
Fried shallot
Lime
Bean sprout

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, keluak, turmeric, and oil. Add water and blend smoothly.
2. Sauté the blended spices on medium-low heat until oily. Then, add lemongrass, kaffir lime leaf, and bay leaf. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add water. Bring to a boil, then transfer into the pressure cooker.
4. Add meat, red tomato, green onions, salt, stock powder, pepper, and sugar. Cook for 60 minutes.
5. For the Sambal, chop the Thai chili and garlic with a food processor.
6. Heat some oil and sauté the chopped chili for a moment. Then, add water, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cook until the water is reduced and set aside.
7. Assemble the ingredients in a bowl. Add salted egg, bean sprouts, lime, Sambal, and fried shallots.
8. Rawon is ready to serve.

title: Kenyal Kres! Resep BAKSO DAGING SAPI [100% Sukses]
recipe_id:
Resep Bakso Sapi (30-35 pcs)

Bahan:
500 gr daging sapi chuck (leher), kalau banyak darah potong-potong dan bilas terlebih dahulu
100 gr tetelan / lemak sapi
2 sdm bawang merah goreng
½ sdm bawang putih goreng
80 gr tepung sagu
1.5 sdt garam
2 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt merica
1 sdt Royco Kaldu Sapi
130 gr es batu
1 butir putih telur
2 sdt baking powder

Bahan kuah bakso:
2,5 liter air
200 gr tetelan sapi
1 sdt Royco Kaldu Sapi
1 sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm bawang putih goreng
1 sdm bawang merah goreng

Pelengkap:
Sawi hijau
Daun bawang
Seledri
Bawang goreng

Langkah:
1. Keringkan daging, buang silver skin lalu potong-potong
2. Masukkan ke dalam food processor beserta tetelan lalu masukkan garam, gula, merica, Royco Kaldu Sapi, baking powder, bawang merah goreng, dan bawang putih goreng. Haluskan hingga lengket 2-3 menit
3. Masukkan putih telur, haluskan kemudian masukkan es batu secara perlahan, haluskan hingga rata
4. Masukkan tepung sagu, haluskan kembali. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk. Simpan di dalam kulkas
5. Untuk kuah, didihkan air lalu masukkan tetelan
6. Blender bawang putih goreng dan bawang merah goreng kemudian masukkan ke dalam kuah
7. Masukkan Royco Kaldu Sapi, garam, gula pasir, dan merica
8. Potong-potong sawi hijau lalu rebus di panci terpisah, tiriskan
9. Bentuk bulat bakso dengan tangan ataupun dengan sendok kemudian masukkan ke dalam air panas hingga mengapung atau matang
10. Masukkan bakso ke dalam kuah beserta sawi hijau
11. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk beri taburan seledri, daun bawang, dan bawang goreng
12. Bakso sapi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Beef Meatballs Recipe (yield 30-35 pcs)

Ingredients:
500 g beef chuck (neck)
100 g beef trimming / fat
2 tbsp fried shallot
½ tbsp fried garlic
80 g sago flour
1.5 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp Royco Beef Powder
130 g ice cube
1 pc egg white
2 tsp baking powder

Broth ingredients:
2.5 L water
200 g beef trimming
1 tsp Royco Beef Powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp fried garlic
1 tbsp fried shallot

Add-ons:
Choy sum
Green onion
Celery
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. Pat the beef dry. Remove the silver skin, then slice.
2. Add the beef and trimmings into the food processor, then add salt, sugar, pepper, Royco Beef Powder, baking powder, fried shallots, and fried garlic. Blend until sticky for 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the egg white. Blend, then add the ice cubes slowly and blend smoothly.
4. Add sago flour and blend again. Transfer to a bowl and place in the fridge.
5. For the broth, boil water and add the trimmings.
6. Blend the fried garlic and fried shallots, then add into the broth.
7. Add Royco Beef Powder, salt, sugar, and pepper.
8. Slice the choy sum, then boil in a separate bowl. Set aside.
9. Shape the meatballs with hands or spoons, then add into hot water and cook until they float.
10. Add the meatballs and choy sum into the broth.
11. Plate and add celery, green onions, and fried shallots toppings.
12. Beef Meatball is ready to serve.

title: Cukup 10 Menit! Resep UDANG BAKAR MADU [Khas Resto Sunda]
recipe_id:
Resep Udang Bakar Madu (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr udang utuh
⅓ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 buah jeruk nipis

Bahan saus madu:
3 sdm madu
2 sdm saus tomat
2 sdm saus sambal rasa bawang putih
1 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm margarin (suhu ruang)
2 sdm air

Langkah:
1. Buang bagian kepala udang atau pada bagian yang tajam kemudian belah punggung udang. Buang bagian kotoran pada udang 
2. Marinasi udang dengan perasan jeruk nipis, garam, dan merica aduk rata. Diamkan beberapa saat
3. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan madu, saus sambal, saus tomat, saus tiram, dan margarin, aduk rata
4. Tambahkan sedikit air, aduk rata
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan udang, masak hingga setengah matang di kedua sisi 
6. Masukkan saus, aduk  sesaat, sisihkan
7. Udang bakar madu siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Honey Grilled Shrimp Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g whole shrimp
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 pc lime

Honey Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp honey
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 tbsp garlic-infused chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp margarine (room temperature)
2 tbsp water

Steps:
1. Trim the head or sharp parts, then butterfly and devein the shrimp.
2. Marinate the shrimp with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Stir and marinate for a moment.
3. In a bowl, combine honey, chili sauce, tomato sauce, oyster sauce, and margarine. Mix well.
4. Add a bit of water and stir.
5. Heat some oil. Add the shrimp in and cook them halfway on both sides.
6. Add the sauce in. Stir for a moment, then plate.
7. Honey Grilled Shrimp is ready to serve.

title: Singapore-style INDOMIE CHILI OIL Recipe: [Fish Ball Noodle Singapore]
recipe_id:
Resep Indomie Chili Oil (untuk 1-2 porsi)

Bahan:
2 bungkus mi goreng instan + bumbu mi

Bahan tambahan bumbu:
1 sdm bubuk cabai kasar
1 buah daun bawang cung
½ sdt minyak wijen
1 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm minyak panas
1 sdt gula pasir

Pelengkap:
1 butir telur
75 gr ayam cincang
1 lembar kol, potong
5 buah bakso ikan (https://youtu.be/vz-_F-WKTw4)
350 ml air
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt gula pasir
⅛ sdt merica
Bawang goreng

Langkah:
1. Untuk kuah, didihkan air kemudian masukkan 1 bumbu mie, 1 minyak bawang dan ayam cincang, rebus hingga ayam matang, sisihkan ayam
2. Masukkan kol, telur, dan bakso ikan, rebus telur hingga setengah matang, sisihkan telur
3. Tambahkan garam, gula pasir, dan merica, aduk rata, masak di api kecil
4. Iris halus daun bawang lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
5. Masukkan bubuk cabai dan minyak yang telah panas, aduk rata
6. Masukkan bumbu mie, gula pasir, kecap asin, minyak wijen, minyak bawang, dan sambal mie, aduk rata, sisihkan
7. Rebus mie hingga matang atau sesuai selera kemudian masukkan ke dalam mangkuk berisi bumbu, aduk rata
8. Tambahkan topping ayam, telur, bakso ikan, daun bawang, dan bawang goreng
9. Indomie chili oil siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chili Oil Indomie Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pack instant fried noodles + seasoning

Additional Seasoning ingredients:
1 tbsp chili flake
1 pc spring onion
½ tsp sesame oil
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp hot oil
1 tsp sugar

Add-ons:
1 pc egg
75 g ground chicken
1 pc cabbage, slice
5 pc fish ball (https://youtu.be/vz-_F-WKTw4)
350 ml water
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. For the broth, boil water and add 1 pack of instant noodle seasoning, 1 pack of the fragrant oil, and ground chicken. Boil until it’s cooked and set the chicken aside.
2. Add cabbage, egg, and fish balls. Cook the egg until it’s half-boiled and set it aside.
3. Add salt, sugar, and pepper. Mix well and cook on low heat.
4. Slice the green onions finely and place in a bowl.
5. Add the chili flakes and pour the hot oil in. Mix well.
6. Add the instant noodle’s seasoning, chili, and fragrant oil. Add sugar, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well and set aside.
7. Boil the noodles to taste, then mix it well with the sauce.
8. Add the chicken, egg, fish balls, green onions, and fried shallots toppings.
9. Chili Oil Indomie is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Meresap! Resep SAYAP AYAM PANGGANG ALA THAILAND
recipe_id:
Resep Sayap Ayam Panggang Ala Thailand (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
8 pcs sayap ayam @90gr
3 siung bawang putih
2 akar daun ketumbar
½ sdt lada putih butir
1 batang serai
2 sdm kecap ikan
1 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm saus tiram
3 sdm gula palem
1 sdt penyedap / kaldu bubuk
1 buah jeruk nipis @2 sdm
2 sdm minyak

Bahan dipping sauce:
3 siung bawang putih
40 gr cabai rawit hijau
3 sdm air jeruk nipis
2 sdm gula pasir
3 sdm kecap ikan
1 sdm air

Bahan lainnya:
Daun ketumbar

Langkah:
1. Belah sayap menjadi dua bagian, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Potong akar daun ketumbar dan bawang putih, masukkan ke dalam blender
3. Masukkan lada putih, minyak, kecap ikan, dan kecap asin, haluskan lalu masukkan ke dalam ayam
4. Tambahkan gula palem, kaldu bubuk, saus tiram, dan perasan jeruk nipis
5. Geprek dan iris serai lalu masukkan ke dalam ayam, aduk rata. Diamkan selama  1-2 jam di suhu ruang atau semalaman di dalam kulkas
6. Susun ayam ke dalam keranjang air fryer kemudian panggang di suhu 180 derajat celcius selama 15-17 menit
7. Di tengah memanggang, balikan ayam kemudian oleskan kembali bumbu marinasi
8. Untuk dipping sauce, blender kasar bawang putih lalu masukkan cabai rawit hijau, blender kasar kembali 
9. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, masukkan gula pasir, jeruk nipis, dan kecap ikan, aduk rata
10. Tambahkan air matang 1-2 sdm bila perlu
11. Sayap ayam panggang siap disajikan 

Loreal Indonesia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lorealindonesia/
Lazada: https://www.lazada.co.id/shop/loreal-paris/
recipe_en:
Gai Yang Grilled Chicken Wings (yield 4 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
8 pc chicken wings @90g
3 clove garlic
2 pc coriander root
½ tsp whole white pepper
1 pc lemongrass
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp palm sugar
1 tsp MSG / stock powder
1 pc lime @1 tbsp
2 tbsp oil

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
3 clove garlic
40 g green Thai chili
3 tbsp lime juice
2 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp water

Other ingredients:
Cilantro

Steps:
1. Halve the wings and place in a bowl.
2. Slice the coriander root and garlic. Add into the blender.
3. Add white pepper, oil, fish sauce, and soy sauce. Blend, then mix with the wings.
4. Add palm sugar, stock powder, oyster sauce, and lime juice.
5. Pound and slice the lemongrass, then add into the wings and mix. Let it marinate for 1-2 hours at room temperature or overnight in the fridge.
6. Arrange the wings in the air fryer basket. Grill at 180°C for 15-17 minutes.
7. Halfway into the cook, flip the wings and brush them with the marinade.
8. For the dipping sauce, roughly blend the garlic. Then, add the green Thai chili and roughly blend it again.
9. Transfer it to a bowl. Add sugar, lime, and soy sauce. Mix well.
10. Add 1-2 tbsp water, if needed.
11. Grilled Chicken Wings is ready to serve.

title: Renyah Tahan Lama! Resep UDANG KRISPI [Khas Bu Rudy Surabaya]
recipe_id:
Resep Udang Krispi (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
500  gr udang kecil / hurang, cuci bersih
½ sdm garam
1 ½ sdt baking powder
1 sdm kaldu jamur / penyedap
½ sdt merica
2 sdm cuka

Bahan lainnya:
220 gr tepung tapioka
30 gr tepung beras
Minyak Goreng Fortune

Pelengkap:
Sambal bawang (https://youtu.be/6vv6enFEVc4)
Nasi putih Beras Premium Fortune

Langkah:
1. Marinasi udang dengan garam, kaldu jamur, baking powder, merica, dan cuka, aduk rata. Diamkan 10-15 menit
2. Campurkan tepung tapioka dengan tepung beras, aduk rata
3. Masukkan udang ke dalam tepung lalu aduk dengan garpu
4. Ratakan udang dengan saringan 
5. Panaskan minyak goreng fortune, goreng udang di api sedang besar selama 5 menit kemudian kecilkan api, goreng selama 20-25 menit, tiriskan
6. Jika kurang kering, panggang udang di suhu 110°C selama 15-25 menit 
7. Udang krispi siap disajikan 

Yuk cek Instagram @FORTUNECERMAT
Instagram: https://instagram.com/fortunecermat
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/Fortune-Cooking-Oil-Pouch-2-L-i.65323877.6057939507
Blibli: https://www.blibli.com/cari/Fortune?shipment=blibli
JD.ID: https://www.jd.id/product/fortune-cooking-oil-pouch-1l_10009879/100014842.html
recipe_en:
Crispy Shrimp Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g small shrimp / “hurang”, rinsed clean
½ tbsp salt
1.5 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp mushroom stock powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp vinegar

Others:
220 g tapioca flour
30 g rice flour
Fortune Oil

Condiments:
Sambal bawang (https://youtu.be/6vv6enFEVc4)
Fortune Premium Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the shrimp with salt, mushroom stock powder, baking powder, pepper, and vinegar. Mix well and marinate for 10-15 minutes.
2. Mix the tapioca flour with rice flour evenly.
3. Add the shrimp into the flour. Mix with a fork.
4. Sift the excess flour off.
5. Heat Fortune Oil. Fry the shrimp on medium-high heat for 5 minutes. Then, lower the heat and continue frying for 20-25 minutes. Set aside.
6. If the shrimp aren’t crispy enough, bake in the oven at 110°C for 15-25 minutes.
7. Crispy Shrimp is ready to serve.

title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep SEMUR BOLA DAGING [MPASI Cocok]
recipe_id:
Resep Semur Bola Daging (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
450 gr daging sapi
6 sdm tepung roti putih
50 ml air / susu
1 butir telur
1 buah bawang bombai, cincang, tumis
2 sdm maizena
½ sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica

Bahan kuah:
Bumbu halus putih (4 siung bawang putih, 6 siung bawang merah, 3 butir kemiri
2 buah tomat merah, potong
5 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
½ sdt bubuk pala
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt kaldu sapi bubuk
700 ml air
2 batang seledri, opsional

Pelengkap:
Wortel
Buncis
Nasi putih
Bawang merah goreng

Langkah:
1. Potong-potong daging kemudian buang bagian silver skin
2. Masukkan daging sapi, garam, kaldu bubuk, dan merica ke dalam Beaba Babycook Neo Terracotta, haluskan
3. Campurkan tepung roti dengan air, diamkan beberapa saat
4. Pindahkan daging ke dalam mangkuk kemudian tambahkan tepung roti, bawang bombai, telur, dan maizena, aduk rata
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak, bentuk bulat daging lalu goreng hingga kecokelatan, sisihkan
6. Di wajan yang sama tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian masukkan tomat, seledri, air, kecap manis, saus tiram, kaldu sapi bubuk, pala bubuk, dan merica, aduk rata
7. Masukkan bola daging, masak sesaat selama 10 menit di api sedang 
8. Potong  memanjang wortel dan buncis lalu kukus dengan Beaba Babycook Neo Terracotta hingga matang
9. Untuk mpasi, kukus nasi, wortel, buncis, dan bola daging lalu haluskan sesuai selera
10. Semur bola daging siap disajikan 

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @BEABA.INDO
Instagram: https://instagram.com/beaba.indo
Tokopedia: https://tokopedia.com/beaba-id
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/beabaofficial
recipe_en:
Braised Meatballs Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
400 g beef
6 tbsp white breadcrumb
50 ml water / milk
1 pc egg
1 pc onion, chopped, sautéed
2 tbsp cornstarch
½ tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Broth ingredients:
White paste (4 clove garlic, 6 pc shallot, 3 pc candlenut)
2 pc red tomato, sliced
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp nutmeg powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp beef stock powder
700 ml water
2 pc celery, optional

Others:
Carrot
Green bean
Rice
Fried shallot

Steps:
1. Slice the meat and remove the silver skin.
2. Add the beef, salt, stock powder, and pepper into the Beaba Babycook Neo Terracotta. Grind.
3. Mix the breadcrumbs with water. Let it soak for a moment.
4. Transfer the meat to a bowl. Add the breadcrumbs, onion, egg, and cornstarch. Mix well.
5. Heat some oil. Shape the meat into balls and pan-sear until browned. Set aside.
6. In the same pan, sauté the white paste until fragrant. Then, add tomato, celery, sweet soy sauce, beef powder, nutmeg powder, and pepper. Mix well.
7. Add the meatballs in. Cook for about 10 minutes on medium heat.
8. Slice the carrot and green beans, then steam them with Beaba Babycook Neo Terracotta until cooked.
9. For complementary feeding, steam rice, carrot, green bean, and meatballs. Then, blend to your preference.
10. Braised Meatballs are ready to serve.

title: Resep NUGGET BALADO: Sangat Praktis, Gurih & Renyah!
recipe_id:
Resep Nugget Balado (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
1 pack Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
150 gr / 30 buah cabai merah keriting
15 buah cabai rawit merah
6 siung bawang putih
15 siung bawang merah
1 pcs terasi
4 lembar daun jeruk
5 sdm minyak goreng
50 ml air
⅓ sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap

Pelengkap:
Jeruk limau
Nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Iris bawang merah dan belah dua cabai keriting
2. Masukkan bawang putih, terasi, cabai rawit, dan cabai keriting ke dalam food processor, haluskan
3. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang merah hingga wangi dan kering kemudian masukkan bumbu yang telah dihaluskan, aduk rata
4. Masukkan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi kemudian masukkan air, garam, gula, dan penyedap, aduk rata
5. Masukkan Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget ke dalam air fryer, panggang di suhu 180 derajat selama 8 menit
6. Masukkan Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget ke dalam sambal balado, aduk rata
7. Nugget balado siap disajikan 

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @TEMANKANZLER
Instagram: https://instagram.com/temankanzler

recipe_en:
Nugget Balado Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pack Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
150 g / 30 pc curly red chili
15 pc red Thai chili
6 clove garlic
15 pc shallot
1 pc shrimp paste
4 pc kaffir lime leaf
5 tbsp oil
50 ml water
⅓ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Others:
Kaffir lime
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots and halve the curly chili.
2. Add garlic, shrimp paste, Thai chili, and curly chili into a food processor and blend.
3. Heat the oil. Sauté the shallots until fragrant and crisp. Add the blended spices. Stir.
4. Add the kaffir lime leaf. Sauté until fragrant, then add water, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Stir.
5. Add Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget into an air fryer. Cook at 180°C for 8 minutes.
6. Add the Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget into the Sambal Balado and mix.
7. Nugget Balado is ready to serve.

title: Cukup 10 Menit! Resep BAKSO KEPITING SAUS SINGAPORE [Chili Crab Stick]
recipe_id:
Resep Chili Crab Stick (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan:
12 pcs crab stick
2 sdt bumbu gulai instan
1 butir telur
1,5 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm saus sambal
300 ml air
1,5 sdm maizena
½ buah bawang bombai
2 siung bawang putih
2 buah cabai merah
4 buah cabai rawit
1-2 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Pelengkap:
Nais putih

Langkah:
1. Potong bawang bombai, bawang putih, cabai merah, dan cabai rawit merah
2. Belah dua crab stick kemudian panaskan sedikit minyak, goreng hingga kering, sisihkan 
3. Sisihkan sebagian minyak lalu tumis bawang bombai, aduk rata
4. Masukkan bawang putih, aduk rata kemudian masukkan cabai merah dan cabai rawit, tumis hingga wangi
5. Masukkan bumbu gulai, saus tiram, saus sambal, gula, dan penyedap, aduk rata
6. Campurkan maizena dengan air lalu tuang ke dalam wajan, aduk hingga mengental
7. Kocok lepas telur, tuang ke dalam wajan perlahan sambil diaduk
8. Masukkan crab stick, masak sesaat
9. Chili crab stick siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chili Crab Stick Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
12 pc crab stick
2 tsp instant Gulai paste
1 pc egg
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp chili sauce
300 ml water
1.5 tbsp cornstarch
½ pc onion
2 clove garlic
2 pc red chili
4 pc Thai chili
1-2 tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
Oil, as needed

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the onion, garlic, red chili, and red Thai chili.
2. Halve the crab sticks. Heat some oil and fry them until crisp. Set aside.
3. Set aside some of the oil, then sauté the onion.
4. Add garlic. Stir, then add red chili and Thai chili. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add the Gulai paste, oyster sauce, chili sauce, sugar, and MSG. Stir well.
6. Mix the cornstarch with water and add it into the pan. Stir until the sauce thickens.
7. Lightly beat the egg. Pour into the pan slowly while stirring.
8. Add the crab sticks in and cook for a moment.
9. Chili Crab Stick is ready to serve.

title: Ala KFC! Resep POPCORN CHICKEN: Dijamin Nagih!
recipe_id:
Resep Popcorn Chicken (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
500 gr dada ayam filet
4 siung bawang putih
¼ buah bawang bombai
100 ml susu
¾ sdt garam
¾ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
¼ sdt merica
½ sdm mixed herbs
1 sdt bubuk paprika
1 sdt cuka
2 sdm saus sambal
1 butir telur
6 sdm campuran tepung kering

Bahan tepung kering:
300 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
2 sdt bubuk paprika
1 sdm bubuk bawang putih, opsional
100 gr maizena
1 sdm baking powder
1 sdt garam
½ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
Saus sambal

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam kemudian iris sebesar satu ruas jempol, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Potong-potong bawang putih dan bawang bombai lalu blender dengan susu
3. Masukkan ke dalam ayam kemudian tambahkan garam, kaldu bubuk, merica, mixed herbs, bubuk paprika, cuka, saus sambal, dan telur, aduk rata, diamkan selama 15-30 menit
4. Untuk tepung kering, campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, bubuk bawang putih, bubuk paprika, baking powder, garam, dan merica, aduk rata
5. Masukkan 6 sdm campuran tepung kering ke dalam ayam, aduk rata
6. Masukkan ayam ke dalam tepung kering satu per satu, ratakan
7. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam hingga sedikit kecokelatan di api sedang kecil
8. Popcorn chicken siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Popcorn Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
500 g chicken breast fillet
4 clove garlic
¼ pc onion
100 ml milk
¾ tsp salt
¾ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsb mixed herbs
1 tsp paprika powder
1 tsp vinegar
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 pc egg
6 tbsp dry coat

Dry Coat ingredients:
300 g all-purpose flour
2 tsp paprika powder
1 tbsp garlic powder, optional
100 g cornstarch
1 tbsp baking powder
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Condiment:
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry, then slice it into thumb-sized strips. Place in a bowl.
2. Slice the garlic and onion, then blend with milk.
3. Add the mixture to the chicken, then add salt, stock powder, pepper, mixed herbs, paprika powder, vinegar, chili sauce, and egg. Mix well and marinate for 15-30 minutes.
4. For the dry coating, combine the flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, paprika powder, baking powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Add 6 tbsp of the dry coat mix into the chicken and mix well.
6. Add the chicken into the dry coat one by one and coat evenly.
7. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken until golden brown on medium-low heat.
8. Popcorn Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Irit Minyak, 3 Bahan, 10 Menit! Resep SAMBAL TERONG Dijamin Nagih
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Terong (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
2 buah terong ungu kecil atau 1 buah terong ungu besar
3 siung bawang putih
20 buah cabai rawit merah
4 sdm minyak goreng
½ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
½ sdt penyedap

Pelengkap:
Nasi putih
Kecap manis
Telur

Langkah:
1. Potong-potong terong kemudian kukus selama 7 menit
2. Haluskan bawang putih, garam, gula pasir, dan penyedap dengan ulekan
3. Masukkan cabai rawit merah, ulek kasar
4. Panaskan minyak lalu tuang ke dalam sambal, aduk rata
5. Suwir-suwir terong kemudian masukkan ke dalam sambal, aduk rata
6. Goreng telur hingga setengah matang atau sesuai selera, sisihkan
7. Sambal terong siap disajikan dengan nasi, telur mata sapi, dan kecap sebagai pelengkap

title: Krispi! Resep BAKWAN ALA JEPANG [Kakiage Sosis]
recipe_id:
Resep Kakiage Sosis (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan:
1 buah wortel
1 buah bawang bombai
50 gr horenso
14 pcs Sosis Kanzler Beef Cocktail

Bahan tepung kering:
70 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica

Bahan tepung basah:
120 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
15 gr maizena
1 butir kuning telur
300 ml air es

Bahan cocolan tempura (tentsuyu):
4 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm mirin
2 sdm gula pasir
5 gr konbu
3 sdm bonito
300 ml air

Lainnya:
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Langkah:
1. Panaskan wajan, masukkan mirin, masak sesaat  lalu masukkan kecap asin, gula pasir, air, dan konbu, masak hingga mendidih
2. Masukkan bonito flakes, matikan api, sisihkan
3. Potong wortel bentuk korek api, iris bawang bombai dan potong horenso, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
4. Potong Kanzler Beef Cocktail, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk kemudian masukkan tepung terigu, garam, dan merica, aduk rata
5. Di dalam wadah terpisah, campurkan air es, kuning telur, tepung terigu, dan maizena, aduk rata
6. Siapkan wadah, ambil sedikit sayuran lalu tuang sedikit tepung basah, aduk rata 
7. Masukkan ke dalam minyak yang telah panas, tekan-tekan hingga menyatu, goreng hingga kering, tiriskan 
8. Bakwan jepang siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Sausage Kakiage Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc carrot
1 pc onion
50 g horenzo
14 pc Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage

Dry Coat ingredients:
70 g all-purpose flour
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Wet Batter ingredients:
120 g all-purpose flour
15 g cornstarch
1 pc egg yolk
300 ml ice water

Tempura Dipping Sauce (Tentsuyu) ingredients:
4 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp mirin
2 tbsp sugar
5 g konbu
3 tbsp bonito
300 ml water

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Heat the pan. Add mirin and cook for a moment. Then, add soy sauce, sugar, water, and konbu. Bring to a boil.
2. Add bonito flakes. Turn the heat off and set aside.
3. Slice the carrot into matchsticks. Slice the onion and horenzo. Transfer to a bowl.
4. Slice Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausages. Add into the bowl, then add flour, salt, pepper. Mix well.
5. In a separate bowl, combine ice water, egg yolk, flour, and cornstarch. Mix well.
6. Prepare a bowl. Get some of the veggie mix and pour some of the wet batter. Mix well.
7. Add it to hot oil. Push the sliced veggies into one and fry until crispy. Set aside.
8. Sausage Kakiage is ready to serve.

title: Luar Garing, Dalam Lembut! Resep EGG CHICKEN ROLL ALA HOKBEN
recipe_id:
Resep Egg Chicken Roll (6-7 rol)

Bahan:
600 gr paha ayam
7 siung bawang putih halus
3 sdm bawang merah goreng
2 sdm maizena
1 butir putih telur
120 gr air es / es batu
2 sdm minyak wijen
1,5 sdt garam
1,5 sdm gula pasir
2 sdt kaldu ayam
½ sdt merica
¾ sdt pala bubuk / ngohiong
1-2 lembar roti tawar kecil
50 ml air

Bahan kulit rolade:
2 butir telur
80 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
40 gr maizena
250 ml air
2 sdm minyak
¾ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
Pewarna kuning secukupnya, opsional

Lainnya:
Minyak Goreng Fortune
Nasi putih Beras Premium Fortune
Salad dressing (https://youtu.be/9KXKkUvY9x0)

Langkah:
1. Untuk kulit, campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, telur, air, dan minyak, aduk rata lalu tambahkan sedikit pewarna kuning, aduk rata
2. Tambahkan garam dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata
3. Panaskan wajan di api kecil, tuang adonan kulit sambil di ratakan, masak hingga matang kemudian sisihkan
4. Keringkan ayam, masukkan ke dalam food processor bersamaan dengan garam, kaldu bubuk, dan gula pasir, haluskan hingga lengket
5. Masukkan bawang putih halus, dan bawang goreng, haluskan lalu tambahkan merica, bubuk pala, minyak wijen, dan es batu, haluskan kembali
6. Masukkan putih telur dan maizena, haluskan hingga tercampur rata
7. Potong kotak kecil roti lalu campurkan dengan air, masukkan ke dalam food processor, haluskan
8. Siapkan kulit egg roll, tuang adonan lalu oles ujung kulit dengan larutan tepung, gulung
9. Kukus egg chicken roll selama 20 menit, tiriskan kemudian potong-potong
10. Panaskan minyak goreng fortune lalu goreng egg chicken roll hingga kuning keemasan
11. Egg chicken roll siap disajikan 

Yuk cek Instagram @FORTUNECERMAT
Instagram: https://instagram.com/fortunecermat
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/Fortune-Cooking-Oil-Pouch-2-L-i.65323877.6057939507
Blibli: https://www.blibli.com/cari/Fortune?shipment=blibli
JD.ID: https://www.jd.id/product/fortune-cooking-oil-pouch-1l_10009879/100014842.html
recipe_en:
Egg Chicken Roll Recipe (yield 6-7 rolls)

Ingredients:
600 g chicken thigh
7 clove minced garlic
3 tbsp fried shallot
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 pc egg white
120 g cold water / ice cube
2 tbsp sesame oil
1.5 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
2 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper
¾ tsp nutmeg / five-spice powder
1-2 slice white bread, small
50 ml water

Rissole Skin ingredients:
2 pc egg
80 g all-purpose flour
40 g cornstarch
250 ml water
2 tbsp oil
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
Yellow food coloring, optional

Others:
Fortune Oil
Fortune Premium Rice
Salad dressing (https://youtu.be/9KXKkUvY9x0)

Steps:
1. For the skin, combine the flour, cornstarch, egg, water, and oil. Mix well, then add a little bit of yellow food coloring. Stir.
2. Add salt and stock powder. Mix well.
3. Heat the pan on low heat. Pour the batter and even it out. Cook through and set aside.
4. Pat the chicken dry. Add it into the food processor along with the salt, stock powder, and sugar. Blend until sticky.
5. Add minced garlic and fried shallots. Blend, then add pepper, nutmeg powder, sesame oil, and ice cubes. Blend it again.
6. Add egg white and cornstarch. Blend until it’s mixed evenly.
7. Dice the bread. Mix it with water, then add into the food processor and blend.
8. Prepare the Egg Roll skin. Spread the meat dough, roll, and seal the skin with the flour mixture.
9. Steam the Egg Chicken Rolls for 20 minutes. Set aside, then slice.
10. Heat Fortune Oil, then fry the Egg Chicken Rolls until golden brown.
11. Egg Chicken Rolls are ready to serve.

title: Crunchy Asam Manis Gurih! Resep SALAD ALA HOKBEN: Favorit Anak & Keluarga!
recipe_id:
Resep Salad Ala Hokben (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan:
2 buah wortel berastagi besar
1 buah lobak putih
5 lembar kol

Bahan campuran acar:
3-4 sdm cuka
8 sdm gula pasir
2 sdt garam
150 ml air

Bahan dressing mayo:
8 sdm mayones
1 sdm kental manis
1-2 sdm saus tomat
1 sdt mustard, opsional
¼ sdt garam
Merica secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Serut wortel atau potong korek api, potong miring lobak lalu iris memanjang, pindahkan ke dalam wadah
2. Masak gula, cuka, garam, dan air hingga larut kemudian tuang ke dalam wortel dan lobak, aduk rata, dinginkan
3. Iris tipis kol lalu rendam dengan air es
4. Campurkan mayo, saus tomat, kental manis, mustard, garam, dan merica, aduk rata
5. Susun salad di atas piring 
6. Salad ala hokben siap disajikan dengan dressing mayo
recipe_en:
Salad à la HokBen Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc carrots, large
1 pc white radish
5 sheet cabbage

Pickling Liquid ingredients:
3-4 tbsp vinegar
8 tbsp sugar
2 tsp salt
200 ml water

Mayo Dressing ingredients:
8 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tbsp condensed milk
1-2 tbsp ketchup
1 tsp mustard, optional
¼ tsp salt
Pepper, to taste

Steps:
1. Shave the carrots or slice them into matchsticks. Slice the radish diagonally and chop it lengthwise. Transfer to a bowl.
2. Cook the sugar, vinegar, salt, and water until the sugar dissolves. Pour into the carrots and radish. Mix well and chill.
3. Slice the cabbage thinly and soak in cold water.
4. Combine mayo, ketchup, condensed milk, mustard, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Arrange the salad on the plate.
6. Salad à la HokBen is ready to serve with the Mayo Dressing.

title: Resep KUE MOCHI WIJEN ISI KACANG: Khas Semarang, Disukai Semua!
recipe_id:
Resep Mochi Semarang (24-26 pcs)

Bahan isian original:
90 gr kacang tanah goreng, giling
35 gr gula pasir
50 ml air
¼ sdt garam

Bahan isian cokelat:
75 gr campuran kacang almond panggang, giling
4 sdm Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco
35 gr gula pasir
¼ sdt garam

Bahan adonan mochi:
160 gr tepung ketan
40 gr tepung tapioka
80 gr gula pasir
2 sdt minyak
280 gr air
½ sdt garam
½ sdm perisa pisang ambon

Lainnya:
Wijen sangrai
Maizena

Langkah:
1. Untuk isian original, masak air, gula, dan garam hingga mendidih kemudian masukkan kacang giling, masak di api sedang kecil hingga menyatu sambil diaduk, dinginkan
2. Untuk isian cokelat, masukkan kacang almond, garam, gula, dan Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco, masak di api sedang kecil hingga menyatu sambil diaduk, dinginkan
3. Setelah dingin, bentuk bulat masing-masing isian dengan sendok takar ukuran 1 sdt
4. Di dalam wadah, campurkan tepung ketan, tapioka, gula pasir, garam, minyak, dan perisa pisang ambon dan air aduk rata
5. Masukkan ke dalam loyang, tutup dengan aluminium foil lalu kukus selama 30 menit
6. Keluarkan dari cetakan, uleni hingga menyatu kemudian bagi menjadi dua adonan 
7. Taburkan maizena, bentuk memanjang lalu potong-potong
8. Pipihkan bagian samping mochi dengan cara dicubit, masukkan isian lalu bulatkan
9. Masukkan ke dalam wijen sangrai, ratakan 
10. Mochi semarang siap disajikan 

Info lebih lengkap cek Instagram @INDOMILK
Instagram: https://instagram.com/indomilk/
Website: http://indomilk.com/
recipe_en:
Semarang Mochi Recipe (yield 24-26 pcs)

Original filling ingredients:
90 g fried peanuts, crushed
35 g sugar
50 ml water
¼ tsp salt

Chocolate filling ingredients:
75 g toasted almond, crushed
4 tbsp Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk
35 g sugar
¼ tsp salt

Mochi dough ingredients:
160 g glutinous rice flour
40 g tapioca flour
80 g sugar
2 tsp oil
280 g water
½ tsp salt
½ tbsp banana essence

Others:
Toasted sesame seed
Cornstarch

Steps:
1. For the Original filling, bring water, sugar, and salt to a boil. Then, add the crushed peanuts and cook on medium-low heat while stirring until it comes together. Let cool.
2. For the Chocolate filling, add the almonds, salt, sugar, and Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk. Cook on medium-low heat while stirring until it comes together. Let cool.
3. After they cool, shape the fillings into balls using a 1-tsp measuring spoon.
4. In a bowl, combine glutinous rice flour, tapioca flour, sugar, salt, oil, banana essence, and water. Mix well.
5. Pour into the pan and cover with aluminum foil. Steam for 30 minutes.
6. Get the dough out of the pan and knead until it comes together, then divide into two parts.
7. Sprinkle it with cornstarch. Shape into a long cylinder and slice.
8. Flatten the sides by pinching the dough. Add the filling in, seal, and shape into balls.
9. Coat with toasted sesame seeds evenly.
10. Semarang Mochi is ready to serve.

title: Sederhana Tetap Nikmat! Resep TUMIS CABAI HIJAU Khas Sunda [Cocok Untuk Ketupat Lebaran]
recipe_id:
Resep Tumis Cabai Hijau (3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr cabai hijau tanjung
150 gr cabai gendot
3-5 lembar daun salam
3-5 lembar daun jeruk
2 jempol lengkuas, geprek
25 gr gula merah
½ sdm kecap manis
½ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
400-500 ml air

Bahan bumbu halus:
7 siung bawang putih
13 siung bawang merah
5 butir kemiri sangrai
20 buah cabai rawit hijau
2 saset terasi
4 cm kunyit
6 cm kencur, opsional
Minyak secukupnya

Pelengkap:
Nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Blender bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit hijau, kemiri, kencur, terasi, kunyit dan sedikit minyak hingga halus
2. Tumis bumbu halus hingga minyak keluar lalu masukkan lengkuas, daun salam, dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi
3. Belah cabai tanjung lalu masukkan ke dalam bumbu halus beserta cabai gendot, gula merah, dan air
4. Tambahkan garam, kaldu bubuk, dan kecap manis, masak di api kecil sedang selama 10-15 menit 
5. Tumis cabai hijau siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Green Chili Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g Tanjung green chili
150 g habanero
3-5 pc bay leaf
3-5 pc lime leaf
2 thumb galangal, pounded
25 g palm sugar
½ tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder / MSG
400-500 ml water

Blended Spices ingredients:
7 clove garlic
13 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut, toasted
20 pc green Thai chili
2 sachet shrimp paste
4 cm turmeric
6 cm aromatic ginger, optional
Oil, as needed

Add-ons:
Rice

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, green Thai chili, candlenuts, aromatic ginger, shrimp paste, and turmeric with some oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until it’s oily, then add galangal, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Cook until fragrant.
3. Slit the Tanjung chili. Add it into the pan with the habanero, palm sugar, and water.
4. Add salt, stock powder, and sweet soy sauce. Cook on low heat for 10-15 minutes.
5. Green Chili Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

title: Cukup 5 Menit! Resep NASI YOSHINOYA RICE COOKER: Gurih, Wangi & Nagih!
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Yoshinoya Rice Cooker (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr beras, cuci bersih
350 ml air
1 pack Yoshinoya Beef Pack Original
7 siung bawang putih, haluskan
3 sdm minyak
1 sdm kecap asin
1 ½ sdm margarin
½ sdm kaldu sapi bubuk
1 batang daun bawang

Pelengkap:
Yoshinoya Sambal Korek Bawang
Yoshinoya Onsen Egg

Langkah:
1. Press bawang putih lalu goreng dengan minyak hingga sedikit kecokelatan lalu saring
2. Di dalam rice cooker, masukkan beras, air, 1-2 sdm minyak bawang, kecap asin, kaldu sapi bubuk, 1-2 sdt bawang putih goreng, dan Yoshinoya Beef Pack Original,  masak hingga matang
3. Iris daun bawang lalu masukkan ke dalam nasi beserta margarin, aduk rata
4. Nasi yoshinoya siap disajikan dengan sambal korek bawang dan onsen egg sebagai pelengkap   

Untuk pembelian produk-produk Yoshinoya bisa di srore terdekat
Instagram: https://instagram.com/yoshinoyaid/
recipe_en:
Yoshinoya Rice with Rice Cooker Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g rice, rinsed
350 ml water
1 pack Original Yoshinoya Beef Pack
7 clove garlic, minced
3 tbsp oil
1 tbsp soy sauce
1.5 tbsp margarine
½ tbsp beef powder
1 pc green onion

Add-ons:
Yoshinoya Sambal Korek Bawang
Yoshinoya Onsen Egg

Steps:
1. Press the garlic and fry it with oil until lightly browned, then strain it.
2. Into a rice cooker, add rice, water, 1-2 tbsp of Garlic Oil, soy sauce, beef powder, 1-2 tsp of fried garlic, and the Original Yoshinoya Beef Pack. Let it cook.
3. Slice the green onions and add it into the rice with the margarine. Mix well.
4. Yoshinoya Rice is ready to serve with Sambal Korek Bawang and Onsen Egg on the side.

title: Resep SIOMAY AYAM Ekonomis: Gurih, Kenyal, Nagih [Murah Bukan Murahan!]
recipe_id:
Resep Siomay Ayam (28-30 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
500 gr ayam filet paha
90 gr labu siam (setelah diperas)
2 sdt garam
2 sdm gula pasir
2 sdt kaldu bubuk / msg
½ sdt merica
1 butir putih telur
2 sdm kecap ikan
1 sdm bawang putih halus
3 batang daun bawang
3 sdm minyak goreng
100-150 ml es batu / air es
220 gr tepung tapioka
40 gr tepung terigu protein sedang

Bahan saus kacang:
100 gr kacang tanah goreng
5 siung bawang putih
7 siung bawang merah
10 buah cabai merah keriting
3 butir kemiri
2 buah cabai rawit
80 ml minyak
80 gr gula merah
3 sdm air asam jawa
3 lembar daun jeruk
550 ml air
3 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm tepung beras
1 sdt garam

Lainnya:
Jeruk limau

Langkah:
1. Parut halus labu siam kemudian peras 
2. Iris halus daun bawang, panaskan minyak lalu tumis sesaat, sisihkan
3. Di dalam food processor, masukkan setengah paha ayam, bawang putih halus, garam, gula pasir, kaldu bubuk, dan merica hingga halus dan lengket
4. Masukkan sisa ayam, es batu, putih telur, dan kecap ikan, haluskan kembali kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
5. Masukkan labu siam parut, daun bawang beserta minyak, tepung terigu, dan tepung tapioka, aduk rata
6. Oles kukusan dengan minyak, bentuk bulat adonan dengan sendok kemudian masukkan ke dalam kukusan
7. Rapikan siomay menggunakan garpu dari samping ke atas lalu kukus selama 20 menit
8. Untuk saus, potong bawang putih dan bawang merah, geprek kemiri, iris cabai rawit, dan cabai merah keriting 
9. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang merah, bawang putih, dan kemiri, masak sesaat lalu tambahkan cabai rawit dan cabai merah keriting
10. Pindahkan ke dalam blender, masukkan kacang dan sedikit air, blender hingga halus kemudian masak kembali
11. Masukkan daun jeruk dan gula merah, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan air, air asam jawa, saus sambal, dan garam, masak hingga mendidih
12. Larutkan tepung beras lalu masukkan ke dalam saus, aduk rata 
13. Siomay ayam siap disajikan 

Download aplikasi Flip di sini flip.id/devina
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/flip_id/
recipe_en:
Chicken Shumai Recipe (yield 28-30 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
90 g chayote (after squeezing the water out)
2 tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
2 tsp stock powder / MSG
½ tsp pepper
1 pc egg white
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp minced garlic
3 pc green onion
3 tbsp oil
100-150 ml ice cube / cold water
220 g tapioca flour
40 g all-purpose flour

Peanut Sauce ingredients:
100 g fried peanut
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
10 pc curly red chili
3 pc candlenut
2 pc Thai chili
80 ml oil
80 g palm sugar
3 tbsp tamarind water
3 pc lime leaf
550 ml water
3 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp rice flour
1 tsp salt

Others:
Lime leaf

Steps:
1. Grate the chayote finely and squeeze the water out.
2. Slice the green onions finely. Heat the oil and sauté for a moment. Set aside.
3. In a food processor, add half of the chicken thigh along with the minced garlic, salt, sugar, stock powder, and pepper. Blend until smooth and sticky.
4. Add the rest of the chicken in with ice cubes, egg white, and fish sauce. Blend again and transfer into a bowl.
5. Add the grated chayote, green onion and its oil, flour, and tapioca flour. Mix well.
6. Brush the steamer with oil. Shape the dough into balls with a spoon and place in the steamer.
7. Tidy up the shape with forks. Pull the sides upwards, then steam for 20 minutes.
8. For the Sauce, slice the garlic and shallots. Pound the candlenuts, slice the Thai chili and curly red chili.
9. Heat the oil. Sauté the shallots, garlic, and candlenuts. Cook for a moment, then add Thai chili and curly red chili.
10. Transfer into the blender. Add peanuts and some water, then blend until smooth. Return to the pan and cook.
11. Add lime leaf and palm sugar. Stir, then add water, tamarind water, chili sauce, and salt. Bring to a boil.
12. Dilute the rice water and add it into the sauce. Mix well.
13. Chicken Shumai is ready to serve.

title: Wangi & Creamy! Resep DESSERT MANGGA SAGU: Cocok Untuk Lebaran! [Mango Sagoo]
recipe_id:
Resep Mango Sagoo (untuk 10-12 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr mangga harum manis matang, potong
145 gr Krim Kafe Kapal Api
400 ml susu
50-100 ml sirup mangga
Es batu secukupnya

Bahan jeli:
7,5 gr bubuk jeli polos
3 sdm gula pasir
4 sdm Krim Kafe Kapal Api
300 ml air

Topping:
Sagu mutiara
Nata de coco
Jeruk bali

Langkah:
1. Masak air, bubuk jeli, dan gula, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan Krim Kafe Kapal Api, masak hingga mendidih, tuang ke dalam wadah, dinginkan
2. Keluarkan jeli dari cetakan lalu potong memanjang
3. Blender mangga dengan susu hingga halus lalu tambahkan Krim Kafe Kapal Api, haluskan kembali
4. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk lalu tambahkan sirup mangga, aduk rata
5. Masukkan jeli, sagu mutiara, jeruk bali, nata de coco, dan es batu, aduk rata
6. Mango sagoo siap disajikan 

Krim Kafe ini merupakan krimer serbaguna tidak hanya berfungsi untuk krimer kopi, tetapi sebagai bahan masakan untuk makanan dan minuman manis. Krim Kafe ini juga low sodium lho!

recipe_en:
Mango Sago Recipe (yield 10-12 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g ripe Harum Manis mango, sliced
145 g Kapal Api Krim Kafe
400 ml milk
50-100 ml mango syrup 
Ice cube, as needed

Jelly ingredients:
7.5 g plain jelly powder
3 tbsp sugar
4 tbsp Kapal Api Krim Kafe
300 ml water

Topping:
Pearl sago
Nata de coco
Pomelo

Steps:
1. Combine the water with jelly powder and sugar. Stir, then add Kapal Api Krim Kafe. Bring to a boil and pour into the mold. Chill.
2. Get the jelly out of the mold and slice lengthwise.
3. Blend the mango with milk until smooth. Add Kapal Api Krim Kafe and blend again.
4. Transfer the slurry to a bowl, then add mango syrup and stir.
5. Add the jelly, pearl sago, pomelo, nata de coco, and ice cubes. Mix well.
6. Mango Sago is ready to serve.

title: Menu Spesial Lebaran! Resep OPOR AYAM SUSU: Gurih Berempah!
recipe_id:
Resep Opor Ayam Susu (5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 ekor ayam broiler @800 gr
1 ½ sdt garam
1 buah jeruk nipis

Bahan bumbu halus:
7 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
4 butir kemiri sangrai
¾ sdt ketumbar sangrai
½ sdt jintan sangrai
2 cm jahe
30 ml air

Bahan lainnya:
2 batang serai, geprek
1 lembar daun jeruk
3 lembar daun salam
3 butir kapulaga
½ butir pala
5 cm lengkuas, iris, geprek
500 ml air
½ sdt garam
½ sdm gula
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
70 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter
50 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
300 ml Anchor Full Cream Milk

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam dengan tisu lalu potong ayam menjadi 10 bagian
2. Marinasi dengan perasan jeruk nipis dan garam, aduk rata diamkan selama 30 menit
3. Blender kemiri, bawang merah, bawang putih, jahe, jintan, ketumbar, dan sedikit air hingga halus 
4. Untuk clarified butter, panaskan Anchor Unsalted Butter di api kecil hingga meleleh dan berbuih kemudian saring 
5. Tumis bumbu halus, masak sebentar lalu tuang lelehan mentega
6. Masukkan merica, lengkuas, serai, daun salam, daun jeruk, kapulaga, dan pala yang telah dihancurkan, aduk rata lalu masukkan ayam, masak hingga kecokelatan
7. Masukkan air, garam, gula, dan  kaldu bubuk, tutup wajan masak selama 10-15 menit
8.  Masukkan Anchor Cooking Cream dan Anchor Full Cream Milk, masak sesaat
9. Opor ayam siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Milky Chicken Opor Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 pc broiler chicken @800 g
1.5 tsp salt
1 pc lime

Blended Spices ingredients:
7 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut, toasted
¾ tsp coriander, toasted
½ tsp cumin, toasted
2 cm ginger
30 ml water

Others:
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
1 pc lime leaf
3 pc bay leaf
3 pc cardamom
½ pc nutmeg
5 cm galangal, sliced and pounded
500 ml water
½ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
70 g Anchor Unsalted Butter
50 ml Anchor Cooking Cream
300 ml Anchor Full Cream Milk

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Chop it into 10 pieces.
2. Marinate the chicken with lime juice and salt. Mix well and marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Blend the candlenuts, shallots, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, and a bit of water until smooth.
4. For the Clarified Butter, heat Anchor Unsalted Butter on low heat until it melts and becomes foamy. Then, strain.
5. Sauté the blended spices. Cook for a moment, then add the melted butter.
6. Add pepper, galangal, lemongrass, bay leaf, lime leaf, crushed cardamom, and nutmeg. Mix well, then add the chicken in. Cook until browned.
7. Add water, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cover the pan and cook for 10-15 minutes.
8. Add Anchor Cooking Cream and Anchor Full Cream Milk. Cook for a moment. 
9. Chicken Opor is ready to serve.

title: Resep SAMBAL GORENG TOMAT: Gurih, Sedap, Awet!
recipe_id:
Resep Sambal Tomat (2 jar @250ml)

Bahan:
80 gr bawang merah
35 gr bawang putih
350 gr tomat merah
70 gr cabai merah tanjung
1 sdm terasi
120 gr cabai rawit merah
3 lembar daun jeruk
100-150 ml minyak goreng
50 ml air
¾ sdt garam
2 sdm gula pasir
1 sdt kaldu jamur / msg

Lainnya:
1 buah jeruk limau

Langkah:
1. Potong bawang putih dan bawang merah, goreng sesaat kemudian pindahkan ke dalam food processor
2. Tambahkan terasi, haluskan
3. Potong cabai merah dan cabai rawit lalu goreng di api kecil hingga lunak, pindahkan ke dalam food processor, haluskan
4. Potong tomat, goreng sesaat di api besar, lalu masukkan campuran cabai, daun jeruk, garam, gula pasir, dan kaldu jamur, aduk rata
5. Tambahkan sedikit air, masak di api kecil hingga matang
6. Sambal tomat siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Tomato Sambal Recipe (yield 2 jars @250ml)

Ingredients:
80 g shallot
35 g garlic
350 g red tomato
70 g Tanjung red chili
1 tbsp shrimp paste
120 g red Thai chili
3 pc lime leaf
150 ml oil
50 ml water
¾ tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
1 tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Others:
1 pc kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic and shallots. Fry for a moment, then transfer to the food processor.
2. Add shrimp paste and blend.
3. Slice the red chili and Thai chili. Fry them on low heat until soft. Add into the food processor and blend.
4. Dice the tomatoes. Fry it for a moment on high heat, then add the blended chili, lime leaf, salt, sugar, and mushroom stock powder. Stir.
5. Add a bit of water. Cook on low heat thoroughly.
6. Tomato Sambal is ready to serve.

title: PINEAPPLE DESSERT Recipe: MasterChef Indonesia S9 Champion [feat. Cheryl]
recipe_id:
Resep Deconstructed Tropical Dessert (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan jeli jahe:
150 gr air
4 cm jahe
50 gr gula pasir
1 ½ gr bubuk agar-agar

Bahan nanas karamel:
1 buah nanas madu
Bubuk kayu manis secukupnya
5 sdm gula castor

Bahan crumble kelapa:
85 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
50 gr mentega
25 gr kelapa parut kering
50 gr gula pasir
Garam secukupnya

Bahan whipped lime yogurt:
150 ml whipping cream
1 buah jeruk nipis
25 gr greek yogurt
25 gr gula halus

Langkah:
1. Panaskan air, gula pasir, parutan jahe, masak hingga mendidih lalu masukkan bubuk agar-agar, aduk rata tuang ke dalam mangkuk, dinginkan kemudian potong kotak
2. Untuk coconut crumble, lelehkan mentega lalu di wadah terpisah, campurkan tepung, gula dan kelapa parut kering, aduk rata
3. Masukkan lelehan mentega secara perlahan sambil diaduk kemudian masukkan sedikit garam, masak kembali hingga kecokelatan, sisihkan 
4. Campurkan whipping cream, greek yogurt, dan gula halus yang telah disaring, kocok hingga mengembang lalu masukkan sedikit parutan jeruk nipis dan sedikit perasan air jeruk nipis, aduk rata
5. Masukkan ke dalam piping bag yang telah diberi spuit di dalamnya
6. Potong nanas lalu tambahkan bubuk kayu manis, aduk rata
7. Susun ke dalam loyang tahan panas, taburkan gula castor di semua sisi lalu torch, potong kotak sebagian nanas, sisihkan
8. Susun crumble, whipped cream, nanas dan jeli di dalam gelas atau dessert plate
9. Deconstructed tropical dessert siap dihidangkan
recipe_en:
Deconstructed Tropical Dessert Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ginger Jelly ingredients:
150 g water
4 cm ginger
50 g sugar
1.5 g agar powder

Caramelized Pineapple ingredients:
1 pc honey pineapple
Cinnamon powder, as needed
5 tbsp caster sugar

Coconut Crumble ingredients:
85 g cake flour
50 g butter
25 g desiccated coconut
50 g sugar
Salt, as needed

Whipped Lime Yogurt ingredients:
150 ml whipping cream
1 pc lime
25 g greek yogurt
25 g icing sugar

Steps:
1. Heat water, sugar, grated ginger, and bring to a boil. Add agar powder and stir. Pour into a bowl. Chill, then slice into cubes.
2. For the Coconut Crumble, melt the butter. In another bowl, combine flour, sugar, and desiccated coconut. Mix well.
3. Add the melted butter in slowly while stirring. Add a bit of salt, then cook again until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Combine whipping cream, greek yogurt, and sifted icing sugar. Whisk until fluffy, then add lime zest and lime juice. Mix well.
5. Add the cream into a piping bag with a nozzle attached.
6. Slice the pineapple and add cinnamon powder. Mix well.
7. Arrange the pineapple on a heat-proof pan. Sprinkle caster sugar on all sides, then torch it. Cube some of the pineapple and set aside.
8. Assemble the Crumble, Whipped Cream, Pineapple, and Jelly in a glass or a dessert plate.
9. Deconstructed Tropical Dessert is ready to serve.

title: Lembut & Wangi! Resep SATE AYAM KHAS SENAYAN: Meresap Sampai Ke Tusuk Satenya!
recipe_id:
Resep Sate Ayam Khas Senayan (4-5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
600 gr paha ayam filet
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
1 sdt ketumbar
6 cm lengkuas, iris
5 sdm kecap manis
1 buah jeruk nipis
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
¼ sdt merica
300 ml air

Bahan saus:
120 gr kacang goreng
3 siung bawang putih. potong
5 siung bawang merah, potong
4 buah cabai merah keriting, potong
50 gr gula merah
3 lembar daun jeruk
500 ml air
2 sdm kecap manis
¼ sdt garam
Minyak untuk menumis

Lainnya:
Margarin

Pelengkap:
Bawang merah iris
Cabai rawit merah rebus
Ketupat
Jeruk limau

Langkah:
1. Potong ayam memanjang lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih, lengkuas, ketumbar, dan air hingga halus lalu tuang ke dalam ayam
3. Masukkan kecap manis, garam, kaldu bubuk, merica, dan perasan jeruk nipis, aduk rata kemudian tutup dengan cling wrap, masukkan ke dalam kulkas semalaman
4. Untuk saus, panaskan sedikit minyak lalu tumis cabai keriting, bawang putih, dan bawang merah, sisihkan
5. Blender kacang, air dan tumisan bawang hingga halus lalu masak kembali
6. Tambahkan gula merah, daun jeruk, kecap manis, dan garam, masak di api kecil sambil diaduk hingga mengental
7. Tusukkan sate dengan tusuk sate, panaskan wajan kemudian masukkan sedikit margarin 
8. Masukkan sate ke dalam wajan, masak hingga kedua sisi kecokelatan, kecilkan api lalu tutup wajan, masak sesaat
9. Sate khas senayan siap disajikan dengan cabai rawit, jeruk limau, ketupat, dan irisan bawang merah sebagai pelengkap
recipe_en:
“Sate Khas Senayan” Chicken Satay Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
600 g chicken thigh fillet
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
1 tsp coriander
6 cm galangal, sliced
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder / MSG
¼ tsp pepper
300 ml water

Sauce ingredients:
120 g fried peanuts
3 clove garlic, sliced
5 pc shallot, sliced
4 pc red curly chili, sliced
50 g palm sugar
3 pc lime leaf
500 ml water
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
¼ tsp salt
Oil for frying

Add-ons:
Sliced shallot
Boiled red Thai chili
Ketupat
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into long strips. Set aside in a bowl.
2. Blend the shallots, garlic, galangal, and coriander with water until smooth. Add into the chicken.
3. Add sweet soy sauce, salt, stock powder, pepper, and lime juice. Stir evenly, then cover with plastic wrap and marinate in the fridge overnight.
4. For the sauce, heat some oil and sauté the curly chili, garlic, and shallots. Set aside.
5. Blend the peanuts, water, and sautéed ingredients until smooth, then cook it again.
6. Add palm sugar, lime leaf, sweet soy sauce, and salt. Cook on low heat while stirring until it thickens.
7. Skewer the meat. Heat the pan and add a bit of margarine.
8. Add the Satay into the pan. Cook until both sides are browned. Lower the heat, then cover the pan and let it cook.
9. “Sate Khas Senayan” Chicken Satay is ready to serve with Thai chili, kaffir lime, Ketupat, and sliced shallots on the side.

title: Istimewa! Resep TAHU BAKSO Khas Semarang
recipe_id:
Resep Tahu Bakso Semarang (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
900 gr tahu putih sutra
340 gr ayam paha filet + 30 gr kulit
250 gr daging sapi cincang
5-6 siung bawang putih
3 sdm bawang goreng
150 gr tepung tapioka
2 butir putih telur
60 gr air es / es batu
1 sdm garam
1 sdm kaldu bubuk / penyedap
2 sdm gula pasir
¾ sdt merica

Lainnya:
Minyak Goreng Fortune
Nasi Beras Premium Fortune

Pelengkap:
Cabai rawit hijau

Langkah:
1. Panaskan minyak goreng fortune lalu masukkan tahu, goreng hingga kering, tiriskan 
2. Gunting kulit ayam masukkan ke dalam food processor beserta daging ayam, daging sapi, bawang putih, garam, gula, kaldu bubuk, dan merica hingga halus dan lengket
3. Masukkan es batu, haluskan kemudian masukkan putih telur dan bawang goreng, haluskan kembali
4. Masukkan tepung tapioka, haluskan hingga menyatu kemudian pindahkan ke dalam piping bag
5. Keluarkan sedikit isian tahu lalu isi tahu dengan adonan, rapikan dengan garpu, ulangi hingga habis
6. Kukus tahu bakso selama 20 menit hingga matang 
7. Tahu bakso siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Semarang Stuffed Tofu Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
900 g silken white tofu
340 g chicken thigh fillet + 30 g skin
250 g ground beef
5-6 clove garlic
3 tbsp fried shallots
150 g tapioca flour
2 pc egg white
60 gr cold water / ice cube
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 tbsp sugar
¾ tsp pepper

Others:
Fortune Oi
Fortune Premium Rice

Add-ons:
Green Thai chili

Steps:
1. Heat Fortune oil, then add tofu and fry until crisp. Set aside.
2. Cut up the chicken skin. Add into the food processor along with chicken fillet, beef, garlic, salt, sugar, stock powder, and pepper. Blend until smooth and sticky.
3. Add the ice cubes in. Blend, then add the egg whites and fried shallots. Blend again.
4. Add the tapioca flour. Blend until the dough comes together, then transfer into a piping bag.
5. Scrape some tofu out, then pipe the dough into the tofu. Use a fork to make it neat. Repeat until finished.
6. Steam the Stuffed Tofu for 20 minutes until cooked.
7. Stuffed Tofu is ready to serve

title: 100% Success! Nastar Cake Recipe 3.0: Deliciously Soft and Savory! [Perfect for Eid]
recipe_id:
Resep Nastar (120-130 pcs)

Bahan adonan nastar:  
270 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
110 gr maizena
125 gr Anchor Tinned Salted Butter atau Anchor Salted Butter
125 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter 
100 gr susu bubuk
110 gr gula halus
2 butir kuning telur
½ sdt garam
75 gr Anchor Cheddar Cheese, parut

Bahan selai nanas:
750 gr nanas parut
160 gr gula pasir
5 buah cengkih
1 sdm Anchor Tinned Salted Butter atau Anchor Salted Butter
1 sdm Anchor Unsalted Butter

Bahan olesan:
2 butir kuning telur
1 sdm minyak
1 sdm Anchor Full Cream Milk

Langkah:
1. Panaskan wajan, masukkan nanas, gula pasir, dan cengkih, masak hingga menyusut lalu tambahkan Anchor Unsalted Butter dan  Anchor Tinned Salted Butter, masak kembali hingga menyatu dan lengket
2. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, dinginkan
3. Bentuk bulat selai dengan menggunakan sendok takar ukuran ¼ sdt atau 3 gr kemudian masukkan ke dalam kulkas
4. Untuk adonan, kocok Anchor Tinned Salted Butter dan Anchor Unsalted Butter hingga menyatu lalu tambahkan gula halus kocok kembali hingga pucat dan mengembang 
5. Tambahkan kuning telur satu per satu lalu masukkan garam, kocok kembali
6. Masukkan susu bubuk, maizena, dan tepung terigu yang telah disaring, aduk dengan spatula
7. Tambahkan Anchor Cheddar Cheese, aduk rata hingga menyatu lalu bentuk bulat dengan sendok takar ukuran 1 sdt atau 6-7 gr
8. Masukkan isian selai nanas, bentuk bulat lalu simpan ke dalam loyang yang sudah dialasi baking paper
9. Panggang nastar di suhu 130-135 derajat celcius selama 15-18 menit
10. Untuk olesan, campurkan kuning telur dengan minyak dan Anchor Full Cream Milk, aduk rata
11. Keluarkan nastar lalu oles dengan olesan hingga rata, panggang kembali selama 8-10 menit
12. Nastar siap dihidangkan
