recipe_en:
Pineapple Tarts Recipe (yield 120-130 pcs)

Pineapple Tart Dough ingredients:
270 g all-purpose flour
110 g cornstarch
125 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter or Anchor Salted Butter
125 g Anchor Unsalted Butter 
100 g powdered milk
110 g icing sugar
2 pc egg yolk
½ tsp salt
75 g Anchor Cheddar Cheese, grated

Pineapple Jam ingredients:
750 g grated pineapple
160 g sugar
5 pc clove
1 tbsp Anchor Tinned Salted Butter or Anchor Salted Butter
1 tbsp Anchor Unsalted Butter

Egg Wash ingredients:
2 pc egg yolk
1 tbsp oil
1 tbsp Anchor Full Cream Milk

Steps:
1. Heat the pan. Add the pineapple, sugar, and clove. Cook until the juice is reduced, then add Anchor Unsalted Butter and Anchor Tinned Salted Butter. Cook again until the jam comes together and becomes sticky.
2. Transfer to a bowl and let cool.
3. Shape the jam into balls using a measuring spoon (¼ tsp) or 3 g each. Store in the fridge.
4. For the dough, mix Anchor Unsalted Butter and Anchor Tinned Salted Butter. Then, add icing sugar and whisk until pale and fluffy.
5. Add the egg yolks one by one, then add salt and mix.
6. Sift in powdered milk, cornstarch, and flour. Mix with a spatula.
7. Add Anchor Cheddar Cheese. Mix well until the dough comes together and shape into balls using a measuring spoon (1 tsp) or 6-7 g each.
8. Add the pineapple jam. Shape into balls and arrange on a tray lined with baking paper.
9. Bake at 130°C-135°C for 15-18 minutes.
10. For the egg wash, mix the yolks with oil and Anchor Full Cream Milk. Mix well.
11. Get the tarts out and brush them with the egg wash evenly. Bake them again for 8-10 minutes.
12. The Pineapple Tarts are ready to serve.

title: Resep AYAM KEMANGI PEDAS Khas Sunda [Resep Buka Puasa]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Pedas Kemangi (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 kg ayam negeri, potong 12
1 buah jeruk nipis
1 sdt garam

Bahan lainnya:
2 batang serai, geprek
3 lembar daun salam
7 lembar daun jeruk
2 batang daun bawang, potong
1 buah tomat, potong
10-15 buah cabai rawit merah
50 gr daun kemangi
1 jempol jahe, geprek
⅓ sdt garam
1 ½ sdm gula pasir
½ sdm kaldu bubuk
600 ml air

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih
8 siung bawang merah
5 butir kemiri
1 jempol kunyit
10-15 buah cabai rawit merah
2 jempol kencur
Minyak secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan perasan jeruk nipis dan garam, aduk rata lalu diamkan beberapa saat
2. Geprek kemiri, potong bawang putih, bawang merah, kunyit, dan kencur lalu masukkan ke dalam blender
3. Masukkan cabai rawit dan sedikit minyak, blender hingga halus lalu tumis hingga minyak keluar 
4. Masukkan serai, jahe, daun salam, dan daun jeruk, masak hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan
5. Masukkan ayam, masak sesaat hingga sedikit kecokelatan kemudian tambahkan air 
6. Tambahkan garam, gula, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata lalu ungkep selama 15-20 menit
7. Masukkan tomat, daun bawang, dan cabai rawit, aduk rata, masak sesaat
8. Masukkan daun kemangi, aduk rata lalu matikan api
9. Ayam kemangi pedas siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Lemon Basil Chicken Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
1 kg broiler, sliced into 12 pieces
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt

Other ingredients:
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
3 pc bay leaf
7 pc lime leaf
2 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc tomato, sliced
10-15 pc red Thai chili
50 g lemon basil
1 thumb ginger, pounded
⅓ tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp stock powder
600 ml water

Blended Spices ingredients:
5 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut
1 thumb turmeric
10-15 pc red Thai chili
2 thumb aromatic ginger
Oil, as needed

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice and salt. Stir and marinate for a few moments.
2. Pound the candlenuts. Slice the garlic, shallot, turmeric, and aromatic ginger. Add into the blender.
3. Add Thai chili and some oil, then blend until smooth. Then, sauté until oily.
4. Add lemongrass, ginger, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Cook until fragrant and browned.
5. Add the chicken in. Cook for a moment until a bit browned, then add water.
6. Season with salt, sugar, and stock powder. Stir, then braise for 15-20 minutes.
7. Add tomato, green onions, and Thai chili. Stir and cook for a moment.
8. Add lemon basil. Stir well, then turn the heat off.
9. Spicy Lemon Basil Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Renyah! Resep BAKWAN SAYUR Lengkap Dengan SAMBAL KACANG
recipe_id:
Resep Bakwan Sayur (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
4 lembar kol
80 gr tauge
1-2 buah wortel, kupas
2-3 batang daun bawang
4 batang seledri
250 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
50 gr maizena
50 gr tepung beras
1 sdt baking powder, opsional
100 ml santan
2 sdt garam
1 sdm kaldu bubuk
1 sdm gula pasir
330 ml air

Bahan sambal kacang:
3 siung bawang putih, potong
3 siung bawang merah, potong
6 buah cabai merah keriting, potong
6 buah cabai rawit, potong
80 gr kacang goreng
3 lembar daun jeruk
500 ml air
1 sdm cuka
50 gr gula merah
1 sdt garam
1-2 sdm gula pasir
¼ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap 

Langkah:
1. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai keriting, dan cabai rawit hingga layu lalu masukkan daun jeruk, masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan 
2. Blender kacang, air dan tumisan bawang hingga halus kemudian masak kembali
3. Tambahkan gula merah, cuka, garam, gula pasir, dan kaldu bubuk, masak hingga mendidih, sisihkan
4. Iris kol, daun bawang, seledri dan parut wortel lalu masukkan ke dalam wadah
5. Masukkan tauge, tepung terigu, tepung beras, maizena, baking powder, garam, kaldu bubuk, dan gula pasir, aduk hingga rata
6. Tambahkan santan dan air, aduk rata
7. Panaskan minyak, goreng bakwan hingga kuning keemasan
8. Bakwan siap disajikan dengan sambal kacang sebagai pelengkap
recipe_en:
Indonesian Vegetable Fritters (Bakwan Sayur) Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
4 pc cabbage
80 g beansprouts
1-2 pc carrot, peeled
2-3 pc green onion
4 pc celery
250 g all-purpose flour
50 g cornstarch
50 g rice flour
1 tsp baking powder, optional
100 ml coconut milk
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp stock powder
1 tbsp sugar
330 ml water

Peanut Sambal ingredients:
3 clove garlic, sliced
3 pc shallot, sliced
6 pc red curly chili, sliced
6 pc Thai chili, sliced
80 g fried peanut
3 pc lime leaf
500 ml water
1 tbsp vinegar
50 g palm sugar
1 tsp salt
1-2 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Steps:
1. Heat some oil. Sauté the garlic, shallots, curly chili, and Thai chili until they wilt. Add lime leaf and cook until browned.
2. Blend the peanuts, water, and sautéed ingredients until smooth. Cook it again.
3. Add palm sugar, vinegar, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Bring to a boil and set aside.
4. Slice the cabbage, green onion, and celery. Shave the carrots and place in a bowl.
5. Add beansprouts, flour, rice flour, cornstarch, baking powder, salt, stock powder, and sugar. Mix well.
6. Add coconut milk and water. Mix well.
7. Heat the oil and fry the Fritters until golden brown.
8. Vegetable Fritters are ready to serve with Peanut Sambal on the side.

title: Resep ROLADE TAHU: Luar Garing Dalam Lembut! [Stok Lauk Sahur / Berbuka]
recipe_id:
Resep Rolade Tahu (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan adonan:
600 gr tahu putih padat
1 butir telur
1 buah bawang bombai, cincang, tumis
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
3 sdm maizena
3-4 siung bawang putih halus
½ sdm kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt garam
1 ½ sdm gula
2 sdt minyak wijen, opsional

Bahan kulit rolade:
2 butir telur
80 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
40 gr maizena
250 ml air
2 sdm minyak
¾ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
Pewarna kuning secukupnya, opsional

Lainnya:
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Langkah:
1. Untuk kulit, campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, telur, air dan minyak, aduk rata lalu tambahkan sedikit pewarna kuning, aduk rata
2. Tambahkan garam dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata
3. Panaskan wajan, tuang adonan kulit sambil di ratakan, masak hingga matang kemudian sisihkan
4. Di dalam food processor, masukkan tahu, telur, bawang putih halus, maizena, tepung terigu, garam, kaldu bubuk dan gula, haluskan 
5. Tambahkan bawang bombai, ratakan 
6. Tuang adonan tahu di atas kulit kemudian gulung
7. Kukus selama 20 menit, tiriskan
8. Potong-potong rolade lalu goreng hingga kuning keemasan
9. Rolade tahu siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Tofu Roulade Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Tofu Mix recipe:
600 g firm tofu
1 pc egg
1 pc onion, chopped and sautéed
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 tbsp cornstarch
3-4 clove garlic, minced
½ tbsp chicken powder
½ tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
2 tsp sesame oil, optional

Roulade Skin ingredients:
2 pc egg
80 g all-purpose flour
40 g cornstarch
250 ml water
2 tbsp oil
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
Yellow food coloring, as needed, optional

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. For the skin, combine flour, cornstarch, eggs, water, and oil. Mix well, then add some yellow food coloring. Mix well.
2. Add salt and stock powder. Mix well.
3. Heat the pan. Pour the batter in and even it out. Cook through and set aside.
4. In a food processor, add tofu, egg, minced garlic, cornstarch, flour, salt, stock power, and sugar. Blend smoothly.
5. Add the onions and mix well.
6. Add the tofu mix on the skin and roll.
7. Steam for 20 minutes. Set aside.
8. Slice and fry the Roulade until golden brown.
9. Tofu Roulade is ready to serve.

title: Praktis! Resep ICE CREAM COOKIE SANDWICH: Kesukaan Anak-Anak
recipe_id:
Resep Ice Cream Cookie Sandwich (16-20 pcs)

Bahan:
Good Time Double Choc
Good Time Rainbow

Bahan pastry cream:
150 ml susu
50 ml santan
1 butir kuning telur
40 gr gula pasir
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
¼ sdt garam
15 gr maizena
1 sdm mentega

Bahan lainnya:
170 ml whipping cream
Perisa pandan secukupnya
Pewarna kuning, opsional

Topping:
Gumpaste

Langkah:
1. Campurkan kuning telur, maizena, gula, garam, dan sedikit susu, aduk rata
2. Panaskan wajan, campurkan sisa susu dan santan, masak hingga sedikit mendidih kemudian tuang ke dalam campuran telur, aduk perlahan
3. Masak kembali lalu masukkan ekstrak vanila, masak hingga mengental lalu tambahkan mentega, aduk rata
4. Tuang ke dalam mangkuk, tutup dengan cling wrap hingga menyentuh dasar cream, dinginkan di dalam kulkas
5. Kocok whipping cream hingga medium peak lalu di dalam wadah terpisah kocok pastry cream hingga lembut 
6. Masukkan whipping cream ke dalam pastry cream, aduk dengan spatula hingga rata
7. Bagi menjadi 2 bagian, tuang perisa pandan dan sedikit pewarna kuning, aduk rata kemudian masukkan ke dalam piping bag
8. Siapkan loyang lalu susun Good Time Double Choc dan Good Time Rainbow, semprotkan cream lalu tutup kembali dengan good time di atasnya
9. Beri topping gumpaste lalu tutup dengan cling wrap, masukkan ke dalam freezer

recipe_en:
Cookie Ice Cream Sandwich Recipe (yield 16-20 pcs)

Ingredient:
Good Time Double Choc
Good Time Rainbow

Pastry Cream ingredients:
150 ml milk
50 ml coconut milk
1 pc egg yolk
40 g sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
¼ tsp salt
15 g cornstarch
1 tbsp butter

Other ingredients:
170 ml whipping cream
Pandan extract, as needed
Yellow food coloring, optional

Topping:
Gumpaste

Steps:
1. Combine egg yolk, cornstarch, sugar, salt, and a bit of milk. Mix well.
2. Heat the pan. Add the rest of the milk and the coconut milk. Cook until simmering, then add into the yolk mixture. Stir slowly.
3. Cook it again, then add vanilla extract. Cook until it thickens, then add butter. Mix well.
4. Transfer to a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap until it touches the surface of the cream. Chill in the fridge.
5. Whip the cream to a medium peak. In a separate bowl, mix the pastry cream until soft.
6. Add the whipping cream to the pastry cream. Mix well with a spatula.
7. Divide into 2 parts. Add pandan flavoring and some yellow food coloring to one bowl. Mix well, then transfer into piping bags.
8. Prepare a baking pan and arrange Good Time Double Choc and Good Time Rainbow. Pipe the cream on the biscuit and top it with another Good Time biscuit.
9. Add the gumpaste topping and cover with plastic wrap. Chill in the freezer.

title: TOP 5 TEFAL MUST HAVE ITEMS! [Ads]
10 Menit Jadi! Resep SUP KRIM AYAM JAGUNG
recipe_id:
Resep Sup Krim Ayam Jagung (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
250 gr dada ayam filet
2 siung bawang putih 
½ sdt mixed herbs, opsional
1 sdt mustard, opsional
1 sdt garam
½ sdm gula
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica
Jeruk nipis

Bahan sup:
1 buah bawang bombai, cincang
3 sdm Anchor Salted Butter
3-4 sdm terigu protein sedang
750 ml air
2 batang seledri, opsional
1 cup jagung pipil
1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
133 gr Anchor Cooking Cream

Pelengkap:
Roti soft baguette

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam dengan tisu lalu iris tipis, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Marinasi dengan garam, kaldu bubuk, gula, merica, bawang putih yang telah dihaluskan, sedikit perasan jeruk nipis, mustard, dan mixed herbs, aduk rata
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan ayam masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan lalu potong potong
4. Di wajan yang sama, tumis bawang bombai hingga wangi, aduk rata lalu masukkan Anchor Salted Butter dan tepung terigu, aduk rata
5. Masukkan air, aduk rata lalu masukkan ayam, jagung, seledri, dan kaldu ayam bubuk, aduk rata
6. Tambahkan Anchor Cooking Cream, masak sebentar
7. Sup krim ayam jagung siap disajikan dengan roti sebagai pelengkap

recipe_en:
Chicken & Corn Cream Soup Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Marinade ingredients:
250 g chicken breast fillet
2 clove garlic
½ tsp mixed herbs, optional
1 tsp mustard, optional
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
Lime

Soup ingredients:
1 pc onion, chopped
3 tbsp Anchor Salted Butter
3-4 tbsp all-purpose flour
750 ml water
2 pc celery, optional
1 cup shelled corn
1 tsp chicken powder
133 g Anchor Cooking Cream

Add-ons:
Soft baguette

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel. Slice thinly and place in a bowl.
2. Marinate with salt, stock powder, sugar, pepper, minced garlic, a bit of lime juice, mustard, and mixed herbs. Mix well.
3. Heat some oil. Add the chicken and cook until a bit browned. Set aside and dice.
4. In the same pan, sauté the onion until fragrant. Stir, then add Anchor Salted Butter and flour. Stir well.
5. Add water. Stir, then add chicken, corn, celery, and chicken powder. Stir well.
6. Add Anchor Cooking Cream and cook shortly.
7. Chicken & Corn Cream Soup is ready to serve with a baguette on the side.

title: Gurih Nikmat! Resep BUBUR SUMSUM, Jelly Pandan dan Oat: Cocok Untuk Takjil & Keluarga.
recipe_id:
Resep Bubur Sumsum (untuk 7 porsi)

Bahan jeli pandan:
650 ml jus pandan (6 lembar daun pandan + 6 lembar daun suji)
10 gr bubuk jeli
50 gr gula pasir

Bahan bubur sumsum:
300 ml santan kental
450 ml air
30 gr tepung beras
15 gr tepung tapioka
2 lembar daun pandan
½ sdt garam

Bahan brown sugar granola:
50 gr mentega
80 gr gula palem
2 sdm air
¼ sdt garam
1 ½ cup Quaker Rolled Oat
½ cup kismis
1 cup almond slice

Pelengkap:
Sirup gula merah, opsional

Langkah:
1. Masukkan jus pandan, bubuk jeli, dan gula pasir, aduk rata, masak hingga mendidih kemudian saring
2. Tuang ke dalam gelas, dinginkan
3. Untuk granola, panaskan wajan di api kecil, masukkan Quaker Rolled Oats dan slice almond, sangrai hingga sedikit kecokelatan 
4. Masukan  kismis, masak sesaat hingga kecokelatan, sisihkan
5. Masukkan gula palem dan air, aduk rata lalu tambahkan mentega dan garam, aduk rata
6. Masukan campuran oats, masak sesaat lalu pindahkan ke dalam loyang yang sudah dialasi baking paper, diamkan hingga dingin
7. Untuk bubur sum-sum, masukkan air, santan, tepung tapioka, tepung beras, dan garam, aduk rata kemudian masukkan daun pandan, nyalakan api masak hingga mengental sambil diaduk
8. Masukkan bubur sumsum ke dalam gelas berisi jelly  lalu tambahkan granola dan sirup gula merah sebagai topping

recipe_en:
Indonesian Sweet Rice Porridge Recipe (yield 7 servings)

Pandan Jelly ingredients:
650 ml pandan juice (6 pc pandan leaf + 6 pc suji leaf)
10 g jelly powder
50 g sugar

Sweet Rice Porridge ingredients:
300 ml instant coconut milk
450 ml water
30 g rice flour
15 g tapioca flour
2 pc pandan leaf
½ tsp salt

Brown Sugar Granola ingredients:
50 g butter
80 g palm sugar
2 tbsp water
¼ tsp salt
1.5 cup Quaker Rolled Oats
½ cup raisin
1 cup sliced almond

Add-ons:
Palm sugar syrup, optional

Steps:
1. Add pandan juice, jelly powder, and sugar into the pan. Mix well and cook until boiling, then strain.
2. Pour into a glass and chill.
3. For the Granola, heat a pan on low heat. Add Quaker Rolled Oats and sliced almonds. Toast until lightly browned.
4. Add raisins. Cook for a moment until browned. Set aside.
5. Add palm sugar and water. Stir, then add butter and salt. Stir well.
6. Add the oat mixture. Cook for a moment, then transfer to a pan lined with baking paper. Let it cool down.
7. For the Sweet Rice Porridge, add water, coconut milk, tapioca flour, rice flour, and salt. Stir well, then add pandan leaf. Turn the heat on and cook until it thickens while stirring.
8. Add Sweet Rice Porridge into the glass with Pandan Jelly. Add Granola and Palm Sugar Syrup as toppings.

title: Sweet and Fragrant! Surabaya Layered Pudding Recipe [Tips for Perfect Layer Adhesion]
recipe_id:
Resep Puding Lapis Surabaya (loyang ukuran 20x20 cm)

Bahan lapisan cake:
2 butir telur
60 gr gula pasir
½ sdt SP, opsional
60 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
10 gr Krim Kafe Kapal Api / susu bubuk
1 sdm susu
35 gr margarin cair
½ sdt ekstrak vanila
⅛ sdt garam

Bahan lapisan cokelat:
½ bungkus (3,5 gr) jeli bubuk polos
½ bungkus (7,5 gr) agar-agar bubuk polos
700 ml susu cokelat
100 gr dark chocolate, cincang
60 gr Krim Kafe Kapal Api / susu bubuk
⅛ sdt garam

Bahan lapisan kuning:
½ bungkus (3,5 gr) jeli bubuk polos
½ bungkus (7,5 gr) agar-agar bubuk polos
2 butir telur
80 gr margarin cair
650 ml susu 
120 gr gula pasir
60 gr Krim Kafe Kapal Api / susu bubuk 
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
⅛ sdt garam

Bahan lapisan bening:
2 gr agar-agar bubuk polos
250 ml air

Langkah:
1. Kocok telur, gula, dan SP dengan mixer hingga pucat dan mengembang
2. Masukkan tepung terigu, Krim Kafe Kapal Api, dan garam sambil disaring, aduk perlahan lalu tambahkan margarin, susu, dan ekstrak vanila, aduk perlahan
3. Tuang ke dalam loyang lalu panggang di suhu 165°C selama 15-20 menit
4. Setelah dingin, keluarkan cake dari loyang, sisihkan
5. Panaskan susu, jeli bubuk, agar-agar bubuk, ekstrak vanila, dan garam hingga sedikit mendidih lalu di wadah terpisah campurkan telur, margarin, dan gula, aduk rata
6. Matikan api, masukkan campuran telur secara perlahan sambil diaduk kemudian tambahkan Krim Kafe Kapal Api, masak hingga sedikit mengental
7. Tuang ke dalam loyang, diamkan selama 8-10 menit
8. Panaskan susu cokelat, agar bubuk, jeli bubuk, garam, dan Krim Kafe Kapal Api, masak hingga sedikit mendidih lalu masukkan dark cokelat, aduk rata
9. Tusuk-tusuk puding kuning lalu tuang lapisan cokelat ke dalam loyang sebagai lapisan kedua, diamkan selama 7-8 menit
10. Masak air dan agar-agar bubuk hingga mendidih lalu tuang di atas lapisan cokelat
11. Masukkan cake ke dalam loyang lalu tutup dengan cling wrap, masukkan ke dalam kulkas selama 1-2 jam
12. Keluarkan puding dari loyang lalu potong-potong
13. Puding lapis surabaya siap disajikan

title: Grilled Chicken with Rujak Seasoning Recipe: Soft and Soaked! [Perfect for Sahur]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Bakar Bumbu Rujak (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 ekor ayam broiler @800 gr
1 buah jeruk nipis
½ sdt garam
½ sdt merica

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
5 butir kemiri sangrai
2 cm jahe, iris
3 cm kunyit, iris
4 cm lengkuas, iris
3 saset terasi
Minyak

Bahan giling:
11 buah cabai merah
12 cabai merah keriting
6 buah cabai rawit merah
2 buah tomat merah

Bahan lainnya:
2 batang serai
3 lembar daun salam
4 lembar daun jeruk
2 sdm gula merah sisir
2-4 sdm air asam jawa
100 ml santan
300 ml air
½ sdt garam
1-2 sdm gula
1 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap

Pelengkap:
Timun
Kemangi
Jeruk limau

Langkah:
1. Potong ayam menjadi 6 bagian kemudian marinasi dengan perasan jeruk nipis, garam dan merica, aduk rata, diamkan selama 30 menit
2. Blender bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, kunyit, jahe, lengkuas, terasi dan minyak hingga halus
3. Untuk cabai giling, rebus cabai merah dan cabai keriting selama 5 menit, bilas dengan air
4. Blender tomat lalu masukkan cabai merah, cabai keriting dan cabai rawit, blender kasar, sisihkan
5. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian masukkan serai, daun salam dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga minyak keluar 
6. Masukkan cabai giling, aduk rata lalu masukkan ayam, aduk kembali
7. Masukkan air asam jawa, gula merah, santan dan air, aduk rata
8. Tambahkan garam, gula dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata, lalu ungkep selama 25-30 menit di api sedang kecil 
9. Masukkan ayam ke dalam air fryer lalu panggang di suhu 200 derajat 10 menit 
10. Masukkan ayam ke dalam bumbu, aduk rata
11. Ayam bumbu rujak siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Rujak Grilled Chicken Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 pc broiler chicken @800 g
1 pc lime
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Blended spices ingredients:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut, toasted
2 cm ginger, sliced
3 cm turmeric, sliced
4 cm galangal, sliced
3 sachet shrimp paste
Oil

Other spices:
11 pc red chili
12 pc red curly chili
6 pc red Thai chili
2 pc red tomato

Others:
2 pc lemongrass
3 pc bay leaf
4 pc lime leaf
2 tbsp palm sugar, shaved
2-4 tbsp tamarind water
100 ml coconut milk
300 ml water
½ tsp salt
1-2 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Add-ons:
Cucumber
Lemon basil
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken into 6 parts, then marinate with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix well and marinate for 30 minutes,
2. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, turmeric, ginger, galangal, shrimp paste, and oil until smooth.
3. For the chili, boil the red chili and red curly chili for 5 minutes. Rinse with water.
4. Blend the tomato, then add red chili, red curly chili, and Thai chili. Blend to a rough texture and set aside.
5. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass, bay leaf, and lime leaf. Sauté until the oil seeps out.
6. Add the blended chili in. Stir evenly, then add the chicken in and mix.
7. Add the tamarind water, palm sugar, coconut milk, and water. Mix well.
8. Add salt, sugar, and stock powder. Stir, then braise for 25-30 minutes on medium-low heat.
9. Add the chicken into the air fryer. Grill at 200°C for 10 minutes.
10. Add the chicken back into the spices and stir.
11. Rujak Grilled Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Istimewa! Resep SAYAP AYAM GORENG OSENG BAWANG: Dijamin Nambah! [Resep Chicken Wing]
recipe_id:
Resep Sayap Ayam Goreng dengan Oseng Bawang (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
10 pcs sayap ayam
5 siung bawang putih halus
1 butir telur
1 sdm cuka / air jeruk lemon
1 sdt baking powder, opsional
6 sdm tepung tapioka
2 sdt kaldu
1 sdt garam
½ sdm gula
½ sdt merica
2 saset terasi

Bahan sambal bawang:
100 gr bawang merah kecil utuh
3 siung bawang putih halus
2 batang daun bawang
15 buah cabai rawit merah
10 buah cabai rawit hijau
50 ml air
1 sdm saus tiram
¼ sdt garam
½ sdm gula
¼ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
Nasi putih Beras Premium Fortune

Langkah:
1. Belah ayam menjadi 2 lalu marinasi dengan bawang putih halus, telur, tepung tapioka, cuka, baking powder, kaldu ayam, garam, gula, dan merica, aduk rata
2. Bakar terasi, hancurkan lalu masukkan ke dalam ayam sambil disaring, aduk rata diamkan minimal 30 menit
3. Panaskan minyak goreng Fortune lalu goreng ayam hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan
4. Potong daun bawang, cabai rawit merah, dan cabai rawit hijau seukuran dengan bawang merah
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak goreng Fortune, tumis bawang putih halus, masak sesaat lalu masukkan bawang merah dan daun bawang bagian putih, tumis hingga wangi
6. Masukkan air, saus tiram, garam, gula dan kaldu bubuk, masak sesaat lalu masukkan cabai rawit merah, cabai rawit hijau, dan sisa daun bawang, aduk rata
7. Sayap ayam goreng oseng sambal bawang siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Fried Chicken Wings with Shallot Stir-Fry Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
10 pc chicken wing
5 clove garlic, minced
1 pc egg
1 tbsp vinegar / lemon juice
1 tsp baking powder, optional
6 tbsp tapioca flour
2 tsp stock powder
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
2 sachet shrimp paste

Shallot Stir-Fry ingredients:
100 g shallot, small, whole
3 clove garlic, minced
2 pc green onion
15 pc red Thai chili
10 pc green Thai chili
50 ml water
1 tbsp oyster sauce
¼ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
¼ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
Fortune Premium Rice

Steps:
1. Halve the wings, then marinate with minced garlic, egg, tapioca flour, vinegar, baking powder, chicken powder, salt, sugar, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Roast the shrimp paste. Crumble it, then add into the chicken while straining. Mix well and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Heat Fortune Oil, then fry the wings until browned. Set aside.
4. Slice the green onions, red Thai chili, and green Thai chili in the size of the shallots.
5. Heat some Fortune Oil. Stir-fry the minced garlic for a moment, then add the shallots and the white part of the green onions. Cook until fragrant.
6. Add water, oyster sauce, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Cook for a moment, then add red Thai chili, green Thai chili, and the rest of the green onions. Stir well.
7. Fried Chicken Wings with Shallot Stir-Fry is ready to serve.

title: 100% Success Savory! Soft & Flexible SERABI SOLO Recipe: Perfect for Takjil.
recipe_id:
Resep Serabi Solo (20-23 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
200 ml santan instan
450 ml air
1 sdt garam
2 lembar daun pandan
75 gr gula pasir
1 butir telur
185 gr tepung beras
75 gr tepung tapioka
¾ sdt ragi instan

Bahan siraman santan:
200 ml santan
100 ml air
1 sdt garam
2 lembar daun pandan
1 sdm cokelat bubuk
2 sdm air panas
45-60 ml Indomilk Kental Manis Plain
45-60 ml Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco

Topping:
Meses
Keju parut

Langkah:
1. Masak air, santan, daun pandan dan garam hingga mendidih selama 2 menit lalu tuang ke dalam mangkuk, diamkan hingga hangat, buang daun pandan
2. Masukkan tepung beras, tepung tapioka, telur, gula dan ragi, aduk rata, tutup dengan cling wrap diamkan selama 30 menit
3. Untuk siraman santan, masak santan, air, daun pandan dan garam hingga mendidih lalu tuang ke dalam 2 wadah
4. Masukkan Indomilk Kental Manis Plain dan Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco ke dalam masing-masing wadah
5. Seduh bubuk cokelat dengan air panas, aduk rata kemudian masukkan ke dalam siraman santan cokelat, aduk rata
6. Panaskan wajan, tuang adonan serabi, putar sedikit lalu tuang 2-3 sdm masing-masing siraman kuah santan, masak hingga matang
7. Untuk serabi putih, tambahkan topping Indomilk Kental Manis Plain dan keju parut lalu untuk serabi cokelat tambahkan Indomilk Kental Manis Swiss Choco dan meses sebagai topping
8. Simpan serabi di atas daun pisang kemudian gulung
9. Serabi solo siap dihidangkan

recipe_en:
Serabi Solo Recipe (yield 20-23 pcs)

Batter ingredients:
200 ml coconut milk
450 ml water
1 tsp salt
2 pc pandan leaf
75 g sugar
1 pc egg
185 g rice flour
75 g tapioca flour
¾ tsp instant yeast

Coconut Sauce ingredients:
200 ml coconut milk
100 ml water
1 tsp salt
2 pc pandan leaf
1 tbsp cocoa powder
2 tbsp hot water
45-60 ml Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk
45-60 ml Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk

Topping:
Chocolate rice
Grated cheese

Steps:
1. Bring water, coconut milk, pandan leaf, and salt to a boil for 2 minutes, then transfer to a bowl. Let it cool until warm and discard the pandan leaf.
2. Add rice flour, tapioca flour, egg, sugar, and yeast. Mix well, then cover with plastic wrap and proof for 30 minutes.
3. For the Coconut Sauce, bring coconut milk, water, pandan leaf, and salt to a boil. Then, split into 2 bowls.
4. Add Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk and Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk into each bowl.
5. Dilute cocoa powder with hot water and mix well. Add it into the Chocolate Coconut Sauce and mix well.
6. Heat the pan. Pour the Serabi batter. Swirl the pan, then add 2-3 tbsp of each of the Coconut Sauce. Cook thoroughly.
7. For the White Serabi, add Indomilk Plain Condensed Milk and grated cheese as toppings. For the Chocolate Serabi, add the Indomilk Swiss Choco Condensed Milk and chocolate rice as toppings.
8. Place the Serabi on a banana leaf and roll.
9. Serabi Solo is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Korean Flying Chicken Recipe (yield 12 servings)

Brining ingredients:
2 pc broiler chicken @800 g
2.5 tbsp lime juice
3 tbsp salt
4 tbsp sugar
6 clove garlic, pounded
700 ml water

Dry Coat ingredients:
115 g all-purpose flour
130 g cornstarch
¾ tbsp garlic powder
¾ tbsp onion powder
1 tbsp chicken powder
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
2 tsp baking powder, optional

Wet Batter ingredients:
300 ml water
200 g dry coat

Spicy Powder ingredients:
1.5 tbsp smoked paprika powder
½ tbsp fine chili powder
½ tbsp sugar, powdered
½ tsp salt
½ tsp chicken powder

Other ingredients:
Fortune Oil
Fortune Premium Rice Grains

Steps:
1. Halve the chicken and butterfly it. In a bowl, combine salt, sugar, water, pounded garlic, and lime juice. Mix well.
2. Add the chicken in. Cover with plastic wrap and keep in the fridge for 24 hours.
3. Combine flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, onion powder, chicken powder, salt, pepper, and baking powder. Mix well.
4. For the wet batter, combine some of the dry coat with water. Mix well.
5. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Coat with the dry coat and dip into the wet batter evenly.
6. Heat Fortune Oil on medium heat. Add the chicken in and fry until browned for 13-15 minutes. Set aside.
7. For the sprinkles, combine the smoked paprika powder, chili powder, salt, sugar, and chicken powder. Mix well.
8. Korean Flying Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Cukup 15 menit! Resep MIE KUAH AYAM LABU SIAM : Praktis & Ekonomis.
recipe_id:
Resep Mie Kuah Ayam Labu Siam (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
300 gr dada ayam fillet
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt garam
Jeruk nipis

Bahan lainnya:
5 siung bawang putih
9 siung bawang merah
2 batang daun bawang, potong
1 batang seledri, potong
1 buah tomat, potong
1,2 liter air

Mie basah
Minyak goreng

Sambal cabai rawit
Saus sambal
Jeruk nipis
Telur rebus

2. Potong memanjang labu siam lalu bilas dengan air
3. Iris tipis bawang merah dan bawang putih lalu panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan bawang merah, masak sebentar di api besar 
4. Kecilkan api masukkan bawang putih, goreng hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan

recipe_en:
Chicken & Chayote Noodle Soup Recipe (yield 6-7 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
300 g chicken breast fillet
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp salt
Lime

Other ingredients:
5 clove garlic
9 pc shallot
2 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
1 pc tomato, sliced
1.2 L water
430 g chayote, small
½ tbsp chicken powder
½ tbsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
Fresh noodles
Oil

Condiments:
Thai chili Sambal
Chili sauce
Lime
Boiled egg

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix well and let marinate.
2. Slice the chayote into sticks. Rinse with water.
3. Slice the shallots and garlic thinly. Heat some oil. Add the shallots and cook for a moment on high heat.
4. Lower the heat and add garlic. Fry a bit until yellowed. Set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the chicken. Pan-sear until a bit browned, then add water, chicken powder, salt, sugar, and some of the fried shallots. Cook until the chicken is done.
6. Add tomato and chayote. Cook until soft, then add green onion and celery.
7. Remove the chicken and shred it, then add it back into the pan.
8. Heat some water and boil the noodles. Set aside.
9. Add the noodles into a bowl and pour the soup in.
10. Chicken & Chayote Noodle Soup is ready to be served with Thai chili Sambal, chili sauce, boiled egg, lime juice, and fried shallots on the side.

title: Resep PEPES AYAM KEMANGI: Empuk Berempah!
recipe_id:
Resep Pepes Ayam Kemangi (4 porsi)

Bahan marinasi:
1 ekor ayam pejantan @600 gr potong 4 bagian
1 buah jeruk nipis
1 sdt garam
½ sdt merica

Bahan bumbu halus:
8 siung bawang putih
12 siung bawang merah
7 butir kemiri
8 buah cabai merah keriting
5 cm kunyit, iris
6 cm lengkuas, iris
Minyak

Bahan lainnya:
8 buah cabai rawit merah
4 lembar daun salam
2 batang serai, iris miring
1 buah tomat merah, potong
60 gr daun kemangi
2 batang daun bawang, potong
½ sdt garam
1 sdm gula
1 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
Daun pisang untuk membungkus

Langkah:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan perasan jeruk nipis, garam dan merica, aduk rata, diamkan beberapa saat
2. Blender lengkuas, kunyit, kemiri, bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit dengan sedikit minyak hingga halus
3. Tumis bumbu halus di api sedang hingga wangi dan sedikit kecokelatan, tambahkan sedikit minyak bila perlu lalu matikan api 
4. Jika bumbu sudah dingin atau hangat, masukkan ayam, garam, gula dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata 
5. Masukkan daun bawang dan daun kemangi, aduk rata
6. Siapkan daun pisang, masukkan daun salam, serai, ayam beserta bumbu, cabai rawit dan tomat, lalu bungkus, sematkan tusuk gigi
7. Kukus selama 40 menit

recipe_en:
Chicken Basil Pepes Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 pc rooster @600 g, sliced into 4 pieces
1 pc lime
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Blended spices ingredients:
8 clove garlic
12 pc shallot
7 pc candlenut
8 pc red curly chili
5 cm turmeric, sliced
6 cm galangal, sliced
Oil

Other ingredients:
8 pc red Thai chili
4 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, sliced diagonally
1 pc red tomato, sliced
60 g lemon basil
2 pc green onion, sliced
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
Banana leaf to wrap

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime juice, salt, and pepper. Mix well and let it marinate.
2. Blend the galangal, turmeric, candlenuts, garlic, shallot, and chili with oil until smooth.
3. Sauté the blended spices on medium heat until brownish and fragrant. Add oil if needed, then turn the heat off.
4. Once the spices are warm or cooled down, add chicken, salt, sugar, and stock powder. Mix well.
5. Add green onions and lemon basil. Mix well.
6. Prepare the banana leaves. Add bay leaf, lemongrass, chicken with the spices, Thai chili, and tomato. Wrap and secure with a toothpick.
7. Steam for 40 minutes.
8. Chicken Pepes is ready to serve.

11. Tambahkan ayam, bawang goreng, pangsit goreng, dan irisan daun bawang 
12. Mie gacoan siap disajikan

recipe_id:

3 butir telur omega

½ buah jagung

recipe_en:
Golden Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc Omega egg
350 g cooked white rice
3 clove garlic
2 pc green onion, medium-sized
½ pc corn
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tsp fish sauce
¼ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
Oil to fry
 
Steps:
1. Chop the garlic, slice the green onions, and shell the corn by slicing. Set aside.
2. Separate the yolks from the whites. Mix the rice into the yolks and stir well.
3. Heat some oil and add the egg whites. Stir until fragrant, then add garlic and the white part of green onions. Stir well.
4. Add the rice in. Stir, then add soy sauce and fish sauce. Stir well.
5. Add sugar, salt, and stock powder. Stir well.
6. Add corn and the rest of the green onions. Stir.
7. Golden Fried Rice is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Batter-Fried Tempeh Recipe (yield 18-20 pieces)

Ingredients:
Tempeh, thinly sliced

Batter ingredients:
250 g all-purpose flour
30 g rice flour

1 tsp baking powder, optional
5 clove garlic, minced

1 tsp coriander powder
3 pc green onion, large
2 pc celery, large

500 ml water

recipe_id:
Resep Japanese Soba Salad (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan ponzu dressing (dengan ponzu siap pakai):
40 ml cuka beras
140 ml ponzu
40 gr air
40 gr Hillary Farm Manuka Honey / gula (bukan ml)
80 ml minyak wijen

40-50 ml air jeruk nipis / yuzu juice
35 ml cuka beras
40 gr air

80 ml minyak wijen
2 cm jahe, kupas, iris
1 -2 siung bawang putih

Wijen secukupnya

Selada hijau organik

Tomat ceri
Timun kyuri
Soba buckwheat
Wakame
Bawang bombai

Daun bawang cung

recipe_en:
Japanese Soba Salad Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ponzu Dressing ingredients (with store-bought Ponzu):
40 ml rice vinegar
140 ml ponzu
40 g water
40 g Hillary Farm Manuka Honey / sugar (not in ml)
80 ml sesame oil
2 cm ginger, peeled and sliced
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder, optional
Sesame seeds, as needed

Ponzu Dressing ingredients (with soy sauce):
90 ml soy sauce (heat, then add 3 g katsuobushi and 3 g kombu, infuse for 15 minutes, then strain)
40-50 ml lime juice / yuzu juice
35 ml rice vinegar
40 g water
40 g Hillary Farm Manuka Honey / sugar (not in ml)
80 ml sesame oil
2 cm ginger, peeled and sliced
1 - 2 clove garlic
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder, optional
Toasted sesame seeds, as needed

Salad ingredients:
Organic green lettuce
Iceberg lettuce
Edamame
Cherry tomato
Japanese cucumber
Buckwheat soba
Wakame
Onion
Carrot
Spring onion

Others:
Toasted sesame seeds as topping

Steps:

3. Soak the wakame in mineral water. Drain and slice.
4. Slice the vegetables to your preference. Soak the sliced onion in ice water.

title: Gurih Nagih! Resep FRENCH TOAST WITH COFFEE CUSTARD: Luar Kering Dalem Lembut!
recipe_id:
Resep French Toast with Coffee Custard (untuk 3 porsi)

Bahan:
3 lembar roti tawar
170 ml susu
3 butir telur
¼ sdt garam
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
Gula
Mentega

Bahan coffee custard:
200 ml susu
80 ml campuran kopi pekat
3-4 sdm gula palem
1 butir telur
5 sdm Kapal Api Krim Cafe
2 sdm maizena
2 sdm mentega
⅛ sdt garam

Bahan campuran kopi pekat:
3 sdm Kopi Kapal Api Spesial
100 ml air

Topping:
Whipped cream

Langkah:
1. Didihkan air masukkan kopi kapal api, masak hingga mendidih lalu saring
2. Pindahkan ke dalam wajan, masukkan susu dan Kapal Api Krim Café, aduk kemudian masak  
3. Di dalam wadah terpisah, campurkan telur, maizena, gula palem, dan garam, aduk rata lalu tuang campuran kopi sambil diaduk
4. Masak kembali hingga mengental lalu tambahkan mentega, aduk rata tuang ke dalam mangkuk, tutup dengan cling wrap
5. Di dalam wadah, campurkan telur, susu, garam, ekstrak vanilla, aduk lalu celupkan roti di kedua sisi
6. Panaskan wajan di api sedang, masukkan mentega lalu panggang roti masing-masing sisi selama 4 menit atau hingga kecokelatan
7. Taburkan gula di semua sisi dan terakhir masukkan mentega, sisihkan
8. Masukkan vla kopi dan whipped cream sebagai topping
9. French toast dengan vla kopi siap disajikan

Instagram: https://instagram.com/krimkafe/

recipe_en:
French Toast with Coffee Custard Recipe (yield 3 servings)

Ingredients:
3 slice white bread
112 ml milk
2 pc egg
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
Sugar
Butter

Coffee Custard ingredients:
200 ml milk
80 ml coffee concentrate
3-4 tbsp palm sugar
1 pc egg
5 tbsp Kapal Api Krim Kafe
2 tbsp cornstarch
2 tbsp butter
⅛ tsp salt

Coffee Concentrate ingredients:
3 tbsp Kapal Api Spesial Coffee
100 ml water

Topping:
Whipped cream

Steps:
1. Boil some water. Add Kapal Api Coffee, then brew and strain.
2. Transfer to a pan. Add milk and Kapal Api Krim Kafe. Stir and simmer.
3. In a separate bowl, combine egg, cornstarch, palm sugar, and salt. Mix well, then pour the coffee mixture in while stirring.
4. Return to the pan and cook until it thickens, then add butter. Mix well and pour into a bowl and cover with plastic wrap.
5. In a container, combine eggs, milk, salt, and vanilla extract. Mix well, then soak both sides of the bread.
6. Heat the pan on medium heat. Add butter, then toast each side of the bread for 4 minutes or until browned.
7. Sprinkle sugar on all sides of the bread. Add more butter, then set the bread aside.
8. Pour the Coffee Custard and add the whipped cream topping.
9. French Toast with Coffee Custard is ready to serve.

title: Mantap! Resep PAI AYAM JAMUR Khas Eropa [Chicken & Mushroom Pie]
recipe_id:
Resep Chicken Mushroom Pie (Untuk 9-10 porsi)

Bahan:
puff pastry

Bahan marinasi:
1 pasang dada ayam @450gr
1 sdm minyak
2 sdt mustard
1 sdm jus lemon
1 sdt bubuk paprika
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdt garam
½ sdm gula
¼ sdt lada hitam

Bahan saus mushroom:
450 gr jamur (shitake, champignon, portobello, dan shimeji cokelat)
7 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
3 sdm mentega
150 ml krim
1 sdm kecap inggris
250 ml air
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt merica
Thyme secukupnya
Minyak untuk menumis 

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam dengan tisu kemudian potong kotak-kotak, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Marinasi ayam dengan jus lemon, mustard, bubuk paprika, garam, gula, lada hitam, tepung terigu, dan minyak, aduk rata lalu tutup dengan cling wrap, diamkan minimal 1 jam 
3. Potong jamur lalu cincang bawang putih dan bawang merah, sisihkan
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis jamur hingga matang, sisihkan
5. Di wajan yang sama, masukkan ayam, mentega, bawang putih, dan bawang merah, aduk rata
6. Masukkan jamur, kecap inggris, cream, air, kaldu ayam bubuk, merica, dan thyme, aduk rata, diamkan hingga dingin 
7. Taburkan sedikit tepung terigu di atas puff pastry, potong menjadi lingkaran diameter 28 cm untuk dasar lalu oles dengan egg wash
8. Potong memanjang puff pastry, bentuk jaring dengan cutter roller lalu simpan di atas puff pastry berbentuk lingkaran
9. Untuk pinggiran loyang, bentuk kecil memanjang lalu rekatkan sambil di tekan, oles dengan egg wash
10. Tutup pai dengan puff pastry lalu oles dengan egg wash
11. Panggang di suhu 200 derajat selama 20 menit 
12. Chicken mushroom pie siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Mushroom Pie Recipe (yield 9-10 servings)

Ingredients:
Puff pastry

Marinating ingredients:
1 pair chicken breast fillet @450g
1 tbsp oil
2 tsp mustard
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 tsp paprika powder
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
¼ tsp black pepper

Mushroom Sauce ingredients:
450 g mushroom (Shiitake, Champignon, Portobello, and Brown Shimeji)
7 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
3 tbsp butter
150 ml cream
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
250 ml water
2 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
Thyme, as needed
Oil for sautéing

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel. Dice and place it in a bowl.
2. Marinate the chicken with lemon juice, mustard, paprika powder, salt, sugar, black pepper, flour, and oil. Stir well and cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
3. Chop the mushroom. Mince the garlic and shallots. Set aside.
4. Heat some oil. Sauté the mushroom until cooked. Set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the chicken, butter, garlic, and shallots. Stir well.
6. Add the mushroom, Worcestershire sauce, cream, water, chicken powder, pepper, and thyme. Stir well and let cool.
7. Dust the puff pastry with flour. Cut into a circle, 28-cm in diameter, for the base. Brush with the egg wash.
8. Cut the puff pastry lengthwise. Make a lattice pattern with a roller cutter and paste on top of the circular puff pastry.
9. For the edges of the pan, cut the puff pastry into bands. Push it onto the pan so it sticks well, then brush it with the egg wash.
10. Cover the pie with the puff pastry, then brush it with the egg wash.
11. Bake it at 200°C for 20 minutes.
12. Chicken Mushroom Pie is ready to serve.

title: Cukup 1 Wajan! Resep GRILLED CHICKEN WITH MUSHROOM SAUCE [Menu Valentine]
recipe_id:
Resep Grilled Chicken Mushroom Sauce (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan:
1 pasang dada ayam
2 sdm minyak
2 sdt bawang putih halus / bubuk bawang putih
1 sdm mustard
1 sdm jus lemon / kecap inggris
1 sdt bubuk paprika
¾ sdt garam
1 sdt gula
¼ sdt lada hitam

Bahan saus mushroom:
2 buah jamur shitake
10 buah jamur champignon
4 siung bawang putih halus
5 siung bawang merah halus
Thyme secukupnya    
2 sdm mentega
150 ml krim
200 ml air
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt gula
¼ sdt merica

Pelengkap:
1 buah kentang rebus, potong
½ pack baby buncis, rebus
3 siung bawang putih cincang
4 sdm mentega
Parsley, cincang
Lemon

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam dengan tisu kemudian pipihkan dengan cara dipukul-pukul dengan rolling pin atau benda tumpul
2. Marinasi ayam dengan jus lemon, minyak, bawang putih, mustard, bubuk paprika, garam, gula, dan lada hitam, aduk rata
3. Tutup dengan cling wrap, diamkan minimal 1 jam di suhu ruang 
4. Untuk saus, cincang jamur shitake dan champignon, sisihkan
5. Rebus sebentar buncis dengab sedikit garam dan gula lalu bilas dengan air dingin, tiriskan
6. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan ayam, panggang di satu sisi terlebih dahulu kemudian balikkan
7. Masukkan kentang dan baby buncis, masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan lalu masukkan sebagian mentega, bawang putih,  aduk rata 
8. Masukkan parsley dan sedikit perasan lemon, masak hingga matang lalu angkat kentang dan baby buncis
9. Masukkan sisa mentega lalu siram lelehan mentega ke atas ayam, tiriskan
10. Di wajan yang sama, tumis jamur hingga matang lalu masukkan bawang putih, bawang merah, dan thyme, masak hingga wangi
11. Tambahkan krim, air, garam, gula, dan merica, aduk rata, lalu masukkan mentega
12. Grilled chicken siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Grilled Chicken with Mushroom Sauce Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pair chicken breast
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp minced garlic / garlic powder
1 tbsp mustard
1 tbsp lemon juice / Worcestershire sauce
1 tsp paprika powder
¾ tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp black pepper

Mushroom Sauce ingredients:
2 pc Shiitake
10 pc Champignon
4 clove garlic, minced
5 pc shallot, minced
Thyme, as needed
2 tbsp butter
150 ml cream
200 ml water
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Add-ons:
1 pc potato, boiled and sliced
½ pack baby green beans, blanched
3 clove garlic, minced
4 tbsp butter
Parsley, chop
Lemon

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with a paper towel. Pound with a rolling pin to flatten.
2. Marinate the chicken with lemon juice, oil, garlic, mustard, paprika powder, salt, sugar, and black pepper. Mix well.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for at least 1 hour at room temperature.
4. For the Sauce, chop the Shiitake and Champignon. Set aside.
5. Blanch the green beans with a bit salt & sugar, rinse with cold water. Set aside.
6. Heat some oil. Add the chicken in. Sear on one side first, then flip.
7. Add the potato and green beans. Cook until lightly browned, then add garlic and some of the butter. Stir.
8. Add parsley and a bit of lemon juice. Cook properly, then remove the potato and green beans from the pan.
9. Add the rest of the butter, then baste the chicken. Set aside.
10. In the same pan, sauté the mushroom until it’s cooked. Then, add garlic, shallots, and thyme. Cook until fragrant.
11. Add cream, water, salt, sugar, and pepper. Stir well. Add butter
12. Grilled Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Kids & Husband Love It! Special ICE CREAM CAKE Recipe: Perfect for Birthdays!
recipe_id:
Resep Ice Cream Cake (whole diameter 18 cm untuk 8-9 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg ice cream vanila
2 pak  Good Time Double Choc

Bahan chocolate cake:
135 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
135 gr gula pasir
45 gr bubuk cokelat
¾ sdt baking powder
½ sdt baking soda
½ sdt garam
1 butir telur
170 gr susu
½ sdm cuka
65 ml kopi panas / air panas
60 gr minyak
1 sdt ekstrak vanila

Bahan pelapis:
500 gr whipping cream
150 gr gula halus
50 gr bubuk cokelat

Langkah: 
1. Campurkan susu dengan cuka, aduk rata lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
2. Masukkan telur, minyak, coffee, ekstrak vanila, bubuk cokelat, gula pasir, baking soda, baking powder, garam, dan tepung terigu kocok dengan mixer hingga menyatu
3. Tuang ke dalam loyang yang sudah dialasi baking paper, panggang di suhu 175-180 derajat selama 40-45 menit 
4. Setelah dingin keluarkan cake dari cetakan lalu masukkan ke dalam freezer
5. Potong bagian atas cake yang berlebih, sisihkan untuk hiasan
6. Siapkan loyang dan baking paper, bentuk pita lalu alasi dasar dan pinggiran loyang dengan baking paper
7. Masukkan Good Time Double Choc ke dalam plastik lalu hancurkan dengan rolling pin, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
8. Masukkan ice cream vanilla, aduk rata lalu tuang ke dalam loyang, ratakan dan masukkan ke dalam freezer 
9. Untuk lapisan kocok whipping cream, gula halus dan cokelat bubuk 
10. Susun cake lalu oles whipping cream, ratakan kemudian simpan ice cream di atas cake, tutup dengan lapisan whipping cream, hias sesuai selera
11. Beri taburan Good Time Double Choc dan sisa cake yang telah dihancurkan 
12. Ice cream cake siap dihidangkan

recipe_en:
Ice Cream Cake Recipe (18-cm or 7” pan for 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg vanilla ice cream
2 pack Good Time Double Choc

Chocolate Cake ingredients:
135 g all-purpose flour
135 g sugar
45 g cocoa powder
¾ tsp baking powder
½ tsp baking soda
½ tsp salt
1 pc egg
170 g milk
½ tbsp vinegar
65 ml espresso
60 g oil
1 tsp vanilla extract

Frosting ingredients:
500 g whipping cream
150 g powdered sugar
50 g cocoa powder

Steps:
1. Mix the milk with vinegar. Stir and transfer to a bowl.
2. Add the egg, oil, coffee, vanilla extract, cocoa powder, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and flour. Mix well with a mixer.
3. Pour into a pan lined with baking paper. Bake at 175°C-180°C for 40-45 minutes.
4. Once it cools down, de-pan the cake and put it in the freezer.
5. Slice the top of the cake and set it aside for decor.
6. Prepare a pan and baking paper. Make a band from the baking paper and line the bottom and sides, too.
7. Add Good Time Double Choc into a plastic bag and pound it with a rolling pin. Place in a bowl.
8. Add vanilla ice cream. Mix well, then add it into the pan evenly. Place in the freezer.
9. For the frosting, whip the cream, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder.
10. To assemble, spread the frosting on the cake evenly. Place the ice cream layer on top of the cake. Cover with the frosting and decorate to your liking.
11. Sprinkle Good Time Double Choc crumbs and the leftover cake crumbs.
12. Ice Cream Cake is ready to serve.

title: Recipe for HAM-CHEESE LAYERED SHRIMP in an Old-Fashioned Chinese Restaurant Style: MAKE IT SO GOOD!
recipe_id:
Resep Udang Lapis Ham Keju (10 pcs)

Bahan:
10 pcs udang, kupas sisa buntut
Smoked beef / bacon / ham
Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices
Daun bawang cung, potong seukuran udang

Bahan adonan:
200 gr paha ayam fillet dengan kulit, cincang
200 gr udang, cincang kasar
2-3 buah jamur shitake, rendam air hangat
1 sdt garam
1 sdm gula
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica
1-2 sdm maizena
4 siung bawang putih, haluskan
1 sdm air jahe
½ butir putih telur
1 sdt minyak wijen

Pelapis:
2 butir telur, kocok
Maizena

Bahan saus mentega:
2 sdm kecap inggris
1 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm arak masak, opsional
65 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ sdm gula pasir

Langkah:
1. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan ayam, udang, garam, merica, kaldu bubuk dan gula, aduk hingga lengket selama 5-8 menit
2. Peras jamur shitake yang telah direndam lalu cincang dan masukkan ke dalam adonan
3. Masukkan bawang putih, air jahe, putih telur, minyak wijen, dan maizena, aduk rata
4. Belah dua anchor cheddar cheese slices dan smoked beef lalu sayat bagian bawang udang 
5. Susun smoked beef, keju, udang dan daun bawang lalu gulung
6. Bungkus udang dengan adonan lalu beri sedikit taburan maizena, ratakan sambil dibentuk
7. Celupkan udang ke dalam telur lalu ke dalam maizena lalu goreng di api sedang hingga sedikit kekuningan, tiriskan dan diamkan beberapa saat
8. Goreng kembali udang dengan minyak panas selama 30 detik, tiriskan
9. Untuk saus, campurkan kecap inggris, kecap asin, arak masak dan gula, aduk rata
10. Panaskan wajan, masukkan anchor unsalted butter lalu tuang campuran saus, masak beberapa saat lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
11. Udang lapis ham keju siap disajikan dengan saus mentega sebagai pelengkap

recipe_en:
Ham & Cheese Shrimp Roll Recipe (yield 10 pieces)

Ingredients:
10 pc shrimp, peeled, tail intact
Smoked beef / bacon / ham
Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices
Spring onion, sliced in the size of the shrimp

Dough ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh fillet with skin, chopped
200 g shrimp, roughly chopped
2-3 pc shitake mushroom, soaked in warm water
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
1-2 tbsp cornstarch
4 clove garlic, minced
1 tbsp ginger liquid
½ pc egg white
1 tsp sesame oil

Coating:
2 pc egg, whisked
Cornstarch

Soy Butter Sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp cooking wine, optional
65 g Anchor Unsalted Butter
½ tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. In a bowl, mix chicken, shrimp, salt, pepper, stock powder, and sugar. Stir until sticky for 5-8 minutes.
2. Squeeze the soaked Shiitake. Chop and add into the dough.
3. Add garlic, ginger water, egg white, sesame oil, and cornstarch. Mix evenly.
4. Halve the Anchor Cheddar Cheese Slices and smoked beef. Slice the bottom of the shrimp.
5. Stack the smoked beef, cheese, shrimp, and green onions, then roll.
6. Wrap the shrimp with the dough. Coat it with cornstarch and wrap it evenly while shaping.
7. Dip the shrimp into the egg, then coat with cornstarch. Fry on medium heat until slightly yellowed. Set aside and let cool.
8. Fry the shrimp once more in hot oil for 30 seconds. Set aside.
9. For the sauce, combine Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, cooking wine, and sugar.
10. Heat the pan. Add Anchor Unsalted Butter and the sauce mix. Cook for a moment, then transfer to a bowl.
11. Ham & Cheese Shrimp Roll is ready to serve with Soy Butter Sauce on the side.

title: Gurih & Wangi! Resep AYAM GORENG ITALIA: CHICKEN PARMIGIANA [Bisa Pakai Air Fryer]
recipe_id:

Bahan:
1 pasang dada ayam ukuran besar

2 butir telur
1 sdm minyak (untuk metode oven & air fryer)

Bahan breadcrumbs mix:
1 ½  cup tepung panko
½ cup parmesan parut
1 sdm basil kering / italian mixed herbs
3-4 sdm minyak (untuk metode oven & air fryer)
½ sdt lada hitam

Bahan saus tomat:
3 siung bawang putih, iris
8 siung bawang merah, iris
2 lembar bay leaf
300 gr tomat kupas kaleng
200 gr tomat ceri, belah dua
2 sdm saus tomat
1 sdm kecap inggris
250 ml air
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm gula pasir

Topping:
Keju parmesan
Keju mozzarella

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam lalu belah masing-masing menjadi 2 bagian
2. Siapkan baking paper, pipihkan ayam menggunakan rolling pin dengan cara dipukul-pukul
3. Marinasi ayam dengan garam dan merica lalu campurkan bubuk bawang putih, bubuk bawang bombai, dan bubuk paprika, aduk rata kemudian taburkan ke dalam ayam, ratakan 
4. Tambahkan perasan lemon, ratakan kemudian bungkus dengan baking paper, diamkan 10-15 menit 
5. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang merah hingga wangi lalu masukkan bawang putih, aduk
6. Masukkan tomat ceri dan bay leaf, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan tomat kaleng, air dan saus tomat, aduk rata
7. Tambahkan kecap inggris, garam, merica, dan gula, kecilkan api lalu masak secara perlahan hingga menyatu
8. Kocok telur dengan minyak kemudian di wadah terpisah campurkan tepung panko, keju parmesan dan basil kering, aduk rata
9. Tambahkan minyak dan lada hitam, aduk rata
10. Balurkan ayam ke dalam tepung terigu lalu telur kemudian ke dalam campuran breadcrumbs, ratakan
11. Masak dengan metode air fryer di suhu 185 derajat celcius selama 15 menit kemudian oles dengan minyak panggang kembali di suhu 200 derajat selama 5 menit
12. Beri topping saus tomat, keju mozzarella, dan keju parmesan parut di atas ayam lalu panggang kembali selama 5 menit di suhu 200 derajat 
13. Chicken parmigiana siap disajikan

3 cm jahe parut + 1 sdm air

recipe_en:
Five-Spice Oat Chicken Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc chicken thigh fillet, large
5 clove garlic, minced
3 cm ginger, grated + 1 tbsp water
1 tbsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 pc egg
5 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp salt
2 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar

Dry Coat:
9 tbsp Quaker Rolled Oats
9 tbsp cornstarch
9 tbsp Quaker Rolled Oats, ground

Sprinkles ingredients:
15 clove garlic, minced
3 pc red curly chili, sliced
3 pc red Thai chili, sliced
2 pc pandan leaf, sliced
2 sprig curry leaf
4 tbsp Quaker Rolled Oats
1 tbsp powdered milk
1 tsp chicken powder
1 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp butter

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels. Slice it thinly and pound with the knife.
2. Place it in a bowl. Marinate with egg, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, five-spice powder, salt, stock powder, sugar, pepper, minced garlic, ginger liquid, and cornstarch. Mix evenly.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for at least 1 hour.
4. Combine cornstarch with whole rolled oats and ground rolled oats.
5. Coat the chicken in the rolled oats mix. Coat evenly while massaging the chicken. Let it rest for 3-5 minutes.
6. Heat the oil and fry the chicken until browned and cooked. Set aside.
7. If using an air fryer, brush both sides of the chicken with oil and fry at 185°C for 20 - 25 minutes.
8. Heat some oil and sauté the garlic on medium heat until fragrant.
9. Add pandan leaf, Thai chili, red chili, Quaker Rolled Oats, curry leaf, butter, powdered milk, chicken powder, sugar, and pepper. Cook on low heat until a bit browned.
10. Five-Spice Oat Fried Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Lembut Wangi! Resep BANANA CAKE Anti Gagal
recipe_id:
Resep Banana Cake (loyang ukuran  26 cm x 10 cm)

Bahan:
3 butir telur
100 gr gula pasir
230 gr pisang ambon lumut (sangat matang)
70 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter
70 gr Anchor Tinned Salted Butter atau Anchor Salted Butter
110 gr tepung terigu protein sedang 
½ sdt garam
20 gr susu bubuk
1 sdt baking powder 

Langkah:
1. Panaskan oven di suhu 170 derajat
2. Campurkan Anchor Unsalted Butter dengan Anchor Tinned Salted Butter kemudian lelehkan dengan microwave selama 30 detik, aduk 
3. Hancurkan pisang dengan garpu lalu tuang lelehan butter, aduk rata
4. Tambahkan garam, baking powder, dan susu bubuk, aduk rata lalu masukkan tepung terigu sambil disaring, aduk hingga rata
5. Kocok telur dan masukkan gula secara perlahan, kocok hingga pucat dan mengembang
6. Campurkan sedikit adonan telur ke dalam campuran pisang, aduk rata
7. Masukkan campuran pisang ke dalam telur, aduk perlahan hingga rata
8. Tuang adonan ke dalam loyang yang telah dialasi baking paper kemudian panggang selama 40 menit
9. Banana cake siap dihidangkan

title: Gurih & Crispy! Resep POTATO WEDGES: Tanpa Digoreng! [Bisa Pakai Air Fryer]
recipe_id:
Resep Potato Wedges (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
3-4 buah kentang

Bahan pelapis kering:
60 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
60 gr maizena
2 sdt mixed herbs
2 sdt bubuk paprika
½ sdt bubuk kari
2 sdt bubuk bawang putih
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica

Bahan pelapis basah:
2 butir telur
⅓ sdt garam
½ sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt merica

Langkah:
1. Potong wedges kentang, bilas dengan air lalu kukus selama 15 menit hingga empuk
2. Di dalam mangkuk, campurkan tepung terigu, maizena, mixed herbs, bubuk paprika, bubuk kari, bubuk bawang putih, garam, kaldu bubuk, dan merica, aduk rata
3. Kocok telur dengan garam, kaldu bubuk, dan merica
4. Masukkan kentang ke dalam tepung kering, telur, dan tepung kering
5. Masukkan ke dalam air fryer, masak di suhu 180 derajat selama 15 menit
6. Oles dengan minyak lalu masak kembali di suhu 200 derajat selama 10 menit
7. Potato wedges siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Potato Wedges Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
3-4 pc potato

Dry coating ingredients:
60 g all-purpose flour
60 g cornstarch
2 tsp mixed herbs
2 tsp paprika powder
½ tsp curry powder
2 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Wet coating ingredients:
2 pc egg
⅓ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Slice the potatoes into wedges. Rinse them with water, then steam for 15 minutes until soft.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, cornstarch, mixed herbs, paprika powder, curry powder, garlic powder, salt, stock powder, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Whisk the egg with salt, stock powder, and pepper.
4. Roll the potatoes into the dry coat, the egg, then the dry coat.
5. Place them in the air fryer and cook at 180℃ for 15 minutes.
6. Brush them with oil and cook them again at 200℃ for 10 minutes.
7. Potato Wedges are ready to serve.

title: Tasty Fresh! Recipe TOM YUM SPAGHETTI
recipe_id:
Resep Tom Yum Spaghetti (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
Spaghetti
200-300 gr udang
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
5 lembar daun jeruk
3 buah cabai rawit merah
1 buah cabai merah
2 sdm Filippo Berio Tomato Pesto
2-3 sdm tom yum paste (https://youtu.be/YW1ABCvBDt8) 
300 ml kaldu kulit udang
1 buah tomat merah
Filippo Berio Pure Olive Oil
Garam, gula, merica secukupnya (opsional)

Pelengkap:
Daun ketumbar
Parmesan parut
Jeruk nipis
Filippo Berio Extra Virgin Olive Oil

Langkah:
1. Iris bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai merah, cabai rawit, dan daun jeruk
2. Rebus air lalu masukkan spaghetti masak selama 6-7 menit
3. Panaskan sedikit Filippo Berio Pure Olive Oil, masukkan udang masak beberapa saat hingga matang, tiriskan 
4. Di wajan yang sama, tumis bawang merah dan bawang putih hingga wangi lalu masukkan cabai rawit, cabai merah dan daun jeruk, aduk rata
5. Cincang tomat lalu masukkan ke dalam tumisan, aduk rata
6. Tambahkan tom yum paste dan Filippo Berio Tomato Pesto, aduk rata kemudian masukkan kaldu udang
7. Masukkan spaghetti dan sedikit air rebusan nya lalu tambahkan garam, gula dan merica sesuai selera, masak selama 1-2 menit
8. Tambahkan udang, daun ketumbar dan parutan parmesan, aduk rata
9. Pindahkan ke dalam piring lalu tuang sedikit Filippo Berio Extra Virgin Olive Oil dan perasan jeruk nipis
10. Spaghetti tom yum siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Tom Yum Spaghetti Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
Spaghetti
200-300 g shrimp
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
5 pc lime leaf
3 pc red Thai chili
1 pc red chili
2 tbsp Filippo Berio Tomato Pesto
2-3 tbsp tom yum paste (https://youtu.be/YW1ABCvBDt8) 
300 ml shrimp stock
1 pc red tomato
Filippo Berio Pure Olive Oil
Salt, sugar, pepper, to taste (optional)

Others:
Cilantro
Grated parmesan
Lime
Filippo Berio Extra Virgin Olive Oil

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic, shallots, red chili, Thai chili, and lime leaves.
2. Bring water to a boil and add spaghetti. Cook for 6-7 minutes.
3. Heat some Filippo Berio Pure Olive Oil. Add the shrimp in and cook shortly until cooked. Set aside.
4. In the same pan, sauté the shallots and garlic until fragrant. Add Thai chili, red chili, and lime leaves. Stir well.
5. Chop the tomato and add it in the pan. Stir.
6. Add the tom yum paste and Filippo Berio Tomato Pesto. Stir and add the shrimp stock.
7. Add the spaghetti and some pasta water. Add salt, sugar, and pepper, to taste. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
8. Add the shrimp, cilantro, and grated parmesan in. Stir.
9. Transfer to a plate and finish with some Filippo Berio Extra Virgin Olive Oil and lime juice.
10. Tom Yum Spaghetti is ready to serve.

title: Sehat Segar Crunchy! Resep ASIAN SALAD [Yu Sheng Khas IMLEK]
recipe_id:
Resep Yu Sheng (untuk 7-8 porsi)

Bahan cured salmon:
250 gr salmon
1 sdm garam
2 sdm gula

Bahan:
1 buah lobak ukuran sedang
1 buah wortel
1 buah timun kyuri
1 buah ubi ungu ukuran sedang
2 batang daun bawang
1 buah paprika merah
100 gr mangga muda
2 pcs jeruk bali
5 lembar kulit pangsit
30 gr kacang mede panggang, cincang

Bahan asian dressing:
4 sdm plum sauce / sambal bangkok
2,5 sdm minyak wijen
4-5 sdm cuka beras
4,5 sdt gula pasir
1,5 sdm air jahe
1,5 sdm air bawang putih
1/3 sdt garam
1/3 sdt kaldu bubuk

Langkah:
1. Pisahkan kulit salmon, taburkan garam dan gula pasir di seluruh permukaan salmon, tutup dengan plastic wrap diamkan di kulkas selama 1-2 jam
2. Bilas salmon dengan air, keringkan dengan tisu kemudian iris tipis
3. Potong dan iris tipis sayuran mulai dari lobak, wortel, timun, paprika merah, dan daun bawang lalu rendam dengan air es
4. Iris tipis mangga muda, ubi ungu, dan kulit pangsit
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak tumis ubi ungu hingga matang dan mengkilap
6. Panaskan minyak, goreng pangsit di api sedang hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan
7. Untuk dressing, campurkan plum sauce, cuka beras, minyak wijen, gula pasir, air jahe, air bawang putih, garam, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata
8. Susun sayuran di atas piring, masukkan dressing lalu aduk 
9. Yu sheng siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Yu Sheng Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Cured Salmon ingredients:
250 g salmon
1 tbsp salt
2 tbsp sugar

Ingredients:
1 pc radish, medium
1 pc carrot
1 pc Japanese cucumber
1 pc purple yam, medium
2 pc green onion
1 pc red bell pepper
100 g unripe mango
2 pc pomelo
5 pc wonton wrapper
30 g roasted cashew, chop

Asian Dressing ingredients:
3-4 tbsp plum sauce / bangkok sambal
2.5 tbsp sesame oil
4 - 5 tbsp rice vinegar
4.5 tsp sugar
1.5 tbsp ginger liquid
1.5 tbsp garlic liquid
⅜ tsp salt
⅜ tsp stock powder

Steps:
1. Skin the salmon, then sprinkle salt and sugar on the entire surface. Cover with plastic wrap and cure in the fridge for 1-2 hours.
2. Rinse the salmon with water. Pat dry with a paper towel and slice it thinly.
3. Slice the radish, carrot, cucumber, red bell pepper, and green onions thinly and soak in ice water.
4. Slice the unripe mango, purple yam, and wonton wrappers thinly.
5. Heat some oil and stir-fry the purple yam until cooked and shiny.
6. Heat some oil and fry the wonton wrappers on medium heat until lightly browned. Set aside.
7. For the dressing, mix the plum sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, sugar, ginger liquid, garlic liquid, salt, and stock powder. Stir well.
8. Arrange the veggies on the plate. Add dressing and stir.
9. Yu Sheng is ready to serve.

title: Istimewa! Resep DODOL WIJEN: Lembut & Tahan Lama! [Khas Imlek]
recipe_id:
Resep Dodol Wijen (6 pcs)

Bahan:
265 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Ketan
800 ml santan kental
350 gr gula merah, sisir
50 ml minyak kelapa atau minyak goreng
60 gr gula pasir
½ sdt garam
3 lembar daun pandan
½ sdt vanili bubuk

Topping:
Wijen sangrai

Pembungkus:
Plastik
Benang kasur

Langkah:
1. Campurkan santan, gula merah, gula pasir, garam, vanili bubuk, minyak kelapa, dan daun pandan, aduk lalu masak di api sedang selama 5-10 menit kemudian saring
2. Tuang cairan yang sudah tidak mendidih ke dalam BOLA Deli tepung ketan secara perlahan sambil diaduk
3. Masak kembali di api sedang kecil sambil diaduk hingga mengental, kecilkan api masak hingga adonan mengkilap selama 30-35 menit
4. Pindahkan adonan ke dalam wadah anti panas yang sudah dialasi daun pisang
5. Tutup dengan cling wrap hingga menyentuh dasar adonan, tusuk dengan tusukan sate lalu kukus selama 90 menit 
6. Diamkan dodol selama 8 jam atau semalaman
7. Setelah dingin, bagi dodol menjadi 3 bagian dengan pisau yang sudah di olesi minyak
8. Masukkan ke dalam wijen, ratakan
9. Gulung dengan plastik kemudian eratkan tiap ujung dengan benang kasur 
10. Dodol wijen siap dihidangkan

recipe_en:
Sesame Dodol Recipe (yield 6 pcs)

Ingredients:
265 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
800 ml thick coconut milk
350 g palm sugar, shaved
50 ml coconut oil or vegetable oil
60 g sugar
½ tsp salt
3 pc pandan leaf
½ tsp vanilla powder

Topping:
Toasted sesame seeds

Wrapping:
Plastic
Nylon twine

Steps:
1. Combine the coconut milk, palm sugar, white sugar, salt, vanilla powder, coconut oil, and pandan leaves. Stir and cook on medium heat for 5-10 minutes. Strain.
2. Pour the warm, not boiling, liquid into BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour slowly while stirring.
3. Cook it again on low heat while stirring until thickened. Lower the heat and cook until the Dodol becomes shiny for 30-35 minutes.
4. Transfer the Dodol into heat-proof bowls lined with banana leaves.
5. Cover the surface of the Dodol with plastic wrap. Poke holes using a satay skewer, then steam for 90 minutes.
6. Chill the Dodol for 8 hours or overnight.
7. Once chilled, slice the Dodol into 3 parts with a knife brushed with oil.
8. Coat with the sesame seeds evenly.
9. Wrap with plastic and tie the ends with the nylon twill.
10. Sesame Dodol is ready to serve.

title: Praktis Favorit! Resep SUP IKAN KEMANGI: Gurih & Segar

recipe_en:
Lemon Basil Fish Soup Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc tilapia @700g
2 clove garlic, sliced
7 pc shallot, sliced
4 slice ginger, pounded
2 pc red tomato, sliced
9 pc red Thai chili, optional
2 pc green onion, sliced
2 pc celery, sliced
40 g lemon basil
Lime
1 L water
½ pc onion, sliced
¼ tsp pepper
¾ tsp flavor enhancer
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
Oil to sauté

Steps:
1. Rub the fish with salt. Let it sit for 2 minutes, then rinse with running water.
2. Pat the fish dry with paper towels / a cloth, then slice.
3. Heat some oil. Add shallots and garlic and sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the onion and ginger. Sauté for a moment, then add water, tomatoes, green onions, and celery. Bring to a boil.
5. Add the fish,Thai chili, salt, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Cook for a moment, then add the lemon basil. Turn the heat off.
6. Lemon Basil Fish Soup is ready to serve.

14. Untuk dressing, campurkan plum sauce, cuka beras, minyak wijen, gula pasir, air jahe, air bawang putih, garam, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata
15. Oles roti yang telah dibelah dengan mentega lalu panggang hingga sedikit kecokelatan
16. Susun lettuce, timun, wortel, cabai gendot, ayam suwir, asian dressing, dan daun ketumbar lalu bungkus dengan baking paper
17. 3 jenis sandwich siap disajikan

title: 100% Sukses! Resep ROTI SUBWAY SOFT BAGUETTE: Empuk Lembut!
recipe_id:
Resep Subway Bread (6 pcs)

Bahan A:
8 gr ragi instan
30 gr gula pasir
300 gr air es
250 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
200 gr tepung terigu protein sedang

Bahan B:
50 gr mentega
8 gr garam

Topping (opsional):
Parmesan bubuk
Keju parut
Mixed herbs

Langkah:
1. Masukkan campuran tepung terigu, gula pasir, dan ragi ke dalam mixer, aduk rata 
2. Masukkan air es secara perlahan, mixer hingga setengah kalis lalu masukkan garam dan mentega, mixer kembali hingga kalis
3. Tutup dengan plastic wrap. Diamkan selama 60-90 menit
4. Timbang adonan masing-masing 135 gr atau menjadi 6 pcs lalu bentuk bulat
5. Pipihkan adonan dengan rolling pin, bentuk adonan menjadi persegi panjang lalu gulung dari atas ke depan, rapatkan ujung adonan
6. Campurkan parmesan bubuk dan mixed herbs, aduk rata
7. Oles adonan dengan air lalu gulingkan ke dalam campuran mixed herbs. Pindahkan adonan ke dalam loyang yang sudah dialasi baking paper
8. Tutup dengan plastic wrap, istirahatkan selama 60 menit
9. Setelah mengembang, bentuk sayatan dengan pisau atau silet
10. Taburkan keju parut lalu panggang di suhu 175 derajat selama 20 menit
11. Roti subway siap dihidangkan
recipe_en:
Subway Bread Recipe (yield: 6 pieces)

Ingredients A:
8 g instant yeast
30 g sugar
300 g cold water
250 g bread flour
200 g all-purpose flour

Ingredients B:
50 g butter
8 g salt

Topping (optional):
Parmesan
Grated cheese
Mixed herbs

Steps:
1. Combine flour, sugar, and yeast in a mixer bowl and mix evenly.
2. Add cold water slowly. Mix until the dough is half-elastic, then add salt and butter. Mix again until it’s elastic.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and proof for 60-90 minutes.
4. Weigh each dough to 135 g or 6 pieces, then shape into a ball.
5. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin. Shape into a rectangle, then roll it from the top. Seal the seams.
6. Combine parmesan and mixed herbs. Mix evenly.
7. Brush the dough with water, then roll it into the mixed herbs mixture. Transfer to a pan lined with baking paper.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and proof for 60 minutes.
9. After the dough rises, slit the top with a knife or a razor.
10. Sprinkle grated cheese on top and bake at 175℃ for 20 minutes.
11. Subway Bread is ready to serve.

title: Ekonomis Pakai Tepung Beras! Resep KUE PANDAN KUKUS / Apem Lembut Tahan Lama
recipe_id:
Resep Kue Pandan Kukus (untuk 5 porsi)

Bahan A:
60 ml santan
400 ml air
15 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Beras
¼ sdt garam
Perisa pandan secukupnya
Pewarna kuning secukupnya
Pewarna cokelat secukupnya

130 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Beras
30 gr tepung terigu

1 sdt ragi

7. Tambahkan kelapa muda, garam, dan gula pasir, aduk rata
8. Kue apem siap disajikan dengan saus gula merah sebagai pelengkap

350 ml coconut water
150 ml coconut milk
85 g palm sugar, shaved
2 pc pandan leaf
100 g coconut flesh
4 tbsp BOLA Deli Cornstarch
¼ tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. Combine coconut milk, water, pandan essence, yellow food coloring, and brown food coloring. Mix well, then add BOLA Deli Rice Flour and salt. Stir and cook until it thickens.
2. Transfer it to a bowl. Let it cool down until lukewarm.
3. Add sugar and stir. Then, add BOLA Deli Rice Flour. Mix well.
4. Add flour. Stir, then add the yeast and baking powder. Mix well, cover with plastic wrap, and rest for 1 hour.
5. Prepare the steamer and a heatproof pan brushed with oil. Steam for 35 minutes. Once it’s cooled down, remove from the pan.
6. For the Coconut Sauce, combine the coconut water, coconut milk, palm sugar, pandan leaves, and BOLA Deli Cornstarch. Stir while it’s still cold, then cook on medium heat until it thickens.
7. Add the coconut flesh, salt, and sugar in. Stir.
8. Steamed Pandan Cake is ready to serve with Coconut Sauce on the side.

title: Cara Meresap Sampai Dalam! Resep AYAM BAKAR KECAP TEFLON
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Bakar Kecap (untuk 8 porsi)

Bahan marinasi ayam:
2 ekor ayam, potong 4 bagian
2 buah jeruk nipis
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu
8 sdm kecap manis
2 sdm air asam jawa, opsional

Bahan bumbu halus:
8 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
4 butir kemiri
6 cm kunyit
6 cm lengkuas
3 buah cabai merah tanjung / 8 buah cabai keriting
1 sdt ketumbar sangrai
1 sachet terasi
Minyak secukupnya

Bahan lainnya:
2 batang serai, potong, geprek
4 lembar daun salam
1 sdm margarin
½ sdt merica
1 sdt kaldu bubuk
½ sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
4 sdm kecap manis
700 ml air

Bahan oles:
Bumbu ungkepan
2 sdm margarin

Pelengkap:
Nasi
Terong, potong
Sambal bawang (https://youtu.be/6vv6enFEVc4) 
Kemangi
Bawang goreng

Langkah:
1. Masukkan garam secukupnya dan perasan jeruk nipis ke dalam ayam, aduk rata. Diamkan 5-10 menit lalu bilas, tiriskan
2. Masukkan kecap manis, air asam jawa, garam, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk rata, tutup dengan plastik wrap lalu diamkan 3-4 jam atau semalaman di dalam kulkas
3. Haluskan bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, lengkuas, kunyit, ketumbar, terasi, cabai merah, dan sedikit minyak dengan blender lalu tumis hingga setengah matang
4. Masukkan serai, daun salam, merica, dan margarin tumis hingga matang kemudian masukkan ayam, aduk rata
5. Tambahkan air, kecap manis, garam, kaldu, dan  gula pasir masak hingga meresap di api sedang selama 25 menit, tiriskan
6. Sisihkan bumbu ungkepan ke dalam mangkuk lalu campurkan dengan margarin, aduk rata
7. Panaskan wajan, masukkan ayam lalu oles dengan bumbu oles, panggang hingga matang
8. Untuk oven atau air fryer, panggang ayam dan terong yang telah dioles bumbu di suhu 170 derajat celcius selama 15 menit
9. Ayam bakar kecap siap disajikan dengan pelengkap
recipe_en:
Sweet Soy Grilled Chicken Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Chicken marinade ingredients:
2 pc whole chicken, sliced into 4 pieces
2 pc lime
1 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder
8 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp tamarind water, optional

Blended Spices ingredients:
8 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut
6 cm turmeric
6 cm galangal
3 pc red large chili / 8 pc red curly chili
1 tsp toasted coriander
1 sachet shrimp paste
Oil, as needed

Others:
2 pc lemongrass, sliced, pounded
4 pc bay leaf
1 tbsp margarine
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp stock powder
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
4 tbsp sweet soy sauce
700 ml water

Grill Sauce ingredients:
Braising liquid
2 tbsp margarine

Sides:
Rice
Eggplant, sliced
Shallot Sambal (https://youtu.be/6vv6enFEVc4) 
Lemon basil
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Add salt and lime juice, as needed, into the chicken and mix well. Let it rest for 5-10 minutes, then rinse and drain.
2. Add sweet soy sauce, tamarind water, salt, and stock powder. Mix well and cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for 3-4 hours or overnight in the fridge.
3. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, galangal, turmeric, coriander, shrimp paste, red chili, and some oil. Then, sauté until it’s half-cooked.
4. Add lemongrass, bay leaves, pepper, and margarine. Sauté until cooked, then add the chicken in and stir.
5. Add water, sweet soy sauce, salt, stock powder, and sugar. Cook until the liquid is absorbed on medium heat for 25 minutes. Set aside.
6. Transfer the braising liquid into a bowl and stir it with margarine.
7. Heat the pan. Add the chicken in and brush with the grill sauce. Grill until cooked.
8. For cooking in an oven or an air fryer, brush the chicken and eggplant with the grill sauce and grill at 170°C for 15 minutes.
9. Sweet Soy Grilled Chicken is ready to serve with the sides.

title: 3-Ingredient Grilled Sausage Recipe! Complete with Cheesy Mashed Potatoes and Onion Gravy: [New Y...
recipe_id:
BBQ gak harus ribet, dengan Kanzler Cocktail Series bikin BBQ bersama keluarga tercinta lebih simple dan berkesan.

Resep Sosis Bakar BBQ (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail
Kanzler Beef Cocktail
Kanzler Frankfurter Cocktail
Margarin
Saus BBQ (https://youtu.be/MrsaBWQX890)

Bahan saus onion gravy:
2 buah bawang bombai, iris
3 siung bawang putih halus
4 siung bawang merah halus
2 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
3 sdm mentega
2 lembar bay leaf
400 ml kaldu sapi (air + kaldu sapi bubuk)

Bahan cheesy mashed potato:
2 buah kentang ukuran sedang
3 sdm mentega
200 ml susu
100 gr keju mozarella, parut
50 gr keju parmesan, parut

Pelengkap:
Kacang polong, opsional

Langkah:
1. Potong kentang, rebus dengan sedikit garam hingga empuk lalu haluskan kentang menggunakan saringan
2. Masak kentang di api sedang, masukkan susu dan mentega, aduk rata
3. Tambahkan sebagian keju parmesan dan keju mozarella, aduk rata lalu pindahkan ke dalam wadah anti panas
4. Taburkan sisa keju sebagai topping, panggang di suhu 180 derajat selama 12-15 menit
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang merah dan bawang putih yang telah dihaluskan hingga wangi
6. Kecilkan api, masukkan bawang bombai, masak hingga kecokelatan lalu masukkan mentega dan tepung terigu, aduk rata
7. Masukkan bay leaf  dan kaldu sapi, masak hingga mendidih dan sedikit mengental
8. Tusukan sosis Kanzler dengan tusukan besi, panaskan panggangan lalu oles dengan margarin
9. Oles sosis Kanzler dengan margarin, panggang hingga sedikit kecokelatan lalu oles dengan saus bbq
10. Sosis bakar bbq siap disajikan
