recipe_en:
Grilled BBQ Sausage Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail
Kanzler Beef Cocktail
Kanzler Frankfurter Cocktail
Margarine
BBQ Sauce (https://youtu.be/MrsaBWQX890)

Onion Gravy Sauce ingredients:
2 pc onion, sliced
3 clove garlic, minced
4 pc shallot, minced
2 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 tbsp butter
2 pc bay leaf
400 ml beef stock (water + beef stock powder)

Cheesy Mashed Potato ingredients:
2 pc potato, medium-sized
3 tbsp butter
200 ml milk
100 g mozzarella, grated
50 g parmesan, grated

Others:
Peas, optional

Steps:
1. Slice the potatoes. Boil with some salt until softened, then mash with a strainer.
2. Cook the potato on medium heat. Add milk and butter. Mix evenly.
3. Add some of the parmesan and mozzarella. Stir, then transfer to a heatproof bowl.
4. Sprinkle the rest of the cheeses as topping. Bake at 180℃ for 12-15 minutes.
5. Heat some oil. Sauté the minced shallots and garlic until fragrant.
6. Lower the heat. Add the onions. Cook until browned, then add butter and flour. Stir.
7. Add bay leaves and beef stock. Bring to a boil and cook until it thickens a bit.
8. Skewer the Kanzler sausages on iron skewers. Heat the grill plate and brush it with margarine.
9. Brush the Kanzler sausages with margarine. Grill until a bit browned, then brush with the BBQ sauce.
10. Grilled BBQ Sausage is ready to serve.

title: Resep BROKOLI PANGGANG KEJU Favorit Anak-anak! [Cheesy Baked Broccoli]
recipe_id:
Resep Baked Broccoli & Cheese (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
250 gr kentang, potong kotak, rebus
4 bonggol brokoli

Bahan saus keju:
3 sdm mentega
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
400 ml susu
20 gr keju parmesan
35 gr keju mozarella
½ sdt garam
⅓ sdt merica
1 butir telur

Bahan garlic butter:
3 sdm mentega
5 siung bawang putih, cincang
½ sdt parsley kering
½ sdt garam
⅓ sdt merica

Topping:
Keju parmesan
Keju mozarella

Langkah:
1. Potong brokoli, rendam dengan air garam selama 5 menit
2. Bilas hingga dua kali kemudian kukus selama 6-8 menit
3. Untuk saus keju, panaskan wajan masukkan mentega dan tepung, masak hingga sedikit berubah warna dan wangi
4. Masukkan susu, aduk rata lalu tambahkan keju parmesan, keju mozarella, garam, dan merica, aduk kembali lalu pindahkan ke mangkuk
5. Setelah dingin, masukkan telur, aduk rata
6. Untuk garlic butter, campurkan mentega, bawang putih, parsley, garam, dan merica, aduk rata
7. Siapkan wadah anti panas, susun kentang, brokoli, saus keju, garlic butter, dan taburkan keju di atasnya
8. Panggang dalam mode grill selama 30 menit dengan suhu 160 derajat
9. Brokoli panggang keju siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Baked Broccoli & Cheese Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g potato, diced, boiled
4 pc broccoli

Cheese Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp butter
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
400 ml milk
20 g parmesan cheese
35 g mozzarella cheese
½ tsp salt
⅓ tsp pepper
1 pc egg

Garlic Butter ingredients:
3 tbsp butter
5 clove garlic, minced
½ tsp dried parsley
½ tsp salt
⅓ tsp pepper

Toppings:
Parmesan cheese
Mozzarella cheese

Steps:
1. Slice the broccoli. Soak in salted water for 5 minutes.
2. Rinse twice, then steam for 6-8 minutes.
3. For the Cheese Sauce, heat the pan and add butter and flour. Cook until yellowed and fragrant.
4. Add milk. Mix well, then add parmesan, mozzarella, salt, and pepper. Stir and transfer to a bowl.
5. Once it cools, add the egg in and mix well.
6. For the Garlic Butter, combine the butter, garlic, parsley, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
7. Prepare a heatproof bowl. Arrange the potatoes, broccoli, Cheese Sauce, and Garlic Butter. Sprinkle cheese on top.
8. Bake on Grill mode for 30 minutes at 160℃.
9. Baked Broccoli & Cheese is ready to serve.

title: NO Mold! STRAWBERRY THUMBPRINT COOKIES Recipe [New Year & Eid Cookies]
recipe_id:
Resep Kue Strawberry Thumbprint (80 pcs)

Bahan:
80 gr Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
80 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter
100 gr gula halus
1 butir kuning telur
245 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
20 gr tepung maizena
1/2 sdt baking powder
1/8 sdt garam
2 sdm corn syrup / madu / kental manis

Bahan lainnya:
Selai strawberry secukupnya
Gula halus untuk topping

Langkah:
1. Kocok Anchor Tinned Salted Butter & Anchor Unsalted Butter hingga pucat dan sedikit mengembang
2. Masukkan gula halus, kocok hingga tercampur rata lalu masukkan kuning telur, garam dan kental manis kocok kembali hingga tercampur rata
3. Masukkan maizena, baking powder dan tepung terigu sambil disaring, aduk dengan spatula
4. Tutup dengan plastic wrap, simpan di dalam kulkas selama 10 menit
5. Ambil adonan sebanyak 1 sdt atau 6 gr lalu bentuk adonan menjadi sedikit gepeng
6. Buat lubang kecil di tengahnya dengan alat penekan yang sudah dicelup ke maizena atau tepung terigu lalu isi dengan selai strawberry
7. Panggang dengan suhu 150 derajat celcius selama 17-20 menit
8. Keluarkan dari panggangan lalu taburkan gula halus di atasnya
9. Kue strawberry thumbprint siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Strawberry Thumbprint Cookies Recipe (yield 80 pieces)

Ingredients:
80 g Anchor Tinned Salted Butter
80 g Anchor Unsalted Butter
100 g icing sugar
1 pc egg yolk
245 g cake flour
20 g cornstarch
½ tsp baking powder
⅛ tsp salt
2 tbsp corn syrup / honey / condensed milk

Others:
Strawberry jam, as needed
Icing sugar for topping

Steps:
1. Whip Anchor Tinned Salted Butter & Anchor Unsalted Butter until they pale and expand a bit.
2. Add icing sugar. Mix well, then add egg yolk, salt, and condensed milk. Mix well.
3. Add sifted cornstarch, baking powder, and flour. Mix with a spatula.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge for 10 minutes.
5. Get 1 tsp or 6 grams of dough. Shape flatly.
6. Press the center with a measuring spoon coated with cornstarch or flour. Then, fill with the strawberry jam.
7. Bake at 150℃ for 17-20 minutes.
8. Get the cookies out of the oven and sprinkle icing sugar on top.
9. Strawberry Thumbprint Cookies are ready to serve.

title: 100% SUKSES LEMBUT! Resep CHIFFON DONAT [Gluten Free]
recipe_id:
Resep Chiffon Donat (12 pcs)

Bahan A:
8 butir kuning telur
85 ml minyak
90 ml air
40 ml santan
½ sdt garam
150 gr Tepung Singkong Ladang Lima atau 185 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
6 gr baking powder
2 sdt ekstrak vanila

Bahan B:
8 butir putih telur
120 gr gula pasir

Bahan nougat:
80 gr kacang mede panggang
75 gr gula pasir
3 sdm air
¼ sdt garam

Bahan buttercream:
160 gr roombutter
45 gr gula halus
30 gr kental manis

Topping:
Keju parut
Meses cokelat

Langkah:
1. Campurkan telur, minyak, santan, air, perisa vanila, dan garam, aduk lalu tambahkan Tepung Singkong Ladang Lima dan baking powder yang telah disaring, aduk rata
2. Di mangkuk terpisah, kocok putih telur dan gula secara bertahap hingga membentuk paruh burung
3. Campurkan sedikit demi sedikit putih telur ke dalam adonan kuning telur, aduk perlahan
4. Tuang adonan ke dalam cetakan 1/3 penuh, ratakan dengan tusuk sate dengan cara diputar
5. Celupkan tusuk sate ke dalam kental manis, lalu beri garis atau sobekan, panggang selama 30-35 menit dengan suhu 160-165 derajat
6. Untuk nougat kacang, masak gula dan air hingga kecokelatan tanpa diaduk lalu masukkan kacang mede dan garam, pindahkan ke dalam baking paper
7. Jika sudah dingin, hancurkan nougat dengan pisau atau food processor 
8. Untuk buttercream, kocok roombutter hingga pucat lalu tambahkan gula halus dan kental manis, aduk, pindahkan ke dalam piping bag
9. Keluarkan chiffon dari panggangan lalu balikan, diamkan hingga dingin kemudian keluarkan dari loyang
10. Oles buttercream lalu tambahkan topping keju, meses, dan nougat kacang
11. Chiffon donat siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Chiffon Donuts Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients A:
8 pc egg yolk
85 ml oil
90 ml water
40 ml coconut milk
½ tsp salt
150 g Ladang Lima Cassava Flour or 185 g all-purpose flour
6 g baking powder
2 tsp vanilla extract

Ingredients B:
8 pc egg white
120 g sugar

Nougat ingredients:
80 g toasted cashew
75 g sugar
3 tbsp water
¼ tsp salt

Buttercream ingredients:
160 g roombutter
45 g icing sugar
30 g condensed milk

Toppings:
Grated cheese
Chocolate rice

Steps:
1. Combine the egg yolk, oil, coconut milk, water, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix, then add sifted Ladang Lima Cassava Flour and baking powder. Mix well.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites. Add the sugar bit by bit until the bird-beak stage is reached.
3. Mix the meringue into the yolk batter bit by bit. Fold it in slowly.
4. Pour the batter into the pan until ⅓ full. Even out the surface by swirling a satay skewer.
5. Dip the skewer into condensed milk and add the slits. Bake for 30-35 minutes at 160-165℃.
6. For the Cashew Nougat, cook the sugar and water until it browns without stirring. Add the cashew and salt in. Transfer to a baking paper.
7. Once it’s cooled down, crush the nougat with a knife or a food processor.
8. For the buttercream, whip the roombutter until it pales. Add icing sugar and condensed milk. Mix and transfer to a piping bag.
9. Remove the Chiffon out of the oven and flip it upside down. Let it cool, then demold.
10. Spread the buttercream and add the cheese, chocolate rice, and cashew nougat.
11. Chiffon Donuts are ready to serve.

title: PADANG SEAFOOD SAUCE Recipe Vol. 2 By Devina Hermawan.
recipe_id:
Resep Seafood Saus Padang (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan:
350 gr udang, belah
250 gr cumi, potong
1 kg kepiting
2 buah jagung, potong, rebus

Bahan marinasi cumi:
1 sdt baking soda
1 sdm cuka
1 sdt garam

Bahan bumbu halus:
10 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
8 buah cabai rawit merah
Minyak secukupnya

Bahan lainnya:
3 batang daun bawang, potong
3 jempol jahe
6 sdm saus tiram
6 sdm saus tomat
6 sdm saus sambal
2 sdm kecap ikan
1 sdm seasoning sauce
800 ml air
3 lembar daun salam
4 lembar daun jeruk
1 buah bawang bombai, iris
1 ½ sdm margarin
1 sdm gula pasir
½ sdm kaldu bubuk
2 sdm maizena

Pelengkap:
Nasi

Langkah:
1. Potong cumi lalu marinasi dengan baking soda, cuka, dan garam, diamkan selama 10 menit lalu bilas
2. Belah punggung udang lalu potong bagian tajam pada udang, bilas
3. Haluskan bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit, dan minyak dengan blender kemudian tumis hingga wangi
4. Masukkan jahe yang telah di geprek, daun salam dan daun jeruk, tumis hingga wangi dan matang
5. Masukkan kecap ikan, seasoning sauce, saus tiram, saus tomat, saus sambal, daun bawang bagian putih, dan bawang bombai, aduk rata
6. Tambahkan air dan larutan maizena, aduk rata lalu masukkan gula, kaldu bubuk dan margarin
7. Masukkan kepiting lalu masak dengan keadaan tertutup
8. Panaskan minyak, goreng cumi dan udang selama 30-60 detik, tiriskan 
9. Masukkan jagung, sisa daun bawang, cumi, dan udang yang telah digoreng, masak hingga mendidih kemudian matikan api
10. Seafood saus padang siap disajikan dengan nasi sebagai pelengkap 

In collaboration with COCA-COLA
"Teliti sebelum membeli, baca peringatan pada label” 

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @COCACOLA_ID
Instagram: https://instagram.com/cocacola_id/
Tokopedia: https://www.tokopedia.com/cocacolaofficial
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/cocacolaindonesia
recipe_en:
Seafood with Padang Sauce (yield 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g shrimp, deveined
250 g squid, slice
1 kg crab
2 pc corn, sliced, boiled

Squid marinating ingredients:
1 tsp baking soda
1 tbsp vinegar
1 tsp salt

Blended Spices ingredients:
10 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
8 pc red Thai chili
Oil, as needed

Others:
3 pc green onions, sliced
3 thumb ginger
6 tbsp oyster sauce
6 tbsp tomato sauce
6 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp seasoning sauce
800 ml water
3 pc bay leaf
4 pc lime leaf
1 pc onion, sliced
1.5 tbsp margarine
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp stock powder
2 tbsp cornstarch

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. Slice the squid and marinate it with baking soda, vinegar, and salt. Marinate for 10 minutes, then rinse.
2. Devein the shrimp and trim the sharp parts. Rinse.
3. Blend the garlic, shallots, Thai chili, and oil. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the pounded ginger, bay leaves, and lime leaves. Sautè through until fragrant.
5. Add fish sauce, seasoning sauce, oyster sauce, tomato sauce, chili sauce, white part of green onions, and onions. Stir.
6. Add a mix of water and cornstarch. Stir, then add sugar, stock powder, and margarine.
7. Add the crab in and cover the pan to cook.
8. Heat some oil. Flash fry the squid and shrimp for 30-60 seconds. Set aside.
9. Add the corn, the rest of the green onions, as well as the fried squid and shrimp. Bring to a boil, then turn the heat off.
10. Seafood with Padang Sauce is ready to serve with rice on the side.

title: Kriuk Gurih Empuk! Resep PAI KACANG GULA MERAH: Bikin Nagih! [Pecan Tart Khas Amerika]
recipe_id:
Resep Pecan Pie (2 tart loyang diameter 20 cm tinggi 2 cm)
(Diadaptasi dari resep Chef Frank Haasnoot)

Bahan:
Kacang pecan, panggang

Bahan tart shell:
260 gr tepung terigu protein rendah / sedang
50 gr gula halus
125 gr mentega dingin potong kotak / parut
2 butir kuning telur
¾ sdt garam
1-2 sdm air es (jika adonan terlalu kering)

Joconde (Bahan A):
2 butir putih telur
65 gr gula

Joconde (Bahan B):
2 butir telur utuh
15 gr gula pasir
75 gr tepung almond
25 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdt maizena
½ sdt garam
20 gr mentega cair

Brown sugar syrup (Bahan A):
135 gr gula pasir
80 ml air
¾ sdt cream of tartar / lemon 

Brown sugar syrup (Bahan B):
55 gr mentega
115 gr brown sugar
2 butir telur
¾ sdt garam
2 sdt perisa vanila

Bahan lainnya:
Mentega cair untuk olesan

Langkah:
1. Untuk kulit pie, campurkan tepung terigu, gula halus, dan garam yang telah disaring kemudian masukkan mentega dingin, aduk hingga menjadi butiran pasir
2. Tambahkan kuning telur dan air es, aduk hingga rata
3. Masukkan setengah adonan kulit pie di antara baking paper, lalu ratakan dengan rolling pin, diamkan di dalam kulkas selama 5 menit
4. Keluarkan dari kulkas lalu pindahkan ke dalam cetakan, ratakan, tusuk dasar pie dengan garpu
5. Untuk cara kedua, masukkan adonan ke dalam cetakan kemudian ratakan, tusuk dasar pie dengan garpu
6. Panggang selama 15 menit dengan suhu 160 derajat
7. Untuk joconde, kocok telur dan gula hingga larut dan pucat kemudian masukkan tepung terigu, maizena, tepung almond, dan garam, aduk rata 
8. Kocok putih telur hingga berbuih lalu masukkan gula sedikit demi sedikit, kocok hingga membentuk paruh burung 
9. Masukkan sedikit demi sedikit putih telur ke dalam adonan kuning telur, aduk perlahan kemudian masukkan mentega cair, aduk rata
10. Tuang adonan ke dalam loyang ukuran 30 x 25 cm yang sudah dialasi baking paper, panggang selama 10-15 menit di suhu 170-180 derajat 
11. Untuk syrup gula merah, masak gula dengan air hingga larut di api kecil sambil diaduk
12. Besarkan sedikit api, masukkan cream of tartar, masak hingga mengental kemudian masukkan brown sugar, mentega, perisa vanila, dan garam, aduk rata, matikan api
13. Setelah hangat, masukkan telur, aduk rata
14. Keluarkan joconde dari cetakan lalu potong bulat seukuran kulit pie 
15. Masukkan ke dalam pie, tusuk dengan garpu lalu susun pecan yang telah dipanggang
16. Pindahkan ke dalam loyang yang telah dialasi baking paper lalu siram dengan brown sugar syrup, diamkan selama 15 menit hingga meresap
17. Tuang kembali brown sugar syrup, bungkus pinggiran kulit pie dengan baking paper yang sudah di bentuk pita
18. Panggang selama 35 menit di suhu 160 derajat 
19. Setelah dingin oles pecan pie dengan mentega cair 
20. Pecan pie siap disajikan

title: Gurih Mantap! Resep SATE DAGING SHASHLIK: Rusia Rasa Lokal! [Menu Tahun Baru]

2 siung bawang putih, iris

Sedikit perasan jeruk nipis

1 buah paprika hijau, potong kotak

5. Panaskan panggangan, masak sate hingga matang di semua sisi lalu oleskan saus, panggang sebentar

recipe_en:
Shashlik Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Shashlik ingredients:
350 g beef fillet
1 pc onion, small, sliced
2 clove garlic, sliced
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp oil
1 tsp mixed herbs
A bit of lime juice

Others:
Beef bacon / smoked beef, optional, diced
1 pc onion, diced
1 pc red bell pepper, diced
1 pc green bell pepper, diced

Sweet Sour BBQ Sauce ingredients:
3 clove garlic, minced
5 pc shallot, minced
1 tbsp margarine
7 tbsp tomato sauce
2.5 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp vinegar
3 tbsp honey / sugar
150 ml water
½ tsp stock powder

Steps:
1. Cut the beef into long slices. Marinate with onion, garlic, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, mixed herbs, lime juice, stock powder, pepper, and oil. Mix well and cover with plastic wrap and press down. Marinate for 15-30 minutes.
2. For the sauce, heat the oil. Add the minced shallots and garlic in. Sauté until fragrant, then add margarine. Stir.
3. Add tomato sauce, chili sauce, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, honey, water, and stock powder. Stir.
4. Fold the beef bacon inside the beef fillet and skewer them in with red bell pepper, onion, beef, green bell pepper, onion, and beef.
5. Heat the grill. Grill the Shashlik until they’re cooked evenly on all sides. Then, brush the sauce on and grill for a moment.
6. Shashlik is ready to serve with the sauce on the side.

recipe_en:
Beef Enoki & Vegetable Rolls Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g sliced beef
1 pack enoki mushroom
60 g baby green bean
4 pc baby corn, sliced
3 clove garlic
1 pc spring onion, sliced
1 tbsp cornstarch

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp dried shrimp, soaked in hot water
3 clove garlic
1.5 tbsp soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp cooking wine (optional)
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tbsp chili oil
100 ml water
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer

Others:
1 tbsp lime
Sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Prepare 2-3 pieces of beef slice for one roll. Arrange the baby green beans, baby corn, and enoki on top, then roll.
2. Sprinkle it with cornstarch and smear it on evenly.
3. Chop the dried shrimp and mince the garlic.
4. Heat some oil. Add the rolls and cook until a bit browned on all sides. Transfer to a plate.
5. In the same pan, heat some oil and sauté the garlic and dried shrimp until fragrant.
6. Add soy sauce, oyster sauce, cooking wine, sesame oil, chili oil, water, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Stir.
7. Add the Beef Rolls in and lime juice.
8. Beef Enoki & Vegetable Rolls are ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep KECIPUT KEJU WIJEN: Gurih & Renyah.

recipe_en:
Cheese Keciput Recipe (yield 4-5 servings) @500 g

Ingredients:
200 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
2 tbsp BOLA Deli Cornstarch

½ tsp baking soda

2 pc egg yolk

25 g cheddar cheese, grated
25 g parmesan cheese, grated

Others:
Sesame seeds
Water, as needed

Steps:
1. Combine BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour, BOLA Deli Cornstarch, BOLA Deli Icing Sugar, and margarine. Mix well.
2. Add salt, baking powder, baking soda, and cheese. Mix well, then add the yolks and coconut milk. Mix evenly.
3. Mix the sesame seeds with a bit of water.
4. Shape the dough into small balls and coat with the sesame seeds. Round the dough until the sesame seeds stick well.
5. Heat the oil on low heat and fry the Keciput until browned. Drain.
6. Cheese Keciput is ready to serve.

title: Cukup Pakai Teflon! Resep IKAN KEMBUNG BAKAR SAMBAL COLO-COLO
recipe_id:
Resep Ikan Bakar Colo-Colo (untuk 6 porsi)

Bumbu ikan:
6 ekor ikan kembung
3 siung bawang putih halus
½ sdt bubuk ketumbar
½ sdt bubuk kunyit
2 buah jeruk nipis
1 sdt merica
1 ½ sdt garam
1 sdt penyedap
1 sdt gula

Sambal colo-colo:
100 gr tomat hijau, potong kotak
100 gr tomat merah, potong kotak
50 gr bawang merah, iris
25 gr cabai rawit merah
25 gr cabai rawit hijau
10 gr kemangi, rendam air es, iris
4 buah jeruk limau / jeruk nipis
50 ml minyak
2 sdt gula
¾ sdt garam
¼ sdt penyedap

Pelengkap:
4 lembar daun salam
Daun pisang
Kecap manis
Garam untuk taburan ikan

Langkah:
1. Untuk bahan marinasi, campurkan bawang putih halus, garam, merica, penyedap, bubuk ketumbar, bubuk kunyit, gula, dan perasan jeruk nipis, aduk rata
2. Belah ikan lalu masukkan bumbu marinasi, tutup dengan plastic wrap diamkan 10-15 menit
3. Untuk sambal, ulek kasar cabai rawit merah, cabai rawit hijau, garam, gula, dan penyedap 
4. Masukkan bawang merah, tomat hijau, dan tomat merah, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan jeruk limau dan kemangi, aduk rata
5. Panaskan minyak, siram ke dalam sambal, aduk rata
6. Panaskan wajan, taburkan garam di permukaan ikan, masukkan ke dalam wajan kemudian tambahkan daun salam
7. Tutup dengan daun pisang panggang selama 4-6 menit
8. Taburkan garam lalu balikkan ikan, tutup kembali dengan daun pisang, masak hingga matang 
9. Ikan bakar colo-colo siap disajikan dengan sambal sebagai pelengkap

recipe_en:
Colo-Colo Grilled Fish Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Fish marinade ingredients:
6 pc chub mackerel fish
3 clove garlic, minced
½ tsp coriander powder
½ tsp turmeric powder
2 pc lime
1 tsp pepper
1.5 tsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer
1 tsp sugar

Colo-Colo Sambal:
100 g green tomato, diced
100 g red tomato, diced
50 g shallot, slice
25 g red Thai chili
25 gr green Thai chili
10 g lemon basil, soaked in cold water and sliced
4 pc kaffir lime / lime
50 ml oil
2 tsp sugar
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp flavor enhancer

Others:
4 pc bay leaf
Banana leaf
Sweet soy sauce
Salt to sprinkle on the fish

Steps:
1. For the marinade, combine the minced garlic, salt, pepper, flavor enhancer, coriander powder, turmeric powder, sugar, and lime juice. Mix well.
2. Slice the fish and add the marinade in. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for 10-15 minutes.
3. For the Sambal, roughly grind the red Thai chili, green Thai chili, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer.
4. Add shallots, green tomato, and red tomato. Stir, then add kaffir lime and lemon basil.
5. Heat some oil and pour into the Sambal. Mix well.
6. Heat the pan. Sprinkle the fish with salt and place it on the pan. Add bay leaves.
7. Cover with the banana leaf and grill for 4-6 minutes.
8. Sprinkle the fish with salt and flip. Cover it again with the banana leaf and let it finish cooking.
9. Colo-Colo Grilled Fish is ready to serve with the Sambal on the side.

title: Resep NASI SIRAM AYAM JAMUR Ala Chinese Resto
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Siram Ayam Jamur (untuk 1-2 porsi)

Bahan:
2 cups Leon Thai Jasmine Rice
2 ½ cups air
1 butir telur
2-3 sdm minyak
½ sdm kecap ikan
1 batang daun bawang, iris

Bahan marinasi ayam:
120 gr ayam paha fillet
½ sdm tepung tapioka
4 iris jahe
¼ sdt kaldu bubuk
¼ sdt garam
⅛ sdt merica
1 sdm arak masak, opsional

Bahan cah ayam jamur:
3 siung bawang putih, geprek
½ bawang bombai
1 batang daun bawang, iris
1 buah wortel, potong
2 buah jagung putren, potong
40 gr kembang kol, potong
3 buah jamur champignon / merang, potong

Bahan saus:
1 sdm kecap asin
½ sdm saus tiram
1 sdm kecap ikan
1 sdt minyak wijen
½ sdm tepung tapioka
½ sdm gula
⅛ sdt merica
¼ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
300 ml air + ½ sdm kaldu ayam 

Langkah:
1. Potong ayam, marinasi dengan jahe, arak masak, tepung tapioka, garam, merica, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk, diamkan beberapa saat
2. Masak Leon Thai Jasmine Rice dengan rice cooker hingga matang lalu dinginkan
3. Rebus wortel, jagung, dan kembang kol yang telah dipotong, tiriskan 
4. Panaskan minyak, masukkan daun bawang bagian putih, tumis hingga wangi lalu masukkan telur, aduk rata
5. Masukkan nasi dan kecap ikan, masak sebentar lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
6. Untuk saus, campurkan air kaldu dengan kecap asin, saus tiram, kecap ikan, minyak wijen, dan tepung tapioka, aduk lalu tambahkan gula, merica dan penyedap, aduk rata
7. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih hingga wangi lalu masukkan ayam dan jamur, masak hingga kecokelatan
8. Masukkan sayuran, bawang bombai, dan daun bawang, aduk rata
9. Lalu masukkan campuran saus, masak sebentar lalu tuang di atas nasi
10. Nasi siram ayam jamur siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Chicken Mushroom Rice Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
2 cup Leon Thai Jasmine Rice
2.5 cup water
1 pc egg
2-3 tbsp oil
½ tbsp fish sauce
1 pc green onion, sliced

Marinated Chicken ingredients:
120 g chicken thigh fillet
½ tbsp tapioca flour
4 slice ginger
¼ tsp stock powder
¼ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper
1 tbsp cooking wine, optional

Chicken Mushroom Stir-Fry ingredients:
3 clove garlic, pounded
½ pc onion
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc carrot, sliced
2 pc baby corn, sliced
40 g cauliflower, sliced
3 pc champignon / straw mushroom, sliced

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp soy sauce
½ tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
½ tbsp tapioca flour
½ tbsp sugar
⅛ tsp pepper
¼ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
300 ml water + ½ tbsp chicken powder 

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken and marinate with ginger, cooking wine, tapioca flour, salt, pepper, and stock powder. Mix and let it rest.
2. Cook Leon Thai Jasmine Rice with a rice cooker, then let it cool.
3. Blanch the sliced carrots, baby corn, and cauliflower. Drain.
4. Heat some oil. Stir fry the white part of green onion until fragrant, then add the egg in. Stir.
5. Add the rice and fish sauce. Cook for a moment, then transfer to a bowl.
6. For the sauce, mix the stock with soy sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, sesame oil, and tapioca flour. Stir, then add sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Mix well.
7. Heat some oil and stir fry the garlic until fragrant. Then, add the chicken and mushroom. Cook until browned.
8. Add the veggies, onion, and green onions. Stir.
9. Add the sauce mix. Cook for a moment, then pour over rice.
10. Chicken Mushroom Rice is ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep CRUNCHY CHOCOLATE LAVA CAKE: Bahan Minimarket Rasa Premium!
recipe_id:
Resep Chocolate Lava Cake (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan:
100 gr mentega
135 gr dark chocolate, cincang
2 butir telur ukuran besar
1 butir kuning telur
40 gr gula pasir
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
¼ sdt garam
1 sdm bubuk cokelat
1 bungkus Good Time Double Choc

Bahan olesan:
Mentega
Bubuk cokelat

Langkah:
1. Panaskan oven di suhu 180-185 derajat
2. Panaskan mentega hingga mendidih dan berwarna kuning gelap lalu siram ke dalam dark chocolate, aduk hingga tercampur rata
3. Di mangkuk terpisah, masukkan telur dan gula, kocok hingga gula larut dan sedikit pucat
4. Masukkan tepung terigu, cokelat bubuk, garam sambil disaring dan lelehan cokelat, aduk rata  
5. Pindahkan Good Time Double Choc ke dalam plastik lalu hancurkan hingga menjadi kepingan kecil-kecil
6. Oles mangkuk anti panas dengan mentega kemudian lapisi dengan cokelat bubuk, ratakan
8. Campurkan setengah Good Time Double Choc ke dalam adonan, aduk rata
9. Tuang adonan lava cake ke dalam cetakan lalu taburkan Good Time Double Choc di atasnya
10. Panggang selama 10-12 menit
11. Chocolate lava cake siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Chocolate Lava Cake Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients:
100 g butter
150 g dark chocolate, chopped
2 pc egg
1 pc egg yolk
40 g sugar
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
¼ tsp salt
1 tbsp cocoa powder
1 pack Good Time Double Choc

To spread:
Butter
Cocoa powder

Steps:
1. Heat the oven at 180-185℃.
2. Heat the butter until it’s foamy and dark yellow, then pour into the dark chocolate. Mix evenly.
3. In a separate bowl, add eggs and sugar. Whisk until the sugar dissolves and the color pales.
4. Add sifted flour, cocoa powder, and salt. Pour in the melted chocolate and mix evenly.
5. Add Good Time Double Choc into a plastic bag and crush into little pieces.
6. Brush the ramekins with butter and coat with cocoa powder evenly.
7. Mix half of the crushed Good Time Double Choc into the batter.
8. Pour the Lava Cake batter into the ramekins, then sprinkle Good Time Double Choc on top.
9. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
10. Chocolate Lava Cake is ready to serve.

title: Istimewa Tetap Praktis! Resep NASI GORENG KAMPUNG [ala Hotel]
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Goreng Kampung (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
8 siung bawang merah
6 buah cabai keriting merah, iris
1 sachet terasi
Minyak secukupnya

Bahan nasi goreng:
350 gr nasi
1 butir telur
40 gr kol, iris
35 gr wortel, potong kotak kecil
2 batang daun bawang, iris
1 sdm kecap manis
2 sdt kecap ikan / kecap asin
1 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
¼ sdt merica

Bahan pelengkap ayam:
300 gr ayam dada fillet, potong kotak
2 pcs ayam paha bawah

Bahan marinasi sate:
1 sdm bumbu halus
2 sdm selai kacang
1 sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu ayam
1-2 sdm air
1 sdm kecap manis

Bahan marinasi ayam goreng:
2 sdt kaldu ayam
1 sdt garam
½ sdt merica
1 ½ sdt kunyit bubuk
1 sdm bumbu halus
100 ml air
½ sdm gula

Bahan pelengkap lainnya:
Telur ceplok
Acar (timun, wortel, bawang merah, rawit hijau)
Kerupuk udang
Bawang goreng
Timun
Tomat

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bawang putih, bawang merah dan minyak, blender hingga halus kemudian pisahkan sebagian bumbu
2. Masukkan cabai merah keriting dan terasi, haluskan bersama bumbu halus
3. Belah dada ayam menjadi dua bagian untuk ayam suwir dan untuk sate lalu potong
4. Untuk ayam goreng, campurkan paha ayam dan dada fillet, marinasi dengan kaldu ayam, garam, merica, kunyit bubuk, bumbu halus, air dan gula, aduk rata, diamkan selama 45-60 menit
5. Untuk sate, marinasi dada ayam fillet yang telah dipotong kotak-kotak dengan bumbu halus putih, selai kacang, merica, kaldu ayam, air dan kecap manis, diamkan selama 15 menit kemudian tusukan dengan tusuk sate 
6. Panaskan minyak goreng ayam di api kecil hingga kecokelatan tiriskan lalu suwir dada ayam 
7. Untuk sate, panaskan wajan, panggang sate hingga kecokelatan lalu masukkan sedikit air dan bumbu marinasi masak sebentar sambil ditutup 
8. Untuk nasi goreng, tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi lalu masukkan telur, aduk rata
9. Masukkan sebagian daun bawang, ayam suwir dan wortel, aduk rata
10. Masukkan kecap ikan dan nasi, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan kaldu bubuk,merica, kecap manis, kol dan sisa daun bawang, aduk rata
11. Nasi goreng siap disajikan dengan pelengkap

title: Kenyal Lembut! Resep KUE BERAS MIPAN: Jajanan Jadul Tetap Disukai!
recipe_id:
Resep Mipan (untuk 4 porsi)

Bahan A:
100 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Beras
50 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Tapioka
100 ml air suhu ruang
½ sdt garam
2 sdt minyak

Bahan B:
10 gr air khi / air abu
500 ml air

Bahan saus gula merah:
80 gr gula merah kualitas baik, sisir
50 ml air
1-2 sdm gula pasir

Bahan minyak bawang:
8 siung bawang putih, cincang
50 ml minyak

Pelengkap:
Kecap asin

Lainnya:
Minyak untuk olesan

Penyajian:
2 sdm saus gula merah
1 sdm minyak bawang
1 sdm kecap asin

Langkah:
1. Untuk bahan A, campurkan BOLA Deli Tepung Beras, BOLA Deli Tepung Tapioka, garam, minyak, dan air, aduk rata
2. Panaskan air di api besar hingga panas lalu kecilkan api masukkan air khi
3. Masukkan campuran tepung masak di api kecil hingga sedikit mengental sambil diaduk lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, aduk kembali
4. Panaskan cetakan anti panas dengan kukusan, lalu keluarkan, olesi dengan minyak
5. Tuang adonan mipan ke dalam mangkuk, kukus selama 20-30 menit 
6. Diamkan minimal 5 menit sebelum dikeluarkan dari cetakan 
7. Untuk saus gula merah, campurkan gula merah, gula pasir, dan air, masak hingga mendidih lalu saring, diamkan hingga dingin
8. Untuk minyak bawang putih, panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih masak di api kecil hingga kekuningan 
9. Mipan siap disajikan dengan saus gula merah, minyak bawang putih, dan kecap asin sebagai pelengkap

recipe_en:
Mipan Recipe (yield 4 servings)

Ingredients A:
110 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
50 g BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour
100 ml water, room temperature
½ tsp salt
2 tsp oil

Ingredients B:
10 g lye water
500 ml water

Palm Sugar Sauce ingredients:
80 g palm sugar, shaved
50 ml water
1 tbsp white sugar

Garlic Oil ingredients:
8 clove garlic, minced
50 ml oil

Add-ons:
Soy sauce

Others:
Oil to grease

Serving:
2 tbsp Palm Sugar Sauce
1 tbsp Garlic Oil
1 tbsp soy sauce

Steps:
1. For Ingredients A, combine BOLA Deli Rice Flour, BOLA Deli Tapioca Flour, salt, oil, and water. Mix evenly.
2. Heat the water on high heat until hot, then lower the heat and add the lye water.
3. Add the rice flour mix and cook on low heat until it thickens while stirring. Transfer to a bowl and stir again.
4. Heat the heatproof mold with the steamer. Remove from the steamer and brush with oil.
5. Pour the Mipan batter into the bowl. Steam for 20-30 minutes.
6. Rest the Mipan for 5 minutes before removing it from the mold.
7. For the Palm Sugar Sauce, combine the palm sugar, white sugar, and water. Bring to a boil, then strain. Let cool.
8. For the Garlic Oil, heat the oil and add the garlic in. Cook on low heat until yellowed.
9. Mipan is ready to serve with Palm Sugar Sauce, Garlic Oil, and soy sauce.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep PIZZA KENTANG TEFLON: Gurih Garing Praktis!
recipe_id:

30 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
50 gr tepung maizena
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
Minyak secukupnya

Bahan isian:

Minyak untuk menumis

Parsley kering

2. Masukkan garam, merica, tepung terigu, dan tepung maizena, aduk rata
3. Panaskan minyak, masukkan kentang, ratakan  lalu panggang selama 7-8 menit di api kecil sedang hingga kering
4. Tambahkan sedikit minyak untuk extra kering lalu balikkan
5. Untuk isian, panaskan sedikit minyak lalu tumis bawang bombai hingga wangi 
6. Masukkan Kanzler Cheese Cocktail, aduk rata
7. Masukkan saus ke dalam pizza sambil di ratakan lalu masukkan tomat, tumisan bawang bombai, sosis, dan keju mozzarella, panggang kembali hingga keju meleleh
8. Taburkan parsley kering di atasnya

recipe_en:
Sausage Potato Pizza Recipe (one 28-cm pan)

Ingredients:
650 g potato, peeled, soaked in water
30 g all-purpose flour
50 g cornstarch
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
Oil, as needed

Topping ingredients:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail
60 g BBQ sauce / pizza sauce
½ pc onion, sliced
1 pc red tomato, sliced
Oil for stir-frying

Others:
Mozzarella cheese
Dried parsley

Steps:
1. Grate the potato then squeeze dry.
2. Add salt, pepper, flour, and cornstarch. Mix well.
3. Heat the oil. Add the potato mix in. Even it out and cook for 7-8 minutes on medium-low heat until crisp.
4. Add some oil to make it extra crisp, then flip.
5. For the topping, heat some oil and sauté the onion until fragrant.
6. Add Kanzler Cheese Cocktail. Stir.
7. Add the sauce onto the pizza. Spread it evenly, then add tomato, sautéed onion, sausages, and mozzarella cheese. Cook again until the cheese melts.
8. Sprinkle dried parsley on top.
9. Potato Pizza is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Pedas Manis! Resep JAGUNG BAKAR ABANG-ABANG Pakai Air Fryer
recipe_id:
Resep Jagung Panggang (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
4-5 pcs jagung manis muda

Bahan olesan original:
85 gr margarin
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
½ sdt garam
½ sdt merica

Bahan olesan pedas manis:
1-2 sdm saus sambal
½ sdm kental manis
Bubuk cabai, sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Belah jagung menjadi 4 bagian
2. Campurkan margarin, kaldu ayam dan garam, aduk rata
3. Oleskan ke jagung hingga rata lalu panggang dengan air fryer selama 12 menit di suhu 185 derajat 
4. Untuk olesan pedas, campurkan saus sambal, kental manis dan bubuk cabai ke dalam campuran margarin, aduk rata
5. Oleskan ke jagung hingga rata, taburkan bubuk cabai kemudian panggang selama 12 menit
6. Jagung panggang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Grilled Corn Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
4-5 pc young sweet corn

Original Spread ingredients:
85 g margarine
2 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Sweet Chili Spread ingredients:
1-2 tbsp chili sauce
½ tbsp condensed milk
Chili powder, to taste

Steps:
1. Slice the corn into 4 parts.
2. Combine margarine, chicken stock, and salt. Mix well.
3. Spread the mix onto the corn evenly. Grill in the air fryer for 12 minutes at 185°C.
4. For the Sweet Chili spread, add the chili sauce, condensed milk, and chili powder into the margarine mix. Mix well.
5. Spread the mix onto the corn evenly. Sprinkle some chili powder, then grill for 12 minutes.
6. Grilled Corn is ready to serve.

title: JANGAN Pakai Tepung! Resep KULIT AYAM GORENG KRISPI: Lengkap Dengan Sausnya!

3. Masukkan merica, masak hingga wangi lalu tambahkan air, santan, cuka, sisa kaldu ayam, garam, dan gula, aduk rata

recipe_en:
Crispy Fried Chicken Skin Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g - 1 kg chicken skin
10 clove garlic
5 cm turmeric
5 pc bay leaf
4 cm ginger
1 pc lemongrass
1.5 tsp salt
2 tsp chicken powder
2 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp vinegar
1 L water
60 g coconut milk, optional
½ tsp pepper
Oil for frying

Sauce ingredients:
1.5 tbsp tomato sauce
3 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp sugar
100 ml water
1 tsp vinegar

Steps:
1. Mash the garlic and turmeric with some chicken powder in a stone bowl.
2. Heat the oil. Sauté the mashed spices until fragrant, then add lemongrass, ginger, and bay leaves. Stir.
3. Season with pepper. Cook until fragrant, then add water, coconut milk, vinegar, the rest of the chicken powder, salt, and sugar. Stir.
4. Add the rinsed chicken skin. Cook for 15 minutes. Drain and let cool.
5. Heat the oil. Fry the chicken skin on low heat until browned. Set aside.
6. For the sauce, combine tomato sauce, chili sauce, sugar, water, and vinegar. Bring to a boil while stirring.
7. Crispy Fried Chicken Skin is ready to serve with the sauce on the side.

title: Kaldu Udang Rahasianya! Resep TOM YUM GOONG: Sup Asam Pedas Khas Thailand [100% Bahan Lokal]
recipe_id:
Resep Tom Yum Goong (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
12 siung bawang merah
8 siung bawang putih
10 buah cabai kering, rendam dengan air panas
8 buah cabai keriting merah
2 sachet terasi
2 batang serai, iris
4 cm lengkuas, iris
Minyak secukupnya
Air secukupnya

Bahan aromatik:
2 batang serai, geprek
50 gr lengkuas, iris
10 lembar daun jeruk purut
6 batang daun ketumbar

Bahan isian:
500 gr udang dengan kulit
100 gr jamur grey oyster, suwir
200 gr jamur merang, potong
100 ml air perasan jeruk nipis
200-250 ml susu evaporasi
1 buah tomat, potong
15 buah cabai rawit merah
4 sdm kecap ikan
1 sdt garam
7 sdm gula
2 sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
2 liter air

Bahan pelengkap:
2 cups Leon Thai Jasmine Rice
2 ½ cups air

Langkah:
1. Pisahkan udang dengan kulit, buang kotoran udang kemudian cuci bersih
2. Panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis kulit udang hingga wangi dan kering kemudian tambahkan air, masak selama 10 menit
3. Cuci bersih beras Leon Thai Jasmine Rice, lalu tuang air, masak dengan rice cooker hingga matang
4. Blender batang serai bagian putih, lengkuas, bawang merah, bawang putih, terasi, cabai keriting, cabai kering, minyak, dan air secukupnya, blender hingga halus
5. Tumis bumbu halus di api sedang hingga wangi dan kering, sisihkan
6. Saring kaldu udang kemudian masukkan  serai, lengkuas, tomat, daun jeruk, jamur, dan bumbu halus, aduk rata
7. Tambahkan kecap ikan, garam, gula, penyedap, cabai rawit, dan air jeruk nipis, masak selama 3 menit
8. Tambahkan sedikit air bila perlu
9. Masukkan udang dan daun ketumbar, matikan api lalu tambahkan susu evaporasi, aduk rata
10. Tom yum goong siap disajikan dengan nasi Leon Thai Jasmine sebagai pelengkap

recipe_en:
Tom Yum Goong Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Blended Spices ingredients:
12 pc shallot
8 clove garlic
10 pc dried chili, soaked in hot water
8 pc red curly chili
2 sachet shrimp paste
2 pc lemongrass, sliced
4 cm galangal, sliced
Oil, as needed
Water, as needed

Aromatics ingredients:
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
50 g galangal, sliced
10 pc kaffir lime leaf
6 pc cilantro

Filling ingredients:
500 g shrimp, with shell
100 g oyster mushroom, shredded
200 g straw mushroom, sliced
100 ml lime juice
200-250 ml evaporated milk
1 pc tomato, sliced
15 pc red Thai chili
4 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp salt
7 tbsp sugar
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 L water

Others:
2 cup Leon Thai Jasmine Rice
2.5 cup water

Steps:
1. Peel, devein, and rinse the shrimp cleanly.
2. Heat some oil. Sauté the shrimp shells until fragrant and crisp. Add water and cook for 10 minutes.
3. Rinse Leon Thai Jasmine Rice cleanly. Add water and cook in a rice cooker.
4. Blend the white part of the lemongrass, the galangal, shallots, garlic, shrimp paste, curly chili, and dried chili with oil and water as needed. Blend until smooth.
5. Sauté the blended spices on medium heat until fragrant. Set aside.
6. Strain the shrimp stock. Add lemongrass, galangal, tomato, lime leaves, mushroom, and the blended spices. Stir.
7. Add fish sauce, salt, sugar, flavor enhancer, Thai chili, and lime juice. Cook for 3 minutes.
8. Add water if needed.
9. Add the shrimp and cilantro. Turn the heat off, then add evaporated milk. Stir.
10. Tom Yum Goong is ready to serve with Leon Thai Jasmine Rice on the side.

title: Rendam Telur Biar Empuk! Resep NASI GORENG OAT: Gurih Tetap Sehat.
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Goreng Oat (untuk 1-2 porsi)

70 gr Quaker Rolled Oats
3 butir telur
120 gr nasi beras merah

Bahan bumbu halus:
4 siung bawang merah, potong
3 siung bawang putih, potong
2 butir kemiri
Minyak biji anggur secukupnya

½ sdm kecap ikan

Merica sesuai selera

2. Blender bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, dan minyak hingga halus 
3. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi, masukkan rolled oats, aduk hingga kering
4. Masukkan daun bawang bagian batang dan bakso, aduk rata
5. Tambahkan kecap ikan, kecap manis, saus tiram, dan nasi, aduk rata
6. Tambahkan merica, cabai merah, sisa daun bawang, dan pakcoy, aduk rata

recipe_en:
Oat Fried Rice Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
70 g Quaker Rolled Oats
3 pc egg
120 g red rice

Blended Spices ingredients:
4 pc shallot, sliced
3 clove garlic, sliced
2 pc candlenut
Grapeseed oil, as needed

Add-ons ingredients:
1 pc green onion, sliced
5 pc beef meatball, sliced
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 pc bok choy, sliced
2 pc red chili, sliced
Pepper, to taste

Steps:
1. Mix the Quaker Rolled Oats with eggs. Stir and cover with plastic wrap. Let soak for 45-60 minutes.
2. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, and oil until smooth.
3. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant. Add the rolled oats and cook until crisp.
4. Add the white part of the green onions and meatballs. Stir.
5. Add fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, and rice. Stir.
6. Season with pepper. Add the red chili, the rest of the green onions, bok choy. Stir.
7. Oat Fried Rice is ready to serve.

title: Empuk Berempah! Resep TONGSENG SAPI Gulai [Menu Idul Adha]
recipe_id:

10 siung bawang merah
4 butir kemiri
50 gr cabai keriting merah
5 cm kunyit

Minyak secukupnya

2 batang serai, geprek
Daun kunyit / daun kari (opsional)
5 lembar daun jeruk
1/2 butir pala, hancurkan
2 butir cengkih
1 butir bunga lawang
3-5 butir kapulaga
3-4 cm kayu manis
1/2 buah asam kandis / asam jawa (opsional)
1,2 liter air
200 ml santan instant kental
1 sdt garam
⅓ sdt merica
1-2 sdt kaldu sapi / penyedap
1 sdt gula pasir

Bahan iris:
150 gr daging has dalam, opsional, potong
1 sdm margarin
5 siung bawang merah, iris
½ buah bawang bombai, iris
1 buah tomat merah, iris

1 sdm kecap manis

Bumbu-bumbu sesuai selera

Langkah
1. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih, kemiri, kunyit, jahe, lengkuas, cabai keriting merah, ketumbar, jintan dan sedikit minyak hingga halus
2. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi lalu masukkan serai, daun salam, daun jeruk, pala, cengkeh, bunga lawang, kapulaga, kayu manis dan asam kandis, aduk rata
3. Tambahkan garam, merica, penyedap, daging sengkel yang telah dipotong dan air, presto selama 30 menit
4. Setelah empuk, masukkan santan dan gula, aduk rata
5. Panaskan wajan, masukkan margarin,  aduk lalu masukkan bawang bombai dan bawang merah, tumis hingga wangi
6. Masukkan daging, cabai rawit, daun bawang, aduk rata lalu masukkan kol, air rebusan gulai, kecap manis, saus tiram dan bumbu-bumbu sesuai selera
7. Tongseng sapi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Beef Tongseng Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Blended Spices ingredients:
8 clove garlic
10 pc shallot
4 pc candlenut
50 g red curly chili
5 cm turmeric
2 cm ginger
4 cm galangal
1 tsp toasted coriander
1 tsp toasted cumin
Oil, as needed

Gulai ingredients:
500 g beef shank / ribs / chicken / mixed, sliced
2 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
Turmeric leaf / curry leaf (optional)
5 pc lime leaf
1 pc nutmeg, pounded
3 pc clove
2 pc star anise
5 pc cardamom
5 cm cinnamon
1 pc asam kandis / tamarind (optional)
1 L water
100 ml coconut milk
1 tsp salt
⅓ tsp pepper
1-2 tsp beef powder / flavor enhancer
1 tsp sugar

Sliced ingredients:
150 g beef fillet, optional, sliced
1 tbsp margarine
5 pc shallot, sliced
½ pc onion, sliced
1 pc red tomato, sliced
2 pc green onion, sliced
100 g cabbage, sliced
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tbsp oyster sauce
7 pc Thai chili, sliced
Seasonings, to taste

Steps:
1. Blend the shallots, garlic, candlenuts, turmeric, ginger, galangal, red curly chili, coriander, cumin, and a bit of oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant. Add the lemongrass, bay leaf, lime leaf, nutmeg, clove, star anise, cardamom, cinnamon, and asam kandis. Stir.
3. Season with salt, pepper, flavor enhancer, sliced beef shank, and water. Pressure cook for 30 minutes.
4. Once tender, add coconut milk and sugar. Stir.
5. Heat the pan. Add margarine and stir. Add onion and shallots. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the meat, Thai chili, and green onions. Stir, then add the cabbage, Gulai broth, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, and seasonings, to taste.
7. Beef Tongseng is ready to serve.

title: 100% Renyah & Mengkilat! Resep PAI BUAH SEGAR GURIH Kualitas Hotel [Mini Fruit Pie]
recipe_id:
Resep Fruit Pie (25-28 pcs)

Bahan:
260 gr tepung terigu protein rendah/sedang
80 gr gula halus
125 gr mentega dingin, potong kotak-kotak
2 butir kuning telur
¾ sdt garam

Pastry cream:
450 ml susu full cream
80 gr gula pasir
4 butir kuning telur
25 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
20 gr tepung maizena
35 gr mentega
1-2 sdt ekstrak vanila
½ sdt garam

Bahan lainnya:
Kiwi, potong
Stroberi, potong
Anggur, potong
Jeruk kaleng, potong
Jelly polos untuk olesan

Langkah:
1. Untuk cream, panaskan susu, di wadah terpisah campurkan kuning telur, gula pasir, ekstrak vanila, maizena, tepung terigu, dan garam, aduk rata
2. Tuang susu ke dalam campuran tepung sambil diaduk, kemudian masak kembali di api sedang kecil hingga mengental  
3. Masukkan mentega, aduk rata lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, tutup dengan plastic wrap, diamkan hingga dingin di dalam kulkas minimal dua jam
4. Setelah dingin, mixer cream lalu masukkan ke dalam piping bag
5. Untuk kulit pai, campurkan tepung terigu, gula halus, dan garam yang telah disaring, aduk rata
6. Masukkan mentega, aduk hingga tercampur lalu tambahkan kuning telur, aduk hingga rata
7. Oles cetakan pai dengan minyak, lalu isi dengan kulit pai, ratakan, tusuk dasar pai dengan garpu
8. Panggang di suhu 170 derajat selama 20 menit
9. Keluarkan kulit pai dari cetakan, isi dengan cream lalu beri topping buah di atas nya
10. Oles dengan jelly polos
11. Pai buah siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Fruit Pie Recipe (yield 25-28 pieces)

Ingredients:
260 g all-purpose flour
80 g icing sugar
125 g cold butter, diced
2 pc egg yolk
¾ tsp salt

Pastry Cream:
450 ml full cream milk
80 g sugar
4 pc egg yolk
25 g all-purpose flour
20 g cornstarch
35 g butter
1-2 tsp vanilla extract
½ tsp salt

Other ingredients:
Kiwi, sliced
Strawberry, sliced
Grape, sliced
Canned orange, sliced
Plain jelly to brush

Steps:
1. For the pastry cream, heat the milk. In a separate bowl, mix the egg yolks, sugar, vanilla extract, cornstarch, flour, and salt. Mix well.
2. Pour the milk into the yolk mix while stirring, then cook it again on medium-low heat until it thickens.
3. Add butter. Mix well, then transfer to a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap. Chill in the fridge for at least 2 hours.
4. Once chilled, mix the cream with a mixer and transfer into a piping bag.
5. For the pie crust, mix the sifted flour, icing sugar, and salt. Stir.
6. Add butter and stir until it’s mixed. Add egg yolks and mix well.
7. Brush the pie tins with oil. Fill the tins with the dough. Even it out and stab the base of the pie with a fork.
8. Bake at 170℃ for 20 minutes.
9. Get the pie crust out of the tins. Fill it with the pastry cream and top with fruits.
10. Brush it with plain jelly.
11. Fruit Pie is ready to serve.

title: TANPA Oven! Resep PAI COKELAT MINI [NO BAKE Choco Pie]
recipe_id:
Resep No Bake Chocolate Pie (10 pcs)

Bahan kulit pai:
250 gr Good Time Classic
70 gr mentega leleh

Bahan isian:
12 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
30 gr mentega
210 ml susu
7 gr bubuk cokelat
80 gr cokelat compound (½ milk ½ dark), cincang
50 gr kental manis putih
⅕ sdt garam

Lainnya:
Dark chocolate, lelehkan

Langkah:
1. Untuk  kulit pai, hancurkan Good Time Classic dengan food processor, pisahkan sebagian untuk topping
2. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk kemudian masukkan mentega yang telah dilelehkan, aduk rata
3. Siapkan cetakan,masukkan adonan kulit pai, tekan dan ratakan 
4. Tutup dengan plastic wrap, diamkan di dalam freezer selama 20-30 menit hingga set 
5. Untuk isian, panaskan susu, kental manis, cokelat bubuk, dan tepung terigu yang telah disaring, masak di api sedang sambil diaduk hingga sedikit mendidih
6. Masukkan garam, cokelat, dan mentega, aduk rata lalu matikan api 
7. Keluarkan pai dari cetakan lalu tuang isian cokelat, tutup dengan plastic wrap, simpan di dalam kulkas selama 2-3 jam
8. Tambahkan dark chocolate yang telah dilelehkan dan Good Time Classic sebagai topping
9. No bake chocolate pie siap disajikan 

Untuk pembelian Good Time bisa di Indomaret atau klik di sini
https://www.klikindomaret.com/product/cookies-chocochips-2

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @goodtime.id
Instagram: https://instagram.com/goodtimeid/
Facebook Page: https://facebook.com/GoodTimeID
recipe_en:
No-Bake Chocolate Pie Recipe (yield: 10 pcs)

Pie Crust ingredients:
200 g Good Time Classic
70 g melted butter

Filling ingredients:
12 g all-purpose flour
30 g butter
210 ml milk
7 g chocolate powder
80 g compound chocolate (½ milk + ½ dark), chopped
50 g white condensed milk
⅕ tsp salt

Others:
Dark chocolate, chop & melt

Steps:
1. For the pie crust, grind Good Time Classic with a food processor. Set aside a little bit for topping.
2. Transfer to a bowl, then add melted butter and mix evenly.
3. Prepare the pie tins. Add the crust in, press it in and even it out.
4. Cover with plastic wrap. Place in the freezer for 20-30 minutes until they set.
5. For the filling, heat the milk, condensed milk, and sifted chocolate powder and flour. Cook on medium heat while stirring until it’s simmering.
6. Add salt, chocolate, and butter. Stir well, then turn the heat off.
7. Get the pie crust out of the tins, then pour the chocolate filling in. Cover with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge for 2-3 hours.
8. Add melted dark chocolate and Good Time Classic as the toppings.
9. No-Bake Chocolate Pie is ready to serve.

title: Resep AYAM RICA-RICA KEMANGI Pedas Gurih Ala Devina Hermawan
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Rica-Rica (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg ayam nanas / ayam kampung / ayam broiler
2 buah jeruk nipis
2 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu ayam
½ sdt merica

Bahan bumbu halus:
8 siung bawang putih
7 siung bawang merah, potong
6 butir kemiri
2 ruas jahe
2 ruas kunyit
60 gr cabai keriting merah, potong
80 gr cabai rawit merah, potong
50 ml minyak

Bahan lainnya:
13 buah cabai rawit merah
30 gr daun kemangi
1 batang daun bawang, potong
3 lembar daun salam, opsional
2 batang serai, geprek
1 lembar daun pandan, opsional
5 lembar daun jeruk
1 sdt garam
1 - 1,5 sdm gula
1 sdt kaldu ayam

Pelengkap:
Nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Marinasi ayam dengan jeruk nipis, garam, kaldu ayam, dan merica, aduk rata kemudian tutup dengan plastik wrap, diamkan selama 1-2 jam  
2. Blender kemiri, bawang putih, jahe, kunyit, dan minyak hingga halus lalu masukkan bawang merah, cabai rawit merah dan cabai keriting blender kembali 
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan ayam masak hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan
4. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi kemudian masukkan serai, daun salam, dan daun jeruk, aduk rata
5. Masukkan ayam, air, garam, gula, kaldu ayam, dan daun pandan, masak di api besar selama 15-20 menit
6. Masukkan cabai rawit, daun bawang, dan kemangi, aduk rata
7. Ayam rica-rica siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Chicken Rica-Rica Recipe (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Ingredients:
1 kg ayam nanas / free-range chicken / broiler
2 pc lime
2 tsp salt
1 tsp chicken powder
½ tsp pepper

Blended Spices ingredients:
8 clove garlic
7 pc shallot, sliced
6 pc candlenut
5 cm ginger
5 cm turmeric
50 g red curly chili, sliced
70 g red bird’s eye chili, sliced
50 ml oil

Other ingredients:
13 pc red bird’s eye chili
40 g lemon basil
2 pc green onion, sliced
3 pc bay leaf
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
1 pc pandan leaf, optional
5 pc lime leaf
1 tsp salt
1 - 1.5 tbsp sugar
1 tsp chicken powder

Other:
Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with lime, salt, chicken powder, and pepper. Mix well and cover with plastic wrap. Rest for 1-2 hours.
2. Blend the candlenuts, garlic, ginger, turmeric, and oil until smooth. Add shallots, red bird’s eye chili, and curly chili. Blend again.
3. Heat some oil. Add the chicken and cook until browned. Set aside.
4. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant. Add lemongrass, bay leaves, and lime leaves. Stir.
5. Add the chicken, water, salt, sugar, chicken powder, and pandan leaves. Cook on high heat for 15-20 minutes.
6. Add bird’s eye chili, green onions, and lemon basil. Stir.
7. Chicken Rica-Rica is ready to serve.

title: Resep TAHU ISI SAYURAN PEDAS Air Fryer: Irit Minyak & Lebih Sehat.
recipe_id:
Resep Gehu Pedas (10 pcs)

Bahan:
10 pcs tahu kuning
100 gr tauge
100 gr wortel, potong korek api
100 gr kol, iris
7 buah cabai rawit merah
15 buah cabai keriting
3 siung bawang merah
2 siung bawang putih
1 batang daun bawang, iris
½ sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
½ sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
2 sdm tepung tapioka

Bahan pelapis:
8 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
3 sdm maizena
1 sdt baking powder
1 ½ sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
125 ml air
2 sdm minyak goreng
¼ sdt bubuk kunyit
¼ sdt bubuk paprika
2 siung bawang putih halus

Langkah:
1. Masukkan tahu ke dalam air fryer, masak dengan suhu  175-180 derajat masing-masing sisi selama 10 menit, tiriskan lalu keluarkan isi tahu
2. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih, sebagian cabai rawit, cabai merah, dan sedikit minyak hingga halus
3. Tumis bumbu hingga wangi kemudian masukkan daun bawang dan wortel, masak sebentar lalu masukkan kol dan tauge, aduk rata
4. Tambahkan garam, gula pasir, merica, dan penyedap, aduk rata
5. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, masukkan potongan cabai rawit, tutup dengan plastic wrap diamkan hingga dingin
6. Setelah dingin, masukkan tepung tapioka, aduk rata kemudian pindahkan isian ke dalam piping bag
7. Isi tahu yang telah dibelah dengan isian sayuran
8. Siapkan mangkuk, masukkan tepung terigu, maizena, kaldu bubuk, bubuk paprika, bubuk kunyit, dan baking powder, aduk rata
9. Masukkan air, minyak, dan bawang putih, aduk rata
10. Panaskan wajan, celupkan tahu  ke dalam adonan tepung basah lalu masak tahu hingga terbentuk crust atau lapisan kecokelatan
11. Masukkan ke dalam air fryer masak selama 8 menit di suhu 180 derajat kemudian balikkan tahu, masak kembali selama 7 menit
12. Gehu pedas siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Tofu Recipe (yield: 10 pcs)

Ingredients:
10 pc yellow tofu
100 g beansprout
100 g carrot, sliced into matchsticks
100 g cabbage, sliced
7 pc red bird’s eye chili
15 pc curly chili
3 pc shallot
2 clove garlic
1 pc green onion, sliced
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 tbsp tapioca flour

Batter ingredients:
8 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp baking powder
1.5 tsp chicken powder
125 ml water
2 tbsp oil
¼ tsp turmeric powder
¼ tsp paprika powder
2 clove garlic, minced

Steps:
1. Place the tofu in the air fryer. Cook at 175-180°C for 10 minutes per side. Set aside, then scoop out the inside.
2. Blend the shallots, garlic, some of the bird’s eye chili, red chili, and some oil until smooth.
3. Sauté the blended spices until fragrant. Add green onion and carrot. Cook for a moment, then add cabbage and beansprouts. Stir.
4. Season with salt, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Mix well.
5. Transfer to a bowl. Add sliced bird’s eye chili, then cover with plastic wrap. Let cool.
6. After the filling has cooled, add tapioca flour. Mix well, then transfer the filling into a piping bag.
7. Fill the tofu with the vegetable filling.
8. Prepare a bowl. Combine flour, cornstarch, chicken powder, paprika powder, turmeric powder, and baking powder. Mix well.
9. Add water, oil, and garlic. Mix well.
10. Heat the pan. Dip the tofu into the batter. Pan-sear the tofu until a crust or a brownish layer is formed.
11. Place the tofu in the air fryer. Cook for 8 minutes at 180°C, then flip and cook again for 7 minutes.
12. Spicy Tofu is ready to serve.

title: Spicy Tempeh Serabi Recipe: 100% Soft and Hollow! [Gluten-Free]
recipe_id:
Resep Serabi Pedas (6-8 porsi)

Bahan adonan:
300 ml santan instant (kental) 
500 ml air panas
450 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Beras
30 gr gula pasir
3/4 sdt ragi
1 sdt garam

Bahan tempe:
180 gr tempe
3 buah cabai merah keriting
5 siung bawang merah
4 siung bawang putih
1 ruas kencur
5 buah cabai rawit merah
2 genggam kemangi, iris
70 ml air
½ sdt garam
2 sdt gula
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
Minyak

Bahan lainnya:
Cabai rawit merah, iris

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan, siapkan mangkuk campurkan santan, air panas, garam, BOLA Deli Tepung Beras, dan gula, aduk rata
2. Masukkan ragi, aduk rata kemudian tutup dengan plastic wrap, diamkan selama 40-60 menit
3. Hancurkan tempe lalu goreng hingga kekuningan, tiriskan 
4. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih, kencur, cabai keriting, cabai rawit, dan minyak hingga halus
5. Tumis bumbu halus hingga wangi lalu masukkan tempe, aduk rata
6. Masukkan air, garam, gula, dan  penyedap, aduk kemudian tambahkan kemangi, aduk rata
7. Panaskan cetakan di api kecil sedang, masukkan adonan serabi, tutup sebentar hingga setengah matang lalu tambahkan topping dan potongan cabai rawit, masak hingga matang
8. Serabi tempe pedas siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Spicy Serabi Recipe (yield 6-8 servings)

Batter ingredients:
300 ml instant coconut milk (thick)
500 ml hot water
450 g BOLA Deli Rice Flour
30 g sugar
¾ tsp yeast
1 tsp salt

Tempeh ingredients:
180 g tempeh
3 pc red curly chili
5 pc shallot
4 clove garlic
2 cm aromatic ginger
5 pc red bird’s eye chili
2 fistful lemon basil, sliced
70 ml water
½ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
Oil

Other ingredients:
Red bird’s eye chili, sliced

Steps:
1. For the batter, combine the coconut milk, hot water, salt, BOLA Deli Rice Flour, and sugar in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Add the yeast in. Mix well, then cover the bowl with plastic wrap. Rest for 40-60 minutes.
3. Pinch the tempeh into chunks and fry until golden. Set aside.
4. Blend the shallots, garlic, aromatic ginger, curly chili, bird’s eye chili, and oil until smooth.
5. Sautè the blended spices until fragrant. Add the tempeh in and mix well.
6. Add water, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Stir, then add the lemon basil in.
7. Heat the mold pan on medium-low heat. Pour the Serabi batter in. Cover the pan until they’re half-cooked, then add the topping and sliced bird’s eye chili. Continue cooking.
8. Spicy Tempeh Serabi is ready to serve.

title: Tips SUP AYAM Kolagen Kental & Gurih: Resep BIJIN HOTPOT / NABE [Sup Kecantikan & Awet Muda]
recipe_id:
Resep Collagen Soup Hotpot (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan soup:
500 gr ceker ayam
500 gr tulang rongkong ayam
½ buah bawang bombai, potong
2 ruas jahe, iris
6 liter air

Bahan lainnya:
Jamur shimeji
Jamur enoki
Jamur shimeji putih
Tang oh
Daun bawang, iris
Tahu tube
Wortel, bentuk bunga (opsional)
Lobak, potong
Daging slice

Bahan bakso ayam:
250 gr ayam cincang
¾ sdt garam
1 ½ sdt gula
¼ sdt merica
¼ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
2 sdt air bawang putih
1 sdt air jahe
2 sdt tepung maizena
1 sdm putih telur

Bahan cocolan:
Ponzu atau kecap asin + jeruk nipis
Cabai rawit merah, iris
Daun bawang bagian putih, iris
Bawang putih cincang
Lobak, parut

Langkah:
1. Untuk soup, didihkan air masukkan ceker dan tulang, masak sebentar lalu bilas dengan air
2. Didihkan kembali air, masukkan ceker dan tulang kemudian tambahkan bawang bombai dan jahe, masak selama 60 menit di api besar
3. Kecilkan api, rebus ceker dan tulang selama 4 jam, tambahkan air jika menyusut
4. Besarkan api, masak kembali selama 15-20 menit lalu saring 
5. Pindahkan ke dalam botol, simpan di kulkas semalaman hingga kuah berubah menjadi jelly
6. Untuk bakso, siapkan mangkuk, campurkan ayam, garam, gula, merica, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk hingga lengket
7. Tambahkan air jahe, air bawang putih, putih telur, aduk kembali kemudian masukkan tepung maizena, aduk rata
8. Susun sayuran, daging slice ke dalam piring, lalu bentuk bulat bakso
9. Untuk cocolan, campurkan semua bahan, aduk rata
10. Panaskan wajan, tuang collagen kemudian panaskan kembali
11. Masukkan sayuran, daging slice dan juga bakso
12. Collagen nabe siap disajikan dengan saus cocolan sebagai pelengkap

recipe_en:
Collagen Soup Hotpot Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Soup ingredients:
500 g chicken feet
500 g chicken carcass
½ pc onion, sliced
5 cm ginger, sliced
6 L water

Other ingredients:
Shimeji mushroom
Enoki mushroom
White Shimeji mushroom
Crown daisy
Green onion, sliced
Silk tofu
Carrot, sliced into flowers (optional)
Radish, sliced
Sliced beef

Chicken Meatball ingredients:
250 g ground chicken
¾ tsp salt
1.5 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
¼ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
2 tsp garlic liquid
1 tsp ginger liquid
2 tsp cornstarch
1 tbsp egg white

Dipping Sauce:
Ponzu or soy sauce + lime
Red bird’s eye chili, sliced
White part of green onions, sliced
Garlic, minced
Radish, grated

Steps:
1. For the soup, boil the water and add the chicken feet and chicken carcass. Cook for a bit, then rinse.
2. Bring water to a boil once more. Add the chicken feet and carcass with onion and ginger. Cook for 60 minutes on high heat.
3. Lower the heat. Boil the feet and carcass for 4 hours. Add water if necessary.
4. Turn the heat up and continue cooking for 15-20 minutes, then strain.
5. Transfer the soup into a bottle. Keep in the fridge overnight until it turns into jelly.
6. For the Meatballs, prepare a bowl. Combine the chicken, salt, sugar, pepper, and stock powder. Mix until sticky.
7. Add ginger liquid, garlic liquid, and egg white. Stir and add cornstarch in. Mix well.
8. Arrange the vegetables and sliced beef on a plate. Shape the meatballs.
9. For the dipping sauce, combine all the ingredients and stir.
10. Heat the pan. Add the collagen soup and reheat.
11. Add the vegetables, sliced beef, and chicken meatballs.
12. Collagen Nabe is ready to serve with the dipping sauce on the side.

title: Resep BUNTUT GORENG KREMES SAMBAL BALADO: Dijamin Nambah!
recipe_id:
Resep Buntut Goreng Kremes Sambal Balado (untuk 8-10 porsi)

Bahan:
2 kg buntut sapi
3 liter air
6 siung bawang putih halus
6 siung bawang merah
36 gr jahe, geprek
½ sdm lada putih
2 sdm garam
1 sdm kaldu bubuk / penyedap
3 sdm gula pasir
5 lembar daun salam
5 lembar daun jeruk
1 batang serai, geprek

Sambal balado:
200 gr cabai keriting
30 gr cabai rawit merah
9 siung bawang merah
3 siung bawang putih, potong
1 buah tomat, potong
1 sachet terasi, bakar
80 ml air
1 sdt garam
1 sdt penyedap
1 ½ sdm gula aren
2 iris lengkuas
1 batang serai
2 lembar daun jeruk
3 lembar daun salam
Minyak Goreng Fortune untuk menumis

Bahan kremesan:
1 butir telur
7 sdm tepung tapioka
2 sdm tepung beras
2 sdt baking powder
200 ml air ungkepan buntut
50 gr es batu atau air es (opsional)
Bumbu-bumbu sesuai selera

Lainnya:
Tepung tapioka
Minyak Goreng Fortune untuk menggoreng
Nasi
Timun

Langkah:
1. Masukkan bawang putih halus, bawang merah, jahe, serai, daun salam, daun jeruk, buntut, air, garam, lada putih, kaldu bubuk dan gula ke dalam presto, masak selama satu jam
2. Setelah empuk, tiriskan buntut lalu saring air ungkepan, pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk 
3. Untuk sambal balado, panaskan minyak goreng Fortune, masukkan cabai keriting,cabai rawit, bawang putih, bawang merah, terasi yang telah dibakar dan tomat, masak hingga sedikit layu
4. Pindahkan ke dalam food processor, haluskan lalu tumis kembali
5. Masukkan lengkuas, serai, daun salam dan daun jeruk, aduk rata
6. Tambahkan air, garam, penyedap dan gula aren, masak hingga air menyusut
7. Untuk kremesan, campurkan tepung tapioka, tepung beras baking powder, air ungkepan, telur dan es batu aduk rata 
8. Panaskan minyak goreng Fortune, goreng kremesan hingga matang di api sedang, tiriskan
9. Celupkan buntut ke dalam tepung basah kremesan kemudian goreng, tiriskan
10. Untuk cara kedua, balurkan buntut ke dalam tepung tapioka lalu ke dalam tepung basah kremesan kemudian goreng hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan 
11. Buntut goreng kremes siap disajikan dengan nasi dan timun sebagai pelengkap

title: Resep MIE ACEH: Istimewa, Gurih Berempah!
recipe_id:
Resep Mie Aceh (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
7-8 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
8 buah cabai keriting merah
5 buah cabai kering, rendam air hangat
2 ruas jahe
½ sdt lada putih utuh atau ¼ sdt lada bubuk
1 sachet terasi, opsional
Minyak

Bumbu tumis:
3 siung bawang merah, iris
1 batang daun bawang, potong
½ batang seledri, iris
½ buah tomat merah ukuran sedang
1 sdm bubuk kari
5 ekor udang kecil dengan kulit
2 pasang ati ampela, rebus, iris
3 buah cumi, potong
1 butir telur
200 gr mie kuning
1 sdm kecap manis
2 sdt kecap ikan
1-2 sdt kaldu sapi bubuk
500 ml air
Kol, iris
Tauge

Bahan acar bawang merah:
9 siung bawang merah, iris
½ sdm cuka
½ sdt gula
⅓ sdt garam

Pelengkap:
Jeruk limau
Cabai rawit hijau
Timun
Emping
Kacang goreng

Langkah:
1. Blender bawang putih, bawang merah, kemiri, lada putih, jahe, terasi, cabai keriting, dan cabai kering dengan sedikit minyak hingga halus lalu tumis hingga harum, sisihkan
2. Untuk acar, iris bawang merah, masukkan cuka, gula, dan garam aduk rata
3. Panaskan minyak, masukkan ati ampela tumis hingga wangi. Kemudian masukkan udang dan cumi, masak hingga air sedikit menyusut 
4. Masukkan telur, aduk, lalu masukkan bawang merah, daun bawang, tomat, dan bumbu halus, aduk rata 
5. Tambahkan kecap manis, kecap ikan, dan bubuk kari aduk rata
6. Masukkan air dan kaldu sapi bubuk aduk kembali lalu tambahkan seledri dan mie, masak selama dua-tiga menit
7. Masukkan kol dan tauge, masak sebentar
8. Mie aceh siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Aceh Noodles Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Blended Spices ingredients:
7-8 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
3 pc candlenut
8 pc red curly chili
5 pc dried chili, soaked in warm water
5 cm ginger
½ tsp whole white pepper or ¼ tsp pepper
1 sachet shrimp paste, optional
Oil

Stir-fried ingredients:
3 pc shallot, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced
½ pc celery, sliced
½ pc tomato, medium
1 tbsp curry powder
5 pc shrimp, small, with shell
2 pair gizzard and liver, boiled, sliced
3 pc squid, sliced
1 pc egg
200 g fresh egg noodles
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tsp fish sauce
1-2 tsp beef powder
500 ml water
Cabbage, sliced
Beansprout

Shallot Pickle ingredients:
9 pc shallot, sliced
½ tbsp vinegar
½ tsp sugar
⅓ tsp salt

Condiments:
Kaffir lime
Green bird’s eye chili
Cucumber
Emping
Fried peanuts

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, white pepper, ginger, shrimp paste, curly chili, and dried chili with some oil until smooth. Then, sauté until fragrant. Set aside.
2. For the pickles, slice the shallots. Add vinegar, sugar, and salt. Mix well.
3. Heat the oil. Add the gizzards and liver, sauté until fragrant. Then, add the shrimp and squid. Cook until the liquid is reduced a bit.
4. Add the egg and stir. Then, add the shallots, green onions, tomato, and blended spices. Mix well.
5. Add sweet soy sauce, fish sauce, and curry powder. Mix well.
6. Add water and beef powder. Stir, then add celery and the noodles. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
7. Add the cabbage and beansprouts. Cook for a bit.
8. Aceh Noodle is ready to serve.

title: Resep ONIGIRI SOSIS TELUR Bahan Lokal ! [Sausages & Egg Onigirazu / Sushi Sandwich]
recipe_id:
Onigirazu, Onigiri modern yang sangat kekinian dengan menggunakan Kanzler Cheese Cocktail, cocok banget buat ide jualan, sarapan atau bekal ke kantor dan sekolah.

Resep Sausages & Egg Onigirazu (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan nasi:
180 gr beras jepang (140 gr beras biasa + 40 gr beras ketan putih)
250 ml air
½ sdt garam

Bahan lainnya:
Sosis Kanzler Cheese Cocktail
3 sdm mayones
2 butir telur
2 lembar rumput laut / telur dadar
¼ sdt garam
Lada hitam sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Campurkan beras biasa dengan beras ketan putih kemudian cuci
2. Masukkan ke dalam rice cooker lalu tambahkan air, masak hingga matang
3. Setelah matang, aduk nasi lalu masukkan garam, aduk rata
4. Simpan nasi ke dalam mangkuk kemudian tutup dengan plastic wrap
5. Rebus Sosis Kanzler Cheese Cocktail selama 1-2 menit, tiriskan
6. Kocok telur, tambahkan garam, aduk rata
7. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan telur, masak hingga setengah matang sambil diaduk
8. Ambil satu lembar rumput laut, tuang nasi, ratakan
9. Tambahkan mayones, lada hitam, telur, Sosis Kanzler Cheese Cocktail, dan nasi kemudian gulung sambil ditekan
10. Sausages and egg onigirazu siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Sausage & Egg Onigirazu Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Rice ingredients:
180 g Japanese rice (140 g regular rice + 40 g white glutinous rice)
250 ml water
½ tsp salt


Other ingredients:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail Sausage
3 tbsp mayonnaise
2 pc egg
2 pc nori / omelet
¼ tsp salt
Black pepper, to taste


Steps:
1. Mix regular rice with white glutinous rice and rinse.
2. Place into the rice cooker and add water. Cook through.
3. Once the rice is cooked, stir and season with salt. Mix well.
4. Transfer the rice into a bowl and cover with plastic wrap.
5. Boil Kanzler Cheese Cocktail Sausage for 1-2 minutes. Set aside.
6. Whisk the egg. Season with salt and stir.
7. Heat some oil. Add the egg in and cook until half-done while stirring.
8. Get one sheet of nori. Add rice evenly.
9. Add mayonnaise, black pepper, egg, Kanzler Cheese Cocktail Sausage, and rice. Wrap and pack it in.
10. Sausage and Egg Onigirazu is ready to serve.

title: Cukup 10 Menit! Resep PHILLY CHEESESTEAK SANDWICH Khas Amerika
recipe_id:
Resep Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan:
Roti soft baguette
150 gr daging slice rib eye
½ buah bawang bombai, potong kotak
5 buah shishito pepper, opsional
Garam sesuai selera
Merica sesuai selera

Bahan marinasi untuk daging lokal:
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
2 sdt tepung maizena
½ sdm kecap inggris
¾ sdt bawang putih halus

Bahan olesan roti:
1 sdm mayones
2 siung bawang putih halus
1 sdm mentega

Bahan saus keju:
65 gr keju quick melt, parut
2 sdt tepung maizena
75 ml susu
1 sdt gula

Pelengkap:
Acar mentimun
Keripik kentang

Langkah:
1. Untuk saus keju, panaskan keju, tepung maizena, dan susu, masak hingga keju meleleh lalu tambahkan gula, aduk rata
2. Untuk daging lokal, marinasi dengan garam, merica, dan tepung maizena, aduk rata lalu tambahkan kecap inggris dan bawang putih halus 
3. Campurkan bawang putih dengan mentega, lalu oleskan ke dalam roti yang telah dibelah dua
4. Panaskan minyak masukkan bawang bombai, tumis hingga kecokelatan lalu masukkan cabai dan daging, tambahkan garam dan merica, masak hingga matang
5. Panggang roti hingga sedikit kecokelatan lalu oles dengan mayones, masukkan isian daging dan saus keju
6. Philly cheesesteak sandwich siap disajikan dengan acar timun dan keripik kentang sebagai pelengkap
recipe_en:
Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
Soft baguette bread
150 g rib-eye sliced beef
½ pc onion, diced
5 pc shishito pepper, optional
Salt, to taste
Pepper, to taste

Marinade for local beef:
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp cornstarch
½ tbsp Worcestershire sauce
¾ tsp minced garlic

Bread spread ingredients:
1 tbsp mayonnaise
2 clove garlic, minced
1 tbsp butter

Cheese Sauce ingredients:
65 g quick melt cheese, grated
2 tsp cornstarch
75 ml milk
1 tsp sugar

Condiments:
Cucumber pickles
Potato chips

Steps:
1. For the Cheese Sauce, heat the cheese, cornstarch, and milk. Cook until the cheese melts. Then, add sugar and mix well.
2. For the local beef, marinate with salt, pepper, and cornstarch. Mix well, then add Worcestershire sauce and minced garlic.
3. Mix the garlic with butter, then spread to the halved bread.
4. Heat some oil. Add the onion and sauté until browned. Then, add the meat and chili. Season with salt and pepper. Cook thoroughly.
5. Grill the bread until lightly browned, then spread mayonnaise on it. Add the meat filling and Cheese Sauce.
6. Philly Cheesesteak Sandwich is ready to serve with cucumber pickles and potato chips on the side.

title: Anti Kempis! Resep ONDE-ONDE MANIS TELUR ASIN Ala Resto Dim Sum: Kopong & Garing!
recipe_id:
Resep Onde-Onde Telur Asin (10 pcs)

Bahan kulit onde:
40 gr kentang, kukus
50 gr gula pasir
145 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Ketan
90 gr air panas
10 gr minyak goreng
¼ sdt garam

Isian telur asin:
65 gr margarin, suhu ruang
25 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Maizena
60 gr BOLA Deli Gula Halus
25 gr susu bubuk
3 butir kuning telur asin, kukus, haluskan
¼ sdt garam
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
BOLA Deli Tepung Maizena untuk pelapis

Bahan lapisan:
Wijen
100 gr air
1-2 sdm BOLA Deli Tepung Maizena

Lainnya:
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Langkah:
1. Untuk isian, campurkan margarin, telur asin, susu bubuk, garam, BOLA Deli tepung maizena, BOLA Deli gula halus, dan ekstrak vanila, aduk rata
2. Bungkus dengan plastic wrap, masukkan ke dalam kulkas minimal tiga jam 
3. Bagi isian menjadi 10 bagian, balurkan ke dalam BOLA Deli tepung maizena kemudian bulatkan  
4. Masukkan isian ke dalam freezer selama 20-30 menit 
5. Untuk kulit onde, campurkan BOLA Deli tepung ketan, gula, kentang, minyak, dan garam, aduk rata 
6. Tambahkan air panas, uleni hingga tercampur rata kemudian tutup dengan plastik wrap, diamkan selama 15-30 menit
7. Uleni adonan kulit lalu bentuk memanjang, potong menjadi 10 bagian atau 30 gram 
8. Bentuk kulit onde seperti mangkuk, isi dengan isian telur asin lalu bulatkan perlahan 
9. Campurkan air dengan tepung maizena lalu masukkan onde ke dalam air kemudian ke dalam wijen
10. Panaskan minyak, goreng onde di api kecil selama 8 menit sambil diaduk perlahan
11. Setelah mengembang, besarkan api di api sedang masak hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
12. Onde-onde isi telur asin siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Salted Egg Sesame Ball Recipe (yield 10 pcs)

Sesame Ball Dough ingredients:
40 g potato, steamed
50 g sugar
145 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
90 g hot water
10 g oil
¼ tsp salt

Salted Egg Filling:
65 g margarine, room temperature
25 g BOLA Deli Cornstarch
60 g BOLA Deli Icing Sugar
25 g powdered sugar
3 pc salted egg yolk, steamed, mashed
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
BOLA Deli Cornstarch to coat

Coating ingredients:
Sesame seed
100 g water
1-2 tbsp BOLA Deli Cornstarch

Others:
Oil to fry

Steps:
1. For the filling, combine margarine, salted egg, powdered milk, salt, BOLA Deli Cornstarch, BOLA Deli Icing Sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
2. Cover with a plastic wrap and place in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours.
2. Slice the filling into 10 parts. Coat with BOLA Deli Cornstarch and shape into balls.
4. Place the filling into the freezer for 20-30 minutes.
5. For the Sesame Ball dough, combine BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour, sugar, potato, oil, and salt. Mix well.
6. Add hot water and knead until it comes together. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 15-30 minutes.
7. Knead the dough and shape into a cylinder. Slice into 10 parts or 30 g each.
8. Shape the dough into a bowl. Add the Salted Egg filling, then wrap and seal slowly.
9. Mix water with cornstarch, then dip the Sesame Balls in it and coat with the sesame seeds.
10. Heat the oil. Fry the Sesame Balls on low heat for 8 minutes while stirring slowly.
11. Once they’re expanded, increase the heat to medium. Fry until golden brown and set aside.
12. Salted Egg Sesame Balls are ready to serve.

title: Resep AYAM BETUTU KOMPLIT Khas Bali: Empuk, Meresap Sampai Ke Dalam! [Versi Ungkep Praktis]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Betutu (untuk 6-8 porsi)

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih
3 butir kemiri
8 gr terasi
1 sdt ketumbar
¾ sdt jintan
60 ml minyak / minyak kelapa

Bumbu rajang:

40 gr lengkuas, iris
30 gr serai, iris
15 gr kencur, iris
30 gr kunyit, iris
20 gr jahe, iris
40 gr cabai merah, iris
30 gr cabai rawit merah

Bahan lainnya:
2 ekor ayam pejantan (total 1,6 kg)
1 sdm gula merah
3 lembar daun salam
5 lembar daun jeruk
½ butir pala
2 butir cengkih
1 liter air
2 sdt garam
1 ½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
½ sdt merica

Kacang panjang bejek:
250 gr kacang panjang, belah dua
2-3 sdm bumbu dasar tumis
50 ml santan
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
150 ml air

Sambal terasi:
17 buah cabai rawit merah
4 buah cabai merah, potong
10 siung bawang merah
1 buah tomat
100 ml minyak
2 sachet terasi, bakar
½ sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap

Sambal matah:
12 siung bawang merah, iris
8 buah cabai rawit merah, iris
¾ sdt terasi, bakar
3 buah jeruk limau
½ sdt garam
1 sdt gula pasir
¼ sdt penyedap
30 ml minyak panas

Pelengkap:
Kacang goreng dengan kulit
Bawang merah goreng
Bawang putih goreng
Nasi

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bawang putih, kemiri, ketumbar, jintan, terasi, dan minyak dengan blender lalu masukkan kunyit, jahe, lengkuas, serai, cabai merah, bawang merah, dan cabai rawit, haluskan kembali
2. Panaskan wajan, tumis bumbu hingga wangi kemudian masukkan pala, cengkih, daun jeruk, dan daun salam, masak hingga matang kemudian sisihkan 2-3 sdm bumbu
3. Masukkan ayam, air, garam, merica, kaldu bubuk, dan gula merah, masak hingga empuk selama  90-120 menit
4. Untuk kacang panjang bejek, panaskan wajan, masukkan sisa bumbu halus lalu masukkan kacang panjang dan air
5. Tambahkan garam, merica, dan kaldu bubuk masak hingga air sedikit menyusut lalu masukkan santan, aduk rata
6. Untuk sambal matah, campurkan bawang merah, cabai rawit merah, dan perasan jeruk limau kemudian tambahkan garam, gula, dan kaldu bubuk
7. Masukkan terasi yang telah dibakar, hancurkan lalu tambahkan minyak panas, aduk rata
8. Untuk sambal terasi, panaskan  minyak, masukkan cabai merah, bawang merah, dan cabai rawit, masak hingga sedikit layu lalu masukkan tomat
9. Pindahkan ke dalam food processor, kemudian haluskan
10. Masukkan terasi yang telah dibakar, haluskan lalu masak kembali 
11. Tambahkan garam, gula pasir, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk
12. Ayam betutu siap disajikan
