title: Makan Dengan Kulitnya! Resep UDANG CABAI GARAM: 100% Gurih Renyah! [Ala Resto]
recipe_id:
Resep Udang Cabai Garam (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan udang:
500 gr udang utuh dengan kulit
1-2 sdm putih telur
1 sdt baking powder
¾ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
6 sdm tepung maizena
2 sdt cuka
½ sdt bubuk ngohiong, opsional
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Bahan cabai garam:
10-12 siung bawang putih cincang
2-4 siung bawang merah, iris
1 batang daun bawang, iris
3 buah cabai keriting merah, iris
4 buah cabai merah, iris
⅓ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu bubuk / penyedap
½ sdt gula
½ sdm saus tiram
Minyak untuk menumis

Langkah:
1. Gunting bagian depan kepala udang, kaki, dan keluarkan kotoran udang
2. Marinasi udang dengan putih telur, baking powder, cuka, garam, merica, tepung maizena, dan bubuk ngohiong, aduk rata diamkan 10-15 menit
3. Panaskan minyak goreng udang di api besar selama satu menit, tiriskan diamkan beberapa saat lalu goreng kembali beberapa detik, tiriskan
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak lalu goreng bawang putih hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
5. Tumis bawang merah, daun bawang, cabai rawit, cabai merah, garam, merica, gula, dan saus tiram, aduk lalu masukkan udang yang telah di goreng, aduk rata
6. Taburkan bawang putih goreng
7. Udang cabe garam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spicy Salt & Pepper Shrimp Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Shrimp ingredients:
500 g whole shrimp with shell
1-2 tbsp egg white
1 tsp baking powder
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
6 tbsp cornstarch
2 tsp vinegar
½ tsp Chinese five-spice powder, optional
Oil for frying

Spicy Salt & Pepper Seasoning ingredients:
10-12 clove garlic, minced
2-4 pc shallot, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced
3 pc red curly chili, sliced
4 pc red bird’s eye chili, sliced
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
½ tsp sugar
½ tbsp oyster sauce
Oil to sauté

Steps:
1. Trim the shrimp’s head area, legs, and devein it.
2. Marinate with egg whites, baking powder, vinegar, salt, pepper, cornstarch, and Chinese five-spice powder. Mix well and marinate for 10-15 minutes.
3. Heat the oil. Fry the shrimp on high heat for 1 minute. Set aside and let it rest for a moment, then fry it again for a few seconds. Set aside.
4. Heat some oil and fry the garlic until golden. Set aside.
5. Sauté the shallots, green onions, bird’s eye chili, red chili, salt, pepper, sugar, and oyster sauce. Stir, then add the fried shrimp. Mix well.
6. Sprinkle the fried garlic on top.
7. Spicy Salt & Pepper Shrimp is ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep CHIFFON KEJU GURIH: Wangi, Anti Kempis & Anti Retak.
recipe_id:
Resep Chiffon Keju (8 pcs loyang diameter 10 cm)

Bahan A:
9 butir kuning telur (1 butir telur = 50 gr)
65 gr gula pasir
50 gr kental manis
100 ml minyak
75 ml susu
60 ml air
210 gr tepung terigu protein sedang / rendah
10 gr baking powder
1 sdt garam
1 sdm ekstrak vanila

Bahan B:
9 butir putih telur (1 butir telur = 50 gr)
130 gr gula pasir
¾ sdt cream of tartar atau 2 sdt lemon juice, opsional

Topping:
Keju

Langkah:
1. Untuk bahan A, campurkan kuning telur, kental manis, ekstrak vanila, minyak, susu dan air aduk dengan ballon whisk kemudian masukan gula pasir, aduk kembali
2. Masukan tepung terigu, baking powder dan garam yang telah disaring, aduk rata
3. Untuk bahan B, kocok putih telur, sedikit gula, dan cream of tar-tar dengan mixer, lalu masukkan kembali sisa gula pasir, mixer kembali hingga membentuk paruh burung 
4. Masukkan sedikit putih telur kedalam kuning telur, aduk kemudian masukkan ke dalam adonan putih telur, aduk
5. Masukkan adonan ke dalam loyang, kemudian isi dengan keju, tuang kembali adonan hingga 70-80%
6. Tambahkan keju parut lalu panggang dengan suhu 155-160 derajat selama 35-40 menit
7. Keluarkan cake dari panggangan lalu balikan, diamkan hingga dingin kemudian keluarkan cake dari loyang
8. Chiffon keju siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Cheese Chiffon Cake Recipe (yields 8 pieces of 10 cm pan)

Ingredients A:
9 pc egg yolk (1 pc egg = 50 g)
65 g sugar
50 g condensed milk
100 ml oil
75 ml milk
60 ml water
210 g all-purpose / cake flour
10 g baking powder
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp vanilla extract

Ingredients B:
9 pc egg white (1 pc egg = 50 g)
130 g sugar
¾ tsp cream of tartar or 2 tsp lemon juice, optional

Topping:
Cheese

Steps:
1. For Ingredients A, combine the egg yolks, condensed milk, vanilla extract, oil, milk, and water. Mix with a balloon whisk, then add sugar and mix again.
2. Add sifted flour, baking powder, and salt. Mix well.
3. For Ingredients B, beat the egg whites with some of the sugar and cream of tartar with a mixer. Add the rest of the sugar and beat until the birdbeak stage.
4. Add some of the egg white batter into the yolk batter. Mix, then add it into the egg white batter and stir.
5. Pour the batter into the pan. Fill it with cheese, then pour the batter again until it’s 70-80% full.
6. Sprinkle the grated cheese on top and bake at 155°C - 160°C for 35-40 minutes.
7. Get the cake out of the oven and turn it upside down. Let it cool, then get it out of the pan.
8. Cheese Chiffon Cake is ready to serve.

title: Favorit Keluarga! Resep PASTEL TUTUP KHAS INGGRIS [Shepherd’s / Cottage Pie, Pai Daging Cincang]
recipe_id:
Resep Shepherd's Pie (untuk 7-8 porsi)

Bahan kentang:
850 gr kentang
2 sdm mentega
1 butir kuning telur
150 ml susu
80 gr keju parmesan
¾ sdt garam
¼ sdt lada putih

Bahan isian:
450 gr daging sapi giling
3 lembar beef bacon / smoked beef, iris
1 buah bawang bombai ukuran besar, potong kotak
5 siung bawang putih halus
1-2 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
50 ml arak masak putih / red wine / wine (opsional)
1 buah tomat merah, rebus, kupas kulit, potong
300 ml air
60 gr wortel, potong kotak
70 gr kacang polong
1 batang seledri
½ sdm rosemary / mixed herbs
½ sdm bubuk paprika
2 sdm kecap inggris
3 sdm saus tomat
½ sdt kaldu bubuk
¾ sdt garam
2 sdt gula
¼ sdt merica

Langkah:
1. Potong kentang, rebus hingga matang kemudian haluskan kentang dengan saringan
2. Panaskan wajan, masukkan kentang, mentega, parutan keju, garam, lada putih, dan susu, aduk rata
3. Panaskan sedikit minyak, masukkan smoked beef dan bawang bombai, masak hingga wangi
4. Masukkan bawang putih dan daging giling, aduk rata kemudian tambahkan wortel dan tomat, aduk rata
5. Masukkan rosemary, seledri, paprika bubuk, arak masak, kecap inggris, dan saus tomat, aduk rata
6. Masukkan tepung terigu, aduk rata lalu masukkan air, garam, gula, merica, dan kaldu bubuk, aduk kembali
7. Masukkan kacang polong, masak sebentar hingga air menyusut
8. Masukkan kentang yang telah dimasak ke dalam daging, ratakan dan beri corak dengan menggunakan garpu
9. Campurkan kuning telur dengan sedikit susu, lalu oleskan di atas kentang
10. Tambahkan parutan keju lalu panggang dengan suhu 190 derajat selama 15-18 menit
11. Diamkan selama 30-60 menit sebelum dihidangkan
recipe_en:
Shepherd's Pie Recipe (yield 7-8 servings)

Mashed Potato ingredients:
850 g potato
2 tbsp butter
1 pc egg yolk
150 ml milk
80 g Parmesan cheese
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp white pepper

Filling ingredients:
450 g ground beef
3 pc beef bacon / smoked beef, sliced
1 pc onion, large, diced
5 clove garlic, minced
1-2 tbsp all-purpose flour
50 ml white cooking wine / red wine / wine (optional)
1 pc red tomato, boiled, peeled, chopped
300 ml water
60 g carrot, diced
70 g pea
1 pc celery
½ tbsp rosemary / mixed herbs
½ tbsp paprika powder
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
3 tbsp tomato sauce
½ tsp stock powder
¾ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Slice the potatoes. Boil until soft, then mash with a strainer.
2. Heat the pan. Add the potatoes, butter, grated cheese, salt, white pepper, and milk. Mix well.
3. Heat some oil. Add the smoked beef and onion. Cook until fragrant.
4. Add the garlic and ground beef. Stir, then add carrot and tomato. Mix well.
5. Add the rosemary, celery, paprika powder, cooking wine, Worcestershire sauce, and tomato sauce. Mix well.
6. Add flour in. Mix, then add water, salt, sugar, pepper, and stock powder. Stir.
7. Add the peas in. Cook for a moment until the water is reduced.
8. Add the cooked potato on top of the meat. Even it out and create a pattern with a fork.
9. Mix the yolk with a bit of milk and brush on top of the potato.
10. Add grated cheese on top, then bake at 190°C for 15-18 minutes.
11. Rest for 30-60 minutes before serving.

title: Empuk Tahan Lama! Resep ROTI GORENG ISI RAGOUT: Luar Garing Dalem Empuk.
recipe_id:
Resep Roti Goreng Isi Ragout (11 pcs)

Bahan:
275 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
30 gr gula pasir
2 sdm susu bubuk
5 gr ragi
2 butir kuning telur
145 ml susu cair dingin
50 gr mentega/ margarin
½ sdt garam

Bahan ragout:
3 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
3 sdm mentega
½ buah bawang bombai, potong kotak kecil
2 siung bawang putih halus
1 batang daun bawang, iris
1 batang seledri, iris
100 gr jagung pipil
180 gr luncheon ayam / spam / sosis
50 gr wortel, potong kotak kecil, rebus
50 gr buncis, potong kotak kecil, rebus
350 ml susu
Sejumput pala bubuk
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
½ sdt gula

Bahan lainnya:
2 butir putih telur
Tepung roti
Minyak Goreng Fortune untuk menggoreng 

Langkah:
1. Untuk  adonan, campurkan tepung, gula pasir, susu bubuk, dan ragi, aduk dengan mixer, lalu masukkan susu dan kuning telur, mixer hingga tercampur rata
2. Masukkan mentega dan garam, mixer kembali hingga kalis elastis selama 15-20 menit di kecepatan sedang-cepat
3. Setelah kalis, bulatkan adonan lalu tutup dengan plastic wrap dan istirahatkan selama 45-60 menit
4. Untuk isian, panaskan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang bombai dan bawang putih, aduk lalu tambahkan daun bawang, aduk rata
5. Masukkan luncheon ayam, jagung pipil, buncis, wortel, seledri, dan sedikit bubuk pala, aduk rata 
6. Tambahkan mentega dan tepung terigu, aduk kemudian masukkan susu, garam, merica, dan gula, masak hingga mengental, dinginkan 
7. Kempeskan adonan dan timbang masing-masing adonan 40-42 gr, kemudian bulatkan, tutup dengan plastic wrap, istirahatkan selama 5-15 menit
8. Pipihkan kembali adonan dengan menggunakan rolling pin kemudian isi dengan isian, bulatkan kembali, ulangi hingga adonan habis
9. Tutup kembali dengan plastic wrap, istirahatkan selama 15-25 menit
10. Setelah mengembang, masukkan adonan roti ke dalam putih telur lalu tepung roti
11. Panaskan Minyak Goreng Fortune, goreng roti hingga kecokelatan, tiriskan 
12. Roti goreng siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Fried Ragout Buns Recipe (11 pcs)

Ingredients:
275 g bread flour
30 g sugar
2 tbsp powdered milk
5 g yeast
2 pc egg yolk
145 ml milk, cold
50 g butter / margarine
½ tsp salt

Ragout ingredients:
3 tbsp all-purpose flour
3 tbsp butter
½ pc onion, small diced
2 clove garlic, minced
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
100 g shelled corn
180 g chicken luncheon / spam / sausage
50 g carrot, small diced and boiled
50 g green bean, small diced and boiled
350 ml milk
A pinch nutmeg powder
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp sugar

Other ingredients:
2 pc egg white
Breadcrumbs
Fortune Oil for frying

Steps:
1. For the dough, combine the flour, sugar, powdered milk, and yeast. Mix with the mixer, then add milk and egg yolks. Mix evenly.
2. Add the butter and salt. Mix again until elastic for 15-20 minutes at medium-high speed.
3. After it’s elastic, round the dough into a ball and cover it with a plastic wrap. Rest for 45-60 minutes.
4. For the filling, heat some oil and sauté the onion and garlic. Stir, then add the green onions in. Mix evenly.
5. Add the chicken luncheon, shelled corn, green beans, carrot, celery, and a bit of nutmeg powder. Mix well.
6. Add butter and flour. Stir, then add milk, salt, pepper, and sugar. Cook until it thickens, then let cool.
7. Punch the dough and weigh to 40-42 g each. Shape into a ball and cover with a plastic wrap. Rest for 5-15 minutes.
8. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin and fill. Shape into a ball once more. Repeat for all the dough.
9. Cover with a plastic wrap again. Rest for 15-25 minutes.
10. Once it’s risen, dip the bun into the egg whites then the breadcrumbs.
11. Heat the Fortune Oil and fry the buns until browned. Set aside.
12. The Fried Buns are ready to serve.

title: Resep CRISPY CHICKEN RICE: Nasi Hainan Krispi [Praktis Pakai Rice Cooker]

Resep Crispy Chicken Rice (untuk 4-5 porsi)

½ sdt garam

3 iris jahe
1 batang daun bawang, potong
1 batang akar & batang daun ketumbar

1 batang akar daun ketumbar, haluskan

1 sdm saus tiram

1 sdt gula
¼ sdt merica

Bahan lainnya:

1 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk

1 sdt baking powder
60 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdt paprika bubuk

Minyak untuk menggoreng
Sambal bangkok/ sambal nasi hainan (https://youtu.be/1xLsazlvzGc)
Timun kyuri
Daun ketumbar

Langkah:
1. Panaskan wajan, masukkan air dan kulit ayam, rebus hingga sedikit lunak kemudian potong-potong kulit masak hingga air menyusut dan minyak pada kulit keluar
2. Masukkan minyak, goreng kulit hingga kering, lalu sisihkan kulit
3. Masukkan jahe dan bawang putih, masak di api kecil 
4. Cuci bersih Leon Thai Jasmine Rice, lalu masukkan ke dalam wajan berisi minyak, aduk rata
5. Campurkan air dan kaldu ayam bubuk, aduk
6. Pindahkan beras ke dalam rice cooker, masukkan campurkan air kaldu, aduk rata
7. Tambahkan garam, masak hingga matang
8. Haluskan akar daun ketumbar dan bawang putih dengan ulekan, lalu masukkan ke dalam ayam

11. Masukkan ayam ke tepung kering, lalu tambahkan air ke sisa tepung, aduk rata
12. Tambahkan paprika bubuk, aduk kemudian masukkan ayam ke dalam tepung basah hingga rata
13. Panaskan minyak, goreng ayam hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
14. Untuk soup, siapkan wajan, masukkan air, kaldu ayam bubuk, jahe, daun bawang, akar, dan batang daun ketumbar, masak hingga mendidih
15. Crispy chicken rice siap disajikan

title: Spicy and Awesome! Recipe for NUGGET GEPREK SAMBAL PECAK: The Combination is Perfect!
recipe_id:
Resep Nugget Geprek (untuk 8-10 porsi)

Bahan:
2 bungkus Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
130 gr cabai rawit hijau
1 buah tomat, potong
60 gr bawang merah
1 siung bawang putih, opsional
1 sdt garam

2 sdt gula
2-3 sdm minyak

Bahan lainnya:
Nasi putih
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Langkah:
1. Siapkan ulekan, masukkan bawang putih, garam, penyedap, dan gula, haluskan
2. Masukkan sebagian bawang merah, haluskan lalu masukkan cabai rawit sedikit demi sedikit, haluskan kembali
3. Masukkan potongan tomat, haluskan 
4. Panaskan sedikit minyak, iris sisa bawang merah lalu goreng setengah kering kemudian masukkan ke dalam ulekan, aduk rata
5. Panaskan minyak di api besar, goreng Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget selama tiga menit, tiriskan

recipe_en:
Nugget Geprek Recipe (yield: 8-10 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pack Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget
130 g green bird’s eye chili
1 pc tomato, sliced
60 g shallot
1 clove garlic, optional
1 tsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer
2 tsp sugar
2-3 tbsp oil

Other ingredients:
Rice
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Prepare a stone bowl. Add the garlic, salt, flavor enhancer, and sugar. Mash.
2. Add half of the shallots. Mash, then add the bird’s eye chili bit by bit. Mash again.
3. Add the sliced tomato in and mash.
4. Heat some oil. Slice the remaining shallots, then fry until half-crisp. Add into the Sambal and mix.
5. Heat oil on high heat and fry Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget for 3 minutes. Drain.
6. Transfer the Kanzler Crispy Chicken Nugget into the stone bowl, then mash with the Sambal.
7. Nugget Geprek Sambal Pecak is ready to serve.

title: HANYA 6 BAHAN! Resep BOLEN PISANG LILIT Legit Rasanya
recipe_id:
Resep Bolen Pisang Lilit (6 pcs)

Bahan:
100 gr gula pasir
300 ml air
1-2 sdm mentega wijsman
6 buah pisang raja / kepok / tanduk
⅓ sdt garam
Danish pastry
Keju
Meses
Kuning telur untuk olesan

Langkah:
1. Panaskan wajan, masukkan gula dan air masak hingga gula larut lalu masukkan pisang dan garam, masak hingga mengental
2. Masukkan mentega, balikan pisang di kedua sisi, dinginkan
3. Setelah dingin, belah pisang lalu isi dengan keju parut dan pisang lainnya dengan meses
4. Pipihkan danish pastry dengan sedikit taburan tepung terigu menggunakan rolling pin
5. Bagi menjadi enam bagian kemudian lilitkan ke dalam pisang
6. Olesi dengan kuning telur, taburkan meses dan keju parut
7. Panggang dengan menggunakan air fryer selama 10-12 menit dengan suhu 170-180 derajat
8. Bolen pisang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Banana Twist Pastry Recipe (6 pcs)

Ingredients:
100 g sugar
300 ml water
1-2 tbsp Wijsman butter
6 pc pisang raja / saba / plantain
⅓ tsp salt
Danish pastry
Cheese
Chocolate rice
Yolks for egg wash

Steps:
1. Heat the pan. Add sugar and water, and boil until the sugar is dissolved. Then, add the banana and salt, and cook until it thickens.
2. Add the butter. Flip the bananas and cook on both sides. Let it cool.
3. After it’s cooled down, halve the banana and fill it with grated cheese or chocolate rice.
4. Dust the danish pastry with flour and roll it with a rolling pin.
5. Slice into 6 strips, then twist it around the banana.
6. Brush with the egg wash. Sprinkle with chocolate rice and grated cheese.
7. Bake with an air fryer for 10-12 minutes at 170°C-180°C.
8. Banana Twist Pastry is ready to serve.

title: Istimewa! Resep KUE BUGIS MANDI TARO [Kue Putri Mandi]
recipe_id:
Resep Kue Bugis Mandi Taro (25-30 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
275 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Ketan
125 gr talas, kukus, haluskan
125 ml air mendidih
2 sdm susu bubuk vanilla
130-140 ml santan instan
Perisa taro secukupnya 

Bahan isian:
200 gr kelapa parut segar
150 gr gula pasir
½ sdt garam
½ sdt vanila ekstrak tidak berwarna
2 lembar daun pandan 

Bahan vla santan:
200 gr santan instan (kental)
200 gr air
20 gr BOLA Deli Tepung Maizena
2 lembar daun pandan
1/2 sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Untuk isian, panaskan wajan, masukkan air, daun pandan, gula, dan vanila ekstrak, aduk hingga larut lalu masukkan kelapa parut dan garam, masak hingga air menyusut
2. Setelah dingin, bentuk bulat isian 
3. Untuk adonan kulit bugis, kukus talas, hancurkan, lalu saring hingga halus 
4. Di mangkuk terpisah, campurkan BOLA Deli Tepung Ketan, susu bubuk, aduk kemudian tambahkan air panas, aduk rata
5. Masukkan talas, perisa taro, dan santan secara perlahan, aduk kembali hingga menyatu
6. Bentuk memanjang adonan, lalu potong dan bentuk bulat
7. Pipihkan lalu masukan isian, rapatkan kembali hingga berbentuk bulat, kukus hingga matang
8. Untuk vla santan, campurkan santan, garam, BOLA Deli Tepung Maizena, dan pandan masak hingga mengental
9. Bagi menjadi dua, tambahkan secukupnya perisa taro ke dalam satu bagian, aduk rata
10. Siapkan cetakan atau mangkuk pudding, masukkan kue bugis dan vla santan
11. Kue bugis mandi siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Taro Bugis Mandi Recipe (30 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
275 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
125 g taro, steamed and mashed
125 ml boiling water
2 tbsp vanilla powdered milk
130-140 ml instant coconut milk
Taro paste, to taste

Filling ingredients:
200 g freshly grated coconut
150 g sugar
½ tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla extract, colorless
2 pc pandan leaf

Coconut Sauce ingredients:
200 g instant coconut milk
200 g water
20 g BOLA Deli Cornstarch
2 pc pandan leaf
½ tsp salt

Steps:
1. For the filling, heat the pan and add water, pandan leaves, sugar, and vanilla extract. Stir until the sugar is dissolved, then add grated coconut and salt. Cook until the water is reduced.
2. Once it’s cooled, shape into balls.
3. For the Bugs dough, steam the taro and mash. Strain to a smooth paste.
4. In a separate bowl, add BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour and powdered milk. Stir, then pour the hot water in. Mix well.
5. Add the taro, taro paste, and coconut milk slowly. Mix until the dough comes together.
6. Shape the dough into cylinders. Divide and shape into balls.
7. Flatten the dough and fill it. Seal the dough and shape it into a ball again. Steam until cooked.
8. For the Coconut Sauce, combine the coconut milk, salt, BOLA Deli Cornstarch, and pandan leaves. Cook until thickened.
9. Divide the sauce into two. Add taro paste, to taste, into one of them and mix.
10. Prepare a cup or a bowl. Add the Bugis Mandi and Coconut Sauce in.
11. Bugis Mandi is ready to serve.

title: Resep BAKSO ‘IKAN’ KOREA: Ekonomis Pakai Ayam & Tahu [Korean Fish Cake]
recipe_id:
Resep ‘Fish’ Cake Ayam Kuah (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan kuah:
1 buah bawang bombai, potong
2 buah daun bawang, potong
5 gr wakame / kombu
½ sdm ikan teri kering
½ sdm ebi kering
1-2 buah jamur shitake kering
1 buah lobak besar, potong
2-3 liter air
Bumbu-bumbu sesuai selera

Bahan ‘fish’ cake ayam:
350 gr dada ayam fillet
2 sdt garam
1 sdm gula
2 sdt kaldu / penyedap
1 butir putih telur
2 sdt baking powder (BUKAN baking soda)
200 gr tahu telur sutra tube
¼ buah bawang bombai atau 2 sdt onion powder
1-2 siung bawang putih atau 1 sdt garlic powder
50 gr tepung maizena / tepung sagu / tepung tapioka
70 ml air dingin
Bubuk ikan teri, sesuai selera
15 gr wortel, potong kotak kecil
25 gr paprika merah, potong kotak kecil
20 gr paprika hijau, potong kotak kecil
Merica sesuai selera

Bahan sambal teri:
8 buah cabai rawit merah
1 sdm bubuk cabai
6 siung bawang putih
1 batang daun bawang
2-3 sdm ikan teri kering
1 sdt kecap asin
1 sdt gula
½ sdt penyedap
1 sdm minyak wijen
Minyak untuk menumis

Lainnya:
Mie somen
Sawi putih

Langkah:
1. Untuk kuah, panaskan wajan, masukkan ikan teri dan ebi, sangrai hingga harum lalu masukkan bawang bombai, daun bawang, aduk
2. tambahkan air, lobak, wakame, dan jamur shitake kering, rebus selama 30-40 menit
3. Untuk adonan, blender ayam, garam, gula, penyedap, dan baking powder hingga lengket lalu tambahkan bawang putih, bawang bombai, tahu, haluskan kembali
4. Masukkan putih telur, air es, tepung maizena, dan merica, haluskan hingga tercampur rata, tambahkan bubuk ikan teri
5. Bagi adonan menjadi dua, masukkan wortel, paprika merah, dan hijau ke dalam satu adonan, aduk rata
6. Panaskan minyak di api sedang, bentuk bulat adonan dengan sendok yang sudah diberi minyak, kemudian goreng hingga sedikit kecokelatan, tiriskan
7. Untuk sambal teri, panaskan minyak, masukkan ikan teri hingga setengah kering, lalu masukkan cabai bubuk, daun bawang, bawang putih, cabai rawit, aduk lalu tambahkan kecap asin, gula, penyedap, dan minyak wijen, aduk rata
8. Saring kuah, lalu pisahkan sebagian kuah ke dalam wajan, nyalakan api lalu masukkan sawi putih, mie, dan ‘fish’ cake ayam kemudian masukkan bumbu-bumbu sesuai selera
recipe_en:

title: Sehat Praktis! Resep SAMGYETANG: Sup Ayam Ginseng Khas Korea
recipe_id:
Resep Samgyetang (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan:
2 ekor ayam utuh ukuran kecil @500-600 gr
8-10 sdm beras ketan putih, rendam air
6 siung bawang putih
2 pcs jujube
1 sdt Cheong Kwan Jang Korean Red Ginseng & Honey Paste
Rempah samgyetang
1,5 liter air kaldu
300 ml air rendaman beras ketan

Bahan kaldu:
1 ekor ayam utuh, potong kecil-kecil
2 liter air

Side dish:
1,5 sdt garam
1 sdt merica
2 sdm minyak wijen
2 sdt biji wijen sangrai

Lainnya:
Daun bawang
Jujube

Langkah:
1. Cuci beras ketan lalu rendam selama 2 jam, saring
2. Untuk kaldu ayam, rebus ayam yang telah dipotong hingga mendidih, bilas dengan air, kemudian presto selama 1 jam, saring
3. Cuci ayam lalu keringkan dengan lap atau tisu kemudian potong bagian ayam yang berlemak
4. Isi ayam dengan beras ketan, lalu masukkan jujube, bawang putih, beras ketan, dan Cheong Kwan Jang Korean Red Ginseng & Honey Paste
5. Siapkan panci, masukkan rempah, ayam, air rendaman ketan, dan kaldu ayam, rebus di api sedang besar selama 60 menit  
6. Pindahkan ayam ke dalam mangkuk beserta air rebusan, tambahkan daun bawang dan jujube, masak kembali beberapa saat
7. Di mangkuk terpisah, campurkan garam, merica, biji wijen, dan minyak wijen, aduk rata
8. Samgyetang siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Samgyetang Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc whole chicken, small (@500-600 g)
8-10 tbsp white glutinous rice, soaked
6 clove garlic
2 pc jujube
1 tsp Cheong Kwan Jang Korean Red Ginseng & Honey Paste
1.5 L stock
300 ml glutinous rice soaking water

Stock ingredients:
1 pc whole chicken, chop into small cuts
2 L water

Dipping Sauce:
1.5 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper
2 tbsp sesame oil
2 tsp toasted sesame seeds

Others:
Green onions
Jujube

Steps:
1. Wash the glutinous rice and soak for 2 hours. Drain and collect the water.
2. For the chicken stock, bring the chopped chicken to a boil. Remove the water and rinse, then cook in the pressure cooker for 1 hour. Drain and collect the water.
3. Clean the chicken and pat dry with a clean cloth or paper towels. Trim the fatty parts.
4. Fill the chicken with the glutinous rice, then add jujube, garlic, glutinous rice, and Cheong Kwan Jang Korean Red Ginseng & Honey Paste.
5. Prepare the pot and add the spices, the chicken, glutinous rice soaking water, and chicken stock. Boil on a medium-high heat for 60 minutes.
6. Plate the chicken into a stone bowl with the soup. Add green onions and jujube. Cook it again for a moment.
7. In a separate bowl, mix the salt, pepper, sesame seeds, and sesame oil. Mix well.
8. Samgyetang is ready to serve.

title: Resep WAFFLE: Luar Garing Dalem Fluffy Empuk Kopong!
recipe_id:
Resep Waffle (untuk 6-7 pcs)

Bahan:
120 gr tepung terigu serbaguna
20 gr tepung maizena
3 gr ragi
½ sdt garam
½ sdt baking powder
240 ml susu
60 gr mentega wijsman
½ butir telur
½ sdt ekstrak vanila
1 ½ sdm susu bubuk
1-2 sdm Gula dapat ditambahkan sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Hangatkan susu dengan microwave lalu tambahkan mentega, aduk hingga mentega mencair
2. Pindahkan ke mangkuk besar, masukkan vanilla ekstrak, garam, baking powder, telur, dan ragi, aduk
3. Masukan tepung maizena, susu bubuk, dan terigu, aduk kembali, tutup dengan plastic wrap diamkan selama 60-90 menit
4. Panaskan cetakan waffle, tuang waffle, panggang di api kecil sedang hingga kecokelatan
5. Waffle siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Waffle Recipe (yield: 6-7 pcs)

Ingredients:
120 g cake flour
17 g cornstarch
3 g yeast
½ tsp salt
½ tsp baking powder
250 ml milk
60 g Wijsman
½ pc egg
½ tsp vanilla extract
1.5 tbsp powdered milk

Steps:
1. Heat the milk in the microwave. Add butter and stir until the butter melts.
2. Transfer to a large bowl. Add vanilla extract, salt, baking powder, egg, and yeast. Stir.
3. Add cornstarch, powdered milk, and flour. Mix and cover with plastic wrap. Rest for 60-90 minutes.
4. Heat the waffle maker. Pour the batter in and cook on low heat until browned.
5. The Waffle is ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep DONAT MINI Empuk, Lembut, Tahan Lama [Tanpa Mixer & Ulen]
recipe_id:
Resep Mini Donut (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
70 ml susu
90 ml air
50 gr mentega
¼ sdt garam
½ sdm gula
75 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
2 butir telur
½ sdt baking powder

Isian:
Cherries & Berries Preserve
Lemon Curd
Strawberry Preserve with Champagne

Bahan pelengkap:
30 gr gula pasir
Bubuk kayu manis, secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan, panaskan air, susu, dan mentega, aduk lalu tambahkan garam dan gula, masak hingga mendidih
2. Masukkan tepung terigu, masak di api kecil sambil diaduk, lalu pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk, dinginkan
3. Setelah dingin masukkan baking powder dan telur satu per satu sambil diaduk hingga rata kemudian masukkan ke dalam piping bag
4. Panaskan minyak, goreng donat di api kecil hingga 8-10 menit, tiriskan 
5. Masukkan gula pasir dan kayu manis bubuk, aduk rata kemudian masukkan isian cherries & berries preserve, lemon curd, dan strawberry preserve with champagne
6. Mini donut siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Mini Donut Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
70 ml milk
90 ml water
50 g butter
¼ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
75 g all-purpose flour
2 pc egg
½ tsp baking powder

Filling:
Cherries & Berries Preserve
Lemon Curd
Strawberry Preserve with Champagne

Others:
30 g sugar
Cinnamon powder, to taste

Steps:
1. For the dough, heat water, milk, and butter. Stir, then add salt and sugar. Bring to a boil.
2. Add flour and cook on low heat while stirring, then transfer to a bowl. Let cool.
3. Once it’s cooled, add baking powder and eggs one by one while stirring. Once mixed evenly, transfer to a piping bag.
4. Heat the oil and fry the donuts on low heat for 8 - 10 minutes. Drain.
5. Coat with the sugar and cinnamon powder mix evenly. Fill with cherries & berries preserve, lemon curd, and strawberry preserve with champagne.
6. Mini Donut is ready to serve.

title: Fried Chicken and Shrimp Meatball Recipe: Crispy, Hollow, and Soft!
recipe_id:
Resep Bakso Goreng (12 pcs)

Bahan minyak ayam bawang (bisa diganti minyak polos + bawang merah goreng siap pakai):
70 gr kulit ayam
3 sdm air
3 sdm Minyak Goreng Fortune
6-7 siung bawang merah ukuran besar, iris
1 sdm ebi, rendam air hangat

Bahan adonan:
250 gr paha ayam fillet
150 gr udang cincang
4 siung bawang putih halus
½ sdt merica
1 sdt garam
2 sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdm gula
2 ½ sdt baking powder
1 sdm kecap ikan
1-2 sdm minyak
1 butir telur
70 gr air es / es serut
110 gr tepung tapioka
25 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
25 gr tepung beras

Lainnya:
Minyak Goreng Fortune untuk menggoreng

Langkah:
1. Panaskan wajan, masukkan air dan kulit ayam, rebus hingga air menyusut kemudian gunting-gunting kulit ayam
2. Masukkan bawang merah, ebi, dan minyak goreng Fortune, masak hingga kering kemudian pisahkan minyak dengan campuran kulit ayam 
3. Untuk adonan blender ayam, campuran kulit ayam, garam, gula, kaldu jamur, merica, baking powder, dan bawang putih hingga halus
4. Masukkan telur, haluskan kembali kemudian pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk
5. Masukkan udang, aduk rata lalu tambahkan kecap ikan, air es sedikit demi sedikit, dan minyak ayam bawang, aduk rata
6. Masukkan tepung tapioka, tepung beras, dan tepung terigu, aduk rata
7. Panaskan minyak goreng Fortune, bentuk bulat bakso dengan scoop ice cream, lalu goreng di api  kecil selama 15-20 menit hingga kuning kecokelatan, lalu besarkan kompor di api sedang goreng kembali 20-30 menit, tiriskan
8. Bakso goreng siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Bakso Goreng Recipe (yield 12 pcs)

Fragrant Chicken Oil ingredients (or use oil + ready-made fried shallots):
70 g chicken skin
3 tbsp water
3 tbsp Fortune Oil
6-7 pc shallot, large, sliced
1 tbsp dried shrimp, soaked in warm water

Dough ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh fillet
150 g shrimp, chopped
4 clove garlic, minced
½ tsp pepper
1 tsp salt
2 tsp mushroom stock powder
½ tbsp sugar
2.5 tsp baking powder
1 tbsp fish sauce
1-2 tbsp oil
1 pc egg
70 g cold water / shaved ice
100 g tapioca flour
25 g all-purpose flour
25 g rice flour

Others:
Fortune Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Heat the pan. Add water and chicken skin. Boil until the water is reduced, then cut the chicken skin.
2. Add the shallots, dried shrimp, and Fortune oil. Cook until they’re crisp, then separate the oil with the chicken skin mix.
3. To make the dough, blend the chicken fillet, chicken skin mix, salt, sugar, mushroom stock powder, pepper, baking powder, and garlic until smooth.
4. Add the egg in and blend again, then transfer to a bowl.
5. Add the shrimp in. Mix well, then add fish sauce, cold water bit by bit, and fragrant chicken oil. Mix well.
6. Add the tapioca flour, rice flour, and all-purpose flour. Mix well.
7. Heat the Fortune Oil. Shape the dough into balls with an ice cream scoop, then fry on low heat for 15-20 minutes until yellowish brown. Then, turn the heat up to medium heat and continue frying for 20-30 minutes. Set aside.
8. Bakso Goreng is ready to serve.

title: Anti-Clumping! Recipe for Savory Purple Potato Rice with Rice Cooker: Fluffy, Fragrant, Practical!
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Gurih Ubi Ungu (2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
225 gr beras
320 ml air
2 sdm santan
½ sdm margarin
2 sdm minyak
4 siung bawang merah
2 siung bawang putih
2 cm jahe, iris
1 batang serai, potong
1 lembar daun pandan, potong
1 lembar daun jeruk
½ sdt garam
½ sdt penyedap / kaldu ayam
¼ sdt merica
35 gr ubi ungu, iris korek api

Langkah:
1. Blender bawang putih,bawang merah dan minyak hingga halus, lalu tumis hingga wangi
2. Masukkan serai, jahe dan merica, aduk lalu tambahkan daun pandan dan daun jeruk, aduk sebentar lalu matikan api
3. Masukkan beras dan air ke dalam rice cooker, lalu masukkan ubi ungu, bumbu halus, santan,garam, penyedap dan margarin, masak hingga matang
4. Nasi gurih ubi ungu siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Ube Savory Rice Recipe (yield 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
225 g rice
320 ml water
2 tbsp coconut milk
½ tbsp margarine
2 tbsp oil
4 pc shallot
2 clove garlic
2 cm ginger, sliced
1 pc lemongrass, sliced
1 pc pandan leaf, sliced
1 pc kaffir lime leaf
½ tsp salt
½ tsp flavor enhancer / chicken powder
¼ tsp pepper
35 gr ube, sliced into matchsticks

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, and oil until smooth. Sauté until fragrant.
2. Add the lemongrass, ginger, and pepper. Stir, then add the pandan leaf and lime leaf. Stir for a moment, then turn the heat off.
3. Add the rice and water into the rice cooker. Then, add the ube, blended spices, coconut milk, salt, flavor enhancer, and margarine. Cook thoroughly.
4. Ube Savory Rice is ready to serve.

title: TANPA Cetakan! Resep KUE AWUG / KUE PUTU: Empuk, Gurih, Manis!
recipe_id:
Resep Awug / Ombus-ombus Tapanuli (14 pcs)

Bahan:
200 gr tepung beras
250 gr kelapa parut
50 gr tepung ketan
50 ml air
1 sdt garam
½ sdt vanili bubuk
160 gr gula aren
Daun pisang
5 lembar daun pandan

Langkah:
1. Kukus tepung beras dengan satu lembar daun pandan selama 20-25 menit, 
2. Setelah dingin, campurkan tepung beras dengan tepung ketan, aduk kemudian tambahkan kelapa parut, aduk rata
3. Campurkan air, garam dan vanili bubuk, aduk rata lalu masukkan ke dalam campuran tepung, aduk kembali
4. Siapkan daun pisang dan cetakan mangkuk berukuran kecil, gunting daun pisang seukuran mangkuk
5. Masukkan adonan tepung beras, gula aren lalu masukkan kembali adonan, padatkan kemudian pindahkan ke daun pisang 
6. Panaskan kukusan, masukkan daun pandan ke dalam air kukusan, kukus selama 10 menit
7. Belah memanjang daun pisang, bentuk kerucut lalu masukkan adonan tepung ¾ penuh, isi dengan gula aren, masukkan kembali adonan tepung, padatkan, tutup kemudian sematkan tusuk gigi
8. Kukus selama 15 menit 
9. Hidangan siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Awug / Ombus-ombus Tapanuli Recipe (yield 14 pcs)

Ingredients:
200 g rice flour
250 g grated coconut
50 g glutinous rice flour
50 ml water
1 tsp salt
½ tsp vanilla powder
160 g palm sugar
Banana leaf
5 pc pandan leaf

Steps:
1. Steam the rice flour with a piece of pandan leaf for 20-25 minutes.
2. Once it cools, mix in the glutinous rice flour and stir. Then, add the grated coconut in and mix well.
3. Mix water, salt, and vanilla powder evenly, then add into the flour mix and stir.
4. Prepare the banana leaves and a small cup. Cut the leaves into the size of the cup.
5. Add the flour mix, then the palm sugar, and cover with the flour mix. Pack it in, then unmold onto the banana leaf.
6. Heat the steamer and add pandan leaves into the water. Steam the Awug for 10 minutes.
7. Tear the banana leaves lengthwise. Shape it into a cone, then add the flour mix until ¾ full, fill it with palm sugar, and cover with more flour mix. Pack it in, fold the leaf close, and secure with a toothpick.
8. Steam for 15 minutes.
9. The dish is ready to serve.

title: TANPA Oven! Resep KLAPPERTAART Gurih, Wangi, Lembut.
recipe_id:
Resep Klappertaart (untuk 4-6 porsi)

Bahan:
250 ml air kelapa
250 ml susu
3 butir kuning telur
30 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
15 gr tepung ketan / maizena
20-30 gr gula pasir
¼ sdt garam
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
50 gr kental manis
85 gr mentega

Bahan isian & topping:
70 gr kacang kenari, sangrai
60 gr kismis
30 ml rum
30 ml air
300 gr daging kelapa muda
Bubuk kayu manis
Vicenzovo Ladyfinger
Air kelapa untuk celup ladyfinger

Meringue, opsional
3 butir putih telur
90 gr gula pasir
¼ sdt garam
½ sdt cream of tartar

Langkah:
1. Rendam kismis dengan rum dan air, aduk
2. Panaskan susu dan air kelapa, lalu di wadah terpisah, campurkan kuning telur, kental manis, gula pasir, ekstrak vanila, garam, tepung terigu, dan tepung beras ketan, aduk
3. Tuang campuran air kelapa ke dalam campuran terigu perlahan sambil diaduk kemudian masak kembali hingga mengental
4. Masukkan kelapa muda, kacang kenari, kismis, dan mentega, aduk rata
5. Celupkan Vicenzovo lady finger ke dalam air kelapa, pindahkan ke dalam wadah lalu masukkan klappertaart 
6. Untuk meringue, siapkan air mendidih dan stainless bowl, campurkan putih telur dengan gula, aduk hingga gula larut dan putih telur menjadi panas, angkat
7. Masukkan garam dan cream of tartar, lalu kocok dengan mixer hingga mengembang kemudian masukkan ke dalam piping bag
8. masukkan meringue ke dalam mangkuk klappertaart lalu torch
9. Masukkan sisa kacang kenari, kismis, dan taburkan kayu manis bubuk di atasnya
10. Simpan di dalam kulkas minimal 2 jam sebelum di konsumsi
 
Jangan lupa cek Instagram @kartikawiraadisukses
Instagram: https://instagram.com/kartikawiraadisukses/
Website: https://kartikawira.com/
Tokopedia: https://tokopedia.com/pt-kartikawira/?ltclid=
Shopee: https://shopee.co.id/officialkartikawiraadisukses/?ltclid=
recipe_en:
Klappertaart Recipe (yield 4-6 servings)

Ingredients:
250 ml coconut water
250 ml milk
3 pc egg yolk
30 g all-purpose flour
15 g glutinous rice flour / cornstarch
20-30 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
50 g condensed milk
85 g butter

Filling & Topping ingredients:
70 g kenari nuts, toasted
60 g raisin
30 ml rum
30 ml water
300 g coconut
Cinnamon powder
Vicenzovo Ladyfinger
Coconut water to dip the ladyfinger

Meringue, optional
3 pc egg whites
90 g sugar
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp cream of tartar

Steps:
1. Soak the raisins with rum and water. Stir.
2. Heat the milk and coconut water. In a separate bowl, mix the egg yolks, condensed milk, sugar, vanilla extract, salt, flour, and glutinous rice flour.
3. Pour the coconut water mix into the yolk mix slowly while stirring. Cook again until thickens.
4. Add the coconut, kenari nuts, raisins, and butter. Stir.
5. Dip Vicenzovo Ladyfinger into coconut water. Arrange in a bowl and pour the custard in.
6. For the meringue, prepare boiling water and a stainless bowl. Add egg whites and sugar in. Stir until the sugar is dissolved and the egg whites become hot. Remove from heat.
7. Add salt and cream of tartar, then beat with a mixer until it expands. Transfer to a piping bag.
8. Pipe the meringue onto the Klappertaart, then torch it.
9. Add the rest of the kenari nuts, raisins, and dust with cinnamon powder on top.
10. Chill in the fridge for at least 2 hours before consuming.

title: Snow Sticky Rice Braided DONUT Recipe: Chewy, Sweet, Savory! [CHEAP Not Cheap]
recipe_id:
Resep Kue Kepang Ketan (18-20 pcs)

Bahan:

60 ml santan kental

3. Panaskan minyak, goreng kue kepang di api sedang-besar hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan

recipe_en:
Glutinous Rice Kue Kepang Recipe (yield: 18-20 pcs)

Ingredients:
150 ml water
60 ml thick coconut milk
175 g BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour
68 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp baking powder
½ tsp salt

Other ingredients:
100 g sugar
2-3 tbsp water
2 pc pandan leaf, sliced

Steps:
1. Mix BOLA Deli Glutinous Rice Flour with flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir, then add water and coconut milk. Knead until the dough comes together.
2. Shape the dough into a long cylinder and slice. Get a piece of dough, roll into a long cylinder, connect the ends, then twist it slowly. Repeat for all the dough.
3. Heat the oil and fry Kue Kepang on medium-high heat until golden brown. Set aside.
4. Heat the pan. Add sugar and water, then cook until the sugar is dissolved and thickens. Add the Kue Kepang and pandan leaves in. Stir until the sugar crystallizes
5. Kue Kepang is ready to serve.

title: Resep MISOA GORENG: Gurih Lembut Cocok Untuk Camilan Anak! [Ekonomis Bisa Buat Jualan]
recipe_id:
Bikin misoa goreng biasa jadi kekinian dengan menggunakan Kanzler Cheese Cocktail. Rasanya makin kaya, gurih asin dan manis di setiap gigitan, cocok banget buat ide jualan.

Resep Misoa Goreng (25 pcs)

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih
7 siung bawang merah
1 sdt lada putih utuh
Minyak

Bahan misoa goreng:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail, belah dua, sayat menyilang
200 gr misoa
1 buah wortel, parut
1 batang daun bawang, iris
1 batang seledri, iris
150 gr ayam suwir
2 sdm saus tiram
½ sdm garam
1 sdm gula
½ sdm penyedap
1,2 liter air 

Bahan lainnya:
3 butir telur
Minyak untuk menggoreng
Tepung terigu protein sedang 

Bahan pelengkap:
Cabai rawit hijau

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bawang merah, bawang putih, lada putih, dan minyak dengan blender 
2. Tumis hingga wangi lalu masukkan daun bawang, seledri, ayam suwir, tumis sebentar kemudian masukkan wortel, saus tiram, air, dan misoa, aduk rata
3. Tambahkan garam, gula, dan penyedap, masak hingga air menyusut lalu pindahkan ke dalam cetakan yang sudah dialasi kertas roti
4. Masukkan Kanzler Cheese Cocktail ke dalam misoa, lalu diamkan di suhu ruang hingga dingin atau di dalam kulkas 
5. Potong kotak misoa kemudian masukkan ke dalam tepung terigu lalu telur
6. Panaskan minyak, goreng misoa hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
7. Misoa goreng siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Fried Misua Recipe (yield 25 pcs)

Blended Spices ingredients:
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
1 tsp whole white pepper
Oil

Fried Misua ingredients:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail, halve and make a cross
200 g misua
1 pc carrot, shred
1 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
150 g shredded chicken
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp flavor enhancer
1.2 L water

Others:
3 pc egg
Oil for frying
All-purpose flour

Condiments:
Green bird’s eye chili

Steps:
1. Blend the shallots, garlic, white pepper, and oil.
2. Sauté until fragrant. Then, add green onions, celery, and shredded chicken. Stir-fry shortly, then add the carrot, oyster sauce, water, and misua. Mix well.
3. Season with salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Cook until the water is absorbed, then transfer to a mold lined with baking paper.
4. Add Kanzler Cheese Cocktail into the Misua, then let cool at room temperature or in the fridge.
5. Slice the Misua, then coat with flour and dip in the eggs.
6. Heat the oil and fry the Misua until golden brown. Set aside.
7. Fried Misua is ready to serve.

title: JELLYFISH CHICKEN SALAD Recipe: 2nd Place MasterChef Indonesia S8 [feat. Nadya]
recipe_id:
Resep Jellyfish Salad Roll (untuk 1 porsi)

Wortel, iris
Lobak, iris
Timun, kupas, iris
Paprika merah, iris
Daun ketumbar
50 gr paha ayam
30 gr jamur kuping
30 gr ubur ubur, potong

Bahan saus:
2 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm black vinegar
1 ½ sdm minyak wijen
1 sdm chili oil
1 sdt gula

Lainnya:
Lemon
Bihun
Wijen hitam
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Langkah:
1. Rebus ubur-ubur dan jamur kuping, kemudian bilas ubur-ubur hingga dua kali, tiriskan
2. Rebus  ayam hingga matang,tiriskan kemudian suwir ayam 
3. Untuk saus campurkan semua bahan, aduk hingga gula larut
4. Susun sayuran yang telah dipotong memanjang mulai dari lobak, wortel, timun, paprika merah, ayam, jamur kuping,ubur-ubur dan daun ketumbar kemudian gulung
5. Siapkan minyak, goreng bihun hingga mekar, tiriskan
6. Jellyfish salad roll siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Jellyfish Salad Roll Recipe (yield 1 serving)

Carrot, sliced
Daikon, sliced
Cucumber, peeled and sliced
Red bell pepper, peeled and sliced
Cilantro
50 g chicken thigh
30 g wood ear mushroom
30 g jellyfish, sliced

Dressing ingredients:
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp black vinegar
1.5 tbsp sesame oil
1 tbsp chili oil
1 tsp sugar

Others:
Lemon
Vermicelli
Black sesame seeds
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Boil the jellyfish and wood ear mushroom. Rinse the jellyfish twice and drain.
2. Boil the chicken until cooked, then shred.
3. For the dressing, mix all the ingredients and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Assemble the sliced vegetables, starting from the daikon, carrot, cucumber, red bell pepper, chicken, wood ear mushroom, jellyfish, and cilantro. Then, roll it.
5. Prepare the oil and fry the vermicelli until it expands. Set aside.
6. Jellyfish Salad Roll is ready to serve.

title: Resep ES MERAH DELIMA Versi Thailand: Juara MasterChef Indonesia S8 [feat. Jesselyn]
recipe_id:
Resep Es Merah Delima Khas Thailand (untuk 2 porsi)

Bahan:
3 buah nangka, kupas potong
30 gr kelapa muda
100 gr tepung tapioka
30 gr chestnuts kaleng, potong kotak kecil
10 tetes pewarna merah
Air untuk merebus
Es serut
Tepung tapioka

Bahan saus santan:
130 ml santan
Garam secukupnya
1 lembar daun pandan

Bahan sirup gula:
100 gr gula
250 ml air
2 lembar daun pandan

Langkah:
1. Rendam chestnuts dengan air dan pewarna merah, diamkan selama 15 menit lalu tiriskan
2. Masukkan tepung tapioka, aduk rata kemudian rebus hingga matang, dinginkan
3. Untuk sirup gula, panaskan wajan, masukkan gula, air, dan daun pandan, masak hingga gula larut, dinginkan
4. Untuk saus santan, panaskan wajan, masukkan santan, garam, dan daun pandan, aduk rata
5. Siapkan gelas, masukkan nangka, chestnuts, kelapa muda, es serut, sirup gula dan saus santan
6. Es merah delima khas Thailand siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Thailand Es Merah Delima Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Ingredients:
3 pc jackfruit, peel and slice
30 g coconut
100 g tapioca flour
30 g canned water chestnuts, slice into small cubes
10 drop red food coloring
Water to boil
Shaved ice
Tapioca flour

Coconut Cream ingredients:
130 ml coconut milk
Salt, to taste
1 pc pandan leaf

Sugar Syrup ingredients:
100 g sugar
250 ml water
2 pc pandan leaf

Steps:
1. Soak the chestnuts with water and red food coloring for 15 minutes, then drain.
2. Add the tapioca flour in. Mix evenly and boil until cooked. Let cool.
3. For the Sugar Syrup, heat the pan and add sugar, water, and pandan leaves. Cook until the sugar is dissolved. Let cool.
4. For the Coconut Cream, heat the pan and add coconut milk, salt, and pandan leaf. Mix well.
5. Prepare a glass. Add the jackfruit, chestnuts, coconut, shaved ice, sugar syrup, and coconut cream in.
6. Thai Es Merah Delima is ready to serve.

title: Resep AYAM TIM JAHE: Gurihnya Meresap! [Pek Cam Kee]
recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Tim Jahe (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan kuah:
1 ekor ayam kampung
2 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu / penyedap, opsional
1 sdm gula
½ sdt merica
1 batang daun bawang
1-2 jempol jahe, iris
1 sdm arak masak putih / sake, opsional

Bahan minyak bawang putih jahe:
93 gr bawang putih, haluskan
70 gr jahe, haluskan
½ sdm minyak wijen
60 ml minyak

Pelengkap:
Kecap asin
Cabai merah, iris tipis
Daun bawang besar, iris tipis
Daun ketumbar
Timun, kupas, potong

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ayam, lalu campurkan garam, gula, kaldu, merica dengan arak masak, aduk rata
2. Marinasi ayam mulai dari bagian dalam ayam kemudian masukkan daun bawang dan jahe
3. Bungkus ayam dengan kertas roti lalu bungkus kembali dengan aluminium foil, kukus selama 60-80 menit di api besar
4. Untuk saus jahe, panaskan minyak, masukkan bawang putih, masak hingga wangi kemudian kecilkan api, masukkan jahe, masak hingga kering
5. Matikan api, tambahkan minyak wijen, aduk rata
6. Keluarkan ayam dari kukusan, sisihkan ekstrak ayam ke dalam mangkuk lalu potong-potong ayam
7. Tambahkan sedikit kecap asin ke dalam ekstrak ayam, aduk
8. Ayam jahe siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Steamed Ginger Chicken (yield 6-7 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 pc free-range chicken
2 tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer, optional
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
1 pc green onions
1-2 thumb ginger, sliced
1 tbsp white cooking wine / sake, optional

Garlic Ginger Oil ingredients:
93 g garlic, minced
70 g ginger, grated
½ tbsp sesame oil
60 ml oil

Condiments:
Soy sauce
Red chili, thinly sliced
Large green onion, thinly sliced
Cilantro
Cucumber, peeled and sliced

Steps:
1. Pat the chicken dry. Mix the salt, sugar, stock powder, pepper with cooking wine and stir.
2. Marinate the chicken starting from the cavity. Add the green onions and ginger into the cavity.
3. Wrap the chicken with baking paper, then wrap again with aluminum foil. Steam for 60-80 minutes on high heat.
4. For the Garlic Ginger Oil, heat the oil and add the garlic in. Cook until fragrant, then lower the heat and add the ginger in. Cook until reduced.
5. Turn the heat off. Add sesame oil in and mix well.
6. Get the chicken out of the steamer. Set aside the chicken juice in a bowl, then slice the chicken.
7. Add soy sauce to the chicken juice. Stir.
8. Ginger Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Pasti Nambah! Resep NASI LIWET & OSENG CUMI CABAI GENDOT [Khas Sunda]
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Liwet Sunda (3-4 porsi)

Bahan nasi:
375 gr beras
500 ml air
12 siung bawang merah
3 batang serai, geprek
3-5 lembar daun salam
2 buah cabai merah
10 buah cabai rawit merah
2 sdm Blue Band Rice Mix rasa ayam
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
30 gr petai, belah dua, opsional

Bahan cumi oseng cabai gendot:
100 gr cumi asin, rebus
3 siung bawang putih, iris
8 siung bawang merah, iris
3 buah cabai gendot, potong
2 buah tomat hijau, potong
10 buah cabai rawit merah, iris
40 gr petai, belah dua, opsional
100 ml air
¼ sdt garam
2 sdt gula
½ sdt penyedap

Bahan keciwis bakar:
6 buah keciwis, belah dua
1 sdm Blue Band Serbaguna
¼ sdt merica
50 ml air

Pelengkap:
Sambal tomat (https://youtu.be/j9a9EB0pGTo)

Langkah:
1. Untuk nasi liwet, tumis bawang merah, serai, daun salam, cabai merah, cabai rawit, dan petai, tumis hingga wangi
2. Masukkan beras ke dalam rice cooker dan air, tambahkan bahan tumisan, Blue Band Rice Mix rasa ayam, garam, dan merica, masak hingga matang
3. Untuk oseng cumi, tumis bawang putih dan bawang merah, aduk kemudian masukkan cumi, goreng hingga kering
4. Masukkan cabai gendot, cabai rawit, tomat hijau, dan petai, aduk, lalu tambahkan air, garam, gula, dan penyedap, aduk rata

7. Nasi liwet siap disajikan

Instagram: https://instagram.com/blueband_id/

recipe_en:
Sundanese Nasi Liwet Recipe (yield 3-4 servings)

Nasi Liwet ingredients:
375 g rice
500 ml water
12 pc shallot
3 pc lemongrass, pounded
3-5 pc bay leaf
2 pc red chili
10 pc red bird’s eye chili
2 tbsp Blue Band Rice Mix Chicken flavor
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
30 g bitter bean, halved, optional

Salted Squid Habanero Stir Fry ingredients:
100 g salted squid, boiled
3 clove garlic, sliced
8 pc shallot, sliced
3 pc habanero, sliced
2 pc tomatillo, sliced
10 pc red bird’s eye chili, sliced
40 g bitter bean, halved, optional
100 ml water
¼ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer

Roasted Keciwis ingredients:
6 pc keciwis, halved
1 tbsp Blue Band Serbaguna
¼ tsp pepper
50 ml water

Condiments:
Tomato Sambal (https://youtu.be/j9a9EB0pGTo)

Steps:
1. For the Nasi Liwet, sauté the shallots, lemongrass, bay leaves, red chili, bird’s eye chili, and bitter beans until fragrant.
2. Add the rice and water into the rice cooker. Add the sautéd ingredients in with Blue Band Rice Mix in Chicken flavor, salt, and pepper. Cook until done.
3. For the Salted Squid Habanero Stir Fry, sauté the garlic and shallots. Stir, then add the squid in and cook until crisp.
4. Add the habanero, bird’s eye chili, tomatillo, and bitter beans in. Stir and add water, salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer.
5. For the Roasted Keciwis, add the sliced keciwis into the pan. Add water and cook until reduced.
6. Add pepper and Blue Band Serbaguna, roast until browned.
7. Nasi Liwet is ready to serve.

title: Resep STEAK CAFE DE PARIS & KENTANG GORENG SHOESTRING: Spesial Perpaduan Garlic & Butter!
recipe_id:
Resep Café de Paris Steak (untuk 2-4 porsi)

Bahan:
Daging steak tenderloin

Bahan butter:
200 gr mentega, suhu ruang
½ sdt garam
½ sdt lada hitam
1 sdt gula
8-12 batang parsley (kalau ada yang flat-leaf parsley)
1 batang rosemary, cincang halus
1 batang daun bawang cung, cincang halus
2 siung bawang merah, cincang halus
8 siung bawang putih ukuran besar, haluskan
½ sdm mustard
Lemon utuh, ambil sedikit kulit
1 sdm air perasan lemon
10 gr anchovies
½ sdt paprika bubuk
½ sdt kari bubuk

Bahan lainnya:
1 buah kentang ukuran jumbo
2 sdt garam
1 sdm cuka
100 ml cream
Selada air hijau

Langkah:
1. Untuk kentang, potong tipis kentang ukuran 3-4 mm, bilas, kemudian rendam dengan air dan cuka minimal 30 menit, bilas hingga dua kali, keringkan
2. Panaskan minyak, lalu goreng kentang di api kecil selama 15 menit, tiriskan kemudian goreng kembali di api besar hingga matang, tiriskan
3. Untuk café de paris butter, siapkan mangkuk, masukkan bawang putih yang telah dihaluskan, bawang merah, parutan lemon, rosemary, parsley, daun bawang, perasan lemon, anchovies, kari bubuk, paprika bubuk, dan mustard kemudian aduk 
4. Tambahkan garam, lada hitam dan gula, aduk kembali hingga menyatu, diamkan 2 menit lalu tambahkan mentega, aduk
5. Pindahkan ke dalam plastic wrap kemudian gulung memanjang, diamkan di dalam kulkas atau freezer
6. Keluarkan dari kulkas kemudian potong-potong, untuk saus panaskan wajan, masukkan sedikit mentega yang telah dipotong lalu tambahkan cream, aduk rata
7. Untuk steak, keringkan dengan tisu lalu bumbui dengan garam, lada hitam, dan sedikit minyak sesuai selera
8. Panggang daging dengan Tefal Opti Grill+ hingga medium well lalu untuk daging kedua panggang hingga rare atau sesuai selera
9. Café de paris steak siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Café de Paris Steak Recipe (yield 2-4 servings)

Ingredients:
Tenderloin steak

Butter ingredients:
200 g butter, room temperature
½ tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
1 tsp sugar
8 pc parsley, finely chopped
1 sprig rosemary, finely chopped
1 pc spring onion, finely chopped
2 pc shallot, finely chopped
8 pc garlic, large, minced
½ tbsp mustard
Whole lemon, zest
1 tbsp lemon juice
10 g anchovies
½ tsp paprika powder
½ tsp curry powder

Other ingredients:
1 pc potato, jumbo size
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp vinegar
100 ml cream
Watercress

Steps:
1. For the Fries, slice the potato thinly to 3-4 mm, rinse, and soak in water and vinegar for at least 30 minutes. Rinse twice and pat dry.
2. Heat some oil. Fry the potato on low heat for 15 minutes and set aside. Fry it again on high heat until cooked. Set aside.
3. For the Café de Paris butter, prepare a bowl and add minced garlic, shallots, lemon zest, rosemary, parsley, spring onions, lemon juice, anchovies, curry powder, paprika powder, and mustard. Mix.
4. Add salt, black pepper, and sugar. Mix well and rest for 2 minutes. Add the butter in and stir.
5. Transfer onto a plastic wrap and roll to a cylinder. Chill in the fridge or freezer.
6. Get the butter out of the fridge and slice. To make the sauce, heat the pan and add some of the sliced butter in and the cream. Mix well.
7. For the steak, pat it dry with a paper towel. Season with salt, black pepper, and oil, to taste.
8. Grill the steak with Tefal OptiGrill+ to medium well. For the second steak, cook it to rare or to taste.
9. Café de Paris Steak is ready to serve.

title: Resep NASI GORENG TUMPENG Merah Putih: Cocok Untuk Pemula!
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Goreng Tumpeng (untuk 5-6 porsi)

10 siung bawang merah
2 sachet terasi
Minyak Goreng Fortune

Timun kyuri
Acar

Telur rebus goreng
Sosis sapi, belah membentuk tanda x
Bakso sapi, belah membentuk tanda x

Lainnya:

Daun pisang

Langkah:
1. Siapkan daun pisang dan tampah, bentuk segitiga kemudian susun di atas tampah
2. Haluskan bawang putih, bawang merah, terasi, dan sedikit Minyak Goreng Fortune dengan blender
3. Untuk cabai halus, haluskan cabai keriting, cabai rawit merah, dan sedikit air dengan blender
4. Untuk ayam suwir, tumis ⅓ bagian dari bumbu halus dan ½ cabai halus hingga wangi dan minyak keluar kemudian masukkan serai, daun jeruk, dan daun salam, aduk
5. Masukkan ayam suwir, aduk kembali lalu tambahkan garam, gula, merica, dan penyedap, aduk
6. Tambahkan sedikit air, masak hingga air menyusut 
7. Untuk nasi goreng merah, tumis sebagian bumbu halus dan sisa cabai halus hingga wangi lalu masukkan telur dan daun bawang, aduk rata
8. Masukkan nasi, aduk lalu tambahkan kecap asin, saus tiram, kecap ikan, dan saus tomat, aduk kemudian tambahkan merica, aduk rata 
9. Masukkan ke dalam cetakan tumpeng ¾ penuh, tekan dan ratakan
10. Untuk nasi goreng putih, panaskan sedikit Minyak Goreng Fortune, tumis sisa bumbu halus hingga wangi lalu masukkan telur dan daun bawang, aduk rata
11. Masukkan kecap asin, kecap ikan, saus tiram, dan nasi, aduk lalu tambahkan  garam, gula, merica, dan penyedap, aduk rata
12. Masukkan ke dalam cetakan tumpeng yang sudah diisi nasi merah sebelumnya, ratakan
13. Panaskan Minyak Goreng Fortune, goreng bakso dan sosis hingga matang,tiriskan 
14. Susun nasi di atas tampah daun pisang beserta pelengkap lainnya
15. Nasi goreng tumpeng merah putih siap disajikan

recipe_id:
Resep Ayam Goreng 5 Bahan (untuk 6-7 porsi)

Bahan:
1 ekor ayam negeri utuh
2 sdm cuka beras /1 sdm cuka meja
8 siung bawang putih halus

1-2 sdm kaldu ayam bubuk

1. Potong ayam menjadi 14 bagian, lalu marinasi ayam dengan bawang putih halus, kaldu ayam, cuka, dan tepung tapioka, aduk, tutup dengan plastic wrap, diamkan minimal 30 menit

recipe_en:
5-Ingredient Fried Chicken Recipe (yield: 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
1 pc whole broiler
2 tbsp rice vinegar / 1 tbsp regular vinegar
8 clove garlic, minced
9.5 tbsp tapioca flour
1-2 tbsp chicken powder

Tomato Sambal:
12 pc shallot, halved
2-3 pc tomato, sliced
20 pc red bird’s eye chili, halved
1 tbsp sugar
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp flavor enhancer
Oil for stir-frying
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken into 14 pieces. Marinate it with minced garlic, chicken powder, vinegar, and tapioca flour. Mix and cover with a plastic wrap. Marinate for at least 30 minutes.
2. Heat the oil and fry the chicken on high heat first, then lower to medium-low heat until browned. Set aside.
3. For the Sambal, heat the oil and stir-fry the shallots and bird’s eye chili until fragrant and soft. Transfer to a stone bowl. Season with salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Mash.

title: Gurih Pedas! Resep MIE AYAM RICA: Bikin Nagih!

5 siung bawang merah dengan kulit, geprek

6 siung bawang putih

1-2 cm jahe

10 buah cabai rawit

½ sdm kecap asin

Bawang goreng

recipe_en:
Rica Chicken Noodles Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Fragrant Chicken Oil ingredients:
60-80 pc chicken skin
10 clove garlic, skin-on, pounded
5 pc shallot, skin-on, pounded
150 ml oil
Water

Rica Chicken ingredients:
300 g chicken thigh fillet, skin-on
6 clove garlic
6 pc shallot
1-2 cm ginger
4 pc dried chili or 2 tsp chili powder
10 pc bird’s eye chili
3 tbsp water
2 tbsp oil
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tbsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
½ tbsp fish sauce, optional
60-100 ml water

Others:
Egg noodles
Choy sum, boiled
Green onion, sliced
Fried shallots

Plating per serving (100 g noodles):
Egg noodles
1.5 tbsp fragrant chicken oil
1-2 tsp soy sauce (depends on the brand)
½ tsp fish sauce, optional
⅛ tsp flavor enhancer
⅛ tsp pepper

Steps:
1. For the fragrant chicken oil, boil some water and add the chicken skin in. Cook on medium heat until the water is reduced, then slice.
2. Add oil, garlic, and shallots. Cook on low heat until crisp.
3. For the chicken, marinate it with chili sauce, fish sauce, oyster sauce, soy sauce, flavor enhancer, sugar, and pepper. Cover with a plastic wrap and marinate for 10-15 minutes.
4. Blend the garlic, shallots, ginger, bird’s eye chili, dried chili, oil, and a bit of water.
5. Sauté until oily, then add the chicken in. Add water and cook until it’s a bit reduced.
6. Cook the egg noodles and drain.
7. Prepare a bowl. Add the fragrant chicken oil, soy sauce, fish sauce, flavor enhancer, pepper, and noodles. Stir and add the Rica Chicken and choy sum toppings.

title: Istimewa! Resep PEMPEK DOS: Wangi Gurih TANPA Ikan & Ayam! [Lengkap Kuah Cuko]
recipe_id:
Resep Pempek Dos (33 pcs)

Bahan adonan pempek:
300 gr BOLA Deli tepung beras
800 ml air
1 sdm garam
1 ½ sdm gula
6 siung bawang putih
6 siung bawang merah
½ sdt merica
2 sdm kaldu ayam / kaldu jamur
2 butir telur ayam
550 gr BOLA Deli tepung tapioka
80 gr tepung terigu protein sedang

Campuran bahan pempek keriting:
350 gr adonan pempek dos
1 butir telur
2 sdm air

Bahan kuah cuko:
600 ml air
500 gr gula aren
10 siung bawang putih
15 buah cabai rawit
2-3 sdm cuka
½ sdt garam
3 sdm ebi, rendam, sangrai

Isian pempek kapal selam:
4 butir telur, kocok

Pelengkap:
Timun, potong
Sohun, rebus

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan, haluskan bawang merah, bawang putih dengan sedikit air, lalu pindahkan ke wajan, tambahkan sisa air, aduk
2. Masukkan garam, merica, gula, kaldu ayam, aduk lalu tambahkan BOLA Deli tepung beras, aduk, nyalakan api, masak hingga mengental
3. Pindahkan ke dalam mangkuk besar, biarkan dingin kemudian masukkan telur, aduk rata
4. Masukkan BOLA Deli tepung tapioka dan tepung terigu, uleni hingga menyatu
5. Untuk pempek keriting, ambil 350 gr adonan kemudian tambahkan telur dan air, aduk, lalu masukkan ke dalam piping bag 
6. Siapkan kertas roti, lalu cetak adonan
7. Bagi sisa adonan 2:3, untuk pempek lenjer ambil adonan paling sedikit lalu gulung memanjang kemudian potong menjadi beberapa bagian
8. Untuk pempek kapal selam, gulung adonan memanjang, potong menjadi beberapa bagian
9. Lumuri ujung adonan dengan sedikit BOLA Deli tepung tapioka kemudian tusuk bagian tengah dengan jari telunjuk,lalu bentuk lubang dengan jempol 
10. Isi dengan telur ⅔ penuh kemudian rapatkan bagian atas adonan secara perlahan, ulangi hingga adonan habis  
11. Siapkan air mendidih, rebus pempek selama 10 menit, tiriskan lalu goreng hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan 
12. Untuk saus cuko, haluskan ebi, cabai rawit, bawang putih dengan sedikit air
13. Siapkan wajan, masukkan gula aren dan air, aduk, lalu masukkan bumbu yang telah dihaluskan, masak hingga mendidih 
14. Tambahkan cuka dan garam, aduk rata
15. Pempek dos siap disajikan dengan timun, saus cuko, dan sohun sebagai pelengkap

title: Resep SOTO BETAWI Kuah & Oseng Versi Praktis [Menu IdulAdha]
recipe_id:
Resep Soto Betawi (untuk 8-9 porsi)

Bahan:
1 kg daging sengkel
500 gr urat tunjang, opsional
2 liter air
100 ml santan
50 gr susu evaporasi
1 sdm garam
1 sdm gula
1 sdm kaldu sapi
½ sdm penyedap / kaldu jamur

Bumbu halus:
8-10 siung bawang putih
15 siung bawang merah
6 butir kemiri
2 cm kunyit
2 cm jahe
1 sdt ketumbar
½ sdt jintan
1 sdt lada putih utuh
Minyak

Rempah:
2-3 iris lengkuas
2 batang serai, geprek
3 lembar daun salam
5 lembar daun jeruk
5 butir kapulaga
5 butir cengkih
1 batang kayu manis
1 buah bunga lawang

Pelengkap:
1-2 buah kentang, ukuran besar
2-3 buah tomat, potong
1 batang daun bawang, potong
2-3 seledri, potong
Bawang goreng
Cabai rawit, rebus
Jeruk limau
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Bahan oseng:
Daging dan kuah soto betawi
10 siung bawang merah ukuran kecil
1 buah tomat
25 gr cabai rawit hijau
1 batang daun bawang
1 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdm minyak samin / margarin
Bumbu-bumbu sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Untuk bumbu halus, blender kemiri, bawang putih, bawang merah, jahe, kunyit, jintan, ketumbar, lada putih dengan minyak hingga halus
2. Tumis bumbu halus hingga keluar minyak dan wangi, lalu masukkan serai, lengkuas, daun salam, daun jeruk, kapulaga, kayu manis, cengkih, dan bunga lawang, aduk rata
3. Masukkan urat tunjang dan daging yang telah dipotong, lalu tambahkan garam, gula, dan kaldu sapi,aduk rata
4. Tambahkan air, daun bawang dan seledri, presto selama 45 menit lalu masukkan santan, susu evaporasi, dan penyedap aduk rata
5. Potong-potong kentang kemudian goreng hingga matang, tiriskan
6. Untuk soto oseng, panaskan wajan, masukkan minyak samin, tumis daun bawang, tomat, bawang merah, dan cabai rawit hingga wangi lalu masukkan daging, saus tiram, kecap manis dan bumbu-bumbu sesuai selera,aduk rata
7. Soto betawi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Soto Betawi Recipe (yield 8-9 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg beef shank
500 g beef tendons, optional
2 L water
100 ml coconut milk
50 g evaporated milk
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1 tbsp beef stock
½ tbsp flavor enhancer / mushroom stock powder

Blended Spices:
8-10 clove garlic
15 pc shallot
6 pc candlenut
2 cm turmeric
2 cm ginger
1 tsp coriander
½ tsp cumin
1 tsp whole white pepper
Oil

Spices:
2-3 slice galangal
2 pc lemongrass, pounded
3 pc bay leaf
5 pc lime leaf
5 pc cardamom
5 pc clove
1 pc cinnamon
1 pc star anise

Add-ons:
1-2 pc potato, large
2-3 pc tomato, sliced
1 pc green onions, sliced
2-3 pc celery, sliced
Fried shallots
Bird’s eye chili, boiled
Kaffir lime
Oil for frying

Stir-Fried Soto ingredients:
Soto Betawi meat and broth
10 pc shallot, small
1 pc tomato
25 g green bird’s eye chili
1 pc green onion
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp ghee / margarine
Seasoning, to taste

Steps:
1. For the blended spices, blend the candlenuts, garlic, shallots, ginger, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and white pepper with oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices until oily and fragrant. Then, add the lemongrass, galangal, bay leaves, lime leaves, cardamom, cinnamon, clove, and star anise. Stir.
3. Add the sliced tendons and beef shank. Season with salt, sugar, and beef stock. Stir.
4. Add water, green onions, and celery. Pressure cook for 45 minutes, then add the coconut milk, evaporated milk, and flavor enhancer. Stir.
5. Slice the potatoes and fry until cooked. Set aside.
6. For the Stir-Fried Soto, heat the pan and add ghee. Sauté the green onions, tomatoes, shallots, and bird’s eye chili until fragrant, then add the meat, oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, and seasoning, to taste. Stir.
7. Soto Betawi is ready to serve.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep MARTABAK MANIS TEFLON Rumahan [Terang Bulan] V.2
recipe_id:
Resep Martabak Pizza (2 kali wajan ukuran 22 atau 24 cm untuk 4-6 porsi)

Bahan 1:
225 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
20 gr tepung maizena
20 gr gula pasir
1 butir telur
¾ sdt baking powder
250 ml air

Bahan 2:
50 ml air
¾ sdt baking soda

Lainnya:
Gula pasir secukupnya

Topping:
Butter / wijsman
Indomilk Kental Manis Putih
Indomilk Kental Manis Cokelat
Meses
Kacang mete
Keju parut
Cokelat batang
Biskuit cokelat
Pisang, potong
Cream cheese
Jagung pipil manis

6 macam topping:
Susu keju
Triple chocolate
Cokelat kacang mete
Jagung susu keju
Biskuit cokelat
Pisang keju

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan martabak, campurkan tepung terigu, tepung maizena, gula dan air, aduk menggunakan mixer selama 6-7 menit
2. Masukkan telur dan baking powder, aduk rata lalu diamkan minimal satu jam
3. Campurkan  baking soda dengan air kemudian masukkan ke dalam adonan, aduk rata
4. Panaskan teflon di api kecil sedang, tuang adonan lalu ratakan hingga hingga menempel di pinggiran Teflon 
5. Tunggu hingga gelembung-gelembung naik, lalu taburkan gula pasir di atasnya
6. Setelah bersarang,tutup adonan masak hingga matang dan bagian atasnya tidak lengket
7. Setelah matang, olesi dengan mentega di seluruh permukaannya lalu belah menjadi 6 bagian
8. Tambahkan Indomilk Kental Manis Putih, Indomilk Kental Manis Cokelat dan topping lainnya
9. Martabak siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Pizza Martabak Recipe (two 22-cm/8-inch or 24-cm/9” pan for 4-6 servings each)

Ingredients 1:
225 g all-purpose flour
20 g cornstarch
20 g sugar
1 pc egg
¾ tsp baking powder
250 ml water

Ingredients 2:
50 ml water
¾ tsp baking soda

Others:
Sugar, as needed

Toppings:
Butter / Wijsman
Indomilk White Condensed Milk
Indomilk Chocolate Condensed Milk
Chocolate rice
Cashew
Grated cheese
Compound chocolate
Chocolate biscuit
Banana, sliced
Cream cheese
Shelled sweet corn

6 topping variations:
Milk Cheese
Triple Chocolate
Chocolate Cashew
Corn Milk Cheese
Chocolate Biscuit
Banana Cheese

Steps:
1. For the Martabak batter, combine the flour, cornstarch, sugar, and water. Mix with a mixer for 6-7 minutes.
2. Add the egg and baking powder in. Mix and let it rest for at least 1 hour.
3. Combine the baking soda with water, then add into the batter and mix well.
4. Heat the teflon on medium-low heat. Pour the batter in and swirl the pan so the batter sticks to the sides.
5. Wait until the bubbles rise, then sprinkle sugar on top.
6. Once the bubbles burst, place the lid on the pan. Cook until the top is not sticky.
7. Once it’s cooked, spread the butter on the entire surface and slice into 6 parts.
8. Add the Indomilk White Condensed Milk, Indomilk Chocolate Condensed Milk, and other toppings.
9. Martabak is ready to serve.

title: Gurih Merdeka! Resep TAHU BAKSO AYAM & KORNET [Edisi HUT Kemerdekaan RI]
recipe_id:
Resep Tahu Bakso Merah Putih (untuk 4-5 porsi)

Bahan:
6 pcs tahu putih

Isian tahu:
270 gr paha ayam fillet dengan kulit
80 gr kornet sapi / udang
2 sdt garam
1 sdm gula
½ sdm merica
1 sdt penyedap
1 butir putih telur besar
1-2 siung bawang putih besar
3 siung bawang merah sedang
120 gr tepung sagu
70 gr beetroot halus
1 batang daun bawang, iris halus
2 sdm minyak
80 ml air es
55 gr wortel parut
2-3 tetes pewarna kuning
2-3 tetes pewarna merah

Lainnya:
Minyak untuk menggoreng
Tepung terigu protein sedang untuk taburan

Pelengkap:
Saus bangkok

Langkah
1. Potong tahu menjadi tiga bagian, lalu buang bagian tengah tahu
2. Blender paha ayam, kornet, gula, garam, penyedap dan merica, lalu tambahkan bawang putih, bawang merah dan sisa tahu, haluskan
3. Masukkan putih telur, air es, beetroot, tepung sagu, pewarna, wortel dan daun bawang, aduk rata
4. Taburkan tepung terigu di bagian atas tahu, lalu masukkan adonan isian ke dalam tahu, kukus selama 10 menit di api sedang
5. Panaskan minyak, lalu masukkan tahu yang sudah dikukus, goreng hingga matang
6. Tahu bakso merah putih siap disajikan dengan saus bangkok sebagai pelengkap
recipe_en:
Red&White Meatloaf Tofu Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Ingredients:
6 pc white tofu

Meatloaf Dough:
270 g chicken thigh fillet with skin
80 g corned beef / shrimp
2 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancer
1 pc egg white, large
1-2 clove garlic, large
3 pc shallot, medium
120 g sago flour
70 g beetroot, ground
1 pc green onion, thinly sliced
2 tbsp oil
80 ml cold water
55 g carrot, grated
2-3 drop yellow food coloring
2-3 drop red food coloring

Others:
Oil for frying
All-purpose flour to dust

Condiments:
Bangkok sauce

Steps:
1. Slice the tofu into three parts. Scrape out the center.
2. Blend the chicken thighs, corned beef, sugar, salt, flavor enhancer, and pepper. Add the garlic, shallots, and tofu leftovers. Blend.
3. Add the egg whites, cold water, beetroots, sago flour, food coloring, carrots, and green onions. Mix well.
4. Dust the tofu with flour, then add the dough to the tofu. Steam for 10 minutes on medium heat.
5. Heat some oil and fry the steamed tofu.
6. Red&White Meatball Tofu is ready to serve with Bangkok sauce on the side.

title: TANPA Oven! Resep MILLE CREPE CAKE RASA RED VELVET: Lembutnya Berlapis!
recipe_id:
Resep Red Velvet Mille Crepe Cake (untuk 5-6 porsi)

Bahan red velvet crepe:
260 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
40 gr tepung maizena
12 gr cokelat bubuk
500 ml susu
100 gr yogurt plain / susu plain
½ sdt garam
100 gr mentega leleh
5 butir telur
13 tetes pewarna merah
3 tetes pewarna kuning

Cream cheese frosting

Bahan a:
350 ml susu
100 gr gula pasir
2 butir telur atau 4 kuning telur
35 gr tepung maizena
¾ sdt garam
80 gr kental manis
30 gr mentega

Bahan b:
250 gr cream cheese
250 gr mentega tawar
1-2 sdt ekstrak vanila

Nougat kacang (bisa diganti biskuit red velvet):
80 gr kacang mete, sangrai
60 gr gula
1-2 sdm air

Langkah:
1. Untuk pastry cream, panaskan susu, lalu di mangkuk terpisah campurkan telur, gula, tepung maizena, garam, dan kental manis, aduk rata
2. Tuang susu yang telah dipanaskan ke dalam campuran telur, aduk, masak kembali hingga mengental kemudian tambahkan mentega, aduk rata
3. Pindahkan ke mangkuk lalu tutup dengan plastic wrap, diamkan hingga dingin kemudian masukkan ke dalam kulkas 
4. Untuk cream cheese frosting, kocok mentega dengan mixer hingga sedikit pucat lalu masukkan cream cheese dan ekstrak vanilla, mixer kembali
5. Keluarkan pastry cream lalu kocok dengan mixer hingga lembut, campurkan ke dalam cream cheese, mixer kembali hingga menyatu
6. Untuk nougat kacang, panaskan wajan, masukkan gula dan air, masak hingga membentuk karamel, lalu masukkan kacang mete, aduk, pindahkan ke dalam kertas roti, diamkan hingga dingin 
7. Setelah dingin, hancurkan kacang dengan pisau
8. Untuk adonan mille crepe, campurkan tepung terigu, tepung maizena, garam, cokelat bubuk, aduk lalu tambahkan telur dan susu, aduk rata
9. Tambahkan pewarna merah dan sedikit pewarna kuning, aduk lalu masukkan yoghurt dan mentega leleh, aduk rata 
10. Panaskan wajan, tuang sedikit adonan, masak hingga pinggir adonan terlihat kering, angkat, ulangi hingga adonan habis
11. Ambil satu lembar kulit crepe, olesi dengan dengan sedikit cream, ratakan lalu tutup kembali dengan kulit crepe, ulangi langkah ini hingga kulit crepe habis
12. Olesi bagian atas crepe dengan whipping cream, kemudian taburi dengan nougat kacang
13. Mille crepe cake siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Crispy Chicken with Mango Sambal Recipe (yield 8 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
2 pc whole chicken, halved
2 tsp salt per 1 kg of chicken
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer per 1 kg of chicken
5 clove garlic + 3 tbsp water
2 tbsp vinegar
½ tsp pepper
2 tbsp cornstarch

Sambal ingredients:
25 pc red bird’s eye chili
15 pc red curly chili
6 pc shallot, halve
3 clove garlic, halve
1 pc tomato, sliced
2 sachet shrimp paste
300 g half-ripe mango, peeled and grated
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
Oil to sauté

Others:
Kaffir lime
Vinegar to brush the chicken
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with garlic, flavor enhancer, salt, pepper, vinegar, and cornstarch. Mix well and cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for 1-2 hours in the fridge.
2. Get the chicken out of the fridge. Fry it at room temperature.
3. For the first method, bring water to a boil and pour the hot water onto the chicken.
4. Pat dry with a paper towel, then brush the chicken with vinegar. Fry until golden brown and set aside.
5. For the second method, fry the chicken directly until golden brown for about 15 minutes. Set aside.
6. For the Sambal, sauté the shallots, garlic, red curly chili, and bird’s eye chili. Cook until they’re a bit dry and wilted, then add shrimp paste and tomato.
7. Transfer to a mortar & pestle. Season with salt and sugar. Grind, then add the grated mango. Mix well.
8. Crispy Chicken with Mango Sambal is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Gyukatsu Recipe (yield 1-2 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
300 g wagyu / wagyu meltique sirloin
1 pc egg
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp black pepper
All-purpose flour
Panko

Japanese BBQ Sauce:
150 g tomato sauce
1 tbsp chili sauce
70 g onion, chopped
2-3 clove garlic, minced
30 ml pineapple juice
30 ml orange juice
2 tbsp oil
100 ml water
½ tsp flavor enhancer
½ tsp sugar

Negi Shio:
5 pc green onion (more white than green), sliced
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
¼ tps flavor enhancer
1 tbsp mirin
1-2 tsp lemon juice
2 tbsp sesame oil
1 tbsp vegetable oil

Others:
Cabbage, sliced and soaked in ice water
Japanese cucumber, sliced
Cherry tomato
Rice

Steps:
1. For the BBQ Sauce, heat the oil. Sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant, then add tomato sauce, chili sauce, pineapple juice, orange juice, and water. Stir.
2. Add flavor enhancer and sugar. Mix well.
3. For the Negi Shio, mix the green onions, salt, pepper, flavor enhancer, mirin, and lemon juice. Mix well.
4. Heat the sesame oil and vegetable oil. Pour it into the green onion mix and stir.
5. Pat the meat dry. Season with a bit of salt and black pepper, then coat with flour evenly.
6. Dip the meat into the beaten egg, then into the breadcrumbs.
7. Heat the oil and fry the meat until golden brown. Drain and slice.
8. Heat the pan. Cook the raw part of the meat on both sides.
9. Gyukatsu is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Beef Bakmoy Rice Recipe (yield 5-6 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g beef fillet
3 L water
2-3 tbsp Royco Beef Stock Powder
1 pc green onion
Salt, to taste
Sugar, to taste
Pepper, to taste

Filling:
500 g white tofu
5 pc boiled egg

Blended Spices:
6-7 clove garlic
8-10 pc shallot
6 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
350 ml water
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp Royco Beef Stock Powder

Add-ons:
Bird’s eye chili
Kaffir lime
Fried shallots
Celery
Rice

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Boil the water. Add the meat, green onions, and Royco Beef Stock Powder in. Cook until the meat is tender.
2. Slice the meat into small dice.
3. Dice the tofu, then fry until crisp outside. Set aside.
4. Blend the garlic and shallots with a bit of oil. Sauté on medium heat until reduced and fragrant.
5. Add the meat and tofu in. Turn the heat up, then add sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, Royco Beef Stock Powder, water, boiled eggs, and pepper. Stir and cook until the sauce is reduced.
6. For the broth, season with sugar, salt, and pepper. Stir.
7. Bakmoy Rice is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Chicken Meatballs with Cheese filling Recipe (yield 5 servings)

Ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh fillet
250 g chicken breast fillet
2.5 tsp salt
4 tsp sugar
2 tsp chicken powder / flavor enhancer
½ tsp pepper
6 clove garlic, minced
4 tbsp fried shallot
80 g egg whites
50 g tapioca flour
8 g baking powder
300 ml ice water

Filling:
MEG Slice Melt 

Chicken Oil:
75 g chicken skin
5 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
Water

Condiments:
25 g dried chili
2-3 tbsp oil
Kaffir lime

Meatball Broth:
Water
Salt, to taste
Sugar, to taste
Flavor enhancer, to taste

Steps:
1. Add the chicken, salt, sugar, flavor enhancer, and pepper into the food processor. Blend until sticky, then add garlic. Blend until smooth and sticky.
2. Add the baking powder, egg whites, tapioca flour, and fried shallots in. Blend, then add ice water bit by bit. Blend thoroughly.
3. Transfer to a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and keep in the fridge.
4. Get the dough out of the fridge. Shape it into balls and fill with MEG Slice Melt.
5. Heat the water. Add the meatballs in and cook on low heat thoroughly.
6. For the Chicken Oil, boil the chicken skin with a bit of water. Slice, then cook until the water is reduced a bit.
7. Blend the shallots and garlic with a bit of oil until smooth. Add to the chicken skin and cook on medium-low heat.
8. For the dried chili, heat some oil and pour into the dried chili. Stir.
9. For the broth, boil some water. Then, add salt, flavor enhancer, and sugar. Add the meatballs into the broth.
10. Meatballs are ready to serve with chicken oil, dried chili, and kaffir lime on the side.

recipe_en:
Chicken Nanban Recipe (yield 6 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1 kg chicken thigh fillet, skin-on
3 clove garlic, minced
2 cm ginger + 1 tbsp water, strained
2 tbsp soy sauce
2 tsp chicken powder
1 pc egg
2 tbsp Lily Seasoned Flour
½ tbsp sugar
¼ tsp white pepper

Coating:
200 g Lily Seasoned Flour (dry coat)
200 g Lily Seasoned Flour (wet batter)
200 ml water

Nanban Sauce:
4 tbsp soy sauce
3 tbsp mirin 2 tbsp apple juice
3 tbsp palm sugar
1.5 tbsp rice wine vinegar or 1 tbsp white vinegar
2 tbsp katsuobushi (bonito flakes, optional)
½ tbsp dried wakame, optional
150 ml water
2 slice ginger

Japanese Tartar Sauce:
3 pc egg (boiled for 8 minutes), sliced
8 tbsp mayonnaise
1.5 tbsp rice wine vinegar or 1 tbsp white vinegar
2 tsp honey / condensed milk / sugar
1 tsp dashi powder / stock powder
¼ tsp white pepper
1 pc green onion, small, finely chopped

Others:
Cabbage, sliced, soaked in cold water
Rice

Steps:
1. Marinate the chicken with garlic, ginger liquid, soy sauce, chicken powder, and egg.
2. Add sugar and Lily Seasoned flour. Stir and cover with plastic wrap. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
3. For the sauce, heat the pan and add soy sauce, palm sugar, vinegar, mirin, water, and wakame. Bring to a boil and add katsuobushi and ginger. Cook for a moment, strain, and transfer to a bowl.
4. For the Tartar Sauce, mix the boiled eggs, green onions, honey, vinegar, dashi, mayonnaise, and white pepper.
5. For the wet batter, mix the Lily Seasoned Flour with water. Mix well.
6. Coat the chicken with the dry coat, then dip it into the wet batter.
7. Heat the oil and fry the chicken until golden brown. Drain the oil.
8. Chicken Nanban is ready to serve.

title: 50 Ribu BERLIMA! Resep NASI AYAM TORI SOBORO: Versi Jepang & Versi Indonesia.

Nasi
