recipe_en:
Tori Soboro Recipe (yield 4-5 servings)

Japanese-style Soboro:
200 g ground chicken thigh
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp palm sugar
1.5 tbsp mirin / cooking wine / apple juice
1 clove garlic, minced
1 cm grated ginger + 1 tbsp water
½ tsp dashi powder / stock powder / flavor enhancer
3-4 tbsp water

Indonesian-style Soboro:
200 g ground chicken thigh
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
½ tbsp sugar
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
5 clove garlic, minced
6 pc red bird’s eye chili
3-4 tbsp water
1 tsp dark soy sauce

Eggs ingredients:
4 pc egg
1 tsp soy sauce
2 tsp sugar
1 sdt dashi / stock powder

Green Beans Goma-Ae:
200 g green bean
500 ml water
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp salt
2 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp sugar
2 tbsp ground toasted sesame

Others:
Rice

Steps:
1. For the Japanese-style, mix the chicken with soy sauce, sugar, dashi powder, ginger liquid, and garlic. Stir and marinate for a couple minutes.
2. Add the mirin and water in. Stir and cook on medium-low heat while stirring until the sauces are absorbed.
3. For the Indonesian-style, mix the chicken with soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and flavor enhancer. Stir and marinate for a couple minutes.
4. Heat the oil. Sauté the garlic and bird’s eye chili until fragrant. Add the chicken and dark soy sauce in and cook through.
5. For the Green Beans Goma-Ae, boil the green beans with salt and sugar for 2-3 minutes. Rinse with cold water and slice.
6. Grind the toasted sesame, then add sugar and soy sauce. Grind again, then add into the green beans.
7. Beat the eggs. Add soy sauce, dashi powder, and sugar. Stir.
8. Heat the oil. Cook the eggs while stirring slowly until they’re cooked.
9. Tori Soboro is ready to serve.

title: TANPA Mixer, Empuk Seharian! Resep PANADA SOSIS PEDAS: Cakep, Mulus, Anti Kempes.
recipe_id:
Resep Panada Sosis (12 pcs)

7 siung bawang putih

2. Tambahkan daun bawang, air, gula, garam, penyedap, aduk rata kemudian masukkan saus sambal, aduk

recipe_en:
Sausage Panada Recipe (12 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
15 g sugar
6 g yeast
100 ml lukewarm water
300 g all-purpose flour
30 g thick coconut milk
25 g butter / margarine, melted
1 pc egg
½ tsp salt

Filling:
Kanzler Cheese Cocktail Sausage, sliced

Sambal ingredients:
21 pc shallot
7 clove garlic
3 pc lime leaf
45 pc red bird’s eye chili
1 pc green onion, sliced
50 ml water
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp flavor enhancer
1 tbsp chili sauce

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. For the Sambal, blend the garlic, shallots, red bird’s eye chili, and lime leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
2. Add the green onions, water, sugar, salt, and flavor enhancer in. Stir, add chili sauce in, and mix.
3. For the dough, add the sugar and yeast into lukewarm water. Cover with plastic wrap.
4. After the yeast blooms, add the coconut milk, egg, and butter. Mix well.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the flour and salt. Pour the yeast mix in and stir.
6. Knead the dough until it comes together for about 3-5 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 10 minutes.
7. Flatten the dough into a rectangle. Roll, then rest for 5 minutes. Repeat this step twice.
8. Flatten the dough, then roll lengthwise. Slice into 12 pieces.
9. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin. Add the Sambal and Kanzler Cheese Cocktail Sausage. Fold and seal the dough.
10. Heat the oil and fry the Panada on medium heat until browned. Drain.
11. Panada is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Chicken Soup Recipe (yield: 8-10 servings)

Ingredients:
900 g chicken drumstick, sliced
10 pc shallot, sliced
3 clove garlic, pounded
300 g carrot, sliced
300 g potato, sliced
200 g cabbage, sliced
2 pc green onion, sliced
6 pc celery, sliced
2 pc red tomato, sliced
1 pc nutmeg
4 pc cardamom
½ tsp white pepper
2-3 tbsp Masako Kaldu Spesial Rasa Ayam
2-3 L water
2-3 tbsp oil

Others:
Fried shallots
Kaffir lime

Steps:
1. Heat some oil. Add the shallots and fry on medium-low heat.
2. Set aside some of the fried shallots. Then, stir in the garlic and white pepper.
3. Add the white part of the green onions. Turn the heat up, then add the chicken and stir-fry until browned.
4. Add some water and bring to a boil, then lower the heat.
5. Add the potatoes and carrots. Stir, then add the nutmeg and cardamom.
6. Add Masako Chicken Powder. Stir, then add the tomato, green onions, celery, and cabbage. Cook for about 5 minutes.
7. Masako Chicken Soup is ready to serve with fried shallots and kaffir lime on the side.

recipe_id:

recipe_en:
Taliwang Grilled Chicken (yield: 5-6 servings)

Marinating ingredients:
1.2 kg whole chicken / fillet
40 g coconut milk
2 pc kaffir lime
1.5 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Blended Spices:
5 clove garlic
8 pc shallot
5 pc candlenut
4 pc red chili
15 pc red bird’s eye chili
15 g dried chili (soaked in warm water)
5 cm aromatic ginger
1 pc tomato, sliced
2 sachet shrimp paste, roasted
Oil

Others:
50 ml coconut milk
250 ml water
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1 tsp flavor enhancer

Eggplant Beberuk Sambal ingredients:
5 pc eggplant, sliced
10 pc red bird’s eye chili
5 pc shallot
3 pc kaffir lime
1 pc shrimp paste, roasted
2 pc red tomato, sliced
¾ tsp salt
1 - 1.5 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Butterfly the chicken and press it in the middle.
2. Marinate the chicken with salt, pepper, and kaffir lime on both sides. Add the coconut milk in and spread it evenly.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate for 1 hour at room temperature or overnight in the fridge.
4. Blend the spices with a bit of oil. Sauté until the oil seeps out.
5. Add the water, coconut milk, sugar, salt, and flavor enhancer. Cook for a bit and stir, then set aside a little bit for the dipping sauce.
6. For the Eggplant Beberuk Sambal, grind the bird’s eye chili, shrimp paste, salt, and sugar. Add the tomatoes in and grind until smooth.
7. Add the shallots and eggplant. Mash again, then add lime juice. Mix well.
8. Heat the pan on high heat. Add the chicken in and grill until half-cooked.
9. Dip the chicken into the sauce and grill again. Repeat this step so the chicken is dipped twice.
10. Taliwang Grilled Chicken is ready to serve with the Sambal on the side.

recipe_en:
Croffle Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients:
200 ml lukewarm milk
6 g yeast
3 tbsp sugar
290 g bread flour
½ tsp salt
150 g butter, room temperature

Others:
Sugar

Steps:
1. Add the yeast and sugar into the milk. Stir and cover with plastic wrap. Let it sit for 5-10 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the flour and salt. Stir, then add the yeast mixture. Knead the dough until it comes together for 5 minutes.
3. Rub the bowl with a bit of oil and place the dough inside. Cover and proof for 1 hour.
4. Prepare a cutting board or a working surface and dust with flour. Roll the dough into a rectangle.
5. Spread the butter evenly. Slice into four parts, stack, and fold the dough.
6. Place in the freezer for 45 minutes.
7. Get the dough out of the freezer. Flatten lengthwise and slice into 10 triangles.
8. For each dough, halve the bottom part, pull the dough, then roll. Repeat for all the dough.
9. Rest the dough for 15-20 minutes until they rise.
10. Brush it with water, then roll it in sugar.
11. Heat the Croffle maker. Add the dough and cook until browned.
12. The Croffle is ready to serve.

title: Resep SUP DAGING SAYURAN Lengkap Dengan Saus Pedas Segar! [Mille-Feuille Hotpot Korea]

recipe_en:
Mille-Feuille Nabe Recipe (yield: 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g sliced beef
1 pc white cabbage
1 pack bok choy
1 pc onion
2 cm ginger
150 g shimeji mushroom

Broth:
1 L water
2 tbsp Royco Beef Stock Powder
100 ml evaporated milk

Dipping Sauce:
40 g green bird’s eye chili
20 g red curly chili / red bird’s eye chili
40 g garlic
3 tbsp oil
½ tbsp sesame seeds
3 tbsp sugar
3 tbsp lime juice / 1.5 tbsp vinegar
4 tbsp fish sauce

Steps:
1. Arrange the cabbage, sliced beef, bok choy, sliced beef, cabbage, sliced beef, bok choy, and so on. Stack (meat on top, vegetable on the bottom) and slice.
2. Add the onion and leftover vegetables into the pan and arrange the mille-feuille and shimeji mushroom on the center.
3. For the broth, combine water with Royco Beef Stock Powder. Pour into the pan.
4. Add the ginger in and bring to a boil. Then, add the evaporated milk in.
5. For the sauce, blend the garlic, green bird’s eye chili, and curly chili. Transfer to a bowl.
6. Heat some oil and pour the hot oil onto the chopped ingredients. Stir.
7. Add the fish sauce, lime juice, sesame seeds, and sugar in. Mix well.
8. Mille-Feuille Nabe is ready to serve with the dipping sauce on the side.

title: Resep SATE KAMBING 5 BAHAN dan Sambal Taichan
recipe_id:
Resep Sate Kambing Teflon (untuk 2-3 porsi)

Bahan:
500 gr daging kambing, potong memanjang
1-2 sdm bubuk kari
10 siung bawang putih
45 buah cabai rawit merah
1 buah jeruk nipis
2 sdt kaldu ayam bubuk
¼ sdt gula
3 sdm air
Sejumput garam untuk daging
⅛ sdt garam untuk sambal
Minyak

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bawang putih dengan setengah kaldu ayam bubuk, lalu tambahkan cabai rawit, haluskan
2. Pisahkan sedikit sambal, lalu masukkan ke dalam daging yang telah dipotong, aduk rata
3. Masukkan bubuk kari, garam, sisa kaldu ayam bubuk dan ½ buah jeruk nipis, aduk rata diamkan selama 10 menit
4. Setelah 10 menit, masukkan sedikit minyak ke dalam daging, lalu tusuk daging dengan tusuk sate
5. Panaskan sedikit minyak di api sedang, masukkan daging masak hingga setengah matang, lalu balikan sate, besarkan api, masak kembali hingga matang
6. Untuk daging goreng, panaskan minyak, lalu goreng daging hingga matang, tiriskan
7. Untuk sambal, tambahkan gula dan garam, aduk
8. Panaskan sedikit minyak, lalu siram minyak ke dalam sambal
9. Tambahkan jeruk nipis dan air, aduk rata
10. Sate kambing siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Teflon Goat Satay Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g goat meat, slice lengthwise
1-2 tbsp curry powder
10 clove garlic
45 pc bird’s eye chili
1 pc lime
2 tsp chicken powder
¼ tsp sugar
3 tbsp water
A pinch of salt for the meat
⅛ tsp salt for the Sambal
Oil

Steps:
1. Grind the garlic with half of the chicken powder. Then, add the bird’s eye chili in and mash.
2. Set aside some of the chili, then add the mashed ingredients to the sliced meat and stir.
3. Add the curry powder, salt, the rest of the chicken powder, and ½ of the lime juice. Mix evenly and marinate for 10 minutes.
4. After 10 minutes, add a bit of oil to the meat and skewer all of them.
5. Heat some oil on medium heat and pan-sear the Satay until half-cooked. Flip, increase the heat, and cook thoroughly.
6. For the fried Satay, heat the oil and fry the Satay until they’re done. Drain.
7. For the Sambal, add sugar and salt to the mashed chili. Mix.
8. Heat some oil and pour the hot oil into the Sambal.
9. Add lime juice and water. Mix well.
10. Goat Satay is ready to serve.

6. Kukus kembali adonan hingga habis
7. Tumpuk adonan, lalu potong-potong
8. Kwetiau siap untuk diolah

recipe_en:
Spicy Carbonara Ramyeon Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
1-2 serving Ang’s Popomie 2 mm Ramen Noodles

Spicy Oil:

6 pc bird’s eye chili

3 tbsp creamer

1 tbsp chili sauce
1 cube chicken powder
1 tsp sesame oil
1 tsp soy sauce
1 tsp fish sauce
1 tbsp dried parsley
1 tsp sesame seeds

Egg yolk
Chicken luncheon, diced

Egg

recipe_en:
Beef & Sweet Potato Kalio Recipe (yield: 10-11 servings)

Blended spices:
10 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
15 pc large red chili or 20 pc curly chili
10 pc red bird’s eye chili
2 cm ginger
8 pc candlenut
1 tsp coriander, toasted
3 cm turmeric
½ tsp cumin
Oil

Add-ons:
800 g beef shank, sliced
500 g Japanese sweet potato, peeled, sliced

Aromatics:
2 pc lemongrass
2 thumb galangal
3 pc bay leaf
3 pc kaffir lime leaf
100 g toasted coconut, optional

Others:
210 ml thick coconut milk
1.2 liter water, or as needed
Royco Beef Stock Powder
¼ tsp sugar, optional

Spices:
2 pc clove
3 pc cardamom
½ pc cinnamon
1 pc star anise

Steps:
1. Blend the spices with oil. Sauté until the oil seeps out.
2. Add the lemongrass, galangal, bay leaves, kaffir lime leaves, clove, cardamom, cinnamon, and star anise. Sauté until fragrant. Then, add the blended toasted coconut in. Mix well.
3. Add the meat, water, salt, pepper, and Royco Beef Stock Powder. Cook for 90 minutes.
4. Heat some oil and fry the sweet potatoes until a bit browned.
5. Add the sweet potatoes, coconut milk, and additional water in. Cook until reduced and thickens.
6. Beef & Sweet Potato Kalio is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Okonomiyaki Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
3 tbsp Bakwan flour / seasoned flour
4 tbsp water
4 pc white cabbage leaf, sliced
1 pc egg
1 pc cooked instant fried noodles, seasoning and oil
90 g sliced beef
1 pc green onion, sliced

Sauce:
1.5 tbsp soy sauce / kombu tsuyu
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
1 tbsp honey / Bangkok sambal
⅓ tsp garlic powder
¼ tsp ginger powder, optional

Topping:
Mayonnaise
Aonori

Steps:
1. For the sauce, combine all the ingredients and mix.
2. For the batter, mix the flour with water evenly.
3. Heat the pan and add some oil. Add the batter and flatten to a circle.
4. Add the cabbage in and a bit more batter. Then, add instant noodles seasoning, green onions, sliced beef, and aonori.
5. Flip the Okonomiyaki. Cook the noodles on the side, then add the sauce and instant noodles seasoning. Stir.
6. Lift the Okonomiyaki. Drag the noodles to the center of the pan and stack the Okonomiyaki on top.
7. Flip the Okonomiyaki. Add the egg in and flip again. Cook until fragrant and a bit crisp.
8. Add the sauce in with mayo, aonori, and green onion toppings.
9. The Okonomiyaki is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Cireng Recipe (yield: 12 pcs)

Dough:
250 ml water
5 tbsp tapioca flour
2-3 clove garlic, minced
1-2 pc green onions, sliced
2 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Additional flour for the dough:
150 g tapioca flour
    
Dry Coat:
100 g tapioca flour

Vinegar Sambal:
250 ml water
8 pc red bird’s eye chili, boiled
3 pc red chili, boiled
2-3 clove garlic
2 tbsp white vinegar
3 tbsp sugar
¼ tsp salt

Rujak Sambal:
1 clove garlic
8 pc bird’s eye chili
2 cm aromatic ginger
1 sachet shrimp paste, roasted
1 pc palm sugar
4 tbsp tamarind water

Steps:
1. Add water, tapioca flour, garlic, green onions, salt, flavor enhancer, and pepper into a pan and stir. Heat the pan, then cook until thick and sticky.
2. Add the dough into the additional flour and knead until the dough comes together. Divide into 12 pieces.
3. Coat with the dry flour evenly and rest for 10 minutes.
4. Heat the oil. Fry the Cireng on high heat until half-cooked. Drain and let it rest for a moment, then fry it again until it changes color a little bit. Set aside.
5. For the Vinegar Sambal, boil the bird’s eye chili, red chili, and garlic. Then, add the vinegar, water, sugar, salt, and flavor enhancer in. Stir and blend until smooth.
6. For the Rujak Sambal, mash the garlic, aromatic ginger, and salt. Then, add the shrimp paste, bird’s eye chili, palm sugar, and tamarind water. Mix well.
7. Cireng is ready to serve with Vinegar Sambal and Rujak Sambal on the side.

recipe_en:
Hotteok Recipe (yield: 12 pcs)

Ingredients:
120 g BOLA Deli glutinous rice flour
280 g all-purpose flour
8 g instant yeast
50 ml milk
250 ml water
1 tsp salt
1 tsp baking powder
30 ml oil

Filling (Original):
75 g brown sugar
40 g toasted cashew, finely chopped
25 g toasted black sesame seed, ground
8 g cinnamon powder
30 g butter
1 g salt
4 g vanilla extract

Filling (Cheese):
35 g BOLA Deli powdered sugar
100 g mozzarella, grated
10 g white sesame, toasted

Filling (Spicy Chicken):
250 g chicken breast, boiled/steamed, shredded
3 clove garlic
5 pc shallot
1-2 pc red chili, large
10 pc bird’s eye chili
6 pc kaffir lime leaf
½ tsp salt
2 tbsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer
Oil

Steps:
1. For the dough, combine BOLA Deli glutinous rice flour, flour, salt, and baking powder. Mix, then add the yeast in. Mix again.
2. Add the milk, water, and oil in. Mix and cover with plastic wrap. Rest for 90-180 minutes.
3. For the Original filling, combine the brown sugar, cashew, ground toasted sesame seeds, cinnamon, and salt. Stir, then add the butter and vanilla extract. Mix well.
4. For the Cheese filling, mix BOLA Deli powdered sugar, mozzarella, and sesame seeds.
5. For the Spicy Chicken filling, blend the garlic, shallots, bird’s eye chili, large red chili, and kaffir lime leaves with a bit of oil. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the chicken, salt, sugar, flavor enhancer, and a bit of water in. Cook until reduced.
7. Prepare oil in a bowl. Rub both hands with oil and grab some of the dough. Thin it out and fill, then seal.
8. Heat the pan with oil in it. Fry the Hotteok on medium heat.
9. After the dough expands a bit, flip and press. Fry until browned and drain.
10. Hotteok is ready to serve.

9. Untuk truffle fries, pindahkan kentang ke mangkuk, lalu tambahkan garam, keju parmesan bubuk, paprika smoked powder, lada hitam, minyak truffle, dan parsley, aduk

recipe_en:
Homemade French Fries Recipes (yield: 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
2 pc potato, large 
1 tbsp salt
Water
70 g cornstarch
Fortune Cooking Oil

Original French Fries (Seaweed Mayo):
100 g mayonnaise
5 g aonori seaweed
Salt, to taste

Truffle Fries:
1 tsp parmesan
1 tsp smoked paprika powder
1 tbsp truffle oil
Parsley, chopped
Black pepper, to taste
Salt, to taste

Steps:
1. Peel and slice the potatoes.
2. Soak it in water and salt for 30 minutes.
3. Rinse until the water is clear.
4. Bring water to a boil and cook the potatoes for 5-6 minutes. Let it cool a bit.
5. Prepare baking paper. Arrange the potatoes on it and coat with cornstarch. Mix well.
6. Heat Fortune Cooking Oil and fry the potatoes on high heat for 1 minute. Then, lower the heat and fry for 5 minutes. Remove and drain.
7. After it cools, fry the fries again until golden brown. Drain, transfer to a bowl, and season it with salt.
8. For the Seaweed Mayo, mix the mayonnaise with aonori seaweed. Mix well.
9. For the Truffle Fries, transfer the fries to a bowl and add salt, parmesan, smoked paprika powder, black pepper, truffle oil, and parsley. Mix well.
10. Homemade French Fries are ready to serve.

Ingredients:

Coating ingredients:
Butter
Cocoa powder

Steps:

2. Whisk the eggs and sugar until it pales and the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add the flour and cocoa powder in. Mix well.

5. Brush the cups with butter and coat with cocoa powder, then pour the batter in halfway. Cover with aluminum foil.
6. Heat the pan and fill it halfway with water.

8. Slide the Lava Cake out of the mold and it’s ready to serve.

3. Tuang Vegemil Banana Soy Drink yang telah dipanaskan ke dalam tepung, aduk rata, masak kembali sambil diaduk

6. Untuk caramel choux sponge cake, panaskan wajan, masukkan air dan gula, masak hingga berwarna cokelat, lalu masukkan Vegemil Banana Soy Drink, garam, mentega, dan tepung, aduk rata

Steps:
1. For the Banana Cream Custard, heat the Vegemil Banana Soy Drink.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the egg, cornstarch, salt, and condensed milk. Mix well.
3. Pour the simmering Vegemil Banana Soy Drink into the bowl. Mix well, then return to the pan. Cook while stirring.
4. Add the butter in. Cook until thickens. Transfer to a bowl and cover with a plastic wrap. Let cool.
5. Once the custard cools, whip the cream until fluffy and a bit firm. Mix into the custard bit by bit while stirring.
6. For the Caramel Choux Sponge Cake, heat the pan and add water and sugar. Cook until browned, then add Vegemil Banana Soy Drink, salt, butter, and flour. Mix well.
7. Transfer to a bowl. Mix and let cool.
8. Add the yolks one by one. Mix well.
9. For the meringue, beat the egg whites and cream of tartar. Add the sugar incrementally. Beat to a bird’s beak consistency.
10. Get a bit of the meringue and mix with the yolk batter. Mix well, then return to the meringue bowl and stir.
11. Rub the baking pan with oil and line with baking paper. Pour the batter in and even out.
12. Bake at 165°C for 10 minutes.
13. Remove from the oven and let cool, then sprinkle icing sugar on.
14. Prepare a sheet of baking paper and flip the sponge cake on top of it. Spread the Banana Cream Custard on, roll, and slice.

4 butir telur

1 sdt SP
60 gr tepung protein sedang

¼ sdt garam

Pewarna kuning
Pewarna cokelat

⅛ sdt garam

130 ml minyak
50 gr margarin
250 ml air
100 gr gula
3 lembar daun pandan

Pelengkap:

Milk chocolate meses

Langkah:
1. Kocok telur, SP, dan gula hingga mengembang, lalu tambahkan perisa pandan, pewarna kuning dan cokelat
2. Tambahkan garam, Haan maizena, dan tepung terigu, kocok kembali di kecepatan rendah, lalu masukkan minyak, aduk rata 
3. Siapkan loyang yang sudah dialasi baking paper, tuang adonan, lalu ratakan
4. Panggang sponge cake dengan suhu 165 derajat selama 10 menit
5. Keluarkan sponge cake, alasi baking paper di atasnya, balik, lalu lepaskan baking paper
6. Gulung sponge cake di kedua sisi sebelum ditambahkan isian
7. Siapkan wajan, panaskan margarin dan minyak, lalu goreng pisang hingga kecokelatan
8. Siapkan panci, masukkan air, gula, dan daun pandan, masak hingga mendidih
9. Masukkan pisang yang telah di goreng ke dalam air gula, lalu tambahkan sedikit campuran margarin, rebus hingga pisang empuk

12. Belah sponge cake menjadi dua, lalu olesi mocha cream, ratakan

recipe_en:
Banana Roll Cake Recipe (yield: 13 pcs)

Pandan Sponge Cake:
4 pc egg
55 g sugar
1 tsp SP
60 g all-purpose flour
15 g Haan cornstarch
50 ml oil
¼ tsp salt
1 tsp Pandan extract
Yellow food coloring
Brown food coloring

Mocha Cream:
100 g Haan Wippy Cream
200 ml cold water
2 tbsp cocoa powder
1 tsp mocha / coffee extract
⅛ tsp salt

Banana:
3 pc plantain / Latundan banana
130 ml oil
50 ge margarine
250 ml water
100 gr sugar
3 pc pandan leaf

Add-ons:
Colatta Dark Compound, melted
Milk chocolate rice

Steps:
1. Beat the eggs, SP, and sugar until it expands. Then, add the pandan extract and yellow and brown food colorings.
2. Add the salt, Haan cornstarch, and flour in. Mix again on low speed, then add oil in and mix well.
3. Prepare a pan lined with baking paper. Pour the batter in and even it out.
4. Bake the sponge cake at 165°C for 10 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven. Place baking paper on top and flip the cake. Then, peel the baking paper off.
6. Roll the sponge cake from both sides before filling.
7. Prepare a pan. Heat the oil and margarine, then fry the banana until browned.
8. Prepare a saucepan. Add water, sugar, and pandan leaves in. Bring to a boil.
9. Add the fried bananas into the sugar syrup, then add a bit of the margarine mix. Boil until soft.
10. For the Mocha Cream, add Haan Wippy Cream, cocoa powder, and mocha extract into a bowl with cold water. Mix, then add salt in and mix until fluffy.
11. Roll and shape the banana with baking paper.
12. Slice the sponge cake into two, then spread the mocha cream evenly.
13. Add the chocolate rice and banana, then roll. Slice into several pieces and dip both sides into melted chocolate.

title: Kulit BENING, Udang Crunchy! Resep HAKAU UDANG Ala Resto Dimsum [100% Sukses]
recipe_id:
Resep Hakau (26-28 pcs)

Bahan marinasi:
1 sdm baking powder
2 sdt gula
1 sdt garam

Isian:
350 gr udang, kupas bersih, potong
84 gr rebung kaleng / water chestnut, iris tipis
3 sdm minyak goreng
1 sdm air jahe
½ sdm air bawang putih
1 ¼ sdt garam
2 sdt gula
¼ sdt merica
1 sdt penyedap
½ sdt minyak wijen
1 sdt putih telur
½ sdm tepung sagu

Kulit:
80 gr tepung tapioka
120 gr tepung tang mien
175 gr air mendidih (panas maksimal)
2 ½ sdt minyak
½ sdt garam

Langkah:
1. Siapkan mangkuk, masukkan udang, garam, dan gula, aduk rata, diamkan selama 5-10 menit, lalu bilas dengan air, keringkan
2. Setelah kering, masukkan kembali gula dan garam, aduk hingga lengket, lalu tambahkan merica, minyak wijen, minyak goreng, air jahe, air bawang putih, penyedap, dan rebung, aduk rata
3. Tambahkan putih telur dan tepung, aduk, lalu tutup dengan plastik wrap, simpan di kulkas 
4. Untuk kulit, campurkan tepung tang mien dan tepung tapioka, aduk rata, lalu pisahkan 3-4 sdm tepung ke dalam wadah terpisah
5. Masukkan air mendidih, minyak dan garam, segera aduk rata, pindahkan ke talenan, lalu uleni dengan sisa tepung hingga kalis, tutup dengan plastic wrap selama 10-20 menit
6. Ambil ⅓ adonan, bentuk memanjang, potong-potong menjadi beberapa bagian masing-masing 13 gr
7. Siapkan lap bersih yang sudah di olesi minyak, lalu bentuk bulat dengan menggunakan golok yang diberi sedikit minyak, tekan adonan gerakan memutar kanan ke kiri
8. Untuk adonan memakai rolling pin, giling adonan memutar, rapikan dengan cutting ring
9. Masukkan adonan hakau ke dalam kulit, lalu lipat dan bentuk 
10. Kukus hakau dengan Tefal Food Steamer Ultra Compact selama 7-8 menit
11. Hakau siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Har Gow Recipe (yield: 26-28 pcs)

Marinating ingredients:
1 tbsp baking powder
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp salt

Filling:
350 g shrimp, peeled, sliced
84 g canned bamboo shoots / water chestnut, thinly sliced
3 tbsp vegetable oil
1 tbsp ginger liquid
½ tbsp garlic liquid
1¼ tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
¼ tsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancer
½ tsp sesame oil
1 tsp egg white
½ tbsp sago flour

Skin:
80 g tapioca flour
120 g tang mien flour
175 g boiling water
2.5 tbsp oil
½ tsp salt

Steps:
1. Prepare a bowl and add the shrimp, salt, and sugar in. Mix well and rest for 5-10 minutes. Then, rinse with water and drain.
2. Once the shrimp is dry, add more salt and sugar. Stir until sticky, then add the pepper, sesame oil, vegetable oil, ginger liquid, garlic liquid, flavor enhancer, and bamboo shoots. Mix well.
3. Add the egg whites and flour. Stir, then cover with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge.
4. For the skin, mix the tang mien flour and tapioca flour. Stir, then set aside some flour in a separate bowl.
5. Add boiling water, oil, and salt in. Mix well and transfer to a cutting board. Knead the dough with the flour that was set aside until elastic. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 10-20 minutes.
6. Get a third of the dough and roll into a long cylinder. Slice into several pieces @13g.
7. Rub some oil onto a clean cloth. Thin out the dough with an oiled cleaver. Press the dough in a circular manner to the left and right.
8. For the rolling pin method, roll the sides of the dough. Trim with a ring cutter.
9. Place the filling at the center of the skin, then fold and shape.
10. Steam the Har Gow with Tefal Ultra Compact Food Steamer for 7-8 minutes.
11. Har Gow is ready to serve.

title: Resep DENDENG BATOKOK BALADO Dua Varian: Basah & Kering! [Menu IdulAdha]

3. Masukkan daging, air kelapa, garam, penyedap, dan merica, masak selama satu jam hingga daging empuk
4. Untuk sambal, panaskan minyak, tumis cabai merah, cabai keriting, cabai rawit, dan bawang merah, aduk rata, lalu tambahkan sedikit air ungkepan daging, garam dan penyedap masak hingga minyak keluar

recipe_en:
Dendeng Batokok Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
1 kg beef, silverside
15 clove garlic, pounded, minced
6 pc candlenut
1 pc lemongrass, sliced
2 slice galangal
2 pc bay leaf
800 ml coconut water
½ tbsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer

Sambal Balado:
8 pc large red chili, sliced
20 pc curly chili, sliced in two
8 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced, optional
15-18 pc shallot, pounded
½ tsp salt
½ tsp flavor enhancer
Lime / asam kandis, optional

Steps:
1. Slice the meat thinly. Then, chop the candlenuts and garlic finely.
2. Heat some oil and sauté the garlic and candlenuts. Stir, then add the lemongrass, galangal, and bay leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the meat, coconut water, salt, flavor enhancer, and pepper in. Cook for 1 hour until the meat is tender.
4. For the Sambal, heat some oil and sauté the red chili, curly chili, bird’s eye chili, and shallots. Stir, then add a bit of the meat braising liquid, salt, and flavor enhancer. Cook until the oil seeps out.
5. Remove the meat, then flatten and pound until thin.
6. For the grilled version, heat the pan and add a bit of the braising liquid. Add the meat in and cook until the liquid is reduced, then grill until browned.
7. For the fried version, heat some oil and fry until browned and crisp.
8. Transfer to a plate and top with the Sambal. Add lime juice.
9. Dendeng Batokok is ready to serve.

title: Ala GYU-KAKU! Resep NASI GORENG JEPANG [Garlic Fried Rice]

recipe_en:
Garlic Fried Rice Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
8 clove garlic, sliced
1-2 serving rice
1-2 pc egg
¼ pc onion, diced into ½-cm squares
1-2 pc green onion, sliced
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp butter
1 tsp stock powder / dashi powder
¼ tsp pepper
2 tsp sugar
½ tbsp flour
½ pc carrot, diced into 3-mm squares
⅙ pc red bell pepper, diced

Steps:
1. Slice the garlic. Coat with a little bit of flour and fry until golden. Set aside.
2. Heat the pan again. Add the eggs in and stir, then add the onion, carrots, bell peppers, and green onions. Mix well.
3. Add the rice in and stir. Then, add the soy sauce, dashi powder, sugar, pepper, and butter in. Mix well.
4. For the green onion garnish, rinse with cold water.
5. Serve the Garlic Fried Rice with fried garlic and green onions.

title: Capital of Rp 90 Thousand Becomes Luxurious! ICE MIX CAKE Recipe: Fluffy, Fragrant, Savory.
recipe_id:

6 butir kuning telur
60 gr gula pasir
40 gr santan
80 ml minyak
100 ml air
185 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
6 gr baking powder
¾ sdt garam

Bahan b:
6 butir putih telur

½ sdt cream of tartar atau 1 sdt lemon juice, opsional

Pelengkap:
Perisa sesuai selera (cocopandan / pandan / pisang)
Pewarna kuning
Air Gula

Vla bubur sumsum:
350 ml air kelapa / air
½ sdt garam
250 ml santan
3 lembar daun pandan
1 butir telur
80 gr gula
35 gr tepung maizena
50 gr tepung beras

Frosting:
200 gr Haan Wippy Cream
150 ml santan
350 ml air es
⅓ sdt garam

Topping:
Kelapa muda
Sagu mutiara
Nangka
Melon / alpukat

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan kuning telur, siapkan wadah, campurkan telur, gula, minyak, santan, dan air, aduk rata, lalu masukkan tepung terigu, garam, dan baking powder yang sudah diayak, aduk kembali
2. Untuk meringue, kocok putih telur, gula, dan cream of tartar, kocok hingga membentuk lengkungan seperti paruh burung
3. Ambil sedikit meringue, campurkan ke dalam adonan kuning telur, aduk perlahan, lalu masukkan ke dalam adonan putih telur, aduk rata
4. Pisahkan adonan ke dalam wadah menjadi 3 bagian, masukkan perisa pandan dan cocopandan ke dalam dua wadah, aduk rata, lalu tambahkan sedikit pewarna kuning ke dalam adonan cocopandan, aduk kembali
5. Masukkan adonan ke dalam loyang diameter 17 cm, panggang dengan suhu 175 derajat selama 25-30 menit
6. Untuk vla bubur sumsum, panaskan wajan, masukkan santan, air kelapa, dan daun pandan, aduk
7. Di wadah terpisah, campurkan telur, gula, tepung maizena, dan tepung beras, aduk rata, lalu tuang adonan yang telah dimasak, aduk kembali
8. Setelah tercampur, masak kembali hingga matang dan mengental, lalu masukkan ke dalam wadah, tutup dengan plastik wrap, aduk kembali ketika sudah dingin
9. Untuk frosting, campurkan Haan Wippy Cream dengan air es, kocok hingga mengembang, lalu tambahkan santan, kocok kembali hingga tercampur rata
10. Bagi menjadi 3 bagian, masukkan perisa pandan dan cocopandan ke dalam wadah, aduk rata
11. Siapkan meja putar dan tatakan untuk kue, beri sedikit krim letakkan kue di atasnya, lalu tambahkan air gula, ratakan
12. Oleskan vla bubur sumsum, ratakan, lalu tambahkan topping kelapa muda dan nangka
13. Untuk lapisan kedua, lapisi vla bubur sumsum untuk bagian bawah kue, masukkan air gula, vla bubur sum-sum, lalu topping sagu mutiara dan melon
14. Untuk lapisan paling atas, olesi dengan vla bubur sum-sum dan air gula, masukkan frosting cream, ratakan dengan spatula
15. Tambahkan  cream yang sudah dimasukkan ke dalam piping bag di bagian sisi kue, ratakan, bentuk corak dengan spatula, lalu beri topping di atas kue
16. Diamkan kue di kulkas 3-24 jam

recipe_en:
Mochi with Chocolate Filling Recipe (yield: 13 pcs)

Mochi Dough:
300 g glutinous rice flour
50 g oil
250 g water
3 g tutti frutti extract
2 g vanilla powder / vanilla extract
2 g salt
140 g white condensed milk

Filling:
40 g flour
30 g butter
140 g water
140 g milk
20 g cocoa powder
115 g compound milk chocolate, chopped
100 g white condensed milk
⅓ tsp salt

Coating:
100 g tapioca flour, toasted
Pandan leaf

Steps:
1. For the chocolate filling, prepare a pan. Add the butter and flour in and cook.
2. Add the water, milk, salt, condensed milk, and cocoa powder in. Mix well.
3. Turn the heat off. Add the compound milk chocolate in and mix well.
4. Transfer into a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and chill in the fridge.
5. For the Mochi dough, prepare a bowl and add the glutinous rice flour, condensed milk, salt, tutti frutti extract, oil, vanilla powder, and water in. Mix well.
6. Transfer to a heat proof pan. Cover with aluminum foil and steam for 35-40 minutes.
7. For the coating, toast the tapioca flour with pandan leaf until fragrant.
8. Get the chocolate filling out of the fridge. Scoop it out with an ice cream scoop until half full. Shape into balls and coat with the flour.
9. Remove the mochi from the steamer. Knead the dough. Shape it into a long cylinder and divide into 13 pieces.
10. Thin out the Mochi, add the chocolate filling in, and shape into balls again. Coat the surface with a bit of the toasted tapioca flour.

1 sdt lada hitam

400 gr kentang kecil, rebus ½ matang, potong

recipe_en:
Crispy Fried Duck Recipe (yield: 8 servings)

Braising ingredients:
2 pc duck
1 tbsp salt
1 tbsp flavor enhancer
1.5 L water
4 sachet shrimp paste, toasted
50 g toasted coconut paste
35 g palm sugar, sliced

Blended Spices:
10 clove garlic
2 pc turmeric, medium
1 tbsp coriander
30 ml Fortune Cooking Oil

Sliced ingredients:
20 pc candlenut
15 pc shallot
5 pc galangal, thumb-sized, finely sliced
1 pc ginger, thumb-sized, sliced
2 pc aromatic ginger, large, optional

Other ingredients:
3 pc lemongrass
5 pc bay leaf
5 pc kaffir lime leaf

Black Sambal:
8 pc shallot
5 clove garlic
5 pc red chili, large
25 pc red bird’s eye chili
1-2 pc kluwek, optional
200 ml duck braising liquid
1 tsp flavor enhancer
⅓ tsp salt
2 tbsp duck braising spices
200 ml water
20 g palm sugar

Condiments:
Fortune Premium Rice
Peeled cucumber
Lemon basil

Steps:
1. For the basic spices, blend the coriander, aromatic ginger, and turmeric with Fortune Cooking Oil. Then, add the garlic, ginger, galangal, candlenuts, and shallots. Sauté until the oil seeps out.
2. Add the lemongrass, bay leaves, and kaffir lime leaves in. Stir, then add the duck, water, palm sugar, shrimp paste, salt, flavor enhancer, and toasted coconut paste. Cook for 15-20 minutes on high heat, then lower the heat and continue cooking for 20-30 minutes on medium heat.
3. Set the duck aside. Strain the braising liquid and spices.
4. Rest the duck for 15-20 minutes before frying.
5. For the Sambal, blend the shallots, garlic, bird’s eye chili, kluwek, red chili, and duck braising liquid. Cook until the oil seeps out.
6. Add the palm sugar, duck braising spices, flavor enhancer, salt, and water in. Cook until the Sambal changes color.
7. Fry the duck with Fortune Cooking Oil until browned. Then, fry the braising spices until crisp and set aside.
8. Fried Duck is ready to serve with Fortune Premium Rice, lemon basil, Sambal, and cucumber as the condiments.

recipe_en:
Homemade Sausage Recipe (12 pcs)

Ingredients:
250 g ground chicken thigh
150 g fatty ground beef
1.5 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp sugar
5 g baking powder
120 g cold water / shaved ice
1 pc egg white
4 tbsp sago flour / cornstarch
4 tbsp aromatic oil / cooking oil
1 tbsp mustard

Seasoning and Spices (or premixed sausage seasoning mix):
1.5 tsp smoke powder or ½ tsp liquid smoke, optional
½ tbsp garlic powder
½ tbsp onion powder
⅓ tsp dried oregano
⅓ tsp nutmeg powder
⅓ tsp dried marjoram / thyme / basil

Topping:
44 g mild cheddar cheese

Steps:
1. Add the ground chicken and beef into a bowl. Add the sugar and salt in and mix with a mixer until stringy and sticky.
2. Add the spices in, mustard, egg white, baking powder, oil, and sago flour. Mix well.
3. Add the water in. Mix again thoroughly, and cover the bowl with a plastic wrap. Place in the fridge for 20 minutes.
4. Get the bowl out of the fridge and divide the dough into two parts.
5. Add the cheese topping into one of the dough. Mix well. Then, transfer the dough into a piping bag.
6. Prepare 18-cm long sausage casings. Pipe the dough into the sausage casings.
7. Evenly distribute the dough and press it with a finger.
8. Tie the sausage with a twine from the middle to the sides into six parts. Punch the surface with a needle.
9. Steam the sausage with Tefal Ultra Compact Food Steamer for 15-20 minutes.
10. Remove the sausage from the steamer and let them cool. Then, cut the links off.
11. For grilled sausages, score the surface of the sausages. Heat some oil and grill the sausage until browned.

recipe_en:
Coffee Bun Recipe (8-9 pcs)

Bun Dough (sponge/starter):
200 g bread flour
150 ml water
3 gr yeast
45 gr sugar

Dough:
135 g all-purpose flour
20 g powdered milk
3 g yeast
1 pc egg
40 ml milk
45 g butter
4 g salt

Coffee Topping:
5 g instant coffee
2 tbsp hot water
75 g butter
100 g sugar
1 pc egg
75 g all purpose flour
1 tsp coffee extract

Filling:
90 g salted butter

Steps:
1. For the starter, prepare a bowl and combine the flour, yeast, and sugar. Mix well, then add the water bit by bit while stirring. Cover with a plastic wrap and proof for 2-3 hours.
2. For the dough, add the flour, powdered milk, and yeast into Ecohome Noble Stand Mixer. Then, add the milk and egg in. Mix well.
3. Add the starter in and mix again with Ecohome Noble Stand Mixer. Add the butter and salt in. Mix for 15-17 minutes until the dough is really elastic.
4. Transfer the dough onto an oiled work surface. Portion to 70 g each, shape it into balls, and cover with a plastic wrap. Rest for 15 minutes.
5. Flatten the dough a little bit and add the salted butter filling on top. Shape it into a ball and arrange on a baking pan. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 30 minutes.
6. For the topping, add the butter and sugar and mix with Ecohome Noble Stand Mixer until it pales.
7. Add the egg, instant coffee, and coffee extract in. Mix well, then add the four in. Mix again.
8. Pipe the topping onto the bun until it covers half of the bun.
9. Bake at 170°C-175°C for 15 minutes with Ecohome Platinum Electric Oven.
10. Once they’re done, let the buns cool before slicing.

recipe_en:
Crispy Mushroom Recipe (yield: 2-3 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g oyster mushroom

Wet Batter (or use ready-made flour):
½ tbsp minced garlic / garlic powder
½ tbsp minced shallot
5 tbsp flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 pc egg
1.5 tsp baking powder
½ tsp salt
1 tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
50 ml water

Dry Coat:
120 g flour
50 g cornstarch
½ tbsp garlic powder
1 tsp paprika powder
½ tsp salt
⅛ tsp pepper

Condiment:
Chili sauce

Steps:
1. Sprinkle some salt onto the mushroom and massage.
2. Rinse with water, then squeeze it dry to remove the water content.
3. Prepare a clean cloth. Stretch out the mushroom on top, then cover with another cloth and press it dry.
4. For the wet batter, combine all the ingredients together. Add water in and mix well.
5. For the dry coat, combine all the ingredients together. Mix well.
6. Dip the mushroom into the wet batter, then coat with the dry coat. Repeat until finished.
7. Heat the oil and fry the mushroom until golden brown. Then, lower the heat and fry it again until crispy. Drain and set aside.
8. Serve the mushroom with chili sauce.

recipe_en:
Spaghetti Bolognese Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g spaghetti

Bolognese:
120 g onion, chopped
5 clove garlic, minced
100 g carrot, chopped
3 pc celery / 4 tbsp chopped celery
400 g ground meat (chicken / beef / mixed)
80 g corned beef (optional)
5 pc tomato / 500 ml tomato juice
6 tbsp tomato sauce
1-2 tbsp tomato paste (optional)
1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
100 ml apple juice (optional)
100 ml milk
3 pc bay leaf
1-2 tsp stock powder
1-2 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper
200 ml water

Condiments:
2 pc half-boiled egg
Chopped parsley
Parmesan
Olive oil

Steps:
1. For the tomato juice, score the bottom of the tomatoes in an X shape. Boil for a moment, then peel the skin off and blend smoothly.
2. For the Bolognese sauce, heat some oil and sauté the corned beef until half-crisp. Then, add the onions in and sauté until browned.
3. Add the ground meat in and stir-fry until browned. Then, add the garlic, carrots, and celery in and cook until golden brown.
4. Add the apple juice, Worcestershire sauce, tomato juice, tomato sauce, milk, tomato paste, and water.
5. Add the bay leaves in. Season with stock powder, salt, and pepper. Then, place the lid on and cook on low heat for 20-30 minutes.
6. Prepare boiling water and cook the spaghetti for 5 minutes or to the desired doneness.
7. Heat some oil. Pour the Bolognese sauce in as needed and add the boiled spaghetti. Add a bit of the pasta water and cook until the sauce is absorbed.
8. Serve the Spaghetti Bolognese with half-boiled eggs, parsley, parmesan, black pepper, and olive oil as the condiments.

recipe_en:
Chicken & Shrimp Kekian Recipe (yield: 6-7 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g ground chicken thigh
150 g shrimp, peeled and roughly chopped
50 g chicken fat / ground chicken skin
1 tsp salt
3 tbsp sugar
1 tsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancer
1 tsp ngohiong powder (optional)
50 ml cold water
3-4 clove garlic, minced
4-8 pc small green onion, white parts only, finely chopped
90 g tapioca flour
40 g rice flour
1 pc egg white
2 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp sesame oil
40 ml hot oil
Tofu skin

Steps:
1. Heat the oil and pour into the green onions.
2. For the dough, add the chicken and the shrimp into a bowl. Add half of the sugar and salt. Stir until stringy and pales.
3. Add the chicken fat in. Stir well.
4. Add the green onions, egg white, garlic, tapioca flour, rice flour, sesame oil, oyster sauce, ngohiong powder, flavor enhancer, sugar, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Add the cold water in. Mix again.
6. Wipe the tofu skin clean and cut into 6 parts.
7. Add 3-4 tbsp of dough on top of the tofu skin and roll.
8. Steam with Tefal UltraCompact Food Steamer for 30 minutes.
9. After it’s cooked, let the Kekian out of the steamer. Then, fry it whole Tefal Natural Force Wokpan until golden brown and slice.
10. To make it extra crisp, fry the sliced Kekian once more. Set aside.
11. Serve Kekian with Bangkok sauce on the side.

recipe_en:
Sweet & Sour Chicken Recipe (yield: 4-5 servings)

Marinade:
300 g chicken fillet
2 tbsp garlic liquid
1-2 tbsp ginger liquid
1 tbsp Cap Menjangan Soy Sauce
2 tbsp oil
2 tsp stock powder
¼ tsp pepper
30 g cornstarch / tapioca

Wet batter:
9 tbsp flour
30 g cornstarch / tapioca
1 tsp baking powder
¼ tsp salt
130 ml water

Sauce:
150 ml water
4-5 tbsp Cap Menjangan Tomato Sauce
60 g sugar
1-3 slice lemon
3-4 tbsp rice wine vinegar or 1-2 tbsp table vinegar
1 tbsp cornstarch

Condiments:
1 pc red chili, large
½ pc green bell pepper
½ pc onion
50 g pineapple, diced

Steps:
1. Dice the chicken.
2. Marinate it with stock powder, pepper, garlic liquid, ginger liquid, cornstarch, and Cap Menjangan Soy Sauce. Mix evenly.
3. Add the oil in. Stir evenly and rest for at least 10 minutes.
4. For the wet batter, combine all the dry ingredients. Add some salt and water bit by bit. Mix well.
5. Add the chicken into the wet batter. Mix well.
6. Heat some oil and fry the chicken on high heat until half-cooked. Set aside and rest for about 5 minutes.
7. Fry the chicken again until golden brown. Set aside.
8. For the sauce, combine the sugar, vinegar, Cap Menjangan Tomato Sauce, and water.
9. Add the cornstarch in to thicken the sauce. Mix once more.
10. Add the sauce mixture into the pan. Add the lemon in and bring to a boil.
11. Add the onion, green bell pepper, red chili, and diced pineapple in. Mix well.
12. Add the chicken into the sauce. Cook for a bit.
13. Sweet & Sour Chicken is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Beef Steak Recipe (yield: 2-4 servings)

Local Steak:
200 g sirloin
1 pc egg yolk
1 tbsp flour
½ tsp salt
1-2 tbsp black pepper
½ tbsp cornstarch
3 clove garlic, skin-on and pounded
1-2 sprig rosemary
3 tbsp butter

Wagyu:
200-350 g steak (rib-eye)
3 clove garlic, skin on and pounded
½ tsp salt
1 tbsp black pepper
1-2 sprig rosemary
3 tbsp butter

Sauce: 
1-2 tbsp steak sauce / BBQ sauce (https://youtu.be/MrsaBWQX890)
1 tbsp tomato sauce
500 ml beef stock (water + beef stock cubes)
½ tbsp soy sauce
5 pc shallot
Black pepper, to taste
100 ml cream
15 ml cooking wine / sake / cognac / apple juice

Steps:
1. For the local steak, pound the sirloin from two directions and pummel it.
2. Rub with egg yolk evenly.
3. Add the black pepper, salt, flour, and cornstarch.
4. For the sauce, combine the stock with the steak sauce, tomato sauce, and soy sauce. Mix well.
5. For the Wagyu, pat dry with a paper towel and marinate the steak with salt and black pepper. Press it in evenly.
6. Heat Tefal Natura Force Fry Pan with a bit of oil.
7. Sear the steak for 2-3 minutes, then flip.
8. Add the garlic, rosemary, and butter in. Baste the steak.
9. After it’s cooked, rest it for 5-10 minutes.
10. For the local steak, pan-sear the steak until crisp, then flip.
11. Add the garlic, rosemary, and butter in. Baste the steak.
12. After it’s cooked, rest it for 5-10 minutes.
13. Slice the shallots and sauté in the same pan.
14. Add the black pepper, cooking wine, and the sauce in. Cook for 2-3 minutes on high heat.
15.Add the cream and butter in. Stir well.
16. Slice the steak after it cools down.
17. Serve the steak with the sauce.

recipe_en:
3 Rendang Creations Recipe (yield: 4 servings)

Rendang Spring Rolls:
100 g rendang, sliced into small pieces
½ pc onion
40 g dried glass noodles, soaked
50 g carrot, boiled
50 g green beans, boiled
80 g potato, boiled
Green onion
Lumpia / spring roll / rissole skin
1 tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp flavor enhancer
Fortune Oil

Wet batter:
40 g flour
1 pc egg

Others:
Green bird’s eye chili

Rice Cooker Rendang Rice:
300 g Fortune Premium Rice
5-6 tbsp rendang, sliced into small pieces
400 ml water
6 pc whole shallot
25 g fried shallot
2 pc bay leaf
6 pc whole bird’s eye chili
1 tsp chicken / beef powder
1 tbsp margarine
1 tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Rendang Omelette:
6 pc duck / chicken egg
4 tbsp rendang, sliced into small pieces
10 pc shallot, sliced
2 pc Kaffir lime leaf, sliced
6 pc bird’s eye chili, chopped / mashed
2 pc red chili, chopped / mashed
3 pc green onion, sliced
1 pc celery, sliced
1 pc turmeric leaf, sliced
4-5 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp flavor enhancer
½ tsp salt
Fortune Oil

Steps:
1. For the Rendang Rice, add Fortune Premium Rice into the rice cooker.
2. Add the other ingredients and cook properly.
3. For the Rendang Spring Rolls, chop the vegetables into small dice.
4. Heat the pan and sauté the vegetables. Then, add the oyster sauce, rendang, and glass noodles in. Stir well.
5. Add some salt, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Sauté for a bit, then set aside.
6. Prepare the spring roll skin. Add the rendang, green onion, and sautéd vegetables.
7. Fold the spring rolls and dip into the wet batter.
8. Heat the pan. Fry the spring rolls until golden brown. Set aside.
9. Serve with green bird’s eye chili on the side.
10. For the Rendang Omelette, prepare the eggs.
11. Add the rendang and other ingredients in. Mix well.
12. Season with flavor enhancer and salt.
13. Heat the pan. Fry the omelette until the structure is formed.
14. Then, lower the heat. Flip the omelette and fry in a larger pan until it’s cooked.
15. Rendang Omelette is ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Beef Pepper Rice Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
1-2 serving rice
200 g Meat The Boss US Flank Beef
Canned corn as needed
1 pc green onion
80 g butter
Cracked black pepper as needed

Sauce:
½ pc onion
10 clove garlic
3 slice ginger
4 tbsp oil
80 ml soy sauce
150 ml water
80 ml mirin / apple juice
30 ml cooking wine, optional
60 ml honey
1 tsp dashi powder / chicken powder
¼ tsp sesame oil
Sugar, to taste

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, onion, and oil until smooth.
2. Sauté the blended spices. Add the ginger in and cook until fragrant.
3. Add the cooking wine, mirin, soy sauce, and honey in. Then, add the water, dashi powder, and sugar in. Stir well.
4. Add the sesame oil in. Cook on low heat for 5 - 10 minutes.
5. Slice the Meat The Boss US Flank Beef into 2 mm thickness.
6. Prepare a nonstick pan. Without heating the pan, add some oil in.
7. Mold the rice with a small bowl. Toast it until a crust is formed.
8. Add butter, corn, black pepper, and green onions on top of the rice.
9. Add the beef in around the rice. Cook on high heat.
10. Once the beef is half-cooked, add the sauce and 1 tbsp of butter in.
11. Add the sauce on top of the meat. Stir and cook through, then transfer to a plate.
12. Beef Pepper Rice is ready to serve.

recipe_en:

Mayo Sauce ingredients:
12 tbsp mayonnaise
3 tbsp condensed milk / honey
1.5 tbsp mustard
1 tbsp chili sauce (optional)
¼ tsp pepper
1-2 tbsp milk

Filling:
7 slice beef bacon/ham/bacon
45 g cheese
2 pc boiled egg, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced (optional)

Rissole Skin ingredients:
125 g flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
130 ml water
200 ml milk
½ tsp salt
2 tbsp oil
1 pc egg

Coating:
Egg
Breadcrumbs (panko)

Steps:
1. For the skin, combine all the ingredients and stir with a balloon whisk.
2. Heat the pan on low to medium heat. Wait until the pan is hot.
3. Pour the Rissole skin batter in. Swirl to even the spread.
4. Cook for a bit. Release the skin from the pan with a spatula and transfer to a plate.
5. For the sauce, combine the mayonnaise with condensed milk, mustard, chili sauce, and pepper. Stir.
6. Add the milk in. Mix evenly.
7. Prepare the Rissole skin. Add the smoked beef, boiled egg, green onions, mayo sauce, and cheese.
8. Fold the skin. Dip it in the egg then the breadcrumbs to coat.
9. Heat some oil and fry the Rissole until golden brown. Set aside.
10. Mayo Rissole with Smoked Beef & Cheese is ready to serve.

1 bungkus Sasa Bumbu Rendang
500 ml air
Minyak goreng

Opor bola tahu (untuk 4-6 porsi):
500 gr tahu putih
1 siung bawang putih, parut
1 batang daun bawang
1 bungkus Sasa Bumbu Opor
2 sdm tepung terigu
¼ sdm merica
¾ sdm penyedap
⅓ sdt garam
½ sdm gula
500 ml air
1 buah wortel, potong
6 buah buncis, potong
Minyak goreng
Bawang goreng

Langkah:
1. Campur jamur dengan garam secukupnya, lalu remas-remas jamur 
2. Bilas jamur dengan air, lalu peras sampai tidak ada kandungan air di dalam jamur
3. Masukkan tepung terigu, kemudian bentuk seperti bentuk daging rendang
4. Setelah terbentuk, taburkan sisa tepung terigu di atas jamur
5. Panaskan pan dengan minyak secukupnya, lalu goreng jamur sampai kuning kecokelatan
6. Masukkan air, lalu tambahkan Sasa Bumbu Rendang, masak dengan api kecil sampai meresap
7. Untuk opor bola tahu, hancurkan tahu putih
8. Masukkan penyedap, garam, bawang putih, gula, dan merica
9. Panaskan sedikit minyak, lalu di mangkuk terpisah masukkan minyak ke dalam daun bawang
10. Campurkan daun bawang dengan adonan tahu, aduk
11. Bentuk tahu menjadi bola-bola tahu
12. Kemudian goreng dengan api sedang hingga kecokelatan
13. Didihkan air, masukkan wortel dan buncis
14. Masukkan Sasa Bumbu Opor, masak sampai mendidih, lalu masukkan bola-bola tahu 
15. Sajikan dengan bawang goreng sebagai pelengkap

recipe_en:
Mushroom Rendang & Tofu Balls Opor Recipe

Mushroom Rendang (yield 3-5 servings):
500 g oyster mushroom
1 tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
4-5 tbsp flour
1 pack Sasa Rendang Seasoning
500 ml water
Oil

Tofu Balls Opor (yield 4-6 servings):
500 g white tofu
1 clove garlic, grated
1 pc green onions
1 pack Sasa Opor Seasoning
2 tbsp flour
¼ tbsp pepper
¾ tbsp flavor enhancer
⅓ tsp salt
½ tbsp sugar
500 ml water
1 pc carrot, sliced
6 pc green beans, sliced
Oil
Fried shallots

Steps:
1. Add salt as needed into the mushroom and massage.
2. Rinse with water and squeeze the water out completely.
3. Add the flour in and shape into rendang,
4. Then, coat the mushroom with the rest of the flour.
5. Heat the pan with oil as needed, then fry the mushroom until golden brown.
6. Add the water in and Sasa Rendang Seasoning. Cook on low heat until the seasoning is absorbed well.
7. For the Tofu Balls Opor, mash the white tofu.
8. Add the flavor enhancer, salt, garlic, sugar, and pepper in.
9. Heat some oil. In a separate bowl, pour the hot oil into the green onions.
10. Add the green onions with the tofu mixture. Mix well.
11. Shape the tofu into balls.
12. Fry the tofu balls on medium heat until browned.
13. Bring water to a boil and add the carrots and green beans in.
14. Add Sasa Opor Seasoning in. Bring to a boil, then add the tofu balls in.
15. Serve with fried shallots as the garnish.

title: Special! ONE Dough Becomes Three Cookie Recipes [Nastar, PalmCheese, CheeseButton Recipe]
recipe_id:
Resep 3 Kue Kering (32 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
135 gr margarin
135 gr wijsman
3 butir kuning telur
70 gr keju edam / cheddar kering
400 gr tepung terigu protein sedang (kalau mau lebih lumer pakai 365 gr saja)
60 gr maizena
50 gr susu bubuk
6 gr baking powder
70 gr gula halus

Pelengkap nastar (untuk ⅓ resep adonan):
2 butir kuning telur
1-2 sdm minyak
Selai nanas (https://youtu.be/7JgCJFZENUM)

Pelengkap palm sugar cheese cookies (untuk ⅓ resep adonan):
15 gr keju edam
30 gr kacang mede, opsional
Gula palm

Pelengkap cheese button cookies (untuk ⅓ resep adonan):
25 gr keju edam / cheddar kering

Untuk glazur icing:
160 gr gula halus
2 butir putih telur
2 sdt air perasan lemon
1 sdt perisa kopi
⅛ sdt pasta cokelat

Langkah:
1. Kocok margarin, butter dengan gula halus sampai mengembang
2. Masukkan kuning telur satu persatu sambil dikocok
3. Masukkan bahan-bahan kering dan keju, aduk rata
4. Timbang adonan, lalu bagi menjadi 3 adonan
5. Lalu tutup adonan dengan cling wrap
6. Untuk nastar, bentuk persegi lalu potong kotak-kotak, lubangi kemudian isi 1 sendok teh selai nanas, tutup lalu bentuk bulat
7. Lanjutkan hingga adonan habis
8. Panggang dengan suhu 120-130  derajat selama 30 menit, lalu keluarkan dari oven dan olesi dengan campuran kuning telur dan minyak
9. Panggang kembali dengan suhu yang sama selama 20-30 menit
10. Untuk palm sugar cookies, tambahkan kacang mede dan keju parut, bentuk persegi lalu potong kotak-kotak
11. Masukkan ke dalam mangkuk yang berisi palm sugar, tekan sedikit adonan dengan jari
12. Panggang dengan suhu 120-130 derajat selama 50-70 menit
13. Untuk cheese button cookies, tambahkan keju ke dalam adonan, gilas adonan yang sudah dialasi baking paper berbentuk persegi dengan tebal 3 mm
14. Potong adonan dengan ukuran 4 x 3 cm, lalu panggang dengan suhu 120-130 derajat selama 30 menit
15. Keluarkan dari oven, diamkan hingga dingin
16. Untuk topping glazur, kocok putih telur, air perasan lemon, dan gula halus sampai sedikit mengembang
17. Ambil sedikit adonan di mangkuk terpisah, lalu tuang perisa kopi dan pasta cokelat, aduk rata
18. Masukkan topping glazur ke dalam piping bag
19. Tuang glazur putih di atas cookies, ratakan
20. Kemudian tuang glazur cokelat di atasnya, buat motif corak garis dengan tusuk sate
21. Pindahkan cookies yang telah diberi motif ke loyang yang sudah dialasi baking paper
22. Panggang kembali dengan suhu 130 derajat selama 30 menit
recipe_en:
3 Cookies Recipe (32 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
135 g margarine

75 g cornstarch

Pineapple Tarts add-ons (for ⅓ of the dough):

Pineapple jam (https://youtu.be/7JgCJFZENUM)

15 g Edam cheese
30 g cashews, optional
Palm sugar

Cheese Button Cookies add-ons (for ⅓ of the dough):
24 g Edam / dried cheddar

For the icing glaze:
160 g icing sugar
2 pc egg whites
1 tsp lemon juice

⅛ tsp chocolate paste

recipe_en:
Cheese Crazy Fried Rice Recipe (yield 2 servings)

Blended spices:
5 clove garlic
7 pc shallot
2 pc candlenut
1 sachet shrimp paste / fish sauce / dried shrimp, optional
Oil, as needed

Fried Rice ingredients:
250 g rice
2 tbsp blended spices
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tbsp tomato sauce
¼ tsp pepper
½ tsp salt
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer

Stir-fry ingredients:
2 tbsp blended spices
4-5 pc meatballs, sliced
2-3 pc sausages, sliced
2 pc egg
½ pc tomato, sliced
1 pc green onion, sliced
5 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp sweet soy sauce
½ tbsp soy sauce / Maggi / Raja Rasa
½ tbsp chili sauce
½ tbsp tomato sauce
½ tsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
¼ tsp pepper
1-2 pc choy sum, sliced
1 pc cabbage leaf, sliced

Others:
MEG Slice Melt
Sliced cucumber
Crackers

Steps:
1. Blend the spices.
2. Wash the vegetables cleanly with Secret Clean Baby Liquid Cleanser.
3. Heat the pan and sauté the blended spices until fragrant.

5. For the stir-fry, heat some oil as needed. Then, add the eggs in and stir.
6. Add the blended spices, meatballs, sausages, tomato, bird’s eye chili, and green onion. Cook it again.
7. Add the oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, chili sauce, tomato sauce, choy sum, and cabbage. Stir well.

title: White Chocolate Brownies Recipe: Soft & Apple-Scented! [100% Success]

2. Lelehkan mentega, masukkan apel yang sudah diiris lalu masukkan bubuk kayu manis kemudian masak hingga layu
3. Untuk membuat brown butter, lelehkan mentega sampai kecoklatan, tuang kedalam mangkuk dan masukkan Whittakers White Chocolate, aduk rata hingga meleleh
4. Kocok telur dan gula sampai mengembang menggunakan mixer
5. Masukkan gula palem, brown butter,  ekstrak vanila dan garam ke dalam adonan, aduk

recipe_en:
Apple Blondies White Brownies Recipe (1 pan, size 22 x 22 cm / 8.6 x 8.6”)

Blondies Batter:
3 pc egg
100 g white sugar
50 g palm sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
120 g butter (made into brown butter)
125 g Whittaker’s White Chocolate
7 g baking powder
110 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp salt

Apple Filling:
200 g Envy Apple
1 tbsp butter
¼ tsp cinnamon powder

Others:
Envy Apple, sliced

Steps:
1. Peel and slice the Envy Apples.
2. Melt the butter, then add the sliced apple and cinnamon powder in. Cook until it softens.
3. To make the brown butter, melt the butter until it’s browned. Transfer to a bowl and add Whittaker’s White Chocolate. Mix well until the chocolate melts.
4. Beat the eggs and sugar until it expands with a mixer.
5. Add the palm sugar, brown butter, vanilla extract, and salt into the batter. Mix well.
6. Sift the baking powder and flour in. Mix with spatula.
7. Add the sautéd apples in. Mix well.
8. Pour the batter into a 22 x 22 cm (8.6x8.6”) pan lined with baking paper. Garnish with sliced Envy Apples on top.
9. Bake in the oven at 180°C for 30 - 40 minutes.
10. Once it cools down, remove the Blondies from the pan.

title: Rice Cooker CHICKEN RICE Recipe: 100% Local Version [Eid Menu]
recipe_id:
Resep Nasi Ayam Mandhi (untuk 4-6 porsi)

Bumbu halus:
8- 10 siung bawang putih
½ buah bawang bombai ukuran sedang
1 jempol jahe
50 ml minyak

Bahan ayam:
1 ekor ayam utuh
3-4 sdm bumbu halus
2-3 sdm bumbu rendang instan
4 sdm plain yoghurt / santan
½ sdm garam
1 sdt penyedap / kaldu
½ sdt merica
1 sdm oregano

Bahan nasi:
375 gr beras lokal / 325 gr beras basmati
500 ml air kaldu tawar / air
4 sdm bumbu halus
2-3 sdm bumbu rendang instan
2 sdm margarin / ghee/ minyak samin
2 sdt kaldu ayam
1 buah kulit jeruk atau 3-5 lembar daun jeruk
3 lembar daun salam
1 sdt jinten bubuk, opsional
5-6 buah kapulaga, opsional
½ sdt garam
½ sdt merica

Sambal:
15 buah cabai rawit
3 siung bawang putih, iris
6 siung bawang merah, iris
Minyak
Garam
Penyedap

Pelengkap:
Timun, kupas dan iris
Cabai hijau besar
Bawang bombai, iris
Jeruk nipis, iris

Langkah:
1. Blender bumbu halus 
2. Untuk nasi, tumis bumbu halus hingga matang 
3. Kupas kulit jeruk hindari bagian dalam jeruk
4. Masukkan beras, bumbu halus yang sudah di tumis, bumbu rendang, jintan, kaldu ayam bubuk, kapulaga, daun salam, kulit jeruk, margarin, garam, merica, dan air kaldu.
5. Untuk ayam, belah menjadi dua bagian lalu marinasi ayam dengan semua bahan dan tambahkan oregano 
6. Sayat ayam agar bumbu cepat meresap lalu tambahkan merica dan garam
7. Panggang ayam menggunakan Tefal Air Fryer Easy Fry EY-702 dengan suhu 180 derajat selama 15-20 menit
8. Setelah 20 menit keluarkan ayam lalu olesi dengan minyak goreng kemudian panggang kembali dengan suhu 160 derajat selama 8 menit
9. Untuk sambal tumis hingga matang tambahkan garam dan penyedap lalu tuang air dan masak hingga air menyusut
10. Untuk pelengkap, goreng cabai dengan sedikit minyak sampai sedikit kecokelatan
11. Sajikan nasi mandi dengan ayam turki, cabai, bawang bombai, jeruk nipis dan sambal sebagai pelengkap
recipe_en:
Chicken Mandhi Recipe (yield: 4-6 servings)

Blended Spices:
10 clove garlic
½ pc onion
1 thumb ginger
50 ml oil

Chicken:
1 pc whole chicken
3-4 tbsp blended spices
3 tbsp Rendang instant seasoning
4 tbsp plain yoghurt / coconut milk
½ tbsp salt
1 tsp flavor enhancer / stock powder
½ tsp pepper
1 tbsp oregano

Rice:
375 g local rice / 325 g basmati rice
500 ml plain stock / water
4 tbsp blended spices
3 tbsp Rendang instant seasoning
2 tbsp margarine / ghee
2 tsp chicken powder
1 pc lime zest or 3-5 pc Kaffir lime leaf
3 pc bay leaf
1 tsp cumin powder, optional
5-6 pc cardamom, optional
¾ tsp salt
½ tsp pepper

Sambal:
15 pc bird’s eye chili
3 clove garlic, sliced
6 pc shallot, sliced
Oil
Salt
Flavor enhancer

Condiments:
Cucumber, peeled and sliced
Large green chili
Onion, sliced
Lime, sliced

Steps:
1. Blend the spices.
2. For the rice, sauté the blended spices.
3. Peel the lime zest, avoiding the inner part.
4. Add the rice, sautéd blended spices, Rendang seasoning, cumin, chicken powder, cardamom, bay leaves, lime zest, margarine, salt, pepper, and stock.
5. For the chicken, halve it and marinate with all the ingredients and oregano.
6. Slice the chicken so the marinate gets absorbed quickly. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Grill the chicken with Tefal Air Fryer Easy Fry EY-702 on 180°C for 15-20 minutes.
8. After 20 minutes, remove the chicken and brush with oil. Grill again at 160°C for 8 minutes.
9. For the Sambal, sauté the ingredients until cooked. Season with salt and flavor enhancer, then pour the water in and cook until it’s reduced.
10. For the condiments, grill the chili with a bit of oil until browned.
11. Serve Chicken Mandhi with chicken, chili, onion, lime, and Sambal on the side.

title: Chinese Resto's Favorite! Recipe for TWO FLAVORS: Savory & Crispy [Ala Resto Chinese]

recipe_en:
Gai Lan Two Ways Recipe (yield: 2 servings)

Ingredients:
500 g Greenville Gai Lan

Oyster Sauce for Gai Lan stems and leaves:
1 pc green onion, sliced
2 clove garlic, pounded
1 tbsp cooking wine, optional
250 ml stock or water + stock powder
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp soy sauce
½ tbsp cornstarch

Salt & Pepper for Gai Lan leaves:
10 clove garlic, minced
8 pc bird’s eye chili, sliced
¼ tsp salt
½ tsp powdered sugar
¼ tsp flavor enhancer

Others:
Oil for frying

Steps:
1. Rinse the Greenville Gai Lan thoroughly. Separate the stems and the leaves.
2. Halve the stems.
3. Slice half of the leaves for the Salt & Pepper version.
4. For the Oyster Sauce Gai Lan, boil the Gai Lan with a bit of salt for 1-2 minutes. Drain and set on the plate.
5. Heat some oil. Sauté the green onions until fragrant, then add minced garlic in.
6. Deglaze the pan with cooking wine.
7. Add stock, oyster sauce, sugar, soy sauce, sesame oil, and diluted cornstarch in. Cook until the sauce thickens.
8. Pour the oyster sauce on top of the boiled gai lan.
9. For the Salt & Pepper version, add the gai lan leaves in, place the lid on, and fry until crisp.
10. Heat some oil and sauté the garlic on low heat until yellow.
11. Add the sliced bird’s eye chili. Fry for a bit, then drain.
12. Set the fried gai lan on the plate. Sprinkle it with fried garlic and bird’s eye chili.
13. Gai Lan Two Ways is ready to serve.

title: TANPA Oven & Cream! Resep DESSERT BOX COKLAT: Bahan Minimarket Rasa Premium!
recipe_id:
Resep Chocolate Dessert Box (untuk 2 box)

Sponge cake:
80 gr Tepung Bogasari Segitiga Biru
1 sdm maizena
30 gr cokelat bubuk
½ sdt garam
1 sdt baking powder, opsional
75 gr gula
3 butir telur
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
80 ml minyak goreng
1-2 sdt perasa kopi / kopi instan

Whipped Ganache:
120 gr milk chocolate
120 gr dark chocolate 
120 ml susu
65 gr margarin

Crumb:
60 gr Tepung Bogasari Kunci Biru
30 gr gula
50 gr margarin / mentega
20 gr kelapa parut
½ sdt garam

Vla kopi:
50 gr kopi susu (tanpa ampas)
300 ml susu
1 butir telur
1 sdm maizena
40 gr kental manis

Vla susu:
40 gr susu bubuk
300 ml susu
1 butir telur
1 sdm maizena
40 gr kental manis

Lainnya:
Chocochip

Langkah:
1. Untuk membuat sponge cake, kocok gula dan telur sampai mengembang
2. Masukkan minyak, ekstrak vanila, dan kopi
3. Campur dengan bahan kering yang sudah diayak, aduk rata menggunakan spatula
4. Kukus selama 20-25 menit di api besar atau panggang di loyang yang lebar dengan ketebalan 1 cm di suhu 180 derajat 12-15 menit
5. Untuk membuat ganache, panaskan susu dan margarin hingga simmer
6. Tuang ke dalam mangkuk berisi cokelat yang sudah dicincang, aduk rata
7. Dinginkan selama 3-4 jam di dalam kulkas
8. Kocok adonan ganache sampai mengembang
9. Untuk membuat vla kopi, panaskan susu hingga simmer
10. Di wadah terpisah, aduk bahan lainnya kemudian tuang susu panas sedikit demi sedikit sambil diaduk
11. Masukkan kembali semua bahan kedalam pan masak hingga mengental
12. Untuk membuat crumbs, aduk semua bahan
13. Sangrai di teflon di api sedang hingga setengah kering lalu gunakan api kecil masak hingga matang dan kering sambil terus diaduk
14. Potong sponge cake sesuai ukuran wadah
15. Susun berlapis crumbs- sponge cake - vla kopi / susu -  whipped ganache - cookie crumbs sampai penuh
16. Lapisi lapisan paling atas dengan ganache yang dipanaskan sebentar di dalam microwave
17. Hias dengan chocochip, simpan di lemari es sebelum dihidangkan

title: PONTIANAK'S SPECIAL BAKWAN Recipe: Crispy but still soft!

180 gr tepung terigu protein sedang

1. Campurkan semua bahan adonan hingga rata
2. Siapkan minyak panas, celupkan sendok sayur / cetakan bakwan ke dalam minyak panas
3. Tuang adonan kedalam cetakan, beri topping salami / rebon / telur puyuh lalu diaduk dan diberi irisan cabai merah

recipe_en:
Pontianak Bakwan Recipe (12 pcs)

180 g all-purpose flour
45 g rice flour
30 g cornstarch

1.5 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom stock powder
½ tsp baking powder
1 bunch chives, sliced
400 ml water

3 clove garlic, mashed

Topping:
10 g rebon
4 pc salami
4 pc quail egg
1 pc red chili, sliced

Sambal:
4 tbsp chili sauce
4 tbsp Bangkok chili sauce
2 clove garlic, minced
3 pc red curly chili / bird’s eye chili, chopped
1 tbsp vinegar
¼ tsp salt
¼ tsp flavor enhancer
150 ml water

Steps:
1. Combine all the batter ingredients.
2. Prepare hot oil. Dip a ladle / Bakwan mold into the hot oil.
3. Pour the batter into the mold. Add the salami / rebon / quail egg topping. Whisk the egg a bit, then add sliced red chili on top.
4. Dip the mold in and fry until half-crisp. Remove the Bakwan from the mold and fry until golden brown. Set aside.
5. For the Sambal, combine all the ingredients. Bring to a boil and cook until thickens.
6. Serve Bakwan Pontianak with Sambal on the side.

title: Boil First, 100% Crispy and Long-Lasting! Recipe for Crispy Chicken Skin with Butter Sauce [100% ...

recipe_en:
Butter Soy Crispy Skin Recipe (yield: 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
350 g chicken skin
1 tbsp salt
½ tsp pepper
1 pc egg
80 g all-purpose flour
35 g cornstarch
1.5 tsp garlic powder
¾ tsp baking powder

Butter Soy sauce:
2 clove garlic, sliced
½ pc onion
6 pc bird’s eye chili, chopped (optional)
1 tbsp margarine / butter
9 tbsp Bango sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp water
1 tbsp sugar

Steps:
1. Cook the chicken skin in boiling water. Add salt and pepper, and boil for 3-5 minutes.
2. Drain the skin and rinse under running water.
3. Heat some oil in the pan.
4. Meanwhile, whisk the egg with some salt.
5. For the dry coat, combine the flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, and baking powder. Mix well.
6. Add the chicken skin into the egg, then coat with the dry coat.
7. Fry the chicken skin on medium-high heat. After it’s half-cooked, lower the heat and fry until golden brown. Set aside.
8. For the Butter Soy sauce, add some oil and sauté the garlic and onion until fragrant.
9. Add the Worcestershire sauce, oyster sauce, and Bango sweet soy sauce. Let it cook.
10. Add the tomato sauce and water. Stir.
11. Add the drained chicken skin into the Butter Soy sauce. Stir.
12. Butter Soy Crispy Chicken Skin is ready to serve.

title: Homemade Practical! CLASSIC Italian Resto-style LASAGNA Recipe: Make Your Own Skin.
recipe_id:
Resep Classic Lasagna (2 loyang)

Saus bolognese:
1 buah bawang bombai, cincang
1 buah wortel, cincang
6 batang seledri, cincang
4 siung bawang putih, cincang
600 gr daging sapi giling
400 gr daging ayam giling
2 kaleng tomat kupas
8 sdm saus tomat
3 sdm tomato paste
300 ml susu
700 ml kaldu sapi
½ sdt herb mix / oregano
50 ml jus apel, opsional
Garam sesuai selera
Gula sesuai selera
Merica sesuai selera

Cheese sauce (bechamel):
60 gr Anchor Unsalted Butter
5 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
800 ml susu
450 ml Anchor Culinary Cream
100 gr Mainland Tasty
100 gr Mainland Vintage
¼ sdt bubuk pala
¾ sdt garam

Kulit lasagna:
400 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
4 butir telur
2 sdm air
1 sdt garam

Pelengkap:
100 gr Mainland Mild, Parut
Parsley cincang

Langkah:
1. Untuk lasagna, campurkan garam dan tepung lalu aduk rata
2. Pecahkan telur lalu beri air dan aduk rata, tuang perlahan ke dalam adonan tepung sambil terus diaduk menggunakan sumpit
3. Uleni adonan sebentar hingga permukaannya mulus, bungkus dengan plastik wrap dan diamkan 15-30 menit
4. Setelah 30 menit, pipihkan adonan menggunakan rolling pin kemudian lipat dan pipihkan lagi lalu gulung dan bungkus menggunakan plastik wrap kemudian diamkan 1-2 jam
5. Bagi adonan menjadi 8 bagian sama rata, taburi adonan menggunakan terigu dan pipihkan sedikit menggunakan rolling pin
6. Gunakan penggiling mie / pasta, giling masing-masing adonan dengan ketebalan no2, 4 dan 6 secara bertahap
7. Taburi setiap lembar lasagna dengan terigu, potong sesuai ukuran loyang yang akan digunakan
8. Untuk saus bolognese, panaskan minyak lalu tumis bawang bombai hingga kering dan masukkan wortel, seledri, dan bawang putih kemudian tumis hingga wangi
9. Masukkan daging ayam dan daging sapi kemudian tambahkan herbs dan masak hingga kecokelatan
10. Masukkan tomat kupas kaleng, pasta tomat, saus tomat, dan jus apel
11. Tuang kaldu sapi dan susu lalu masak hingga mengental
12. Untuk cheese sauce, panaskan Anchor Unsalted Butter hingga meleleh lalu masukkan terigu dan aduk rata
13. Masukkan pala bubuk dan susu sambil terus diaduk
14. Masukkan Anchor Culinary Cream, Mainland Tasty, Mainland Vintage parut, dan garam lalu aduk rata dan masak hingga mengental 
15. Siapkan loyang atau wadah tahan panas, tuang saus bolognese, dan susun lasagna - bolognese – cheese sauce lalu ulangi step ini hingga 3-4 lapisan
16. Taburi bagian atas dengan Mainland Mild parut hingga rata
17. Panggang dengan suhu 200°C selama 40-50 menit
18. Sajikan dengan taburan parsley di atasnya

title: NO Mixer! Lotus Biscoff Cheesecake Recipe: Savory & Light on the Mouth.
recipe_id:
Lotus Biscoff Cheesecake (loyang diameter 17 cm)

Base:
120 gr Lotus Biscoff Biscuit, haluskan
60 gr mentega cair
  
Chesecake (semua bahan dalam suhu ruang):
425 gr cream cheese
110-130 gr kental manis
120 ml cream atau susu
1 pcs telur
2 pcs kuning telur
½ sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
¼ sdt garam

Pelengkap:
Lotus Biscoff Crunchy Spread
Lotus Biscoff Biscuit

Langkah:
1. Aduk cream cheese menggunakan spatula sampai lembut
2. Masukkan kental manis, cream, dan ekstrak vanila lalu aduk kembali 
3. Masukkan telur satu per satu, aduk rata
4. Masukan garam dan tepung, aduk kembali menggunakan ballon whisk
5. Campurkan biskuit yang sudah dihancurkan dengan mentega cair, aduk rata
6. Siapkan loyang yang dialasi dengan baking paper
7. Oleskan baking paper dengan minyak atau mentega
8. Masukkan base ke dalam loyang dan ratakan
9. Masukkan adonan cheese cake ke dalam loyang, ratakan
10. Tutup dengan alumunium foil
11. Masukan adonan cheese cake ke dalam Tefal Air Fryer  Easy Fry EY-401 dengan suhu 160 derajat celcius, selama 60-90 menit. 
12. Lepas alumunium foil lalu panggang kembali 10 menit. 
13. Dinginkan cheese cake di dalam lemari es minimal 4 jam atau semalaman sebelum dikeluarkan dari loyang
14. Setelah dingin keluarkan cheese cake dari loyang dan lepaskan baking paper
15. Panaskan Lotus Biscoff Crunchy Spread menggunakan microwave selama 20 detik
16. Oleskan di atas cheese cake sampai merata
17. Sajikan cheese cake dengan topping dan Lotus Biscoff Biscuit yang telah dihancurkan
recipe_en:
Lotus Biscoff Cheesecake (7” pan)

Base:
120 g Lotus Biscoff Biscuit, grind
60 g melted butter
  
Cheesecake (all ingredients at room temperature):
425 g cream cheese
110-130 g condensed milk
120 ml cream or milk
1 pc egg
2 pc egg yolk
½ tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tsp vanilla extract
¼ tsp salt

Others:
Lotus Biscoff Crunchy Spread
Lotus Biscoff Biscuit

Steps:
1. Stir the cream cheese with a spatula to soften.
2. Add the condensed milk, cream, and vanilla extract in. Mix well.
3. Add the eggs one by one. Mix well.
4. Add the salt and flour in. Stir with a balloon whisk.
5. Combine the ground biscuit with melted butter. Mix well.
6. Prepare a baking pan lined with baking paper.
7. Brush the baking paper with oil or butter.
8. Add the base into the pan. Level it out.
9. Add the cheesecake batter into the pan. Level the surface.
10. Cover with aluminum foil.
11. Bake the cheesecake with Tefal Air Fryer Easy Fry EY-401 at 160°C for 60-90 minutes.
12. Uncover the aluminum foil, then bake again for 10 minutes.
13. Cool the cheesecake inside the fridge for at least 4 hours or overnight before removing it from the pan.
14. After the cheesecake is chilled, remove it from the pan and remove the baking paper.
15. Heat the Lotus Biscoff Crunchy Spread Crunchy with a microwave for 20 seconds.
16. Spread on top of the cheesecake evenly.
17. Serve the Cheesecake with the toppings and crushed Lotus Biscoff Biscuit.

title: Recipe for FILLED FAN TOFU Ala Seafood Restaurant: Long-Lasting Crispy!
recipe_id:

5-6 siung bawang putih, cincang

1 ½ sdm tepung tapioka / maizena

1 sdm gula
½ sdt penyedap / kaldu bubuk
½ sdt merica
½ sdm saus tiram
½ sdt minyak wijen

150 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
50 gr tepung maizena

325 gr air
½ sdm kaldu bubuk / penyedap
⅓ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica

Lainnya:
Cabai rawit
Saus bangkok

Nasi putih

Langkah:
1. Tumis bawang bombai dan daun bawang hingga kecoklatan lalu masukkan bawang putih kemudian tumis hingga wangi, masukkan seledri
2. Masukkan udang dan cumi, aduk rata
3. Masukkan sayuran lalu bumbui dengan garam, gula, merica, kaldu bubuk, saus tiram dan minyak wijen
4. Matikan api lalu masukkan tepung maizena/tapioka, aduk rata

6. Lubangi satu sisi bagian tahu, keluarkan isian tahu dengan menggunakan sendok kecil
7. Isi tahu dengan tumisan menggunakan bantuan sendok atau plastik segitiga kemudian ratakan
8. Celupkan tahu kedalam adonan tepung pelapis
9. Goreng tahu dengan minyak Fortune yang sudah dipanaskan hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan

recipe_en:
Seafood Tofu Recipe (15 pcs)

Ingredients:
15 pc yellow tofu, fried
150 g peeled shrimp, chopped
100 g squid, diced
100 g carrot, grated
100 g wood ear mushroom, sliced
50 g green beans, sliced
3 pc green onion, sliced
5-6 clove garlic, minced
½ pc onion, chopped
2 pc celery, chopped (optional)
1.5 tbsp tapioca flour / cornstarch
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
½ tsp flavor enhancer / stock powder
½ tsp pepper
½ tbsp oyster sauce
½ tsp sesame oil

Wet Batter:
150 g flour
50 g cornstarch
1 tsp baking powder, optional
325 g water
½ tbsp stock powder / flavor enhancer
⅓ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper

Others:
Bird’s eye chili
Bangkok chili sauce
Fortune oil for frying
Warm rice

Steps:
1. Sauté the onion and green onions until browned. Add the garlic in, then sauté until fragrant and add the celery in.
2. Add the shrimp and squid. Stir.
3. Add the vegetables in. Season with salt, sugar, pepper, stock powder, oyster sauce, and sesame oil.
4. Turn the heat off, then add the cornstarch/tapioca flour. Mix well.
5. Combine all the wet batter ingredients. Mix well.
6. Make a hole on one side of the tofu and remove some of the insides with a small spoon.
7. Fill the tofu with the stir-fried filling with a spoon or a piping bag.
8. Dip the tofu into the wet batter.
9. Fry the tofu with heated Fortune oil until golden brown. Set aside.
10. Serve the Seafood Tofu with bird’s eye chili, Bangkok chili sauce, and rice on the side.

title: Vietnamese Style BEEF PHO NOODLES Recipe: 100% Local Ingredients!
recipe_id:
Resep Vietnamese Beef Pho

Kuah (8-10 porsi):
500 gr iga / tulang sapi
500 gr daging potongan besar
100 gr kikil / urat, opsional
5 liter air
1 sdm garam
4-5 sdm kecap ikan
20-30 gr gula batu / gula pasir
½ sdm kaldu
½ sdt merica

Rempah:
2 buah bawang bombai, potong
2 ruas jahe
2 sdm ketumbar
5 butir kapulaga
4 buah bunga lawang
2 batang kayu manis
3 butir cengkih

Pelengkap (untuk 2 porsi):
100 gr daging segar slice tipis
2 bungkus Skinny Pasta Fettuccine Shape
½ buah bawang bombai, iris
1 batang daun bawang, iris
Daun ketumbar
Daun kemangi
Daun mint
Cabai hijau, iris
Cabai merah, iris
Jeruk nipis
Tauge segar
Saus hoisin
Sriracha / saus sambal

Langkah:
1. Rebus tulang iga dan kikil selama 5-10 menit, buang air dan lemaknya kemudian cuci dengan air mengalir
2. Sangrai rempah hingga kecoklatan, sisihkan
3. Sangrai juga bawang bombai dan jahe, sisihkan
4. Masukkan tulang, daging, kikil, rempah sangrai, bawang bombai, jahe, air, merica dan garam kemudian presto selama 1 jam
5. Setelah dipresto, buang minyak di bagian atas kuah
6. Sisihkan daging dan kikil, saring kuah
7. Masukkan gula batu, kaldu bubuk dan kecap ikan, aduk rata
8. Masukkan daging dan kikil yang sudang dipotong lalu masak hingga kaldu mendidih
9. Rendam bawang bombai, daun kemangi, daun bawang, daun mint dan daun ketumbar di air dingin
10. Bilas Skinny Pasta Fettuccine shape dengan air mengalir kemudian rebus sebentar dengan air mendidih
11. Susun Skinny Pasta Fettuccine Shape, daging iris dan bawang bombai kemudian siram dengan kuah kaldu yang mendidih. Sajikan dengan tauge,  daun kemangi, daun mint, daun bawang, daun ketumbar, jeruk nipis, cabai merah, cabai hijau, saus hoisin dan sriracha sebagai pelengkap

Produk Skinny Pasta juga tersedia di Foodhall, Ranch Market, dan Kemchick
