recipe_en:
Spicy and Addictive! Squid Sambal Recipe

Aside from its delicious flavor, squid contains lots of nutrients, starting from vitamins to minerals that are important for our body. This time, I'm making a Squid Sambal using salted squid. The bouncy and soft texture of the squid is combined with the spiciness and savoriness of the Sambal. It's a great dish for spicy food lovers. I got all of these fresh ingredients from HappyFresh #FreshlyHandpicked.

Squid Sambal Recipe (yield: 2 jars)

Ingredients:
300 g salted squid
5 pc Kaffir lime leaves
1 stalk lemongrass
2 pc bay leaves
5 clove garlic
10 pc shallots
50 ml oil
2 pc shrimp paste
30 pc bird's eye chili
8 pc red chili, large
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp flavor enhancers
1 pc limau lime

Steps:
1. Soak the squid with hot water. Set aside. Slice the squid and rinse to clean.
2. Heat a bit of oil. Sauté the squid and place the lid on to prevent the oil from splattering. Cook until the squid changes color. Remove and set aside.
3. For the spice mix, blend the shallots, garlic, and oil together to a paste.
4. For the chopped spices, add the red chili, bird's eye chili, and shrimp paste to a food processor. Chop finely.
5. Heat the pan where you fried the squid. Sauté the spice mix, lemongrass, Kaffir lime leaves, and bay leaves until fragrant. Add the chopped spices and sauté until fragrant on medium heat.
6. Season with sugar, salt, flavor enhancers, and limau lime. Mix well.
8. Squid Sambal can be stored for 1 week in a sterilized jar or vacuumed plastic bag.

title: Slanted Slice! Recipe for Soft Maranggi Satay WITHOUT Tenderizer [Eid al-Adha]
recipe_id:
Resep Sate Maranggi. Sate Maranggi banyak kita jumpai di daerah Purwakarta. Hidangan khas sunda ini terbuat dari daging sapi yang dipotong-potong dan dibalur dengan bumbu bakar khusus. Semakin nikmat disajikan bersama lontong atau nasi timbel.

Resep Sate Maranggi (12 tusuk)

Bahan:
300 gr daging has dalam

Bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
3 cm lengkuas, iris
2 sdt ketumbar, sangrai
3 sdm air asam jawa
4 sdm Kecap Sedaap Kedelai Hitam Special
1 sdm gula merah
1 sdt garam
1 sdt merica
½ sdt kaldu jamur

Sambal tomat:
2 buah tomat
5 cabai rawit merah
15 cabai rawit hijau
1 siung bawang putih
3 siung bawang merah
2 buah jeruk limau
½ sdt garam
1 sdt gula

Langkah:
1. Iris daging memanjang kurang lebih selebar jari, dengan arah memotong serat
2. Blender semua bumbu halus hingga benar-benar halus, tuang ke dalam daging aduk rata, marinasi daging minimal 1-2 jam
3. Setelah dua jam, tusuk daging menggunakan tusuk sate yang sudah direndam terlebih dahulu, tusuk daging dengan arah zig-zag
4. Panaskan griller, oles dengan sedikit minyak / lemak sapi, panggang kedua sisi sate sambil sesekali dioles dengan sisa bumbu halus, panggang sate dengan tingkat kematangan sesuai selera
5. Untuk sambal tomat, ulek bawang putih dan garam hingga halus. Tambahkan cabai rawit merah dan hijau ulek hingga halus, masukkan irisan tomat bumbui dengan gula, beri perasan jeruk limau, aduk rata
6. Sajikan sate maranggi dengan sambal tomat, irisan bawang merah, jeruk limau, dan kecap manis
recipe_en:
Slice it Diagonally! Tender Maranggi Satay Recipe with NO Tenderizer [Eid al-Adha]

Maranggi Satay is most commonly found in Purwakarta area. This Sundanese dish is made of sliced beef and marinated with a special grilling sauce. It tastes even better when it's served with rice cakes or Timbel rice.

Maranggi Satay (yield: 12 skewers)

Ingredients:
300 g tenderloin

The spices:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallots
3 cm galangal, sliced
2 tsp coriander, roasted
3 tbsp tamarind juice
4 tbsp "Sedaap Kedelai Hitam Special" sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp brown sugar
1 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1/2 tsp mushroom stock powder

Tomato Sambal:
2 pc tomatoes
5 pc red bird's eye chili
15 pc green bird's eye chili
1 clove garlic
3 pc shallots
2 pc Kaffir lime
1/2 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar

Steps:
1. Cut the beef into long slices to about a forefinger wide. Cut in the direction of the grain.
2. Blend all the spices to a paste. Add to the beef and mix well. Marinate the beef for at least 1-2 hours.
3. After 2 hours, skewer the meat on a pre-soaked skewer using a zigzag pattern.
4. Heat up the griller. Brush a bit of oil or beef fat. Grill both sides of the satay and baste with the marinating sauce once in a while. Adjust the doneness to your liking.
5. For the Tomato Sambal, mash the garlic with salt to a paste. Add the red and green bird's eye chili. Mash to a fine paste, then add sliced tomatoes. Season with sugar and Kaffir lime juice. Mix well.
6. Serve Maranggi Satay with Tomato Sambal, sliced shallots, Kaffir lime, and sweet soy sauce.

title: 100% Lurus Krispi! Resep Tempura Udang Marugame [Bahan Lokal]
recipe_id:
Resep Tempura Udang. Tempura adalah salah satu makanan populer khas Jepang. Kali ini aku akan share resep Tempura Moriawase yang terdiri dari udang dan sayuran. Kunci membuat tempura yang renyah adalah adonan tepung yang tepat. Dijamin kriuk kriuk asalkan memperhatikan step by stepnya!

Resep Tempura Moriawase (30 pcs)

Bahan tempura:
10 sdm tepung protein rendah
25-30 sdm air dingin
1 sdt cuka
¼ sdt baking soda
8 ekor udang, kupas
½ bonggol bawang bombai, iris
6 lembar horenso
¼ buah kabocha, iris
1 buah terong, potong kipas

Bahan tentsuyu:
3 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm jus apel
5 sdm air
½ sdm gula

Pelengkap:
1 batang daun bawang, iris
3 cm jahe, parut
½ buah lobak, parut

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan tepung, campurkan cuka dan baking soda hingga berbuih. Lalu campurkan dengan air dan tepung, aduk rata.
2. Sayat-sayat udang yang sudah dibersihkan, lalu tekan-tekan agar udang menjadi lurus, bumbui dengan sedikit garam.
3. Letakkan udang dan semua bahan sayuran kecuali horenso di atas talenan, taburi kedua sisi dengan sedikit tepung.
4. Panaskan minyak, celupkan masing-masing bahan ke dalam adonan tepung lalu goreng di minyak panas hingga kuning keemasan, angkat dan tiriskan.
5. Untuk tentsuyu, campurkan kecap asin, jus apel, air, dan gula, aduk rata.
6. Hidangkan tempura dengan tentsuyu, daun bawang iris, jahe dan lobak parut sebagai pelengkap
recipe_en:
Tempura Moriawase ala Japanese Restaurants Recipe

Tempura is one of the most popular Japanese dishes. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for Tempura Moriawase that's composed of shrimp and vegetables. The key to making a crispy Tempura is to make the right batter. It's guaranteed to be crispy as long as you pay attention to the step-by-step!

Tempura Moriawase Recipe (30 pcs)

Tempura ingredients:
10 tbsp pastry flour
25-30 tbsp cold water
1 tsp vinegar
1/4 tsp baking soda
8 pc shrimp, peeled
1/2 onion, sliced
6 pcs Horenso
1/4 pc Kabocha, sliced
1 pc eggplant, slice to a fan

Tentsuyu ingredients:
3 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp apple juice
5 tbsp water
1/2 tbsp sugar

Condiments:
1 stalk scallions, sliced
3 cm ginger, grated
1/2 pc radish, grated

Steps:
1. For the batter, combine the vinegar and baking soda until it bubbles. Add to the water and flour mixture. Stir well.
2. Cut the peeled shrimp. Massage the shrimp to straighten it up. Season with a bit of salt.
3. Place the shrimp and all the vegetables save for the Horenso on a cutting board. Sprinkle both sides with flour.
4. Heat the oil. Dip each ingredient into the batter and fry in the hot oil until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
4. For the Tentsuyu, combine the soy sauce, apple juice, water, and sugar. Mix well.
5. Serve the Tempura with the Tentsuyu, sliced scallions, grated ginger, and grated radish as condiments.

title: NO Oven, Just Rice Cooker! Cheese Cake Castella Cake Recipe [Birthday Cake]
recipe_id:
Resep Kue Ulang Tahun Bolu Keju Castella Cake. Castella cake atau kasutera adalah jenis sponge cake yang sangat populer di Jepang. Kue ini cukup mudah dibuat karena tidak memerlukan pengembang seperti SP, TBM, atau ovalet. Sedikit berbeda di sini aku menggunakan rice cooker untuk memasaknya. Tekstur kue yang lembut dan berpori ditambah dengan manisnya whipped cream dan gurihnya keju. Cocok untuk teman ngopi atau teh.

Resep Castella Cake (untuk 1 loyang diameter 16 cm)

Bahan:
4 butir kuning telur
40 gr gula pasir
40 ml minyak
60 ml susu cair
85 gr tepung protein sedang
4 butir putih telur
60 gr gula pasir
½ sdt garam
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
2 ½ sdt baking powder (opsional)
2 keju lembaran

Bahan coating:
150 ml whipped cream
25 gr gula pasir
200 gr keju cheddar

Langkah:
1. Kocok kuning telur, gula, minyak, susu, garam, dan ekstrak vanila sampai larut atau tercampur rata
2. Tambahkan tepung terigu dan baking powder (opsional) yang sudah diayak sedikit demi sedikit, aduk rata
3. Kocok putih telur sampai mengembang tambahkan gula dalam dua bagian, aduk sampai putih telur yang  jika diangkat akan membentuk paruh burung
4. Tuang ¼ adonan ke dalam adonan kuning telur, aduk rata lalu campurkan ke dalam 3/4 adonan putih telur yang tadi, aduk rata
5. Tuang adonan ke dalam loyang rice cooker  yang sudah diolesi mentega dan terigu
6. Beri potongan keju di dalam adonan, jangan sampai menyentuh dasar loyang.
7. Masak dengan rice cooker selama 40 menit
8. Setelah matang, angkat dan balikkan loyang lalu dinginkan di atas cooling rack
9. Kocok whipped cream dan gula sampai kaku, masukkan ke dalam piping bag
10. Setelah dingin belah dua kue sama rata, lalu semprotkan whipping cream secara merata di layer pertama dan ratakan dengan spatula. Tumpuk dengan layer kedua, semprotkan lagi hingga rata di seluruh permukaan kue, ratakan dengan spatula
11. Beri parutan keju hingga menutupi seluruh permukaan kue
12. Castella Cake siap disajikan
recipe_en:
NO Oven, Only with a Rice Cooker! Naturally Soft Cheese Sponge Cake Recipe [Castella Cake]

Castella Cake or kasutera is a type of sponge cake that is very popular in Japan. This cake is quite easy to make as it doesn't need emulsifier like SP, TBM, or Ovalet. The difference here is I'm using a rice cooker to bake the cake. The soft and porous cake texture is complemented with the sweet whipped cream and savory cheese. It's great to accompany your coffee or tea.

Castella Cake Recipe (for a 6" pan)

Ingredients:
4 pc egg yolks
40 g sugar
40 ml oil
60 ml milk
85 g all-purpose flour
4 pc egg whites
60 g sugar
1/2 tsp salt
1 tsp Vanilla extract
2.5 tsp baking powder (optional)
2 pc sliced cheese

Frosting ingredients:
150 ml whipped cream
25 g sugar
200 g Cheddar cheese

Steps:
1. Whisk the yolks, sugar, oil, milk, salt, and Vanilla extract. Mix well.
2. Add the sifted flour and baking powder (optional) in bit by bit. Mix well.
3. Whip the whites until foamy. Add the sugar in two increments. Whip until when lifted, the egg whites form a bird's beak.
4. Pour 1/4 of the whites into the yolk mixture. Mix well and combine with the rest of the whites. Mix well.
5. Pour the batter into the rice cooker pan that has been rubbed with butter and flour.
6. Add the sliced cheese into the batter. Don't let it touch the base.
7. Cook with the rice cooker for 40 minutes.
8. When it's done, remove the pan and turn it over on a cooling rack.
9. Whip the whipped cream with sugar until it's firm and add into a piping bag.
10. After the cake cools, slice it into two even parts. Pipe the whipped cream evenly on the first layer and even it out using a spatula. Place the second layer on top and pipe the whipped cream again evenly on the entire cake's surface. Even it out using a spatula.
11. Add the grated cheese until it covers the entire cake.
12. Castella Cake is ready to serve.

title: Niku Udon Ala Marugame Recipe [100% Local Ingredients]
recipe_id:
Resep Niku Udon Halal. Sajian mie khas Jepang ini memiliki dua bahan dasar mie dan kuah. Biasanya ditambahkan juga dengan topping. Kali ini aku akan mencoba menduplikasi niku udon Marugame. 

Resep Mie Udon: https://youtu.be/IVjeK4VYs_w

Resep Niku Udon (3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
3-4 porsi udon

Daging:
400 gr daging sapi sukiyaki
2 sdm jus apel
4 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm gula
½ sdm minyak wijen

Kuah:
8 siung bawang merah
1 bonggol bawang putih
3 cm jahe, geprek
16 sdm jus apel
12 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm ikan teri, panggang / sangrai
2-3 liter air
Garam sesuai selera
2-3 sdm gula
2 sdm kaldu ayam

Tenkasu:
5 sdm tepung protein rendah
12-15 sdm air dingin
½ sdt cuka
⅕ sdt baking soda
Minyak goreng

Pelengkap:
5 buah cabai rawit merah, iris
1 batang daun bawang, iris

Langkah:
1. Marinasi daging dengan jus apel, minyak wijen, kecap asin, dan gula
2. Tumis daging hingga matang dan berwarna kecoklatan
3. Untuk tenkasu, campurkan cuka dan baking soda hingga berbuih lalu campurkan dengan air dan tepung, aduk rata
4. Panaskan minyak, goreng adonan dengan api sedang sampai kuning keemasan
5. Untuk kuah, cuci bersih bawang merah dan bawang putih dengan kulitnya lalu belah dua dan masukkan ke dalam air rebusan. Masukkan daun bawang, jahe, teri, jus apel, dan kecap asin, aduk rata
6. Bumbui dengan gula, garam dan kaldu ayam lalu masak hingga mendidih
7. Rebus sebentar udon yang sudah matang di dalam kuah, angkat dan pindahkan ke piring saji
8. Masukkan daging yang sudah ditumis ke dalam kuah, masak sebentar
9. Sajikan udon dengan daging, kuah, tenkasu, irisan cabai rawit dan irisan daun bawang
recipe_en:
Niku Udon Recipe a la Marugame [100% Local Ingredients]

This signature Japanese noodle dish has two main points, the noodle and the soup. It's usually served with various toppings. This time, I'm trying to duplicate Marugame's Niku Udon.

Udon Recipe: https://youtu.be/IVjeK4VYs_w

Niku Udon Recipe (yield: 3-4 serving)

Ingredient:
3-4 serving Udon

Meat:
400 g Sukiyaki beef
2 tbsp apple juice
4 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp sugar
½ tbsp sesame oil

Soup:
8 pc shallots
1 whole garlic
3 cm ginger, pounded
16 tbsp apple juice
12 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp anchovies, roasted
2-3 L water
Salt, to taste
2-3 tbsp sugar
2 tbsp chicken stock powder

Tenkasu:
5 tbsp pastry flour
12-15 tbsp cold water
½ tsp vinegar
⅕ tsp baking soda
Oil

Condiments:
5 pc bird's eye chili, sliced
1 pc scallion, sliced

Steps:
1. Marinate the beef with apple juice, sesame oil, soy sauce, and sugar.
2. Sauté the beef until it's cooked and browned.
3. For the Tenkasu, combine the vinegar and baking soda until bubbling. Combine with the water and flour. Mix well.
4. Heat some oil and fry the batter on medium heat until golden brown.
5. For the soup, rinse the shallots and garlic, skin-on. Halve and add to the boiling water. Add scallions, ginger, anchovies, apple juice, and soy sauce. Mix well.
6. Season with sugar, salt, and chicken stock powder. Bring to a boil.
7. Boil the cooked Udon for a bit in the soup. Remove and transfer to a serving bowl.
8. Add the sautéed beef into the soup. Cook for a bit.
9. Serve the Udon with the beef, the soup, the Tenkasu, as well as the sliced bird's eye chili and sliced scallions.

title: Marugame Udon Recipe: Local Ingredients, Authentic Flavor [No Machine]
recipe_id:
Resep Udon Ala Marugame. Salah satu jenis mie yang terkenal dari Jepang adalah mie udon. Perbedaan mie udon dan mie yang lain adalah ketebalannya dan tepung yang digunakan. Untuk menikmatinya, udon dapat diolah dengan beberapa variasi masakan. Ada yang disajikan dengan kuah panas maupun dingin.

Resep Udon (3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
300 gr tepung protein sedang (saya: tepung hong kong / bakpao)
140 gr air
20 gr garam
Maizena (untuk taburan adonan)

Langkah:
1. Larutkan garam dengan air
2. Campurkan air dan tepung hong kong yang sudah diayak menggunakan sumpit hingga tercampur rata. Tekan-tekan dengan tangan agar terigunya tercampur
3. Pindahkan ke plastik, pipihkan adonan menggunakan rolling pin, gunakan beban tubuh agar lebih mudah. Bisa juga menggunakan metode diinjak, bungkus adonan dengan plastik lalu lapisi dengan kain, gunakan kaus kaki bersih agar lebih higienis lalu injak-injak adonan dengan tumit. Setelah melebar, gulung adonan lalu pipihkan lagi, lakukan 5-6 kali hingga adonan menjadi mulus
4. Istirahatkan adonan 10-15 menit
5. Pipihkan adonan sekali lagi, lalu bulatkan dan istirahatkan adonan minimal 2 jam
6. Taburi talenan dengan maizena, letakkan adonan dan taburi lagi sedikit maizena di atasnya. Pipihkan adonan menggunakan rolling pin. Setelah melebar, gulung adonan menggunakan rolling pin sambil ditekan-tekan. Pipihkan dengan ketebalan 3 mm
7. Lipat adonan dan beri taburan maizena di setiap lipatan agar tidak lengket, lalu potong-potong memanjang dengan ketebalan sesuai selera
8. Siapkan air rebusan. Rebus udon 15-20 menit tergantung ketebalan udon
9. Setelah matang, angkat dan tiriskan. Bilas dengan air dingin. Udon siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Udon Recipe a la Marugame: Local Ingredients, Authentic Flavor [No Machine]

Udon Recipe a la Marugame. Udon is one of the most popular noodles from Japan. The differences between Udon and other noodles are its thickness and the type of flour used. To enjoy Udon, you can cook it into several varieties of dishes. Some are served with a hot broth, some are served cold.

Udon Recipe (3-4 serving)

Ingredients:
300 g all-purpose flour (me: Hong Kong flour / Pao flour)
140 g water
20 g salt
Cornstarch (to sprinkle on the dough)

Steps:
1. Dissolve the salt in the water.
2. Combine the water and sifted Hong Kong flour with chopsticks. Mix well. Press with hands so the flour is well-incorporated.
3. Transfer to a plastic bag. Flatten the dough with a rolling pin. Use your body weight to make it easier. You can also use the stepping method, where you wrap the dough in plastic, cover it with cloth, wear clean socks to make it more hygienic, and step on the dough with your heels. After the dough is flattened, roll it and flatten it again. Repeat for 5 -6 times until the dough becomes smooth.
4. Rest the dough for 10-15 minutes.
5. Flatten the dough once more. Make a ball and rest the dough for at least 2 hours.
6. Sprinkle the cutting board with cornstarch. Place the dough on top and sprinkle it with a bit of cornstarch. Flatten the dough using a rolling pin. After it's flattened, roll the dough with the rolling pin while pressing it down. Flatten to a thickness of 3 mm.
7. Fold the dough and sprinkle each layer with cornstarch to keep it from sticking. Slice the dough lengthwise. Adjust the thickness to your liking.
8. Prepare the boiling water. Boil the Udon for 15-20 minutes, depending on the thickness.
9. After it's cooked, remove from the water and rinse with cold water. Udon is ready to serve.

title: Resep BAKCANG AYAM & CARA MEMBUNGKUS Bentuk Piramid Sempurna.
recipe_id:
Resep Bakcang Ayam. Bacang, disebut juga bakcang atau zongzi adalah makanan tradisional Tiongkok yang terbuat dari beras dengan isian beragam. Setiap tanggal 6 bulan 5 penanggalan China diperingati festival Pechun, di mana setiap keluarga membuat dan makan bakcang bersama. Makanan ini tergolong unik karena berbentuk limas segitiga yang dibungkus dengan daun bambu dan diikat tali.

Resep Bakcang (10 pcs)

Bahan:
2 gelas beras
3 gelas air
1 sdt garam
5 siung bawang merah halus
5 siung bawang putih halus
250 gr paha ayam fillet, cincang
100 gr jamur shitake
3 batang daun bawang
3 sdm saus tiram
3 sdm kecap asin
12 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm kaldu jamur
3 sdm bawang goreng
400 ml air
10 cabai rawit
50 ml minyak goreng

Lainnya:
20 lembar daun bakcang
Tali rafia atau tali bambu

Langkah:
1. Cuci bersih beras, tambahkan air dan garam lalu masak setengah matang
2. Panaskan minyak, tumis jamur hingga kering dan berubah warna
3. Tambahkan bawang merah dan bawang putih halus, tumis hingga wangi
4. Tambahkan irisan daun bawang, tumis sebentar
5. Masukkan daging ayam, aduk
6. Masukkan air, bumbui dengan kecap manis, kecap asin, saus tiram, dan kaldu jamur. Masak hingga air berkurang dan bumbu meresap
7. Tambahkan bawang goreng, aduk rata
8. Rebus daun bakcang sebentar agar mudah dibentuk
9. Siapkan dua lembar daun bakcang. Hadapkan berlawanan lalu lipat berbentuk kerucut, isi dengan 2-3 sdm nasi lalu bentuk cekungan dan tambahkan isian ayam, beri 1 cabai rawit. Tutup dengan 2 sdm nasi lalu padatkan
10. Lipat daun bakcang kerucut sama sisi, pastikan tidak bocor lalu ikat dengan tali rafia
11. Siapkan air untuk merebus, masukkan bakcang. Pastikan permukaan bakcang terendam semua, lalu tutup. Rebus selama 1-2 jam lalu dinginkan
12. Bakcang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Chicken Bakcang Recipe & How to Make The Perfect Pyramid Shape.

Bakcang, also known as Zongzi, is a Chinese traditional dish made of rice with various fillings. We celebrate the Peh Cun festival on every sixth day of the fifth month in the Chinese calendar, where every family makes and eats Bakcang together. This dish is quite unique due to its triangular pyramid shape, wrapped with bamboo leaves and tied with a string.

Bakcang Recipe (10 pcs)

Ingredients:
2 cups rice
3 cups water
1 tsp salt
5 pc shallots, mashed
5 clove garlic, mashed
250 g chicken thigh fillet, chopped
100 g Shiitake mushroom
3 pc scallions
3 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp soy sauce
12 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp mushroom stock powder
3 tbsp fried shallots
400 ml water
10 pc bird's eye chili
50 ml oil

Others:
20 pc Bakcang leaves
Raffia strings or bamboo ropes

Steps:
1. Rinse the rice. Add some water and salt. Cook until half-cooked.
2. Heat some oil. Sauté the mushroom until it dries and changes color.
3. Add the mashed shallots and garlic in. Sauté until fragrant.
4. Add the chopped scallions. Cook for a bit.
5. Add the chicken in. Stir.
6. Add some water. Season with sweet soy sauce, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and mushroom stock powder. Cook until the water is reduced and the sauces are absorbed well.
7. Add fried shallots. Mix well.
8. Boil the Bakcang leaves for a bit so they're easy to shape.
9. Prepare two pieces of Bakcang leaves. Arrange in a different direction, then make a conical shape. Fill with 2-3 tbsp of rice. Create a basin and add the chicken filling. Add 1 bird's eye chili and cover with 2 tbsp of rice. Pack the rice in.
10. Fold the Bakcang leaves. Make sure it won't leak and tie it with the Raffia string.
11. Prepare some water for boiling and add the Bakcang in. Make sure they're completely submerged and cover the pan. Boil for 1-2 hours. Let cool.
12. Bakcang is ready to serve.

title: Murah Bukan Murahan! Resep Dimsum Ayam Istimewa: HALAL Gurih Kenyal [Rp 1.000]
recipe_id:
Resep Chili Oil: https://youtu.be/lNJimSmQLYw

Resep Siomay Ayam Udang (15-20 pcs)

Bahan adonan siomay:
200 gr paha ayam fillet
50 gr kulit ayam
50 gr udang kupas (bisa diganti ayam)
2 siung bawang putih
1 butir putih telur
9 sdm tepung sagu
½ sdm garam
1 sdm gula
½ sdt merica
¼ sdt kaldu jamur
3 sdm es batu
2 sdt saus tiram
2 sdt minyak wijen
2 sdt kecap asin
50 gr wortel parut
15-20 kulit pangsit

Bahan saus cocol:
2 siung bawang putih
1 siung bawang merah
3 cabai rawit
1 cabai merah ukuran sedang
6 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm cuka
150 ml air
2 sdm minyak goreng
2 sdt gula
½ sdt kaldu jamur

Langkah:
1. Masukkan ½ ayam, bawang putih, tepung sagu, putih telur, saus tiram, kecap asin, minyak wijen, merica, garam, gula, kaldu jamur, dan es batu ke dalam food processor cincang hingga halus
2. Masukkan ½ ayam dan udang, cincang sebentar
3. Pindahkan ke wadah, masukkan ½ parutan wortel, aduk rata
4. Ambil kulit dim sum, beri 1 sdm adonan lalu bungkus dan beri parutan wortel di atasnya
5. Kukus siomay 15-20 menit
6. Untuk saus cocolan, cincang bawang putih, cabai rawit, dan bawang merah. Tumis hingga wangi lalu tambahkan air
7. Masukkan saus sambal, cuka, gula, dan kaldu jamur. Masak hingga mendidih
8. Siomay siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Cheap, Not Shabby! Special Chicken Dim Sum Recipe: Tasty and Bouncy [IDR1.000]

Chili Oil Recipe: https://youtu.be/lNJimSmQLYw

Chicken and Shrimp Shumai Recipe (15-20 pcs)

Shumai Filling ingredients:
200 g chicken thigh fillet
50 g chicken skin
50 g peeled shrimp (interchangeable with chicken)
2 clove garlic
1 pc egg whites
9 tbsp sago flour
1/2 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
1/2 tsp pepper
1/4 tsp mushroom stock powder
3 tbsp ice cubes
2 tsp oyster sauce
2 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp soy sauce
50 g shredded carrots
15-20 Shumai wrappers

Dipping Sauce ingredients:
2 clove garlic
1 pc shallots
3 bird's eye chili
1 pc medium-sized red chili
6 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp vinegar
150 ml water
2 tbsp cooking oil
2 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp mushroom stock powder

Steps:
1. Add half of the chicken, garlic, sago flour, egg whites, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sesame oil, pepper, salt, sugar, mushroom stock powder, and ice cubes into the food processor. Blend into a smooth consistency.
2. Add the rest of the chicken and the shrimp in. Blend for a bit.
3. Transfer to a bowl. Add half of the shredded carrots. Mix well.
4. Grab a Dim Sum wrapper. Add 2 tbsp of filling and wrap it. Add some shredded carrot on top.
5. Steam the Shumai for 15 - 20 minutes.
6. For the dipping sauce, mince the garlic, bird's eye chili, and shallots. Sauté until fragrant, then add some water.
7. Add the chili sauce, vinegar, sugar, and mushroom stock powder in. Bring to a boil.
8. Shumai is ready to serve.

title: Duplikasi Roti & Saus Resep Yakiniku Burger McDonald's [Taste Of Japan]
recipe_id:
Resep Burger. Untuk pecinta fast food pasti gak asing lagi dengan hamburger atau burger. Salah satu varian burger yang aku suka yaitu Taste of Japan dari McDonalds. Kali ini aku mencoba menduplikasi Yakiniku Burger mulai dari membuat burger bun, patty, dan isian lainnya.

Resep Yakiniku Burger

Bahan roti burger (10 pcs):
500 gr tepung hongkong
50 gr shortening cair / minyak
5 gr baking powder
5 gr garam
20 gr gula halus
250 gr air hangat
6 gr ragi
10 gr wijen hitam

Bahan patty:
250 gr daging cincang
¼ sdt merica
¼ sdt garam

Saus yakiniku (untuk 200 ml saus):
Air secukupnya
3-4 sdm kecap asin
8 sdm jus apel
2 siung bawang putih
2 siung bawang merah
1 iris jahe
1 buah daun bawang
3 sdm gula palem
1 sdm bubuk nori
1 sdm tepung maizena
1 sdt kaldu jamur

Pelengkap:
75 gr mayones
1 sdm susu kental manis
1 sdt cuka beras
50 gr kol ungu
50 gr kol putih
60 gr wortel
6 lembar nori
3 butir telur

Langkah membuat roti burger:
1. Campurkan air hangat, ragi, dan sedikit gula halus, aduk rata dan diamkan hingga berbuih
2. Aduk rata tepung hongkong, baking powder, garam, dan sisa gula halus dengan mixer
3. Tambahkan adonan ragi dan shortening cair, aduk hingga kalis
4. Proofing adonan selama 30 menit
5. Bagi 10 adonan sama rata dengan berat 80 gr lalu bulatkan
6. Tempelkan wijen hitam di permukaan adonan, lalu sayat adonan roti burger melingkar menggunakan scraper atau gelas, tekan-tekan pinggirnya agar terkunci
7. Proofing adonan selama 30 menit atau sampai mengembang
8. Panggang dengan suhu 150°C selama 15-20 menit

Langkah membuat yakiniku burger:
1. Untuk saus yakiniku. Cuci bersih bawang merah dan bawang putih dengan kulitnya lalu belah dua. Didihkan air dalam panci, masukkan jahe, bawang merah, bawang putih dan daun bawang. Tambahkan gula palem, aduk hingga mendidih. Tambahkan kaldu jamur. Saring saus, didihkan lagi dalam panci tambahkan larutan maizena dan bubuk nori lalu aduk rata
2. Untuk patty, ambil daging giling lalu lempar daging giling ke tangan kanan dan tangan kiri bergiliran hingga padat, jangan diuleni. Panaskan panggangan, tambahkan minyak lalu masak daging dan bumbui dengan garam dan merica, masak kedua sisi hingga matang
3. Siapkan roti burger, belah dua lalu panggang satu sisinya
4. Untuk telur. Panaskan teflon dan ring cutter, beri minyak lalu pecahkan telur ke dalam ring cutter. Setelah setengah matang, lepaskan telur dari ring cutter, balik lalu masak hingga matang dan sisihkan
5. Untuk salad, iris tipis kol putih, kol ungu dan wortel. Campurkan mayones, cuka beras dan susu kental manis, bumbui dengan garam dan lada lalu aduk rata
6. Ambil bagian bawah roti burger letakkan patty di atasnya, beri saus yakiniku lalu tumpuk dengan telur, taruh sayuran di atasnya dan beri saus mayones kemudian taruh dua lembar nori, oleskan sedikit saus yakiniku di bawah roti burger lalu tumpuk di atas nori. Yakiniku Burger siap disajikan
recipe_en:

1/4 tsp salt

Yakiniku Sauce (for 200 ml of sauce):
Water, as needed

8 tbsp apple juice
2 clove garlic
2 pc shallots
1 slice ginger
1 pc leeks
3 tbsp palm sugar

1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp mushroom stock powder

Condiments:
75 g mayonnaise

50 g white cabbage
50 g red cabbage

title: VIRAL Le Gino Fried Dumpling Recipe: The Seasoning is the MOST Important!
recipe_id:
Resep Pangsit Le Gino. Kali ini aku mau coba menduplikasi salah satu makanan yang sedang viral, Pangsit Goreng Le Gino. Di sini aku menggunakan daging ayam untuk isian pangsit dan memadukannya dengan bumbu ‘rahasia’ yang biasa aku pakai untuk memasak mie atau nasi goreng. Pastinya enak dan gak perlu ngantri lama karena bisa bikin sendiri di rumah.

Resep Pangsit Goreng

Bahan pangsit (untuk 40 pcs):
1 pack kulit pangsit
300 gr paha ayam fillet
20 gr ebi, rendam air
4 siung bawang putih halus
2 sdm tepung sagu
3 sdm air jahe
2 sdt minyak wijen
4 sdt saus tiram
1 sdm gula
1 sdt garam
1 sdt kaldu jamur

Bumbu ebi (untuk 250 gr):
16 siung bawang putih
12 buah kemiri
20 gr ebi, rendam air
1 buah terasi
125 ml minyak

Bahan lainnya (untuk 2 porsi):
2 butir telur
3 siung bawang merah, iris
2 siung bawang putih, cincang
1 batang daun bawang, iris
1 buah caisim, iris
25 gr tauge
50 gr kol, iris
5 buah bakso sapi, iris
75 gr paha ayam fillet, iris
3 sdm kecap manis
2 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm kecap asin
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt kaldu jamur
¼ sdt merica

Langkah:
1. Untuk bumbu ebi, potong-potong bawang putih dan kemiri lalu masukkan ke dalam blender bersama minyak, terasi, dan ebi, blender hingga halus. Tumis hingga wangi dan berwarna cokelat
2. Untuk isian pangsit, blender semua bahan hingga halus menggunakan food processor
3. Ambil satu lembar kulit pangsit, taruh 1 sendok teh adonan lalu oleskan air di kulit pangsit dan lipat menjadi segitiga kemudian kedua ujungnya ditekuk dan dilem lagi menggunakan air
4. Rebus air agak banyak, masak hingga pangsit mengapung
5. Tumis bawang merah dan bawang putih, masukkan telur dan masak hingga kering. Lalu masukkan ayam, bakso, pangsit, saus tiram, kecap asin, dan kecap manis aduk rata
6. Masukkan 2 sendok makan bumbu ebi. Bumbui dengan garam, merica, dan kaldu jamur, aduk rata
7. Masukkan kol, tauge, caisim, dan daun bawang, masak sebentar
8. Pangsit goreng siap disajikan
recipe_en:
VIRAL Fried Dumplings a la Le Gino Recipe

Fried Dumplings Recipe

Filling ingredients (for 40 pcs):
1 pack dumpling wrappers
300 g chicken thigh fillet
20 g dried shrimp, soak in water
4 clove minced garlic
2 tbsp sago flour
3 tbsp ginger liquid
2 tsp sesame oil
4 tsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp salt
1 tsp mushroom stock powder

Dried shrimp spice mix (for 250 g):
16 clove garlic
12 pc candlenuts
20 g dried shrimp, soak in water
1 pc shrimp paste
125 ml oil

Other ingredients (for 2 servings):
2 pc egg
3 pc shallots, sliced
2 clove garlic, minced
1 pc leeks, sliced
25 g bean sprouts
50 g cabbage, sliced
5 pc beef meatball, sliced
75 g chicken thigh fillet, sliced
3 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp soy sauce
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp mushroom stock powder
1/4 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. For the dried shrimp spice mix, chop the garlic and candlenuts and add to the blender with oil, shrimp paste, and dried shrimp. Blend to a paste. Sauté until fragrant and the color browns.
2. For the filling, blend all ingredients until smooth with a food processor.
3. Get one dumpling wrapper and place 1 tsp of filling. Brush some water on the skin and fold into a triangle. Fold the edges together and glue it on with water.
4. Boil water in a fairly large quantity and boil the dumplings until they float to the top.
5. Sauté the shallots and garlic. Add the eggs in and cook until they're fragrant. Add in the chicken, meatballs, dumplings, oyster sauce, soy sauce, and sweet soy sauce. Mix well.
6. Add 2 tbsp of the dried shrimp spice mix. Season with salt, pepper, and mushroom stock powder. Mix well.
7. Add the cabbage, bean sprouts, bok choy, and leeks in. Cook for a moment.
8. Fried Dumplings are ready to serve.

title: A FORK! Mini Churros Recipe: Even Better with Milk! [Boarding House Student Signs In]
recipe_id:
Resep Churros. Churros merupakan camilan khas Spanyol dan Portugis. Snack yang lagi hits ini terbuat dari adonan choux paste yang terdiri dari tepung terigu, air, telur, dan mentega. Kali ini aku akan share resep mini churros yang tekstur luarnya garing namun di dalamnya tetap empuk. Apalagi disajikan dengan saus Ovomaltine jadi makin komplit.

Resep Mini Churros

Bahan:
120 gr tepung terigu
50 gr mentega
180 ml air
20 gr gula
½ sdt garam
1 butir telur
250 ml minyak
50 ml susu cair
2 sdm Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Langkah:
1. Panaskan air, butter, gula, dan garam. Masak hingga mendidih
2. Masukkan tepung terigu, gunakan api kecil lalu aduk hingga menjadi adonan dan tidak lengket
3. Diamkan adonan hingga agak dingin, lalu masukkan telur. Aduk hingga tercampur rata
4. Masukkan adonan ke dalam piping bag yang sudah diberi spuit
5. Bisa juga bentuk adonan menggunakan garpu. Caranya ambil adonan lalu gulung memanjang, potong-potong kecil sama rata. Tekan menggunakan garpu lalu gulung dan kunci dengan bantuan sumpit
6. Panaskan minyak, piping adonan sekitar 3 cm lalu gunting. Lakukan terus hingga adonan habis
7. Goreng hingga kuning keemasan
8. Untuk saus Ovomaltine, campurkan susu dengan Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream lalu aduk rata
9. Mini Churros siap disajikan dengan saus Ovomaltine atau dijadikan sereal dengan menambahkan susu cair

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream tersedia di Ranch Market, Farmers Market, Food Hall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chicks, Grand Lucky, Indomaret, Supermarket dan Toko-toko lainnya.

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @OVOMALTINE_INDONESIA

Instagram: https://instagram.com/ovomaltine_indonesia
Facebook Page : https://facebook.com/OvomaltineOfficialID/
recipe_en:
Only with a Fork, No Piping Tip. Crispy, Soft Mini Churros Recipe!

A Churros is a snack food from Spain and Portugal. This hit snack is made of Choux Pastry dough that consists of flour, water, eggs, and butter. This time, I'm sharing a Mini Churros recipe with crispy outer texture yet soft inside. It tastes even better with an Ovomaltine sauce.

Mini Churros Recipe

Ingredients:
120 g flour
50 g butter
180 ml water
20 g sugar
1/2 tsp salt
1 pc egg
250 ml oil
50 ml plain milk
2 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Steps:
1. Heat the water, butter, sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil.
2. Add the flour in. Cook in low heat and keep stirring until a non-sticky dough is formed.
3. Let the dough cool, then add the egg in. Stir until they're well-incorporated.
4. Transfer the dough into a piping bag with a tip installed.
5. You can also shape the dough with a for. Take the dough, make a long roll, and slice into small, even bits. Press the dough with the fork, roll it, and stick it together with a chopstick.
6. Heat some oil. Pipe a 3-cm (about 1") dough and cut it with scissors. Repeat until all the dough is finished.
7. Fry until golden brown.
8. For the Ovomaltine sauce, combine the milk with the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream. Mix well.
9. Mini Churros are ready to serve with the Ovomaltine sauce or made into cereals by adding some milk.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

title: Special! Jabrig Bread Recipe: Soft & Anti Shrink [Filled with Chocolate & Cheese]
recipe_id:
Resep Roti Jabrig. Makanan yang sedang viral satu ini memiliki keunikan tersendiri. Roti Jabrig merupakan roti berbentuk bulat dengan topping keju yang diparut memanjang sehingga terlihat seperti rambut jabrig / gondrong. Lembutnya roti dipadukan dengan isian keju yang gurih dan manis serta isian cokelat yang lumer di mulut.

Resep Roti Jabrig (22 pcs)

Bahan adonan roti:
100 gr kentang halus
2 butir kuning telur
100 gr gula
150 ml air kelapa dingin
70 ml susu cair
500 gr tepung protein tinggi
30 gr susu bubuk
7 gr ragi
70 gr margarin
70 gr mentega
40 gr wijsman

Bahan isian keju:
200 gr keju cheddar parut
250 gr susu cair
80 gr susu kental manis

Isian cokelat:
50 gr cokelat bubuk
100 gr susu bubuk / krimer
40 gr margarin
300 gr air
240 gr gula pasir
½ sdt garam
1 sdt vanila ekstrak
80 gr tepung terigu

Taburan:
250 gr keju cheddar parut

Langkah:
1. Siapkan mixer. kocok kuning telur dan gula menggunakan balloon whisk hingga mengembang, masukan kentang halus, aduk hingga rata
2. Masukkan ragi, susu bubuk, air kelapa dan susu cair lalu kocok dengan menggunakan hook untuk mengadon roti
3. Tambahkan tepung sedikit demi sedikit, aduk dengan kecepatan sedang hingga menyatu
4. Setelah berbentuk adonan, tambahkan mentega, margarin dan wijsman, aduk hingga kalis
5. Pindahkan adonan ke talenan yang sudah diolesi minyak, tutup dengan mangkuk yang sudah diolesi minyak diamkan hingga mengembang selama 70-90 menit
6. Untuk isian keju, campurkan keju cheddar parut, susu dan susu kental manis masak hingga mendidih sambil terus diaduk
7. Untuk isian coklat, masukkan tepung, coklat bubuk, krime r/ susu bubuk, garam, gula dan air aduk hingga benar-benar tercampur baru nyalakan api sedang dan masak hingga mengental sambil terus diaduk. Setelah mengental, matikan api dan masukkan margarin dan vanila ekstrak, aduk rata
8. Setelah adonan mengembang, kempeskan adonan lalu timbang adonan masing-masing 50 gr
9. Bulatkan adonan, lalu istirahatkan lagi 15-20 menit
10. Kempeskan adonan, masukan dua sendok teh isian coklat atau keju lalu tutup dan kunci adonan pastikan tidak bocor, lalu letakkan di loyang muffin yang sudah dialasi kertas muffin. Lakukan hingga adonan habis
11. Proofing roti selama 60-90 menit
12. Panggang roti dengan suhu 160-165°C selama 20-25 menit.
13. Setelah agak dingin, olesi bagian atas roti dengan isian keju, lalu taruh parutan keju yang diparut memanjang

title: NO Cream Cheese! Korean Garlic Bread Recipe: Crispy But Soft [100% Success]
recipe_id:
Resep Garlic Bread. Korean Cheesy Garlic Bread belakangan sedang viral di kalangan pecinta kuliner. Street food Korea Selatan ini merupakan roti dengan topping krim keju yang disiram saus bawang putih. Sedikit berbeda, di sini aku memadukannya dengan topping cheese bechamel. Tentunya cocok dengan tekstur roti yang crunchy dan lembut.

Resep Korean Cheesy Garlic Bread (4 roti)

Bahan adonan roti:
220 ml air
200 gr tepung protein tinggi
125 gr tepung protein sedang
2 sdt gula pasir
1 sdt garam
1 sdt ragi
2 sdm olive oil / minyak goreng
1 sdm madu

Bahan garlic sauce:
100 gr mentega cair
35 gr bawang putih cincang
20 gr susu kental manis
15 gr madu
1 sdm parsley cincang
1 butir telur ukuran kecil
½ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
1 sdm saus tomat
1 sdm saus sambal

Bahan cheese bechamel:
3 sdm tepung protein sedang
50 gr mentega
250 ml susu cair
100 gr keju cheddar parut
1 sdm gula pasir
1 sdt garam 

Langkah:
1.  Aduk semua bahan roti dengan menggunakan sumpit hanya sampai tercampur rata, diamkan adonan minimal 2 jam
2. Setelah 2 jam, beri taburan tepung di atas talenan atau meja lalu tuang adonan supaya tidak lengket
3. Bagi adonan 4 bagian sama rata lalu bentuk bulat, jika dirasa terlalu lengket lumuri permukaan tangan dengan minyak
4. Simpan adonan roti di atas loyang yang sudah diolesi minyak, lalu proofing selama 30 menit
5. Panaskan oven 220°C, panggang selama 15 menit
6. Jika memanggang dengan panci, alasi dasar panci dengan loyang atau alas kukusan, alasi dengan kertas roti masukkan roti dan tutup pancinya lalu masak dengan api sedang selama 15-20 menit
7. Untuk garlic sauce, campurkan mentega cair, bawang putih dan parsley cincang, susu kental manis, madu, garam, merica dan telur lalu aduk rata 
8. Jika akan memanggang menggunakan panci, cara membuat garlic saucenya lelehkan butter lalu tumis bawang putih hingga wangi, matikan api lalu tambahkan parsley cincang, garam, merica, susu kental manis dan madu, aduk rata dan tidak perlu menggunakan telur
9.Bagi dua garlic sauce, tambahkan saus sambal dan saus tomat di salah satunya lalu aduk rata
10. Untuk cheese bechamel, panaskan mentega dan tepung dalam pan lalu masak hingga tepung matang sambil terus diaduk, jangan sampai gosong
11. Tambahkan susu, keju parut, garam, dan gula. Aduk hingga keju meleleh dan menyatu lalu matikan api
12. Setelah dingin, pindahkan bechamel ke dalam piping bag
13. Belah roti menjadi 6 bagian sama rata tapi jangan sampai putus
14. Semprotkan bechamel di setiap sisi roti, lalu oles dengan garlic sauce
15. Letakkan di loyang yang dialasi kertas roti, lalu panggang dengan suhu 220°C selama 10-15 menit
16. Untuk memanggang yang menggunakan panci, alasi dasar panci dengan loyang atau alas kukusan, alasi dengan kertas roti masukkan roti dan tutup pancinya lalu masak dengan api sedang selama 10-15 menit

recipe_en:
WITHOUT Cream Cheese! Korean Garlic Bread Recipe: Crisp yet Soft [100% Success]

This South Korean street food is a bread with cream cheese topping and garlic sauce poured on top. This recipe is a bit different as I paired the bread with Cheese Bechamel topping. It goes along well with the crunchy and soft bread texture.

Korean Cheesy Garlic Bread Recipe (4 pcs)

Bread dough ingredients:
220 ml water

1 tsp yeast

Garlic sauce ingredients:
100 g melted butter
35 g minced garlic
20 g condensed milk
15 g honey
1 tbsp chopped parsley
1 pc egg, small
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
1 tbsp tomato sauce
1 tbsp chili sauce

Cheese Bechamel  ingredients:
3 tbsp medium-protein flour
50 g butter
250 ml milk
100 g grated Cheddar cheese
1 tbsp sugar
1 tsp salt

title: TEFLON Pizza Recipe Only 7 Minutes! [No Kneading, No Proofing, Crispy, Soft, Pizza Hut Style]
recipe_id:
Resep Pizza Teflon. Pizza salah satu hidangan paling populer yang berasal dari Italia. Roti berbentuk bundar dan pipih ini biasanya diberi topping saus tomat dan keju. Kali ini aku akan sedikit modifikasi menggunakan 2 cara dipanggang menggunakan oven dan teflon. Topping isiannya pun menggunakan Sarden Yamato yang rasanya enak dan tidak amis. Pizza sarden ini cocok dijadikan alternatif camilan favorit kamu di rumah.

Resep Pizza Teflon (untuk 2 loyang / 6 porsi)

Bahan adonan:
135 gr / ml air hangat
7 gr ragi
7 gr gula pasir
¾ sdt garam
1 ½ sdm olive oil
1 sdm madu
250 gr tepung protein sedang

Bahan topping:
3 siung bawang putih, iris
1 siung bawang bombai, iris
100 gr jamur shitake, iris
2 sdm minyak
1 kaleng Sarden Yamato
10 cabai rawit, iris
2 sdm saus sambal
4 sdm saus tomat

Bahan lainnya:
120 gr keju mozarella parut
2 buah black olive
2 sdm olive oil

Langkah:
1. Aduk air hangat, ragi, dan gula pasir hingga rata lalu diamkan hingga berbuih
2. Masukkan garam, madu, dan olive oil lalu aduk rata
3. Tambahkan tepung terigu, aduk hingga semua menyatu
4. Alasi permukaan talenan atau meja dengan minyak. Bagi dua adonan sama rata kemudian pipihkan dengan rolling pin seukuran pan yang akan digunakan
5. Untuk topping pizza, tumis bawang putih, bawang bombai, dan jamur hingga wangi. Masukkan Sarden Yamato, cabai rawit, saus sambal, dan saus tomat. Masak hingga mengental
6. Panaskan teflon di api sedang, olesi dengan minyak lalu panggang satu sisi pizza hingga matang
7. Balikkan pizza lalu beri topping sarden dan keju mozarella. Tutup dan masak dengan api sedang hingga pizza matang
8. Untuk menggunakan oven. Olesi loyang pizza dengan minyak lalu taruh adonan pizza di atasnya. Beri topping sarden, mozarella, bawang bombai, black olive, dan sedikit olive oil. Panggang di suhu 220°C selama 8-12 menit

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @YAMATOSARDEN.ID
Instagram: https://instagram.com/yamatosarden.id/
Facebook Page: https://facebook.com/YamatoSarden.id/
Blibli : https://blibli.com/brand/yamato-sarden
recipe_en:
TEFLON Pizza Recipe, Only 7 Minutes! [No Kneading, Crispy, Fluffy, a la Pizza Hut]

Pizza is one of the most popular Italian dishes. This circular and flat bread is usually topped with tomato sauce and cheese. This time, I'm modifying it a bit using two types of baking methods: with an oven and with a Teflon. The topping is Yamato Sardines which has a nice flavor without any fishy smell. This Sardines Pizza can be your favorite new snack at home.

Teflon Pizza Recipe (for 2 pans / 6 servings)

Dough ingredients:
135 ml warm water
7 g yeast
7 g sugar
3/4 tsp salt
1.5 tbsp olive oil
1 tbsp honey
250 g medium-protein flour

Topping ingredients:
3 clove garlic, sliced
1 pc shallots, sliced
100 g shiitake mushroom, sliced
2 tbsp oil
1 can Yamato Sardines
10 pc bird's eye chili, sliced
2 tbsp chili sauce
4 tbsp tomato sauce

Other ingredients:
120 g grated mozzarella cheese
2 pc black olive
2 tbsp olive oil

Steps:
1. Mix warm water, yeast, and sugar evenly. Let it bloom.
2. Add the salt, honey, and olive oil in. Mix well.
3. Add the flour. Mix until well-incorporated.
4. Rub some oil on the board or the table. Divide the dough into two equal parts and flatten with a rolling pin to match the pan's diameter.
5. For the pizza’s topping, sauté the garlic, onion, and mushroom until fragrant. Add the Yamato Sardines, bird’s eye chili, chili sauce, and tomato sauce. Cook until thickens.
6. Turn the Teflon on medium heat. Add some oil and cook one side of the pizza until it's cooked.
7. Flip the pizza and add the sardines and mozzarella toppings. Place the lid on and cook on medium heat until the pizza is cooked.
8. For oven-baked pizza, brush the pizza pan with some oil and place the pizza dough on top. Place the sardines, mozzarella, onion, and black olive toppings. Add a bit of olive oil. Bake at 220°C for 8-12 minutes.

title: One Bite THREE Textures! Fudgy Cookie Brownies Recipe [No Mixer]
recipe_id:
Resep Brownies. Cookie Brownies ini cocok banget untuk kamu yang suka cookies dan brownies. Menggabungkan 2 jenis kue dalam 1 loyang. Perpaduan tekstur lembut, lengket, dan padat cookie brownies ditambah dengan crumble dari biskuit semakin kaya rasa. Bisa dijadikan camilan dan dihidangkan bersama susu, teh atau kopi.

Resep Fudgy Cookie Brownies (12 pcs)

Bahan adonan cookies:
50 gr gula pasir
82 gr brown sugar
1/2 sdt garam
57 gr mentega cair
1 butir telur
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
100 gr protein sedang
½ sdt baking soda
75 gr choco chip

Bahan adonan brownies:
77 gr mentega cair
87 gr gula pasir
2 butir telur
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
25 gr cokelat bubuk
53 gr tepung protein sedang
¼ sdt garam
¼ sdt baking powder
30 gr biskuit Roma Kelapa

Bahan crumble:
60 gr biskuit Roma Kelapa
20 gr mentega cair

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan brownies, kocok gula pasir, mentega cair, dan gula pasir hingga tercampur rata
2. Masukkan cokelat bubuk, tepung terigu, ekstrak vanila, dan baking powder. Aduk rata
3. Tambahkan biskuit Roma Kelapa yang dihancurkan, aduk rata
4. Untuk adonan cookies, kocok gula pasir, brown sugar, dan telur hingga tercampur rata
5. Masukkan baking soda, ekstrak vanila, garam, dan tepung terigu. Aduk rata
6. Tambahkan chocochip, aduk rata. Lalu pindahkan ke piping bag
7. Untuk crumble, hancurkan biskuit Roma Kelapa. Tambahkan mentega cair lalu aduk rata
8. Panaskan oven 180°C
9. Alasi loyang 20x11 cm dengan kertas roti, tuang adonan brownies lalu ratakan
10. Semprotkan adonan cookies di layer kedua lalu beri taburan crumble di atasnya
11. Panggang selama 30-35 menit
12. Tunggu kue benar-benar dingin baru keluarkan dari loyang
13. Sajikan Fudgy Cookie Brownies dengan es krim
recipe_en:
3 Textures in 1 Bite. No-Mixer Fudgy Cookie Brownies Recipe

This Cookie Brownies is a great dessert for those of you who love cookies and brownies. It's a combination of two types of cakes in one pan. The soft, sticky, and firm cookie brownies texture with the biscuit crumble make this dessert even more decadent. It's great for snacks and to be served with milk, tea, or coffee.

Fudgy Cookie Brownies Recipe (12 pcs)

Cookie Dough ingredients:
50 g regular sugar
82 g brown sugar
1/2 tsp salt
57 g melted butter
1 pc egg
1 tsp vanilla extract
100 g medium-protein flour
1/2 tsp baking soda
75 g chocolate chips

Brownies Batter ingredients:
77 g melted butter
87 g regular sugar
2 pc eggs
1 tsp vanilla extract
25 g cocoa powder
53 g medium-protein flour
1/4 tsp salt
1/4 tsp baking powder
30 g Roma Kelapa biscuit

Crumble ingredients:
60 g Roma Kelapa biscuit
20 g melted butter

Steps:
1. For the brownies batter, whisk the sugar, melted butter, and eggs. Mix well.
2. Add the cocoa powder, flour, vanilla extract, and baking powder. Mix well.
3. Add the crumbled Roma Kelapa biscuits. Mix well.
4. For the Cookie Dough, whisk the regular sugar, brown sugar, and eggs. Mix well.
5. Add the baking soda, vanilla extract, salt, and flour. Mix well.
6. Add the chocolate chips. Mix well and transfer to a piping bag.
7. For the crumble, crumble the Roma Kelapa biscuit. Add the melted butter in and mix well. 
8. Heat the oven to 180°C.
9. Line a 8" x 4" baking pan with a baking paper. Pour the brownies batter in and even out the surface.
10. Pipe the cookie dough as the second layer and sprinkle the crumble on top.
11. Bake for 30-35 minutes.
12. Wait until the cake has cooled down completely before removing it from the pan.
13. Serve the Fudgy Cookie Brownies with ice cream.

title: Don't Fry It! Butter Sauce Recipe for Shrimp or Other Dishes: Top Restaurant Style.
recipe_id:
Resep Udang Saus Mentega. Udang menjadi bahan masakan favorit karena cepat matang dan memiliki rasa yang lezat. Berbeda dengan udang goreng mentega, di resep ini aku tidak menggoreng udang melainkan hanya pan seared. Pan seared atau searing adalah teknik memasak dengan temperatur yang tinggi (menggunakan pan) untuk memberikan tekstur yang crunchy pada permukaan daging (beef, poultry, atau ikan). recipe_en:
Top a la Restaurant: Soy Butter Sauce Recipe for Shrimp and Other Dishes

Shrimp is one of people's favorite ingredients as it cooks quickly and the flavor is tasty. Unlike Fried Shrimp with Soy Butter Sauce, I only pan-sear the shrimp in this recipe instead of frying them. Pan-searing is a cooking technique that uses high temperature (with a pan) to give a crunchy texture to the flesh' surface (beef, poultry, or fish). A great moment to serve this dish is when you're hanging out and eating together with family.

Sautéed Shrimp with Soy Butter Sauce Recipe (for 1-2 servings)

Ingredients:
200 g peeled shrimp
1 pc onion
3 pc shallots, mashed
2 clove garlic, mashed
1 pc leeks
1 inch ginger
5 pc bird's eye chili
1 pc tomato
4 tbsp margarine
2 tbsp Lombok Gandaria sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp Lombok Gandaria soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
2 tsp Worcestershire sauce

Steps:
1. Rinse the shrimp and devein.
2. Slice the onion, bird's eye chili, and leeks.
3. Remove the tomato seeds and dice.
4. Melt the margarine and sauté the shrimp until half cooked. Set aside.
5. Wait until the water in the margarine evaporates. Add the sliced onion, bird's eye chili, the white part of the leeks, tomato, mashed shallots, mashed garlic, and pounded ginger. Sauté until fragrant.
6. Add the Lombok Gandaria sweet soy sauce, Lombok Gandaria soy sauce, oyster sauce, tomato sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Add the shrimp and the green part of the leeks. Cook until the sauces are absorbed well.
8. Sautéed Shrimp with Soy Butter Sauce is ready to serve.

title: 100% Success! Cinnamon Roll Recipe [Hand-Kneaded Cinnamon Roll Recipe]
recipe_id:
Cinnamon Roll merupakan roti klasik khas Amerika yang sangat populer. Aroma kayu manis yang kuat menjadi ciri khas hidangan ini. Kelezatan roti lembut dipadukan dengan filling gula dan topping cream cheese frosting membuat cinnamon roll semakin kaya rasa. Cocok untuk teman ngopi atau teh. #WorkingWithSpotify

recipe_en:
100% Success! Soft Inside and Out Cinnamon Roll Recipe [Cream Cheese, Hand Knead OK]

Cinnamon Roll is a classic American pastry that's very popular. The strong scent of cinnamon is the characteristic of this dish. The soft bread combined with the sugar filling and cream cheese frosting make Cinnamon Roll even more flavorful. It's great to snack on with coffee or tea.

Cinnamon Roll Recipe (12 pcs)

Dough ingredients:
250 g medium-protein flour
100 g high-protein flour
30 g sugar
30 g brown sugar
3 g salt
50 g melted butter
7 g yeast
180 ml milk
1 pc egg
1 tsp vanilla extract

Filling ingredients:
75 g butter
125 g brown sugar
1 tbsp cinnamon powder
1 tbsp cornstarch
1 tsp salt

Frosting ingredients:
100 g cream cheese
40 g icing sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
3 tbsp milk

Steps:
1. Combine all the dough ingredients into a bowl and mix with a mixer under medium speed until it becomes elastic.
2. Move the dough to an oiled work surface.
3. Cover the dough with a bowl and let it rest for 20-30 minutes.
4. Press the dough to remove the air bubbles. Flatten with a rolling pin to a thickness of 1/2 cm.
5. To make the filling, combine butter, cornstarch, salt, and cinnamon powder. Mix well.
6. Spread the butter filling on the dough and sprinkle evenly with the brown sugar.
7. Roll the dough. Divide into 12 even pieces.
8. Arrange the dough in a buttered pan. Cover with a clean cloth and let it rest to rise up to 30-50% its size for about 15-20 minutes.
9. Heat the oven to 180°C. Once the dough has risen, bake it for 20-25 minutes.
10. To make the frosting, combine the cream cheese, icing sugar, vanilla extract, and milk. Mix well and transfer to a piping bag.
11. Remove the Cinnamon Rolls from the pan and let it cool on a cooling rack to maintain the crispy texture.
12. Pour the frosting on top. Cinnamon Rolls are ready to serve.

recipe_en:
Done in 5 Minutes! Hong Kong Egg Rice Recipe: Nutritious & Budget-Friendly [Egg Chiffon Rice]

Hong Kong Egg Rice recipe. This menu is inspired by Hong Kong's Char Siu Scrambled Egg, but I modified it a bit. Here, I'm using eggs and sausages as the main ingredients, as well as rice with gravy sauce poured on top. This simple dish can be a special menu for you.

Chicken Charsiu Recipe: https://youtu.be/xxS8yFMmhF8
Chili Oil Recipe: https://youtu.be/lNJimSmQLYw

Hong Kong Egg Rice Recipe (for 1 servings)

Ingredients:
1 serving rice
2 pc eggs
1 pc sausage
3 pc shallots
4 pc bird's eye chili
1/2 tsp salt
1/4 tsp pepper
3 tbsp cooking oil
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp soy sauce
2 tsp chicken stock powder
1 tbsp cornstarch
200 ml water
1 tsp sugar
2 tsp margarine
1 pc leek
Chili oil (optional)

Steps:
1. Slice the shallots and bird's eye chili.
2. Thinly slice the sausage, lengthwise.
3. Heat the oil and sauté the shallots, bird's eye chili, and sausage until fragrant.
4. Season with salt and pepper. Turn the heat off.
5. Lightly whisk the egg and pour into the sautéed sausage while the pan is still hot. Cook until the egg is half-done or to your liking.
6. Prepare the rice and place the egg on top.
7. For the gravy, combine water, cornstarch, oyster sauce, soy sauce, chicken stock powder, and sugar into a bowl. Mix well.
8. Heat the pan and pour the sauce mix. Stir well.
9. Add the margarine and cook until sauce thickens.
10. Pour the gravy on top of the egg. Serve with sliced leeks and chili oil.

title: The Flour Choice! The Secret Bomboloni Donut Recipe: 100% Success, Never Flat, and Fluffy.
recipe_id:
Saat ini muncul berbagai macam kreasi donat. Dari yang berlubang, donat mini, donat isi, donat kentang, donat pisang, dan lainnya. Kali ini aku akan share resep donat bomboloni isi custard yang lembut dan empuk tanpa menggunakan kentang. Rasa donat goreng yang enak akan semakin lezat dengan lelehan custard ovomaltine di dalamnya. Cocok banget untuk teman minum kopi ataupun teh.

Resep Donat Bomboloni (15 pcs)

Bahan adonan:
325 gr tepung protein sedang
75 gr tepung protein tinggi
50 gr brown sugar (gula palem pasir)
3 gr garam
50 gr mentega
7 gr ragi
150 ml susu cair
2 butir telur
1 sdt ekstrak vanila

Bahan filling custard:
250 gr susu
250 gr cream 
80 gr gula pasir
3 butir kuning telur
1 butir telur
30 gr maizena
1 sdt garam
50 gr mentega
1 sdt ekstrak vanila
100 gr Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Bahan lainnya:
200 gr brown sugar untuk taburan
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Langkah:
1. Campur tepung protein sedang, tepung protein tinggi, ragi, dan brown sugar, aduk rata
2. Tambahkan susu dan telur, aduk menggunakan mixer hingga membentuk adonan
3. Tambahkan butter dan garam, aduk hingga kalis
4. Diamkan adonan selama 30 menit hingga mengembang
5. Giling adonan setebal 1 cm lalu cetak dengan ringan cutter
6. Diamkan lagi selama 30 menit hingga mengembang
7. Buat filling custard. Didihkan susu, gula, garam, dan ekstrak vanila
8. Campurkan telur dan maizena, aduk rata lalu saring
9. Tuangkan sedikit susu yang mendidih ke adonan telur, aduk rata lalu tuangkan ke panci susu
10. Masak dengan api kecil sambil terus diaduk hingga mengental
11. Simpan di wadah lalu tutup permukaannya dengan cling wrap
12. Setelah custard dingin, sisihkan sebagian dan campur dengan Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream
12. Panaskan minyak di api kecil, goreng donat hingga cokelat keemasan
13. Gulingkan donat ke brown sugar hingga rata
14. Lubangi donat, lalu semprotkan custard menggunakan piping bag. Donat Bomboloni siap disajikan

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream tersedia di Ranch Market, Farmers Market, Food Hall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chicks, Grand Lucky, Indomaret, Supermarket dan Toko-toko lainnya.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ovomaltine_indonesia

recipe_en:
Flour Choice! The Secret to The Softest, Collapse-Proof Bombolone Donut, 100% Success.

These days, there are so many donut variations. From donut holes, mini donuts, donuts with fillings, potato donuts, banana donuts, etc. This time, I'm sharing a soft and airy bomboloni donut recipe. This delicious fried donut will be even more yummy with Ovomaltine Custard filling inside. It's great to be consumed with coffee or tea.

Bomboloni Donuts Recipe

Dough ingredients:
325 g medium-protein flour
75 g high-protein flour
50 g brown sugar
3 g salt
50 g butter
7 g yeast
150 ml milk
2 pc eggs
1 tsp vanilla extract

Custard Filling ingredients:
250 ml milk
250 ml cream
80 g sugar
3 egg yolks
1 whole egg
30 g cornstarch
1 tsp salt
50 g butter
1 tsp vanilla extract
100 g Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Other ingredients:
200 g brown sugar for topping
Cooking oil for frying

Steps:
1. Combine the medium-protein flour, high-protein flour, yeast, and brown sugar. Mix well.
2. Add the milk and eggs. Mix with mixer until they form a dough.
3. Add the butter and salt. Mix until elastic.
4. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes to rise.
5. Roll the dough to 1 cm thickness and shape with a cutter.
6. Rest the dough again for 30 minutes to rise.
7. To make the custard filling, heat the milk, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract.
8. Combine the egg and cornstarch. Mix well and strain.
9. Add a bit of the boiling milk into the egg. Mix well and return to the milk pan to cook.
10. Cook with low heat and keep stirring until thickens.
11. Store in a bowl and cover the surface with plastic wrap.
12. After the custard cools, set aside some of it and add the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream.
13. Heat some oil on low heat and fry the donuts until golden brown.
14. Make a hole on the donut and fill with custard using a piping bag. Bomboloni Donuts are ready to serve.

title: 5 Menit, Anti Kempes! Resep Donat Kentang Krispi Dan Lembut [100% Sukses]
recipe_id:
Resep Donat Kentang Empuk dan Lembut. Donat menjadi salah satu camilan favorit banyak orang. Kali ini aku mau share resep donat kentang yang lembut dan empuk. Proses proofing di sini menjadi kunci agar adonan donat mengembang sempurna. Asalkan memperhatikan step by stepnya dengan baik, tentu tidak akan gagal.

RALAT
Menit ke 06:24 yang betul adalah TEPUNG TERIGU PROTEIN SEDANG

Resep Donat Kentang (10 pcs)

Bahan Donat Kentang Original:
250 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
100 gr kentang halus
35 gr gula pasir
100 ml air / susu
6 gr ragi
30 gr margarin cair (atau unsalted butter + garam)
1 butir kuning telur
¼ sdt baking powder
2 sdm susu bubuk

Bahan Donat Kentang Pandan:
260 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
100 gr kentang halus
35 gr gula pasir
100 ml air / susu
6 gr ragi
30 gr margarin cair (atau unsalted butter + garam)
1 butir kuning telur
¼ sdt baking powder
2 sdt pandan essence

Bahan lainnya:
200 gr gula halus
500 ml minyak goreng

Langkah:
1. Campur tepung terigu, ragi, gula, baking powder, dan susu bubuk (untuk adonan pandan skip susu bubuk) aduk rata
2. Tambahkan kentang yang sudah dihaluskan, aduk terus dengan sumpit hingga mirip gumpalan pasir
3. Campurkan kuning telur, air, dan margarin cair (tambah pandan essence untuk adonan pandan) aduk rata
4. Campurkan bahan cair dan bahan kering, aduk hingga tercampur rata. Simpan dalam wadah lalu tutupi dengan cling wrap diamkan 30 menit
5. Uleni adonan sebentar lalu diamkan 5-10 menit
6. Olesi talenan dan rolling pin dengan sedikit minyak. Pipihkan adonan, pastikan seluruh permukaan sama rata lalu cetak dengan cetakan donat
7. Diamkan donat selama 20 menit atau sampai mengembang
8. Panaskan minyak, gunakan api kecil lalu goreng hingga kuning keemasan. Untuk donat pandan harus dimasak perlahan dengan api kecil
9. Tiriskan minyak pada donat
10. Gulingkan donat yang sudah dingin ke gula halus. Donat Kentang siap disajikan
recipe_en:
5 Minutes, Soft, Stays Fluffy! Potato Donut Recipe (Turn it into Kkwabaegi, Korean Twisted Donut)

Donuts are one of many people's favorite snacks. This time, I'm sharing a soft and airy potato donut recipe. The proofing process is the key here to make a perfectly-risen donut dough. As long as you pay attention to the steps, you won't fail in making this donut.

Potato Donut Recipe (10 pcs)

Original Potato Donut ingredients:
250 g medium-protein flour
100 g potatoes, mashed
35 g sugar
100 ml water / milk
6 g yeast
30 g melted margarine (or unsalted butter + salt)
1 egg yolk
1/4 tsp baking powder
2 tbsp powdered milk

Pandan Potato Donut ingredients:
260 g medium-protein flour
100 g potatoes, mashed
35 g sugar
100 ml water / milk
6 g yeast
30 g melted margarine (or unsalted butter + salt)
1 egg yolk
1/4 tsp baking powder
2 tsp Pandan essence

Other ingredients:
200 g icing sugar
500 ml cooking oil

Steps:
1. Combine the flour, yeast, sugar, baking powder, and powdered milk. (For the Pandan dough, skip the powdered milk) Mix well.
2. Add the mashed potatoes. Keep stirring with chopsticks until you get a sandy texture.
3. Combine the yolk, water, and melted margarine. (For the Pandan dough, add the Pandan essence). Mix well.
4. Combine the wet and dry ingredients. Mix well. Place in a bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Let it rest for 30 minutes.
5. Knead the dough for a bit and rest for 5-10 minutes.
6. Apply some oil to the board and rolling pin. Roll the dough. Make sure the surface is even and shape with the donut cutter.
7. Let the donuts rest for 20 minutes or until they have risen.
8. Heat the oil in low heat and fry the donuts until golden brown. For the Pandan donuts, fry them slowly with low heat.
9. Drain the oil.
10. Roll the cooled donuts in icing sugar. Potato Donuts are ready to serve.

title: Tips for Cutting and Cooking Lobster, Perfectly Split [TIPS & TRICKS]
recipe_id:
Lobster merupakan salah satu jenis udang besar yang harganya lumayan mahal namun mengandung banyak sekali nutrisi. Bagian lobster yang paling sulit dibersihkan adalah kepala dan ekornya. Kali ini aku akan share tips & tricks cara membersihkan dan memotong lobster dengan mudah.

Cara memotong lobster:
1. Cuci bersih lobster
2. Rebus lobster di air mendidih 10-12 menit
3. Angkat lalu masukkan ke air es agar memberhentikan proses masak
4. Bilas lobster
5. Potong bagian kepala lobster. Gunakan lap atau sarung tangan untuk menahan lobster. Pastikan pisau yang digunakan cukup kuat dan tajam untuk memotong lobster
6. Lobster siap digunakan
recipe_en:
How to Cut and Clean Lobsters [TIPS & TRICKS]

Lobsters are a family of large crustaceans that is quite expensive, but it contains so many nutrients. The most difficult parts to clean on a lobster is its head and tail. This time, I'm sharing the tips & tricks on how to clean and cut lobsters easily.

How to cut lobsters:
1. Wash the lobster cleanly.
2. Boil the lobster in boiling water for 10-12 minutes.
3. Remove the lobster and soak in ice water to stop the cooking process.
4. Rinse the lobster.
5. Cut the lobster's head. Use a dish towel or a glove to hold the lobster. Make sure the knife you use is strong and sharp enough to cut through the lobster.
6. The lobster is ready to use.

title: Bisa TANPA Mixer! Resep Cheesecake 4 Bahan Ter-LEGIT [Anak Kos Masuk]
recipe_id:
Cheesecake merupakan sajian kue yang terbuat dari bahan dasar keju. Kali ini aku akan share resep cheesecake super gampang tanpa oven. Terdiri dari dua bagian, yaitu bagian crust menggunakan biskuit dan bagian isi menggunakan krim keju. Perpaduan rasa manis, asam, gurih dan tekstur cheesecake yang lembut dijamin bikin ketagihan.

Resep Cheesecake (untuk 6 porsi)

Bahan:
300 gr cream cheese
60 gr mentega
75 gr susu kental manis
2 sdt vanilla beans / essence (opsional)
1 sdm jeruk nipis (opsional)
Garam sesuai selera (opsional)

Bahan crust:
30 keping biskuit Roma Kelapa
75 gr margarin / mentega cair

Garnish:
Kelapa sangrai
Whipped cream

Langkah:
1. Hancurkan biskuit Roma Kelapa hingga halus, campurkan dengan margarin / mentega cair, aduk rata
2. Masukkan campuran biskuit ke dalam loyang. Ratakan dan tekan-tekan hingga padat. Masukkan ke dalam lemari pendingin ± 15 menit
3. Aduk cream cheese hingga lembut lalu masukkan susu kental manis, garam, jeruk nipis, vanilla, dan mentega. Aduk hingga tercampur rata
4. Masukkan adonan cheesecake ke dalam loyang. Dinginkan di lemari pendingin sekitar 6-12 jam atau di freezer 1 jam hingga set
5. Hias dengan kelapa sangrai dan whipped cream. Cheesecake siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Only 4 Ingredients, No Oven No Mixer. Melt-in-Your-Mouth Cheesecake Recipe

Cheesecake is a dessert with cheese as its main ingredients. This time, I'm sharing a super easy cheesecake recipe, no oven needed. There are two parts to this recipe: the crust, made with biscuits, and the filling, made with cream cheese. The combination of sweet, tart, and savory flavor with the soft cheesecake texture will definitely make you come back for seconds.

Cheesecake Recipe (for 6 servings)

Ingredients:
300 g cream cheese
60 g butter
75 g condensed milk
2 tsp vanilla beans / essence (optional)
1 tbsp lime juice (optional)

Crust ingredients:
30 pc Roma Kelapa biscuits
75 g margarine / butter

Garnish:
Toasted coconut
Whipped cream

Steps:
1. Crush the Roma Kelapa biscuits to a fine crumb. Combine with the margarine / butter and mix well.
2. Add the biscuit mix into the mold. Even it out and press until firm. Cool in the fridge for ±15 minutes.
3. Whisk the cream cheese until it's soft. Add the condensed milk, salt, lime juice, and vanilla. Mix well.
4. Add the cheesecake batter into the mold. Cool in the fridge for 6-12 hours or in the freezer for 1 hour until it's set.
5. Garnish with toasted coconut and whipped cream. Cheesecake is ready to serve.

title: Just Stir It! Korean Fried Rice with Eggs Recipe [Boarding House Student Enters]
recipe_id:
Bokkeumbap (볶음밥) atau Nasi Goreng Korea sedikit berbeda dengan nasi goreng biasanya. Caranya cukup unik dengan mencampurkan nasi dan telur terlebih dahulu sebelum dimasak. Walaupun bahannya hanya nasi dan telur, namun rasanya dijamin nikmat. Kalau di Korea, biasanya ditambahkan juga dengan kimchi (asinan sayuran hasil fermentasi).

Resep Ramen Indomie: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI

Resep Nasi Goreng Korea

Bahan:
1- 2 porsi nasi putih
1 telur
2-5 sdm sambal bawang atau terasi instan @sambaluhe 
1 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm margarin
1 cabai merah, iris
1-2 cabai gendot, iris
1 daun bawang, iris
3 siung bawang merah, iris
Garam, merica, gula, penyedap sesuai selera
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Bahan egg chiffon:
2 butir telur

Garnish:
Daun bawang, iris

Langkah:
1. Campur nasi putih dengan telur, sambal cumi, kecap asin, dan kecap manis. Aduk rata
2. Panaskan pan, beri sedikit minyak goreng. Masukkan bawang merah, daun bawang, dan cabai. Tumis hingga harum
3. Masukkan campuran nasi, aduk hingga nasi kering dan tidak lengket
4. Bumbui dengan garam, merica, gula, dan penyedap
5. Masukkan mentega, tunggu hingga meleleh, aduk rata
6. Cetak nasi goreng menggunakan mangkuk
7. Buat Egg Chiffon. Kocok telur. Lalu goreng setengah matang sambil diaduk ke tengah
8. Letakkan egg chiffon di atas nasi goreng dan garnish dengan daun bawang
recipe_en:
Just Mix It! Korean Fried Rice with Egg Blanket Recipe

Bokkeumbap (볶음밥) or Korean Fried Rice is a bit different to Indonesian fried rice. The cooking method is quite unique -- you mix the rice and the egg first before cooking. Even though it's just rice and eggs, the taste is delicious. In Korea, it is usually served with kimchi (salted and fermented vegetables)

Ramen Indomie Recipe: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI

Korean Fried Rice Recipe

Ingredients:
1-2 serving rice
1 egg
2-5 tbsp garlic chili or instant shrimp paste @sambaluhe
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp margarine
1 red chili
1-2 habanero
1 leeks
3 shallots
salt, pepper, sugar to taste
cooking oil as needed

Egg Chiffon ingredients:
2 pc eggs

Garnish:
Leeks, sliced

Steps:
1. Mix the rice with the egg, squid sambal, soy sauce, and sweet soy sauce. Mix well.
2. Heat the pan and add a bit of oil. Add in the shallots, leeks, and chili. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the rice mix and stir until the rice is dry and not sticky.
4. Season with salt, pepper, sugar, and flavor enhancer.
5. Add in the margarine and wait until it melts. Mix well.
6. Mold the fried rice with a small bowl.
7. To make the Egg Chiffon, whisk the egg and fry it until half-cooked while keep stirring it to the center.
8. Place the Egg Chiffon on top of the fried rice and garnish it with the leeks.

title: Resep Udang Mayones Krispi TETAP Kenyal Ala Resto: Potongannya Harus Lebar!
recipe_id:
Udang Mayones merupakan salah satu menu favorit di restoran chinese atau restoran seafood. Udang digoreng renyah dengan balutan tepung dipadukan dengan campuran saus mayones yang segar. Ternyata menu restoran ini sangat mudah dibuat asalkan tahu tips & tricksnya. Cocok dijadikan camilan atau lauk untuk anak-anak dan keluarga di rumah.

Resep Ramen Indomie: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI
Cara memotong udang: https://youtu.be/_j6IN7fAas8
Resep Ebi Furai: https://youtu.be/f-PlPtWxSsI
Resep Udang Goreng Sereal: https://youtu.be/xDyoLvgWqhc
Resep Udang Saus Singapore: https://youtu.be/P3GuDIigDwU

Resep Udang Mayones

Bahan:
300 gr udang ukuran 25, kupas kulit
1/2 st jahe halus
1 butir putih telur
150 gr tepung maizena
1/2 sdt baking soda
Garam, lada sesuai selera
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Bahan saus mayo:
6 sdm mayones
2 sdm susu kental manis
1.5 sdm madu
2 sdm air jeruk nipis
1/4 sdt garam

Bahan tambahan untuk dynamite mayo:
1-2 sdm saus sambal
1/2 siung bawang putih halus

Bahan lainnya:
Bihun jagung goreng
Biji wijen hitam
Daun bawang

Langkah:
1. Belah udang menjadi potongan butterfly
2. Masukkan jahe halus, baking soda, putih telur, garam, merica, dan sedikit tepung maizena. Aduk rata lalu diamkan 10-15 menit di suhu ruangan
3. Buat dynamite mayo original. Campurkan mayones, air jeruk nipis, susu kental manis, dan madu. Aduk rata, tambahkan sedikit garam
4. Buat dynamite mayo pedas dengan menambahkan saus sambal dan bawang putih. Aduk rata
5. Setelah udang di marinasi, masukkan ke dalam tepung maizena, aduk rata hingga seluruh permukaannya terlapisi, lalu saring
6. Goreng udang hingga matang, angkat lalu tiriskan
7. Campur udang goreng dengan dynamite mayo, aduk rata
8. Siapkan bihun jagung goreng, garnish dengan biji wijen hitam dan daun bawang. Udang Mayones siap disajikan
