recipe_en:
Crispy & Bouncy Mayonnaise Shrimp a la Restaurant Recipe: The Trick is Wide Cuts!

Mayonnaise Shrimp is one of the favorites in Chinese or seafood restaurants. The shrimp is coated with flour, fried until crisp, and mixed with a fresh mayonnaise sauce. As it turns out, this restaurant menu is very easy to make if you know the tips & tricks. It's great as a snack food or as a main dish for kids and family at home.

Indomie Ramen Recipe: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI
How to peel shrimp: https://youtu.be/_j6IN7fAas8
Ebi Furai Recipe: https://youtu.be/f-PlPtWxSsI
Cereal Prawns Recipe: https://youtu.be/xDyoLvgWqhc
Prawns in Singapore Sauce Recipe: https://youtu.be/P3GuDIigDwU

Mayonnaise Shrimp Recipe

Ingredients:
300 g shrimp, grade 25, peeled
1/2 tsp grated ginger
1 egg white
150 g cornstarch
Salt, pepper, to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Dynamite Mayo ingredients:
6 tbsp mayonnaise
2 tbsp condensed milk
1.5 tbsp honey
2 tbsp lime juice
1/4 tsp salt

Additional ingredients for the Dynamite Mayo:
1-2 tbsp chili sauce
1/2 clove grated garlic

Other ingredients:
Fried corn-based vermicelli
Black sesame seeds
Leeks

Steps:
1. Butterfly the shrimp.
2. Add the grated ginger, baking soda, egg white, salt, pepper, and a bit of cornstarch. Mix well and let it rest for 10-15 minutes at room temperature.
3. To make the Original Dynamite Mayo, combine the mayonnaise, lime juice, condensed milk, and honey. Mix well and add a bit of salt.
4. To make the Spicy Dynamite Mayo, add the chili sauce and garlic. Mix well.
5. After the shrimp is finished marinating, coat them with cornstarch. Mix well until all the surface is coated and sift the excess off.
6. Fry the shrimp until cooked. Drain and set aside.
7. Mix the fried shrimp with the Dynamite Mayo. Mix well.
8. Prepare the fried vermicelli and garnish with the black sesame seeds and leeks. Mayonnaise Shrimp is ready to serve.

title: 100% Bahan Lokal. Rahasia Resep Sundubu Jjigae Itaewon Class: Cuka! (Sup Tahu Korea)
recipe_id:
Sundubu Jjigae (순두부찌개) atau sup tahu Korea pedas merupakan salah satu makanan yang cukup populer di Korea Selatan. Kali ini aku mau share resep Sundubu Jjigae menggunakan bahan-bahan lokal tapi rasanya mirip dengan aslinya. Sup ini cukup lengkap karena selain tahu, juga dilengkapi dengan daging sapi, kol, telur, dan berbagai macam seafood.

Resep Ramen Indomie: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI

Resep Sundubu Jjigae (untuk 3-4 porsi)

Bahan:
2 balok tahu sutra besar
3 butir telur
1 liter kaldu ayam
100 gr daging sapi
4 ekor udang sedang
1 ekor cumi-cumi
6 buah ikan teri
3 lembar kol, iris
1 batang daun bawang, iris
½ bawang bombai, iris
Minyak goreng untuk menumis

Bahan paste:
2-4 siung bawang putih, haluskan
5 sdm saus sambal
3 sdm kecap ikan
1 sdm minyak wijen
2 sdm cabai bubuk
2 sdm cuka
2 sdm tauco

Langkah:
1. Buat paste. Campurkan saus sambal, kecap ikan, cuka, minyak wijen, tauco, bawang putih, dan cabai bubuk. Aduk rata
2. Panaskan pan. Tumis bawang bombai dan daun bawang hingga harum
3. Masukkan cumi-cumi, daging sapi, ikan teri, udang, dan campuran paste sambil diaduk
4. Masukkan kol dan kaldu ayam. Masak hingga kuah sup berkurang 20%
5. Masukkan tahu ke panci yang berbeda, tambahkan kuah dan isiannya. Masak hingga mendidih sambil tahunya dihancurkan
6. Masukkan telur di bagian tengah sup, tutup dan tunggu beberapa saat
7. Garnish dengan daun bawang, Sundubu Jjigae siap disajikan
recipe_en:
100% Local Ingredients. Itaewon Class Sundubu Jjigae Recipe’s Secret: Vinegar!

Sundubu Jjigae (순두부찌개) or spicy tofu soup is one of South Korea's most popular dishes. This time, I'm sharing a Sundubu Jjigae recipe using local ingredients, but the flavor is close to the original. This soup is quite complete, as it's complemented by not only tofu but also beef, cabbage, egg, and assorted seafood.

Ramen Indomie Recipe: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI

Sundubu Jjigae Recipe (yields 3-4 servings)

Ingredients:
2 blocks large silk tofu
3 pc eggs
1L chicken stock
100 g beef
4 pc medium prawns
1 pc squid
6 pc anchovies
3 pc cabbage leaf, sliced
1 stalk leeks, sliced
1/2 pc onion, sliced
Cooking oil for sautéing

Paste ingredients:
2-4 clove garlic, grated
5 tbsp chili sauce
3 tbsp fish sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
2 tbsp chili powder
2 tbsp vinegar
2 tbsp tauco

Steps:
1. Make the paste. Combine the chili sauce, fish sauce, vinegar, sesame oil, tauco, garlic, and chili powder. Mix well.
2. Heat the pan. Sauté the onion and leeks until fragrant.
3. Add the squid, beef, anchovies, prawns, and the paste while stirring.
4. Add the cabbage and chicken stock. Cook until the broth is reduced by 20%.
5. Add tofu to a different pan. Pour in the broth and the other contents. Bring to a boil and break the tofu apart.
6. Place the egg in the middle of the soup, cover the pan, and wait.
7. Garnish with leeks. Sundubu Jjigae is ready to serve.

title: Just a Pan. 4-Layer Tiramisu Pudding Recipe: The Bottom Layer Is the Most Addictive! [Boarding Ho...
recipe_id:
Puding menjadi salah satu hidangan pencuci mulut alias dessert yang disukai banyak orang. Kali ini aku mau share Puding Tiramisu 4 lapis menggunakan bahan-bahan yang mudah didapat dan caranya pun gampang banget. Rasa manis, gurih, aroma kopi, dan tekstur yang lembut dijamin bikin ketagihan. Cocok juga dijadikan sebagai pengganti kue ulang tahun.

Resep Coffee Mousse: https://youtu.be/fuwOi4wuoAw

Resep Puding Tiramisu

Bahan kopi:
8 sachet Tora Cafe Milky Latte
900 ml air
2 sdm / 30 gr jelly powder
3 sdt rum sintetis (non-alkohol)

Bahan cream cheese:
200 gr cream cheese
650 ml ml susu
1 butir kuning telur
6-7 sdm / 80-100 gr gula pasir
1 ½ sdm / 22 gr jelly powder
2 sdt ekstrak vanila

Bahan lainnya:
Roma Marie Gold secukupnya
1 sachet Tora Cafe Choco Latte
Chocolate powder (opsional)
Whipped cream (opsional)

Langkah:
1. Siapkan 2 panci, rebus air dan susu
2. Campurkan cream cheese dengan gula dan kuning telur, aduk rata menggunakan whisk
3. Tambahkan sedikit susu yang sedang direbus, aduk rata
4. Masukkan jelly powder dan ekstrak vanila, aduk rata
5. Masukkan setengah susu ke dalam campuran cream cheese setelah itu masukkan kembali ke dalam panci, aduk rata
6. Masukkan Tora Cafe Milky Latte ke dalam rebusan air, aduk rata
7. Masukkan jelly powder, aduk rata
8. Matikan api, masukkan essence rum
9. Siapkan wadah cetakan, tuang lapisan pertama yaitu puding cream cheese. Tunggu hingga set
10. Tuang lapisan kedua yaitu campuran puding cream cheese dan kopi. Tunggu hingga set
11.Tuang lapisan ketiga yaitu puding kopi. Tunggu hingga set
12. Tuang lapisan keempat yaitu campuran puding kopi dengan Tora Cafe Choco Latte. Tambahkan biskuit marie di atasnya lalu siram lagi dengan puding. Diamkan di dalam kulkas hingga set
13. Hias dengan whipped cream dan taburan chocolate powder. Puding Tiramisu siap disajikan

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @TORACAFE.ID
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/toracafe.id
Facebook Page: https://www.facebook.com/ID.ToraCafe/
recipe_en:
Just One Pot. 4-Layer Tiramisu Pudding Recipe

Pudding is one of people's favorite desserts. This time, I'm sharing a 4-layer Tiramisu Pudding recipe using easy-to-get ingredients and several simple steps. The coffee aroma as well as the sweetness, savoriness, and texture will make you come back for more. You can also make this to replace a birthday cake.

Tiramisu Pudding Recipe

Coffee Pudding ingredients:
8 sachet Tora Cafe Milky Latte
900 ml water
2 tbsp / 30 g jelly powder
3 tsp rum essence

Cream Cheese Pudding ingredients:
200 g cream cheese
650 ml milk
1 egg yolk
6-7 tbsp / 80-100 g sugar
1.5 tbsp / 22 g jelly powder
2 tsp vanilla extract

Other ingredients:
Roma Marie Gold as needed
1 sachet Tora Cafe Choco Latte
Chocolate powder (optional)
Whipped cream (optional)

Steps:
1. Prepare 2 pans. Bring the water and milk to a boil.
2. Combine the cream cheese with sugar and egg yolk. Mix using a whisk.
3. Add a bit of the boiled milk. Mix well.
4. Add the jelly powder and vanilla extract. Mix well.
5. Add half of the milk into the cream cheese mix and return to pan. Mix well.
6. Add the Tora Cafe Milky Latte into the boiled water. Mix well.
7. Add the jelly powder in. Mix well.
8. Turn off the heat and add the rum essence.
9. Prepare a mold and pour the first layer: the cream cheese pudding. Wait until it sets.
10. Pour the second layer: the cream cheese and coffee pudding. Wait until it sets.
11. Pour the third layer: the coffee pudding. Wait until it sets.
12. Pour the fourth layer: the coffee pudding with Tora Cafe Choco Latte. Add the Marie biscuits on top and pour in the rest of the pudding. Keep in the fridge to set.
13. Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate powder. Tiramisu Pudding is ready to serve.

title: Bongkar Resep FRAPPUCCINO Bertekstur Salju: Jangan Kebanyakan Susunya!
recipe_id:
Frappuccino merupakan minuman yang terbuat dari kopi dan es yang diblender sampai berbusa. Ada banyak cara menikmati frappuccino, salah satunya mocha frappuccino dengan bahan-bahan yang ada di rumah. Perpaduan espresso dengan susu yang diblender ditambah dengan whipped cream dan saus Ovomaltine semakin nikmat. Berasa ngopi di coffee shop.

Resep Whipped Cream dari Santan: https://youtu.be/y5_LXquy8Vo

Resep Es Pisang Ijo Karamel: https://youtu.be/OrHy0XWUWfk

Resep Ovomaltine Frappuccino 

Bahan:
2-3 shots espresso
2-3 sdm gula palem
1 cup susu
2 cup es batu
Whipped Cream

Bahan saus Ovomaltine:
4 sdm Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream
4 sdm susu

Langkah:
1. Masukkan espresso, gula, susu, dan es batu. Blender hingga kental
2. Buat topping. Campur Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream dan susu, aduk rata hingga kekentalannya seperti saus
3. Siapkan gelas, isi bagian pinggir dan tengahnya dengan saus Ovomaltine
4. Tuang frappuccino ke dalam gelas
5. Tambahkan whipped cream dan saus ovomaltine di atasnya
6. Ovomaltine Frappuccino siap disajikan

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream tersedia di Ranch Market, Farmers Market, Food Hall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chicks, Grand Lucky, Indomaret, Supermarket dan Toko-toko lainnya.

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @OVOMALTINE_INDONESIA
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ovomaltine_indonesia
Facebook Page : https://www.facebook.com/OvomaltineOfficialID/
recipe_en:
Not Too Much Milk! The Secret of Snowy Frappuccino Recipe

Frappuccino is a drink made of coffee and ice, blended until they're frothy. There are lots of ways you can enjoy Frappuccino. One of them is by making a mocha Frappuccino with the ingredients you have at home. The mix of espresso with milk, blended together with whipped cream on top and Ovomaltine sauce make this drink even more yummy. It feels like we're hanging out at a coffee shop!

Ovomaltine Frappuccino Recipe

Ingredients:
2-3 shots espresso
2-3 tbsp palm sugar
1 cup milk
2 cups ice cubes
Whipped Cream

Ovomaltine Sauce ingredients:
4 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream
4 tbsp milk

Steps:
1. Combine the espresso, milk, sugar, and ice cubes. Blend until it forms a slushy.
2. For the topping, combine the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream with milk. Mix well until you reach a sauce-like consistency.
3. Prepare a glass. Pour the Ovomaltine sauce to the edges and the center.
4. Pour the Frappuccino into the glass.
5. Add the whipped cream and the Ovomaltine sauce on top.
6. Ovomaltine Frappuccino is ready to serve.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

title: Crispy! Crispy Corn Recipe in 3 Flavors: Kids, Families, Everyone Loves It.
recipe_id:
Jagung Krispi merupakan salah satu camilan favorit aku di rumah. Bahan-bahannya simple dan tentunya enak. Kali ini aku akan share resep 3 varian rasa jagung krispi, sweet butter, garlic, dan spicy. Cocok banget jadi camilan untuk nemenin nonton, work from home, dan kumpul bersama keluarga di rumah.

Resep Tahu Cabai Garam: https://youtu.be/y6eRAgaqi7I
Resep Jamur Krispi: https://youtu.be/pGV54BolkjE

Resep Jagung Krispi

Bahan:
2 buah jagung
1 butir putih telur
200 gr tepung maizena
Garam, merica sesuai selera
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Bumbu sweet butter:
Mentega
Gula halus

Bumbu garlic:
Bawang putih, iris
Daun jeruk, buang batangnya dan iris panjang
Gula halus
Kaldu jamur

Bumbu spicy:
Cabai bubuk
Kaldu jamur
Gula halus
Garam

Langkah:
1. Cuci bersih jagung lalu pipil, masukkan dalam wadah
2. Masukkan putih telur, bumbui dengan garam dan merica. Aduk rata
3. Untuk membuat lapisan basah, campurkan 3 sdm tepung maizena. Aduk rata
4. Masukkan campuran jagung ke tepung maizena, pastikan jagung terlapis sempurna dan tidak menggumpal. Diamkan 5 menit
5. Sebelum digoreng, ayak jagung untuk mengurangi tepung berlebih
5. Gunakan api kecil-sedang, lalu goreng jagung sambil diaduk perlahan hingga kuning keemasan, tiriskan
6. Buat varian sweet butter. Selagi masih panas, campurkan jagung krispi dengan mentega dan gula halus. Aduk rata
7. Buat varian daun jeruk bawang putih. Lapisi daun jeruk dan bawang putih dengan sisa tepung, lalu ayak. Goreng hingga kering. Campurkan jagung krispi dengan daun jeruk dan bawang putih yang sudah digoreng. Bumbui dengan kaldu jamur dan gula halus, lalu aduk rata
8. Buat varian pedas. Campurkan jagung krispi dengan kaldu jamur, gula halus, cabai bubuk, dan garam. Aduk rata
9. Jagung Krispi siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Yummy, Savory Snack Food. 3-Flavors Crispy Corn Recipe

Crispy Corn is one of my favorite snacks at home. The ingredients are simple and, of course, it tastes great. This time, I'll be sharing a recipe for Crispy Corn in 3 flavors: Sweet Butter, Garlic, and Spicy. It's a great snack food to accompany you as you're watching TV, working from home, and hanging out with your family at home.

Salt & Pepper Tofu Recipe: https://youtu.be/y6eRAgaqi7I
Crispy Enoki Recipe: https://youtu.be/pGV54BolkjE

Crispy Corn Recipe

Ingredients:
2 pc corn
1 egg white
200 g cornstarch
Salt, pepper to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Sweet Butter flavor:
Butter
Powdered sugar

Garlic Lime flavor:
Garlic, sliced
Kaffir lime leaves, remove the stem and slice lengthwise
Powdered sugar
Mushroom stock powder

Spicy flavor:
Chili powder
Mushroom stock powder
Powdered sugar
Salt

Steps:
1. Rinse the corn and cut it off the cob. Add to a bowl.
2. Add the egg white and season with salt and pepper. Mix well.
3. To make the wet coating, add 3 tbsp of cornstarch. Mix well.
4. Add the corn to the dry cornstarch. Make sure the corn is well-coated and not lumpy. Let it rest for 5 minutes.
5. Before frying, sift the excess flour off.
6. With medium-low heat, fry the corn as you gently stir them until golden brown. Drain the excess oil.
7. To make the Sweet Butter version, add the butter and powdered sugar while the Crispy Corn is still hot. Mix well.
8. To make the Garlic Lime version, coat the Kaffir lime leaves and garlic with the remaining cornstarch. Sift the excess and fry until crispy. Add the Crispy Corn to the fried Kaffir lime leaves and garlic. Season with mushroom stock and powdered sugar. Mix well.
9. To make the Spicy version, add the Crispy Corn with mushroom stock powder, powdered sugar, chili powder, and salt. Mix well.
10. Crispy Corn is ready to serve.

title: 100% Delicious and Refreshing! Hong Kong Mango Coconut Milk Ice Recipe [Local Ingredients]
recipe_id:
Mango Pomelo Sago merupakan dessert klasik khas Hongkong yang berbahan dasar buah mangga. Kali ini aku menggantinya dengan Vita Pudding Mangga yang rasanya mangga asli dan tanpa bahan pengawet. Dipadukan dengan Sorbet Mangga yang manis dan segar. Pas banget untuk sajian lebaran bersama keluarga di rumah.

Resep Es Sagu Mangga & Sorbet Mangga

Bahan Es Sagu Mangga:
2 pcs Vita Pudding Mangga
50 gr sagu mutiara, rebus
½ jeruk bali
150 ml santan
4 sdm krimer bubuk
60 ml sirup mangga
Es batu secukupnya

Bahan Sorbet Mangga:
3 pcs Vita Pudding Mangga beku
3 sdm sirup mangga
3 sdm krimer bubuk

Langkah:
1. Buat Es Sagu Mangga. Kupas jeruk bali, ambil bagian dagingnya lalu suwir-suwir
2. Siapkan wadah, masukkan santan, krimer bubuk, sirup mangga. Aduk rata
3. Masukkan sagu mutiara, jeruk bali, dan potongan Vita Pudding Mangga. Aduk rata
4. Buat Sorbet Mangga. Blender Vita Pudding Mangga beku, sirup mangga, dan krimer bubuk hingga halus dan mengental
5. Siapkan es batu. Es Mangga Sagu dan Sorbet Mangga siap disajikan.

Vita Pudding menggunakan Aseptic Technology sehingga memiliki kelebihan:
✓ Dapat disimpan pada suhu ruang 
✓ Mencegah kerusakan rasa dan kandungan vitamin
✓ Diproses tanpa ada campur tangan manusia (sterilisasi terjamin)
✓ Dapat bertahan dalam jangka waktu yang lama (1 tahun)
✓ Kualitas produk tetap terjaga
✓ Ramah lingkungan dan bebas dari bahan pengawet

recipe_en:
Minimart Ingredients! People's Favorite Hong Kong Mango Sago and Italian Sorbet Recipe by Vita Pudding

Mango Pomelo Sago is a classic Hong Kong dessert based on mango fruit. This time, I'm substituting the mango with Vita Pudding Mango with real mango flavor and free of preservatives. Serve it with the sweet and refreshing Mango Sorbet. This dessert is great for Eid al-Fitr with your family at home.

Mango Sago & Mango Sorbet Recipe

Mango Sago ingredients:
2 pcs Vita Pudding Mango
50 g sago pearls, boiled
1/2 pomelo
150 ml coconut milk
4 tbsp creamer
60 ml mango syrup
Ice cubes as needed

Mango Sorbet ingredients:
3 pcs Vita Pudding Mango
3 tbsp mango syrup
3 tbsp creamer

Steps:
1. To make the Mango Sago, peel the pomelo and shred the flesh.
2. Prepare a bowl. Add the coconut milk, creamer, and mango syrup. Mix well.
3. Add the sago pearls, pomelo, and Vita Pudding Mango slices. Stir.
4. To make the Mango Sorbet, blend the frozen Vita Pudding Mango with mango syrup and creamer until the consistency is soft and thick.
5. Prepare some ice cubes. Mango Sago and Mango Sorbet are ready to serve.

Hot Dog merupakan salah satu makanan populer di Amerika dan sudah menjamur ke mana-mana termasuk Indonesia. Kali ini aku mau share resep 3 varian hot dog, yaitu US, Japanese, dan Thai Style. Walaupun bahan utamanya hanya sosis dan roti tawar, rasanya gak kalah kayak Pink’s Hot Dog yang ada di Hollywood.

Resep Ebi Furai: https://youtu.be/f-PlPtWxSsI

Resep Tempe Katsu: https://youtu.be/GGy6t_CftnU

Resep Hot Dog

Bahan:
3 roti tawar
Sosis Kanzler Beef Cocktail
Sosis Kanzler Bockwurst
Butter secukupnya

American Style:
¼ buah bawang bombai, tumis
2 sdm keju red cheddar
2 sdm keju mozarella
1 sdm mustard
1 sdm saus tomat (opsional)
1 sdm mayonnaise

Japanese style:
Pelapis katsu (terigu, telur, tepung roti)
1 sdm saus teriyaki manis
¼ buah bawang bombai, tumis
1 sdm mayonnaise
1 bungkus rumput laut
1 batang daun bawang

Thailand style:
½ timun 
½ wortel
2 sdm saus bangkok
2 sdm mayonnaise
1 sdt kecap ikan
1 sdt cuka beras
Daun ketumbar secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Rebus sosis Kanzler Bockwurst
2. Buat pelapis katsu. Kocok telur, bumbui dengan garam dan merica
3. Celupkan sosis Kanzler Beef Cocktail ke dalam tepung terigu, telur, lalu tepung roti. Lakukan 2x agar lebih krispi
4. Goreng hingga kering warnanya kuning keemasan
5. Siapkan roti tawar, potong bagian kulit pinggirnya, lalu pipihkan dengan rolling pin
6. Buat US Style. Taburi roti tawar dengan parutan keju mozarella dan cheddar, pipihkan dengan rolling pin. Olesi dengan mustard, taruh sosis rebus di atasnya dan tambahkan bawang bombai tumis. Gulung roti
7. Buat Japanese style. Taruh nori di atas roti tawar, olesi dengan mayonnaise. Tambahkan saus teriyaki, katsu sosis, dan bawang bombai tumis. Gulung roti
8. Buat Thai Style. Taruh salad di atas roti tawar. Tambahkan sosis rebus, dan daun ketumbar. Gulung roti
9. Panaskan pan, masukkan sedikit butter. Panggang hot dog hingga kulitnya kecokelatan
10. Beri topping dan garnish sesuai selera. Hot Dog siap disajikan

Langkah membuat salad:
1. Parut timun dan wortel
2. Rendam di air es batu beberapa saat lalu tiriskan
3. Campurkan dengan cuka, sambal bangkok, kecap ikan, dan mayonnaise. Aduk rata

Untuk pembelian Sosis Kanzler melalui e-commerce
Tokopedia: https://www.tokopedia.com/kanzlerofficial/

recipe_en:
Hot Dog Recipes from THREE Countries: US, Japan, and Thai. All with Local Ingredients!

Hot Dog Recipe

Ingredients:
3 slice white bread
Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausages
Kanzler Bockwurst Sausages
Butter, as needed

American Stye:
1/4 pc onion, sautéed
2 tbsp Red Cheddar cheese
2 tbsp Mozzarella cheese
1 tbsp mustard
1 tbsp tomato sauce (optional)
1 tbsp mayonnaise

Japanese Style:
Katsu coating (flour, egg, breadcrumbs)
1 tbsp sweet Teriyaki sauce
1/4 pc onion, sautéed
1 tbsp mayonnaise
1 sachet seaweed
1 stalk spring onions

Thai Style:
1/2 cucumber
1/2 carrot
2 tbsp Bangkok sauce
2 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tsp fish sauce
1 tsp rice vinegar
Coriander leaves, as needed

Steps:
1. Boil the Kanzler Bockwurst Sausage.
2. Make the Katsu coating. Whisk the egg and season with salt and pepper.
3. Coat the Kanzler Beef Cocktail Sausage with flour, egg, and breadcrumbs. Repeat it once to make it even more crispy.
4. Fry until golden brown.
5. Prepare the white bread by trimming the edges. Flatten with a rolling pin.
6. To make the US Style, sprinkle the bread with some grated Mozzarella and Red Cheddar cheese. Spread some mustard and place the boiled sausage on top. Add some sautéed onions. Roll the bread.
7. To make the Japanese Style, place nori on top of the bread and spread with mayonnaise. Add the Teriyaki sauce, Sausage Katsu, and sautéed onions. Roll the bread.
8. To make the Thai Style, add the salad to the bread. Add the boiled sausage and coriander leaves. Roll the bread.
9. Heat the pan and add some butter. Grill the hot dog until the bread browns.
10. Add some toppings and garnishes, to taste. Hot Dog is ready to serve.

Steps for making salad:
1. Shred the cucumber and carrot.
2. Soak in ice water for a bit. Drain.
3. Add vinegar, Bangkok sauce, fish sauce, and mayonnaise. Mix well.

title: Praktis, Lengkap: Resep Ketupat Sayur Bakso, Menu Lebaran Wajib!
recipe_id:
Ketupat Sayur salah satu makanan khas betawi, memiliki ciri khas kuah santan kuning cair yang dipadukan dengan sayuran labu siam, tahu, dan telur. Di resep ini aku menambahkan bakso daging untuk menambah cita rasa semakin komplit dan lezat, cocok disajikan sebagai menu sarapan, sahur, buka puasa, maupun untuk acara keluarga.

Resep Ketupat Sayur Bakso 

Bahan ketupat:
1 cup beras
3 cup air

Bahan bumbu halus:
5 siung bawang putih, iris
8 siung bawang merah
3 butir kemiri
5 cm kunyit
3 cm jahe, iris
4 cm lengkuas, iris
1-2 batang serai, iris
5 buah cabai merah keriting, iris
2 sdt ketumbar
Minyak secukupnya

Bahan lainnya:
250 gr bakso sapi Sumber Selera
4 buah tahu goreng
3 buah labu siam kecil, iris memanjang
3 buah wortel, iris memanjang
10 buah cabai hijau keriting
Cabai rawit sesuai selera
5 lembar daun salam
Telur rebus sesuai selera
250 ml santan instan kental
Air secukupnya
Garam, gula, penyedap, dan lada sesuai selera

Pelengkap:
Bawang goreng
Emping
Kerupuk, dll

Langkah:
1. Blender bumbu halus
2. Tumis bumbu hingga kering dan wangi
3. Masukkan air, masak hingga mendidih
4. Masukkan labu siam, wortel, cabai, tahu, dan daun salam
5. Bumbui dengan garam, gula, penyedap, dan lada
6. Masukkan bakso Sumber Selera yang sudah dibelah empat bagian atasnya
7. Masukkan telur rebus
8. Tambahkan santan, aduk rata
9. Sajikan dengan ketupat / lontong dan taburi dengan bawang goreng

Langkah membuat ketupat:
1. Cuci bersih beras. Pastikan ditiriskan hingga air sudah tidak ada
2. Masukkan beras dan air ke dalam rice cooker. Masak hingga matang
3. Lumatkan nasi menggunakan hand blender
4. Cetak di wadah berbentuk kotak atau menggunakan daun pisang
5. Diamkan selama 3-4 jam (bisa dalam keadaan terbuka / tertutup)
6. Ketupat siap digunakan

recipe_en:
Complete, Practical Eid al-Fitr Menu. Indonesian Rice Cake with Veggies and Meatballs.

Ketupat Sayur (Indonesian Rice Cake with Veggies) is a signature dish from Betawi. It has a distinct yellow coconut milk broth with chayotes, tofu, and egg. This recipe is a bit different because I'm adding meatballs to the mix. Of course, it makes the dish even more complete and suitable for breakfast, Suhoor, Iftar, and other family gatherings.

Ketupat Sayur Bakso (Indonesian Rice Cake with Veggies and Meatballs) Recipe

Ketupat (Rice Cake) ingredients:
1 cup rice
3 cups water

Spice blend ingredients:
5 clove garlic, sliced
8 pc shallots
3 pc candlenuts
5 cm turmeric
3 cm ginger, sliced
4 cm galangal, sliced
1-2 stalk lemongrass, sliced
5 pc curly red chili, sliced
2 tsp coriander
Cooking oil as needed

Other ingredients:
250 g Sumber Selera beef meatballs
4 pc fried tofu
3 pc small chayotes, sliced lengthwise
10 pc curly green chili
Bird's eye chili, to taste
5 pc bay leaves
Boiled egg, to taste
250 ml instant coconut milk
Water as needed
Salt, sugar, flavor enhancers, and pepper as needed

Topping:
Fried shallots
Emping
Crackers, etc

Steps:
1. Blend the spices.
2. Sauté the spice paste until reduced and fragrant.
3. Add water and bring to a boil.
4. Add the chayotes, carrots, chili, tofu, and bay leaves.
5. Season with salt, sugar, flavor enhancers, and pepper.
6. Add the Sumber Selera meatballs that have been cut into a plus at the top.
7. Add the boiled eggs.
8. Add coconut milk and mix well.
9. Serve with ketupat / lontong and sprinkle with fried shallots.

Steps to making ketupat (rice cake):
1. Rinse the rice. Make sure to drain the water completely.
2. Add the rice and the water into the rice cooker. Cook until done.
3. Mash the rice with a hand blender.
4. Mold in a square container or use banana leaves.
5. Let it rest for 3-4 hours.
6. The rice cake is ready to use.

title: Crispy, Long-Lasting, and Convenient! Enoki Mushroom Recipe: Rp. 7,000 for 8 Servings [Great for ...
recipe_id:
Enoki atau enokitake 榎 adalah jenis jamur yang sering digunakan di dalam masakan Jepang dan Korea. Kali ini aku akan share resep Jamur Enoki Krispi yang cocok dijadikan camilan maupun lauk. Bahannya ekonomis dan cara buatnya pun mudah. Cocok juga untuk anak sebagai alternatif gorengan yang lebih sehat.

Resep Tahu Cabai Garam: https://youtu.be/y6eRAgaqi7I

Resep Enoki Krispi

Bahan:
1 pack jamur enoki
1 telur
Garam, merica, kaldu jamur / penyedap sesuai selera

Tepung pelapis:
150 gr tepung terigu
150 gr tepung maizena
1 sdm bawang putih bubuk

Taburan:
5 siung bawang putih
10 buah cabai rawit
1-2 batang daun bawang
Gula halus
Cabai bubuk
Terigu dan maizena sisa pelapis enoki

Langkah:
1. Potong bagian akar jamur enoki, cuci bersih dan peras agar tidak ada kandungan air. Lalu keringkan menggunakan tisu
2. Siapkan wadah, masukkan telur, kaldu jamur, garam, dan merica. Aduk rata
3. Buat campuran tepung pelapis. Campurkan tepung terigu dan tepung maizena (perbandingan 1:1), tambahkan bawang putih bubuk lalu aduk rata
4. Masukkan jamur enoki ke telur, pastikan terlapisi sempurna. Pisahkan satu per satu agar tidak menggumpal
5. Masukkan jamur enoki ke campuran tepung pelapis sedikit demi sedikit agar tidak menggumpal
6. Sebelum digoreng, saring jamur enoki untuk mengurangi lapisan tepung yang berlebih
7. Goreng jamur enoki di minyak panas hingga kering. Jangan lupa diaduk agar tidak menggumpal
8. Iris bawang putih, cabai rawit, dan daun bawang. Masukkan ke dalam tepung, saring, lalu goreng hingga kering
9. Campurkan jamur enoki, bawang putih, cabai rawit, dan daun bawang yang sudah digoreng menjadi satu
10. Bumbui dengan garam, gula halus, kaldu jamur, dan cabai bubuk
11. Jamur Enoki Krispi siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Super Crunchy. Crispy Enoki Mushroom Recipe

Enoki or enokitake (榎) is a type of mushroom that's frequently used in Japanese and Korean cuisine. The shape is quite unique. They're small with slim, long stems. This time, I'm sharing a Crispy Enoki Mushroom recipe that's perfect as both a snack and a side dish. The ingredients are inexpensive and the methods are easy, too. Your children would love to have these as their meal's condiments.

Crispy Enoki Recipe

Ingredients:
1 pack Enoki mushroom
1 egg
Salt, pepper, mushroom stock powder / flavor enhancers, to taste

Flour coating mix:
150 g all-purpose flour
150 g cornstarch
1 tbsp garlic powder

Topping:
5 clove garlic
10 pc bird's eye chili
1-2 stalk leeks
Powdered sugar
Chili powder
The remaining flour coating mix

Steps:
1. Remove the Enoki's roots. Rinse and squeeze the water out completely. Pat dry with a paper towel.
2. Prepare a bowl. Add the egg, mushroom stock powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Make the flour coating mix. Combine the flour and cornstarch (ratio 1:1). Add the garlic powder and mix well.
4. Add the Enoki to the egg and make sure they're coated evenly. Separate the stems so they don't lump together.
5. Add the Enoki to the flour coating mix bit by bit to prevent lumps.
6. Before frying, sift the excess flour from the Enoki.
7. Fry the Enoki at high heat until crispy. Don't forget to stir so they don't stick together.
8. Slice the garlic, bird's eye chili, and leeks. Add them into the flour coating mix. Sift the excess and dry until crispy.
9. Combine the fried Enoki, garlic, bird's eye chili, and leeks.
10. Season with salt, powdered sugar, mushroom stock powder, and chili powder.
11. Crispy Enoki Mushroom is ready to serve.

title: 2 Minutes Ready! Ovomaltine Chocolate Cake Recipe (Can Also Be Made As Cookies)
recipe_id:
Mug Cake tergolong sebagai kue yang sangat praktis. Cukup campurkan bahan ke dalam mug, diaduk, lalu masukkan ke dalam microwave. Hanya butuh waktu kurang dari 3 menit dan jadilah dessert simple dan enak. Namun, ada tips & tricksnya untuk membuat adonan ini menjadi lebih spesial!

Resep Roti Sobek Ovomaltine: https://youtu.be/lSpW8_n7HWM

Resep Es Pisang Ijo Karamel: https://youtu.be/OrHy0XWUWfk

Resep Ovomaltine Microwave Mug Cake

Bahan:
1 sdm tepung terigu protein sedang
4 sdm gula palem / gula pasir
1 butir telur
1 sdm cokelat bubuk
3 sdm minyak sayur
1 sdm Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream dan isian sesuai selera
Gula halus sesuai selera untuk garnish
Garam (opsional)

Langkah:
1. Siapkan mug / gelas anti panas, masukkan tepung terigu, gula, dan cokelat bubuk. Bila suka, boleh tambahkan sedikit garam. Aduk rata 
2. Masukkan telur dan minyak, aduk rata
3. Masukkan Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream, aduk rata
4. Tambahkan sedikit Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream di bagian tengah untuk isian
5. Masak di dalam microwave selama 1 - 1,5 menit
6. Setelah matang, taburi dengan gula halus di atasnya
7. Ovomaltine Microwave Mug Cake siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Only in 2 Minutes: Easy-yet-Intense Chocolate Ovomaltine Mug Cake Recipe!

Mug Cake is a very practical cake to make. All you need to do is to combine all the ingredients into a mug, stir, and put it in the microwave. You need less than 3 minutes, and you'll get a simple yet decadent dessert. However, there are some tips & tricks you need to follow to make this cake even more special!

Ovomaltine Sweet Roll Recipe: https://youtu.be/lSpW8_n7HWM

Caramel Pisang Ijo Recipe: https://youtu.be/OrHy0XWUWfk

Ovomaltine Microwave Mug Cake Recipe

Ingredients:
1 tbsp medium-protein flour
4 tbsp palm sugar / white sugar
1 egg
1 tbsp cocoa powder
3 tbsp cooking oil
1 tbsp Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream and other fillings, to taste
Powdered sugar for garnish
Salt (optional)

Steps:
1. Prepare a mug / heat proof glass. Add the flour, sugar, and cocoa powder. If you like, you can add a bit of salt. Mix well.
2. Add the egg and cooking oil. Mix well.
3. Add the Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream. Mix well.
4. Add a bit of Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream at the center for the filling.
5. Cook in the microwave for 1 - 1.5 minutes.
6. After it's cooked, sprinkle with powdered sugar on top.
7. Ovomaltine Microwave Mug Cake is ready to serve.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

title: Tips for Cutting Shrimp in Various Dishes [TIPS & TRICKS]
recipe_id:
Udang merupakan salah satu hidangan laut yang rasanya lezat dan digemari banyak orang. Tak hanya enak, udang juga mengandung banyak gizi. Namun, ada beberapa trik khusus dalam mempersiapkan udang untuk mendapatkan hasil dan tampilan yang maksimal.

Cara mengupas udang:
1. Cuci bersih udang
2. Lepaskan kepala udang
3. Buang kaki udang menggunakan gunting
4. Lepaskan kulit udang
5. Buang ekor udang 
6. Gunakan tusuk gigi untuk membersihkan kotoran yang ada di punggung udang
7. Udang siap digunakan

Cara membuat udang butterfly:
1. Cuci bersih udang, tiriskan
2. Buang kaki udang menggunakan gunting
3. Belah punggung udang hingga membentuk seperti kupu-kupu
4. Bilas lalu keringkan dengan tisu
5. Udang siap digunakan

Cara membuat udang untuk tempura:
1. Cuci bersih udang
2. Lepaskan kepala udang
3. Buang kaki udang menggunakan gunting
4. Lepaskan kulit udang
5. Kerat bagian perut udang
6. Pijat bagian punggung sambil ditekan dan diluruskan hingga berbunyi
7. Rapikan bagian butut udang
8. Udang siap digunakan

recipe_en:
How to Clean and Peel Shrimp [TIPS & TRICKS]

Shrimp is a part of the seafood family that is blessed with delicious flavor and loved by many. Not just tasty, shrimp also contains lots of nutrients. Perhaps it's not as easy as it looks, but there are several special tricks you must do to peel shrimp cleanly without affecting its appearance.

How to peel shrimp:
1. Rinse the shrimp.
2. Detach the head.
3. Remove the legs with scissors.
4. Remove the shell.
5. Remove the tail.
6. Use a toothpick to remove the sand vein on the shrimp's back.
7. The shrimp is ready to use.

How to butterfly shrimp:
1. Rinse the shrimp and drain the excess water.
2. Remove the legs with scissors.
3. Make a slit at the back until you get a butterfly shape.
4. Rinse and pat dry.
5. The shrimp is ready to use.

How to make Tempura-style shrimp:
1. Rinse the shrimp.
2. Detach the head.
3. Remove the legs with scissors.
4. Remove the shell.
5. Make several cuts at the bottom section.
6. Massage the shrimp. Push and straighten until you hear the sound.
7. Trim the tail.
8. The shrimp is ready to use.

title: Practical Rice Cooker Recipe! Chicken Kebuli Rice Recipe (Chicken Option)
recipe_id:
Nasi Kebuli merupakan menu khas Timur Tengah dengan ciri bumbu yang gurih karena dimasak menggunakan daging kambing, kaldu kambing, dan susu kambing. Kali ini aku akan share resep yang jauh lebih praktis namun tetap enak, menggunakan daging ayam dan dengan rice cooker. Aroma wangi rempah dan gurihnya nasi cocok disajikan untuk acara spesial keluarga.

Resep Nasi Kebuli Ayam Rice Cooker

Bahan:
600 gr beras long grain
50 ml susu Greenfields
450 ml air
2 sdm pasta tomat
1 sdm kaldu bubuk 
500 gr paha ayam fillet
5 buah cengkeh
12 buah kapulaga
1/2 buah pala
1 batang kayu manis
3 lembar bay leaf / daun salam
Kismis sesuai selera
Bawang goreng sesuai selera

Bumbu Kebuli:
100 ml susu Greenfields
2 sdm Ghee / minyak samin / margarin
2-3 sdt garam
1 sdm gula

Bahan bumbu halus: 
6 bawang putih
10 bawang merah
1 bawang bombai kecil
4 cm jahe
5 cabe keriting hijau
3 cabe keriting merah
1-2 sdt ketumbar
1-2 sdt jinten
1-2 sdt lada putih
1 batang serai
50 ml minyak goreng

Bahan Sambal Cuka:
6 buah cabe keriting merah
8-15 buah cabe rawit
2 siung bawang putih
1 sdm cuka
1 sdm gula
1/2 sdt garam
4 sdm air mineral

Pelengkap:
Timun
Emping

Langkah : 
1. Blender bumbu halus, lalu tumis hingga harum dan kering
2. Masukkan Ghee, aduk rata
3. Masukkan susu Greenfields, aduk rata
4. Bumbui dengan garam dan gula, aduk rata
5. Masukkan setengah bumbu ke ayam, aduk rata. Simpan sisanya setelah nasi matang
6. Masukkan beras, air, susu, cengkeh, kapulaga, pala, kayu manis, bay leaf / daun salam, ayam berbumbu, pasta tomat, kaldu bubuk ke dalam rice cooker. Ingat jangan diaduk. Masak hingga semuanya matang
7. Buat sambal cuka. Ulek cabai merah, cabai rawit, bawang putih, garam, dan gula. Setelah diulek tambahkan cuka dan air, aduk rata
8. Setelah nasi matang, pisahkan ayam, masukkan sisa bumbu ke dalam nasi
9. Tambahkan kismis dan bawang goreng, lalu aduk rata
10. Goreng ayam atau bisa juga langsung disajikan
11. Nasi Kebuli Ayam Rice Cooker siap disajikan dengan sambal cuka, emping, dan timun.
recipe_en:
Middle-Eastern Signature Dish: Rice Cooker Chicken Indonesian Pilaf Recipe

Nasi Kebuli (Indonesian Pilaf) is one of the signature dishes from Middle East. The characteristic of this dish is its strong spice flavor as it is cooked with lamb, lamb stock, and lamb milk. I'm sharing a recipe that is using chicken and rice cooker, yet still delicious. The spices' aroma and the savory rice is so perfect for your family.

Rice Cooker Chicken Nasi Kebuli (Indonesian Pilaf) Recipe

Ingredients:
600 g long-grain rice
50 ml Greenfields milk
450 ml water
2 tbsp tomato paste
1 tbsp stock powder
500 g chicken thigh fillet
5 cloves
12 cardamom
1/2 nutmeg
1 cinnamon
3 bay leaves
Raisins, to taste
Fried shallots, to taste

Kebuli Ingredients:
100 ml Greenfields milk
2 tbsp Ghee / margarine / butter
2-3 tsp salt
1 tbsp sugar

Spice Blend Ingredients:
6 clove garlic
10 shallots
1 small onion
1.5 inch ginger
5 pc curly green chili
3 pc curly red chili
1-2 tsp coriander
1-2 tsp cumin
1-2 tsp white pepper
1 lemongrass
50 ml cooking oil

Vinegar Sambal Ingredients:
6 pc red curly red chili
8-15 pc bird's eye chili
2 clove garlic
1 tbsp vinegar
1 tbsp sugar
1/2 tsp salt
4 tbsp water

Garnish:
Cucumber
Emping

Steps:
1. Blend the spices and sauté until fragrant and reduced.
2. Add the Ghee. Mix well.
3. Add the Greenfields milk. Mix well.
4. Season with salt and sugar. Mix well.
5. Add half the spice blend into the chicken and mix well. Keep the rest to mix with the cooked rice.
6. Add the rice, water, milk, clove, cardamom, nutmeg, cinnamon, bay leaves, seasoned chicken, tomato paste, and stock powder into the rice cooker. Remember, do not stir. Turn on the rice cooker and let them cook.
7. Make the Vinegar Sambal. Mash the red chili, bird's eye chili, garlic, salt, and sugar. After they are mashed, add vinegar and water. Mix well.
8. After the rice is cooked, set the chicken aside. Add the rest of the spice blend into the rice.
9. Add raisins and fried shallots. Mix well.
10. Fry the chicken or serve them as is.
11. Rice Cooker Chicken Nasi Kebuli is ready to serve with Vinegar Sambal, Emping, and cucumber.

title: 100% Sukses! Resep MARTABAK MANIS TEFLON Rumahan [Terang Bulan] V.1
recipe_id:
Bikin martabak manis (terang bulan)sering gagal atau tidak bersarang maksimal? Pernah bertanya kenapa kalau abang jualan martabak selalu berhasil? Tentu ada tips and tricksnya! Di video ini aku berbagi rahasia untuk membuat martabak manis dengan teflon rumahan, ikuti saja langkahnya dan dijamin 100% berhasil.

Resep Martabak Teflon

Bahan 1:
225 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
20 gr tepung maizena / tang mien / tapioka
30 gr gula pasir
250 ml air
1 butir telur
¾ sdt baking powder

Bahan 2: 
50 ml air
¾ sdt baking soda
2 sdt perisa pandan / vanila / sesuai selera
Gula pasir secukupnya

Topping (sesuai selera):
Mentega / margarin
Susu kental manis
Keju
Wijen sangrai

Langkah:
1. Buat adonan martabak. Campurkan tepung terigu, tepung maizena, gula, dan air. Aduk menggunakan mixer hingga semua bahan menyatu.
2. Masukkan telur dan baking powder, lalu aduk rata
3. Diamkan adonan minimal 1 jam
4. Bagi adonan menjadi dua, untuk yang vanila dan pandan
5. Panaskan teflon di api sedang
6. Untuk adonan vanila, campurkan baking soda dengan air, aduk rata. Untuk adonan pandan, campurkan baking soda, air, dan perisa pandan, aduk rata
7. Masukkan campuran baking soda dan perisa vanila ke adonan pertama, aduk rata. Masukkan campuran baking soda dan perisa pandan ke adonan kedua, aduk rata
8. Tuang adonan vanila ke teflon, ratakan adonan agar menempel di pinggiran teflon
9. Tunggu hingga gelembung-gelembung naik, kecilkan api sedikit
10. Taburkan gula pasir di atasnya untuk membantu gelembung-gelembung pecah
11. Setelah bersarang, tutup adonan masak hingga matang dan bagian atasnya tidak lengket
12. Tuang adonan pandan ke teflon. Masak seperti adonan yang pertama
13. Setelah martabak matang, segera olesi dengan mentega di seluruh permukaannya
14. Belah martabak menjadi dua
15. Taburkan dengan keju parut, wijen, dan susu kental manis
16. Tumpuk martabak menjadi satu, lalu potong menjadi beberapa bagian
17. Martabak Manis siap disajikan

recipe_en:
The Secret to 100% Success! Home Cook’s Teflon Sweet Martabak (Indonesian Pancake) Recipe

Do you often fail or end up making dense Sweet Martabak (Indonesian Pancake)? There are some tips and tricks behind it! In this video, I’m sharing the secret of making sweet martabak with the Teflon you have at home. Follow the steps and you’re guaranteed 100% success.

Sweet Teflon Martabak Recipe

Ingredients 1:
225 g medium-protein flour
20 g cornstarch / Tang Mien flour / tapioca flour
30 g sugar
250 ml water
1 egg
3/4 tsp baking powder

Ingredients 2:
50 ml water
3/4 tsp baking soda
2 tsp Pandan / Vanilla essence, to taste
Sugar as needed

Toppings (to your preference):
Butter / margarine
Condensed milk
Cheese
Toasted sesame seeds

Steps:
1. Make the Martabak batter. Combine flour, cornstarch, sugar, and water. Mix with mixer until all ingredients are well-incorporated.
2. Add the egg and baking powder. Mix well.
3. Let the batter rest for at least 1 hour.
4. Divide the batter into two, for Vanilla and Pandan flavors.
5. Place the Teflon on medium heat.
6. For the Vanilla-flavored batter, combine the baking soda with water and mix well. For the Pandan-flavored batter, combine the baking soda, water, and Pandan essence and mix well.
7. Add the baking soda mix and Vanilla essence to the first batter and mix well. Add the baking soda mix and Pandan essence to the second batter and mix well.
8. Pour the Vanilla-flavored batter to the Teflon. Swivel the pan so the batter sticks to the edges of the Teflon.
9. Wait until the bubbles rise. Then, lower the heat.
10. Sprinkle some sugar on top to help the bubbles burst.
11. After the surface is covered with holes, cover the pan and let it cook until the surface is not sticky anymore.
12. Pour the Pandan-flavored batter to the Teflon. Cook just like the first batter.
13. After the Martabak is cooked, spread some butter on the entire surface right away.
14. Cut the Martabak into two.
15. Top with grated cheese, sesame seeds, and condensed milk.
16. Stack the Martabak on top of one another and cut into several pieces.
17. Sweet Martabak is ready to serve.

title: Empuk, Anti-Kempes. Resep Roti Sobek TANPA Oven (Isi Ovomaltine).
recipe_id:
Roti bisa jadi camilan lezat untuk menemani waktu bersantai. Kali ini aku mau berbagi resep roti manis menggunakan teflon. Walaupun tidak dipanggang dengan oven, tekstur roti tetap lembut dan empuk. Ditambah isiannya yang lumer menggunakan Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream. Cocok untuk dinikmati mulai dari anak-anak hingga orang tua.

Resep Roti Sobek Ovomaltine

Bahan untuk 1 resep:
220 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
30 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
50 gr gula
4 gr ragi
70 ml susu
30 ml air
2 butir kuning telur
50 gr butter
3 gr garam

Bahan untuk 1 ½ resep:
320 gr tepung terigu protein tinggi
50 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
60 gr gula
6 gr ragi
110 ml susu
50 ml air
3 butir kuning telur
70 gr butter
4 gr garam

Bahan isian:
Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Langkah:
1. Siapkan bahan kering, campur tepung terigu, gula, dan ragi. Aduk rata
2. Siapkan bahan basah, campur kuning telur, air, dan susu. Aduk rata
3. Masukkan bahan kering ke mesin roti / mixer lubangi tengahnya lalu tuang bahan basah. Nyalakan mesin tunggu adonan diproses
4. Jika adonan sudah menyatu, masukkan mentega dan garam lalu uleni kembali dengan mesin hingga tahap window pane
5. Diamkan adonan 30-60 menit agar mengembang
6. Bagi adonan menjadi 15 pcs menggunakan timbangan agar terbagi rata
7. Bentuk adonan menjadi bulat
8. Tutup adonan dengan plastic wrap agar tidak kering
9. Pipihkan adonan lalu isi dengan Ovomaltine, bentuk bulat kembali
10. Siapkan teflon, alasi dengan baking paper
11. Masukkan adonan ke teflon, lalu tutup. Panggang di api sedang hingga roti mengembang dan matang kedua sisinya
12. Roti Sobek Ovomaltine siap disajikan

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream tersedia di Ranch Market, Farmers Market, Food Hall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chicks, Grand Lucky, Indomaret, Supermarket dan Toko-toko lainnya.

recipe_en:
Soft and Pillowy. NO OVEN Ovomaltine Sweet Rolls Teflon Recipe

Bread can be a great snack for a relaxing time together. This time, I'm sharing a sweet roll recipe using Teflon. Even though it's not baked in the oven, the bread's texture is still soft and pillowy. Add to that, I'm using a melted filling of Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream. It's great for both kids and adults.

Ovomaltine Sweet Roll Recipe

Ingredients for 1 recipe:
220 g high-protein flour
30 g medium-protein flour
50 g sugar
4 g yeast
70 ml milk
30 ml water
2 egg yolks
50 g butter
3 g salt
Water

Ingredients for 1.5 times recipe:
320 g high-protein flour
50 g medium-protein flour
60 g sugar
6 g yeast
110 ml milk
50 ml water
3 egg yolks
70 g butter
4 g salt
Water

Filling:
Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream

Steps:
1. Prepare the dry ingredients. Combine the flour, sugar, and yeast. Mix well.
2. Prepare the wet ingredients. Combine the yolks, water, and milk. Mix well.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the bread machine / mixer. Make a hole at the center and pour in the wet ingredients. Turn on the machine and wait for the dough to be processed.
4. If the dough has been incorporated well, add the butter and salt. Knead once more with the machine until it reaches the windowpane stage.
5. Proof the dough for 30-60 minutes to rise.
6. Divide the dough into 15 pieces by using a scale to divide them evenly.
7. Shape the dough into balls.
8. Cover the dough with a plastic wrap so they don't dry out.
9. Roll the dough and fill with Ovomaltine. Re-shape them into a ball.
10. Prepare the Teflon and line with baking paper.
11. Place the dough in the pan and cover. Bake on medium heat until the bread has risen and cooked on both sides.
12. Ovomaltine Sweet Rolls are ready to serve.

Ovomaltine Crunchy Cream is available at Ranch market, Farmers market, Foodhall, Lion Superindo, Giant, Kem Chick, Grand lucky, Indomaret, many leading supermarkets, and grocery shops.

title: Anak Juga Suka! Resep Pasta Tuna Ala Resto, Cukup Dengan Rice Cooker.
recipe_id:
Ada berbagai jenis pasta antara lain spaghetti, farfalle, penne, fusilli, dan linguine. Beda jenis pasta, beda pula cara mengolahnya. Kali ini aku akan membagikan resep memasak spaghetti yang dipadukan dengan rempah-rempah cita rasa Indonesia, hanya dengan rice cooker! Cocok untuk sahur maupun buka puasa. 

Resep Garlic Oil: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4 

Resep Pasta Rice Cooker

Bahan:
225 gr spaghetti atau jenis pasta lain
700 ml air
1 kaleng tuna
1 bawang bombai besar / 2 bawang bombai kecil
1 batang serai
10 lembar daun jeruk purut
1 ½ bonggol bawang putih
2 buah tomat
Cabai rawit sesuai selera
70 ml minyak zaitun / minyak sayur
1 butir kuning telur
Garam, merica, gula, penyedap sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Iris tipis bawang bombai
2. Iris tomat sesuai selera
3. Potong serai menjadi tiga bagian, lalu geprek
4. Patahkan spaghetti menjadi dua, lalu masukkan ke dalam rice cooker
5. Masukkan bawang bombai, tomat, tuna, serai, dan daun jeruk ke dalam rice cooker
6. Masukkan air, lalu masak hingga pasta matang
7. Cincang bawang putih, lalu goreng
8. Setelah bawang putih kekuningan, masukkan irisan cabai rawit lalu goreng sebentar, sisihkan
9. Masukkan minyak bawang putih dan cabai rawit ke dalam pasta yang sudah matang
10. Bumbui dengan garam, merica, gula, dan penyedap
11. Masukkan kuning telur, lalu aduk hingga semua tercampur rata
12. Pasta Rice Cooker siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Now Everyone Can Cook. Rice Cooker Pasta ala Restaurant Recipe

Pasta is a pretty popular Italian dish in the world. There are many different kinds of pasta, such as spaghetti, farfalle, penne, fusilli, dan linguine. Different types of pasta require different processing methods. This time, I'm sharing a quick, practical, and delicious pasta recipe. Bouncy spaghetti meets Indonesian spices, it's perfect for both Iftar and Suhoor.

Garlic Oil Recipe: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4 

Rice Cooker Pasta Recipe

Ingredients:
225 g spaghetti or other types of pasta
700 ml water
1 can of tuna
1 large onion / 2 small onions
1 stalk lemongrass
10 Kaffir lime leaves
1.5 whole garlic
2 tomatoes
Bird's eye chili to taste
70 ml olive oil / vegetable oil
1 egg yolk
Salt, pepper, sugar, flavor enhancers to taste

Steps:
1. Slice the onions thinly.
2. Slice the tomatoes to your preference.
3. Cut the lemongrass into two parts and pound.
4. Break the spaghetti into two and add into the rice cooker.
5. Add the onions, tomatoes, tuna, lemongrass, and Kaffir lime leaves into the rice cooker.
6. Add the water and cook until the pasta is done.
7. Mince the garlic and sauté.
8. After the garlic browns, add the bird's eye chili slices and sauté for a bit. Set aside.
9. Add the Garlic Oil and bird's eye chili into the cooked pasta.
10. Season with salt, garlic, sugar, and flavor enhancers.
11. Add the yolk and mix well.
12. Rice Cooker Pasta is ready to serve.

title: 10 Minutes Ready! Tempeh Katsu Recipe: A Cheaper Alternative to Chicken Katsu.
recipe_id:
Chicken Katsu merupakan menu populer bukan hanya di Jepang, tapi di seluruh dunia. Kali ini aku mengganti bahan utamanya yang dari ayam, menjadi tempe. Jauh lebih ekonomis dan tetap cocok untuk lidah orang Indonesia. Lapisan luarnya yang renyah dan gurih dipadukan dengan saus asam pedas yang lezat (boleh juga pakai saus Tonkatsu). 

Resep Salmon Teriyaki: nhttps://youtu.be/lvjOzmhr7Zw

Resep Tempe Katsu Saus Asam Pedas

Bahan tepung basah:
1 butir telur
2 siung bawang putih
3 sdm santan
4-5 sdm tepung terigu
Merica, garam, gula, kaldu / penyedap sesuai selera

Bahan saus asam pedas:
2 sdm margarin / olive oil
2 sdm saus barbeque / tomat
1 sdm minyak wijen
2 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm kecap inggris
1 sdm saus sambal
½ bawang bombai
2 siung bawang putih
Cabai rawit sesuai selera
Gula, garam, cuka sesuai selera
Air secukupnya
Tepung maizena (opsional)

Bahan lainnya:
1 papan tempe
150 gr tepung roti
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Potong tempe ukuran sekitar 2 x 2 x 3 cm lalu pipihkan
2. Buat adonan basah, haluskan bawang putih, bumbui dengan sedikit garam. Masukkan dalam wadah
3. Masukkan telur, santan, tepung terigu, merica, garam, kaldu / penyedap, dan gula. Aduk rata
4. Celupkan tempe ke adonan basah lalu gulingkan ke tepung roti. Pastikan permukaan tempe terlapisi sempurna
5. Goreng tempe hingga warnanya cokelat keemasan
6. Buat saus asam pedas. Iris bawang bombai, cabai rawit, dan geprek bawang putih. Masukkan dalam wadah
7. Masukkan saus barbeque, saus tiram, kecap inggris, saus sambal, dan minyak wijen. Aduk rata. Tambahkan tepung maizena jika perlu
8. Masukkan olive oil / margarin ke pan. Tumis bawang bombai dan bawang putih hingga kecokelatan
9. Masukkan cabai rawit dan campuran saus tadi
10. Tambahkan air, lalu cicipi
11. Tambahkan sedikit cuka, masak hingga saus mengental
12. Tempe Katsu Saus Asam Pedas siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Have Tempeh at Home? Just Make Tempeh Katsu!

Chicken Katsu is popular not only in Japan but throughout the world. This time, I'm substituting the hero ingredient from chicken to Tempeh. It's definitely more budget-friendly. The crispy outer layer is perfected by the mouthwatering Spicy and Sour sauce (you may also use Tonkatsu Sauce).

Tempeh Katsu with Spicy and Sour Sauce Recipe

Wet batter ingredients:
1 egg
2 clove garlic
3 tbsp coconut milk
4-5 tbsp flour
Salt, sugar, stock powder to taste

Spicy and Sour sauce ingredients:
2 tbsp margarine / olive oil
2 tbsp barbecue / tomato sauce
1 tbsp sesame oil
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp chili sauce
1/2 onion
2 clove garlic
Bird's eye chili to taste
Sugar, salt, vinegar to taste
Water as needed
Cornstarch (optional)

Other ingredients:
1 tempeh
150 g bread crumbs
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Slice the Tempeh to 2 x 2 x 3 cm size and flatten.
2. Make the wet batter. Mash the garlic into a paste and season with a bit of salt. Add to a bowl.
3. Add the egg, flour, pepper, and salt. Mix well.
4. Coat the Tempeh with the wet batter and roll it into the bread crumbs. Make sure the Tempeh is well-coated.
5. Fry the Tempeh until golden brown.
6. Make the Spicy and Sour sauce. Slice the onion, bird's eye chili, and pound the garlic. Add them into a bowl.
7. Add the barbecue sauce, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, chili sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well. Add some cornstarch if needed.
8. Sauté the onion and garlic until they brown.
9. Add the bird's eye chili and the sauce mix made earlier.
10. Add some water and sugar to taste.
11. Add a bit of vinegar. Cook until the sauce thickens.
12. Tempeh Katsu with Spicy and Sour Sauce is ready to serve.

title: 5 Menit Jadi! Resep Roti Telur Lipat Korea [Pakai Cabe Makin Maknyus]
recipe_id:
Resep Sandwich Telur yang aku buat ini praktis dan dipadukan dengan sayur, sosis, daging asap, telur, keju, dan lain-lain. Selain bernutrisi dan mengenyangkan untuk menu sahur, menu ini dapat dimakan bersama keluarga. 

Resep Sandwich Telur Lipat

Bahan:
1 lembar roti tawar
1 butir telur
1 sdm air

Bahan untuk isian (sesuai selera):
Sosis
Bawang merah
Cabai rawit
Sambal bangkok
Keju mozzarella
Garam, merica, gula
Minyak goreng

Langkah:
1. Potong-potong sosis, bawang merah, dan cabai rawit. Lalu tumis hingga harum, bumbui dengan garam, merica, dan gula
2. Kocok telur yang diberi sedikit air, lalu tuang ke teflon secara merata
3. Belah roti tawar menjadi dua, letakkan di atas telur (beri jarak antar roti tawar)
4. Panggang di api sedang, setelah telur matang lalu balik
5. Masukkan tumisan sosis, keju mozzarella, dan sambal bangkok di atas telur
6. Lipat telur ke dalam sesuaikan dengan lebar roti. Lalu lipat roti agar membentuk sandwich
7. Panggang kedua sisi roti hingga kering dan sedikit kecoklatan
8. Sandwich Telur Lipat siap disajikan
recipe_en:
5 Minutes Ready: Folded Egg Sandwich Recipe Korean Style, Suitable for Family Breakfast. 

This Egg Sandwich recipe is very practical with a variety of toppings such as vegetables, sausage, smoked beef, eggs, cheese and chili (optional). Of course, this dish is nutritious and filling for Suhoor, suitable for the whole family. 

Folded Egg Sandwich Recipe

Ingredients:
1 slice bread
1 egg
1 tbsp water

Topping ingredients (custom):
Sausage
Shallots
Bird's eye chili
Sambal Bangkok
Mozzarella cheese
Salt, pepper, sugar
Cooking oil

Steps:
1. Slice the sausage, shallots, and bird's eye chili. Sauté until fragrant and season with salt, pepper, and sugar.
2. Whisk the egg after adding some water in. Pour into the Teflon evenly.
3. Slice the bread into halves and place on top of the egg. Put some space between the bread.
4. Cook at medium heat. After the egg is cooked, flip it over.
5. Add the sautéd toppings, mozzarella cheese, and Sambal Bangkok on top of the egg.
6. Fold the edges in according to the bread's width. Fold the bread to create a sandwich.
7. Cook both sides of the bread until they're dry and browned.
8. Folded Egg Sandwich is ready to serve.

title: Tanpa Dikukus! Resep Es Pisang Ijo Karamel Anti Gagal.
recipe_id:
Salah satu takjil praktis khas Indonesia adalah Es Pisang Ijo. Agak sedikit modern, resep es pisang ijo kali ini aku padukan dengan saus karamel yang kental dan manis. Perpaduan rasa manis, gurih, dan segar dari pisang, bubur sumsum dan saus karamel cocok dijadikan menu berbuka puasa bersama keluarga di rumah.

Resep Es Pisang Ijo Karamel

Bahan kulit pisang ijo:
125 gr tepung terigu protein sedang
25 gr tepung kanji / tepung maizena
1 butir telur
200 ml susu
50 ml jus pandan / air
Pandan ekstrak sesuai selera
½ sdt garam

Bahan bubur sumsum:
40 gr tepung beras
10 gr tepung beras ketan / 10 gr tepung kanji
250 ml susu
250 ml santan
3-5 lembar daun pandan
Garam secukupnya

Bahan saus karamel:
100 gr gula semut
50 gr gula pasir
50 gr mentega
1 sdm tepung maizena
250 ml susu

Bahan lain:
Pisang raja / pisang nangka / pisang manis lainnya, rebus
Es serut
Daun pandan untuk garnish

Langkah : 
1. Buat kulit pisang ijo. Campurkan tepung terigu, tepung kanji, telur, susu, jus pandan, pandan ekstra dan garam. Aduk rata hingga tidak ada yang menggumpal
2. Panaskan pan lalu celupkan ke adonan, biarkan hingga matang (jangan sampai kering), lalu angkat
3. Isi dengan pisang rebus lalu gulung
4. Buat bubur sumsum. Campurkan tepung beras, tepung beras ketan, susu, santan, garam, dan daun pandan. Masak di api sedang sambil diaduk hingga mengental dan matang
5. Buat saus karamel. Campurkan gula semut, gula pasir, mentega, tepung maizena, dan susu. Aduk rata, masak di api sedang hingga mengental
6. Potong-potong pisang ijo
7. Siapkan wadah, susun bubur sumsum di paling bawah lalu es serut, pisang ijo, dan siram dengan saus karamel. Garnish dengan daun pandan
8. Es Pisang Ijo Karamel siap disajikan

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @GREENFIELDS.ID
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/greenfields.id
Facebook Page: https://www.facebook.com/GreenfieldsID/
recipe_en:
Don’t Steam, Use Pan Instead. Caramel Green Banana Crepe Recipe.

One of Indonesia's signature Takjil is Es Pisang Ijo (Green Banana Crepe). This recipe is a bit different because I'm pairing Es Pisang Ijo with the sweet and decadent caramel sauce. It's sweet, savory, and fresh thanks to the marriage of banana, Bubur Sumsum (Sweet Coconut Rice Pudding), and caramel sauce.

Caramel Pisang Ijo Recipe

Pisang Ijo Skin ingredients:
125 g medium-protein flour
25 g tapioca flour / cornstarch
1 egg
200 ml milk
50 ml pandan juice / water
Pandan extract to taste
1/2 tsp salt

Bubur Sumsum ingredients:
40 g rice flour
10 g glutinous rice flour / 10 g tapioca flour
250 ml milk
250 ml coconut milk
3-5 pandan leaves
Salt to taste

Caramel sauce:
100 g palm sugar
50 g sugar
50 g butter
1 tbsp cornstarch
250 ml milk

Other ingredients:
Pisang raja / pisang nangka / other sweet banana variety, boiled
Shaved ice
Pandan leaf for garnish

Steps:
1. Make the Pisang Ijo skin. Combine flour, tapioca flour, egg, milk, pandan juice, pandan extract, and salt. Mix well until no lumps can be found.
2. Heat the pan and dip into the batter. Cook (don't let it dry out) and set aside.
3. Fill with banana and roll.
4. Make the Bubur Sumsum. Combine the rice flour, glutinous rice flour, milk, coconut milk, salt, and pandan leaves. Cook at medium heat while stirring until it thickens and cooks.
5. Make the caramel sauce. Combine palm sugar, sugar, butter, cornstarch, and milk. Mix well and cook at medium heat until it thickens.
6. Slice the Pisang Ijo.
7. Prepare the plate. Arrange the Bubur Sumsum at the bottom, followed by shaved ice, Pisang Ijo, and pour the caramel sauce on top. Garnish with the pandan leaf.
8. Es Pisang Ijo is ready to serve.

title: 3 Eggs, 5 Minutes. Fluffy European Omelette Soufflé Recipe.
recipe_id:
Telur merupakan menu sarapan favorit hampir di seluruh dunia. Salah satu menu telur yang populer adalah omelet. Kali ini aku berbagi resep “Fluffy Omelette / Omelette Soufflé.” Modalnya cuma 3 telur! (Kejunya opsional ya). 

Resep Fluffy Omelette

Bahan:
3 butir telur
Gula, garam, merica sesuai selera
Keju mozarella sesuai selera
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Pisahkan kuning dan putih telur di wadah yang berbeda
2. Beri sedikit gula di putih telur lalu kocok hingga mengembang, namun tidak terlalu kaku. Dapat menggunakan mixer atau whisk. 
3. Kocok kuning telur secara merata
4. Campurkan sedikit demi sedikit putih telur yang sudah dikocok ke dalam kuning telur. Aduk perlahan
5. Panaskan pan, gunakan api kecil / sedang lalu beri sedikit minyak
6. Goreng telur lalu tutup. Masak hingga bagian bawah sudah mulai kecokelatan
7. Taburkan garam, merica, dan keju mozarella
8. Masak sebentar lalu lipat omelet
9. Fluffy Omelette siap disajikan
recipe_en:
3 Eggs, Ready in 5 Minutes. European Fluffy Omelette Recipe.

Eggs are a favorite breakfast menu almost anywhere in the world. One of the most popular egg dishes is Omelette. This time, I’m sharing a “Fluffy Omelette / Soufflé Omelette” recipe. You just need 3 eggs! (The cheese is optional, ok?)

Fluffy Omelette Recipe

Ingredients:
3 eggs
Salt, sugar, pepper to taste
Mozzarella cheese to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Separate the yolks and egg whites into two different containers.
2. Add a bit of sugar to the egg whites and whip until fluffy, but not too stiff. You can use a hand mixer or a whisk.
3. Whisk the egg yolks evenly.
4. Add the egg whites into the yolks bit by bit. Fold in gently.
5. Heat the pan. Use low / medium heat, and add some oil.
6. Fry the eggs and cover the pan. Cook until the bottom side browns.
7. Season with salt, pepper. Add the mozzarella cheese.
8. Cook for a bit and fold the omelette.
9. Fluffy Omelette is ready to serve.

title: Mie Nyemek BonCabe: A Practical Sahur Recipe for Spicy Food Lovers. Malaysia, Please Try It.
recipe_id:
Mie jawa (mie nyemek), dikenal juga dengan sebutan mee jawa di Malaysia, adalah mie yang ditumis dan diberi sedikit kuah sehingga rasanya masih pekat. Berbeda dengan mie kuah. Kali ini aku menggunakan mie instan BonCabe yang dikreasikan menjadi Mie Nyemek. Persiapannya sangat praktis namun rasanya tidak kalah dengan di warung-warung bakmi jawa. 

Resep Mie Nyemek BonCabe

Bahan bumbu halus:
3 siung bawang putih
5 siung bawang merah
2 butir kemiri

Bahan lainnya:
2 bungkus Mi BonCabe
2 butir telur
1 batang daun bawang
1 batang seledri
2 lembar kol
½ tomat ukuran besar
Garam, merica sesuai selera
Saus sambal sesuai selera
Air secukupnya
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bawang putih, bawang merah dan kemiri
2. Potong kol, tomat, daun bawang dan seledri
3. Tumis bumbu halus hingga kering lalu sisihkan
4. Di pan yang sama beri sedikit minyak, masukkan telur
5. Masukkan tomat, masak hingga setengah matang
6. Tambahkan air
7. Masukkan Mi BonCabe, masak sesuai selera
8. Masukkan kol, daun bawang, seledri, bumbu Mi Bon Cabe, dan bumbu halus yang sudah ditumis
9. Tambahkan saus sambal
10. Bumbui dengan garam dan gula, aduk rata
11. Sajikan di piring lalu taburi dengan serbuk BonCabe dan bawang goreng
recipe_en:
Instant Noodle Mee Jawa: Simple Spicy Spicy Food Lover's Suhoor Recipe. Malaysia Sila Cuba.

Javanese Noodle (Mie Nyemek), a.k.a Mee Jawa in Malaysia, is a stir-fry noodle with a bit of soup with concentrated flavor, different to a noodle soup. This time, I'm using Bon Cabe instant noodles to make Mie Nyemek. The prep is simple, but the flavor is just as good as those in Javanese noodle shops.

Instant Noodle Mee Jawa Recipe

Spice paste ingredients:
3 cloves garlic
5 shallots
2 candlenuts

Other ingredients:
2 packs BonCabe Noodles
2 eggs
1 stalk leeks
1 stalk celery
2 sheets cabbage
1/2 large tomato
Salt, pepper to taste
Chili sauce to taste
Water as needed
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic, shallots, and candlenuts into a paste.
2. Chop the cabbage, tomatoes, leeks, and celery.
3. Sauté the spice paste until fragrant and set aside.
4. In the same pan, add some oil and add in the eggs.
5. Add in the tomatoes and sauté until half-cooked.
6. Add some water.
7. Add in the BonCabe Noodle. Cook to your preference.
8. Add in the cabbage, leeks, celery, BonCabe Noodle seasoning, and the sautéed spice paste.
9. Add some chili sauce.
10. Season with salt and sugar. Mix well.
11. Plate and sprinkle with BonCabe topping and fried shallots.

title: Mantap! Resep Kangkung Dua Rasa: KRISPI & Garlic Ala Resto Chinese.
recipe_id:
Kailan 2 Rasa merupakan menu yang populer di restoran Chinese. Terdiri dari 2 proses berbeda yaitu ditumis dan digoreng, kali ini aku menggantikan kailan dengan kangkung. Tekstur kangkung yang sudah "crunchy" dipadukan bumbu saus tiram dan digoreng krispi dengan bumbu gurih pedas, dijamin menambah selera makan. Anakpun juga suka terutama di bagian "crunchy"nya.

Resep Kangkung 2 Rasa

Bahan:
300 gr / 2 ikat kangkung
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Bumbu Kangkung Krispi:
6 siung bawang putih, cincang
8 siung bawang merah, cincang
3 cabai merah keriting, iris
Cabai rawit sesuai selera, iris
1 batang daun bawang, iris
Gula, garam, lada, penyedap / kaldu sesuai selera

Bumbu Kangkung Saus Tiram:
4 siung bawang putih, cincang
1 sdm saus tiram
100 ml air
1 sdm tepung maizena
1 ½ sdt gula
½ sdt penyedap / kaldu
¼ sdt lada putih

Langkah:
1. Cuci bersih kangkung lalu keringkan hingga tidak ada air
2. Pisahkan antara daun dan batang kangkung
3. Rebus sebentar batang kangkung beri sedikit gula dan garam. Angkat lalu bilas dengan air dingin
4. Tumis bawang putih hingga kering dan warnanya kuning keemasan, angkat sisihkan 
5. Buat bumbu saus tiram, panaskan pan, masukkan air dan saus tiram
6. Bumbui dengan gula, lada, dan penyedap
7. Masukkan bawang putih yang sudah ditumis sebelumnya
8.Tambahkan tepung maizena, aduk hingga kental. Sisihkan
9. Iris memanjang bagian daun kangkung. Goreng hingga kering dan krispi, angkat lalu tiriskan
10. Buat bumbu kangkung krispi. Tumis bawang merah, daun bawang, cabai keriting dan cabai rawit hingga harum
11. Bumbui dengan gula, garam, lada, dan penyedap
12. Masukkan bawang putih yang sudah ditumis, aduk lalu sisihkan
13. Masukkan daun kangkung yang sudah digoreng krispi, aduk
14. Masukkan batang kangkung yang sudah direbus ke bumbu saus tiram lalu aduk
15. Kangkung 2 Rasa siap disajikan

Resep Mocca Gula Aren Pudding

Bahan:
1 pcs Vita Pudding Cokelat
1-2 sdm sirup gula aren
3-4 sdm espresso / biang kopi
3-4 sdm evaporated milk / santan
Susu sesuai selera
Es batu sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Siapkan gelas, masukkan Vita Pudding Cokelat
2. Masukkan sirup gula aren
3. Masukkan espresso
4. Masukkan evaporated milk
5. Masukkan susu lalu aduk
6. Tambahkan es batu
7. Mocca Gula Aren Pudding siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Water Spinach Two Ways ala Chinese Restaurant

Water Spinach Two Ways Recipe

Ingredients:
300 g / 2 bundles water spinach
Cooking oil as needed

Crispy Water Spinach spices:
6 cloves garlic, minced
8 shallots, minced
3 curly red chili, sliced
Bird's eye chili to taste, sliced
1 stalk leeks, sliced
Salt, sugar, pepper, flavor enhancers / stock powder to taste

Oyster Sauce Water Spinach spices:
4 cloves garlic, minced
1 tbsp oyster sauce
100 ml water
1 tbsp cornstarch
1.5 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp flavor enhancers / stock powder
1/4 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Wash the water spinach thoroughly and dry completely.
2. Separate the leaves and stems.
3. Boil the stems for a bit with sugar and salt. Drain and rinse with cold water.
4. Sauté garlic until fragrant and golden. Set aside.
5. To make the oyster sauce mix, heat up a pan and add water and oyster sauce.
6. Season with sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancers.
7. Add in the sautéed garlic.
8. Add cornstarch and stir until thickens. Set aside.
9. Slice the stems lengthwise. Fry until they're crispy. Drain and set aside.
10. To make the crispy version's sauce, sauté shallots, leeks, curly red chili, and bird's eye chili until fragrant.
11. Season with sugar, salt, pepper, and flavor enhancers.
12. Add in the sautéed garlic. Stir and set aside.
13. Add in the crispy leaves and stir.
14. Add in the boiled stems into the oyster sauce mix and stir.
15. Water Spinach Two Ways is ready to serve.

title: Tips Kupas Bawang TUJUH KALI Lebih Cepat! [TIPS&TRICKS]
recipe_id:
Hampir semua jenis masakan Indonesia menggunakan bawang merah, akan tetapi mengolah bawang merah terkadang menyulitkan. Kali ini aku mau berbagi TIPS&TRICKS cara mengupas bawang merah 7x lebih cepat dan mudah.

Cara Kesatu:
1. Cuci bersih bawang merah, tiriskan
2. Rendam di air panas selama 3-5 menit
3. Bilas dengan air biasa agar bawang tidak termasak
4. Potong kedua ujung bawang bagian pucuk dan akarnya, gunakan pisau yang tajam
5. Kupas kulit bawang merah perlahan
6. Bawang merah siap digunakan

Cara Kedua:
1. Cuci bersih bawang merah, tiriskan
2. Potong kedua ujung bawang bagian pucuk dan akarnya, gunakan pisau yang tajam
3. Belah bawang merah menjadi 2 bagian
4. Kupas kulit bawang merah perlahan
5. Bawang merah siap digunakan
recipe_en:
How to Flash-Peeling Shallots Seven Times FASTER [Tips & Tricks]

Almost all Asian, especially Indonesian, dishes use shallots as an ingredient. However, preparing shallots can be troublesome. This time, I'm sharing the tips on peeling shallots SEVEN TIMES faster and much easier.

Method 1:
1. Rinse the shallots until clean and set aside.
2. Soak in hot water for 3-5 minutes.
3. Rinse with cool water so the shallots won't cook.
4. Cut both ends of the shallots (the top and the base) with a sharp knife.
5. Peel the skin slowly.
6. The shallots are ready to use.

Method 2:
1. Rinse the shallots until clean and set aside.
2. Cut both ends of the shallots (the top and the base) with a sharp knife.
3. Halve the shallots.
4. Peel the skin slowly.
5. The shallots are ready to use.

title: Spanish Omelette Recipe: 100% Local Ingredients.
recipe_id:
Spanish Omelette atau Spanish Tortilla merupakan olahan telur khas Spanyol. Biasanya dinikmati sebagai tapas (makanan selingan) atau disantap sebagai menu sarapan. Bahan utamanya adalah telur, kentang, dan bawang bombai. Bisa juga divariasikan dengan bahan lain seperti paprika, sosis, daging, jamur, ataupun keju parut.

Resep Telur Dadar Spanyol

Bahan:
4 butir telur
2 bawang bombai ukuran sedang
2 kentang ukuran sedang
Garam, merica sesuai selera
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Iris bawang bombai besar-besar
2. Iris kentang lebih tipis dibanding bawang bombai
3. Goreng bawang bombai hingga layu dan harum
4. Masukkan kentang, goreng hingga kecokelatan
5. Angkat lalu tiriskan dalam wadah, diamkan hingga dingin
6. Masukkan telur, kocok hingga semua tercampur rata
7. Bumbui dengan garam dan merica lalu diamkan sekitar 10 menit
8. Siapkan pan, beri sedikit minyak. Goreng telur hingga matang dan warnanya kuning keemasan
9. Telur Dadar Spanyol siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Spanish Omelette Recipe: 100% Your Local Ingredients.

Spanish Omelette or Spanish Tortilla is an egg dish from Spain. It's usually enjoyed as tapas (snack food) or as a breakfast menu. The main ingredients are eggs, potatoes, and onions. You can also add paprika, sausage, meat, mushroom, or grated cheese. It's super filling and nutritious, too!

Spanish Omelette Recipe

Ingredients:
4 eggs
2 onions, medium size
2 potatoes, medium size
Salt and pepper, to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Cut the onions into large slices.
2. Slice the potatoes more thinly than the onions.
3. Fry the onions until soft and fragrant.
4. Add in the potatoes, fry until browned.
5. Drain in a bowl and let cool.
6. Add in the eggs. Mix well.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Let it rest for 10 minutes.
8. Prepare a pan with a bit of oil. Fry the eggs until cooked and golden brown.
9. Spanish Omelette is ready to serve.

title: Rebus Telur Cara Jepang! Resep Ramen Egg Pelengkap Mie.
recipe_id:
Ramen Egg atau Ajitsuke Tamago 味付け卵 merupakan telur yang direbus bersama air rendaman dalam temperatur sedang, sehingga membuat putih telur matang dengan tekstur padat namun kuning telurnya ¾ matang dengan tekstur sangat lembut. Komponen KUNCI adalah kecap asin, mirin, dan gula. Rasa bumbu akan meresap sempurna pada putih dan kuning telur.

RESEP RAMEN INDOMIE: https://youtu.be/PVFcZVGgPyI

Resep Ramen Egg / Ajitsuke Tamago

Bahan Air Rendaman:
Kecap Asin : Mirin : Air : Gula = 1 : 2 : 6 : 2 (alat takar dapat menggunakan gelas kecil, sendok makan, atau mangkuk kecil sesuai kebutuhan)
Dashi powder / chicken powder sesuai selera

Bahan lainnya:
Telur (sesuai kebutuhan)
Es batu

Langkah:
1. Siapkan panci lalu panaskan
2. Masukkan mirin dan kecap asin
3. Tambahkan air dan gula
4. Bumbui dengan dashi powder, masak hingga mendidih
5. Rebus telur selama 7 menit
6. Pindahkan ke wadah air es batu, lalu diamkan
7. Kupas kulit telur perlahan
8. Masukkan telur ke dalam toples / wadah tertutup
9. Campurkan dengan air rendaman
10. Simpan di lemari es semalaman
11. Keluarkan telurnya, potong dengan pisau
12. Ramen Egg siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Boil Egg the Japanese Way! Ramen Egg Recipe: Best for Instant Noodle Topping

Ramen Egg or Ajitsuke Tamago (味付け卵) is a marinated soft-boiled egg characterized by firm egg whites and soft, runny yolk. The KEY components are soy sauce, mirin, and sugar. The marinade will be perfectly infused into the whites and yolk.

Ramen Egg / Ajitsuke Tamago Recipe

Marinade Ingredients:
Soy Sauce : Mirin : Water : Sugar = 1 : 2 : 6 : 2
(Measure with a small glass, a tablespoon, or a small bowl, as appropriate)
Dashi powder / chicken powder, to taste

Other ingredients:
Eggs (as needed)
Ice cubes

Steps:
1. Prepare a saucepan and boil some water
2. Add the mirin and soy sauce
3. Add water and sugar
4. Season with the dashi powder, bring to a boil
5. Boil the eggs for 7 minutes
6. Transfer the eggs to an ice bath and let it rest
7. Peel the eggs gently
8. Add the eggs into a jar / closed container
9. Pour in the marinade
10. Keep in the fridge overnight
11. Remove the egg and cut to halves
12. Ramen Egg is ready to serve

title: Ramen Dari Indomie! Resep Ramen Jepang Hakata-Style
recipe_id:
Ramen merupakan salah satu makanan utama yang sangat populer dari Jepang. Umumnya dibuat dengan mie tipis dengan kuah kaldu, namun resep kali ini caranya tidak harus memakan waktu berjam-jam seperti ramen yang aslinya. Menu ini terinspirasi dari Hakata Ramen, namun tidak menggunakan rebusan tulang melainkan susu.

RESEP TELUR RAMEN: https://youtu.be/CoKPfur8DkQ

Resep Ramen Indomie

Bahan Kaldu (1 porsi):
250-300 ml air
1 bawang putih besar
1 bawang merah besar
2 cm jahe
30-50 ml susu evaporasi
1 batang daun bawang bagian putih

Bahan lainnya:
Mie instan kuah rasa ayam
Daun bawang bagian hijau untuk garnish
Gula, merica sesuai selera

Topping:
Ramen egg, belah dua
Jagung rebus
Jamur lember rebus, iris tipis

Langkah membuat ramen:
1. Buat kaldu. Siapkan panci berisi air, didihkan
2. Potong jahe, bawang putih, bawang merah menjadi dua bagian, masukkan ke dalam air
3. Potong daun bawang bagian putih, masukkan ke dalam air
4. Masak selama 5-10 menit
5. Buat mie instan. Didihkan air, masukkan mie. Rebus mie sesuai selera
6. Masukkan bumbu mie instan ke dalam mangkuk, tambahkan air kaldu, lalu aduk
7. Tambahkan susu evaporasi, bumbui dengan gula dan merica
8. Masukkan mie yang sudah direbus
9. Tambahkan jamur, jagung, dan ramen egg
10.Garnish dengan daun bawang
11. Ramen Indomie siap disajikan

Langkah membuat garnish daun bawang:
1. Pakai bagian hijau daun bawang
2. Potong menjadi tiga bagian
3. Potong tipis melintang secara horizontal
4. Rendam dalam air es dan diamkan beberapa menit hingga keriting
5. Garnish siap digunakan
recipe_en:
Turning Instant Noodle Into Ramen: Hakata-Style Japanese Ramen

Ramen is one of the most popular Japanese dish. It's usually made with thin noodles and broth, but this recipe doesn't require hours of cooking time like regular ramen. This menu is inspired from Hakata Ramen, but it uses milk instead of bone broth.

Indomie Ramen Recipe

Broth Ingredients (1 serving):
250-300 ml water
1 large garlic
1 large shallots
1 inch ginger
30-50 ml evaporated milk
1 stalk green onions (bottom part)

Other ingredients:
Chicken-flavor soup-based instant noodles
Green onions (leaf part)
Sugar & pepper, to taste

Toppings:
Ramen egg, halved
Boiled corn
Boiled Wood Ear mushroom, sliced thinly

Ramen Steps:
1. Make the broth. Prepare a saucepan filled with water and bring to a boil.
2. Halve the ginger, garlic, and shallots. Add them to the water.
3. Slice the bottom part of the green onions. Add them to the water.
4. Cook for 5-10 minutes
5. Cook the instant noodles. Boil some water and add the noodle. Cook to your liking.
6. Add the instant noodle seasoning to a bowl. Pour in some broth and mix well.
7. Add some evaporated milk. Season with sugar and pepper
8. Add the cooked noodles.
9. Add mushroom, corn, and ramen egg.
10. Garnish with green onions.
11. Ramen Indomie is ready to serve.

Green Onion Garnish Steps:
1. Use the leafy part of the green onion.
2. Slice into three parts.
3. Slice thinly lengthwise.
4. Soak in an ice bath and let them rest for a few minutes until they curl.
5. Garnish is ready to use.

title: Rp 3,300 Becomes a 5-Star Hotel Dessert. Coffee Mousse Recipe WITHOUT Whipped Cream.
recipe_id:
Kali ini aku akan berbagi resep cara membuat DESSERT MEWAH sekelas hotel berbintang, bermodalkan hanya KOPI SASET dan beberapa bahan ekonomis saja. Dalam bahasa Prancis, Mousse berarti busa. Sebuah sajian yang diproses sedemikian rupa hingga memiliki tekstur lembut berongga, diaduk dengan cara aduk lipat (folding), kemudian dicetak. 

Resep Coffee Mousse

Bahan Pastry Cream (Vla):
5-6 sachet Tora Cafe Milky Latte
375 ml susu
1 butir telur
2 butir kuning telur
25 gr tepung maizena
40 gr butter / mentega
⅕ sdt garam

Bahan Italian Meringue:
2 butir putih telur
120 gr gula
40 ml air
Cream of tartar (opsional)

Bahan Biskuit:
1 pack egg drop cookies / biskuit lain sesuai selera
1 sachet Tora Cafe Choco Latte
Air secukupnya

Langkah :
1. Buat  pastry cream, panaskan susu
2. Campurkan Tora Cafe Milky Latte, telur, dan tepung Maizena ke dalam wadah, aduk hingga semua tercampur rata
3. Masukkan sedikit demi sedikit susu yang sudah dipanaskan, sambil diaduk
4. Tuang ke panci lalu masak. Aduk terus hingga pastry cream mengental
5. Tambahkan mentega dan garam, aduk rata
6. Masukkan dalam wadah, tutup dengan baking paper / plastik. Diamkan hingga dingin
7. Buat italian meringue, panaskan air dan gula di suhu 118-121°C. Masak hingga menjadi sirup gula
8. Kocok putih telur, lalu tambahkan sirup gula sedikit demi sedikit sambil dikocok hingga kaku. Diamkan hingga dingin
9. Seduh Tora Cafe Choco Latte, lalu tuang ke wadah yang berisi egg drop cookies. Rendam hingga cokelat meresap ke dalam egg drop cookies
10. Campur meringue dengan pastry cream lalu aduk rata, sisakan sedikit meringue untuk topping
11. Masukkan ke dalam piping bag
12. Tata egg drop cookies yang sudah direndam di gelas / wadah
13. Tambahkan dengan adonan mousse
14. Lalu beri topping meringue di atasnya
15. Simpan di dalam lemari es atau bisa langsung disajikan
