recipe_en:
Five-Star Hotel's Dessert for Less Than a Dollar! Coffee Mousse Recipe No Whipped Cream.

This time, I'm sharing a recipe on how to make a 5-star hotel sumptuous dessert with only instant coffee and several other budget-friendly ingredients. In French, mousse means foam. This is a dish that has been meticulously processed so it has a soft, airy texture, mixed with a folding method, and then set.

Coffee Mousse Recipe

Pastry Cream (Vla) Ingredients:
5-6 sachets Tora Cafe Milky Latte
375 ml milk
1 egg
2 egg yolks
25 g cornstarch
40 g butter
1/5 tsp salt

Italian Meringue Ingredients:
2 egg whites
120 g sugar
40 ml water
Cream of tartar (optional)

Biscuit Ingredients:
1 pack Egg Drop cookies / other biscuits to your liking
1 sachet Tora Cafe Choco Latte
Water as needed

Steps:
1. Make pastry cream by first heating the milk.
2. Add Tora Cafe Milky Latte, eggs, and cornstarch into a bowl. Mix thoroughly.
3. Add the heated milk bit by bit while stirring
4. Pour to a pan and cook on heat. Keep stirring until the pastry cream thickens.
5. Add butter and salt. Mix well.
6. Transfer to a container. Cover with baking paper / plastic. Let cool.
7. To make the Italian meringue, heat some water and sugar at 118°C - 121°C. Cook until it becomes a sugar syrup.
8. Beat the egg whites and add the sugar syrup bit by bit as you beat them to a stiff peak. Let cool.
9. Make the Tora Cafe Choco Latte and pour to a container containing the Egg Drop cookies. Soak until the chocolate drink is absorbed well by the cookies.
10. Combine the meringue and the pastry cream. Mix well.
11. Leave a bit of the meringue for the topping. Place in a piping bag.
12. Arrange the soaked Egg Drop cookies in a glass or other container.
13. Add the mousse.
14. Top with meringue.
15. Keep in the fridge or serve.

title: 5 Timun 1 Ikan Jadi Resep Sup Ikan Singapura: Gurih Tapi Sehat Untuk Keluarga.
recipe_id:
Biasanya mengolah ikan dori dengan cara digoreng. Ternyata ikan dori bisa divariasikan dengan cara lain seperti dibuat Sup Ikan Singapore. Bahan utamanya ikan putih, timun, susu, dan rempah-rempah. Seperti di Singapore, sup ini terdiri dari ikan yang dibalut tepung dan digoreng, ada juga yang langsung direbus. Tentunya sehat dan juga bergizi. Cocok disantap bersama keluarga di rumah.

Resep Sup Ikan Singapore

Bahan marinasi:
2 slices ikan dori
1 sdm minyak wijen
1 sdt garam
1 sdt merica

Bahan adonan:
2 butir telur
3,5 sdm tepung protein sedang
1 sdt garam
½ sdt merica

Bahan lainnya:
5 siung bawang putih
5 timun ukuran sedang
Jahe ukuran 2 jempol
2 batang daun bawang
2 sdm kecap asin
1 sdm kecap ikan
80-100 ml evaporated milk (susu evaporasi)
500-600 ml air
2-3 sdt garam
½ sdt merica
1 sdm gula
Penyedap sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Potong ikan dori agak tipis, masukkan dalam wadah
2. Bumbui dengan garam, merica, dan minyak wijen. Aduk rata lalu diamkan agar bumbu meresap
3. Kupas timun lalu potong-potong miring
4. Iris tipis jahe
5. Geprek bawang putih, lalu kupas kulitnya
6. Potong daun bawang
7. Panaskan pan, masukkan sedikit minyak, tumis bawang putih hingga kecokelatan
8. Masukkan timun, masak sebentar
9. Didihkan air, masukkan tumis bawang putih dan timun ke dalamnya
10. Buat adonan pelapis, kocok telur, tepung terigu, garam, dan merica
11. Campurkan setengah ikan dengan adonan lalu goreng hingga keemasan
12. Bumbui kuah dengan garam, merica, gula, penyedap, kecap asin dan kecap ikan
13. Masukkan daun bawang dan jahe
14. Masukkan satu per satu sisa ikan
15. Tambahkan evaporated milk, masak hingga ikan matang
16. Sup Ikan Singapore siap disajikan
recipe_en:
5 Cucumbers 1 Fish, Cook ‘Em With Milk! Singaporean Fish Soup Recipe, Tasty But Healthy.

Usually, we cook Dory by frying them. As it turns out, you can create other dishes from Dory, like this Singaporean Fish Soup. The main ingredients are white fish, cucumbers, milk, and some spices. Just like the ones in Singapore, this soup consists of fried fish and boiled fish. Both the texture and the flavor will make your taste-buds explode. Of course, this dish is healthy and nutritious! Perfect for your family at home.

Singaporean Fish Soup Recipe

Marinade:
2 slices Dory
1 tbsp sesame oil
1 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper

Batter:
2 eggs
3.5 tbsp medium-protein flour
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper

Other ingredients:
5 cloves garlic
5 medium-sized cucumber
2 4" ginger
2 leeks
2 tbsp soy sauce
1 tbsp fish sauce
80-100 ml evaporated milk
2-3 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper
1 tbsp sugar
Flavor enhancers to taste

Steps:
1. Slice Dory slightly thinly and put into a bowl.
2. Season with salt, pepper, and sesame oil. Mix well and let sit until marinade is absorbed.
3. Peel the cucumbers and slice diagonally.
4. Slice the ginger thinly.
5. Pound the garlic and peel.
6. Chop the leeks.
7. Heat the pan, add a bit of oil and sauté garlic until browned.
8. Add the cucumber and cook for a bit.
9. Boil some water. Add the sautéed garlic and cucumber into the water.
10. Make the batter. Beat the eggs, then add flour, salt, and pepper.
11. Coat half the fish with the batter and fry until golden brown.
12. Season the broth with salt, pepper, sugar, flavor enhancers, and fish sauce.
13. Add leeks and ginger.
14. Put the raw fish in one-by-one.
15. Add the evaporated milk and cook until the fish is done.
16. Singaporean Fish Soup is ready to serve.

title: Always in Demand! Chinese Restaurant Style Chili Oil Recipe, Perfect for Dim Sum & Fried Foods.
recipe_id:
Chili Oil (minyak cabai) merupakan sambal khas yang menjadi bumbu pelengkap wajib masakan di Sichuan China atau daerah Asia Timur. Dengan bahan utamanya adalah cabai kering, biasanya digunakan untuk masakan Asia seperti gorengan, ramen, dimsum, bebek peking, tumis sayuran, dan hampir semua jenis masakan Chinese.

Resep Chili Oil

Bahan:
250 gr minyak goreng
60 gr cabai kering
25 gr bawang putih
25 gr bawang merah
25 gr ebi
1 sdt garam
½ sdt gula
½ sdt penyedap
2 sdm kecap asin

Langkah:
1. Haluskan cabai kering dengan blender / food processor, sisihkan
2. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih dan minyak hingga halus
3. Tambahkan ebi yang sudah direndam, blender sebentar
4. Tumis bumbu halus sampai matang dan wangi, bumbui dengan garam, gula, dan penyedap sebelum air dalam bawang habis
5. Masukan cabai yang sudah dihaluskan, masak hingga minyak berwarna merah
6. Tambahkan kecap asin, masak sebentar
7. Simpan Chili Oil dalam botol kaca yang sudah disterilisasi
recipe_en:
Best Paired with Fried Foods. Chili Oil Recipe àla Chinese Restaurant.

Chili oil is a signature condiment in Sichuan, China, Korea, or other East Asian countries. The main ingredient is dried chili. It's typically used for Asian dishes such as ramen, dim-sum, Peking duck, sautéed vegetables and nearly all Chinese-style dishes. It adds fragrance and enhances the flavor of a dish!

Chili Oil Recipe

Ingredients:
250 g cooking oil
60 g dried chili
25 g garlic
25 g shallots
25 g dried shrimp
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp flavor enhancers
2 tbsp soy sauce

Steps:
1. Crush the dried chili with blender / food processor, set aside.
2. Puree the shallots, garlic, and cooking oil until fine.
3. Add the pre-soaked dried shrimp, blend shortly.
4. Sauté the fine mix until cooked and fragrant, season with salt, sugar, and flavor enhancers before the water content in the mix is evaporated.
5. Add crushed chili and cook until the oil turns red.
6. Add soy sauce and let it cook a bit more.
7. Store Chili Oil in a sterilized glass jar.

title: Rice Cooker Sardines! Practical Sahur Recipe, 30 Thousand Fills the Whole Family
recipe_id:
Sarden kalengan, makanan yang tergolong “murah meriah” ini bisa dikreasikan lebih lezat lagi dibanding hanya dimasak begitu saja. Resep kali ini terinspirasi dari nasi liwet: perpaduan antara nasi, sarden kalengan dan rempah-rempah membuat rasanya semakin kuat. Cocok untuk menu sahur maupun buka puasa karena selain praktis dan enak, juga bergizi tinggi. 

Resep Nasi Sardines

Bahan:
1 kaleng Sardines ABC rasa tomat (425 gr)
500 ml beras
500 ml air
6 siung bawang putih
8 siung bawang merah
4 lembar daun salam
6-8 iris jahe
4-6 iris lengkuas
1 batang sereh
2 buah tomat
Cabai rawit sesuai selera
Petai sesuai selera
2 sdm mentega / margarin
1 sdt garam
2 sdt gula
½ sdt merica
Penyedap sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Iris jahe dan lengkuas
2. Iris tipis bawang putih dan bawang merah
3. Potong serai menjadi 3 bagian lalu geprek
4. Campurkan beras dan air ke dalam rice cooker
5. Masukkan jahe, lengkuas, bawang putih, bawang merah, cabai rawit, tomat, dan petai
6. Letakkan sardines di atasnya, tuang sedikit kuah sardines
7. Bumbui dengan garam, gula, merica, dan penyedap
8. Masukkan margarin
9. Masak hingga nasi matang
10. Setelah matang, angkat rempah-rempah yang tidak bisa dimakan dan beberapa sardines untuk disajikan utuh
11. Tuang sisa kuah sardines lalu aduk rata semuanya
12. Sajikan di piring dan taruh sardines di atasnya

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sardenabc.id/
Website: https://www.heinzabc.co.id/abccerdaskanindonesia/

Plate by @BREWSUNIQ
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/brewsuniq/

recipe_en:
Budget-Friendly Food, Only Rice Cooker Needed! Sardine Rice Recipe.

It turns out you can elevate this budget-friendly food to be even more delicious with only rice cooker! This recipe was inspired from Nasi Liwet, a very rich-in-flavor Indonesian food. I combine rice, canned sardines, spices, and herbs to enhance the flavor. It's good and suitable for Suhoor and Iftar as it is simple yet tasty.

Sardines Rice Recipe

Ingredients:
1 canned ABC sardines in tomato flavor (425 g)
500 ml rice
500 ml water
6 cloves garlic
8 shallots
6-8 slices ginger
4-6 slices galangal
1 stalk lemongrass
2 tomatoes
Bird's eye chili, to taste
Petai, to taste
2 tbsp butter / margarine
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp pepper
Flavor enhancers, to taste

Steps:
1. Slice the ginger and galangal
2. Slice the garlic and shallots thinly
3. Cut the lemongrass into 3 parts and pound
4. Put the rice and water into the rice cooker
5. Add ginger, galangal, garlic, shallots, bird's eye chili, tomatoes, and petai
6. Place the sardines on top with a little bit of the tomato sauce
7. Season with salt, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancers
8. Add margarine
9. Cook until the rice is done
10. After it's done, remove the inedible herbs and several sardines to plate whole
11. Add the remaining sardines' sauce and mix well
12. Plate and place the whole sardines on top

title: Stir-fried Like This, Triple the Size! Thai Basil Egg Recipe. Easy!
recipe_id:
Terinspirasi dari makanan Thailand, Pad Kra Pao atau Thai Basil Chicken, kali ini aku modifikasi tanpa menggunakan daging ayam giling melainkan telur. Perpaduan rasa pedas dari cabai dan wangi dari daun kemangi DIJAMIN menambah lezat sajian olahan telur ini. Cocok disantap dengan nasi hangat.

Resep Telur Ceplok Bumbu Kemangi

Bahan:
10 butir telur
2 sdm bawang putih cincang
1 genggam bawang merah kupas
20 cabai rawit merah / hijau / campur
4 cabai merah keriting
2 cabai gendot
50 gr kemangi
4 sdm kecap ikan
4 sdm saus tiram
3 sdt gula
2 sdm air
Penyedap sesuai selera
Minyak untuk menumis dan menggoreng telur

Langkah:
1. Panaskan pan, ceplok telur matang dan setengah matang. Angkat lalu sisihkan
2. Iris cabai rawit, cabai keriting, dan cabai gendot sesuai selera
3. Tumis bawang merah hingga wangi
4. Masukkan semua cabai yang sudah diiris dan bawang putih
5. Bumbui dengan kecap ikan, saus tiram, gula, dan penyedap
6. Masukkan daun kemangi, masak hingga sedikit layu
7. Tambahkan sedikit air, aduk rata
8. Campurkan bumbu kemangi dengan telur yang sudah digoreng sebelumnya
9. Telur Bumbu Kemangi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Must Try, You WILL Be Hooked! Spicy Thai Basil Fried Eggs Recipe.

Inspired by a Thai dish called Pad Krapow or Thai Basil Chicken, this time I'm modifying this dish by using eggs instead of ground chicken. The marriage of the chili's spiciness and the lemon basil's fragrance is GUARANTEED to intensify this egg dish's flavor. This dish is ideal to be paired with warm rice.

Lemon Basil Fried Eggs Recipe

Ingredients:
10 eggs
2 tbsp minced garlic
A fistful of peeled shallots
20 red / green / mixed bird's eye chili
4 curly red chili
2 Habaneros
50 g lemon basil
4 tbsp fish sauce
4 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tsp sugar
2 tbsp water
Flavor enhancers to taste
Cooking oil to sauté and fry the eggs

Steps:
1. Heat the pan, fry the over well and sunny side up eggs. Remove and set aside.
2. Chop the bird's eye chili, curly chili, and Habanero to your preference.
3. Sauté the shallots until fragrant.
4. Add all of the chopped chili and garlic.
5. Season with fish sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, and flavor enhancers
6. Add the lemon basil, cook until they wilt.
7. Add a bit of water, mix well.
8. Combine the lemon basil mix with the fried eggs.
9. Lemon Basil Fried Eggs is ready to serve.

title: Sambal Dabu Dabu ANTI Gagal! Resep Ikan Dori Praktis Cocok Untuk Sahur.
recipe_id:
Sambal Dabu-Dabu merupakan sambal yang berasal dari Manado, Sulawesi Utara. Sambal ini cukup unik karena tidak diulek, melainkan hanya dengan mengiris kecil-kecil semua bahan. Rasanya yang pedas dan segar cocok sekali dinikmati bersama ikan bakar, ikan goreng, atau hidangan seafood lainnya. Belum lengkap rasanya kalau hobby di dapur namun belum pernah membuat sambal Dabu-Dabu.

Resep Ikan Dori Sambal Dabu-dabu

Bahan Sambal Dabu-dabu:
2 tomat merah
2 tomat hijau
5 siung bawang merah
5-10 cabai rawit merah
2 jeruk nipis
1 sdt garam
2 sdt gula
¼ sdt kaldu jamur
50 ml minyak goreng

Bahan lainnya:
2 ikan dori fillet
2 sdm tepung terigu
2 sdm minyak goreng

Langkah:
1. Keringkan ikan dori menggunakan tisu, lumuri dengan tepung terigu
2. Panaskan minyak, pan seared kedua sisi ikan hingga matang
3. Potong dadu tomat merah dan tomat hijau yang dibuang bijinya, iris bawang merah dan cabai rawit merah masukkan ke dalam mangkuk
4. Bumbui dengan garam, gula, kaldu jamur, jeruk nipis dan siram dengan minyak panas, aduk rata
5. Sajikan Ikan Dori dengan Sambal Dabu-Dabu di atasnya
recipe_en:
Got Tomato? Cook It Like This! Dabu-Dabu Sambal Recipe From Manado, Indonesia

Dabu-Dabu Sambal is one of the most popular sambal creations from Manado, North Sulawesi. This Sambal is quite unique because the ingredients are not blended but sliced into small pieces. The spiciness and tartness of this Sambal match well with grilled fish, fried fish, and other seafood dishes. Your passion in cooking is just not complete if you haven’t tried to maks this Dabu-Dabu Sambal.

Dory with Dabu-Dabu Sambal Recipe

Dabu-Dabu Sambal ingredients:
2 red tomatoes
2 green tomatoes
5 shallots
5-10 bird's eye chili
2 limes
1 tsp salt
2 tsp sugar
1/4 tsp mushroom stock powder
50 ml cooking oil

Other ingredients:
2 Dory fillets
2 tbsp flour
2 tbsp cooking oil

Steps:
1. Dry the Dory with paper towel and sprinkle with flour.
2. Heat the oil and pan-sear both sides of the fish until cooked.
3. Dice the red and green tomatoes, core removed. Slice the shallots and bird’s eye chili and add them into a bowl.
4. Season with salt, sugar, mushroom stock, lime, and pour hot oil into the mixture. Mix well.
5. Serve the Dory with Dabu-Dabu Sambal on top.

title: The Secret's in the Marinade! Pizza Hut-Style Chicken Wings Recipe
recipe_id:
Spicy Chicken Wings merupakan salah satu menu favorit di Pizza Hut. Cara membuatnya sebenarnya mudah, asalkan komposisi resep dan cara marinasinya dikerjakan dengan tepat. Bumbu yang dipakai juga mudah didapat, dan pastinya lebih hemat dan sehat untuk disantap bersama keluarga. Perpaduan rasa pedas, manis, dan ayam yang juicy juga cocok dimakan bersama nasi hangat atau camilan bersama kentang goreng.

Resep Spicy Chicken Wings

Bahan:
6 pcs sayap ayam
3 pcs bawang putih halus
1 sdm kecap manis
1 ½ sdm saus tiram
1 sdm saus barbeque
1 ½ sdm Sambel Cap Ibu Jari Hot & Sweet
2 sdm madu
1 sdt kaldu jamur
½ sdt merica
2 sdm minyak goreng

Langkah:
1. Potong sayap ayam menjadi 3 bagian, buang ujung sayapnya, lalu cuci bersih
2. Marinasi sayap ayam dengan bawang putih halus, kecap manis, saus tiram, Sambel Cap Ibu Jari Hot & Sweet, saus barbeque, madu, kaldu jamur, dan merica. Aduk rata
3. Marinasi minimal 2 jam di suhu ruangan / minimal 8 jam di lemari pendingin agar bumbu meresap
4. Setelah dimarinasi, tambahkan minyak goreng, aduk rata
5. Siapkan wire baking rack dan alasnya, letakkan ayam di atasnya agar bumbu menetes ke bawah. Bisa juga menggunakan aluminium foil
6. Panggang di oven dengan suhu 220 derajat selama 10 menit
7. Setelah 10 menit, keluarkan dari oven lalu olesi dengan sisa bumbu marinasi. Panggang kembali di suhu 180 derajat selama 5-10 menit
8. Jika ayam sudah berwarna cokelat keemasan, angkat dan sajikan

Jangan lupa cek Instagram @SAMBELCAPJEMPOL

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sambelcapjempol/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sambelcapjempol/
Website: https://www.sambelcapjempol.com/
recipe_en:
The Secret is the Marination! Chicken Wings Recipe àla Pizza Hut

Spicy Chicken Wings is one of most customers' favorite menus when dining at Pizza Hut. The cooking methods are simple, as long as the recipe and marinade composition are well-made. The ingredients are also easy to find--they're healthier and more budget-friendly for families. The union of spicy, sweet, and juicy chicken flavor is so compatible with warm rice or french fries.

Spicy Chicken Wings Recipe

Ingredients:
6 pcs chicken wings
3 pcs grated garlic
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tbsp barbecue sauce
1.5 tbsp Cap Ibu Jari Hot & Sweet Chili
2 tbsp honey
1 tsp mushroom stock powder
1/2 tsp pepper
2 tbsp cooking oil

Steps:
1. Split the chicken wings into 3 parts, remove the tips and rinse.
2. Marinate the chicken wings with grated garlic, sweet soy sauce, oyster sauce, Cap Ibu Jari Hot & Sweet Chili, barbecue sauce, honey, mushroom stock powder, and pepper. Mix well.
3. Marinate for at least 2 hours at room temp / at least 8 hours in the fridge so the marinade is absorbed well.
4. After marinating the wings, add cooking oil and mix well.
5. Prepare a wire baking rack and a tray. Place the chicken on top so the marinade can drip off. You can also use aluminum foil.
6. Roast in the oven at 220°C for 10 minutes.
7. After 10 minutes, remove from the oven and coat with leftover marinade. Roast the wings once more at 180°C for 5-10 minutes.
8. After the wings turn golden brown, remove from the oven and serve.

title: Tidak Digoreng, Cukup Pakai Rice Cooker! Resep Nasi Ayam Favorit Singapura
recipe_id:
Nasi Ayam Hainan adalah salah satu hidangan populer di Malaysia dan Singapura. Sangat simple tapi nikmat, bahan utama Nasi Ayam Hainan ini menggunakan beras dan ayam yang dibumbui dengan jahe, bawang putih dan minyak wijen. Menu ini sangat cocok untuk dijadikan menu sahur atau buka puasa, atau menu sehat tapi nikmat untuk dihidangkan kepada keluarga.

Resep Sambal Hainan: https://youtu.be/zsl3ViTx2bU

Resep Nasi Ayam

Bahan marinasi ayam:
1 ekor ayam
3 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm arak masak
1 sdm minyak wijen
4 sdt garam
1 sdt merica
1 sdt penyedap
2 sdm jahe iris
3 sdm tepung tapioka

Bahan lainnya:
800 ml / 650 gr beras
800 ml air
5 sdm minyak goreng
1 bonggol bawang putih
2 batang daun bawang

Langkah:
1. Potong ayam kecil-kecil, masukkan dalam wadah
2. Cincang bawang putih
3. Panaskan minyak, tumis bawang putih hingga kuning keemasan
4. Iris tipis jahe seperti korek api. Campurkan ke dalam ayam
5. Masukkan tepung tapioka, saus tiram, garam, penyedap, dan merica. Aduk rata, lalu marinasi selama 15-30 menit
6. Masukkan beras dan air ke dalam rice cooker
7. Masukkan minyak bawang putih
8. Masukkan ayam yang sudah dimarinasi di atasnya, jangan diaduk. Masak nasi ayam hingga matang
9. Potong daun bawang lalu campurkan dengan nasi, aduk rata
10. Nasi Ayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
No Fry, Only Rice Cooker. Savory and Healthy Chicken Rice Recipe

Hainanese Chicken Rice is a popular dish in Malaysian and Singaporean foods. Simple but delicious, this Hainanese Chicken Rice's main ingredients are rice and chicken, marinated with ginger, garlic, and sesame oil. This menu is very suitable for Suhoor or Iftar, or as a healthy yet delicious menu for families.

Steamed Chicken Rice Recipe

Chicken marinade ingredients:
1 whole chicken
3 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp cooking wine
1 tbsp sesame oil
4 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1 tsp flavor enhancers
2 tbsp sliced ginger
3 tbsp tapioca flour

Other ingredients:
800 ml / 650 g rice
800 ml water
5 tbsp cooking oil
1 whole garlic
2 leeks

Steps:
1. Chop the chicken into little pieces, set aside in a bowl
2. Mince the garlic
3. Heat the oil, sauté the garlic until it turns golden
4. Slice the ginger into matchsticks. Add to the chicken.
5. Add tapioca flour, oyster sauce, salt, flavor enhancers, and pepper. Mix well and marinate for 15-30 minutes
6. Add rice and water into the rice cooker
7. Add the garlic oil
8. Add marinated chicken on top, do not stir. Cook chicken rice until done.
9. Chop the leeks and mix well with rice.
10. Steamed Chicken Rice is ready to serve

title: Singapore's Hainanese Sambal Recipe: Ginger is a Must!
recipe_id:
Sambal Nasi Hainan biasanya terbuat dari cabai merah, bawang putih, dan jahe yang dihaluskan. Gurih dari ayam dipadukan dengan resep sambal hainan ini adalah kunci dari lezat dan khasnya masakan Ayam Hainan asli favorit negara-negara di Asia Tenggara khususnya Singapura dan Malaysia.

Resep Ayam Hainan: https://youtu.be/nbNWA4rF_8Y

Resep Sambal Nasi Hainan

Bahan:
12 cabai keriting merah
3 cabai rawit (sesuai selera)
3 cm jahe
1 bonggol kecil bawang putih
50 ml minyak goreng
2 sdm minyak wijen
1,5 sdm cuka beras atau ¾ sdm cuka meja
1-2 sdt garam
1 sdm gula pasir
Penyedap sesuai selera
Air secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Kupas bawang putih, masukkan ke dalam food processor
2. Kupas jahe, iris tipis, masukkan ke dalam food processor
3. Potong cabai, masukkan ke dalam food processor
4. Tambahkan cabai rawit, minyak goreng dan minyak wijen. Lalu haluskan menggunakan food processor
5. Tumis bumbu halus hingga kering dan matang
6. Tambahkan air dan bumbui dengan garam, gula, penyedap, dan cuka beras. Masak hingga mendidih
7. Simpan sambal di wadah kedap udara seperti botol kaca
8. Sambal Nasi Hainan siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Add Ginger! The Secret of Hainanese Sambal àla Singaporean Restaurant Recipe

Hainanese Chicken Rice Sambal is usually made of blended chili, garlic, and ginger. The savory chicken married with this Hainanese sambal is the key to the signature flavor profile of Hainanese Chicken Rice, the favorite, authentic dish in South East Asian countries, especially Singapore and Malaysia.

Hainanese Chicken Recipe: https://youtu.be/nbNWA4rF_8Y

Hainanese Chicken Rice Sambal Recipe

Ingredients:
12 curly chili
3 bird's eye chili (to taste)
3 cm ginger
1 whole garlic, small
50 ml cooking oil
2 tbsp sesame oil
1.5 tbsp rice vinegar or 3/4 tbsp white vinegar
1-2 tbsp salt
1 tbsp sugar
Flavor enhancers to taste
Water

Steps:
1. Peel the garlic, add to the food processor.
2. Peel the ginger, slice thinly, add to the food processor.
3. Chop the chili, add to the food processor.
4. Add the bird's eye chili, cooking oil, and sesame oil. Blend with the food processor.
5. Sauté the spices until fragrant and well-cooked.
6. Add water and season with salt, sugar, flavor enhancers, and rice vinegar.
7. Store the sambal in airtight containers, such as glass jars.
8. Hainanese Chicken Rice Sambal is ready to serve.

title: Convenience store ingredients, 100% ready. Dalgona Oreo & Regal recipe without Ovalet (SP) and wi...
recipe_id:
Siapa yang sudah coba bikin Resep Dalgona Coffee "3 Menit, 100% Sukses" dari aku kemarin? Kali ini aku mau kasih resep untuk membuat varian Dalgona dengan bahan biskuit: Oreo dan Regal. Resep ini *TIDAK PERLU*  menggunakan Whip Cream, Ovalet / SP ataupun Telur.

Es batu

Langkah:

3. Campurkan foam dengan bubuk oreo, aduk rata

Resep REGAL Dalgona

Bahan:

Susu sapi
Es batu
Espresso (opsional)

Langkah:

2. Hancurkan regal lalu saring hingga tidak ada butiran kasar
3. Campurkan foam dengan bubuk regal, aduk rata
4. Siapkan gelas, masukkan es batu dan susu

recipe_en:
Mini-Market Ingredients, 100% Done. Oreo & Regal Dalgona Recipe: No Ovalette (SP) No Whipped Cream.

Have you watched and tried my "3 Minutes, 100% Success and No Mixer" Dalgona Coffee Recipe? This time, I'm sharing a recipe to make a version of that Dalgona drink with these biscuits as ingredients: Oreo and Regal. This recipe *DOES NOT REQUIRE* Whipped cream, Ovalet, and Eggs. Happy cooking!

Find "3 Minutes 100% Success Dalgona Coffee Recipe" here:
https://youtu.be/hLGumMcyfKU

OREO Dalgona Recipe

Ingredients:
100 g instant coconut milk
1 tbsp sugar
6 pc Oreos, remove the cream center
Milk
Ice cubes
Espresso (optional)

Steps:
1. Make the foam. Whip the coconut milk with a mixer until it expands
2. Smash the Oreos and strain them to eliminate large crumbs
3. Combine the foam with Oreo powder, mix thoroughly
4. Prepare a glass, add ice cubes and milk
5. Add the foam and sprinkle Oreo powder on top
6. Oreo Dalgona is ready to serve

REGAL Dalgona Recipe

Ingredients:
100 g instant coconut milk
1 tbsp sugar
3 pc Regal biscuits
Milk
Ice cubes
Espresso (optional)

Steps:
1. Make the foam. Whip the coconut milk with a mixer until it expands
2. Smash the Oreos and strain them to eliminate large crumbs
3. Combine the foam with Regal powder, mix thoroughly
4. Prepare a glass, add ice cubes and milk
5. Add the foam and sprinkle Oreo powder on top
6. Oreo Dalgona is ready to serve

title: Jangan Didadar! Resep Telur Camilan Satu Keluarga Suka.
recipe_id:
Resep Martabak Telur, mudah dan praktis menggunakan kulit lumpia. Martabak sendiri merupakan salah satu makanan yang berasal dari kawasan Arab. Dalam bahasa Arab, martabak artinya “makanan yang terlipat”.

Resep Martabak Telur

Bahan:
6 lembar kulit lumpia
4 butir telur
4 batang daun bawang
1 wortel
3 jamur shitake
2 sdm tepung terigu
1 sdt kari bubuk
1 sdt garam
½ sdt gula
½ sdt merica
½ sdt penyedap
5 cabai rawit
1 siung bawang putih
1 buah jeruk nipis
50 ml kecap manis
1 sdm bawang goreng
20 ml minyak goreng

Langkah:
1. Kupas wortel, potong kotak-kotak kecil
2. Iris daun bawang
3. Buang batang jamur shitake, lalu potong kotak-kotak kecil
4. Masukkan semua bahan ke dalam mangkuk, bumbui dengan garam, gula, merica, penyedap, kari bubuk, tepung terigu, dan telur. Aduk rata
5. Tambahkan irisan cabai rawit sesuai selera
6. Panaskan teflon seukuran kulit lumpia, beri sedikit minyak lalu taruh satu lembar kulit lumpia
7. Tuang adonan telur diatasnya lalu tutup dengan satu lembar kulit lumpia
8. Balikkan martabak, jika terlalu kering tambahkan sedikit minyak. Masak hingga matang
9. Untuk sambal kecap, ulek bawang putih, cabai rawit, garam, dan kaldu bubuk
10. Tambahkan kecap manis dan bawang goreng. Aduk rata
11. Martabak Telur siap disajikan dengan sambal kecap
recipe_en:
Don't Make an Omelet! Try This Snack Recipe Loved by Families

Martabak Telur Recipe, easy and practical using spring roll skin. Martabak itself has an Arabic origin. In Arabic, martabak means "folded food".

Martabak Telur Recipe

Ingredients:
6 sheets spring roll skins
4 eggs
4 leeks
1 carrot
3 Shiitake mushrooms
2 tbsp flour
1 tsp curry powder
1 tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
½ tsp pepper
½ tsp flavor enhancer
5 chili
1 clove garlic
1 lime
50 ml sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp fried shallots
20 ml cooking oil

Steps:
1. Peel the carrot and cut into a small dice
2. Chop the leeks
3. Remove the Shiitake's stem and cut into a small dice
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl, season with salt, sugar, pepper, flavor enhancers, curry powder, and eggs. Mix thoroughly
5. Add chopped chili to taste
6. Heat a non-stick pan with a diameter matching the spring roll skin. Add a bit of oil and place one sheet of spring roll skin in it.
7. Pour the egg filling on top, then cover with another sheet of spring roll skin.
8. Flip the Martabak. If the pan is too dry, add a bit of oil. Let it cook thoroughly.
9. For the sweet soy sambal, mash garlic, chili, salt, and stock powder into a paste
10. Add sweet soy sauce and fried shallots. Mix well
11. Martabak Telur is ready to serve with sweet soy sambal

title: Boil Chicken in Just 2 Minutes! A Favorite Soto Recipe for Kids and the Family
recipe_id:
Ciri khas Soto Bandung yakni kuahnya yang bening, menggunakan lobak dan daging sapi. Namun soto yang aku buat ini menggunakan daging ayam dan tidak menambahkan taburan kacang kedelai goreng. Pastinya enak dan seger, cocok disajikan saat musim hujan seperti sekarang.

Resep Soto Ayam Iris

Bahan:
600 gr dada ayam fillet
1 buah lobak
1 batang daun bawang
8 siung bawang merah
8 siung bawang putih
4 lembar daun salam
10 lembar daun jeruk
1 batang serai
4 sdt garam
1-2 sdm gula
1 sdt merica
1-2 sdt penyedap
1,5 liter air
2 seledri
5 buah jeruk limau
50 gr bawang goreng
20 ml minyak goreng

Langkah:
1. Iris daging ayam
2. Kupas lobak, potong kotak-kotak kecil
3. Blender bawang merah, bawang putih dan minyak hingga halus
4. Tumis bumbu halus, masukan serai geprek, daun jeruk dan daun salam tumis hingga wangi
5. Rebus air, masukkan lobak
6. Masukan sedikit air ke tumisan bumbu halus, aduk kemudian masukkan ke dalam panci rebusan lobak
7. Bumbui dengan garam, gula, merica, penyedap kemudian masukkan daun bawang yang dipotong panjang, masak hingga mendidih
8. Masukkan ayam, masak hingga mendidih lagi
9. Iris seledri dan belah dua jeruk limau
10. Hidangkan soto dengan irisan seledri, perasan jeruk limau dan bawang goreng
recipe_en:
Boils Chicken in Only 2 Minutes! Kids and Family's Favorite Soup Recipe

The characteristics of Soto Bandung (one of Indonesia's favorite soup) are its clear broth and the use of radish and beef. But the Soto I'm making uses chicken without any fried soy beans topping. It's definitely delicious and fresh, suitable for rainy seasons like it is now.

Sliced Chicken Soto Recipe

Ingredients:
600 g chicken breast fillet
1 radish
1 leeks
8 cloves shallots
8 cloves garlic
4 bay leaves
10 Kaffir lime leaves
1 lemongrass
4 tsp salt
1-2 tbsp sugar
1 tsp ground white pepper
1-2 tsp flavor enhancer
1.5L water
2 celery
5 Kaffir lime
50 g fried shallots
20 ml oil

Steps:
1. Slice the chicken breast
2. Peel and dice the radish
3. Blend shallots, garlic, and oil to a paste
4. Sauté the paste. Add pounded lemongrass, Kaffir lime leaves, and bay leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Boil some water. Add radish.
6. Add a little bit of the boiled water to the sautéed spice paste, mix, and empty the pan into the radish pot.
7. Season with salt, sugar, pepper, and flavor enhancer. Add chopped leeks and bring to a boil.
8. Add chicken, bring to a boil once more.
9. Chop the celery and prepare the Kaffir lime.
10. Serve the Soto with celery and fried shallots garnish and Kaffir lime juice.

title: 3 Menit 100% Sukses! Resep Dalgona Coffee Tanpa Mixer [ENGLISH SUBTITLE]
recipe_id:
Hanya 3 menit dan tanpa mixer. Resep Dalgona Coffee Brown Sugar Anti Gagal. Minuman kopi berbusa dalgona coffee saat ini sedang viral di Korea Selatan. Kopi ini menjadi menarik karena topping foamnya adalah cokelat, yang cara membuatnya sangat mudah asalkan tahu tips and tricksnya.

Resep Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee

Bahan Dalgona:
2 sdm kopi bubuk instan TANPA AMPAS
2 sdm white / brown sugar
2-3 sdm air hangat

Bahan lain:
Susu sapi
Evaporated milk / santan
Es batu

Langkah:
1. Buat foam. Campur kopi, gula, dan air hangat di mangkuk ceper. Aduk menggunakan saringan kecil hingga berubah warna menjadi pucat selama 3,5 menit
2. Masukkan es batu, susu sapi, dan evaporated milk ke dalam gelas. Letakkan foam di atasnya
3. Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee siap disajikan
recipe_en:
100% SUCCESS in Only 3 Minutes! Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee Recipe.

Only 3 minutes and no mixers needed! Foolproof Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee Recipe. This foamy Dalgona coffee drink is currently trending in South Korea. This coffee drink is interesting because the foam topping is dark and it is very easy to make when you know the tips and tricks.

Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee Recipe

Dalgona ingredients:
2 tbsp instant coffee powder (SEDIMENT-FREE)
2 tbsp white / brown sugar
2-3 tbsp warm water

Other ingredients:
Plain milk
Evaporated milk / coconut milk
Ice cubes

Steps:
1. Make the foam. Combine coffee, sugar, and water in a shallow bowl. Mix with a small strainer until the color turns pale for 3.5 minutes
2. Add ice cubes, plain milk, and evaporated milk into a glass. Place the foam ontop
3. Brown Sugar Dalgona Coffee is ready to serve

title: Panggang Dua Kali! Rahasia Resep Brownies Ala Starbucks [Atas Garing Daleman Empuk, 100% Sukses]
recipe_id:
Panggang Dua Kali! Rahasia Resep Brownies Ala Starbucks. Cara membuat brownies ada dua macam: kukus dan panggang. Keduanya memiliki cita rasa yang berbeda. Brownies kukus teksturnya lebih lembut dan sedikit basah sedangkan brownies panggang teksturnya lebih garing di luar namun lembut di dalam. Kali ini aku mau share resep brownies dengan cara panggang menggunakan oven.

Resep Chocolate Espresso Brownies

Bahan:
3 butir telur
200 gr gula pasir
50 gr brown sugar
1 sdt vanilla extract
140 gr butter unsalted
110 gr dark compound chocolate 
½ sdm espresso powder
45 gr cocoa powder
7 gr baking powder
65 gr tepung terigu protein sedang / all purpose
1 sdt garam

Langkah :
1. Lelehkan butter lalu sisihkan, masukkan cokelat batang, ¼ cocoa powder dan espresso powder, aduk rata hingga meleleh
2. Kocok telur dan gula sampai fluffy selama 7-10 menit menggunakan mixer
3. Masukkan brown sugar, lelehan butter, vanilla extract dan cokelat ke dalam adonan, aduk
4. Masukkan baking powder, tepung terigu, sisa cocoa powder, dan garam sambil diayak lalu aduk dengan spatula
5. Masukkan adonan ke dalam loyang ukuran 20 x 20 cm, lalu taburi dengan irisan cokelat di atasnya
5. Panggang di dalam oven di suhu 180 derajat selama 20 menit (api atas bawah)
6. Keluarkan adonan, ratakan / tekan dengan spatula lalu diamkan 10 menit
7. Panggang kembali di suhu yang sama selama 20 menit
8. Chocolate Espresso Brownies siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Bake it Twice! The Secret to Brownies a la Starbucks Recipe

Bake it Twice! The Secret to Brownies a la Starbucks Recipe. There are two ways you can make brownies: steamed and baked. Each has a different flavor. Steamed brownies are softer in texture and a bit moist, while baked brownies are crunchy on the outside but soft on the inside. This time, I'm sharing an oven-baked brownies recipe.

Chocolate Espresso Brownies Recipe

Ingredients:
3 eggs
200 g sugar
50 g brown sugar
1 tsp vanilla extract
140 g butter
110 g dark compound chocolate
1/2 tbsp espresso powder
45 g cocoa powder
7 g baking powder
65 g flour all purpose
1 tsp salt

Steps:
1. Melt the butter and set aside. Add the compound chocolate, 1/4 of the cocoa powder and espresso powder. Stir until the chocolate is melted.
2. Whip the eggs and sugar until fluffy for 7-10 minutes using a mixer.
3. Add the brown sugar, melted butter, vanilla extract and chocolate mixture into the batter. Mix well.
4. Add the baking powder, sifted flour, the rest of the cocoa powder, and salt. Fold in with spatula.
5. Add the batter into the baking pan and sprinkle with chocolate shavings on top.
6. Bake in the oven at 180°C for 20 minutes (upper and lower heat).
7. Remove the brownies from the oven. Push down with spatula and let it rest for 10 minutes.
8. Bake once more at the same temperature for 20 minutes.
9. Chocolate Espresso Brownies is ready to serve.

title: Jangan Digoreng! Tambahin Aja 5 Telur. Resep Oseng Tahu Telur Bikin Ketagihan
recipe_id:
Jangan Digoreng! Tambahin Aja 5 Telur. Resep Oseng Tahu Telur ini adalah menu praktis dan ekonomis, yang bahannya hampir pasti selalu ada di dapur kalian yang doyan masak. Cocok untuk disantap bersama anak maupun keluarga, dan pastinya sehat dan bergizi. Jangan lupa disajikan dengan nasi putih hangat dan juga garlic oil supaya lebih mantap dan bikin nambah!

Resep Oseng Tahu Telur

Bahan:
400 gr tahu putih
4 butir telur
3-4 cabai rawit, iris
3 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm garlic oil (link: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4)
4 ½ sdm kecap manis
4 sdm minyak

Langkah:
1. Potong dadu tahu, masukkan dalam wadah
2. Kocok lepas telur, tuang ke dalam tahu
3. Panaskan minyak, tuang tahu. Masak hingga luarnya kecokelatan
4. Masukkan cabai rawit
5. Bumbui dengan garlic oil, kecap asin, dan kecap manis
6. Masak hingga bumbu meresap
7. Oseng Tahu Telur siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Don't Fry 'Em! Simply Add 5 Eggs. Addictive Eggs and Tofu Stir Fry Recipe

Don't Fry 'Em! Simply Add 5 Eggs. This Eggs and Tofu Stir Fry recipe is a practical and budget-friendly food. The ingredients are almost always available in any home-chef's kitchen. This dish can be enjoyed with kids and the entire family as it is healthy and nutritious. Don't forget to serve it with warm rice and Garlic Oil to add a punch to its flavor and make you want more!

Eggs and Tofu Stir Fry Recipe

Ingredients:
400 g white tofu
4 eggs
3-4 sliced bird's eye chili
3 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp Garlic Oil (link: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4)
4.5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
4 tbsp cooking oil

Steps:
1. Dice the tofu and put them in a bowl.
2. Lightly beat the eggs and add to the tofu.
3. Heat some oil, put the eggs and tofu in. Cook until browned.
4. Add the bird's eye chili.
5. Season with Garlic Oil, soy sauce, and sweet soy sauce.
6. Cook until all sauces are absorbed well.
7. Eggs and Tofu Stir Fry is ready to serve.

title: Boiled Shrimp with Sambal Recipe. A Fishy-Free Seafood Dish: Use Pineapple for a Refreshing Taste!
recipe_id:
Seafood paling mantap disantap dengan saus pelengkap, salah satunya sambal cocol. Kali ini aku mau share resep sambal cocol seafood menggunakan nanas segar yang banyak dihidangkan di restoran seafood. Perpaduan rasa pedas, asam, manis serta gurih memperlembut aroma seafood yang tajam. Cocok disantap dengan udang, ikan, cumi, kepiting, atau seafood lainnya.

Resep Sambal Cocol Seafood

Bahan:
200 gr udang
1 buah jahe, digeprek
1 batang daun bawang, potong 5 cm
150 ml Sambel Cap Ibu Jari
3 siung bawang putih halus
2 cm jahe parut, tambahkan sedikit air
3 sdm saus tomat
8 sdm nanas parut
2 pcs jeruk limau
Air es secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Rebus air lalu masukkan jahe geprek, gula, garam, dan daun bawang
2. Setelah daun bawang agak layu, masukkan udang, rebus selama 2-3 menit lalu angkat dan celup di air es sebentar
3. Untuk sambal, campur Sambel Cap Ibu Jari, bawang putih halus, air jahe parut, saus tomat, nanas parut, dan air jeruk limau. Aduk rata
4. Udang siap disajikan dengan sambal cocol

recipe_en:
Pineapple Makes it Fresh! Non-Fishy Seafood Sambal Recipe a la Restaurant

Seafood is best consumed with an accompanying sauce like a dipping sauce. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for a dipping Sambal for seafood using fresh pineapples just like the ones served in restaurants. The combination of the spicy, tart, sweet, and umami flavor will abate the seafood's sharp fragrance. It's great for shrimp, fish, squid, crab, and other seafood.

Seafood Dipping Sambal Recipe

Ingredients:
200 g shrimp
1 pc ginger, pounded
1 stalk leeks, cut in 2" increments
150 ml Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce
3 clove garlic, grated
1 inch grated ginger, add a bit of water
3 tbsp tomato sauce
8 tbsp grated pineapple
2 pc lime
Ice water as needed

Steps:
1. Boil the water and add pounded ginger, sugar, salt, and leeks.
2. After the leeks wilt, add the shrimp and boil for 2-3 minutes. Drain and dip in the ice bath for a bit.
3. For the Sambal, combine the Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce, grated garlic, ginger liquid, tomato sauce, grated pineapple, and lime juice. Mix well.
4. The boiled shrimp is ready to serve with the dipping Sambal.

title: Kari Gurih: Resep Egg Korma Gulai Telur Istimewa (Khas India)
recipe_id:
MENU BUKA PUASA. Egg Korma atau Gulai Telur merupakan salah satu masakan India dengan ciri khas bumbu kari yang berempah dan bercita rasa gurih. Kali ini aku mau share resep Egg Korma versi aku. Sangat sederhana dalam memasak kari yang enak untuk keluarga di rumah.

Resep Egg Korma

Bahan untuk bumbu halus:
6 siung bawang putih
10 siung bawang merah
2 cm jahe
1 ruas kunyit
3 butir kemiri
3 cabai merah keriting
½ sdt ketumbar
½ sdt jinten
½ kapulaga bubuk
½ sdt kayu manis bubuk
5 buah cengkih
Minyak goreng secukupnya
Gula, garam, lada, penyedap / kaldu jamur sesuai selera

Bahan lain:
6 butir telur
240 ml air / kaldu
50 ml santan / almond milk / greek yoghurt
Air es secukupnya

Garnish:
5 siung bawang merah (untuk bawang goreng)
3 buah lobak merah, iris tipis
50 gr kacang mede, cincang kasar
Daun ketumbar secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Blender bumbu halus dan rempah menggunakan minyak, kecuali cengkih
2. Buat bawang goreng. Iris tipis bawang merah. Panaskan minyak, goreng bawang di api sedang hingga kekuningan lalu angkat
3. Panaskan minyak. Tumis bumbu halus hingga harum dan berubah warna kecokelatan
4. Tambahkan air, lalu masukkan cengkih
5. Masukkan santan sedikit demi sedikit (tingkat kekentalan sesuai selera)
6. Bumbui dengan gula, garam, lada, dan penyedap / kaldu jamur
7. Didihkan air, rebus telur selama 5 ½ menit
8. Setelah 5½ menit, langsung angkat telur dan masukkan ke dalam air es. Diamkan sebentar hingga suhu telur menurun, lalu kupas telur
9. Siapkan nasi hangat, letakkan telur diatasnya lalu siram dengan kuah gulai
10. Garnish dengan bawang goreng, lobak merah, kacang mede, dan daun ketumbar
11. Egg Korma siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Savory Curry: Egg Korma Special Egg Curry Recipe (Indian-style)

IFTAR MENU. Egg Korma or Egg Curry is an Indian dish with a curry sauce that's full of spices and savory flavors. This time, I'm sharing my version of Egg Korma. It's a very simple curry dish to cook for your family at home.

Egg Korma Recipe

Spice Blend ingredients:
6 clove garlic
10 pc shallots
2 cm ginger
2 cm turmeric
3 pc candlenuts
3 pc curly red chili
1/2 tsp coriander
1/2 tsp cumin
1/2 tsp cardamom powder
1/2 tsp cinnamon powder
5 pc cloves
Oil, as needed
Sugar, salt, pepper, flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder, to taste

Other ingredients:
6 pc eggs
240 ml water / broth
50 ml coconut milk / almond milk / Greek Yogurt
Cold water, as needed

Garnish:
5 pc shallots (for fried shallots)
3 pc red radish, slice thinly
50 g cashews, roughly chopped
Coriander leaves, as needed

Steps:
1. Blend the spices with oil but the cloves.
2. Make the fried shallots. Slice the shallots thinly. Heat some oil and fry the shallots on medium heat until golden.
3. Heat the oil. Sauté the spice blend until fragrant and browns.
4. Add some water, then add the cloves.
5. Add the coconut oil bit by bit. Adjust the thickness to your liking.
6. Season with sugar, salt, pepper, and flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder.
7. Boil some water and boil the eggs for 5.5 minutes.
8. After 5.5 minutes, remove the eggs and dunk them into the ice bath.
9. Prepare a plate of warm rice. Place the eggs on top and pour the curry sauce.
10. Garnish with fried shallots, red radish, cashew, and coriander leaves.
11. Egg Korma is ready to serve.

title: Legendaris Sisca Soewitomo: Resep Bongko Pisang Feat. Firhan MasterChef Indonesia [Ngobrol Santai]

Sisca Soewitomo Legendary: Bongko Pisang Recipe Feat. Firhan MasterChef Indonesia [Relaxed Chat]

title: Pasti Nambah! Resep Nasi Daun Jeruk Feat. Ade MasterChef Indonesia [Ngobrol Santai]
recipe_en:
Lime Rice, Sambal Korek, and Popcorn Chicken Recipe

Lime Rice ingredients:
1 cup rice
10 pc Kaffir lime leaf
6 clove garlic
2 tbsp butter
10 ml oil
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder

Sambal Korek ingredients:
5 pc red bird’s eye chili
6 pc shallots
1 clove garlic
20 ml oil
½ tsp salt
½ tsp sugar
¼ tsp mushroom stock powder / MSG

Popcorn Chicken Ingredients:
250 g chicken thigh fillet
1 tbsp oil
1 tsp shallot powder
1 tsp garlic powder
½ tsp paprika powder
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
200 g flour
1 tsp shallot powder
1 tsp garlic powder
½ tsp paprika powder
½ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
250 ml water
250 ml oil

Steps:
1. For the Sambal, grind the shallots, garlic, bird’s eye chili, sugar, salt, and mushroom stock powder until smooth, then pour hot oil on it.
2. Slice the Kaffir lime leaves thinly. Remove the midrib.
3. Mince the garlic finely.
4. For the Lime Rice, heat some oil and sauté the garlic until fragrant. Then, add the lime leaves.
5. Remove from heat. Add the butter in and mix well.
6. Add the rice in. Add the mushroom stock powder and mix well.
7. For the Popcorn Chicken, chop the chicken into small pieces and transfer to a bowl.
8. Add the oil, shallots powder, paprika powder, salt, and pepper. Let it rest for 15 minutes.
9. For the batter, combine the flour with shallots powder, garlic powder, paprika powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
10. Add the chicken to the batter and strain.
11. Dip them into a bowl containing water. Remove and dip into the batter once more.
12. Heat some oil. Fry the chicken until golden brown.
13. Assemble the Lime Rice, Popcorn Chicken, and Sambal Korek in a bowl.

title: Pastel Recipe for Sahur Menu Cover Feat. Firhan, MasterChef Indonesia [Casual Chat]
recipe_en:
Pastel Tutup Recipe, Suhoor Menu Feat. Firhan MasterChef Indonesia [Relaxed Chat]

SUHOOR MENU Pastel Tutup Recipe by MasterChef Firhan: easy to make and DELICIOUS! This is a Halal dish, suitable for adults and kids. Other than the positive reviews from the three judges, this menu led Firhan to win the “Stop and Go Challenge” at Gallery 6 on January 18, 2020.

Pastel Tutup Recipe

Ingredients:
750 g potato, steamed
¼ tsp nutmeg powder
¼ tsp pepper
100 g cheddar cheese
50 ml milk
80 g butter
200 g ground beef
1 pc onion
4 clove garlic
1 pc carrot
1 pc corn
1 pc green onion
¼ tsp nutmeg powder
½ tsp mushroom stock powder
Sugar, to taste
20 ml oil
Parsley, as needed
1 pc egg yolk

Steps:
1. Chop the garlic and onion.
2. Slice the white part of the green onion thinly.
3. Shell the corn and brunoise the carrot.
4. Heat some oil and sauté the onion and garlic until fragrant.
5. Add the beef and nutmeg in.
6. Add the corn and carrot in. Cook until they’re done.
7. Add some water and season with sugar, salt, and pepper.
8. Add the green onion in. Stir well.
9. Mash the potatoes. Add butter, milk, salt, nutmeg powder, and ⅓ of the grated cheddar cheese in. Mix well.
10. Place ½ of the potato mix in a heatproof pan. Level the surface.
11. Add the sautéd vegetables and even it out. Add some grated cheese on top.
12. Add the rest of the potato and level the surface. Brush with the egg wash and sprinkle with grated cheese.
13. Bake at 180°C for 15 minutes, then raise the temperature to 200°C and bake again for 15 minutes.
14. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with some chopped parsley.
15. Pastel Tutup is ready to serve.

title: Dihukum Push-up Chef Arnold, Malah Jadi Pemenang: Feat. Eric MasterChef Indonesia
MasterChef Indonesia Season 6 Winner's Recipe: Lamb Noodles! [Feat. Eric Herjanto]
recipe_id:
Eric Herjanto, the winner of MasterChef Indonesia, berbagi resep bakmi yang mengantarkannya menjadi juara: “Xi'An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles.” Biang Biang Noodles adalah salah satu hidangan utama di kota Xi'An yang biasanya dimasak menggunakan daging kambing/sapi karena mayoritas penduduk di sana adalah umat Muslim. Mie Biang Biang sendiri juga merupakan salah satu masakan khas Tiongkok bagian utara, provinsi Shaanxi. 

Resep Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles

Bahan Bakmi:
(1-2 porsi)
1 cup tepung protein tinggi
1 butir telur utuh
2 butir kuning telur
Garam secukupnya

Bahan lainnya:
2 batang daun bawang bagian putih
1 cabai merah, iris
3 bawang putih, cincang
1 lembar kol, iris
2 lembar jamur kuping, iris
Cabai bubuk sesuai selera
150 gr paha domba, iris
1-2 porsi bakmi
2 sdm saus tiram
2 sdm cuka hitam
2 sdt minyak wijen
2 sdt ketumbar, sangrai, tumbuk
1 sdm jinten, sangrai, tumbuk
Minyak goreng untuk menumis
Garam, gula, penyedap sesuai selera
Tambahan daun bawang dan wijen untuk garnish

Langkah membuat Bakmi:
1. Campur semua bahan, uleni sampai benar-benar kalis
2. Diamkan selama 1-2 jam (resting)
3. Pipihkan dan cetak mie sesuai selera

Langkah membuat Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles:
1. Campur daging domba dengan ketumbar dan jinten yang sudah dihaluskan
2. Rebus bakmi selama 3 menit, lalu tiriskan
3. Tumis daun bawang dan cabai hingga harum lalu masukkan bawang putih
4. Masukkan daging domba, tumis hingga matang
5. Masukkan jamur kuping dan cabai bubuk
6. Masukkan saus tiram, cuka hitam, dan minyak wijen
7. Bumbui dengan garam, gula, dan penyedap
8. Masukkan bakmi dan kol, aduk rata
9. Garnish dengan daun bawang dan wijen
10. Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles siap disajikan

recipe_en:
MasterChef Indonesia Winner's Recipe feat. Eric Herjanto

Eric Herjanto, the winner of MasterChef Indonesia, shares the noodle recipe that won him the MasterChef title: "Xi'an Biang Biang Lamb Noodles." Biang Biang Noodles is one of the main dishes in Xi'an city. It's usually cooked with lamb or beef as the majority of the population is Muslim. Biang Biang Noodles itself is one of the signature dishes of Shaanxi province in Northern China.

Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles Recipe

Noodles ingredients:
(yield 1-2 servings)
1 cup bread flour
1 pc egg
2 pc egg yolks
Salt, to taste

Other ingredients:
2 stalk green onions, the white part
1 pc red chili, sliced
3 clove garlic, minced
1 pc cabbage, sliced
2 pc wood ear mushroom, sliced
Chili powder, to taste
150 g lamb leg, sliced
1-2 serving noodle
2 tbsp oyster sauce
2 tbsp black vinegar
2 tbsp sesame oil
2 tsp coriander, toasted, grind
1 tsp cumin, toasted, grind
Oil for sautéing
Salt, sugar, flavor enhancers, to taste
Additional green onions and sesame seeds for garnish

Steps for making the Noodles:
1. Mix all the ingredients. Knead until elastic.
2. Rest for 1-2 hours.
3. Flatten and cut the noodles to your preference.

Steps for making Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles:
1. Mix the lamb with ground coriander and cumin.
2. Boil the noodles for 3 minutes. Set aside.
3. Sauté the green onions and chili until fragrant. Add the garlic in.
4. Add the lamb and sauté until it's cooked.
5. Add the wood ear mushroom and chili powder.
6. Add the oyster sauce, black vinegar, and sesame oil.
7. Season with salt, sugar, and flavor enhancer.
8. Add the noodle and cabbage. Mix well.
9. Garnish with the scallions and sesame seeds.
10. Xi’An Biang Biang Lamb Noodles is ready to serve.

title: Top Ala Restoran: Resep Saus Padang Untuk Cumi Dan Seafood Lainnya
recipe_id:
Cumi Saus Padang menjadi salah satu menu favorit yang banyak dipesan orang saat makan di restoran seafood. Kali ini aku mau share resep Cumi Saus Padang versi aku dengan cita rasa pedas, asam, dan kaya akan bumbu. Selain cumi, saus padang ini juga cocok dipadukan dengan udang, kepiting, kerang, ikan, dan seafood lainnya. Di video ini aku juga kasih tips membersihkan cumi segar yang benar.

Resep Cumi Saus Padang

Bahan bumbu halus:
7 siung bawang merah
4 siung bawang putih
6 cabai keriting
2 sdm minyak goreng

Bahan lainnya:
750 gr cumi segar
½ sdt garam
1 sdm baking soda
1 batang serai, geprek
3 daun jeruk
1 buah jahe, geprek
2 sdm saus tomat
2 sdm Sambel Cap Ibu Jari
2 sdm saus tiram
100 ml air
2 sdm air asam jawa
1 cabai merah, iris
1 batang daun bawang, iris
1 buah bawang bombai, iris
1 sdt garam
1 sdt gula
½ sdt merica

Langkah:
1. Pisahkan kepala dan badan cumi, buang kotoran dan tulangnya. Cuci bersih, lalu potong 1-2 cm tergantung ukuran cumi
2. Rendam cumi dengan baking soda, garam, dan air selama 15-20 menit
3. Buang air rendaman dan cuci bersih cumi kemudian saring
4. Siapkan bumbu halus, blender cabai keriting, bawang merah, bawang putih, dan minyak hingga halus
5. Tumis bumbu halus masukkan bawang bombai, cabai merah, serai geprek (ikat), daun jeruk, dan jahe geprek
6. Tambahkan air, saus tomat, saus tiram, air asam jawa, dan Sambel Cap Ibu Jari. Aduk rata
7. Di pan berbeda, goreng cumi sebentar. Pastikan minyak benar-benar panas
8. Masukkan cumi ke saus, lalu bumbui dengan garam, gula, dan merica
9. Tambahkan daun bawang, masak sebentar
10. Cumi Saus Padang siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Best Restaurant-Quality Dish: Padang Sauce Recipe for Squid and Other Seafood

Squid with Padang Sauce is one of the most popular menus in a seafood restaurant. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for my version of Squid with Padang Sauce with a spicy and tart flavor that's rich in spices. Other than squid, Padang Sauce is also compatible with shrimp, crabs, clams, fish, and other types of seafood. In this video, I'm also sharing several tips on the correct way of cleaning fresh squid.

Squid with Padang Sauce Recipe

Spice blend ingredients:
7 shallots
4 garlic
6 curly chili
2 tbsp cooking oil

Other ingredients:
750 g fresh squid
1/2 tsp salt
1 tbsp baking soda
1 stalk lemongrass, pounded
3 Kaffir lime leaves
1 ginger, pounded
2 tbsp tomato sauce
2 tbsp Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce
2 tbsp oyster sauce
100 ml water
2 tbsp tamarind water
1 chili, sliced
1 leeks, sliced
1 onion, sliced
1 tsp salt
1 tsp sugar
1/2 tsp pepper

Steps:
1. Detach the squid's head from the body. Remove all the dirt and cuttlebones. Rinse well and cut into 1-2 cm increments, depending on the size.
2. Soak the squid with baking soda, salt, and water for 15-20 minutes.
3. Remove the soaking liquid, rinse well, and drain the squid.
4. Prepare the spice blend. Combine the curly chili, shallots, garlic, and blend with the cooking oil until it becomes a paste.
5. Sauté the spice blend. Add onion, chili, pounded lemongrass that's been tied into a knot, Kaffir lime leaves, and pounded ginger.
6. Add in the water, tomato sauce, oyster sauce, tamarind water, and Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce. Mix well.
7. In a different pan, flash fry the squid. Make sure the oil is hot.
8. Add the squid into the sauce. Season with salt, sugar, and pepper.
9. Add in the leeks and cook for a bit.
10. Squid with Padang Sauce is ready to serve.

title: Resep Kari Ayam Mentega Ala Resto: Khas India.
recipe_id:
Butter Chicken merupakan salah satu kari paling populer di restoran India. Ciri khas masakan ini banyak memakai bumbu rempah-rempah. Potongan ayam yang dimarinasi ditambah saus kari krim yang kental membuat Butter Chicken semakin lezat. Salah satu menu yang wajib dicoba!

Resep Butter Chicken

Bahan marinasi:
400 gr ayam paha fillet, potong 2-3 cm
2 siung bawang putih, parut
80 ml santan
2 cm jahe, parut
1 sdt paprika bubuk
2 sdt kunyit bubuk
1 sdt garam
½ sdt lada

Bahan kuah:
3 sdm ghee / clarified butter
1 buah bawang bombai
1 buah tomat
2 siung bawang putih
2 cm jahe
3 sdm pasta tomat
100 ml santan
300 ml air
1/2 sdt ketumbar
1/2 sdt jinten
1/2 sdt kapulaga
1/4 sdt kayu manis
1/4 sdt pala
2 cengkih
1 bunga lawang
1 bay leaf / daun salam
1/4 sdt fenugreek
Garam, gula, penyedap sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Campurkan ayam dengan bahan marinasi dan diamkan minimal 15 menit
2. Pan seared ayam yang sudah dimarinasi dengan api besar hingga ½ matang. Sisihkan
3. Gunakan pan yang sama. Tumis bawang bombai, bawang putih geprek, dan jahe parut
4. Masukkan ghee / clarified butter
5. Setelah agak layu masukkan tomat
6. Tambahkan ketumbar, kapulaga, jinten, fenugreek, pala, dan kayu manis
7. Tumis hingga layu, lalu tambahkan air dan pasta tomat. Masak hingga mendidih
6. Blender bumbu yang sudah dimasak. Setelah halus, masak kembali
7. Masukkan ayam
8. Masukkan daun salam, bunga lawang, dan cengkih
9. Bumbui dengan garam dan gula
10. Masukkan santan sedikit demi sedikit. Masak hingga kuah mengental dan ayam matang
11. Butter Chicken siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Indian Signature Dish: Butter Chicken Curry a la Restaurant Recipe

Butter Chicken is one of the most popular curries in Indian restaurants. The characteristic of this dish is the many spices it uses. Marinated chicken chunks plus creamy curry sauce make Butter Chicken even more delicious. This is really a must-try!

Butter Chicken Recipe

Marinade ingredients:
400 g chicken thigh fillet, cut to about an inch
2 clove garlic, grated
80 ml coconut milk
1 inch ginger, grated
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp Ghee / clarified butter
1 pc onion
1 pc tomato
2 clove garlic
1 inch ginger
3 tbsp tomato paste
100 ml coconut milk
300 ml water
1/2 tsp coriander
1/2 tsp cumin
1/2 tsp cardamom
1/4 tsp cinnamon
1/4 tsp nutmeg
2 cloves
1 star anise
1 bay leaf
1/4 tsp fenugreek
Salt, sugar, flavor enhancers to taste

Steps:
1. Combine the chicken with the marinade and let it rest for at least 15 minutes.
2. Pan-sear the marinated chicken on high heat until half cooked. Set aside.
3. In the same pan, sauté the onion, pounded garlic, and grated ginger.
4. Add the Ghee / clarified butter.
5. After they wilt, add in the tomato.
6. Add the coriander, cardamom, cumin, fenugreek, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
7. Sauté until everything wilts, then add the water and tomato paste in. Bring to a boil.
8. Blend the sautéed spices. After blending, cook the spice mix once more.
9. Add the chicken.
10. Add the bay leaf, star anise, and cloves.
11. Season with salt and sugar.
12. Add the coconut milk bit by bit. Cook until the sauce thickens and the chicken is well-cooked.
11. Butter Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Crispy, Savory, ANTI-TEARING: Risol Mayo Recipes That All Ages Love
recipe_id:
Risoles merupakan salah satu camilan yang banyak digemari semua kalangan, mulai dari anak-anak sampai dewasa. Kali ini aku mau share resep variasi dari risoles yaitu Risol Udang Mayo dengan cita rasa gurih. Di video ini aku juga kasih tips membuat kulit risoles yang lembut dan anti sobek. Cocok dihidangkan untuk sarapan pagi atau camilan saat bersantai.

Resep Risol Udang Mayo

Bahan saus isian:
12 sdm mayonnaise
5 sdm kental manis
3 sdm Sambel Cap Ibu Jari
½ sdt garam
½ sdt lada

Bahan kulit risol:
125 gr tepung terigu
50 ml air
200 ml susu
1 sdt garam
1 pcs telur

Bahan lainnya:
200 gr udang kupas, belah dua
3 pcs telur rebus, potong menjadi 6 bagian
500 gr tepung panir
2 pcs telur

Langkah:
1. Untuk adonan kulit risol, campur tepung terigu, telur, garam, air, dan susu. Aduk rata sampai tidak ada gumpalan
2. Siapkan pan untuk membuat kulit risol, panaskan pan lalu celupkan ke adonan, biarkan hingga matang (jangan sampai kering), lalu angkat. Lakukan berulang hingga adonan habis
3. Untuk saus isian, campurkan mayonnaise, kental manis, Sambel Cap Ibu Jari, garam dan lada. Aduk rata
4. Cuci udang kupas, lalu belah dua
5. Siapkan telur, kocok lepas
6. Ambil kulit risol, isi dengan saus campuran yang sudah dibuat, udang, dan telur rebus, kemudian gulung
7. Gulingkan risol ke telur, lalu ke tepung roti hingga merata
8. Siapkan pan dengan minyak panas, goreng hingga kuning keemasan
9. Risol Udang Mayo siap disajikan
