recipe_en:
Crispy, Melted, TEAR-PROOF: Shrimp Mayo Rissole Recipe

Rissole is one of the most popular snacks that is loved by everyone, starting from kids to adults. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for a variation of Rissole, called Shrimp Mayo Rissole that has a savory flavor profile. In this video, I'm also sharing various tips to make soft, tear-proof Rissole skin. This dish is great for breakfast or snacks.

Shrimp Mayo Rissole Recipe

Filling ingredients:
12 tbsp mayonnaise
5 tbsp condensed milk
3 tbsp Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce
1/2 tsp salt
1/2 tsp pepper

Rissole Skin ingredients:
125 g all-purpose flour
50 ml water
200 ml milk
1 tsp salt
1 egg

Other ingredients:
200 g peeled shrimp, halved
3 boiled eggs, sliced to 6 pieces
500 g breadcrumbs
2 eggs

Steps:
1. For the Rissole skin, combine the flour, egg, salt, water, and milk. Mix well until it's free of lumps.
2. Prepare a pan to make the skin. Heat the pan and dip into the batter. Let the skin cook (not until it's dry) and remove from heat. Repeat until the batter is all cooked.
3. For the filling, combine mayonnaise, condensed milk, Cap Ibu Jari chili sauce, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Rinse the peeled shrimp and halve.
5. Prepare the egg. Lightly whisk.
6. Take the Rissole skin and fill with the mayo fillings, shrimp, and boiled egg. Fold.
7. Dip the Rissole into the egg and coat with breadcrumbs evenly.
8. Prepare a pan with hot oil and fry until golden brown.
9. Shrimp Mayo Rissole is ready to serve.

title: Resep Tim Ayam Cincang Telur Asin: Khas Hong Kong.
recipe_id:
Telur Mata Ayam ini cocok untuk kamu yang bosan dengan hidangan yang bersantan atau berminyak. Telur Mata Ayam sangat praktis dibuat dengan bahan-bahan yang simple dan mudah didapat. Rasanya enak dengan tekstur lembut dari ayam dan crunchy dari bengkuang. Bisa disajikan untuk semua anggota keluarga di rumah, dari anak-anak sampai dewasa.

Resep Telur Mata Ayam

Bahan:
500 gr ayam paha fillet
2 siung bawang putih
1 buah bengkuang
4 lembar smoked chicken
1 butir putih telur
2 sdm tepung sagu
1 sdm kecap ikan
6 sdm air
3 sdm minyak goreng
2 butir kuning telur asin mentah
¾ sdt garam
¼ sdt merica
3 sdt gula
½ sdt kaldu jamur
Garam untuk bengkuang sesuai selera

Optional:
Air jahe
Minyak wijen

Langkah:
1. Potong kotak-kotak kecil smoked chicken
2. Kupas bengkuang dan potong-potong dadu kecil, masukkan ke dalam wadah. Tambahkan garam, remas-remas bengkuang hingga keluar cairan berwarna putih. Cuci bersih bengkuang, saring, dan tiriskan.
3. Cincang kasar ayam lalu masukkan parutan bawang putih, bengkuang, smoked chicken, kecap ikan, tepung sagu, garam, merica, gula, kaldu jamur, putih telur, air dan minyak. Aduk rata
4. Masukkan adonan ke dalam aluminium cup lalu beri lubang ditengahnya, letakkan kuning telur asin mentah di atasnya
5. Kukus selama 15-20 menit
6. Telur Mata Ayam siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Steamed Minced Chicken with Salted Egg Recipe: Hong Kong Style.

This Chicken-Side-Up is great if you’re bored with oily dishes or dishes that contain coconut milk. This dish is very practical to make with simple and easy-to-find ingredients. It tastes great with soft chicken and crunchy jicama textures. You can serve this for your family at home, from kids to adults.

Chicken-Side-Up Recipe

Ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
2 clove garlic
1 pc jicama
4 pc smoked chicken
1 pc egg whites
2 tbsp sago flour
1 tbsp fish sauce
6 tbsp water
3 tbsp oil
2 pc raw salted egg yolk
¾ tsp salt
¼ tsp pepper
3 tsp sugar
½ tsp mushroom stock powder
Salt for the jicama, to taste

Optional:
Ginger liquid
Sesame oil

Steps:
1. Chop the smoked chicken into small dice.
2. Peel the jicama and chop into small dice. Transfer to a bowl. Add some salt and massage the jicama until some white liquid is released. Rince the jicama thoroughly, drain, and set aside.
3. Roughly mince the chicken and add grated garlic, jicama, smoked chicken, fish sauce, sago flour, salt, pepper, sugar, mushroom stock powder, egg whites, water, and oil. Mix well.
4. Add the dough into an aluminum cup. Create a crater at the center and place the salted egg yolk on top.
5. Steam for 15-20 minutes.
6. Chicken-Side-Up is ready to serve.

title: Delicious Spicy Woku Chicken Recipe: Typical of Manado.
recipe_id:
Ayam Woku merupakan masakan khas Manado, Sulawesi Utara. Ciri khas bumbu kuning pedas dan bahan-bahan aromatik seperti daun jeruk, daun kemangi, daun pandan, dan serai manambah cita rasa dan aroma yang khas. Cocok untuk jadi variasi masakan sehari-hari kamu.

Resep Ayam Woku

Bahan bumbu:
3-4 batang serai, iris
5 siung bawang putih
12 siung bawang merah
3 cm jahe, iris
5 cm kunyit, iris
4 cabai merah, iris
6 cabai rawit
2 buah kemiri

Bahan lainnya:
1 ekor ayam negeri, potong menjadi 12-14 bagian
2 batang serai, geprek
15 daun jeruk
1-2 buah tomat, iris
3 daun pandan, iris
1 lembar daun kunyit (opsional)
4-5 batang daun bawang, iris
250 gr daun kemangi
400 ml air
1 jeruk nipis (ukuran kecil)
Gula, garam, lada, penyedap / kaldu jamur sesuai selera
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Cincang halus (bertekstur) bumbu menggunakan food processor
2. Panaskan pan, masukkan minyak
3. Tumis bumbu, daun jeruk, dan serai geprek samapi matang dan benar-benar harum 
4. Masukkan tomat, aduk sampai layu
5. Masukkan ayam, aduk rata
6. Tambahkan air. Bumbui dengan gula, garam, lada, dan penyedap / kaldu jamur
7. Masukkan daun pandan, masak hingga bumbu meresap dan ayam matang
8. Masukkan daun bawang, daun kemangi, dan perasan jeruk nipis. Aduk hingga semua tercampur rata
9. Ayam woku siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Manadonese Food: Spicy Woku Chicken Recipe

Woku Chicken is a signature dish from Manado, North Sulawesi. The characteristic of this dish is its spicy yellow broth with aromatics, such as Kaffir lime leaves, lemon basil, Pandan leaves, and lemongrass, which give the dish its distinct flavor and aroma. This dish is great to spice up your daily diet.

Woku Chicken Recipe

Spice blend:
3-4 stalk lemongrass, sliced
5 clove garlic
12 shallots
1 inch ginger, sliced
2 inch turmeric, sliced
4 pc red chili, sliced
6 pc bird's eye chili
2 pc candlenuts

Other ingredients:
1 whole broiler chicken, chop into 12-14 pieces
2 stalk lemongrass, pounded
15 pc Kaffir lime leaves
1 pc turmeric leaves (optional) 
1-2 pc tomatoes, sliced
3 pc Pandan leaves, sliced
4-5 pc leeks, sliced
250 g lemon basil
400 ml water
1 small Key lime
Sugar, salt, pepper, flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder, to taste
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Finely chop the spices with a food processor until the texture is a bit chunky.
2. Heat the pan and add the oil.
3. Sauté the spice blend, Kaffir lime leaves, and pounded lemongrass until cooked and fragrant.
4. Add in the tomatoes, cook until they wilt.
5. Add in the chicken. Stir.
6. Add the water. Season with sugar, salt, pepper, and flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder.
7. Add the Pandan leaves. Cook until the broth is reduced and the chicken is done.
8. Add in the leeks, lemon basil, and lime juice. Mix well.
9. Woku Chicken is ready to serve.

title: Milk, Pandan & Milo Flavor Mochi Recipe [Local Ingredients Japanese Flavor]
recipe_id:
Milk Mochi merupakan kue khas Jepang yang terbuat dari tepung ketan. Sedikit berbeda, resep kali ini aku mau buat Milk Mochi tanpa isian dengan 3 varian rasa, original (susu), pandan, dan milo yang dicoating dengan kacang halus dan milo bubuk. Teksturnya yang lembut dan kenyal, cocok jadi camilan saat bersantai.

Resep Milk Mochi

Bahan adonan Mochi:
150 gr tepung beras ketan
225 ml susu
25 gr gula pasir
1 sdt garam
25 ml minyak goreng
50 gr milo bubuk
½ sdt pandan essence

Bahan coating:
100 gr kacang tanah, dipanggang / disangrai hingga cokelat
25 gr gula pasir

Langkah:
1. Campur tepung beras ketan, susu, gula, garam dan minyak dalam wadah, aduk rata
2. Kukus adonan selama kurang lebih 20-25 menit
3. Sementara adonan dikukus, haluskan kacang tanah sangrai dan gula pasir menggunakan blender
4. Angkat adonan yang sudah dikukus, bentuk bulat menggunakan dua sendok selagi adonan masih hangat. Lalu masukkan ke dalam kacang halus dan milo bubuk hingga tercampur rata
5. Milk Mochi siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Japanese Mochi, Local Ingredients: Mochi Recipe in Milk, Pandan, and Milo Flavors

Milk Mochi is a Japanese snack made of glutinous rice flour. This recipe is a bit different as I'm making a Milk Mochi without filling in 3 different flavors: Original (Milk), Pandan, and Milo, coated with ground peanuts and Milo powder. The soft and bouncy texture makes this snack suitable for a relaxing time.

Milk Mochi Recipe

Mochi Dough ingredients:
150 g glutinous rice flour
225 ml milk
25 g sugar
1 tsp salt
25 ml oil
50 g Milo powder
1/2 tsp Pandan essence

Coating ingredients:
100 g peanuts, baked / roasted until browned
25 g sugar

Steps:
1. Combine the glutinous rice powder, milk, sugar, salt, and oil in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Steam the dough for about 20-25 minutes.
3. As the dough is being cooked, grind the roasted peanuts and sugar with a blender.
4. Set aside the steamed dough. Shape into balls using two spoons while the dough is still warm and coat with the ground peanuts and Milo Powder until the mochi is evenly coated.
5. Milk Mochi is ready to serve.

title: Anti-Bitter Fragrance! Garlic Oil Recipe Without Long-Lasting Preservatives.
recipe_id:
Garlic Oil atau Minyak Bawang Putih biasanya digunakan sebagai bahan campuran masakan. Bisa dicampur dengan sup, tumisan, nasi goreng, pasta, bakmi, bahkan untuk aneka chinese food. Tentunya lebih praktis, menambah aroma dan cita rasa masakan. Garlic Oil ini bisa tahan sampai dengan 4 minggu di suhu ruangan. 

Resep Garlic Oil

Bahan:
8 siung bawang putih, cincang halus
2 cm jahe, parut
100 ml minyak goreng
Garam sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Panaskan minyak di api kecil
2. Masukkan bawang putih & jahe, masak hingga kekuningan tapi tidak gosong
3. Tambahkan sedikit garam
4. Simpan di toples yang bersih dan kering agar Garlic Oil tetap awet
recipe_en:
Bitterless, Aromatic! Garlic Oil Recipe without Preservative

Garlic Oil is commonly used for as a mixture of cooking ingredients. Added on soup, stir-fried, fried rice, pasta, noodles, even for various Chinese food. A simple way to enhance aroma and flavor. Garlic Oil can hold up to 4 weeks at room temperature.

Garlic Oil Recipe

Ingredients:
8 cloves garlic, finely chopped
2 cm ginger, grated
100ml cooking oil
Salt, own's preferences

Steps:
1. Heat oil on low heat
2. Add garlic & ginger, cook until turns yellow not burnt
3. Add a pinch of salt
4. Store in a clean and dry jar so that Garlic Oil can last longer

title: Praktis Dengan Teflon: Resep Ayam Panggang Madu Ala Restoran [Charsiu]
recipe_id:
Ayam Panggang Madu atau yang biasa dikenal dengan Ayam Charsiu identik dengan citarasa oriental karena menggunakan bahan-bahan seperti angciu, bubuk ngohiong, dan minyak wijen. Kali ini aku mau share resep masakan ala restoran chinese, Ayam Panggang Madu yang berwarna merah. Di sini aku menggunakan angkak untuk menghasilkan warna merah dan menambah aroma pada masakan. Cocok banget sebagai menu spesial bersama keluarga untuk merayakan Imlek.

Resep Garlic Oil: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4

Resep Ayam Panggang Madu

Bahan: 
500 gr paha ayam fillet
10 siung bawang putih
2 cm jahe
2 sdt bubuk ngohiong
1 sdm kecap manis
1 sdm saus tiram
1 sdt minyak wijen
2 sdm angciu
2 sdm madu
1 sdm angkak

Lainnya:
Minyak goreng secukupnya
Air secukupnya
Tepung maizena secukupnya
Gula, garam, dan penyedap / kaldu jamur sesuai selera
Garlic oil 
Daun ketumbar (untuk garnish)

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bawang putih dan jahe, saring ampasnya
2. Masukkan kembali air perasan bawang putih dan jahe ke blender, bersamaan dengan angkak, madu, angciu, saus tiram, kecap manis, dan bubuk ngohiong, lalu haluskan
3. Campurkan bumbu halus dengan ayam, marinasi selama 3-8 jam
4. Tiriskan ayam dari bumbu marinasi atau keringkan menggunakan paper towel, lalu olesi dengan minyak
5. Panggang ayam di oven dengan suhu 210 derajat selama 7 menit, lalu olesi dengan bumbu marinasi, panggang kembali selama 5 menit
6. Atau panggang menggunakan teflon. Panaskan teflon di api sedang. Masukkan sedikit minyak. Panggang ayam hingga luarnya kering, dalamnya matang dan tidak gosong
7. Buat sausnya. Panaskan pan, masukkan air dan bumbu marinasinya, masak hingga mendidih. Bumbui dengan gula, garam, dan penyedap / kaldu jamur. Tambahkan larutan maizena sedikit demi sedikit hingga saus mengental
8. Sajikan Ayam Panggang Madu dengan nasi putih, saus marinasi, dan garlic oil
recipe_en:
Easy with Teflon: Honey Roasted Chicken a la Restaurant Recipe

Honey Roasted Chicken a.k.a. Char Siu Chicken is known for its oriental flavors as it uses ingredients like red yeast rice, five-spice, and sesame oil. This time, I'm sharing a Chinese-style dish, the red Honey Roasted Chicken. Here, I'm using red yeast rice to reproduce the red color and to add some aroma to the dish. This special dish is great to be enjoyed for Chinese New Year with your family.

Garlic Oil Recipe: https://youtu.be/1WZF2s-7D_4

Honey Roasted Chicken Recipe

Ingredients:
500 g chicken thigh fillet
10 clove garlic
1 inch ginger
2 tsp five-spice powder
1 tbsp sweet soy sauce
1 tbsp oyster sauce
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tbsp Chinese cooking wine
2 tbsp honey
1 tbsp red yeast rice

Others:
Cooking oil as needed
Water as needed
Cornstarch as needed
Sugar, salt, and flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder to taste
Garlic Oil
Coriander leaves (for garnish)

Steps:
1. Blend the garlic and ginger, strain the residue.
2. Add the garlic and ginger liquid back to the blender with red yeast rice, honey, cooking wine, oyster sauce, and five-spice powder. Blend.
3. Add the marinating liquid to the chicken. Marinate for 3 - 8 hours.
4. Drain the chicken from the marinating liquid or pat dry with a paper towel. Rub with oil.
5. Roast the chicken in the oven at 210°C for about 7 minutes, then rub with the marinating liquid and roast it again for 5 minutes.
6. If using Teflon, heat the pan on medium heat. Add a bit of oil and pan-sear the chicken until the surface is dry and it's cooked inside without burning.
7. To make the sauce, heat the pan. Add some water and the marinating liquid. Bring to a boil. Season with sugar, salt, and flavor enhancers / mushroom stock powder. Add the cornstarch mix bit by bit until the sauce thickens.
8. Serve Honey Roasted Chicken with rice, the marinating sauce, and Garlic Oil.

title: Spesial, Empuk, Lembut. Resep Nastar Terenak Turunan Keluarga! [100% Sukses, Lumer Di Mulut]
recipe_id:
Resep Nastar

Bahan adonan nastar:
250-280 gr tepung terigu all purpose / sedang (lihat konsistensi adonan pada video)
100 gr maizena
125 gr mentega wijsman
125 gr margarin
110 gr susu bubuk
110 gr gula halus
2 butir kuning telur
75 gr keju parut

Bahan selai nanas:
750 gr nanas parut
150 gr gula pasir
5 buah cengkih
1 sdm mentega wijsman
1 sdm margarin

Bahan olesan nastar:
3 butir kuning telur
2 sdm susu cair
1 sdm minyak goreng

Langkah:
1. Untuk isian. Masak nanas parut, cengkih, dan gula hingga airnya habis, tambahkan mentega dan margarin. Masak hingga mengental
2. Buat adonan nastar. Kocok mentega, margarin, dan gula halus, tambahkan kuning telur aduk rata
3. Masukkan tepung terigu, maizena, dan susu bubuk
4. Tambahkan keju parut. Aduk hingga semua bahan tercampur rata, lalu uleni
5. Ambil kurang lebih 5 gr adonan, pipihkan 
6. Isi dengan selai nanas, tutup lalu bentuk bulat
7. Panggang dengan suhu 140 derajat selama 30-35 menit menggunakan api atas bawah
8. Oles permukaan nastar dengan campuran kuning telur, susu cair, dan minyak
9. Panggang lagi selama 10-15 menit 
10. Nastar siap disajikan

Nastar biasanya menjadi hidangan camilan saat hari-hari besar, salah satunya perayaan tahun baru Imlek. Nama “Nastar” sendiri berasal dari bahasa Belanda, yakni ananas yang artinya nanas dan taart yang artinya kue tar. Kali ini aku mau share resep Nastar klasik menggunakan bahan-bahan PREMIUM yang tentunya membuat Nastar jadi lebih EMPUK dan LEMBUT.
recipe_en:
Pineapple Tarts Recipe

Tart Dough Ingredients:
250-280 g all-purpose flour
100 g cornstarch
125 g Wijsman butter
125 g margarine
110 g powdered milk
110 g powdered sugar
2 egg yolks
75 g grated cheese

Pineapple Jam Ingredients:
750 g grated pineapple
150 g sugar
5 cloves
1 tbsp Wijsman butter
1 tbsp margarine

Egg Wash Ingredients:
3 egg yolks
2 tbsp plain milk
1 tbsp cooking oil

Steps:
1. To make the filling, cook the grated pineapple, clove, and sugar until reduced. Add the butter and margarine, and cook until thickens.
2. For the tart dough, mix the butter, margarine, and powdered sugar. Add the egg yolks and mix well.
3. Add the flour, cornstarch, and powdered milk.
4. Add the grated cheese. Mix thoroughly and knead.
5. Take and flatten about 5 g of dough.
6. Fill with the pineapple jam, cover, and roll into a ball.
7. Bake at 140°C for 30 to 35 minutes.
8. Do the egg wash on the tart's surface with yolks, milk, and oil mix.
9. Bake once more for 10-15 minutes.
10. Pineapple Tarts are ready to serve.

Special, Decadent, Soft. The Best Pineapple Tarts Recipe Passed Down for Generations!

Pineapple Tarts are a snack you usually find served on special events like Chinese New Year. The name "Nastar" (Pineapple Tarts in Indonesian) is derived from Dutch's ananas, which means pineapple and tart, as in tart cakes. This time, I'm sharing a classic Pineapple Tarts recipe using PREMIUM ingredients that will make these tarts SOFTER and more DECADENT.

title: A Must-Have Savory Sambal Matah Recipe: A Balinese Specialty.
recipe_id:
Sambal Matah merupakan kuliner khas Bali yang disajikan sebagai pelengkap hidangan ayam goreng, ikan bakar, ataupun ayam bumbu betutu. "Matah" sendiri memiliki arti "mentah". Sambal Matah memang dibuat dari bahan-bahan mentah yang mengeluarkan aroma khas dari rempah-rempah, seperti serai dan daun jeruk. Kali ini aku mau share resep Sambal Matah versi aku.

Resep Sambal Matah 

Bahan:
6 lembar daun jeruk (ukuran besar)
10-20 cabai rawit
25 bawang merah
2 bawang putih
7 gr terasi
2 batang serai
1,5 sdt kaldu jamur / kaldu ayam / micin
50 ml minyak kelapa
½ sdt garam
1,5 sdt gula
1,5 iris jeruk nipis / jeruk purut / jeruk limau

Langkah:
1. Potong kecil-kecil serai, daun jeruk, cabai rawit, bawang merah, bawang putih, dan terasi
2. Panaskan minyak kelapa
3. Masukkan semua bahan yang sudah dipotong-potong
4. Bumbui dengan garam, kaldu jamur, dan gula
5. Aduk hingga rata dan diamkan sebentar agar aroma bawang keluar
6. Masukkan terasi
7. Tuangkan minyak panas ke dalam wadah
8. Masukkan perasan air jeruk, aduk rata
9. Sambal matah siap disantap. (Sajikan bersama nasi hangat dan ayam suwir)
recipe_en:
Quintessential Bali: Foolproof Sambal Matah Recipe

Sambal Matah is a signature Balinese dish, served to complement dishes like fried chicken, grilled fish, or Betutu chicken. "Matah" itself means "raw". Sambal Matah is made from raw ingredients that exude the unique aroma of spices, such as lemongrass and Kaffir lime leaves. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for my version of Sambal Matah.

Sambal Matah Recipe

Ingredients:
6 Kaffir lime leaves (large size)
10-20 bird's eye chili
25 shallots
2 garlic
7 g shrimp paste
2 stalk lemongrass
1.5 tsp mushroom /chicken stock powder / MSG
50 ml coconut oil
1/2 tsp salt
1.5 tsp sugar
1.5 slice key lime / kaffir lime / regular lime

Steps:
1. Slice the lemongrass, Kaffir lime leaves, shallots, garlic, and shrimp paste thinly.
2. Heat the coconut oil.
3. Combine all the sliced ingredients.
4. Season with salt, mushroom stock powder, and sugar.
5. Mix well and let it rest to enhance the shallots and garlic aroma.
6. Add the shrimp paste.
7. Pour the hot oil into the rest of the ingredients.
8. Add lime juice and mix well.
9. Sambal matah is ready to serve. (Serve with warm rice and pulled chicken)

title: Resep Udang Saus Singapore Pedas Gurih: Khas Singapore.
recipe_id:
Resep Udang Saus Singapore bisa menjadi salah satu pilihan menu keluarga di rumah. Rasanya berbeda dengan olahan udang lain. Masakan yang satu ini juga kaya rasa karena memakai rempah-rempah, seperti jahe, lengkuas, daun salam, dan bumbu lainnya. Selain nikmat, cara membuatnya pun mudah.

Resep Udang Saus Singapore

Bahan:
200 gr udang
100 gr tepung maizena
garam, merica sesuai selera
Minyak goreng untuk menggoreng

Bumbu Halus untuk Tumis:
2-5 cabai merah (buang bijinya)
5-6 bawang merah
5-6 bawang putih
2 cm jahe
1 batang serai (bagian putihnya)
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Bahan untuk Saus Singapore:
2 iris lengkuas
2 daun jeruk
1 daun salam
½ bawang bombai
2 sdm saus sambal
1 sdm saus tomat
1,5 sdm saus tiram
4 sdm evaporated milk
1 butir telur
450 ml air mendidih
Tepung maizena secukupnya (untuk mengentalkan)

Optional:
½ sdm kecap ikan
1 sdt minyak wijen

Langkah:
1. Haluskan bahan-bahan bumbu tumisan
2. Lapisi udang dengan tepung maizena
3. Goreng udang (pastikan minyak benar-benar panas dan goreng sebentar saja tidak sampai kering)
4. Tumis bumbu halus, tambahkan sedikit minyak goreng
5. Setelah minyaknya keluar, masukkan lengkuas, daun salam, dan daun jeruk. Masak hingga kering.
6. Masukkan bawang bombai, tumis hingga harum
7. Tambahkan air mendidih
8. Masukkan saus sambal, saus tomat, dan saus tiram
9. Tambahkan garam, gula, dan kaldu jamur / penyedap sesuai selera
10. Masukkan evaporated milk
11. Masukkan cairan tepung maizena
12. Masukkan telur yang sudah dikocok dengan sedikit air. Aduk perlahan
13. Masak hingga mengental
14. Masukkan Udang
15. Udang Saus Singapore siap disajikan

recipe_en:
Singapore Signature Dish: Spicy and Savory Prawns with Singapore Sauce Recipe

Prawns with Singapore Sauce can be a good menu choice for your family at home. The flavor is a bit different to other prawn dishes. This dish is flavorful as it uses various spices like ginger, galangal, bay leaf, and other ingredients. It's not only delicious but also easy to make.

Prawns with Singapore Sauce Recipe

Ingredients:
200 g prawns
100 g cornstarch
Salt, pepper to taste
Cooking oil for frying

Spice Blend ingredients:
2-5 pc red chili (remove the seeds)
5-6 shallots
5-6 garlic
1 inch ginger
1 stalk lemongrass (the inner white part)
Cooking oil as needed

Singapore Sauce ingredients:
2 slice galangal
2 pc Kaffir lime leaves
1 pc bay leaf
1/2 pc onion
2 tbsp chili sauce
1 tbsp tomato sauce
1.5 tbsp oyster sauce
4 tbsp evaporated milk
1 pc egg
450 ml boiling water
Cornstarch as needed (to thicken the sauce)

Optional:
1/2 tbsp fish sauce
1 tsp sesame oil

Steps:
1. Blend all the spices together.
2. Coat the prawns with cornstarch.
3. Fry the prawns. Make sure the oil is hot and fry it for a bit, not until the prawns are crisp.
4. Sauté the spice blend and add a bit of oil.
5. After the spices release some oil, add the galangal, bay leaf, and Kaffir lime leaves. Cook until reduced.
6. Add the onion and sauté until fragrant.
7. Add boiling water.
8. Add the chili sauce, tomato sauce, and oyster sauce.
9. Season with salt, sugar, and mushroom stock powder / MSG to taste.
10. Add the evaporated milk.
11. Add the cornstarch mix.
12. Add the egg that's been whisked with a bit of water. Stir gently.
13. Cook until the sauce thickens.
14. Add the prawns.
15. Prawn with Singapore Sauce is ready to serve.

title: Just 6 Ingredients: Fried Steak with Butter Sauce Recipe
recipe_id:
Kali ini aku mau share salah satu resep hidangan restoran yaitu Bistik Goreng Saus Mentega. Bahan-bahannya mudah didapat dan gak perlu waktu lama untuk memasaknya. Di video ini aku juga kasih tips velveting yaitu cara agar daging jadi lebih empuk saat dimasak.

Resep Bistik Goreng Saus Mentega

Bahan rendaman daging:
200 gr daging sapi
2 siung bawang putih, parut
2 sdm tepung maizena
1 sdm minyak goreng
Air secukupnya
Garam, merica, kaldu jamur / penyedap sesuai selera

Bahan saus:
3 sdm margarin
5 sdm kecap manis
2 sdm kecap inggris
1 sdm saus tomat
½ bawang bombai, iris
2 siung bawang putih, geprek

Minyak untuk menggoreng

Langkah:

Daging:
1. Iris daging
2. Masukkan garam, merica, bawang putih, minyak, tepung maizena, dan sedikit air. Aduk rata dan diamkan sebentar 
3. Sebelum digoreng, lapisi daging dengan tepung maizena supaya lebih krispi. Lalu goreng daging di minyak yang benar-benar panas dan cukup sebentar saja yang penting daging sudah matang.

Saus:
1. Masukkan margarin
2. Masukkan bawang putih dan bawang bombai, tumis hingga harum
3. Masukkan saus tomat, kecap manis, dan kecap inggris
4. Tambahkan garam, merica, dan kaldu jamur / penyedap sesuai selera
5. Masak hingga mendidih
6. Tuang saus di atas daging (yang sudah digoreng sebelumnya)
7. Bistik Goreng Saus Mentega siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Only 6 Ingredients: Fried Steak in Butter Sauce

This time, I'm sharing one of restaurant dish recipe: Fried Steak in Butter Sauce. The ingredients are easy to get and you don't need a lot of time to cook it. In this video, I'm also giving you a tip about velveting, a technique to make meat become softer when cooked.

Fried Steak in Butter Sauce Recipe

Beef marinade ingredients:
200 g beef
2 clove garlic, grated
2 tbsp cornstarch
1 tbsp cooking oil
Water, as needed
Salt, pepper, mushroom stock powder / flavor enhancers, to taste

Sauce ingredients:
3 tbsp margarine
5 tbsp sweet soy sauce
2 tbsp Worcestershire sauce
1/2 onion, sliced
2 clove garlic, pounded

Cooking oil for frying

Steps:

Beef:
1. Slice the beef.
2. Add salt, pepper, garlic, oil, cornstarch, and a bit of water. Mix well and let it rest.
3. Before frying, coat the beef with cornstarch to make it more crispy. Fry the beef in really hot oil for a bit until the meat is cooked.

Sauce:
1. Add the margarine.
2. Add the garlic and onion. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the tomato sauce, sweet soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Add salt, pepper, and mushroom stock powder / flavor enhancers, to taste.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Pour the sauce on top of the fried beef.
7. Fried Steak in Butter Sauce is ready to serve.

title: Crispy Skin But Tender Meat. Crispy Skin Salmon Steak Recipe.
recipe_id:
Kali ini aku mau share resep dan tips buat Salmon Steak dengan kulit salmon yang super krispi namun bagian dagingnya matang sempurna. Cara buatnya simple banget! Salmon Steak ini juga dilengkapi dengan Creamy Lemon Sauce yang segar dan gurih. Resep ini juga cocok untuk kamu yang lagi diet.

Resep Salmon Steak 

Bahan:
Salmon
Garam
Minyak goreng
Creamy Lemon Sauce (resepnya ada di sini https://youtu.be/OK30kkqHRAc)

Garnish: 
Brokoli
Daun dill
Lemon

Langkah:
1. Potong salmon menjadi beberapa bagian (ketebalan 4-5 cm), keringkan menggunakan tisu
2. Baluri dengan garam dan minyak (bagian atas dan bawah)
3. Panaskan pan, masukkan minyak secukupnya
4. Masukkan salmon, masak bagian kulit salmon terlebih dahulu. Masak hingga kulit salmon krispi
(jika keluar minyak berlebih dari salmon, sebaiknya dibuang)
5. Setelah kulit krispi, balik ikan salmon dan masak sisi sebaliknya sebentar saja (sekitar 1 menit)

recipe_en:
Crispy Skin, Juicy Flesh. Crispy Skin Salmon Steak Recipe

This time, I'm sharing a recipe and tips to make Salmon Steak with super crispy skin but juicy inside. It's so simple to make! This Salmon Steak is paired with the fresh and tasty Creamy Lemon Sauce. This recipe is suitable for people on a diet.

Salmon Steak Recipe

Ingredients:
Salmon
Salt
Cooking oil
Creamy Lemon Sauce (Find the recipe here: https://youtu.be/OK30kkqHRAc)

Garnish:
Broccoli
Dill
Lemon

Steps:
1. Cut the salmon into several slices (4-5 cm thickness). Pat dry with a paper towel.
2. Coat with salt and oil (both sides).
3. Heat the pan. Add cooking oil as necessary.
4. Add the salmon in, skin down. Cook until the skin is crispy. (If the salmon releases oil, remove the excess)
5. After the skin becomes crispy, flip the salmon and cook the other side for a bit (about 1 minute).
6. Serve with Creamy Lemon Sauce.

recipe_en:
Must Try: Creamy Lemon Sauce Recipe for Salmon or Pasta

Creamy Lemon Sauce is usually served to complement dishes like salmon or pasta. Making it is easy and practical and, of course, with ingredients that are easy to get.

Salmon Steak Recipe: https://youtu.be/x1GnFAJEUOI

title: Suitable for Kids & Husbands: Savory Cheese Mayo Fried Bread Recipe Practical Super Crispy
recipe_en:
Great for Kids & Family: Mayo Cheese Fried Bread Recipe, Savory, Practical, Super Crispy

This particular dish usually uses rissole skin, but this time I’m sharing a Rissole Mayo recipe using bread. This Mayo Fried Bread is soft inside and crispy outside. The filling used are ham, cheese, boiled egg, and other ingredients as well as mayonnaise sauce. It’s great and practical for your family’s breakfast at home.

Topics
00:36 : persiapan bahan (prepping the ingredients)
01:57 : mulai menggoreng (frying the bread)
02:04 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating (the dish is ready to plate and serve)

Mayo Cheese Fried Bread Recipe

Ingredients:
10 pc bread (no crust)
2 pc eggs
100 g breadcrumbs
Oil for frying

Mayo Filling:
10 tbsp mayonnaise
4 tbsp Yummy PeranChiz Cheddar Cheese, grated
2-3 tbsp condensed milk
4 tbsp ham / bacon, chopped (optional)
Salt, pepper to taste

Topping:
Ham / Bacon
Sausage
Kani stick
Boiled egg
Corn
Etc., to your liking

Steps:

4. Brush the edges of the bread with the beaten egg. Fold and glue together.
5. Dip the bread into the egg and coat with the breadcrumbs.
6. Fry until golden brown.
7. Mayo Cheese Fried Bread is ready to serve.

title: Spicy and Savory: Mango Sambal Recipe
Original Restaurant Recipe: Cereal Fried Shrimp Recipe
recipe_id:
Kombinasi unik dari udang dan sereal. Kali ini aku mau share resep Udang Goreng Sereal atau Cereal Butter Prawns yang tentunya praktis dan mudah memasaknya. Salah satu masakan yang rasanya gak membosankan menurut aku, karena ada tekstur krispi dari sereal, gurih dari butter, manis dan empuk dari udangnya. Cocok untuk makan bersama keluarga di rumah.


Resep Udang Goreng Sereal


Bahan


Bumbu untuk udang:
14 udang kecil kupas belah punggung, sisain buntut
½ sdt baking soda
1 putih telur
100 gr tepung maizena
Garam, merica sesuai selera


Bumbu tumisan:
2 sdm butter
2 siung bawang putih, cincang
1-4 cabai rawit
1-2 lembar daun kari
1 kuning telur
5-6 sdm nestum sereal / oatmeal instant tawar

1. Kupas kulit bagian badan udang, lalu belah punggungnya. Masukkan ke dalam wadah
2. Masukkan putih telur, baking soda, gula, garam, merica, dan kaldu jamur. Aduk rata
3. Diamkan 10-20 menit di dalam lemari es
4. Lapisi udang dengan tepung terigu

recipe_en:
Real Restaurant Recipe: Cereal Prawns Recipe

This is a unique combination of prawns and cereal. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for Cereal Prawns or Cereal Butter Prawns that is practical and easy to make. It's one of those dishes that I personally won't get bored of due to the crispy texture from the cereal, the umami from the butter, and the sweetness and tender feel of the prawns. It's great for family meals.

Cereal Prawns Recipe

Shrimp Marinade ingredients:
14 small prawns, slice the back and leave the tail and head
1/2 tsp baking soda
1 egg white
100 g cornstarch
Salt, pepper, to taste

Sautéed ingredients:
2 tbsp butter
1 clove garlic, minced
1-4 pc bird's eye chili
1-2 pc curry leaves
1 yolk
5-6 tbsp Nestum cereal / plain, instant oatmeal
1 tbsp powdered milk
Sugar, salt, mushroom stock powder / MSG to taste

Steps:
1. Peel the prawn's shell and slice the back. Add to a bowl.
2. Add the egg white, baking soda, sugar, salt, pepper, and mushroom stock powder. Mix thoroughly.
3. Let it rest for 10-20 minutes in the fridge.
4. Coat the prawns with flour.
5. Fry it for a bit (not until crispy) and set aside.
6. Sauté the butter.
7. Add the egg yolk that has been mixed with 1 tbsp of water / milk. Add slowly while stirring.
8. Add the garlic and sauté until fragrant.
9. Add the sliced bird's eye chili and curry leaves. Cook until dry.
10. Add the Nestum cereal.
11. Season with salt, sugar, and pepper.
12. Add the powdered milk.
13. Add the fried prawns and mix evenly.
14. Cereal Prawns are ready to serve.

title: Ala Fish & Co. Sweet, Sour, and Savory Tartar Sauce Recipe
recipe_id:

4 sdm mayonnaise
⅓ siung bawang putih, parut
2 sdt bawang bombai
1 butir telur rebus
2 buah pickles
1 sdt madu
½ sdt kecap inggris / worcester sauce
2 sdm daun dill
Garam, merica sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Potong semua bahan-bahan dengan ukuran yang sama, masukkan ke dalam wadah
2. Tambahkan mayonnaise, aduk hingga merata
3. Tambahkan madu dan kecap inggris

recipe_en:
A la Fish & Co.: Sweet, Tart, Umami Tartar Sauce Recipe

In restaurants, Tartar Sauce is most commonly served along with seafood. Made of mayonnaise, pickles, lemon, and other ingredients, the tart Tartar Sauce is great for Ebi Furai. It's so easy and simple to make.

Ebi Furai Recipe: https://youtu.be/f-PlPtWxSsI

Tartar Sauce Recipe

Ingredients:
2-3 tbsp lemon
4 tbsp mayonnaise
1/3 clove garlic, grated
2 tsp onion
1 pc boiled egg
2 pc pickles
1 tsp honey
1/2 tsp Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp dill
Salt, pepper to taste

Steps:
1. Chop all of the ingredients in the same size and add to a bowl.
2. Add the mayonnaise and mix well.
3. Add the honey and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Add some salt, pepper, and the lemon juice.
5. Tartar Sauce is ready to serve.

title: The Secret to Making Shrimp Big, Crispy and Straight: Hokben-Style Shrimp Ebi Furai Recipe
recipe_id:
Ebi Furai (berbeda dengan Ebi Tempura) merupakan hidangan populer dari Jepang. Kalau ke restoran Jepang, menu satu ini pasti selalu ada terutama di dalam menu bento. Rasa udang yang empuk dibalut tepung yang krispi jadi salah satu menu favorit keluarga.


Resep Saus Tartar : https://youtu.be/l23X1oIv7As

Resep Ebi Furai


Bahan:
8 ekor udang (ukuran per kg isi 30-40 udang)
Tepung terigu, tepung roti secukupnya
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Adonan tepung basah:
2 sdm tepung terigu
½ butir telur
50 ml susu / cream / santan
Garam, merica, kaldu jamur / penyedap sesuai selera
Bawang putih secukupnya, parut

Langkah:
1. Kupas udang, buang kotorannya, lalu bilas
2. Kerat bagian perut udang (jarak sekitar 1/2 cm) dan jangan terlalu dalam 
3. Lalu tekan punggungnya dengan menggunakan jari seperti memijat, hingga urat di punggung putus memanjang dan rata
4. Buat adonan tepung basah. Campurkan tepung, telur, cream, bawang putih, merica, dan kaldu jamur. Aduk hingga tercampur
5. Lapisi udang dengan tepung terigu, adonan tepung basah, lalu tepung roti

recipe_en:
The SECRET of Straight, Big, Crispy Shrimp: Ebi Furai Recipe àla Restaurant

Ebi Furai (not to be mistaken with Ebi Tempura) is a popular dish from Japan. If we go to a Japanese restaurant, this particular menu is always present, especially in a bento. The bouncy shrimp covered with crispy skin is one of family's favorite menu.

Tartar Sauce Recipe : https://youtu.be/l23X1oIv7As

Ebi Furai Recipe

Ingredients:

8 shrimp (graded at 30-40 pieces per kilogram)
Flour, bread crumbs as needed
Oil to fry

Wet batter:
2 tbsp flour
1/2 egg
50 ml plain milk / cream / coconut milk
Salt, pepper, mushroom stock / flavor enhancers to taste
Grated garlic as needed

Steps:
1. Peel the shrimp, de-vein, and rinse.
2. Make cuts on the underside of the shrimp (about 1/2 cm away), not too deep.
3. Push the back of the shrimp with fingers in a massaging motion until the shrimp becomes straight and flat
4. Make the wet batter. Add flour, egg, cream, garlic, pepper, and mushroom stock. Mix well.
5. Coat the batter with flour, then the wet batter, then the bread crumbs.
6. Fry the shrimp until golden brown
7. Serve Ebi Furai with Tartar Sauce

title: Very Savory, MUST Try! Salted Egg Fried Bread Recipe (Sweet)
recipe_id:
Di Indonesia, tren makanan menggunakan bahan telur asin atau salted egg kian populer. Mulai dari keripik, ayam, seafood, martabak, kue, dan masih banyak lagi. Kali ini aku mau share resep Roti Goreng Telur Asin, bedanya yang ini rasanya MANIS (kalau pernah coba ada di restoran Chinese seperti Din Tai Fung atau Imperial Kitchen, yang biasanya dibungkus bapao). 

Cocok banget untuk bekal anak atau snack saat bersantai. Caranya mudah dan isian telur asin ini bisa tahan lama. Selain itu resep ini juga cocok untuk jualan karena harga bahan-bahannya cukup terjangkau dan bisa mendapatkan untung yang banyak.

Topik
00:42 : persiapan bahan
01:30 : mulai membuat selai telur asin
05:22 : mulai menggoreng
06:03 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating

Resep Roti Goreng Telur Asin 
(untuk 14-16 pcs)

Bahan Selai Telur Asin:
100 gr margarin, lelehkan
30 gr tepung maizena
90 gr gula halus
70 gr susu bubuk
50 gr cream/susu/santan
3 butir kuning telur asin (matang)

Bahan lain:
Roti tawar
Minyak untuk menggoreng

Perekat:
1 butir telur
Tepung terigu secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Masukkan kuning telur asin yang sudah matang, haluskan dengan sendok
2. Campurkan dengan margarin leleh, lalu aduk
3. Masukkan susu bubuk, tepung maizena, gula halus, dan cream. Aduk hingga tercampur
4. Masukkan adonan selai ke dalam wadah plastik, lalu pipihkan. Simpan di lemari es 30-60 menit. (Tahan di lemari es selama seminggu dan di freezer selama sebulan)
5. Pisahkan kulit roti tawar, lalu pipihkan
6. Lapisi roti tawar dengan perekat (campuran telur dan tepung terigu)
7. Masukkan isian telur asin, lalu rekatkan bagian pinggirnya agar tertutup sempurna
8. Goreng roti hingga warnanya keemasan
9. Roti Goreng Telur Asin siap disajikan
recipe_en:
Super Tasty MUST Try! Fried (Sweet) Salted Egg Bread Recipe

In Indonesia, using salted eggs as an ingredient is becoming more and more popular. Starting from chips, chicken, seafood, Martabak, cake, and so on. This time, I'm sharing a Fried Salted Egg Bread recipe. The difference is this one is the SWEET version (you might have tried this in Chinese restaurants like Din Tai Fung or Imperial Kitchen, usually served as Steamed Buns).

It's great as a kids' meal for school or to be eaten as snacks as you relax. The method is easy and the salted egg filling has a long shelf life. This recipe is also great for food businesses because the ingredients are budget-friendly, so you can gain lots of profit.

Fried Salted Egg Bread Recipe
(yield 14-16 pcs)

Salted Egg Filling ingredients:
100 g margarine, melted
30 g cornstarch
90 g powdered sugar
70 g powdered milk
50 g cream/milk/coconut milk
3 pc salted egg yolks (cooked)

Other ingredients:
Bread
Cooking oil for frying

Glue:
1 egg
Flour as needed

Steps:
1. Add the cooked salted egg yolk to a bowl and mash with a spoon.
2. Combine with the melted margarine and mix well.
3. Add the powdered milk, cornstarch, powdered sugar, and cream. Mix well.
4. Add the filling into a plastic bag and flatten. Keep in the fridge for 30-60 minutes. (The shelf life is a week in the fridge and a month in the freezer)
5. Remove the bread crust. Flatten the bread.
6. Cover the surface with the glue mix (an egg and flour mix).
7. Add the salted egg filling and pinch the edges to seal.
8. Fry the bread until golden brown.
9. Fried Salted Egg Bread is ready to serve.

title: Spicy Crispy Tofu: Chili Salt Recipe
recipe_id:
Kreasi olahan tahu ini banyak digemari karena cocok disantap sebagai teman nasi atau disajikan sebagai camilan. Lembutnya tahu sutra dipadukan dengan cabai, garam, dan bawang putih menjadi semakin nikmat, apalagi saat musim hujan seperti sekarang. Selamat mencoba!

Topik
00:24 : persiapan bahan
01:30 : mulai memasak
04:23 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating

Resep Tahu Cabai Garam

Bahan:
10 Tahu sutra putih ukuran kecil
10 bawang putih cincang
10 bawang merah cincang
100-200 gr tepung maizena
2 batang daun bawang iris
5-10 cabai rawit sesuai selera
Gula, garam, dan kaldu jamur sesuai selera (kaldu jamur bisa diganti kaldu ayam, kaldu sapi, atau MSG)
Minyak goreng secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Potong tahu menjadi beberapa bagian, lalu rendam di air garam
2. Lapisi tahu dengan tepung maizena
3. Diamkan 2-3 menit lalu goreng hingga kering

5. Tumis bawang merah hingga layu dan harum

7. Tambahkan gula, garam, dan kaldu jamur sesuai selera

recipe_en:
Hot and Crunchy: Salt and Pepper Tofu Recipe

This tofu dish is a fan-favorite because it's great to be eaten with rice or served as a snack. The softness of silk tofu meets the chili, salt, and garlic make the dish even more mouthwatering, especially during rainy seasons like now. Give it a try!

Salt and Pepper Tofu Recipe

Ingredients:
10 white silk tofu, small size
10 minced garlic
10 minced shallots
100-200 g cornstarch
2 stalk green onion, sliced
5-10 bird's eye chili, to taste
Salt, sugar, and mushroom stock powder, to taste (mushroom stock powder can be substituted with chicken or beef stock powder or MSG)
Cooking oil as needed

Steps:
1. Slice the tofu into several pieces and soak in salt water.
2. Coat the tofu with cornstarch.
3. Rest for 2-3 minutes and fry until they're crispy.
4. Sauté the garlic until crispy and set aside.
5. Sauté the shallots until they wilt and fragrant.
6. Add the green onions and bird's eye chili.
7. Season with sugar, salt, and mushroom stock powder, to taste.
8. Add the fried tofu in.
9. Add the crispy garlic and mix well with all the spices.
10. Salt and Pepper Tofu is ready to serve.

title: 7-Course Kaisen Dinner: Private Dining Event with Devina Hermawan
100% Sukses Tanpa Api. Resep Creme Brulee Bikin Nagih.
recipe_id:
Prancis terkenal dengan sederet hidangan penutup lezat, salah satunya Crème Brulee. Ternyata untuk membuat makanan ini tidaklah sulit. Di resep kali ini aku kasih 2 cara yang dioven dan disteam. Ada juga tips & trik membuat brulee tanpa torch.

Topik
01:02 : persiapan bahan
02:02 : mulai memasak
07:33 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating

Resep Creme Brulee

Bahan:
700 ml cream
5 kuning telur
100 gr gula
¼ sdt garam
1 sdt vanilla extract

Tambahan:
Gula pasir
500 ml air mendidih

Langkah:
Metode 1 : Oven
Metode 2 : Steam

Oven
1. Panaskan oven 160 derajat
2. Aduk rata kuning telur dengan gula
3. Panaskan cream sampai shimering (mendidih bagian atasnya)
4. Temper campuran kuning telur
5. Masukkan air mendidih ke dasar pan
6. Masukkan adonan ke wadah alumunium
7. Panggang selama 35-45 menit

Steam
1. Masukkan adonan ke wadah alumunium, tutup dengan alumunium foil
2. Steam selama 25-35 menit di api sedang
3. Keluarkan dari panci, diamkan 4-6 jam. (Bisa tahan 4-5 hari dimasukkan ke dalam tupperware atau wadah tertutup dan dimasukkan ke dalam lemari es)
4. Taburkan gula pasir merata di atas creme brulee
5. Panaskan sendok di atas kompor 1-2 menit
6. Oleskan sendok panas di atas creme brulee hingga gula caramelize
7. Sajikan
recipe_en:
100% Success No Blow Torch. Addictive Creme Brulee Recipe

France is known with an array of decadent desserts, one of which is Creme Brulee. As it turns out, making this dessert isn't that difficult. In this recipe, I'm giving you two ways to cook it, oven-baked and steamed. There are also some tips & tricks to make Brulee without a torch.

Creme Brulee Recipe

Ingredients:
700 ml cream
5 egg yolks
100 g sugar
1/4 tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract

Others:
Sugar
500 ml boiling water

Steps:
Method 1: Oven-baked
Method 2: Steamed

Oven-baked
1. Heat the oven to 160°C.
2. Mix the egg yolk with the sugar.
3. Heat the cream to a simmer (boiling at the edges)
4. Temper the egg yolks.
5. Add boiling water to a baking pan.
6. Pour in the mixture to the aluminum cups.
7. Bake for 35-45 minutes.

Steamed
1. Pour the mixture into the aluminum cups and cover with aluminum foil.
2. Steam for 25-35 minutes on medium heat.
3. Remove from the steamer and let it rest for 4-6 hours. (You can keep the steamed cream inside a Tupperware or an airtight container and store it in the fridge for 4-5 days)
4. Sprinkle sugar evenly on top of the Creme Brulee.
5. Heat a spoon on the stove for 1-2 minutes.
6. Run the hot spoon on top of the Creme Brulee until the sugar is caramelized.
7. Serve.

title: Healthy Practical: Salmon & Spinach Puff Pastry Recipe With Mushroom Sauce
recipe_id:
Biasa dikenal dengan Salmon en Croute, makanan ini dibuat dengan cara dipanggang. Daging ikan salmon dilapisi dengan puff pastry yang gurih dengan isian bayam dan lezatnya mushroom sauce. 

Topik

01:52 : mulai membuat isian
05:36 : mulai membuat hiasan pastry
07:40 : mulai memanggang
09:20 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating 

RESEP SALMON & SPINACH PUFF PASTRY WITH MUSHROOM SAUCE

Bahan:
500 gr salmon
500 gr bayam (rebus dan peras airnya)
3 lembar puff pastry (ukuran besar)
4 sdm butter
2 sdm mustard
5-6 siung bawang putih
1/4 bawang bombai
1 genggam daun diil
1 genggam daun basil
1 sdm minyak goreng
2 butir telur
Tepung terigu secukupnya
Gula, garam, dan merica secukupnya

Bahan mushroom sauce:
100 gr jamur shitake 
100 gr jamur champignon
5 sdm minyak goreng
3 siung bawang putih
1/4 bawang bombai
4-5 sdm butter
250 ml krim
Gula, garam, dan merica secukupnya

Langkah:
1. Potong salmon, masukkan dalam wadah
2. Campurkan dengan mustard, gula, garam, merica, dan minyak. Aduk hingga rata
3. Potong halus daun diil dan daun basil. Masukkan dalam wadah yang berbeda
4. Campurkan bawang putih, bawang bombai, daun diil, daun basil, garam, dan butter. Aduk hingga rata
5. Ambil lembaran puff pastry, olesi dengan campuran butter yang sudah dibuat
6. Letakkan campuran salmon di atasnya, lalu lapisi kembali dengan butter. Letakkan bayam di atasnya
7. Olesi piggiran puff pastry dengan telur. Tutup adonan
8. Buat hiasan dari puff pastry, bentuk seperti jaring-jaring. Olesi bagian atas adonan dengan telur dan tutup dengan hiasan jaring
9. Panggang dalam oven sekitar 35-45 menit di suhu 200 derajat
10. Sajikan dengan mushroom sauce

Mushroom Sauce:
1. Masukkan minyak
2. Tumis jamur hingga kering
3. Setelah kering, tambahkan sedikit minyak
4. Masukkan bawang putih dan bawang bombai. Tumis hingga harum
5. Masukkan krim, masak hingga sedikit mengental
6. Masukkan gula, garam, dan merica sesuai selera
7. Masukkan butter, masak hingga mengental
8. Saus siap disajikan

Aku terbantu banget menggunakan oven elektrik dari Kirin KBO-350CL. Salah satu kecanggihannya yaitu double cooper heating element yang membuat hasil panggangan matang secara merata. Jadi gak perlu takut gagal deh.

recipe_en:
Healthy and Easy: Salmon & Spinach Puff Pastry with Mushroom Sauce Recipe

Also known as Salmon en Croute, this dish is a baked dish. It's a salmon dish blanketed by the savory puff pastry with spinach filling and the delicious mushroom sauce.

Topics
00:34 : prepping the ingredients
01:52 : making the filling
05:36 : making the pastry decoration
07:40 : start baking
09:20 : the dish is ready to plate and serve

SALMON & SPINACH PUFF PASTRY WITH MUSHROOM SAUCE RECIPE

Ingredients:
500 g salmon
500 g spinach (boiled and squeeze the water out)
3 sheets puff pastry (large)
4 tbsp butter
2 tbsp mustard
5-6 clove garlic
1/4 onion
1 fistful dill
1 fistful basil
1 tbsp cooking oil
2 pc eggs
Flour as needed
Sugar, salt, and pepper to taste

Mushroom Sauce ingredients:
100 g Shiitake mushroom
100 g Champignon mushroom
5 tbsp cooking oil
3 clove garlic
1/4 onion
4-5 tbsp butter
250 ml cooking cream
Sugar, salt, pepper to taste

Steps:
1. Slice the salmon and add to a bowl.
2. Add the mustard, sugar, salt, pepper, and oil. Mix well.
3. Chop the dill and the basil. Add to a different bowl.
4. Add the garlic, onion, dill, basil, salt, and butter. Mix well.
5. Spread the butter mix onto the puff pastry.
6. Add the salmon slices on top and spread more butter mix on top of the salmon. Top with the boiled spinach.
7. Brush the side of the pastry with the egg wash. Fold the pastry.
8. Make a puff pastry decor with some latticework. Brush the top with the egg wash and cover with the latticework.
9. Bake in the oven for 35-45 minutes at 200°C.
10. Serve with the mushroom sauce.

Mushroom Sauce:
1. Add some oil.
2. Sauté the mushroom until dry.
3. Once it's dry, add a bit of oil.
4. Add the garlic and onion. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add the cooking cream and cook until the sauce thickens a bit.
6. Add the sugar, salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Add the butter and cook until the sauce thickens.
8. The sauce is ready to serve.

title: Creamy Tapi Tetap Segar: Resep Salad Buah
recipe_id:
Makanan satu ini lagi hits banget di layanan aplikasi pemesanan online. Kali ini aku mau bagi resep Salad Buah yang dikombinasikan dengan yoghurt dan mayonnaise. Buah-buahan yang digunakan mudah didapat dan tentunya sehat karena kaya akan vitamin dan mineral. Cocok untuk hidangan penutup keluarga di rumah.

Resep Salad Buah

1 cup semangka
1 cup melon
1 cup pir
1 cup stroberi
1 cup anggur
1 cup nata de coco
1 cup fruit cocktail
1 cup jelly rasa leci

Dressing  :
1 cup mayonnaise
1,5 cup plain yoghurt (kental)
5 sdm susu kental manis
2 sdm air jeruk lemon
Keju parut sesuai selera

Langkah :
1. campurkan semua buah-buahan, jelly, dan nata de coco
2. campurkan mayonaise, yoghurt, dan kental manis
3. buat garnish dari potongan stroberi dan anggur
4. susun ke dalam wadah. dimulai dari paling bawah: buah, dressing, keju parut, dilapisi lagi dengan buah, dressing, dan keju parut

recipe_en:
Creamy but Fresh: Fruit Salad Recipe

This particular dish is currently trending in online food service apps. This time, I'm sharing a Fruit Salad recipe that uses yogurt and mayonnaise combination. The fruits used are easy to get and healthy, as well, as they're rich in vitamins and minerals. It's great for your family's dessert at home.

Fruit Salad Recipe

Ingredients:
1 cup watermelon
1 cup cantaloupe
1 cup pears
1 cup strawberries
1 cup grapes
1 cup Nata de Coco
1 cup fruit cocktail
1 cup lychee-flavored jelly

Dressing:
1 cup mayonnaise
1.5 cup plain yogurt (thick)
5 tbsp condensed milk
2 tbsp lemon juice
Grated cheese, to taste

Steps:
1. Combine all the fruits, jelly, and Nata de Coco.
2. Combine the mayonnaise, yogurt, and condensed milk.
3. Make the garnish from strawberries and grapes.
4. Arrange in a bowl, starting from the bottom: fruits, dressing, grated cheese, and layered once more with fruits, dressing, and grated cheese.
5. Place the garnish on top.
6. Serve chilled.

title: Healthy and Practical: Salmon Teriyaki Rice Bowl Recipe
recipe_id:
Ikan salmon memang mudah diolah menjadi hidangan apa saja. Selain kaya nutrisi dan mudah didapat, salmon juga bagus untuk ibu hamil dan menyusui. Kali ini aku mau sharing resep salmon teriyaki yang super simple dan enak. Ini adalah salah satu menu favorit aku kalau makan di restoran Jepang.

Topik
00:45 : persiapan bahan

05:42 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating

Resep Salmon Teriyaki

Bahan utama :
200 gr salmon
2 siung bawang putih
3-4 jahe iris
1 batang daung bawang
1/2 bawang bombai kecil
3 sdm kecap asin
2 sdm madu
2 sdm mirin
1 sdm saus tiram
3 sdm tepung maizena
150 ml air
Daung bawang dan wijen untuk garnish
Minyak goreng untuk menumis

Bahan pelengkap :
15 lembar bayam
Tepung terigu (campurkan dengan lada, garam, dan bawang putih bubuk)
Nasi putih
Onsen tamago (resepnya ada di sini https://youtu.be/nukeZjfRXDk)

Langkah :

Salmon :
1. Potong salmon, lapisi dengan tepung
2. Tumis salmon
3. Masukkan bawang bombai, bawang putih, dan jahe. Tumis hingga harum
3. Tambahkan saus tiram, mirin, madu, dan air
4. Masak hingga salmon matang dan saus mengental
5. Sajikan dengan nasi putih, onsen tamago, dan bayam krispi

Bayam krispi :
1. Lapisi bayam (dalam keadaan basah) dengan tepung kering
2. Gunakan sisa tepung untuk dicampurkan dengan air. Lapisi kembali bayam dengan adonan tepung basah.
3. Goreng bayam hingga kering
recipe_en:
Healthy and Easy: Salmon Teriyaki Rice Bowl Recipe

Salmon can easily be made into any kind of dish. Not only rich in nutrients and easy to find, salmon is great for expecting and breastfeeding moms. This time, I'm sharing a super simple and delicious salmon teriyaki recipe. This is one of my favorite menus when eating out at a Japanese restaurant.

Topics
00:45 : prepping the ingredients
02:38 : start of cook
05:42 : the dish is ready to plate and serve

Salmon Teriyaki Recipe

Main ingredients:
200 g salmon
2 cloves garlic
3-4 slices ginger
1 leek stalk
1/2 small onion
3 tbsp soy sauce
2 tbsp honey
2 tbsp mirin
1 tbsp oyster sauce
3 tbsp cornstarch
150 ml water
Leeks and sesame seeds for garnish
Cooking oil to sauté

Condiments:
15 pc spinach leaves
Flour (mix with pepper, salt, and garlic powder)
Rice
Onsen Tamago (find the recipe here: https://youtu.be/nukeZjfRXDk)

Steps:

Salmon:
1. Slice the salmon and coat with flour.
2. Sauté the salmon.
2. Add the onion, garlic, and ginger. Sauté until fragrant.
3. Add the oyster sauce, mirin, honey, and water.
4. Cook until the salmon is cooked and the sauce thickened.
5. Serve with rice, Onsen Tamago, and Crispy Spinach.

Crispy Spinach:
1. Coat the spinach (wet) with the dry flour.
2. Use the remaining flour for the batter by mixing it with water. Coat the spinach with the wet batter.
3. Fry the spinach until crispy.

title: Crunchy Savory Crispy: McDonald’s Anti-Fail Apple Pie Recipe
recipe_id:
Walaupun menggunakan bahan-bahan lokal, rasanya tetap internasional. Kamu bisa menyajikan cemilan dengan resep ini untuk keluarga tercinta. Untuk menghasilkan kulit pie yang SUPER RENYAH ala McDonald’s, ada tips & triknya lho. Langsung aja tonton dan selamat mencoba!

Topik
00:49 : persiapan bahan
02:45 : mulai membuat isian pie
05:00 : mulai membuat adonan pie
11:33 : mulai menggoreng
12:03 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating

Resep Apple Pie

Bahan:

Isi pie: 
3 buah apel besar
8 sdm brown sugar
1 sdt kayu manis bubuk
1/4 sdt pala bubuk
2 sdm butter
Garam secukupnya 
1 sdm air lemon

Kulit pie:
325 gr tepung terigu protein rendah
150 gr margarin atau butter + garam
15 sdm air es
1 sdm air lemon
½ sdt baking powder 

Bahan lain:
2 butir telur untuk oles adonan
Minyak untuk menggoreng
Tepung terigu untuk coating adonan 

Langkah:

Isi pie:
1. Potong apel berbentuk kotak-kotak kecil
2. Tumis apel
3. Masukkan brown sugar
4. Masukkan kayu manis bubuk
5. Masukkan pala bubuk
6. Tambahkan garam sesuai selera
7. Tambahkan butter
8. Tambahkan air lemon
9. Masak hingga mengental
10. Simpan dalam lemari es 

Kulit pie: 
1. Masukkan tepung, margarin, dan baking powder. Aduk hingga tercampur rata
2. Masukkan air es sedikit demi sedikit, hingga adonan mengeras
3. Tipiskan adonan
4. Diamkan selama 30 menit di dalam lemari es
5. Adonan siap untuk dipotong dan diisi dengan saus apel yang sudah dibuat tadi
6. Masukkan apple pie siap goreng ke dalam freezer sekitar 10 menit. Tujuannya agar saat digoreng nanti lebih renyah.
7. Keluarkan dari freezer. Sebelum digoreng, coating apple pie dengan tepung terigu dan telur.
8. Goreng apple pie hingga warnanya keemasan.
9. Siap untuk disajikan
recipe_en:
Crunchy, Savory, Crispy: Foolproof Apple Pie a la McDonald's Recipe

Even though we're using local ingredients, we can get international flavor. You can serve snacks with this recipe for your loved ones. To make a SUPER CRUNCHY pie crust a la McDonald's, there are some tips and tricks you must follow. Watch it now and good luck!

Topics
00:49 : prepping the ingredients
02:45 : making the pie filling
05:00 : making the pie dough
11:33 : frying the pie
12:03 : the dish is ready to plate and serve

Apple Pie Recipe

Ingredients:

Pie Filling:
3 pc large apples
8 tbsp brown sugar
1 tsp cinnamon powder
1/4 tsp nutmeg powder
2 tbsp butter
Salt, to taste
1 tbsp lemon juice

Pie Crust:
325 g low-protein flour
150 g margarine or butter + salt
15 tbsp ice water
1 tbsp lemon juice
1/2 tsp baking powder

Other ingredients:
2 pc eggs for egg wash
Cooking oil for frying
Flour to coat the dough

Steps:

Pie Filling:
1. Dice the apples.
2. Sauté the apples.
3. Add the brown sugar.
4. Add the cinnamon powder.
5. Add the nutmeg powder.
6. Add salt, to taste.
7. Add the butter.
8. Add the lemon juice.
9. Cook until thickens.
10. Keep in the fridge.

Pie Crust:
1. Combine the flour, margarine, and baking powder. Mix well.
2. Add the ice water bit by bit until the dough becomes hard.
3. Thin out the dough.
4. Let it rest for 30 minutes in the fridge.
5. The dough is ready to cut and filled with the apple filling.
6. Cool the raw apple pies in the freezer for 10 minutes.
7. Before frying, coat the frozen apple pies with flour and eggs.
8. Fry the apple pie until golden brown.
9. Ready to serve.

title: Wangi Banget: Resep Ayam Goreng Pandan Praktis [Dijamin Nagih!]
Renyah Praktis Favorit Keluarga: Resep Fu Yung Hai Telur Ala Resto Hong Kong.
recipe_id:

Resep Fu Yung Hai:

3 butir telur

40 gr ayam cincang
40 gr udang
3 sdm tepung kentang / sagu
1 bawang putih halus
1 batang daun bawang
Garam secukupnya
Merica secukupnya
Minyak goreng

½ bawang bombai

2. Masukkan garam dan merica

recipe_en:
Crisp and Easy, Restaurant-Quality Family-Favorite Dish: Egg Foo Young Recipe

This particular dish is one of the most popular menus in Chinese restaurants. Egg Foo Young can be an easy recipe to make for your family at home. It uses simple ingredients, the method is easy, and it tastes delicious!! Suitable for family and kids.

Egg Foo Young Recipe

Ingredients:
3 eggs
2 leaves cabbage
1/2 carrot
40 g minced chicken
40 g shrimp
3 tbsp potato starch / cornstarch
1 clove minced garlic
1 stalk green onion
Salt, to taste
Pepper, to taste
Cooking oil

Sauce ingredients:
1 tbsp margarine
1/2 onion
1 peeled tomato, diced
150 ml water
1 tbsp cornstarch
3 tbsp tomato sauce
1 tsp Worcestershire sauce
2 tsp vinegar
Salt, pepper to taste

Steps:
1. Combine the cabbage, carrot, minced garlic, green onions, minced chicken, and shrimp into a bowl.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Add the eggs
4. Add the potato starch / cornstarch.
5. Stir until mixed well.
6. Fry the batter until crisp and soft.
7. Serve with the sauce.

Sauce:
1. Sauté the onion and garlic with margarine.
2. Add the tomato.
3. Add the tomato sauce, vinegar, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Slowly add cornstarch and water mix.
5. Add sugar and salt to taste.
6. Cook until the sauces reaches a boil and thickens.

title: Rabokki - Ramen Tteokbokki: Delicious Noodles from Korea
recipe_id:

Rabokki (Ramen Tteokbokki) adalah variasi makanan dari tteokbokki dengan tambahan mie ramen. Rasa tteokbokki yang pedas ditambah dengan gurihnya ramen menambah warna dalam Rabbokki. Dijamin lezat! Selamat mencoba.

Resep Rabokki

½ buah wortel
1 fish cake
2-3 siung bawang putih
Cabai rawit sesuai selera

recipe_en:
Rabokki - Ramen Tteokbokki: Tasty Noodles from Korea

Rabokki (Ramen Tteokbokki) is a variation from Tteokbokki that is added with ramen noodles. The spiciness of Tteokbokki is complemented by the savoriness of ramen which adds some color to the Rabokki. The taste is guaranteed! Happy cooking.

Topics
00:47 : prepping the ingredients
01:58 : start of cook
05:12 : the dish is ready to plate and serve

Rabokki Recipe

Ingredients:
1 pc Korean instant noodles
1 pc leeks
1 pc cabbage leaf
1/2 pc carrot
1 pc fish cake
2-3 cloves garlic
Bird's eye chili, to taste
2 tsp chili powder
1 tbsp chili sauce
1/2 tsp dashi / chicken powder
1 tsp sesame oil
2 tsp fish sauce
400 - 500 ml water
Rice cake (Find the recipe here: https://youtu.be/sRPR0WjYgM4)
Sugar, to taste

Steps:
1. Sauté the garlic with the sesame oil.
2. Add the cabbage, leeks, carrot, and fish cake. Cook until fragrant.
3. Add the water in and bring to a boil.
4. Add the Korean instant noodles.
5. Add the fish sauce, dashi, chili powder, and rice cake.
6. Cook until the broth has thickened and the noodles are cooked.
7. Serve.

title: Resep Korean Rice Cake Garaetteok: Mudah Mantap Betul
recipe_id:

recipe_en:
Korean Rice Cake (Garaetteok) Recipe: Easy, Tasty, Authentic

Still in the Korean cuisine theme, this time, I'm sharing a recipe for Korean Rice Cake. Garaetteok or Korean Rice Cake is usually used as the main ingredient for Korean snacks like Tteokbokki.

After this Korean Rice Cake recipe video, I'll be making an infamous Korean dish that is well-known in the culinary world. Of course, I'll be using this Korean Rice Cake as the main ingredient. Stay tuned!

Rabokki Recipe: https://youtu.be/s_f5IOz81DQ

Topics
00:30 : prepping the ingredients
02:08 : start steaming

Korean Rice Cake Recipe

Ingredients:
1 cup glutinous rice flour
1 cup flour
1 cup boiling water
1 tsp sesame oil
Salt, to taste

Steps:
1. Combine the glutinous rice flour with rice flour and salt.
2. Add the boiling water bit by bit. Stir well.
3. Knead the dough until the texture becomes bouncy.
4. Steam for 25 minutes.
5. Remove from the steamer and let it cool a bit.
6. Add the sesame oil and knead.
7. Shape and slice into cylinders.

title: TOPPP Super Renyah: Resep Ayam Goreng Kriuk Kriuk Shihlin Taiwan
recipe_id:
Street food khas Taiwan ini pasti sudah gak asing lagi, hampir di tiap mall di kota-kota besar di Indonesia selalu ada gerai Shihlin. Jajanan unik ini berbahan dasar dari ayam yang dibalut dengan tepung super renyah. Ternyata “Crispy Chicken Taiwan” bisa kita buat sendiri lho di rumah. Harga lebih terjangkau dan dijamin bikin ketagihan!

Topik
00:49 : persiapan bahan
03:27 : mulai membuat tepung pelapis krispi
08:43 : mulai menggoreng
09:11 : hidangan siap dan tahap plating

Resep Crispy Chicken Taiwan

Bahan:
1 pasang dada ayam
1 sdt bubuk ngo hiong  
2 sdt bawang putih
2 sdt chicken powder / kaldu ayam (menggunakan merk knorr)
1 sdt garam
1 sdt lada
1 sdm tepung terigu
1 sdm tepung maizena
Air secukupnya
1 butir telur

Bahan tepung pelapis:
Tepung tapioka
Air

Bahan taburan:
Bubuk ngo hiong dan chicken powder (perbandingannya 1:3)
Chili powder sesuai selera

Langkah:
1. Fillet dada ayam
2. Masukkan bawang putih, chicken powder, ngo hiong, garam, lada, tepung terigu, tepung maizena, dan air. Campur hingga merata
3. Bungkus dengan plastic wrap dan diamkan sekitar 30-120 menit
4. Masukkan telur, aduk hingga merata
5. Lumuri ayam dengan tepung pelapis (krispi) hingga merata
6. Goreng hingga kering
7. Taburi dengan bumbu pedas
8. Siap disajikan

Langkah membuat tepung pelapis (krispi):
1. Masukkan tepung tapioka
2. Tambahkan air hingga tekstur tepung menjadi padat dan tidak berair
3. Hancurkan tepung menggunakan garpu
4. Pertama, saring menggunakan saringan kasar
5. Kedua, saring menggunakan saringan halus
6. Panggang di oven dengan suhu 100 derajat selama 12-15 menit
7. Tepung siap digunakan
recipe_en:
SUPER Crispy: Shihlin Taiwanese Crispy Fried Chicken Recipe

You must be familiar with this Taiwanese street food because there's at least one stall of Shihlin in nearly all the malls in Indonesia's large cities. This unique snack uses chicken that is coated with super crunchy flour. It turns out we can make this "Taiwanese Crispy Chicken" at home. It's more budget-friendly and guaranteed to make you want more!

Taiwanese Crispy Chicken Recipe

Ingredients:
1 chicken breast
1 tsp Ngo hiang powder
2 tsp garlic
2 tsp chicken powder / stock powder (Brand used: Knorr)
1 tsp salt
1 tsp pepper
1 tbsp all-purpose flour
1 tbsp cornstarch
Water as needed
1 egg

Coating ingredients:
Tapioca flour
Water

Toppings:
Ngo hiang powder and chicken powder (1:3 ratio)
Chili powder, as needed

Steps:
1. Fillet the chicken breast.
2. Add garlic, chicken powder, Ngo hiang powder, salt, pepper, all-purpose flour, cornstarch, and water. Mix well.
3. Cover with plastic wrap and let it rest for 30-120 minutes.
4. Add the egg and mix well.
5. Coat the chicken with the crispy coating evenly.
6. Fry until crispy.
7. Sprinkle with the toppings.
8. Ready to serve.

Steps to make the crispy coating:
1. Add tapioca flour.
2. Add some water until the flour becomes firm in texture and not watery.
3. Crumble the flour with a fork.
4. First, sift with the large strainer.
5. Second, sift with the fine mesh strainer.
6. Bake in the oven at 100°C for 12-15 minutes.
7. Crispy coating is ready to use.

title: Beda Ice Cream dan Gelato: Begini Cara Membuatnya

Ice Cream vs. Gelato: Here’s How it’s Made

Who loves ice cream?? Oops, but this isn’t ice cream, though! This time, Baby Andrew and I are going to taste and see firsthand the process of making Gelato. Even though both Ice Cream and Gelato contain fat and sugar, they have different compositions. Gelato uses more milk and very little cream, so the saturated fat content is way lower than Ice Cream. Have fun watching the video!

title: Super Kenyal & Gurih: Resep Boba Brown Sugar
recipe_id:
Biasanya boba disajikan sebagai pelengkap untuk minuman seperti milk tea, thai tea, atau es kopi susu. Nah, kali ini aku mau share cara membuat Brown Sugar Boba. Mudah dan enakkk. 

Topik
00:37 : persiapan bahan
03:16 : mulai memasak
07:07 : hidangan siap dan tahap serving

Resep Brown Sugar Boba
 
Bahan Boba:
200 gr tepung tapioka
100 gr gula aren
120 ml air (untuk campuran adonan)
2 liter air (untuk merebus boba)
 
Bahan Sirup:
150 gr gula aren
400 ml air
4 lembar daun pandan
 
Bahan Lain:
Fresh milk
Teh hitam
Evaporated milk
Es batu
 
Langkah membuat Boba:
1. Masukkan gula aren dan air, masak hingga larut.
2. Masukkan 1/2 tepung ke dalam sirup, aduk rata, dan masak kembali hingga mengental
3. Uleni adonan dengan sisa tepung tapioka hingga merata, tipiskan dengan ketebalan 1/2cm
4. Potong adonan dan bentuk menjadi bulat dengan diameter kurang dari 1 cm. Kemudian saring agar tidak menyisakan banyak tepung
5. Rebus dalam 2 liter air hingga boba empuk
6. Angkat dan tiriskan
7. Masak kembali boba di campuran sirup gula aren hingga mendidih, pastikan boba matang 
 
Langkah membuat sirup gula aren:
Masak air dengan gula aren dan daun pandan hingga mendidih
 
Penyajian:
1. Masukkan boba ke dalam gelas
2. Tambahkan es batu
3. Masukkan fresh milk
4. Untuk milk tea, masukkan teh dan evaporated milk
recipe_en:
Super Chewy and Savory: Brown Sugar Boba Recipe

Usually, Boba is served as an add-on for drinks like Milk Tea, Thai Tea, or Latte. This time, I’m sharing how to make Brown Sugar Boba. It’s easy and delicious.

Brown Sugar Boba Recipe

Boba Ingredients:
200 g tapioca flour
100 g palm sugar
120 ml water (for the dough)
2L water (to cook the Boba)

Syrup Ingredients:
150 g palm sugar
400 ml water
4 Pandan leaves

Other Ingredients:
Fresh milk
Black tea
Evaporated milk
Ice cubes

Steps to make Boba:
1. Combine palm sugar and water, cook until dissolved.
2. Add half of the flour into the syrup and mix well. Cook once more until it thickens.
3. Knead the dough with the remaining tapioca flour until incorporated well. Roll to a thickness of 1/2 cm.
4. Cut the dough and roll into a round shape with a diameter less than 1 cm.
5. Boil in 2L of water until soft.
6. Drain and set aside.
7. Cook the Boba again in the Brown Sugar Syrup mix and bring to a boil. Make sure the Boba is cooked properly.

Steps to make Brown Sugar Syrup:
Combine water, palm sugar, and Pandan leaves. Bring to a boil.

Plating:
1. Add Boba into a glass.
2. Add some ice cubes.
3. Add the fresh milk.
4. For Milk Tea, add in the tea and evaporated milk.

title: Practical for Kids & Families! Salmon Mentai Rice Recipe [Restaurant Quality]
recipe_id:
Masakan Jepang adalah salah satu favoritku. Dari kecil aku cukup sering ikut keluarga ke Jepang untuk urusan kerjaan, sehingga sedikit banyak selera masakanku terpengaruh ke Japanese taste / style. Kali ini aku mau sharing resep Salmon Mentai Rice sesuai selera kesukaanku. Selamat mencoba ya dan jangan lupa tag foto recook-nya ke Instagram aku untuk direpost setiap hari Rabu.

Resep Salmon Mentai Rice

Bahan Nasi Chirashi:
3 porsi (1.5 cup beras mentah) nasi jepang atau beras + ketan 
4 sdm cuka beras 
2 sdt gula

Pelengkap: wortel tumis, jamur shitake tumis, dan inari (kulit tahu jepang)

10 pcs kani stick

Bahan Saus Mentai:

1 sdm cuka beras

1 bawang putih halus
Gula dan garam sesuai selera

3:08-3:09 "Nasi dan itu", itu yang dimaksud di sini adalah air.

LANGKAH:
1. Buat campuran chirashi / cuka
2. Masukkan campuran cuka ke nasi dan tambahkan sayuran
3. Buat saus mentai

recipe_en:
Salmon Mentai Rice Recipe: Healthy for Kids and Family, Yummy!

Japanese cuisine is one of my favorite foods. Since childhood, I've traveled to Japan quite often with family for work, so my cooking style tends to be influenced by Japanese taste / style. This time, I'm sharing a recipe for Salmon Mentai Rice the way I like to have it. Good luck trying this recipe and don't forget to tag my Instagram if you've recooked this recipe. I'll repost your picture every Wednesday.

Topics
02:02 : prepping the ingredients
05:56 : assembling
06:44 : start to torch
07:18 : the dish is ready to serve

Salmon Mentai Rice Recipe

Chirashi Rice ingredients:
3 serving (1.5 cup rice grain) Japanese rice or regular + glutinous rice
4 tbsp rice vinegar
2 tsp sugar
1 tsp dashi powder
2 tbsp soy sauce
Condiments: sautéed carrots, sautéed Shiitake mushrom, and Inari (Japanese tofu skin)

Topping ingredients:
150 g salmon
10 pcs kani stick
10 sheets nori
1 tbsp Tobiko / fish roe

Mentai Sauce ingredients:
6 tbsp mayonnaise
1 tbsp rice vinegar
2 tbsp chili sauce
2 tbsp Tobiko / fish roe
1/2 tsp chili powder
Grated garlic
Salt and sugar, to taste

STEPS:
1. Make the Chirashi / vinegar mix.
2. Add the vinegar mix into the rice and add the vegetables in.
3. Make the Mentai sauce.
4. Slice the salmon.
5. Add the rice, nori, and toppings to a pan. Assemble neatly.
6. Torch the salmon.
7. Pour the Mentai sauce and torch it again.
8. Ready to serve.
